Matthew1:1 Li‸ chi lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ leh Daˍviˆ ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ caˉ peuˬ teˇ caˉ ya‸ la ve awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:2 Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Iˉcaˆ yoˬ. Iˉcaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yaˍkoˆ yoˬ. Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ leh yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma Taˍmaˍ lo paw la ve Hpaˍrehˆ leh Seˍraˆ yoˬ. Hpaˍrehˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Heˍsaˍronˍ yoˬ. Heˍsaˍronˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍranˍ yoˬ. Aˍranˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍmiˆnaˍdaˆ yoˬ. Aˍmiˆnaˍdaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Naˍsonˍ yoˬ. Naˍsonˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Saˍlaˍmonˍ yoˬ. Saˍlaˍmonˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma Raˍhkaˆ lo paw la ve Bawˇzaˆ yoˬ. Bawˇzaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma Ruˉhtaˆ lo paw la ve Awˇbehˆ yoˬ. Awˇbehˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yeˍsehˇ yoˬ. Yeˍsehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Daˍviˆ yoˬ." 
Matthew1:3 Daˍviˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, Uˇriˇya‸ ve awˬ miˇ ma hpeh‸ jaw ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lo paw la ve Sawˉla‸monˍ yoˬ. Sawˉla‸monˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Rawˇbaoˍ yoˬ. Rawˇbaoˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍbiˉya‸ yoˬ. Aˍbiˉya‸ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍsaˆ yoˬ. Aˍsaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yawˇsaˍhpaˆ yoˬ. Yawˇsaˍhpaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yaˍhawˇranˍ yoˬ. Yaˍhawˇranˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Awˇsiˆ yoˬ. Awˇsiˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yoˇtanˍ yoˬ. Yoˇtanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍhkaˆ yoˬ, Aˍhkaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Heˍsaˍkiˆ yoˬ. Heˍsaˍkiˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Maˍnaˍseˍ yoˬ. Maˍnaˍseˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍmonˍ yoˬ. Aˍmonˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yoˇsiˆ yoˬ. Yoˇsiˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Baˍbuˍlonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo shu yuˬ kʼai ve teˇ co-e htaˇ, Yeˍhkawˇniˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui yoˬ." 
Matthew1:4 Baˍbuˍlonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo shu yawˇ hui hta‸ yuˬ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍhkawˇniˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Saˍlaˍteˍlaˆ yoˬ. Saˍlaˍteˍlaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Seˍruˇbeˍlaˆ yoˬ. Seˍruˇbeˍlaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍbiˉoˆ yoˬ. Aˍbiˉoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Eˇlaˍkenˍ yoˬ. Eˇlaˍkenˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍcawˍ yoˬ. Aˍcawˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Saˍdoˆ yoˬ. Saˍdoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Aˍhkeˍ yoˬ. Aˍhkeˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Eˇliˍoˆ yoˬ. Eˇliˍoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Eˇlaˍsaˍ yoˬ. Eˇlaˍsaˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Maˍhtanˍ yoˬ. Maˍhtanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ Yaˍkoˆ yoˬ. Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ lehˬ, Maˍriˆ ve awˬ hpawˇ Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ. Maˍriˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ paw la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:5 Hkʼe te leh, Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh Daˍviˆ ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ, teˇ chi awˇ co-e cawˬ ve yoˬ. Daˍviˆ hta‸ tanˬ leh Baˍbuˍlonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo shu yuˬ kʼai ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ, teˇ chi awˇ co-e cawˬ ve yoˬ. Baˍbuˍlonˍ mvuhˇ miˬ lo shu yuˬ kʼai ve hta‸ tanˬ leh Hkri‸ ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ, teˇ chi awˇ co-e cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:6 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ paw la ve awˬ lawn lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ lehˬ, Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ heuˆ tuˬ ka ti‸ te da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ maˇ heuˆ da‸ sheˍ htaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw Maˍriˆ yaˇ hu la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:7 Yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh Maˍriˆ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ maˇ luˬ piˇ gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ ta‸ iˉ baˬ taˉ tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:8 Yawˇ chi hkʼe dawˇ nyi chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Daˍviˆ ve yaˇ Yoˇseh‸-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ miˇ ma Maˍriˆ hta‸ heuˆ tuˬ taˇ dawˇ haˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ yaˇ hu ve lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Matthew1:9 Yawˇ yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ paw la tuˬ leh, nawˬ yawˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ gʼa meh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:10 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:11 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ. Yaˇ miˇ haˉ teˇ gʼaˇ yaˇ hu la leh yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ paw la tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ Eˇmaˍno-eˍlaˆ meh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. (Eˇmaˍno-eˍlaˆ kʼoˆ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Matthew1:12 Yoˇseh‸ zuh‸ nawˇ la htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ heuˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew1:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ paˍ maˇ paw la sheˍ ve ceh ceh yawˇ geh maˇ zuh‸. Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve paw la leh yawˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:1 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ Behˍ lehˍhehnˍvenˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ paw la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo tu la leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:2 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Paw la peuˬ ve Yuˇda‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hkʼaˬ lo le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo yawˇ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ ngaˬ hui laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:3 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ tawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ka‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peuˍeˬ ka‸ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:4 Yuˇda‸ chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ leh, Hkri‸ hkʼaˬ lo paw la tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:5 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ Behˍlehˍhehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe," 
Matthew2:6 Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ Behˍlehˍhehnˍ venˇ-oˬ, Yuˇda‸ jawˇmawˇ hui ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ lehˬ shu a‸ kehˉ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ i ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hta‸ sheh kʼai tuˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:7 Oˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hui hta‸ ta‸ iˉ kuˬ yuˬ leh, meu‸ keu shiˍ tawˆ la ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:8 Hkʼe te leh, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui kʼai leh yaˇ paˍ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ca nyi-o. Yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui tuˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ Behˍlehˍhehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:9 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai leh, yaˇ paˍ ehˉ chehˇ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gaˬ htaˇ, jehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:10 Meu‸ keu shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ maˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:11 Yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ, awˬ e Maˍriˆ geh yaˇ paˍ ehˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hui boˆ sheˬ leh yaˇ paˍ ehˉ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yuˬ laˬ taˍ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ tawˆ leh, shi, lawˇbanˍ, leh muˇraˍ, la‸ shawnˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:12 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ geh maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ, zuh‸ maˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ya‸ kʼaw teˇ caˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:13 Yawˇ hui kʼo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, zuh‸ maˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tu loˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ shiˍ veu leh Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo hpaw-e loˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ca tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:14 Oˇ htaˇ Yoˇseh‸ tu leh, yaˇ ehˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ shiˍ veu leh Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:15 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la tuˬ ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kuˬ yuˬ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:16 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hui yawˇ hta‸ heˍ laˇ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi peuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ yawˇ shawˍ nyi leh, Behˍlehˍhehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo leh awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo hkʼa chehˇ ve a sha‸ nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ te leh awˬ hawˉ ve hawˉ hkʼaˆ paˍ ehˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ca tiˇ pehˍ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:17 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Yeˍraˍmiˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:18 Raˍmaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo, paˆ hawˬ kehˇ hawˬ ve awˬ hkawˇ leh dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Raˍhkeˍlaˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw hawˬ chehˇ leh, yawˇ yaˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ ve pa taw, shu yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma sha la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:19 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ suh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yoˇseh‸ Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ zuh‸ maˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew2:20 Tu loˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ shiˍ veu leh Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼo‸-e loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve chaw hui suh peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:21 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ tu leh, yaˇ ehˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Aˍhkeˍlaˆ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ pa jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn Yoˇseh‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ kawˆ leh oˇ kaˬ lo kʼo‸-e maˇ haˆ. Zuh‸ maˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ leh, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼai leh, Naˍzaˍrehˆ meh ve venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew2:23 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ hta‸ Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:1 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew3:2 Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve pa taw, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ loˬ teh‸, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo yawˇ bon maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:3 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve lehˬ, Heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu taˍ loˬ. Yawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ te-o, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:4 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, kaˍlaˍoˆ awˬ mvuh te taˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, yawˇ ve caw‸ cehˍ nyi lo shaˍ guiˬ haˍ pi caˆ tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve caˇ tuˬ lehˬ, paˉ ce‸ leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw ve pehˇ gʼuiˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew3:5 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma awˬ paˇ awˬ kui hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:6 Yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ leh, Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:7 Baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ tuˬ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ leh Saˍduˆkehˇ chaw hui maˇ maˇ yawˇ geh laˬ ve hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Vuiˬ haiˬ awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, gaˬ la tuˬ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ, a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve le." 
Matthew3:8 Venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la-o. 
Matthew3:9 Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw taˇ ca dawˇ, taˇ ca kʼoˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ haˉ pui shiˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tawˆ la hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:10 Chi beu‸ ka‸, suhˆ cehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ lo ceˉ ceˇ teh taˍ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ ve awˬ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ le le hta‸ htu baˬ leh aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:11 Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve awˬ pon, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkuiˉ nuˆ hta‸ yuˬ shi tuˬ ve ceh ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew3:12 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo caˬ hpeuˇ tuˬ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve caˬ jaw‸ kuiˬ hta‸ kehˬ lehˍ shiˆ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˬ shiˍ hta‸ caˬ ciˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaw pfuhˇ keu tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, caˬ cuˉ hta‸ maˇ suh puiˉ ve aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˉ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:13 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw tawˆ la leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma lo Yoˇhanˬ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:14 Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ geh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ngaˬ geh laˬ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:15 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˆ ve, Chi beu‸ a ciˉ te laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ liˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ biˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui te cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:16 Yeˍsuˆ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ leh iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, aˉ pui kʼaˍ hkʼe ya‸ la leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo mui la ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew3:17 Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:1 Oˇ htaˇ, neˇhaiˬ beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:2 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˇ chi nyi awˇ chi haˉ caˇ tuˬ maˇ caˇ leh chehˇ peuˬ heh‸, awˍ meu‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:3 Oˇ htaˇ beˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve kʼo, haˉ pui shiˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkaoˍmonˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:4 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw yaˇ lehˬ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ gʼa te‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ le le hta‸ pa taw gʼa te‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:5 Oˇ htaˇ neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ da‸ kehˬ ve venˇ lo shiˍ kʼai leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew4:6 Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve kʼo, pawˆ ce hkʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve hkui sheh haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa heuˆ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:7 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw teˇ kaˬ bvuh‸ taˍ sheˍ ve lehˬ, Nawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa beˬ maˇ gʼa lawˇ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:8 Teˇ pawˆ neˇhaiˬ yawˇ hta‸ mvuh jaˇ ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ yawˇ hta‸ maw piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew4:9 Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui laˇ ve kʼo, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:10 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Saˍtanˍ-oˬ, kʼai loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Nawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ceh tiˉ nawˬ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui leh, yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ ceh tiˉ nawˬ gʼa te ve yoˬ, teh‸ li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:11 Oˇ htaˇ neˇhaiˬ yawˇ geh tawˆ kʼai leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:12 Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ shu hpeh yuˬ ve awˬ lawn Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:13 Yawˇ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai leh, Zaˍbuˆlonˍ leh Naˍtaˍliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ kaˍ lo, gʼuiˬ po paˇ cawˬ ve Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ hkʼaw gaˬ leh oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:14 Chi lehˬ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ biˇ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:15 Zaˍbuˆlonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Naˍtaˍliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo kʼai ve ya‸ kʼaw, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui chehˇ kuiˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ-oˬ," 
Matthew4:16 naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ba jaˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Suh ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh suh ve aˉ gʼuiˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon awˬ gʼeuˆ ba tawˆ la peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:17 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ka‸ te leh, Yeˍsuˆ bon tanˬ maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve pa taw, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ loˬ teh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:18 Gaˍliˍlehˇ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo Yeˍsuˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi nyiˇ gʼaˇ, gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo geu‸ hpehˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ ngaˇ ca paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:19 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ chaw ca shehˍ hpaˇ te tcuh laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:20 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ geu‸ hta‸ teh taˉ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Matthew4:21 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼaw‸ kʼai htaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi nyiˇ gʼaˇ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ Yaˍkoˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, awˬ pa Zeˍbeˍdehˇ geh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw yawˇ hui ve geu‸ gu tawˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:22 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ pa hta‸ teh taˉ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:23 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai leh yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ htawˇ, teˇ kaˬ le le lo ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve a naˍ teˇ ceuˬ le le leh naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:24 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a naˍ laiˉ ceuˬ naˬ chehˇ gawˬ chehˇ ve chaw, neˇ geh ve chaw, paw‸ hpeuˆ ve chaw, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw, chaw naˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ geh yuˬ laˬ leh yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew4:25 Hkʼe te leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ, Deˍkaˍpawˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo laˬ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:1 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ mui taˍ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:2 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew5:3 Nyi ma hkʼaw haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:4 Dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi ma sha la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:5 Nyi ma nuˇ nuˇ nehˬ nehˬ cawˬ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ lehˬ yawˇ hui gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ shinˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:6 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ meu‸ ve kaˆ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui gʼa caˇ bvuhˆ dawˬ bvuhˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:7 Ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hta‸ shu kʼaw‸ ha kʼaˉ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:8 Nyi ma hkʼaw hpu ve kehˬ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:9 Cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ tuˬ te ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:10 Hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ te ve pa taw fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:11 Ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw shu nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve, fawˉ mehˍ ve, heˍ leh nawˬ hui awˬ lawn haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:12 Ha lehˬ ve hkʼa biˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui ve la‸ shawnˍ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ tawˆ la peuˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ htawˇ shu oˇ hkʼe te fawˉ mehˍ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:13 Nawˬ hui lehˬ miˬguiˬ ve aˉ leh‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Aˉ leh‸ lehˬ mehˬ ve pehˆ kʼai peuˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼaw‸ mehˬ la hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Aˉ leh‸ oˇ ve awˬ bon maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ ve pa taw, shu yuˬ baˬ leh, chaw yaˇ naˆ toˇ ve ceh tiˉ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:14 Nawˬ hui lehˬ miˬguiˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve venˇ hta‸ faˉ taˍ maˇ gʼa. 
Matthew5:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, kawˆ faiˇ tuˉ leh hkʼawˍ lawˇ tcuhˍ mvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ te jaw. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, mvuh kuiˬ lo taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:16 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve naw hui ve Awˬ pa hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:17 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve teh‸ taˇ dawˇ. Te luˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Te biˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew5:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, miˬguiˬ mvuhˇ naw ma maˇ luˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, hkʼa peu-eˬ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo li‸ mehˆ ehˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ maiˉ ehˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ maˬ ka‸ maˇ luˬ maˇ mehˉ taˬ." 
Matthew5:19 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve teˇ maˬ maˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to ka‸ maˇ te leh, shu ka‸ maˇ te tuˬ maˍ piˇ ve chaw lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo shu a‸ kehˉ i ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ to ka‸ te leh, shu ka‸ te tuˬ maˍ piˇ ve chaw lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo uiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui a‸ kehˉ nawˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ leuˉ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e taˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:21 Aˬ sho-eˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. Shu hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ. Shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve chaw lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ hkeu ve chaw lehˬ, moˬ naˆ ho‸ aˬ miˍ hkʼaw gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:23 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ ve tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ tanˇ kuiˬ lo yuˬ laˬ htaˇ, nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ dawˇ nawˇ ve kʼo," 
Matthew5:24 tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ teh taˉ leh kʼo‸-e sheˍ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ nawˬ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ taˉ peuˬ heh‸, kʼaw‸ laˬ leh tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tanˇ loˬ." 
Matthew5:25 Nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ te ve chaw geh teˇ geh shaˉ nanˉ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, nawˬ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ tuˬ haˆ haˆ te loˬ. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ suhˉ taˆ shehˍ hpaˇ la‸ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Suhˉ taˆ shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ nawˬ hta‸ htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ la‸ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh, nawˬ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw keu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew5:26 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, peh‸ shanˍ awˬ leh teˇ peh‸ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ shaiˍ peuˬ ve ceh ceh, htawnˍ hkʼaw lo nawˬ maˇ gʼa tawˆ kʼai taˬ." 
Matthew5:27 Nawˬ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ maˇ gʼa te teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. 
Matthew5:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yaˇ miˇ hta‸ nyi leh peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te peuˬ." 
Matthew5:29 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ la‸ sha paˉ ve mehˆ shiˍ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, mehˆ shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼehˉ baˬ sheˍ. Awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ luˬ kʼai ve lehˬ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:30 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, la‸ sha paˉ ve la‸ sheh htawˇ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, la‸ sheh oˇ ve hta‸ tawˆ baˬ-o‸. Awˬ to teˇ to hkʼa peu-eˬ moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ luˬ kʼai ve lehˬ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:31 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ ve kʼo, baˬ da‸ ve li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew5:32 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ lawn hta‸ pa taw a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te tcuh ve yoˬ. Shu baˬ taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve chaw htawˇ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:33 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ. Nawˬ hkanˍ taˍ ve hkʼe Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa te ve yoˬ teh‸, aˬ sho-eˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew5:34 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ hkanˍ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ cuˇ leh taˇ hkanˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve kʼaw jaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:35 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh taˇ hkanˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve hkui sheh taˍ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh taˇ hkanˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lonˉ ve venˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:36 Nawˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh taˇ hkanˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ uˉ hkeh mvuh teˇ mvuh hpu la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, naˆ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ te maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew5:37 Nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yoˬ kʼo yoˬ, maˇ heˆ kʼo maˇ heˆ teh‸ ceh tiˉ kʼoˆ loˬ. Chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:38 Shu nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ teˇ shiˍ hta‸ te luˬ laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ teˇ shiˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te luˬ piˇ leh, shu nawˬ ve ciˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ te hkʼeh‸ laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve ciˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te hkʼeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew5:39 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ laˇ ve chaw hta‸ taˇ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ. Nawˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ mehˆ hpfuhˇ diˬ hta‸ shu hta laˇ ve kʼo, la‸ mehˍ paˉ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ hkʼo piˇ sheˍ." 
Matthew5:40 Shu nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ te leh aˉ po‸ yuˬ gaˇ ve kʼo, aˉ po‸ lonˉ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ piˇ sheˍ." 
Matthew5:41 Shu nawˬ hta‸ nyiˉ leh ya‸ kʼaw teˇ laˆ kʼai tcuh laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ geh nyiˇ laˆ kʼai-o." 
Matthew5:42 Lawˬ ve chaw hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Chiˇ gaˇ ngaˍ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ htawˇ, taˇ hpfuhˆ kʼai." 
Matthew5:43 A shu yawˇ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ leh, a shu yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ hta‸ canˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew5:44 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon bon lawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew5:45 Nawˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui Awˬ pa ve yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Aw lawn kʼo, chaw haiˬ leh chaw da‸ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ ve mvuhˇ nyi hta‸ yawˇ tawˆ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve chaw leh maˇ hteˇ ve chaw awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew5:46 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ ceh kʼaw‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ hui ka‸ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew5:47 Nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ceh awˬ chawˇ te leh na‸ uˉ te da‸ ve kʼo, shu te ve a‸ kehˉ nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma te leuˉ ve le. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui ka‸ chi hkʼe te ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew5:48 Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa biˇ ve hkʼa shuˍshuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ biˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew6:1 Shu gʼa mawˬ tuˬ awˬ pon chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ da‸ ve kanˉ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve Awˬ pa geh nawˬ awˬ bon maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew6:2 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ shu hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui hkʼe taˇ te. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, shu chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh laˇ tuˬ, bon yehˬ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, behˬ heh ma meuˆ tcuh ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
Matthew6:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ shu hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, shu maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, nawˬ la‸ sha paˉ te ve kanˉ la‸ mehˍ paˉ hta‸ taˇ shiˍ piˇ" 
Matthew6:4 Shu maˇ mawˬ kuiˬ lo mawˬ puiˉ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:5 Nawˬ bon lawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui hkʼe taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ shu gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, bon yehˬ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, ya‸ kʼaw ceh lo maˇ kʼoˆ, huˉ taˍ leh bon lawˬ gaˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
Matthew6:6 Nawˬ bon lawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ ve bawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh yehˬ miˉ hta‸ hoˆ peuˬ htaˇ heh‸, baˬ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa hta‸ lawˬ-o‸. Baˬ kuiˬ lo mawˬ puiˉ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:7 Nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hkʼe taˇ te. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ peuˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui tawˇ maˇ maˇ yaw ve pa taw yawˇ hui bon lawˬ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew6:8 Yawˇ hui hkʼe taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ lawˬ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa shiˍ taˍ peuˬ." 
Matthew6:9 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui bon chi hkʼe lawˬ-o‸. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ yawˆ yan te piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
Matthew6:10 Nawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ ve a loˍ biˇ ve hkʼe, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ htawˇ biˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew6:11 Ya‸ nyi loˍ ve caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, ya‸ nyi ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew6:12 Shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ te ya‸ laˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ htawˇ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew6:13 Venˇbaˆ beˬ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ngaˬ hui hta‸ taˇ kʼai piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇmiˬ,kanˇ paˆ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ nawˬ ve yoˬ. A menˬ." 
Matthew6:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui shu ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ hta‸ htawˇ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ shu ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ hpehˇ hkʼa kʼo, nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ hpehˇ." 
Matthew6:16 Nawˬ hui caˇ tuˬ ce ve teˇ yanˇ, heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui hkʼe mehˆ hpfuhˇ nawˍ tiˆ taˇ te. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce ve hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, yawˇ hui mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi maˇ sha tuˬ te taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
Matthew6:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ caˇ tuˬ ce htaˇ, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ naˍ manˇ shehˍ leh mehˆ hpfuhˇ tsuhˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew6:18 Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui caˇ tuˬ ce ve hta‸ shu maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu maˇ mawˬ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, shu maˇ mawˬ kuiˬ lo mawˬ puiˉ ve nawˬ ve Awˬ pa htawˇ, nawˬ hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:19 Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ taˇ shaw hpoˆ taˍ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo shaw hpoˆ ve kʼo, yawˇ taˆ puiˉ ve, pfuhˇ caˇ puiˉ ve leh chaw hkʼawˇ hkʼawˇ yuˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew6:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ shaw hpoˆ taˍ loˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ maˇ taˆ puiˉ, pfuhˇ maˇ caˇ puiˉ leh chaw hkʼawˇ hkʼawˇ yuˬ maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew6:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ shaw hpoˆ taˍ ve teˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ ve nyi ma htawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:22 Mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, awˬ to ve kawˆ faiˇ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, mehˆ shiˍ nyi leh shu hta‸ maˇ chaweh piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ hkʼa deh‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew6:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ mehˆ shiˍ nyi leh maˇ piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ naˆ ho‸ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ naˆ ho‸ kʼai ve kʼo, naˆ ho‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew6:24 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ jawˇmawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ te maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ canˇ kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ ka‸, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ ve awˬ ceˬ ka‸, teˇ pawˆ tiˉ teˇ geh te maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew6:25 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gʼa caˇ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ, nawˬ hui a sha‸ te‸ ve awˬ pon taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gʼa veu‸ gʼa deh tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ to awˬ pon ka‸ taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. A sha‸ te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ a‸ kehˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ leh, awˬ to htawˇ veu‸ kʼaˇ a‸ kehˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew6:26 Mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ toˇ ve ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi-o. Yawˇ hui lehˬ caˬ maˇ ti, caˬ maˇ gʼeu‸ leh caˬ ciˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo caˬ shiˍ maˇ pfuhˇ keu. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˆ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew6:27 Dawˇ hkiˉ ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ teˇ jaˆ kʼaw‸ zuhˬ la tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ te gʼa ve le." 
Matthew6:28 Veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ pon nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te dawˇ hkiˉ ve le. Heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve shiˍ ya‸ veˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te uiˍ la ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o. Awˬ cehˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, kanˉ maˇ te, hkeh ka‸ maˇ gʼawˬ." 
Matthew6:29 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve jawˇmawˇ Sawˉla‸monˍ lehˬ, awˬ cehˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ cehˬ hkʼe taw ka‸ maˇ gʼa veu‸ maˇ gʼa deh jaw teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew6:30 Hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ya‸ nyi te‸ chehˇ leh shawˉ pawˍ aˬ miˍ hkʼaw baˬ keu tuˬ ve mvuh‸ cehˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha chi taw taw feuˉ piˇ deh piˇ ve kʼo, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ feuˉ laˇ deh laˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew6:31 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa caˇ tuˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa dawˬ tuˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa veu‸ gʼa deh tuˬ, taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ." 
Matthew6:32 Awˬ lawn kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui loˍ ve hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew6:33 Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh yawˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ ca-o. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ htehˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew6:34 Hkʼe te leh, shawˉ pawˍ awˬ pon taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shawˉ pawˍ awˬ pon shawˉ pawˍ dawˇ hkiˉ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ nyi pon teˇ nyi dawˇ haˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve lehˬ law‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:1 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa taˍ tuˬ, nawˬ hui shu hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˇ taˍ." 
Matthew7:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui shu hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ kʼaw‸ taˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui shu hta‸ tsuh piˇ kawˬ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ tsuh laˇ kawˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:3 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve toˉ la‸ lonˉ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ nyi leh, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ nawˬ nyi chehˇ ve le." 
Matthew7:4 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo toˉ la‸ lonˉ cawˬ taˍ ve ka‸, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸, Nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ tawˆ laˇ shaˍ teh‸ ca kʼoˆ ve le." 
Matthew7:5 Heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui-oˬ, nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve toˉ la‸ lonˉ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ yuˬ tawˆ sheˍ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw cawˬ taˍ ve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yuˬ tawˆ tuˬ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ mawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:6 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpuiˇ hta‸ taˇ piˇ. Piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ va‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ taˇ ca baˬ teh taˍ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui naˆ taˍ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ che‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:7 Lawˬ loˬ. Lawˬ kʼo gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Ca loˬ. Ca kʼo mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ hta‸ htawˆ loˬ. Htawˆ kʼo hpaw laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew7:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, lawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Ca ve chaw htawˇ, mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ hta‸ htawˆ ve chaw awˬ pon htawˇ, yehˬ miˉ hpaw laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:9 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ caˇ tuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, haˉ pui shiˍ yuˬ piˇ tuˬ laˇ." 
Matthew7:10 Ngaˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, vuiˬ hta‸ yuˬ piˇ tuˬ laˇ." 
Matthew7:11 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw haiˬ hpeh‸ ve ka‸ a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ hta‸ da‸ ve mawˇ piˇ hkawˇ shiˍ ve kʼo, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa geh hkʼa lawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew7:12 Hkʼe te leh, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ te laˇ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui shu hta‸ oˇ hkʼe te piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkʼaˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:13 Maˇ kʼoˍ ve yehˬ miˉ hta‸ lo‸-e loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, luˬ kuiˬ lo kʼai ve ya‸ kʼaw lehˬ kʼehˬ jaˇ leh, yehˬ miˉ hpe‸ ka‸ kʼoˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo lo‸-e ve chaw ka‸ maˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a sha‸ te‸ kuiˬ lo lo‸-e ve yehˬmiˉhpe‸ lehˬ, maˇ kʼoˍ leh, ya‸ kʼaw ka‸ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ca mawˬ leh lo‸-e ve chaw a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:15 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ yawˇ hui haiˬ jaˇ ve veˬ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, yawˬ awˬ guiˬ kʼuˉ hta‸ deh leh nawˬ hui geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:16 Yawˇ hui ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ nyi kʼo, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Aˉ chuˇ cehˬ lo a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa shaˉ jaw laˇ. Aˉ chuˇ buiˇ lo maˉ nawˆ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa shaˉ jaw laˇ." 
Matthew7:17 Da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, da‸ ve aw shiˍ naw‸ ve yoˬ. Maˇ da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, maˇ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:18 Da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, maˇ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ puiˉ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, da‸ve awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ puiˉ." 
Matthew7:19 Da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ ve awˬ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ le le hta‸ htu baˬ leh aˬ miˍ hkʼaw baˬ keu ve yoˬ. 
Matthew7:20 Hkʼe te leh chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ nyi kʼo, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:21 Ngaˬ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ teh‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼa le le lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve chaw ceh tiˉ gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:22 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ nawˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo bon maˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Nawˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ haiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ leh, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve laiˉ ceuˬ te peuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, chaw maˇ maˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:23 Yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw hui-oˬ, ngaˬ geh tawˆ kʼai loˬ teh‸, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew7:24 Ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa kaˇ leh na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, haˉ pui hkʼoˆ lo yehˬ te ve cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:25 Mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ leh iˉ kaˆ uiˍ taˆ la ve, mvuhˇ haw meuˆ leh yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ htinˍ ve htawˇ, haˉ pui hkʼoˆ lo te taˍ ve pa taw, yehˬ oˇ ve maˇ paiˍ." 
Matthew7:26 Ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, shehˇ shiˍ hkʼoˆ yehˬ te ve cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:27 Mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ leh iˉ kaˆ uiˍ taˆ la ve, mvuhˇ haw meuˆ leh yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ htinˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yehˬ oˇ ve paiˍ ve yoˬ. Paiˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:28 Yeˍsuˆ bon maˍ peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew7:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui hkʼe yawˇ maˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˇ paˆ cawˬ paˍ hkʼe yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:1 Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:2 Oˇ htaˇ, hkiˬ tu‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ te gaˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ nawˬ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:3 Yeˍsuˆ la‸ sheh che leh yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ te gaˇ ve yoˬ. Da‸ la kehˬ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ hkiˬ tu‸ a naˍ mehˉ kʼai leh, yawˇ da‸ la kehˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:4 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ lawn chi chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ hto piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kʼai leh paw hkuˇ hta‸ nawˬ awˬ to ca maw piˇ-oˆ. Shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Moˉseˍ awˬ liˇ teh taˍ ve hkʼe tanˇ tuˬ ca tanˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:5 Yeˍsuˆ Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew8:6 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh leh aˉ hkʼaw lo zuh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:7 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:8 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ poˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve yehˬ hkʼaw nawˬ lo‸ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ceh tiˉ yaw ve ka‸, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ na-e la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew8:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ shu ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ leh, ngaˬ awˬ hawˉ lo ka‸ ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ paˍ hta‸ htawˇ, Chi hta‸ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ te ve yoˬ teh‸, ma‸ poˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:10 Tawˇ chi hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ yawˇ anˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Iˉsaˍ-reˍlaˆ chaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸ chi taw taw yonˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa mawˬ jaw sheˍ." 
Matthew8:11 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ laˬ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍbraˍhanˍ, Iˉcaˆ, Yaˍkoˆ hui geh hkʼa geh gʼa mui caˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew8:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ naˆ ho‸ kuiˬ lo yuˬ baˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:13 Yeˍsuˆ ma‸ poˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:14 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ awˬ miˇ ma ve awˬ e kaˆ naˬ leh zuh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:15 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ leh, kaˆ naˬ ve na-e la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ tu leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:16 Mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la htaˇ, neˇ geh ve chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ shu Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ laˬ leh, yawˇ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ceh tiˉ yaw leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw naˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:17 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, Yawˇ awˬ to ngaˬ hui ve gʼaˇ nuˇ shaˉ nuˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ taˆ leh, ngaˬ hui ve naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ pfuhˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:18 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo hkanˍ kʼai-a veuˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:19 Oˇ htaˇ li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hkʼaˇ suh ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:20 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve, Heh hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ kʼoˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ ve ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, zuh‸ kuiˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ taˍ kuiˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:21 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ pa hta‸ awˉ lawˉ ca tuˍ piˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ a ciˉ pe‸ laˇ sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:22 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸. Chaw suh teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui chaw suh hta‸ tuˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:23 Yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:24 Oˇ htaˇ, gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ la ve pa taw, gʼuiˬ baˇ teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼa beh hkʼa beh kʼai chehˇ htawˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:25 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca nawˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hui gʼa luˬ la yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:26 Yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te kawˆ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ tu la leh, mvuhˇ haw leh gʼuiˬ po hta‸ deˇ piˇ htaˇ, ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:27 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ anˇ jaˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw le. Mvuhˇ haw leh gʼuiˬ po ka‸ yawˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve law teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:28 Gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ Gaˍdaˍraˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, chaw tuˍ hpfuh lo tawˆ la ve neˇ geh ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ caˬ jaˇ ve pa taw, ya‸ kʼaw oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kʼai maˇ hpeh‸." 
Matthew8:29 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ka‸ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ tuˬ nawˬ laˬ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:30 Oˇ teˇ hkui yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ vuiˇ ve teˇ kaˬ lo va‸ teˇ moˍ lonˉ kʼaˆ caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew8:31 Hkʼe te leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ laˇ ve kʼo, va‸ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ lo‸-e tcuh laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:32 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸, Kʼai loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui tawˆ-e leh, va‸ awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, va‸ oˇ ve teˇ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ miˬ haˍ kuiˬ lo gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼuiˇ ya‸-e leh, gʼuiˬ po hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh kʼa suh peuˬ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:33 Va‸ hawˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaw-e leh venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Hkʼa hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, neˇ geh ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn yawˇ hui kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew8:34 Venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:1 Yeˍsuˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ kʼaw‸ ciˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, yawˇ ve venˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:2 Oˇ htaˇ, zuh‸ kuiˬ hkʼoˆ zuh‸ chehˇ ve hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh taˆ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:3 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Chi hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:4 Yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo maˇ da‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ chehˇ ve le." 
Matthew9:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ a ciˉ kʼoˆ piˇ sha le. Nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Tu leh ya‸ kʼaw toˇ kʼai loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ." 
Matthew9:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ leh, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tu-o. Nawˬ ve zuh‸ kuiˬ hta‸ taˆ leh nawˬ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:7 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ tu leh yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. 
Matthew9:8 Oˇ ve hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kawˆ leh, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:9 Yeˍsuˆ tu leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw kuiˬ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mui chehˇ ve Ma‸htehˍ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tu leh Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:10 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ hpui lawˇ paˇ mui caˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui maˇ maˇ laˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh mui caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:11 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui ve saˍ la‸ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇ baˆ yaˇ hui geh hkʼa geh caˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:12 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chehˇ sha ve chaw hui naˆ tsuhˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ maˇ loˍ. Naˬ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ loˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:13 Ngaˬ lehˬ tanˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ heuˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ ca henˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ caˇ tuˬ ce chehˇ ve ka‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ caˇ tuˬ maˇ ce ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:15 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw hui geh chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ chehˇ tuˬ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui geh yuˬ hpaˆ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew9:16 Veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ hpa awˬ suhˉ a shu ka‸ maˇ nehˉ jaw. Oˇ hkʼe nehˉ ve kʼo, nehˉ taˍ ve hpa lehˬ veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ gʼawˬ leh leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ tzuh‸ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew9:17 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ piˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ a shu ka‸ maˇ keu jaw. Oˇ hkʼe keu ve kʼo, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui pe‸ hkoˇ ve pa taw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ sheˆ leh, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui htawˇ luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ suhˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo keu ve kʼo, nyiˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ maˇ luˬ kʼai teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:18 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi teˇ hkui ngaˬ ve yaˇ miˇ suh peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ laˬ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ piˇ la. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:19 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ tu leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:20 Oˇ htaˇ, teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ suhˍ ya‸ leh naˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ lo laˬ leh yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ awˬ caˍ hta‸ htawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ ceh ngaˬ gʼa htawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ na-e la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:22 Yeˍsuˆ hpfuhˆ nyi leh yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:23 Bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ gaˬ la htaˇ, lehˉ lu meuˆ ve chaw hui leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:24 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tawˆ kʼai loˬ. Yaˇ miˇ ehˉ chi suh ve maˇ heˆ, yawˇ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼuiˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:25 Yawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ tawˆ kʼai tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ lo‸-e leh yaˇ miˇ ehˉ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ yuˬ hkʼa leh, yaˇ miˇ ehˉ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:26 Hkʼe te leh awˬ lawn chi, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:27 Yeˍsuˆ tu leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, mehˆ cuˉ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ leh, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:28 Yawˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ, mehˆ cuˉ paˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi hta‸ ngaˬ te puiˉ ve teh‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ yonˍ ve laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yonˍ ve yoˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:29 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ htawˇ leh, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ yonˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:30 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:31 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tawˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw teˇ kaˬ le le lo Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:32 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tawˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, neˇ geh ve chaw kʼaˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:33 Neˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chaw kʼaˍ oˇ ve tawˇ yaw la ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ anˇ leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe ve teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:34 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ neˇ jawˇmawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:35 Oˇ htaˇ, venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo Yeˍsuˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. A naˍ teˇ ceuˬ le le leh naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:36 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˬ hawˉ paˍ maˇ cawˬ ve yawˬ hkʼe nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ jaˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:37 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Caˬ gʼeu‸ tuˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve ka‸, gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hui a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew9:38 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve caˬ gʼeu‸ kuiˬ lo caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ peu laˇ tuˬ, Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ bon lawˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:1 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ leh, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, a naˍ teˇ ceuˬ le le leh naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:2 Tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ meh lehˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ," 
Matthew10:3 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ leh Baˍhtawˇlaˍmehˇ, Htoˉma‸leh awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ Ma‸htehˍ, Aˍlaˍhpehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh Htaˍdehˇ," 
Matthew10:4 Hkaˍnaˍniˆ awˬ moˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw Siˉmonˍleh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ hui yoˬ." 
Matthew10:5 Tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼai tcuh leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo taˇ kʼai. Saˍmaˍriˆ venˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ taˇ lo‸-e." 
Matthew10:6 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˉ kʼai peuˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼai-o. 
Matthew10:7 Nawˬ hui kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ peuˬ teh‸, bon maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew10:8 Naˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ-oˆ. Suh ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ-oˆ. Hkiˬ tu‸ keuˆ ve chaw hui hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ-o‸. Nawˬ hui hkʼe leˇ gʼa ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu hta‸ hkʼe leˇ kʼaw‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew10:9 Nawˬ hui ve haˍ pi caˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo, hpu, shi, peh‸ shanˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ doˆ veu." 
Matthew10:10 Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ awˬ pon miˉ chaw leh aˉ po‸ nyiˇ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ka‸, hkuiˉ nuˆ leh juˇ fuiˍ hta‸ ka‸, taˇ yuˬ kʼai. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˉ te ve chaw lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hta‸ gʼa cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:11 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ venˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkʼaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui lo‸-e ve maˇ kʼoˆ, A shu keunˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi leh, hkʼaˆ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui tawˆ kʼai htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew10:12 Yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ bon na‸ piˇ-oˆ. 
Matthew10:13 Yehˬ oˇ ve keunˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ kaˬ lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ maˇ keunˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hui geh kʼaw‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:14 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ leh nawˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na ve kʼo, yehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, hkui taw kʼaw hta‸ ngawˉ taˍ ve je‸ meu-e hta‸ hpi baˬ taˉ-oˆ." 
Matthew10:15 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ, venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ Sawˉdonˍ leh Gawˇmawˇra‸ mvuhˇmiˬ a‸ kehˉ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:16 Nawˬ hui yawˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, veˬ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, vuiˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ leh, aˉ pui kʼaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu hta‸ maˇ ya‸ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew10:17 Chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ, jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ jaw‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:18 Ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ mvuhˇ miˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ leh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shu yuˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˆ suhˍ leh buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:19 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ gʼa yaw tuˬ taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ yaw shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ nawˬ hui maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui Awˬ pa ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ yaw tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:21 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ suh tuˬ chiˇ a‸ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ pa htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hpfuhˆ leh tiˇ pehˍ tcuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:22 Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ yeˬ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:23 Venˇ teˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu nawˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ venˇ lo hpaw-e loˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ venˇ teˇ hpaˍ lo nawˬ hui ca toˇ maˇ zuhˇ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:24 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve saˍ la‸ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ceˬ htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew10:25 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve saˍ la‸ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ ceˬ htawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, law‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ Beˍsaˍbuˇlaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ, maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew10:26 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ taˇ kawˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼa beh taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ hpeu‸ tawˆ la tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Hkʼa faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ, maˇ shiˍ la tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Matthew10:27 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ naˆ ho‸ kuiˬ lo hto laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ a yehˉ yehˉ hto laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e leh kuˬ maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew10:28 Awˬ to hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ gʼa ve htawˇ, co ha hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ taˇ kawˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, co ha hta‸ ka‸ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸ moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo te luˬ gʼa shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ kawˆ loˬ." 
Matthew10:29 Jaˍ meuˇ nyiˇ hkeh hta‸ peh‸ shanˍ teˇ peh‸ hawˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa a loˍ maˇ cawˬ kʼo, teˇ hkeh ka‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ ce." 
Matthew10:30 Nawˬ hui ve uˉ hkeh mvuh hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ htawˇ gʼaw nyi taˍ peuˬ. 
Matthew10:31 Hkʼe te leh, taˇ kawˆ. Jaˍ meuˇ teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ nawˬ hui awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:32 Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:33 Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:34 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ laˬ ve teh‸ taˇ dawˇ. Cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Aˉ htaw hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew10:35 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ paˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ pa, yaˇ miˇ leh yawˇ ve awˬ e, awˬ hkuiˇ ma leh yawˇ ve awˬ pi, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ cawˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:36 A shu yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:37 Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve a‸ kehˉ awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ keunˍ. Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve a‸ kehˉ yaˇ paˍ yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ keunˍ." 
Matthew10:38 A shu yawˇ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ laˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ keunˍ." 
Matthew10:39 A shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ gʼa ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ shonˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ pon a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ shonˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:40 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew10:41 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, shu yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve kʼo, ha‸ yuˬ shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ pa taw shu yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve kʼo, ha‸ yuˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew10:42 I ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ gawˬ teˇ kawˆ taw piˇ ve kʼo, taw piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ mehˉ taˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve." 
Matthew11:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca maˍ piˇ tuˬ leh bon maˍ tuˬ, yawˇ htawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:2 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Hkri‸ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh," 
Matthew11:3 Nawˬ lehˬ, laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa dawˇ law tuˬ sheˍ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:4 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa gʼa kaˇ hkʼa gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ ca hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew11:5 Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hui mehˆ mawˬ la ve, hkui luˬ ve chaw hui ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai ve, hkiˬ tu‸ keuˆ ve chaw hui da‸ la kehˬ la ve, naˍ paw pawˇ ve chaw hui naˍ paw kaˇ la ve, suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve leh, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui htawˇ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:6 Ngaˬ hta‸ nyi ma maˇ luˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:7 Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼo‸-e chehˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ lawn chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve le. Mvuhˇ haw meuˆ leh hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ te chehˇ ve lo cehˬ hta‸ laˇ." 
Matthew11:8 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ kʼai ve le. Nuˇ lehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw hta‸ laˇ. Nuˇ lehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw hui lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:9 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ kʼai ve le. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hta‸ laˇ. Yoˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hta‸ ca nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:10 Nyi loˬ. Nawˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo nawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu tuˬ ngaˬ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:11 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yaˇ miˇ geh hkʼa paw la ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ tawˆ la jaw. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ i ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:12 Baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ kanˉ te ve awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ hiˉ yuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Hiˉ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼaˇ hte‸ buiˆ da‸ leh lo‸-e chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ hto piˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:14 Nawˬ hui na yuˬ gaˇ ve kʼo, chaw chi lehˬ laˬ tuˬ ve Eˇliˇya‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:15 Kaˇ tuˬ naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw hkʼa deh‸ na-o. 
Matthew11:16 Chaw chi teˇ co-e hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma yuˬ leh gʼa tehˆ maˍ tuˬ le. 
Matthew11:17 Chaw chi teˇ co-e lehˬ, Nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui nawˍ meuˆ htawˇ nawˬ hui kʼaˍ maˇ hkʼeˆ. Ngaˬ hui paˆ hawˬ ve htawˇ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ haˍ, teh‸ tcuh hkʼaw mui taˍ leh awˬ chawˇ chawˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ laˬ leh, maˇ caˇ maˇ dawˬ ve pa taw, Yawˇ lehˬ neˇ geh ve chaw yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:19 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu laˬ leh caˇ ve dawˬ ve pa taw, Chaw chi lehˬ, caˇ leuˉ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ponˬ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te ve chaw yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ shu gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:20 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ kanˉ uiˍ ve maˇ maˇ te maˍ piˇ peuˬ ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ deˇ maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew11:21 Hkawˇraˍsenˍ venˇ-oˬ, nawˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Behˇsehˇdaˆ venˇ-oˬ, nawˬ htawˇ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo te peuˬ ve kanˉ uiˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Tuˇruˆ venˇ leh Siˉdonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo te ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ meh htuˉ pui hpa hta‸ veu‸ deh leh hkʼaw‸ laˉ hkaˆ pfuhˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew11:22 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ Tuˇruˆ venˇ leh Siˉdonˍ venˇ a‸ kehˉ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew11:23 Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma lo hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve laˇ. Nawˬ lehˬ, suh mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa gaˬ gʼa ya‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo te peuˬ ve kanˉ uiˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ Sawˉdonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo te ve hkʼe kʼo, venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ cawˬ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:24 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ Sawˉdonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ a‸ kehˉ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:25 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma miˬ naˆ ma hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ A pa-oˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw leh shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ faˉ taˍ leh, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:26 A pa-oˬ, chi lehˬ nawˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew11:27 Ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ pa maˇ heˆ kʼo, Yaˇ hpu hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Yaˇ hpu leh Yaˇ hpu hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ gaˇ ve chaw maˇ heˆ kʼo, Awˬ pa hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
Matthew11:28 Kanˉ te heuˬ leh mawˇ pfuhˇ hawˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ geh laˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ jehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew11:29 Ngaˬ ve taˆ tuˬ hta‸ taˆ leh ngaˬ geh henˇ yuˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ nyi ma nuˇ nuˇ nehˬ nehˬ cawˬ leh, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma htawˇ gʼaˇ gʼa jehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew11:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve taˆ tuˬ taˆ sha leh, ngaˬ ve mawˇ htawˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:1 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ shinˉ nyi htaˇ heh hkʼaw hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˍ meu‸ leh caˬ nu chehˆ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:2 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ mawˬ leh, Nyi-o, shinˉ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo te maˇ keunˍ te maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ te chehˇ ve law teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:3 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Daˍviˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˍ meu‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw leh laˇ." 
Matthew12:4 Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, yawˇ awˬ to ka‸ yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ caˇ maˇ keunˍ caˇ maˇ cawˇ ve, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ caˇ keunˍ caˇ cawˇ ve tanˇ taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew12:5 Peuˬ leh, shinˉ nyi htaˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ shinˉ nyi ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ." 
Matthew12:6 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, bon yehˬ lonˉ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:7 Tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew12:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, shinˉ nyi ve awˬ jawˇmawˇhpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:9 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. 
Matthew12:10 Oˇ kaˬ lo la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ, Shinˉ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ gu na-e piˇ cawˇ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:11 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˬ teˇ hkeh tiˉ cawˬ leh, shinˉ nyi htaˇ yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hkeh miˬ kʼoˍ hkʼaw ce lo‸-e ve kʼo, maˇ yuˬ tawˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ laˇ." 
Matthew12:12 Chaw yaˇ lehˬ, yawˬ a‸ kehˉ hkʼaˬ ma awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve le. Hkʼe te leh, shinˉ nyi htaˇ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:13 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw oˇ ve hta‸, Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh che hkʼa teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve la‸ sheh che ve teˇ yanˇ kʼaw‸ da‸ la leh, awˬ nu ve teˇ paˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:15 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw maˇ maˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:16 Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn shu hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaoˍ piˇ tuˬ,yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ tawˇ hkʼa deh‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:17 Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ," 
Matthew12:18 Ngaˬ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nyi-o. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh leh ha‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ chehˇ piˇ leh, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ lawn buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:19 Tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ maˇ te. Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa kaˇ" 
Matthew12:20 Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ maˇ gaˬ tcuh sheˍ ve ceh ceh, hteh kʼaˉ taˍ ve lo cehˬ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ te cheˆ. Kawˆ faiˇ awˬ caˆ mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ du du te to‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˉ." 
Matthew12:21 Yawˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui dawˇ law tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:22 Oˇ htaˇ neˇ geh taˍ ve, mehˆ cuˉ leh kʼaˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ chaw kʼaˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve pa taw, chaw kʼaˍ oˇ ve tawˇ yaw gʼa la leh, mehˆ mawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:23 Oˇ htaˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ anˇ jaˇ leh, Chi lehˬ Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu leh naˍ leˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:24 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ, neˇ jawˇmawˇ Beˍsaˍbuˇlaˆ hta‸ gʼaˇ va ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:25 Yawˇ hui dawˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Maˇ cawˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ le le luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ cawˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve venˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yehˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yeˬ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew12:26 Saˍtanˍ lehˬ, Saˍtanˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yeˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Matthew12:27 Ngaˬ lehˬ Beˍsaˍbuˇlaˆ hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, nawˬ hui ve yaˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve le. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ nawˬ hui ve suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ miˬ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Matthew12:29 Awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ maˇ hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh yawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ a shu hiˉ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ le. Awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hta‸ hpeh tiˍ taˍ peuˬ htaˇ heh‸, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:30 Ngaˬ hpawˇ maˇ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ ve canˇ paˍ hpawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh maˇ gʼawˆ hpoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, gʼawˆ baˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:31 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw yaˇ hui te ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ le le leh maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew12:32 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yaw ya‸ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ yaw ya‸ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ ka‸, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ ka‸, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Matthew12:33 Awˬ cehˬ da‸ ve kʼo, awˬ shiˍ htawˇ da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ loˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ cehˬ maˇ da‸ ve kʼo, awˬ shiˍ htawˇ maˇ da‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ shiˍ hta‸ pa taw awˬ cehˬ hta‸ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:34 Vuiˬ haiˬ awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui chaw haiˬ hpeh‸ ve pa taw da‸ ve tawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yaw hpeh‸ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, maw‸ kʼaw yaw tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:35 Da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ doˆ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ doˆ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:36 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ chaw yaˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkʼa yaw ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn gʼa kʼaw‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:37 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:38 Oˇ htaˇ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ te maˍ laˇ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui mawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:39 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Haiˬ leh te ya‸ puiˉ ve chaw chi teˇ co lehˬ, awˬ heˆ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Tcuh kaˍ paˍ Yoˇnaˆ ve awˬ heˆ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ chaw chi teˇ co hta‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ." 
Matthew12:40 Yoˇnaˆ lehˬ, ngaˇ lonˉ gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shehˆ nyi shehˆ haˉ gʼa chehˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu htawˇ miˬ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo shehˆ nyi shehˆ haˉ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew12:41 Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ, Niˇnaˍveˍ venˇ yaˇ hui lehˬ, chaw chi teˇ co geh teˇ geh tu la leh, chaw chi teˇ co hta‸ suhˉ taˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇnaˆ bon maˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve yo‸. Nyi loˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo Yoˇnaˆ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yo‸." 
Matthew12:42 Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi htaˇ, awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ mvuhˇmiˬ ve nanˇ hawˉ hkanˇ ma htawˇ, chaw chi teˇ co geh teˇ geh tu la leh, chaw chi teˇ co hta‸ suhˉ taˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ Sawˉla‸monˍ ve cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ, miˬ guiˬ awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ kaˬ lo tu leh laˬ ve yoˬ. Nyi loˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo Sawˉla‸monˍ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:43 Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hkeh lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, goˇ choˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca toˇ nyi leh, gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ ca ve htawˇ, maˇ mawˬ." 
Matthew12:44 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ tawˆ la ve ngaˬ ve yehˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e shaˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ kʼawˇ lehˍ kehˬ lehˍ hkʼa deh‸ gu shiˆ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:45 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ kʼai leh yawˇ a‸ kehˉ haiˬ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu neˇ suhˍ hkeh hta‸ kuˬ veu laˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui lo‸-e leh oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ hpeh‸ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh haiˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve chaw chi teˇ co htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:46 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ e leh awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ na‸ uˉ te da‸ gaˇ leh, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:47 Hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ e leh nawˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ na‸ uˉ te da‸ gaˇ leh, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:48 Yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ e leh ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ a shu le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew12:49 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ beˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ e leh ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi loˬ." 
Matthew12:50 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve a loˍ hta‸ hkʼa te ve chaw hui lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi ma leh ngaˬ ve awˬ e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:1 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi Yeˍsuˆ yehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo ca mui taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew13:2 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve pa taw, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:3 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tawˇ pa haˉ te leh, awˬ lawn laiˉ ceuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ yawˇ sheˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ yawˇ ca sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:4 Yawˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo ce leh, ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh gʼawˆ caˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:5 Awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ miˬ shaˍ paˇ kuiˬ haˉ pui de lo ce leh, miˬ shaˍ maˇ naˉ ve pa taw, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yeˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:6 Awˬ yeˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ geu maˇ naw‸ ve pa taw, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ la htaˇ haw jaˇ chiˆ jaˇ leh, nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:7 Awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ aˉ chuˇ de lo ce leh, aˉ chuˇ buiˇ teˇ hpaˍ uiˍ la leh awˬ yeˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hoˆ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:8 Awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ miˬ hkuiˇ da‸ kuiˬ lo ce leh awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la ve yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ teˇ ha pun, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkaw‸ chi pun leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ shehˆ chi pun naw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:9 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw hkʼa deh‸ na-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew13:10 Oˇ htaˇ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ piˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:11 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ shiˍ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
Matthew13:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ tuˬ leh yawˇ maˇ maˇ cawˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ cawˬ ve chaw geh yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ tawˆ sheˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew13:13 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui nyi ve ka‸ nyi maˇ mawˬ, kaˇ ve ka‸ na maˇ gʼa ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:14 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve htawˇ na maˇ gʼa. Nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve htawˇ maˇ shiˍ."
