Matthew13:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui mehˆ shiˍ maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, naˍ paw maˇ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ, nyi ma hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, nyi ma maˇ kʼaw‸ pa leh ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa gu na-e tuˬ, chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ ve nyi ma heh leh, yawˇ hui ve naˍ paw maˇ na gaˇ leh yawˇ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ mi‸ taˍ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ gʼa mawˬ leh nawˬ hui ve naˍ paw gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:17 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ mawˬ gaˇ ve htawˇ, maˇ gʼa mawˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui kaˇ gaˇ ve htawˇ maˇ gʼa kaˇ." 
Matthew13:18 Awˬ yawˇ sheˍ paˍ ve awˬ lawn tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ hta‸ na sheˍ. 
Matthew13:19 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ leh na maˇ gʼa ve kʼo, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ laˬ leh, yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ taˍ ve awˬ yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ, ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo sheˍ ve awˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:20 Haˉ pui de lo sheˍ ve awˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh teˇ cawˬ haˉ ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh fawˉ ve mehˍ ve gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ geu maˇ naw‸ leh teˇ hkui ceh tiˉ hkanˍ gʼa ve pa taw, yawˇ luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:22 Aˉ chuˇ de lo sheˍ ve awˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve htawˇ, chi miˬguiˬ ve dawˇ haˍ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve pa taw, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la maˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:23 Miˬ hkuiˇ da‸ kuiˬ lo sheˍ ve awˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ kaˇ leh na gʼa ve chaw hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ teˇ ha pun, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkaw‸ chi pun leh teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ shehˆ chi pun awˬ shiˍ naw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:24 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ pa haˉ kʼaw‸ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve heh hkʼaw lo da‸ ve awˬ yawˇ sheˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:25 Chaw yaˇ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ laˬ leh, caˬ sheˍ taˍ kuiˬ lo veˬ kʼawˍ yawˇ sheˍ keu taˉ leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:26 Awˬ yeˬ yeˬ la leh awˬ shiˍ awˬ nu tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, veˬ kʼawˍ htawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:27 Oˇ htaˇ, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve heh hkʼaw lo da‸ ve awˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ sheˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw veˬ kʼawˍ cawˬ la ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:28 Yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Canˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ chi ve hta‸ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Veˬ kʼawˍ cehˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ca gʼawˬ baˬ tuˬ nawˬ nyi ma cawˇ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:29 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Maˇ heˆ, nawˬ hui veˬ kʼawˍ cehˬ hta‸ gʼawˬ baˬ ve kʼo, caˬ cehˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ga gʼawˬ baˬ puiˉ-aˆ." 
Matthew13:30 Caˬ gʼeuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ hkʼa gaˬ nyiˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ teˇ geh uiˍ la piˇ sheˍ. Caˬ gʼeu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ kʼo, veˬ kʼawˍ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼeu‸ leh aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ tuˬ, awˬ kʼa‸ awˬ kʼa‸ te tsuh‸ taˍ-o‸. Caˬ shiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ve caˬ ciˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaw keu taˍ-o teh‸ caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:31 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ pa haˉ kʼaw‸ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ ve heh awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ taˍ ve gʼawˇ caˉ yawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:32 Awˬ yawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ yawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ i jaˇ ve htawˇ, uiˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ gʼawˇ hpa‸ mvuhˬ naweh hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ la leh awˬ cehˬ lonˉ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ ve ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ gʼaˇ jehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:33 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ pa haˉ kʼaw‸ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, diˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ diˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh hkaoˍ monˇ meu-e shehˆ hkʼawˍ lawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo keu ve teˇ yanˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ciˇ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:34 Awˬ lawn chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ pa haˉ te leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ pa haˉ maˇ te kʼo, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ." 
Matthew13:35 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te maˍ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh tawˇ pa haˉ teˇ hpaˍ te maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:36 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Heh hkʼaw sheˍ ve veˬ kʼawˍ yawˇ tawˇ pa haˉ awˬ lawn tcuhˉ kuiˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ a ciˉ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:37 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve awˬ yawˇ hta‸ sheˍ paˍ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ." 
Matthew13:38 Heh lehˬ, miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve awˬ yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Veˬ kʼawˍ yawˇ lehˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:39 Awˬ yawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ sheˍ ve canˇ paˍ lehˬ neˇhaiˬ yoˬ. Caˬ gʼeu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ chi leh ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Matthew13:40 Veˬ kʼawˍ hta‸ gʼeu‸ leh aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, miˬguiˬ chi leh ve awˬ yanˇ htaˇ chi hkʼe hpehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew13:41 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ peu laˇ leh, shu hta‸ te ya‸ tcuh ve chaw leh haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui yuˬ tawˆ peuˬ hkʼaw nawˉ," 
Matthew13:42 aˬ miˍ buiˬ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew13:43 Oˇ htaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui Awˬ pa ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇ nyi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba tuˬ yoˬ. Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw hkʼa deh‸ na-o." 
Matthew13:44 Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, ti mi hkʼaw faˉ taˍ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve mawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Mawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ mawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, kʼaw‸ gu faˉ taˍ leh, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e leh, yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ti mi oˇ ve hta‸ vuiˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:45 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ hta‸ ca ve tanˇ kaˬ paˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:46 Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ teˇ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ kʼo‸-e leh yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehnˉ oˇ ve hta‸ vuiˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:47 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpehˇ keu leh ngaˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ hoˆ leh gʼawˬ yuˬ ve geu‸ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:48 Ngaˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˇ ca paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geu‸ hta‸ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo gʼawˬ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mui taˍ leh da‸ ve ngaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼawˍ lawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˆ keu leh, maˇ da‸ ve ngaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:49 Miˬguiˬ leh ve teˇ yanˇ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui leh haiˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ pehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ," 
Matthew13:50 haiˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ aˬ miˍ buiˬ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew13:51 Awˬ lawn chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui na gʼa peuˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Na gʼa peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:52 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn henˇ yuˬ peuˬ ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ a shu yawˇ ve mawˇ keu taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, mawˇ awˬ piˍ awˬ suhˉ yuˬ tawˆ ve hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:53 Tawˇ pa haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ te maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:54 Yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui anˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve cuˇ yiˍ leh kanˇ paˆ hta‸ hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve le." 
Matthew13:55 Yawˇ lehˬ, la‸shaˉmaˉ ve yaˇ paˍ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yawˇ ve awˬ e lehˬ Maˍriˆ meh ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yaˍkoˆ, Yoˇseh‸, Siˉmonˍ leh Yuˇda‸ hui maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew13:56 Yawˇ ve awˬ nyi ma hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Hkʼe te leh chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma luˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:57 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew13:58 Yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ kanˉ uiˍ ve hta‸ a ciˉ ceh tiˉ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:1 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh," 
Matthew14:2 yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve pa taw, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ uiˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:3 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ ve awˬ miˇ ma Heˍroˍdiˆ awˬ lawn hta‸ pa taw, Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ heuˆ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Matthew14:5 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ gaˇ ve htawˇ, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ kawˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ yoˬ teh‸ mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hui shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:6 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ paw ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ pawehˇ te ve awˬ nyi kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, Heˍroˍdiˆ ve awˬ yaˇ miˇ chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ pawehˇ te maˍ piˇ htaˇ, Heˍroˆ nyi ma cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:7 Hkʼe te leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ka ti‸ te leh hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:8 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ e maˍ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkehˇ pe le awˬ hkʼaw keu leh pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:9 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ dawˇ haˍ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh, yawˇ geh mui caˇ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ pa taw, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lawˬ ve hkʼe piˇ tuˬ yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:10 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ chaw hta‸ hpehˇ peu leh, htawnˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ ca tawˆ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:11 Oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkehˇ pe le awˬ hkʼaw keu veu laˇ leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ htawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ ca yuˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:12 Oˇ htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ tuˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:13 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ-e leh, chaw gawˬ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, venˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh, miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:14 Yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:15 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Choˬ kaˬ lehˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw hpeh‸ leh, mvuhˇ ka‸ hpeu‸ la yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo kʼai leh caˇ tuˬ ca vuiˬ caˇ-e tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:16 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yawˇ hui kʼai tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Nawˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ caˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:17 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ leh ngaˇ nyiˇ hkeh ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:18 Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh yuˬ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew14:19 Oˇ htaˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸, Mvuh‸ awˬ hkʼoˆ mui-o teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve ngaˇ diˬ leh ngaˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ hkeh hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:20 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˇ ve yoˬ. Caˇ leuˉ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ hkʼa biˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:21 Caˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ leh yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ kʼo, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chaw mawˇ tiˉ aˬ laˬ hkʼe ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:22 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ coˇ paˉ lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:23 Yawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon ca lawˬ tuˬ yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la htaˇ, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:24 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, gʼuiˬ po awˬ kʼaw ji lo gaˬ htaˇ, mvuhˇ haw hpawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve pa taw, gʼuiˬ baˇ teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ htinˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:25 Tanˇ hkuinˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ gʼuiˬ po hkʼoˆ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ leh yawˇ hui geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:26 Gʼuiˬ po hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ laˬ ve hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ leh, Chaw ha ku yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:27 Yawˇ hui kawˆ ve pa taw gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te-o. Taˇ kawˆ, ngaˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:28 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ yoˬ kʼo, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼoˆ ngaˬ hta‸ nawˬ geh laˬ tcuh laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:29 Hkʼe te leh Peˍtruˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw tawˆ-e leh, iˉ kaˆ hkʼoˆ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ haw hehnˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ mawˬ htaˇ, kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˍ lo‸-e chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:31 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve la‸ sheh che leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ tawˆ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma te htawˇ dawˇ nawˬ dawˇ te ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:32 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ haw htawˇ dehˬ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:33 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, Nawˬ lehˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:34 Gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo yawˇ hui hkanˍ kʼai leh Geˍneˍsaˍrehˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew14:35 Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw teˇ kaˬ le le lo chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew14:36 Yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ awˬ caˍ hta‸ ceh gʼa htawˇ tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Hkʼa htawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ na-e la ve yoˬ. 
Matthew15:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo tu leh, Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew15:2 Nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chaw mawˇ hui piˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ya‸ ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui la‸ sheh maˇ tsuhˇ leh caˇ tuˬ caˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:3 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve le." 
Matthew15:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o. Peuˬ leh, A shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa suh ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui lehˬ, Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸, Ngaˬ geh hkʼa cawˬ ve nawˬ hui gʼa cawˇ ve mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yan tuˬ maˇ loˍ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:6 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui te pehˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:7 Chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew15:8 Chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw ngaˬ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ vuiˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:9 Chaw yaˇ hui teh taˍ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:10 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ geh kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼa deh‸ na leh shiˍ-o‸." 
Matthew15:11 Maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw lo‸-e ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ maˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw tawˆ la ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:12 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ-aw laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:13 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa maˇ ti taˍ ve awˬ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ le le hta‸ gʼawˬ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew15:14 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ chehˇ taˍ piˇ sheˍ. Yawˇ hui mehˆ cuˉ ve ka‸, ya‸ kʼaw maˍ piˇ paˍ te ve yoˬ. Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw maˍ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬ kʼoˍ hkʼaw ce lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:15 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Tawˇ pa haˉ chi ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:16 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ hui htawˇ na maˇ gʼa sheˍ leh laˇ." 
Matthew15:17 Maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw lo‸-e ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw gaˬ leh, aˉ kʼa‸ yiˬ kuiˬ lo baˬ taˉ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
Matthew15:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, nyi ma hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, haiˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ ve, chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve, guiˇ ya‸ ve, shu mawˇ hkʼawˇ ve, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve leh, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ nyi ma hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:20 Chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, la‸ sheh maˇ tsuhˇ leh caˇ tuˬ caˇ ve lehˬ, chaw hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:21 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ tawˆ kʼai leh, Tuˇruˆ leh Siˉdonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ hpawˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:22 Oˇ htaˇ, Hkaˍnanˍ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ miˬ oˇ ve teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ ve yaˇ miˇ neˇ geh leh gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ yaw piˇ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ chi ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ laˬ leh kuˬ chehˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh-o teh‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:24 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˉ kʼai peuˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh laˬ tuˬ awˬ pon ceh Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:25 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ga laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:26 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˍ piˇ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:27 Yaˇ miˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve hpui lawˇ hawˉ sheˆ taˍ ve caˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼawˆ caˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:28 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, nawˬ yonˍ ve lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:29 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e leh mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:30 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, hkui luˬ la‸ luˬ ve chaw, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw, kʼaˍ ve chaw leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw naˬ laiˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui shiˍ veu taˆ veu laˇ leh, yawˇ hkui paˇ lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:31 Hkʼe te leh, chaw kʼaˍ teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ yaw gʼa la ve, hkui luˬ la‸ luˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ da‸ la leh ya‸ kʼaw juˇ gʼa la ve, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hui mehˆ mawˬ la ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ leh Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:32 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ geh kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ chi hta‸ ngaˬ ha kʼaˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve shehˆ nyi gaˬ peuˬ leh, caˇ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui awˍ meu‸ jehˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ kʼo‸-e tcuh gaˇ. Kʼo‸-e tcuh ve kʼo, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ hui gʼaˇ nuˇ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:33 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Chaw chi ma ve hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˇ tuˬ ve, choˬ kaˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo hkaoˍ monˇ hkʼaˬ lo ca gʼa tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:34 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui geh hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ diˬ cawˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Hkaoˍmonˇ suhˍ diˬ leh ngaˇ ehˉ a ciˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:35 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ mui tuˬ yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:36 Hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve suhˍ diˬ leh ngaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htaˬ yawˇ yuˬ leh, bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hkʼeh‸ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:37 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa bvuhˆ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˇ leuˉ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, suhˍ hkʼawˍ lawˇ hkʼa biˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:38 Caˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ leh yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ kʼo, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chaw mawˇ tiˉ awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew15:39 Oˇ htaˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh Maˍgaˍdanˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui leh Saˍduˆkehˇ hui laˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma ve awˬ heˆ a ciˉ te maˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:2 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, Mvuhˇ naw ma nyiˉ lehˍ cawˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:3 Peuˬ leh mvuhˇ shawˉ htaˇ, Mvuhˇ naw ma nyiˉ lehˍ cawˬ leh moˬ hoˆ taˍ ve kʼo, ya‸ nyi mvuhˇ haw mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ nyi leh shiˍ puiˉ ve htawˇ, awˬ co-e awˬ yanˇ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui fuiˍ da‸ maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew16:4 Haiˬ leh te ya‸ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ co-e lehˬ, awˬ heˆ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yoˇnaˆ ve awˬ heˆ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:5 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, hkaoˍmonˇ yuˬ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ hui leunˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:6 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ leh Saˍduˆkehˇ hui ve diˇ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te leh jaw kʼai-o teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:7 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ maˇ yuˬ laˬ ve pa taw chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:8 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ maˇ yuˬ laˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve le." 
Matthew16:9 Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ gaˬ sheˍ leh laˇ. Hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ hta‸ chaw ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui awˬ leuˉ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ gʼa ve hta‸ maˇ dawˇ nawˇ leh laˇ." 
Matthew16:10 Peuˬ leh hkaoˍmonˇ suhˍ diˬ hta‸ chaw awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui awˬ leuˉ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ gʼa ve hta‸ maˇ dawˇ nawˇ leh laˇ." 
Matthew16:11 Ngaˬ hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ gaˬ ve le. Hpaˍriˍsehˇ leh Saˍduˆkehˇ hui ve diˇ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:12 Oˇ htaˇ, hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼaw keu ve diˇ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Hpaˍriˍsehˇ leh Saˍduˆkehˇ hui maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:13 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ Kehˉsaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hpawˇ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ a shu hpeh‸ ve teh‸ shu kʼoˆ ve le." 
Matthew16:14 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Eˇliˇya‸ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍraˍmiˆ, maˇ heˆ kʼo Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:15 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ a shu hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le." 
Matthew16:16 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:17 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yoˇnaˆ ve yaˇ paˍ Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ lawn chi hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa nawˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:18 Peuˬ leh ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ yoˬ. Haˉ pui chi awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ ve awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ. Suh mvuhˇmiˬ ve yehˬ miˉ lehˬ, awˬ moˍ chi hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ." 
Matthew16:19 Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ ve shawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hkʼa hpeh taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ hpeh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hkʼa hpui hkʼa ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ hpui hkʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew16:20 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve awˬ lawn chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hto piˇ tuˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ tawˇ hehnˇ chaweh piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:21 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ hta‸ tanˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gʼa kʼai leh, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa suh leh, shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo gʼa kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:22 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, chi hkʼe gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Chi hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa heuˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh yawˇ hta‸ deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:23 Yeˍsuˆ hpfuhˆ nyi leh Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Saˍtanˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ lo jiˆ kʼai-o. Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon hkui htiˇ poˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ maˇ heˆ, chaw yaˇ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew16:24 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ gaˇ ve kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸." 
Matthew16:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve a sha‸ shonˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ awˬ pon a sha‸ shonˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew16:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa ve htawˇ, yawˇ ve a sha‸ shonˇ kʼai ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ le. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh pa gʼa tuˬ le." 
Matthew16:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ Awˬ pa ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui geh teˇ geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, a shu yawˇ te taˍ ve hkʼe, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew16:28 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, choˬ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu chi yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, maˇ gʼa suh teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:1 Hkaw‸ nyi ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ ceh shiˍ veu leh, mvuh ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hui taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:2 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han pa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ nyi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba leh, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpu la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:3 Moˉseˍ leh Eˇliˇya‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tawˆ la leh Yeˍsuˆ geh na‸ uˉ te da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew17:4 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui choˬ kaˬ chehˇ ve lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ nyi ma cawˇ ve kʼo, choˬ kaˬ lo ngaˬ aˉ po kʼo shehˆ shiˍ te tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ, Moˉseˍ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ leh Eˇliˇya‸ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:5 Yawˇ tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve moˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Moˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkawˇ chi hkʼe bvuhˬ la ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:6 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ leh mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:7 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ leh, Tu-o, taˇ kawˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:8 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ chiˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ. Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:9 Hkʼaw oˇ ve teˇ shiˍ lo yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ ya‸ la chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la sheˍ ve ceh ceh, nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn chi, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ hto piˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:10 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, Eˇliˇya‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa laˬ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ" 
Matthew17:11 yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Eˇliˇya‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na laˬ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gu te tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew17:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Eˇliˇya‸ gaˬ la peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, te gaˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ te piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu htawˇ yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:13 Oˇ htaˇ, baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ awˬ lawn yawˇ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:14 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ geh yawˇ hui gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew17:15 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ yaˇ paˍ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ paw‸ hpeuˆ leh gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ hkui teˇ hkui paˍ lo‸-e leh, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ teˇ hkui teˇ hkui paˍ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:16 Nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ htawˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ maˇ gʼa teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:17 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yonˍ ve maˇ cawˬ leh nyi ma hpfuhˆ puiˉ ve chaw chi teˇ co-e, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ maw gʼa chehˇ tuˬ sheˍ le. Nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ maw gʼa yeunˇ hkanˍ tuˬ sheˍ le. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh yuˬ laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:18 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ neˇ oˇ ve hta‸ deˇ leh, neˇ oˇ ve yaˇ paˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ hkui yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:19 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Neˇ oˇ ve hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw ngaˬ hui gʼa‸ kʼoˬ maˇ gʼa ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:20 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼawˇ caˉ yawˇ hkʼe hui cawˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaw chi teˇ shiˍ hta‸, Oˇ kaˬ lo jiˆ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, jiˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui te maˇ gʼa ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui teˇ geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ neˇ la peuˬ." 
Matthew17:23 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ leh shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:24 Yawˇ hui Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ pon a moˇ shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ Peˍtruˆ geh kʼai leh, Nawˬ ve saˍ la‸ lehˬ, a moˇ maˇ keu leh laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:25 Keu ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peˍtruˆ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ awˉ lawˉ yaw leh kʼoˆ ve, Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ ve le. Chi miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu geh a moˇ shaw ve le. A shu yawˇ ve yaˇ geh laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, shu geh shaw ve laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:26 Shu geh shaw ve yoˬ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, yawˇ hui ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa ponˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew17:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pa taw shu maˇ gʼa dawˇ ya‸ tuˬ, gʼuiˬ po lo kʼai leh biˉ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ca baˬ keu-o. Awˉ lawˉ gʼa ve ngaˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ hkʼa nyi. Oˇ htaˇ, hpu teˇ hteh‸ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hpu oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh, ngaˬ awˬ pon leh nawˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hui hta‸ ca piˇ-oˆ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:1 Oˇ ve teˇ hkui awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:2 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ yaˇ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew18:3 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui nyi ma maˇ pa leh yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe maˇ hpeh‸ la ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa lo‸-e taˬ." 
Matthew18:4 A shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yaˇ ehˉ chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nyi ma nehˬ lehˍ taˍ ve chaw lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:5 Yaˇ ehˉ chi hkʼe ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve kʼawˍ peˍ hta‸ haˉ pui mawˍ lonˉ hpeh kʼu leh naˉ jaˇ ve laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ ce peu ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:7 Shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew18:8 Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve hkui sheh teˇ paˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, tawˆ baˬ-o‸. Hkui sheh la‸ sheh nyiˇ paˉ paˉ cawˬ leh co co taiˍ taiˍ to‸ chehˇ ve aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, hkui sheh la‸ sheh hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ cawˬ leh a sha‸ te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:9 Nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ teˇ paˉ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, mehˆ shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼehˉ baˬ sheˍ. Mehˆ shiˍ nyiˇ paˉ paˉ cawˬ leh aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, mehˆ shiˍ teˇ paˉ tiˉ cawˬ leh a sha‸ te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:10 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ le. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, yawˬ teˇ ha hkeh cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ hkeh mehˉ kʼai ve kʼo, kʼawˇ chi kʼawˇ hkeh hta‸ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo teh taˉ leh mehˉ kʼai ve teˇ hkeh hta‸ yawˇ ca nyi tuˬ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew18:13 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yawˬ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ mawˬ ve kʼo, maˇ mehˉ ve yawˬ kʼawˇ chi kʼawˇ hkeh hta‸ ha lehˬ ve a‸ kehˉ, oˇ ve teˇ hkeh hta‸ leuˉ leh ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew18:14 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yaˇ ehˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ luˬ kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ Awˬ pa nyi ma maˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:15 Nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ geh kʼai leh nawˬ huiˉ maˬ ceh tiˉ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve ya‸ kuiˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ nawˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na ve kʼo, nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ nawˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
Matthew18:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ na ve kʼo, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo shehˆ gʼaˇ, tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ le le hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkʼa deh‸ hkanˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ geh chaw teˇ gʼaˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai-o." 
Matthew18:17 Yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ na ve kʼo, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ na ve kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw leh awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ shawˍ taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew18:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui hkʼa hpeh taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ hpeh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui hkʼa hpui hkʼa ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ hpui hkʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew18:19 Peuˬ leh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ nyi ma hawˍ da‸ leh teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lawˬ ve hkʼe te piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew18:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh hpawnˬ da‸ ve kʼo, oˇ kaˬ yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo ngaˬ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:21 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ peuˬ teˇ pawˆ te ya‸ laˇ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ nyiˇ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ le. Suhˍ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:22 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Suhˍ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Suhˍ pawˆ suhˍ chi pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ gʼa hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:23 Hkʼe te leh mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh hpu caˇ lanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu gaˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:24 Yawˇ caˇ lanˇ tanˬ gu chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ chi lanˬ hteh‸ jeˬ cha taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:25 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, kʼaw‸ shaiˍ piˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ awˬ to ka‸, yawˇ miˇ yawˇ yaˇ ka‸, yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve mawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ka‸ hawˇ baˬ sheˬ leh shaiˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:26 Hkʼe te leh awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ a ciˉ yeunˇ hkanˍ laˇ sheˍ. Ngaˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ shaiˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:27 Hkʼe te leh awˬ ceˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ leh yawˇ ve jeˬ hta‸ htawˇ ponˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:28 Oˇ htaˇ awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve tawˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ hta‸ jeˬ teˇ ha hteh‸ cha taˍ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼawˍ peˍ nyiˉ leh, Ngaˬ ve jeˬ hta‸ shaiˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:29 Hkʼe te leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ a ciˉ yeunˇ hkanˍ laˇ sheˍ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ shaiˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ maˇ na leh, jeˬ kʼaw‸ shaiˍ laˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo ca keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:31 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh, awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:32 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Haiˬ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve pa taw nawˬ ve jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ponˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:33 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ htawˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ cawˇ ve yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew18:34 Peuˬ leh yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ nyi ma zuhˆ leh, yawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼaw‸ shaiˍ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew18:35 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi te ya‸ laˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ hpehˇ piˇ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:1 Tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo cawˬ ve Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ tawn lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:2 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:3 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve awˬ lawn teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ hpeh‸-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:4 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve. Te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ hawˉ hkʼaˆ leh yaˇ miˇ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ peuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew19:5 Chi hta‸ pa taw hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ suhˍ teˇ shaˍ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ." 
Matthew19:6 Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha caˉ da‸ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ chaw yaˇ maˇ gʼa yuˬ hpaˆ da‸ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:7 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, hpaˆ da‸ ve li‸ piˇ peuˬ htaˇ heh‸, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ-o‸ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw Moˉseˍ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:8 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui nyi ma heh ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ tuˬ Moˉseˍ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew19:9 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, a shu yawˇ awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:10 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ ve kʼo, maˇ heuˆ ve lehˬ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:11 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hkanˍ yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ awˬ bon gʼa taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ hkanˍ yuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, paw la htaˇ ka‸ awˬ tawnˇ hpeh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ tawnˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ shu yawˇ hui hta‸ te piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ aw pon a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ chaw awˬ tawnˇ hpeh‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ hpeh‸ ve chaw lehˬ, hkanˍ yuˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:13 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh bon lawˬ piˇ tuˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh shiˍ laˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shiˍ laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh laˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇ miˬ lehˬ, chaw oˇ hkʼe ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:15 Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:16 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ da‸ ve kanˉ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ maˬ hta‸ gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:17 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ ve awˬ lawn na nyi laˇ ve le. Da‸ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. A sha‸ te‸ kuiˬ lo nawˬ lo‸-e gaˇ ve kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:18 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ maˬ le teh‸ yawˇ na nyi htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw hta‸ taˇ tiˇ pehˍ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ taˇ te, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ taˇ hkʼawˇ, shu hta‸ maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ taˇ hkanˍ," 
Matthew19:19 nawˬ ve awˬ pa aw e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha‸-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:20 Chaw haˉ paˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ na yuˬ leh te peuˬ. Ngaˬ aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ loˍ sheˍ le teh‸, kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:21 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ biˇ la gaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ kʼo‸-e leh, nawˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ leh haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve mawˇ nawˬ cawˬ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh nawˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:22 Chaw haˉ paˍ lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ mawˇ jeˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:23 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, paw sha ve chaw lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:24 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, kaˍlaˍoˆ teˇ hkeh gʼo‸ naˍ hkʼawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e tuˬ ve lehˬ, paw sha ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ ve a‸ kehˉ sha ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:25 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ leh, Hkʼe te kʼo, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ a shu gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:26 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi leh, Chaw yaˇ lehˬ chi hta‸ te maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew19:27 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh nawˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma gʼa tuˬ ve le." 
Matthew19:28 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, miˬguiˬ awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ gu te ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve kʼaw jaw awˬ hkʼoˆ mui ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, kʼaw jaw teˇ chi nyiˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ mui leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew19:29 Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh a shu yawˇ ve ti mi hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ teˇ ha pun kʼaw‸ gʼa leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ awˬ shinˉ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew19:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ, shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ, shu awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew20:1 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇ miˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te tuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ ca tuˬ, mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ tawˆ kʼai ve yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:2 Yawˇ lehˬ, teˇ nyi teˇ hteh‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, kanˉ te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh jehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:3 Mvuhˇ shawˉ aˬ laˬ hkʼe kʼawˇ naˍ riˍ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, tcuh hkʼaw lo kanˉ maˇ cawˬ leh hkʼe leˇ chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ," 
Matthew20:4 Nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:5 Peuˬ leh, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ teˇ yanˇ leh mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼe teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai leh oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:6 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ aˬ laˬ hkʼe ngaˇ naˍ riˍ teˇ yanˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw choˬ kaˬ lo teˇ nyi tanˇ vanˇ hkʼe leˇ chehˇ taˍ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:7 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ ca la ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, Nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:8 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, hko awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ hkʼaw‸ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ leh leh ca te ve chaw hui hta‸ tanˬ leh, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ca te ve chaw hui hkʼa gaˬ awˬ hpfuhˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ ve mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:9 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ aˬ laˬ hkʼe ngaˇ naˍ riˍ htaˇ kanˉ ca te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ le le teˇ hteh‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:10 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ca te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ taˍ ve ka‸, yawˇ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ hteh‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:11 Yawˇ hui hpu gʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ca beu leh yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew20:12 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ leh leh ca te la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ naˍ riˍ tiˉ gʼa te ve htawˇ, ngaˬ hui teˇ nyi tanˇ vanˇ kanˉ te hkeu‸ leh mvuhˇ cha chiˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ shawˍ piˇ ve law teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:13 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ te laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Teˇ hteh‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ geh ngaˬ jehˬ da‸ taˍ peuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Matthew20:14 Nawˬ ve hpu hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼai-o. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ leh leh te ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew20:15 Ngaˬ ve mawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ te gaˇ ve hkʼe te maˇ cawˇ leh laˇ. Ngaˬ shu hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh piˇ ve pa taw nawˬ nyi ma naˬ leh laˇ teh‸, kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:16 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, shu awˬ gʼu suhˍ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Shu awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:17 Peuˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tiˉ kuˬ veu leh, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew20:18 Ngaˬ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, yawˇ gʼa suh tuˬ ve yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew20:19 Maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve, jaw‸ ve, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:20 Oˇ htaˇ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve yaˇ paˍ hui ve awˬ e leh yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh, awˬ e yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh teˇ ceuˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:21 Nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma heuˆ gaˇ ve le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ na nyi htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Nawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ a ciˉ mui piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:22 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ lawˬ ve nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ. Ngaˬ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ ve kawˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˬ hpeh‸-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Dawˬ hpeh‸-aw teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:23 Ngaˬ ve kawˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa dawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ mehˍ paˉ gʼa mui tuˬ ngaˬ pe‸ laˇ maˇ hpeh‸. Ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa gu taˍ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ gʼa mui tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ," 
Matthew20:24 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi gʼaˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:25 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ uˉ peunˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve chaw uiˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ nyiˉ te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw uiˍ hpeh‸ gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:27 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ te gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve te gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ lehˬ vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, shu yawˇ awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ shu awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ laˬ leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ ve a sha‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:29 Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:30 Oˇ htaˇ ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo mui chehˇ ve mehˆ cuˉ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ paˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:31 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸, Ta‸ iˉ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸ deˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:32 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ huˉ taˍ leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kuˬ leh, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:33 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ hpaw laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew20:34 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ htawˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ mehˆ mawˬ la leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:1 Yawˇ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la leh, Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hta‸ neˇ ve Behˆhpaˍgeˍ hkʼaˆ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew21:2 Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Oˇ kaˬ lo hpeh taˍ ve piˉ laˬ awˬ ma peuˍ leh awˬ yehˇ hta‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hpui leh ngaˬ geh sheh veu laˇ-oˆ. 
Matthew21:3 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ loˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:4 Awˬ lawn chi ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew21:5 Ziˉonˍ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe hto piˇ-oˆ. Nyi loˬ, nawˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo piˉ laˬ awˬ ma peuˍ leh awˬ yehˇ hta‸ ciˇ leh nawˬ geh laˬ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:6 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tcuh ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:7 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, piˉ laˬ awˬ ma peuˍ leh awˬ yehˇ hta‸ sheh veu laˇ leh, piˉ laˬ oˇ ve nyiˇ hkeh awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hkʼawˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ taˆ ciˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:8 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw maˇ-awˍ ve a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo hkʼawˇ piˇ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ suhˆ hpa‸ chaw leh ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo hkʼawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:9 Yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼai ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ kuˬ leh, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ Hoˍsaˍnaˍ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo laˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma lo htawˇ, Hoˍsaˍnaˍ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:10 Yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te leh, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ a shu le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:11 Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ yaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:12 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo mawˇ vuiˬ mawˇ hawˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ leh, hpu pa shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve hpui lawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˉ pui kʼaˍ hawˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve mui hkʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hpfuhˆ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:13 Ngaˬ ve yehˬ hta‸ bon lawˬ kuiˬ yehˬ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ, yehˬ chi hta‸ chaw hkʼawˇ chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:14 Mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hui leh hkui luˬ paˍ hui, bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw yawˇ geh laˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:15 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ te ve anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ Hoˍsaˍnaˍ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:16 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ kaˇ-aw laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh cuˉ dawˬ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve chiˇ mvuh hkawˇ nawˬ keu piˇ taˍ peuˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:17 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo ca haˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:18 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la leh venˇ hkʼaw kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e htaˇ, yawˇ awˍ meu‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:19 Ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo cawˬ ve maˉ nawˆ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ ca nyi htaˇ awˬ hpa‸ hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, nawˬ awˬ shiˍ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ taˇ kʼaw‸ naw‸ teh‸, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ oˇ ve teˇ cawˬ haˉ nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:20 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ anˇ leh, Maˉ nawˆ cehˬ chi, aˬ hto‸ ma te teˇ cawˬ haˉ nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:21 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui yonˍ leh nyi ma htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ maˇ te ve kʼo, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ chi hta‸ ngaˬ te piˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui te hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, hkʼaw chi teˇ shiˍ hta‸, Jiˆ tawˆ-e leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼaw lo ca ce lo‸-e loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew21:22 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:23 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ lo‸-e leh maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hui ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve le. Kanˇ paˆ chi a shu nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:24 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ na nyi shaˍ. Nawˬ hui yaw hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew21:25 Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve le. Mvuhˇ naw ma lo laˇ, chaw yaˇ hui geh lo laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma lo gʼa ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Hkʼe te leh nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew21:26 Chaw yaˇ hui geh gʼa ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ," 
Matthew21:27 Hkʼe te leh, Ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ hto laˇ." 
Matthew21:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ ve le. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ geh yawˇ kʼai leh, Yaˇ paˍoˬ, ya‸ nyi a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ kanˉ ca te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ," 
Matthew21:29 Ngaˬ maˇ kʼai teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:30 Peuˬ leh, awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ geh awˬ pa kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ nyi paˍ lehˬ, Ngaˬ pa-oˬ, ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ maˇ kʼai." 
Matthew21:31 Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pa ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Awˬ viˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ hui leh meh maˬ lanˉ teˇ hpaˍ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:32 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ toˇ leh nawˬ hui geh lo laˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ hui leh meh maˬ lanˉ hui yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui chi hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve htawˇ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
Matthew21:33 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ pa haˉ hta‸ na sheˍ. Yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a pehˉ meuˇ hko te leh ti taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkʼa deh‸ ko taˍ leh, a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ nyiˉ kuiˬ duˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Shaw kuiˬ yehˬ mvuh ve hta‸ htawˇ te taˍ leh, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˍ piˇ taˉ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:34 Awˬ shiˍ meh ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, awˬ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ hko te paˍ hui geh yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:35 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ dawˆ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:36 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ teˇ pawˆ a‸ kehˉ awˬ ceˬ maˇ chaweh hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼai tcuh ve htawˇ, hko te paˍ hui lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ te piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:37 Awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ pawˆ, Ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui yawˆ yan tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:38 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ, awˬ shinˉ gʼa shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Laˬ-o‸, yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ ngaˬ hui yuˬ-a veuˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:39 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh, hko awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo chiˇ baˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:40 Hkʼe te leh hko awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te piˇ tuˬ le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:41 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Haiˬ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ te luˬ te sheˆ piˇ leh, awˬ shiˍ meh la htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ shiˍ kʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hko te paˍ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ngaˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew21:42 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yehˬ kawˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui baˬ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ lo kawˍ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Chi lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha te taˍ ve kanˉ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ anˇ tu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ," 
Matthew21:43 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh yuˬ tawˆ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la puiˉ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew21:44  
Matthew21:45 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ pa haˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ lawn kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew21:46 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ gaˇ ve htawˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ kawˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ chaw chi ma ve shawˍ taˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Matthew22:1 Peuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ pa haˉ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ te leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew22:2 Mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ awˬ pon hkehˉ caˇ tuˬ gu taˍ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:3 Hkehˉ caˇ la tuˬ kuˬ taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ ca kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼai tcuh ve htawˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ laˬ." 
Matthew22:4 Teˇ pawˆ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ ve nuˇ leh chu ve ceˇ caˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ peuˬ. Hkehˉ caˇ la-o teh‸, kuˬ taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca hto piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ dawˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ heh hkʼaw kʼai leh, teˇ gʼaˇ tanˇ kaˬ ca te kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:6 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh tiˇ pehˍ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:7 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, yawˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ te luˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve venˇ hta‸ htawˇ aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:8 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkehˉ caˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kuˬ taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ laˬ maˇ keunˍ." 
Matthew22:9 Hkʼe te leh, ya‸ kʼaw lonˉ ceh da‸ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ lo kʼai leh, hkʼa mawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkehˉ caˇ kuiˬ lo kuˬ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:10 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ya‸ kʼaw lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lo kʼai leh, hkʼa mawˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, maˇ da‸ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, kuˬ hpawnˬ leh, hkehˉ caˇ kuiˬ lo chaw hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:11 Hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ca lo‸ nyi la ve teˇ yanˇ, hkehˉ caˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ veu‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:12 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, hkehˉ caˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ veu‸ leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh nawˬ choˬ kaˬ lo‸ la ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ maˇ gʼa." 
Matthew22:13 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yawˇ ve hkui sheh la‸ sheh hta‸ hpeh tsuh‸ leh, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ naˆ ho‸ kuiˬ lo baˬ keu-o. Oˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, kuˬ yuˬ ve chaw maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, leuˆ yuˬ ve chaw a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:15 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ya‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:16 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh Heˍroˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ kawˆ leh, shu ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:17 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ taˍ ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ a ciˉ hto laˇ-oˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ a moˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ, maˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:18 Yawˇ hui nyi ma kʼaw‸ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa shiˍ leh, Chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve le." 
Matthew22:19 A moˇ hpu teˇ hteh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpu teˇ hteh‸ yuˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:20 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, A shu ve awˬ han, a shu ve awˬ meh cawˬ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:21 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼe te leh, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve mawˇ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew22:22 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, anˇ leh yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:23 Kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Saˍduˆkehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ, oˇ ve teˇ nyi yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew22:24 Saˍ la‸-oˬ, Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ leh suh ve kʼo, awˬ nyi paˍ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ kʼaw‸ heuˆ leh, awˬ viˉ paˍ awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ gʼa cawˬ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:25 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui geh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi suhˍ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ heuˆ leh, yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ suh leh, awˬ nyi paˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma teh taˉ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:26 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, leh suhˍ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, chi hkʼe teh taˉ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:27 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ suh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve htawˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:28 Hkʼe te leh, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw oˇ ve suhˍ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ heuˆ peuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:29 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hta‸ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw nawˬ hui dawˇ ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ka piˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ te. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hkʼe hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew22:31 Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ." 
Matthew22:32 Ngaˬ lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha, Iˉcaˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha leh Yaˍkoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, suh ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:33 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:34 Saˍduˆkehˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tawˇ kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ maˇ gʼa ve awˬ lawn Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui teˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:35 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ shiˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew22:36 Saˍ la‸-oˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:37 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve nyi ma hkʼa peu-eˬ, nawˬ ve co ha hkʼa peu-eˬ leh nawˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:38 Piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ leh awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:39 Nyiˇ hkawˇ teˇ hkawˇ htawˇ, awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ shuˍ da‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:40 Awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ, piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ chi nyiˇ hkawˇ hta‸ tcuhˉ naw‸ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:41 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ na nyi ve," 
Matthew22:42 Hkri‸ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ ve le. Yawˇ a shu ve yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Daˍviˆ ve yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:43 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te leh, Awˬ ha hpu Daˍviˆ hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw yawˇ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le." 
Matthew22:44 Awˬ lawn kʼo Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ taˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ-oˆ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:45 Daˍviˆ yawˇ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh Daˍviˆ ve yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew22:46 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ maˇ hpeh‸ leh, oˇ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ shu kʼaw‸ na nyi maˇ haˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:1 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew23:2 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui lehˬ, Moˉseˍ ve mui kuiˬ lo mui ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:3 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ laˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te-o. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui te ve hkʼe taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui maˇ te." 
Matthew23:4 Hawˇ jaˇ ve mawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui tsuh‸ taˍ leh, chaw yaˇ hui ve la‸ hpeh kʼaˉ hkʼoˆ lo taˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, gu jiˆ pfuhˍ piˇ tuˬ a shu yawˇ ve la‸ naw meuˇ ceh ka‸ maˇ htawˇ." 
Matthew23:5 Yawˇ hui hkʼa te ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ ceh te ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu awˬ tawn ehˉ doˆ pfuhˇ kuiˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui uiˍ chaweh te leh, aˉ po‸ awˬ caˍ zuhˬ chaweh te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:6 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hti caˇ hti dawˬ kuiˬ lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˇ, bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui hkʼawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:7 Tcuh hkʼaw lo shu yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˆ yan laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu yawˇ hui hta‸ saˍ la‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:8 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ saˍ la‸ teh‸ taˇ kʼoˆ tcuh. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui saˍ la‸ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:9 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ awˬ pa teh‸ taˇ kʼoˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui Awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:10 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai shehˍ hpaˇ teh‸ taˇ kʼoˆ tcuh. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ nawˬ hui ve sheh kʼai shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:11 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:12 A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ uiˍ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˍ i ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ i ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˍ uiˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew23:13 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ, nawˬ hui yehˬ miˉ hta‸ hoˆ tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui maˇ lo‸-e ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, lo‸-e gaˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼoˆ nawˬ hui teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui a‸ kehˉ nyiˇ pun yawˇ hta‸ moˬ naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:16 Ya‸ kʼaw maˍ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hkanˍ ve hkʼe maˇ te htawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve shi hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ ve hkʼe gʼa te ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:17 Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw luˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ ve le. Shi uiˍ ve laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo shi hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ lawˬ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ uiˍ ve laˇ." 
Matthew23:18 Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ tanˇ kuiˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hkanˍ ve hkʼe maˇ te htawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ ve hkʼe gʼa te ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:19 Mehˆ cuˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ ve le. Tanˇ tuˬ uiˍ ve laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo, tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ lawˬ ve tanˇ kuiˬ uiˍ ve laˇ." 
Matthew23:20 Hkʼe te leh tanˇ kuiˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve chaw lehˬ, tanˇ kuiˬ hta‸ ka‸, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ka‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:21 Bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve chaw lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ ka‸, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ka‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve yo‸." 
Matthew23:22 Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve kʼaw jaw hta‸ ka‸, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ mui shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ka‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:23 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ i hkinˇ, hawˉ loˍ leh gʼaˆ shaweh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teˇ chi pun teˇ pun yuˬ leh tanˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˉ leh uiˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ te ve, ha kʼaˉ ve leh yonˍ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ naw hui maˇ te. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ teh taˉ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:24 Ya‸ kʼaw maˍ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui lehˬ puiˉ suhˆ naˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ che baˬ leh, kaˍlaˍoˆ hta‸ hehˆ dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:25 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ hkehˇ leh kawˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo tsuhˇ kehˬ ve htawˇ, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lehˬ hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh te ponˬ te leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:26 Mehˆ cuˉ ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ-oˬ, hkehˇ leh kawˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo da‸ kehˬ la tuˬ, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo awˉ lawˉ tsuhˇ kehˬ-o‸." 
Matthew23:27 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ, hpuˉ lehˍ shehˍ taˍ ve chaw tuˍ hpfuh hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Tuˍ hpfuh oˇ ve awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo nyi sha ve htawˇ, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo chaw awˬ mu‸ ku leh cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:28 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo heˍ ve leh haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:29 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ, chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tuˍ hpfuh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui ve kawˍ taˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi sha tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:30 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ puˍ awˬ pi co-e htaˇ gʼa chehˇ ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ ngaˬ hui tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:31 Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew23:32 Nawˬ hui awˬ puˍ awˬ pi te ve hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ te-o. 
Matthew23:33 Vuiˬ haiˬ awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, suhˉ taˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa geh tuˬ ve hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ponˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Matthew23:34 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ lehˬ tcuh kaˍ paˍ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh lo peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ leh, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo jaw‸ leh, teˇ venˇ peuˬ teˇ venˇ lo nawˬ hui kʼai leh fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew23:35 Hkʼe te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Aˍbeˍlaˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ te leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ leh tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ kaˍ lo nawˬ hui tiˇ pehˍ ve aˍraˍhkiˆ yaˇ paˍ Zaˍhkaˍriˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hkʼa gaˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hkʼa sheˆ peuˬ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ suhˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew23:36 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ chaw chi teˇ co awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew23:37 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ-oˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ tiˇ pehˍ leh, nawˬ geh peu laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ pehˍ ve yoˬ.
