Gʼaˆ ma peuˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ yehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ toˍ la‸ kʼuˉ awˬ hawˉ lo hpoˆ chehˇ piˇ lawˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼaˬ nyiˇ pawˆ hpoˆ chehˇ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ maˇ te." 
Matthew23:38 Nyi loˬ, nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lehˬ, gawˬ cu gawˬ pehˆ te teh taˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew23:39 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo laˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, nawˬ hui maˇ kʼoˆ ve ceh ceh, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:1 Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ beˆ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:2 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui mawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yehˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ shiˍ maˇ cawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ shu te luˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:3 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo mui chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ htaˆ hpeh‸ la tuˬ le. Nawˬ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve leh, miˬguiˬ chi awˬ yanˇ leh tuˬ ve awˬ heˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpehˬ tawˆ la tuˬ ve le. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ a ciˉ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:4 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew24:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw maˇ maˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ laˬ leh, Ngaˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:6 Ma‸ bawˆ ve leh bawˆ da‸-a teh‸ te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa kawˆ cheˇ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve htawˇ, awˬ leh meuˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ." 
Matthew24:7 Chaw teˇ ceuˬ leh teˇ ceuˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ leh teˇ peˆ ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Meu‸ ve kaˆ ve leh miˬ hiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:8 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:9 Oˇ htaˇ, fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:10 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ chiˇ a‸ da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ canˇ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:11 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ maˇ tawˆ la leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:12 Haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ cawˬ maˇ la ve pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ i kʼai yawnˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ yeˬ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:14 Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo ca maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:15 Hkʼe te leh, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Daˍyeˍlaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, te luˬ te sheˆ puiˉ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, (li‸ chi hta‸ gʼaw ve chaw lehˬ shiˍ-o‸.)" 
Matthew24:16 oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpaw-e loˬ." 
Matthew24:17 Yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mawˇ ca yuˬ tuˬ, taˇ kʼaw‸ ya‸-e." 
Matthew24:18 Heh hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ ca kʼaw‸ yuˬ tuˬ taˇ kʼo‸-e." 
Matthew24:19 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yaˇ hu ma leh cuˉ dawˬ ve yaˇ ehˉ cawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:20 Nawˬ hui gʼa hpaw-e ve awˬ yanˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ kaˆ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, shinˉ nyi htaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ gʼa cawˇ tuˬ bon lawˬ-o‸." 
Matthew24:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ maˇ hpeh‸ la jaw sheˍ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, oˇ htaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:22 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve maˇ ngeh piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ponˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngeh piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:23 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Nyi-o, Hkri‸ choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ, oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve kʼo taˇ yonˍ." 
Matthew24:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve Hkri‸ leh maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpeh‸ ve kʼo leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ, uiˍ ve anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:25 Nyi loˬ, maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:26 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui lehˬ, Nyi loˬ, yawˇ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve ka‸ taˇ kʼai. Bawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve ka‸ taˇ yonˍ." 
Matthew24:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ lehˬ mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo ba la leh mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ hpawˇ lo gaˬ ve hkʼe, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve lehˬ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:28 Suh taˍ ve awˬ to hkʼa cawˬ kuiˬ lo, naˬ beuˬ ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:29 Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ mvuhˇ nyi naˆ ho‸ kʼai leh, ha pa htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ ba. Meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ naw ma lo ce la leh, mvuhˇ naw ma ve kanˇ paˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:30 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ heˆ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ paˆ hawˬ leh, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, uiˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇ naw ma ve moˬ hta‸ ciˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:31 Peuˬ leh, behˬ heh ma awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh meuˆ leh, yawˇ yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ awˇ ceˍ miˬ awˍ hpawˇ lo yawˇ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:32 Maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ tehˆ maˍ ve tawˇ pa haˉ chi hta‸ henˇ yuˬ-o‸. Awˬ tuˍ tuˍ la leh, awˬ caˍ caˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ cha hkui yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:33 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ lehˬ yehˬmiˉhpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸." 
Matthew24:34 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chi teˇ co maˇ ponˬ kʼai sheˍ htaˇ, awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:35 Mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬ naˆ ma mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ maˇ mehˉ kʼai taˬ." 
Matthew24:36 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui ka‸, Yaˇ hpu ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:37 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve lehˬ, Noˉa‸ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:38 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Noˉa‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, iˉ kaˆ maˇ htonˍ sheˍ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui lehˬ caˇ ve dawˬ ve, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ leh ka piˇ ve, chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:39 Iˉ kaˆ htonˍ la leh yawˇ hui hta‸ poˬ chiˇ veu htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ ve hkʼe, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:40 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ heh hkʼaw lo teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teh taˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:41 Yaˇ miˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ geh haˉ pui mawˍ geuˆ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teh taˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:42 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ ve Awˬ jawˇmawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ nyi kʼaw‸ gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw shaw taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew24:43 Yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ laˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hkʼawˇ maˇ gʼa lo‸ la tuˬ yawˇ shaw taˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸." 
Matthew24:44 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui htawˇ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, naw hui maˇ dawˇ maˇ gaˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:45 Ka ti‸ yeˬ leh cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu le. Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ yanˇ cawˇ lehˍ caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ pehˬ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve hta‸ awˬ hoˉ te tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:46 Awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve lehˬ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew24:47 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve hta‸ awˬ hoˉ te tcuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew24:48 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haiˬ ve awˬ ceˬ lehˬ, Ngaˬ ve awˬ jawˇmawˇ haˆ haˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ la taˬ teh‸ yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ leh," 
Matthew24:49 awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˆ leh, tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve chaw hui geh caˇ chehˇ dawˬ chehˇ ve kʼo," 
Matthew24:50 awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve maˇ dawˇ maˇ gaˇ ve awˬ nyi, maˇ shiˍ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh," 
Matthew24:51 yawˇ hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ leh chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh chehˇ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Matthew25:1 Peuˬ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ yuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ teˇ chi gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:2 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ leh, ngaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai htaˇ, naˍ manˇ maˇ yuˬ kʼai." 
Matthew25:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ geh teˇ geh naˍ manˇ kaw hta‸ htawˇ yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:5 Awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ haˆ haˆ maˇ laˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ zuh‸ muiˉ jo leh, zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:6 Shehˍ kʼaw hkui htaˇ gaˬ leh, Nyi loˬ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ laˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ yuˬ loˬ teh‸, shu kuˬ hkʼa laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:7 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tu la leh, a shu yawˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ hta‸ gu tuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:8 Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve ngaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui ve kawˆ faiˇ suh la paˇ neˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve naˍ manˇ a ciˉ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve ngaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon leh nawˬ hui awˬ pon naˍ manˇ maˇ law‸ hehˉ. Naˍ manˇ hawˇ shehˍ hpaˇ geh kʼai leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ca vuiˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:10 Yawˇ hui ca vuiˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ laˬ leh, gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkehˉ caˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ geh teˇ geh lo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yehˬ miˉ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:11 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yaˇ miˇ haˉ oˇ ve ngaˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ yehˬ miˉ a ciˉ hpaw laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ shiˍ teh‸, kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:13 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ yanˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw hkʼa deh‸ shaw taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew25:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ leh, yawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˉ ve hta‸ shuˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:15 Yawˇ hui puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ nyi leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpu ngaˇ hinˉ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nyiˇ hinˉ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ hinˉ piˇ taˉ leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:16 Oˇ htaˇ, hpu ngaˇ hinˉ gʼa ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼai leh ca kaˬ ve pa taw, awˬ yawˬ ngaˇ hinˉ kʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:17 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hpu nyiˇ hinˉ gʼa ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, awˬ yawˬ nyiˇ hinˉ kʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hpu teˇ hinˉ gʼa ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve hpu hta‸ yuˬ leh miˬ kʼoˍ ca duˇ faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:19 Awˬ yanˇ maw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve awˍ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh hpu caˇ lanˇ shawˍ nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:20 Hpu ngaˇ hinˉ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, awˬ yawˬ ngaˇ hinˉ hteh‸ ka‸ yuˬ veu laˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hpu ngaˇ hinˉ pe‸ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nyi-o, awˬ yawˬ ngaˇ hinˉ hteh‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:21 Yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Da‸ ve yoˬ. Na yuˬ puiˉ leh da‸ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, i ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ na yuˬ puiˉ ve pa taw, maˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ teh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ha lehˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ htawˇ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:22 Hpu nyiˇ hinˉ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ laˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hpu nyiˇ hinˉ pe‸ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nyi-o, awˬ yawˬ nyiˇ hinˉ hteh‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:23 Yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Da‸ ve yoˬ. Na yuˬ puiˉ leh da‸ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, i ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ na yuˬ puiˉ ve pa taw, maˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ teh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ha lehˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ htawˇ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:24 Hpu teˇ hinˉ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ laˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ te haˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ maˇ sheˍ kuiˬ lo nawˬ gʼeu‸ yuˬ leh, nawˬ maˇ hpeuˇ baˬ kuiˬ lo nawˬ shaw hpoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:25 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ kawˆ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve hpu hta‸ miˬ kʼoˍ hkʼaw duˇ faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nyi-o, nawˬ ve mawˇ nawˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:26 Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Haiˬ ve leh bawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, maˇ sheˍ kuiˬ lo ngaˬ gʼeu‸ yuˬ leh, maˇ hpeuˇ baˬ kuiˬ lo ngaˬ shaw hpoˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve kʼo," 
Matthew25:27 hpu chi ve hta‸ yuˬ leh hpu chiˇ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ chiˇ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, ngaˬ kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ ve hpu chi ve leh awˬ yawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:28 Hkʼe te leh, hpu teˇ hinˉ hta‸ yawˇ geh yuˬ hkʼaw‸ leh, hpu teˇ meunˍ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew25:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ maˇ maˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ cawˬ ve chaw geh, yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ tawˆ sheˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:30 Awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ naˆ ho‸ kuiˬ lo baˬ keu-o. Oˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui hawˬ leh ciˬ geu‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:31 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ geh laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve kʼaw jaw awˬ hkʼoˆ yawˇ mui tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:32 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawnˬ la leh, yawˬ hawˉ paˍ, yawˬ leh aˉ che‸ hta‸ pehˬ da‸ ve hkʼe, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ pehˬ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:33 Yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ taˍ leh, aˉ che‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ la‸ mehˍ paˉ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:34 Oˇ htaˇ, la‸ sha paˉ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa geh awˬ bon gʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, laˬ-o‸. Miˬguiˬ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui awˬ pon gu taˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ chehˇ la-o." 
Matthew25:35 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˍ meu‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ awˍ caˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ taw laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew25:36 Ngaˬ veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ veu‸ kʼaˇ feuˉ laˇ ve yoˬ, Ngaˬ chehˇ haˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ nyi laˇ ga laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca nyi la ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:37 Oˇ htaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˍ meu‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh awˍ caˍ laˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le. Nawˬ iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh iˉ kaˆ taw laˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le." 
Matthew25:38 Nawˬ hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le. Veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ leh veu‸ kʼaˇ feuˉ laˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le. 
Matthew25:39 Nawˬ chehˇ haˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh nawˬ hta‸ ca nyi la ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:40 Oˇ htaˇ, Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui te piˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hta‸ te laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:41 Oˇ htaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh, neˇhaiˬ leh yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ hui awˬ pon gu taˍ ve co co taiˍ taiˍ to‸ chehˇ ve aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e loˬ." 
Matthew25:42 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˍ meu‸ ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ caˍ laˇ. Ngaˬ iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ maˇ taw laˇ." 
Matthew25:43 Ngaˬ hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ. Ngaˬ veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ feuˉ laˇ. Ngaˬ chehˇ haˍ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ ca nyi la teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:44 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˍ meu‸ ve, iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve, hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve, veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve, chehˇ haˍ ve, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, nawˬ hta‸ maˇ ga laˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:45 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ te piˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ te laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew25:46 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ ciˍ yanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:1 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew26:2 Nyiˇ nyi peuˬ kʼo, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ peh tuˬ, shu chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:3 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hui lehˬ, Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ meh ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve shaˉ nanˉ lo hpawnˬ da‸ leh," 
Matthew26:4 hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew26:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Chaw chi ma ve duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ te teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:6 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw hkiˬ tu‸ paˍ Siˉmonˍ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ htaˇ," 
Matthew26:7 yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve naˍ manˇ hawnˉ keu taˍ ve hpuˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui kaw teˇ maˬ yuˬ laˬ leh, hpui lawˇ paˇ lo Yeˍsuˆ mui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ naˍ manˇ hawnˉ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:8 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hta‸ yehˇ baˬ ve le." 
Matthew26:9 Naˍ manˇ hawnˉ chi ve hta‸ awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ chaweh hawˇ leh haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ pehˬ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew26:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ chi hta‸ shiˍ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ miˇ chi hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te sho‸ sha‸ piˇ ve le. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ te laˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew26:11 Haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Matthew26:12 Naˍ manˇ hawnˉ chi ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ laˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ tuˍ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon yawˇ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:13 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi, miˬguiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo ca maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ miˇ chi hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ te taˍ ve kanˉ chi hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:14 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui geh kʼai leh," 
Matthew26:15 Nawˬ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma pe‸ laˇ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpu shehˆ chi hteh‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:16 Oˇ teˇ hkui hta‸ tanˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, da‸ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ Yuˇda‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:17 Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, aˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon hkʼaˬ lo teˇ kaˬ gu tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:18 Yawˇ lehˬ, Venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw oˇ ve hpaˇ geh kʼai leh, Saˍ la‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ yanˇ neˇ la peuˬ. Nawˬ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ hta‸ ngaˬ caˇ tuˬ yoˬ ceˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew26:19 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tcuh ve hkʼe awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ te leh, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ca gu ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:20 Mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ geh hpui lawˇ paˇ lo yawˇ mui caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:21 Yawˇ hui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew26:22 Yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ laˇ teh‸ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:23 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ geh teˇ hkehˇ tiˉ hkaˆ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew26:24 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ gʼa kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ chiˇ a‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve maˇ paw la ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:25 Yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yoˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:26 Yawˇ hui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yuˬ leh caˇ-oˆ. Chi lehˬ ngaˬ ve awˬ to yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:27 Kawˆ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ chi hta‸ dawˬ-o‸." 
Matthew26:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi lehˬ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ, chaw maˇ maˇ awˬ pon ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:29 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:30 Peuˬ leh yawˇ hui kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ kʼa peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui tawˆ-e leh Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:31 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ya‸ puiˉ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw nyi ma luˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˬ hawˉ paˍ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˆ pehˍ leh, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˆ da‸ leh teˇ kaˬ teˇ hkeh hpaw kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:32 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui gʼuˇ suhˍ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:33 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ pa taw shu hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma luˬ htawˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ nyi ma maˇ luˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:34 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ya‸ puiˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew26:35 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ gʼa suh ve htawˇ, nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ chiˇ baˬ taˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:36 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh kʼai leh, Geˍseˍmaˍniˆ meh ve teˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo bon ca lawˬ htaˇ, nawˬ hui choˬ kaˬ lo mui taˍ-o‸ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:37 Peuˬ leh, Peˍtruˆ leh Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ veu ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ nyi ma dawˇ haˍ jaˇ, sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ la leh," 
Matthew26:38 yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nyi ma dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve suh la yoˬ. Choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ leh ngaˬ geh teˇ geh shaw taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew26:39 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ a ciˉ kʼai leh, yawˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ sheˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ pa-oˬ, kawˆ chi hta‸ ngaˬ ponˬ kʼai hpeh‸ ve kʼo, ponˬ kʼai tcuh laˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Nawˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:40 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh yawˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, yawˇ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Teˇ naˍ riˍ ceh ka‸ nawˬ hui ngaˬ geh shaw taˍ maˇ hpeh‸ laˇ." 
Matthew26:41 Nawˬ hui beˬ ve lawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ bon lawˬ leh shaw taˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ hui te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ htawˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:42 Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, Ngaˬ pa-oˬ, kawˆ chi hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ dawˬ leh ponˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸, bon kʼaw‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:43 Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼaw‸ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui zuh‸ muiˉ geu‸ jaˇ ve pa taw zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:44 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ teh taˉ leh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ yawˇ lawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ bon kʼaw‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:45 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh yawˇ kʼaw‸ la leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa leh gʼaˇ jehˇ chehˇ sheˍ laˇ. Nyi loˬ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, chaw haiˬ hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Matthew26:46 Tu, kʼai-a veuˬ. Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:47 Yawˇ tawˇ yaw chehˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, aˉ htaw pfuhˇ leh suhˆ taˬ taˆ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:48 Yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ heˆ chi hkʼe te tuˬ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve, Ngaˬ boˆ nu ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tiˍ taˍ-o‸." 
Matthew26:49 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼai leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ boˆ nu ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:50 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ dawˇ taˍ leh laˬ ve hkʼe te-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ vawˆ leh yuˬ tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:51 Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve aˉ htaw gʼawˬ tawˆ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ chaw leh, naˍ paw cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:52 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve aˉ htaw hta‸ awˬ hpui awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ keu-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˉ htaw hkʼa yehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, aˉ htaw hta‸ pa taw luˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew26:53 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ moˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸ ngaˬ geh peu laˇ tuˬ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ Awˬ pa geh lawˬ maˇ gʼa teh‸ nawˬ dawˇ ve laˇ." 
Matthew26:54 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ oˇ hkʼe lawˬ ve kʼo, chi hkʼe gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve Li‸ hpu teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te biˇ la tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:55 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ hta‸ ca hpeh yuˬ ve hkʼe aˉ htaw leh suhˆ taˬ teˇ hpaˍ yuˬ veu laˇ leh, ngaˬ hta‸ ca hpeh la ve laˇ. Teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkaw lo ngaˬ mui taˍ leh maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ hpeh yuˬ." 
Matthew26:56 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh hpaw-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:57 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ lo, paw hkuˇ lonˉ Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ geh yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:58 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve shaˉ nanˉ awˬ paˇ lo ko taˍ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ hkʼa gaˬ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai leh, awˬ lawn chi awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼa gaˬ gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ lo‸-e leh shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:59 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, yawˇ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui ca ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:60 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ maˇ tu la leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo laˬ ve htawˇ, jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ ca maˇ mawˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ htaˇ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew26:61 Chi hpaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ ngaˬ te luˬ leh, shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te gʼa ve yoˬ ceˇ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:62 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ tu la leh, Nawˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve laˇ. Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ awˬ lawn aˬ hto‸ ma shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:63 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ yoˬ laˇ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hkanˍ tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:64 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yoˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, Kanˇ paˆ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui leh, mvuhˇ naw ma ve moˬ hta‸ ciˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:65 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ tzuh‸ suhˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma shaˉ hkiˆ kʼaw‸ loˍ sheˍ le. Yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew26:66 Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ lehˬ suh keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:67 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ chu-eˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:68 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hta leh kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ a shu dawˆ laˇ ve le. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:69 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, shaˉ nanˉ awˬ paˇ lo ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬhkʼaw hpawˇ lo mui chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceˬ ma teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Nawˬ htawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:70 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Peˍtruˆ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ leh, Nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:71 Peuˬ leh, Peˍtruˆ ko taˍ kuiˬ yehˬ miˉ awˬ baˬ lo tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ ma teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ leh, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:72 Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ leh, Chaw oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:73 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw gaˬ leh, oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ Peˍtruˆ geh laˬ leh, Nawˬ htawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ tawˇ yaw ve hkawˇ hta‸ na ve ceh ka‸, ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:74 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ hkeu leh, Chaw oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew26:75 Gʼaˆ hpfuh maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ Peˍtruˆ dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh gʼaˇ hte‸ hawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:1 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:2 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpeh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ sheh veu leh, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ Piˉla‸ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:3 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ shu suhˉ taˆ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh, hpu oˇ ve shehˆ chi hteh‸ hta‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼaw‸ yuˬ laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew27:4 Venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ ngaˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ venˇbaˆ te peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Nawˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼaˇ nawˬ nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:5 Hpu oˇ ve hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu taˉ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ kʼawˍ peˍ ca nyiˉ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:6 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpu oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh, Hpu chi lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, hpu tanˇ geh hkaw‸ da‸ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:7 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tuˍ piˇ tuˬ, hpu oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh mu‸ hkʼu te shehˍ hpaˇ ve miˬ guiˬ teˇ peˆ hta‸ vuiˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:8 Hkʼe te leh, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ miˬguiˬ oˇ ve teˇ peˆ hta‸ Awˬ suhˍ miˬguiˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:9 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Yeˍraˍmiˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ awˬ hpfuhˇ kʼoˆ cheˆ taˍ ve, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hpu shehˆ chi hta‸ yuˬ leh," 
Matthew27:10 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ laˇ ve hkʼe, mu‸ hkʼu te shehˍ hpaˇ ve miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui vuiˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:11 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ chehˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ miˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yoˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:12 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ." 
Matthew27:13 Oˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Nawˬ awˬ lawn yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hkanˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ kaˇ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ lehˬ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve pa taw, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:15 Pawehˇ oˇ ve hta‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw chi ma ve nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ hpehˇ piˇ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:16 Oˇ htaˇ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ meh bvuhˬ ve Baˍraˍbaˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui awˬ pon a shu hta‸ hpehˇ tcuh gaˇ le. Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkawehˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve pa taw yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:19 Peuˬ leh, suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ mui chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe shanˍ piˇ ve, Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ya‸ nyi yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ zuh‸ maˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa tu‸ hkanˍ jaˇ peuˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:20 Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ lawˬ yuˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:21 Mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ lehˬ, Chaw chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ pon hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpehˇ tcuh gaˇ le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi htaˇ, Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:22 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:23 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le. Yawˇ haiˬ ve aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:24 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, yawˇ te‸ chiˉ te maˇ gʼa ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, shu duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te tawˆ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ iˉ kaˆ yuˬ leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ la‸ sheh tsuhˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ suhˍ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ taˇ gaˬ la piˇ. Nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:25 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ ngaˬ hui leh ngaˬ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ gaˬ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:26 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ jaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:27 Oˇ htaˇ mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shiˍ kʼai leh, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ ta‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpawnˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:28 Yawˇ hui yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ kʼehˆ baˬ leh, nyiˉ-ehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma yawˇ hta‸ deh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:29 Aˉ chuˇ te hta‸ yuˬ leh shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼe te gʼa‸ leh, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ la‸ sha paˉ ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo, lo taˬ teˇ taˬ vawˆ taˍ tcuh leh, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve, Yuˇda‸ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh kʼoˆ guiˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:30 Yawˇ hta‸ ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ leh, lo taˬ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ yuˬ leh yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ dawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:31 Yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼehˆ baˬ leh, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ feuˉ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ sheh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:32 Yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, Siˉmonˍ meh ve Kuˇreˍneˍ venˇ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ nyiˉ leh Yeˍsuˆ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:33 Gawˇlaˍgawˇtaˆ meh ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh oˇ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, oˉ koˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:34 Hkʼaˇ ve naˆ tsuhˇ hkaw‸ taˍ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ leh‸ nyi sheˬ leh maˇ dawˬ." 
Matthew27:35 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu peuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kuˇ da‸ leh yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:36 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo mui leh yawˇ hta‸ shaw taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:37 Chaw chi lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve li‸ yawˇ hui bvuh‸ leh, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo nehˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:38 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh chaw hkʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ, la‸ sha paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:39 Kʼai chehˇ laˬ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ leh, a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hiˆ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew27:40 Bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ te luˬ leh shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te gʼa ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ponˬ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ kʼo, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:41 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui lehˬ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:42 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Shu hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ maˇ gʼa. Yawˇ lehˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la piˇ sheˍ. Oˇ htaˇ heh‸, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Matthew27:43 Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ cuˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼui sha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:44 Yawˇ geh teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve chaw hkʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:45 Mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼa gaˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:46 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼe gaˬ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh te leh, Eˇliˆ, Eˇliˆ, laˍmaˍ saˍbaˆtaˍniˍ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, Ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ laˇ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:47 Oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Eˇliˇya‸ hta‸ kuˬ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:48 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ mvuhˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh, ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, lo taˬ hta‸ choˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:49 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Taˇ te sheˍ. Eˇliˇya‸ yawˇ htaˬ ca htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ la tuˬ leh naˍ, nyi taˍ shaˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:50 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kuˬ leh shaˉ cheˆ ve yoˬ. 
Matthew27:51 Oˇ htaˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ ve hpaˬ kaˍ lehˬ, awˬ na te leh awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa gaˬ nyiˇ hkoˇ tzuh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ. Miˬ hiˆ leh, haˉ pui teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hkoˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:52 Tuˍ hpfuh teˇ hpaˍ hpaw sheˬ leh, suh taˍ peuˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ awˬ to kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:53 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, da‸ kehˬ ve venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:54 Ma‸ poˍ leh yawˇ geh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shaw chehˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬ hiˆ ve leh hkʼa hpeh‸ la ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ leh, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve yaˇ hpu teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:55 Oˇ kaˬ a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo yaˇ miˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ chehˇ leh nyi taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh yawˇ hta‸ te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Matthew27:56 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ leh, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ hui ve awˬ e, chi teˇ hpaˍ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:57 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, Aˍriˆma‸htehˍ venˇ yaˇ Yoˇseh‸ meh ve paw sha paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:58 Yawˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ piˇ tuˬ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:59 Hkʼe te leh Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ yuˬ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, da‸ kehˬ ve hpa hpu yuˬ htiˆ sheˬ leh, haˉ pui htawˆ taˍ ve," 
Matthew27:60 yawˇ ve tuˍ hpfuh awˬ suhˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo uiˍ jaˇ ve haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ tsuhˇ taˉ leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. 
Matthew27:61 Oˇ kaˬ lo Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Maˍriˆ teˇ gʼaˇ, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ vuiˇ maˇ neˇ kuiˬ lo mui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:62 Pawehˇ te tuˬ gu ve awˬ nyi peuˬ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh hpawnˬ kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Matthew27:63 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, heˍ puiˉ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ te‸ chehˇ htaˇ, Shehˆ nyi peuˬ kʼo ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:64 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca hkʼawˇ yuˬ leh, Yawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ teh‸, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa ca kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ, shehˆ nyi hkʼa gaˬ tuˍ hpfuh oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shaw taˍ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˉ lawˉ heˍ ve a‸ kehˉ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ heˍ ve lehˬ, leuˉ leh jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:65 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui geh shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Kʼai leh nawˬ hui te gʼa ve hkʼe, hkʼa deh‸ te leh shaw tcuh-o teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew27:66 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui kʼai leh, tuˍ hpfuh hta‸ shu hpaw maˇ gʼa tuˬ haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ sheˬ leh, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ shaw tcuh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:1 Shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi peuˬ leh, suhˍ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ htiˇ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Maˍriˆ teˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tuˍ hpfuh hta‸ ca nyi ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:2 Oˇ htaˇ miˬ hiˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la leh haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ sheˬ leh, haˉ pui shiˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:3 Yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han lehˬ, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ htawˇ vaˇ meu-e hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpu ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:4 Shaw shehˍ hpaˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw cheˇ jaˇ leh, chaw suh hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:5 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. La‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ ca nyi la ve ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:6 Yawˇ choˬ kaˬ maˇ chehˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ kuiˬ lo ca nyi la-o." 
Matthew28:7 Haˆ haˆ kʼo‸-e leh, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ ca hto piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui gʼuˇ suhˍ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼai peuˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ sheˍ. Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:8 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kawˆ ka‸ kawˆ, ha lehˬ ka‸ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ cawˬ haˉ tuˍ hpfuh lo tu leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ tuˬ gʼuiˇ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:9 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ca ha‸ la leh, Awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ ve hkui sheh hta‸ ca vawˆ taˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:10 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ca hto piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:11 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, hkʼa hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:12 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui lehˬ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hui geh hpawnˬ da‸ leh jehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui hpu maˇ maˇ piˇ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Matthew28:13 Tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ ngaˬ hui zuh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca hkʼawˇ yuˬ la ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shu hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew28:14 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ gʼa kaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ beˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:15 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui hpu oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh, shu yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ bvuhˬ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:16 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Matthew28:17 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
Matthew28:18 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui geh jiˆ laˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ve kanˇ paˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ." 
Matthew28:19 Hkʼe te leh nawˬ hui kʼai leh, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ca te-o. Awˬ pa, Yaˇ hpu leh da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo yawˇ hui hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Matthew28:20 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ na yuˬ leh te tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Miˬguiˬ chi awˬ yanˇ leh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. 
Mark1:2 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nyi loˬ, nawˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu taˍ laˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ peu kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:3 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu taˍ loˬ. Yawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ te-o teh‸, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:4 Yoˇhanˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa gʼa tuˬ, venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:5 Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ Yoˇhanˬ geh kʼai ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ leh, Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:6 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, kaˍlaˍoˆ awˬ mvuh te taˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, caw‸ cehˍ nyi lo shaˍ guiˬ haˍ pi caˆ tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Paˉ ce‸ leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw ve pehˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ yawˇ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:7 Yawˇ bon maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ lehˍ te leh yawˇ ve hkuiˉ nuˆ caˆ hta‸ hpui tuˬ ve ceh ka‸ maˇ keunˍ." 
Mark1:8 Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:9 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ tawˆ la leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:10 Yeˍsuˆ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw leh Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ aˉ pui kʼaˍ hkʼe yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ ya‸ la ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:11 Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:12 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ peu ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:13 Yawˇ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo awˇ chi nyi chehˇ leh, Saˍtanˍ yawˇ hta‸ beˬ ve lawˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hpaˍ geh chehˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ loˍ ve hta‸ ga piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:14 Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ shu hpeh yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ lo laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:15 Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ yanˇ biˇ la peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ peu. Venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ yonˍ loˬ teh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:16 Gaˍliˍlehˇ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo Yeˍsuˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo geu‸ hpehˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ ngaˇ ca paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:17 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chaw ca shehˍ hpaˇ te tcuh laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:18 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ geu‸ hta‸ teh taˉ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:19 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ a ciˉ kʼaw‸ kʼai htaˇ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw geu‸ gu tawˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:20 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼaˇ ga caˇ paˍ hui geh awˬ pa Zeˍbeˍdehˇ hta‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo teh taˉ peuˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:21 Yawˇ hui Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ lo taˆ-e leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:22 Yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui maˍ piˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ maˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:23 Oˇ teˇ hkui yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:24 Yawˇ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ te luˬ laˇ tuˬ nawˬ laˬ ve laˇ. Nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:25 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ deˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ta‸ iˉ chehˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:26 Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ lehˬ, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ hpeˆ dawˇ tcuh leh, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:27 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi ve lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Maˍ piˇ ve chi lehˬ, awˬ suhˉ teˇ ceuˬ law leˇ. Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ tawˇ piˇ leh yawˇ hui na yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:28 Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ cawˬ haˉ Gaˍliˍ lehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:29 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hui bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ geh Siˉmonˍ leh Anˍdrehˍ hui ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:30 Siˉmonˍ awˬ miˇ ma ve awˬ e kaˆ naˬ leh zuh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ lawn Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui teˇ cawˬ haˉ hto piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:31 Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ vawˆ leh tu la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve kaˆ naˬ ve na-e la leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:32 Mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ peuˬ leh mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, neˇ geh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:33 Venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yehˬmiˉhpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:34 A naˍ laiˉ ceuˬ te naˬ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Neˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve pa taw Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ maˇ yaw tcuh." 
Mark1:35 Mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸, mvuhˇ maˇ htiˇ sheˍ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tu leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:36 Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ geh chehˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍYeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa‸ ca ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:37 Yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ, Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:38 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo cawˬ ve venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ bon gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe te tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:39 Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ bon ca maˍ piˇ leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:40 Hkiˬ tu‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ te gaˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ nawˬ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:41 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve pa taw, la‸ sheh che leh yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ te gaˇ ve yoˬ. Da‸ la kehˬ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:42 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ hkiˬ tu‸ a naˍ mehˉ kʼai leh yawˇ da‸ la kehˬ la ve yoˬ. 
Mark1:43 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ hehnˇ chaweh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Mark1:44 Awˬ lawn chi chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ ca hto piˇ. Nawˬ kʼai leh paw hkuˇ hta‸ nawˬ awˬ to ca maw piˇ-oˆ. Shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ ve awˬ pon Moˉseˍ awˬ liˇ teh taˍ ve hkʼe, tanˇ tuˬ ca tanˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ leh teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark1:45 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ ca kʼaoˍ piˇ leh, teˇ kaˬ le le awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ kʼai piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ venˇ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaw hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e maˇ hpeh‸ leh, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hpawˇ chi hpawˇ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:1 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw, Yeˍsuˆ Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh, yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ shu gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:2 Chaw hpawnˬ la maˇ jaˇ ve pa taw yehˬ hkʼaw chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo ka‸ chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ. Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ," 
Mark2:3 hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ chaw awˇ gʼaˇ taˆ veu laˇ leh yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. 
Mark2:4 Chaw chehˇ maˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ geh yawˇ hui lo‸-e maˇ gaˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ lo beh taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui hpaˆ pawnˍ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh hpaˆ pawnˍ taˍ kuiˬ lo, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw zuh‸ taˍ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yawˇ hui hpehˇ ya‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:5 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw hta‸, Yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:6 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo mui chehˇ leh, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve," 
Mark2:7 Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve le. Yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, venˇbaˆ hta‸ a shu hpehˇ hkʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Mark2:8 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo teˇ cawˬ haˉ shiˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui nyi ma hkʼaw aˬ hto‸ ma te chi hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve le." 
Mark2:9 Hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ a ciˉ kʼoˆ piˇ sha le. Nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Tu leh nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ taˆ leh juˇ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ." 
Mark2:10 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ leh, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Mark2:11 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, tu loˬ. Nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ taˆ leh nawˬ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:12 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tu leh, zuh‸ hpui hta‸ taˆ veu leh chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw chi ma ve anˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ leh, Ngaˬ hui teˇ pawˆ ka‸ chi hkʼe ve hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:13 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ loˉ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:14 Yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼaw‸ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw kuiˬ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍlaˍhpehˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Leˍviˆ mui chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tu leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:15 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Leˍviˆ aˉ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui maˇ maˇ htawˇ yawˇ hui geh mui caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui maˇ maˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:16 Awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ awˍ caˇ chehˇ ve hta‸, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui geh hkʼa geh caˇ ve le teh‸, na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:17 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chehˇ sha ve chaw hui naˆ tsuhˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ maˇ loˍ. Naˬ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ loˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:18 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, shu Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce chehˇ ve ka‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ caˇ tuˬ maˇ ce ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:19 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw hui geh chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce tuˬ leh laˇ. Yawˇ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ ve ceh ceh, yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce maˇ hpeh‸." 
Mark2:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh yuˬ hpaˆ piˇ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark2:21 Veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ hpa awˬ suhˉ a shu ka‸ maˇ nehˉ jaw. Oˇ hkʼe nehˉ ve kʼo, hpa awˬ suhˉ lehˬ awˬ piˍ hta‸ gʼawˬ leh, leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ tzuh‸ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark2:22 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ piˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ a shu ka‸ maˇ keu jaw. Oˇ hkʼe keu ve kʼo, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ lehˬ, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui hta‸ te hkoˇ ve pa taw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ sheˆ leh, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui htawˇ luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ suhˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa keu ve yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:23 Shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ heh hkʼaw hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui caˬ nu hta‸ chehˆ yuˬ leh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:24 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nyi-o, shinˉ nyi htaˇ te maˇ keunˍ te maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw te ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:25 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Daˍviˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˍ meu‸ leh caˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa gʼaw jaw leh laˇ." 
Mark2:26 Aˍbiˍaˍtaˍ paw hkuˇ lonˉ te chehˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Daˍviˆ lo‸-e leh, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ heˆ kʼo teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ caˇ maˇ keunˍ caˇ maˇ cawˇ ve, tanˇ taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ leh, awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ pehˬ caˍ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:27 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Shinˉ nyi lehˬ chaw yaˇ awˬ pon te taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark2:28 Chaw yaˇ lehˬ, shinˉ nyi awˬ pon te taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, shinˉ nyi ve awˬ jawˇmawˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:1 Yawˇ bon yehˬ hkʼaw kʼaw‸ lo‸-e htaˇ, oˇ kaˬ lo la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:2 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ gʼa tuˬ, shinˉ nyi htaˇ chaw naˬ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ leh naˍ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:3 Yawˇ lehˬ, la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ suh ve chaw hta‸, Nawˬ tu leh awˬ kʼaw ji ca huˉ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:4 Peuˬ leh yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Shinˉ nyi htaˇ da‸ tuˬ te cawˇ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo luˬ tuˬ te cawˇ laˇ. Shu ve a sha‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ cawˇ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo tiˇ pehˍ cawˇ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:5 Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma zuhˆ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui nyi ma heh ve pa taw yawˇ dawˇ haˍ leh, chaw oˇ ve hta‸, Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh che-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ la‸ sheh che leh na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:6 Hkʼe te leh, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui tawˆ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ Heˍroˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh ca jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:7 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh gʼuiˬ po hpawˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:8 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ, Iˇduˇmehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ leh, Tuˇruˆ venˇ leh Siˉdonˍ venˇ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, yawˇ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, awˬ moˍ lonˉ te leh yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:9 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa buiˆ tuˬ, Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ teˇ maˬ hta‸ gu taˍ-o‸ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw naˬ maˇ maˇ hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve pa taw, naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa htawˇ tuˬ, yawˇ geh gʼaˇ hte‸ buiˆ lo‸ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:11 Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ boˆ sheˬ leh, Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:12 Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn shu hta‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ piˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ hehnˇ chaweh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:13 Peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:14 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ geh chehˇ tcuh tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ca maˍ tcuh tuˬ," 
Mark3:15 neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ hpeh‸ ve kanˇ paˆ piˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:16 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ," 
Mark3:17 Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ, Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ, (yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ Bawˇneˍgehˆ meh piˇ ve, tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, mvuhˇ tawˍ yaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ)," 
Mark3:18 Anˍdrehˍ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ, Baˍhtawˇlaˬmehˇ, Ma‸htehˍ, Htoˉma‸, Aˍlaˍhpehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ, Htaˍdehˇ, Hkaˍnaˍniˆ awˬ moˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw Siˉmonˍ leh," 
Mark3:19 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ hui yoˬ. 
Mark3:20 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ hpawnˬ la ve pa taw, yawˇ hui awˍ ka‸ caˇ maˇ tanˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:21 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Yawˇ gʼuˇ kʼai peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ca hpeh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:22 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo ya‸ la ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ Beˍsaˍbuˇlaˆ geh taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Neˇ jawˇ mawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:23 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ leh, tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍtanˍ lehˬ Saˍtanˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gʼa‸ kʼoˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Mark3:24 Mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ maˇ cawˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve kʼo, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve yeˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Mark3:25 Yehˬ teˇ yehˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ maˇ cawˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve kʼo, yehˬ oˇ ve yeˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Mark3:26 Saˍtanˍ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ leh hpaˆ da‸ ve kʼo, yawˇ htawˇ yeˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Yawˇ luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tu yoˬ." 
Mark3:27 Awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hta‸ awˉ lawˉ maˇ hpeh tiˍ taˍ kʼo, a shu htawˇ yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh yawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hta‸ hpeh tiˍ taˍ peuˬ htaˇ heh‸, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark3:28 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw yaˇ hui te ve venˇbaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ hkʼa kʼoˆ hkʼa yaw ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark3:29 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ venˇbaˆ maˇ hpehˇ piˇ taˬ. Yawˇ co co taiˍ taiˍ venˇbaˆ cawˬ taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:30 Yawˇ neˇ cha‸ chiˆ cawˬ ve teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:31 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e leh awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ baˬ hpawˇ huˉ taˍ leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca ku‸ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:32 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ mui chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ e leh nawˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ ca leh awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:33 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ e leh ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ a shu le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark3:34 Hkʼa caw zuhˇ mui chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ caw nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ e leh ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi loˬ." 
Mark3:35 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ hkʼa te ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ awˬ nyi ma leh ngaˬ ve awˬ e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:1 Teˇ pawˆ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve pa taw, gʼuiˬ po hkʼaw cawˬ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw yawˇ ca lo‸ mui ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:2 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tawˇ pa haˉ te leh, awˬ lawn laiˉ ceuˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve," 
Mark4:3 Na sheˍ. Awˬ yawˇ sheˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ yawˇ ca sheˍ ve yoˬ. 
Mark4:4 Yawˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo ce leh, ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ gʼawˆ caˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:5 Awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ miˬ shaˍ paˇ kuiˬ haˉ pui de lo ce leh, miˬ shaˍ maˇ naˉ ve pa taw, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yeˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ yeˬ oˇ ve awˬ geu maˇ naw‸ ve pa taw, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ la htaˇ, haw jaˇ chiˆ jaˇ leh nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:7 Awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ aˉ chuˇ de lo ce ve yoˬ. Aˉ chuˇ buiˇ uiˍ la leh awˬ yeˬ hta‸ hoˆ ve pa taw, awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸." 
Mark4:8 Peuˬ leh awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ miˬ hkuiˇ da‸ kuiˬ lo ce ve yoˬ. Awˬ yeˬ yeˬ la uiˍ la leh, awˬ shiˍ maˇ maˇ naw‸ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ shiˍ shehˆ chi pun, hkaw‸ chi pun leh teˇ ha pun naw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:9 Kaˇ tuˬ naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw hui hkʼa deh‸ na-o teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
Mark4:10 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ shu maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw leh tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ca na nyi la ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:11 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˇ pa haˉ tiˉ gʼa te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:12 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, Yawˇ hui nyi ve ka‸ nyi maˇ mawˬ. Yawˇ hui kaˇ ve ka‸ na maˇ gʼa. Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la leh yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:13 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tawˇ pa haˉ chi ve hta‸ nawˬ hui na maˇ gʼa leh laˇ. Na maˇ gʼa ve kʼo, tawˇ pa haˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te na gʼa tuˬ le." 
Mark4:14 Awˬ yawˇ sheˍ paˍ lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:15 Ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo bon hkawˇ sheˍ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ htaˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ Saˍtanˍ laˬ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ taˍ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:16 Haˉ pui de lo sheˍ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, teˇ cawˬ haˉ ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ geu maˇ naw‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ jaw ceh tiˉ te‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ bon hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ leh fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hui luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:18 Aˉ chuˇ de lo sheˍ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, yawˇ hui bon hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ ve htawˇ," 
Mark4:19 chi miˬguiˬ dawˇ haˍ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve pa taw, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la maˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:20 Miˬ hkuiˇ da‸ kuiˬ lo sheˍ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh ha‸ yuˬ ve pa taw, awˬ shiˍ shehˆ chi pun, hkaw‸ chi pun, teˇ ha pun naw‸ la ve chaw hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:21 Peuˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Kawˆ faiˇ tuˉ leh hkʼawˍ lawˇ tcuhˍ mvuh‸ taˍ tuˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, ku-iˍ hawˉ teh taˍ tuˬ laˇ. Kawˆ faiˇ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo teh taˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Mark4:22 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼa faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Shu hta‸ maˇ shiˍ tcuh ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba kuiˬ lo tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark4:23 Kaˇ tuˬ naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw a shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa deh‸ na-o." 
Mark4:24 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui kawˬ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kawˬ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ leuˉ ka‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark4:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ cawˬ ve chaw geh, yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ tawˆ sheˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:26 Yeˍsuˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ heh hkʼaw lo awˬ yawˇ sheˍ ve hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:27 Yawˇ mvuhˇ hpeu‸ zuh‸ leh mvuhˇ shawˉ tu la ve yoˬ. Awˬ yawˇ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yeˬ la uiˍ la ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ. 
Mark4:28 Miˬguiˬ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ awˬ yeˬ yeˬ la leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ nu, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ nu awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la maˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:29 Meh la leh gʼeu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve pa taw, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ law‸ kʼawˉ yuˬ leh gʼeu‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:30 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma yuˬ leh tehˆ da‸ nyi tuˬ le. Tawˇ pa haˉ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ yehˇ leh tehˆ maˍ tuˬ le." 
Mark4:31 Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, gʼawˇ caˉ yawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ heh hkʼaw lo sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve awˬ yawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ i ve htawˇ," 
Mark4:32 sheˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ yeˬ yeˬ la uiˍ la leh, gʼawˇ hpa‸ mvuhˬ naweh hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ uiˍ la leh, mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ ve ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ aˉ gʼuiˬ ha baˬ kuiˬ lo gʼaˇ jehˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:33 Yawˇ hui na gʼa puiˉ ve hkʼe ceh, chi hkʼe ve tawˇ pa haˉ maˇ maˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:34 Tawˇ pa haˉ maˇ yehˇ kʼo, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui ceh tiˉ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa deh‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:35 Oˇ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, Coˇ paˉ hpawˇ lo hkanˍ kʼai-a veuˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:36 Hkʼe te leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ hui hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh, Yeˍsuˆ chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ yawˇ hui geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:37 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ la leh, gʼuiˬ baˇ teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ htinˍ lo‸ la ve pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo iˉ kaˆ biˇ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:38 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ mehˍ hpawˇ lo uˉ gehˇ tcuhˉ leh, zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca nawˍ piˇ leh, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ hui luˬ kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ dawˇ nyi leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:39 Yeˍsuˆ tu la leh mvuhˇ haw hta‸ deˇ piˇ leh, gʼuiˬ po hta‸, Ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ haw dehˬ kʼai leh, ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:40 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw kawˆ ve le. Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ leh laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark4:41 Yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Chi hpaˇ a shu le. Mvuhˇ haw leh gʼuiˬ po yawˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve law teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:1 Hkʼe te leh, gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ, Gaˍdaˍ raˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ hui gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:2 Yeˍsuˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la htaˇ, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ chaw tuˍ hpfuh lo tawˆ la leh yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:3 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw tuˍ hpfuh teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ kuiˬ lo tiˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ hpeh tiˍ taˍ maˇ gʼa. Sho caˆ yuˬ leh hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve ka‸ maˇ gʼa." 
Mark5:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, laiˉ pawˆ shu yawˇ hta‸ sho kawˬ sho caˆ yuˬ hpeh tiˍ taˍ htawˇ, yawˇ sho caˆ hta‸ gʼawˬ cheˆ leh, sho kawˬ hta‸ awˉ hteh ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ meuˇ la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Mark5:5 Tuˍ hpfuh teˇ hpaˍ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yawˇ kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸, haˉ pui shiˍ yuˬ leh gui htu-iˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:6 Yeˍsuˆ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ chaw oˇ ve gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ geh gʼuiˇ laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:7 Yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuh jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ-oˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai-o teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Mark5:9 Nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma meh le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Ngaˬ hui maˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh lehˬ Leˍjonˍ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:10 Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa gʼa‸ tawˆ tuˬ, yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:11 Hkʼaw oˇ ve awˬ ba‸ le lo, va‸ moˍ lonˉ kʼaˆ caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:12 Hkʼe te leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve, Va‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:13 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ kʼai leh va‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Va‸ awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, miˬ haˍ kuiˬ lo gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼuiˇ ya‸-e leh, gʼuiˬ po hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh kʼa suh peuˬ sheˬ ve yoˬ. Va‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe nyiˇ hinˉ hkeh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:14 Va‸ hawˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ gʼuiˇ kʼo‸-e leh, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ ca nyi la ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:15 Yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ Leˍjonˍ geh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh leh mui chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve nyi ma awˉ lawˉ htaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ kʼaw‸ da‸ la ve hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:16 Gʼa mawˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, neˇ geh ve chaw awˬ lawn leh va‸ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn, ca nyi la ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:18 Yeˍsuˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh jaw ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ geh chehˇ tuˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:19 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ chehˇ tcuh. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ aˉ hkʼaw kʼo‸-e leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼui sha nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ga laˇ leh ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve awˬ lawn, nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:20 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ga laˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn, Deˍkaˍpawˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ ca kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:21 Yeˍsuˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo kʼaw‸ hkanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gʼuiˬ po paˇ chehˇ taˍ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:22 Oˇ htaˇ, Yaˍiˉruˆ meh ve bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ te ve teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve hkui paˇ lo boˆ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:23 Yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve yaˇ miˇ ehˉ suh la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ na-e la leh a sha‸ gʼa te‸ tuˬ, nawˬ laˬ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh a ciˉ ca taˍ piˇ la-o teh‸, gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:24 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ Yaˍiˉruˆ geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, yawˇ hta‸ buiˆ heuˆ ca‸ heuˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:25 Teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ suhˍ ya‸ la chehˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Mark5:26 Naˆ tsuhˇ shehˍ hpaˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yehˇ peuˬ htawˇ, yawˇ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ na-e la ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, a naˍ oˇ ve shaˬ te shaˬ kʼaw‸ jaˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:27 Yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ jaw ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ lo laˬ leh, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ca htawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ceh ngaˬ gʼa htawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ na-e la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:29 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ suhˍ ya‸ la ve teˇ cawˬ haˉ cheh sheˬ leh, yawˇ na-e la peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:30 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ tawˆ kʼai ve hta‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼa shiˍ ve pa taw, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ hpfuhˆ nyi leh, Ngaˬ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ a shu htawˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:31 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ nawˬ hta‸ buiˆ heuˆ ca‸ heuˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ mawˬ chehˇ ve ka‸, Ngaˬ hta‸ a shu htawˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve laˇ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:32 Yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ laˇ ve chaw hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ Yeˍsuˆ hkʼa caw zuhˇ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark5:33 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ kawˆ cheˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ boˆ sheˬ leh, awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ hto piˇ ve yoˬ."
