Mark5:34 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ peuˬ. Dawˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ chehˇ sha la piˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:35 Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yehˬ lo laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ suh peuˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma te Saˍ la‸ hta‸ kʼaw‸ sho‸ sha‸ piˇ ve le." 
Mark5:36 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ maˇ na leh, bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Taˇ dawˇ haˍ. Yonˍ ve tiˇ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:37 Peˍtruˆ, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yoˇhanˬ, yawˇ hui shehˆ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ laˬ tcuh." 
Mark5:38 Yawˇ bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yehˬ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, shu duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te leh, gʼaˇ hte‸ hawˬ leh paˆ hawˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:39 Yeˍsuˆ aˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te leh hawˬ chehˇ ve le. Yaˇ ehˉ chi suh ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:40 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpawnˬ gʼuiˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa‸ tawˆ sheˬ leh, yaˇ ehˉ ve awˬ pa awˬ e leh yawˇ geh laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, yaˇ ehˉ teh taˍ kuiˬ lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:41 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yaˇ miˇ ehˉ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ vawˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Taˍliˇtaˍkuˇmiˆ. Tawˇ oˇ ve tcuhˉ kui lehˬ, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, tu la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:42 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ ehˉ oˇ ve teˇ cawˬ haˉ tu la leh, ya‸ kʼaw toˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ a sha‸ teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ gaˬ peuˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ maˇ tawˆ leh anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark5:43 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shu teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ tawˇ piˇ peuˬ leh, Yaˇ miˇ ehˉ hta‸ caˇ tuˬ caˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:1 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Mark6:2 Shinˉ nyi gaˬ leh bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼa kaˇ ve chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ anˇ jaˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve le. Yawˇ gʼa ve cuˇ yiˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve cuˇ yiˍ le. Chi taw taw kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ yawˇ la‸ hkʼaw hkʼaˬ hkʼe te hpeh‸ la ve le." 
Mark6:3 Yawˇ lehˬ, Maˍriˆ ve yaˇ paˍ la‸shaˉmaˉ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yaˍkoˆ, Yoˇseˍ, Yuˇda‸, Siˉmonˍ hui ve awˬ viˉ paˍ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yawˇ awˬ nyi ma teˇ hpaˍ ka‸, ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma luˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:4 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi leh, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:5 Chehˇ haˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh gu na-e piˇ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ kʼo, oˇ kaˬ lo kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve hta‸ yawˇ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
Mark6:6 Yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ puiˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ teˇ hkʼaˆ peuˬ teˇ hkʼaˆ lo hkʼa zuhˇ kʼai leh bon maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:7 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ leh, nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ kaˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ kaˬ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:8 Juˇ fuiˍ teˇ taˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ awˬ pon awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu te‸ chiˉ taˇ yuˬ kʼai. Miˉ chaw ka‸, hkaoˍmonˇ ka‸ taˇ pfuhˇ kʼai. Haˍ pi caˆ hkʼaw lo hpu taˇ doˆ pfuhˇ kʼai." 
Mark6:9 Hkuiˉ nuˆ tcuhˉ leh, aˉ po‸ teˇ hkʼoˆ ceh tiˉ deh kʼai-o teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:10 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ kaˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu ve yehˬ hkʼaw nawˬ hui lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, hkʼaˆ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ tawˆ kʼai sheˍ ve ceh ceh, oˇ ve teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Mark6:11 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ kaˬ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ leh nawˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na ve kʼo, oˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ hui tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ te maˍ piˇ tuˬ, hkui taw kʼaw hta‸ ngawˉ taˍ ve je‸ meu-e hta‸ hpi baˬ taˉ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:12 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai leh, Chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bon maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:13 Yawˇ hui neˇ maˇ maˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ leh, naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ naˍ manˇ shehˍ leh gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:14 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai jaˇ ve pa taw, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ la peuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:15 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ Eˇliˇya‸ yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:16 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ gʼa kaˇ leh, Chaw chi lehˬ, ngaˬ oˉ kʼoˍ tawˆ peuˬ ve Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:17 Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ ve awˬ miˇ ma Heˍroˍdiˆ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ heuˆ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ chaw hta‸ hpehˇ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:18 Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, Nawˬ awˬ nyi paˍ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ nawˬ heuˆ maˇ cawˇ teh‸, Yoˇhanˬ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Mark6:19 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Heˍroˍdiˆ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ canˇ jaˇ leh tiˇ pehˍ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tiˇ pehˍ maˇ hpeh‸ sheˍ." 
Mark6:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ kawˆ leh hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yoˇhanˬ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ chehˇ ve htawˇ, ha lehˬ ha kʼa na gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:21 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ paw ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ pawehˇ te ve awˬ nyi kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ hawˉ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, ma‸ poˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw ve awˬ hoˉ awˬ naˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ leh hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:22 Awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve pa taw, Heˍroˍdiˆ ve awˬ yaˇ miˇ lo‸-e leh pawehˇ te maˍ piˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ leh yawˇ geh mui caˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ yaˇ miˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve hkʼe lawˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:23 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ yawˇ hkanˍ leh yaˇ miˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ, ngaˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hkoˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:24 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve tawˆ kʼai leh, Ngaˬ aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ gʼa lawˬ tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Awˬ e lehˬ, Baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ lawˬ yuˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:25 Hkʼe te leh, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ geh haˆ haˆ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh kʼoˆ ve, Baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkehˇ pe le awˬ hkʼaw keu leh ngaˬ hta‸ haˆ haˆ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:26 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw leh yawˇ geh mui caˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ te luˬ gaˇ." 
Mark6:27 Oˇ htaˇ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ ca tawˆ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼai leh, htawnˍ hkʼaw lo Yoˇhanˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:28 Oˉ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hkehˇ pe le hkʼaw keu veu laˇ leh yaˇ miˇ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh awˬ yaˇ miˇ htawˇ, awˬ e hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:29 Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui laˬ leh yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ yuˬ leh, tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw lo ca tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:30 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpawnˬ la leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa te hkʼa maˍ ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼaoˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:31 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ laˬ-o‸. Heh puiˉ hkʼaw chaw gawˬ kuiˬ lo gʼaˇ a ciˉ ca jehˇ sheˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw maˇ maˇ yiˬ yiˬ laˬ laˬ te chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hui awˍ ka‸ caˇ maˇ tanˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:32 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw chaw gawˬ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:33 Yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai ve hta‸ chaw maˇ maˇ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ venˇ chi venˇ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui gʼuiˬ po jaˇ lo gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:34 Yeˍsuˆ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ paˍ maˇ cawˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh awˬ lawn laiˉ ceuˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:35 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Choˬ kaˬ lehˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw hpeh‸ leh, mvuhˇ ka‸ hpeu‸ la yoˬ." 
Mark6:36 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ hkʼaw pan hkʼaw lo kʼai leh caˇ tuˬ ca vuiˬ caˇ-e tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ caˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ nyiˇ ha hteh‸ hpfuhˇ ca vuiˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼa caˍ piˇ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:38 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui geh hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ diˬ cawˬ le. A ciˉ ca nyi sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui ca nyi peuˬ leh, Hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ leh ngaˇ nyi hkeh cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:39 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Mvuh‸ nawˉ lehˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ awˬ moˍ awˬ moˍ te mui tcuh-o teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:40 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, teˇ ha gʼaˇ teˇ moˍ, ngaˇ chi gʼaˇ teˇ moˍ, chi hkʼe awˬ moˍ awˍ moˍ te mui ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:41 Yeˍsuˆ hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve ngaˇ diˬ leh ngaˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ hkeh hta‸ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hkʼeh‸ peuˬ leh, chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼu suhˍ lo ca chiˇ teh piˇ tuˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ hkeh hta‸ htawˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:42 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:43 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, caˇ leuˉ ve hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼeh‸ leh ngaˇ shaˍ awˬ peˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ hkʼa biˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:44 Hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ ve chaw hui, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chaw mawˇ tiˉ ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:45 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ hpehˇ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw teˇ cawˬ haˉ lo‸-e tcuh leh, gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ Behˇsehˇdaˆ venˇ lo yawˇ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ hkanˍ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:46 Yawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon ca lawˬ tuˬ yawˇ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:47 Mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la htaˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ po awˬ kʼaw ji lo gaˬ peuˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ chehˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:48 Mvuhˇ haw hpawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve pa taw, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ gʼawˆ heuˬ jaˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, tanˇ hkuiˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ gʼuiˬ po hkʼoˆ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ ponˬ kʼai-a teh‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:49 Yawˇ gʼuiˬ po hkʼoˆ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, chaw ha ku yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ leh, gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:50 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ yaw leh, Nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te-o. Taˇ kawˆ, ngaˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:51 Oˇ htaˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw yawˇ yawˇ hui geh lo‸-e leh, mvuhˇ haw dehˬ sheˬ leh, yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ tehˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:52 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ anˇ tuˬ te maˍ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui maˇ dawˇ shiˍ maˇ dawˇ pawnˍ. Yawˇ hui nyi ma ka‸ heh chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:53 Yawˇ hui gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo hkanˍ kʼai leh, Geˍneˍsaˍrehˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo hpeh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:54 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui tawˆ-e leh, chaw teˇ hpaˍ teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:55 Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ teˇ kaˬ le le lo gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaˬ lo chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ kʼo, chaw naˬ chaw gawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ zuh‸ hpui hkʼoˆ taˆ veu leh, oˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark6:56 Yawˇ hkʼa lo‸-e kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le, hkʼaˆ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇ hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, pan hkʼaw maˇ kʼoˆ, tcuh awˬ paˇ chaw hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ lo chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu ca yuˬ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ awˬ caˍ hta‸ ceh gʼa htawˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh, hkʼa htawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo laˬ ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:2 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ la‸ sheh maˇ kehˬ leh awˬ caˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. La‸ sheh maˇ kehˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe la‸ sheh maˇ tsuhˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, chaw mawˇ hui piˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te leh, la‸ sheh maˇ tsuhˇ kʼo, caˇ tuˬ maˇ caˇ." 
Mark7:4 Tcuh ca huˉ kʼaw‸ la htaˇ ka‸, yawˇ hui iˉ kaˆ maˇ hehˉ kʼo, caˇ tuˬ maˇ caˇ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, kawˆ, hkehˇ, kuiˇ mu‸ hkʼu teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ ve awˬ liˇ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ liˇ laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui yehˇ chehˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:5 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw mawˇ hui awˬ liˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw maˇ te le. La‸ sheh maˇ kehˬ leh aˬ hto‸ ma te caˇ tuˬ caˇ ve le." 
Mark7:6 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw heˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼawngaˬ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve htawˇ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ vuiˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:7 Chaw yaˇ hui teh taˍ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:8 Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui baˬ taˉ leh, chaw yaˇ hui ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:9 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te gʼa tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui baˬ taˉ puiˉ ve law." 
Mark7:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o. Peuˬ leh, A shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa suh ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui lehˬ, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸, Ngaˬ geh hkʼa cawˬ ve nawˬ hui gʼa cawˇ ve mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ ve Kawˍbanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve kʼo," 
Mark7:12 yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ nawˬ hui a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ ga piˇ tcuh. 
Mark7:13 Teˇ caˉ peuˬ teˇ caˉ chaw yaˇ geh gʼa ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ te pehˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe ve awˬ liˇ laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark7:14 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ geh kʼaw‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ ve tawˇ hta‸ na leh shiˍ-o‸." 
Mark7:15 Awˬ baˬ hpawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ hpaˆ da‸ leh yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e htaˇ, tawˇ pa haˉ oˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:18 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui htawˇ na maˇ gʼa leh laˇ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ te leh awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ hkʼa lo‸-e ve teˇ ceuˬ le le yawˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Mark7:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo maˇ lo‸-e. Yawˇ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, aˉ kʼa‸ yiˬ kuiˬ lo baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ da‸ ve kehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Mark7:20 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ nyi ma hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ ve, guiˇ ya‸ ve, shu mawˇ hkʼawˇ ve, chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve," 
Mark7:22 shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, awˬ haiˬ te ve, shu hta‸ heˍ ve, te ponˬ te leuˉ ve, hkawehˉ ve, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve, nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve, maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Mark7:23 Haiˬ ve chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ tawˆ la leh, chaw yaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:24 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, Tuˇruˆ leh Siˉdonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ hpawˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ yehˬ teˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ tcuh piˇ gaˇ htawˇ, yawˇ ca va‸ taˍ maˇ gʼa." 
Mark7:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ e lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ leh, yawˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh yawˇ ve hkui paˇ lo boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:26 Yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ tawˆ tuˬ yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Suˇriˇhpiˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Heˍlaˍsaˆ ma hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:27 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˍ piˇ sheˍ. Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˍ piˇ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:28 Yaˇ miˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ caˇ sheˆ dawˬ sheˆ taˍ ve hta‸ hpui lawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo gʼawˆ caˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:29 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve pa taw, kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:30 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve yawˇ aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ ehˉ zuh‸ hpui hkʼaw zuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ ka‸, neˇ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:31 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ Tuˇruˆ mvuhˇ miˬ hkʼaw kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Siˉdonˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo te leh Deˍkaˍpawˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ kʼaw ji lo hpanˍ kʼai leh, Gaˍliˍlehˇ gʼuiˬ po lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:32 Oˇ htaˇ, naˍ paw pawˇ leh tawˇ hkʼa deh‸ yaw maˇ gʼa ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ veu laˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:33 Hkʼe te leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼaw Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ tawˆ-e leh, baˬ kuiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve naˍ paw hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve la‸ naw juˆ keu leh, ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ sheˬ leh yawˇ ve ha tehˍ hta‸ htawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:34 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi peuˬ leh hkʼanˇ leh, Eˇhpaˍtaˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, hpaw piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:35 Hkʼe te leh, chaw oˇ ve naˍ paw kaˇ la leh, ha tehˍ awˬ kuˇ caˆ nuˇ kʼai leh tawˇ hkʼa deh‸ kʼaw‸ yaw gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:36 Awˬ lawn chi chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hto piˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ shaˬ tawˍ taˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hui shaˬ leuˉ leh shu hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark7:37 Yawˇ hui maˇ maˇ anˇ jaˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ da‸ lehˍ te peuˬ. Naˍ paw pawˇ ve chaw hui kaˇ la tuˬ yawˇ te leh, kʼaˍ ve chaw hui tawˇ yaw puiˉ tuˬ ka‸ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:1 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw awˬ moˍ uiˍ jaˇ ve kʼaw‸ hpawnˬ la leh, yawˇ hui geh caˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Mark8:2 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ chi hta‸ ngaˬ ha kʼaˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve shehˆ nyi gaˬ peuˬ leh, caˇ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ." 
Mark8:3 Yawˇ hui awˍ meu‸ jehˇ chehˇ leh ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve kʼo, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo gʼaˇ nuˇ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:4 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Choˬ kaˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chaw chi ma ve hta‸ hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˍ piˇ tuˬ hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼaˬ lo ca gʼa tuˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:5 Nawˬ hui geh hkaoˍ monˉ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ diˬ cawˬ le teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Hkaoˍmonˇ suhˍ diˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:6 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ mui tuˬ yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hkaoˍ monˇ oˇ ve suhˍ diˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hkʼeh‸ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ca chiˇ teh piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ca chiˇ teh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:7 Yawˇ hui geh ngaˇ ehˉ ka‸ a ciˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ca chiˇ teh piˇ-oˆ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:8 Yawˇ hui hkʼa bvuhˆ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˇ leuˉ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, suhˍ hkʼawˍ lawˇ hkʼa biˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:9 Caˇ ve chaw aˬ laˬ hkʼe awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:10 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, Daˍlaˍmaˍnuˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:11 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma ve awˬ heˆ yawˇ geh lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:12 Yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw hkʼanˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi teˇ co lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw awˬ heˆ hta‸ lawˬ ve le. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw chi teˇ co hta‸ awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:13 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:14 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hkaoˍmonˇ yuˬ kʼai tuˬ leunˇ taˉ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw yawˇ hui hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ diˬ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:15 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ ve diˇ leh jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ve diˇ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te leh jaw kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:16 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:17 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ maˇ yuˬ laˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw kʼoˆ da‸ ve le. Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ gaˬ maˇ dawˇ shiˍ sheˍ leh laˇ. Nawˬ hui nyi ma heh chehˇ sheˍ leh laˇ." 
Mark8:18 Nawˬ hui mehˆ shiˍ cawˬ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ leh laˇ. Naˍ paw cawˬ ka‸ maˇ kaˇ leh laˇ. Nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ nawˇ leh laˇ. 
Mark8:19 Ngaˬ hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh, chaw ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ caˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui awˬ leuˉ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ gʼa ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:20 Ngaˬ hkaoˍmonˇ suhˍ diˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh, chaw awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ caˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui awˬ leuˉ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ gʼa ve le teh‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi htaˇ, suhˍ hkʼawˍ lawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:21 Peuˬ leh yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸, Chi beu‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ shiˍ sheˍ leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:22 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui Behˇsehˇdaˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ geh shiˍ laˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ tuˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:23 Yawˇ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ gʼawˬ leh hkʼaˆ awˬ baˬ lo sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ keu piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh, Nawˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ mawˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:24 Chaw oˇ ve chiˇ nyi leh, Ngaˬ chaw teˇ hpaˍ htaˬ mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ suhˆ cehˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve ka‸, ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:25 Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ la‸ sheh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ htawˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ teˇ pawˆ hkʼa deh‸ kʼaw‸ nyi htaˇ, mehˆ shiˍ da‸ la leh hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ kehˬ lehˍ mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:26 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸, Hkʼaˆ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ lo‸-e teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:27 Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ Kehˉsaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ na nyi ve, Shu ngaˬ hta‸ a shu hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le." 
Mark8:28 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Eˇliˇya‸ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, peuˬ leh teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:29 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ a shu hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:30 Yawˇ awˬ lawn chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hto piˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ hehnˇ chaweh piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:31 Oˇ htaˇ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:32 Awˬ lawn chi yawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:33 Yeˍsuˆ hpfuhˆ nyi leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, saˍtanˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ lo jiˆ kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ maˇ heˆ. Chaw yaˇ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh yawˇ hta‸ deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark8:34 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ gaˇ ve kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸." 
Mark8:35 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve a sha‸ shonˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ awˬ pon leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ pon yawˇ ve a sha‸ shonˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark8:36 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa htawˇ, yawˇ ve a sha‸ shonˇ kʼai ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le." 
Mark8:37 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh pa gʼa tuˬ le." 
Mark8:38 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, te ya‸ puiˉ leh venˇbaˆ te puiˉ ve chaw chi teˇ co awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ leh ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ya‸ taw ve kʼo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ Awˬ pa ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kehˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui geh teˇ geh laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ ya‸ taw tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark9:1 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, choˬ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, maˇ gʼa suh teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:2 Hkaw‸ nyi pon peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ, Yaˍkʼoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ ceh shiˍ veu leh mvuh ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hui taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han pa leh," 
Mark9:3 yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba la leh hpu da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ mawˇ tsuhˇ paˍ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˇ hkʼe taw taw tsuhˇ hpu maˇ gʼa." 
Mark9:4 Moˉseˍ leh Eˇliˇya‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tawˆ la leh Yeˍsuˆ geh na‸ uˉ te da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark9:5 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui choˬ kaˬ chehˇ ve lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui aˉ po kʼo shehˆ shiˍ te tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ, Moˉseˍ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ leh Eˇliˇya‸ awˬ pon teˇ shiˍ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
Mark9:7 Oˇ htaˇ, moˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hoˆ taˍ beh taˍ leh, Chaw chi lehˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na-o teh‸, moˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:8 Yawˇ hui teˇ cawˬ haˉ caw nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ mawˬ. Yeˍsuˆ ceh tiˉ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:9 Hkʼaw oˇ ve teˇ shiˍ lo yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ ya‸ la chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ suh kuiˬ lo maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la sheˍ ve ceh ceh, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hto piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:10 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ tawnˇ taˍ leh, Suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ kʼoˆ ve le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ na nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:11 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Eˇliˇya‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:12 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Eˇliˇya‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na laˬ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gu te ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh chiˇ baˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw bvuh‸ taˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Eˇliˇya‸ gaˬ la peuˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ te gaˇ ve hkʼe te piˇ peuˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:14 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh kʼaw‸ gaˬ la htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ chehˇ taˍ leh, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui geh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:15 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ anˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ geh gʼuiˇ kʼai leh yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:16 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui yawˇ hui geh aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
Mark9:17 chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ nawˬ geh shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, kʼaˍ ve neˇ geh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:18 Neˇ yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, neˇ yawˇ hta‸ ca‸ baˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw awˬ fuˇ tawˆ la leh, ciˬ geu‸ leh awˬ to heh kuˉ lehˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Neˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui te maˇ gʼa teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:19 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yonˍ ve maˇ cawˬ ve chaw chi teˇ co-e, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ maw gʼa chehˇ tuˬ sheˍ le. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ maw gʼa yeunˇ hkanˍ tuˬ sheˍ le. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh yuˬ laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:20 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. Neˇ oˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ paw‸ hpeuˆ piˇ lawˬ leh, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ paiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw awˬ fuˇ tawˆ la leh hpeˆ dawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:21 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yawˇ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hkʼaˬ maw gaˬ peuˬ le teh‸, awˬ pa hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ pa kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ i htaˇ ka‸ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:22 Yawˇ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, laiˉ pawˆ neˇ yawˇ hta‸ ca‸ keu piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te hpeh‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh ga laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:23 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Te hpeh‸ ve kʼo teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ ve laˇ. Yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:24 Oˇ htaˇ yaˇ paˍ ehˉ ve awˬ pa teˇ cawˬ haˉ kuˬ leh, Ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yonˍ maˇ biˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ a ciˉ ga laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:25 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ geh gʼuiˇ laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ oˇ ve hta‸ deˇ leh, Kʼaˍ leh naˍ paw pawˇ ve neˇ-oˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:26 Oˇ htaˇ, neˇ oˇ ve bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ paw‸ hpeuˆ tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ ehˉ oˇ ve chaw suh hkʼe hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Yawˇ suh peuˬ teh‸, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ vawˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ tu piˇ leh yawˇ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:28 Yeˍsuˆ aˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Neˇ oˇ ve hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw ngaˬ hui gʼa‸ kʼoˬ maˇ gʼa ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:29 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Bon lawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, neˇ chi teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ maˇ gʼa teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:30 Yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼai ve awˬ lawn chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark9:31 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehˆ nyi gaˬ kʼo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:32 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui na maˇ gʼa htawˇ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi maˇ haˆ." 
Mark9:33 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui Kaˍpeˍ neˍonˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn jehˬ da‸ ve le teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:34 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve le teh‸ ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:35 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ mui taˍ leh, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, Shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ gaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ i ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:36 Peuˬ leh, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ leh yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo taˍ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ taˆ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Mark9:37 Yaˇ ehˉ chi hkʼe ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ha‸ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:38 Oˇ htaˇ Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh laˬ ve chaw maˇ heˆ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:39 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh anˇ tuˬ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ haˆ haˆ kʼaw‸ hkʼaiˉ gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Mark9:40 Ngaˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ hpawˇ maˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:41 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ nawˬ hui pfuhˇ taˍ ve pa taw, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ iˉ kaˆ teˇ kawˆ taw laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ bon a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ mehˉ taˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:42 Ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve kʼawˍ peˍ hta‸ haˉ pui mawˍ lonˉ hpeh kʼu leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ce peu ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:43 Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, tawˆ baˬ-o‸. La‸ sheh nyiˇ paˉ paˉ cawˬ leh, moˬ naˆ ho‸ lo maˇ suh puiˉ ve aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, la‸ luˬ leh a sha‸ te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Nawˬ ve hkui sheh teˇ paˉ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, tawˆ baˬ-o‸. Hkui sheh nyiˇ paˉ paˉ cawˬ leh moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, hkui luˬ leh a sha‸ te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ teˇ paˉ nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, kʼehˉ baˬ-o‸. Mehˆ shiˍ nyiˇ paˉ paˉ cawˬ leh, awˬ pfuhˇ ma maˇ suh puiˉ, aˬ miˍ ka‸ maˇ suh puiˉ ve moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ," 
Mark9:48 mehˆ shiˍ teˇ paˉ tiˉ cawˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark9:49 Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˉ leh‸ yuˬ leh tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ pfuhˍ piˇ ve hkʼe, aˬ miˍ pfuhˍ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark9:50 Aˉ leh‸ lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mehˬ ve pehˆ kʼai peuˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼaw‸ mehˬ la tuˬ le. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo aˉ leh‸ cawˬ piˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:1 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo cawˬ ve Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ tawn lo kʼai leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh kʼaw‸ hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ liˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:2 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ, Hpaˍriˍ sehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Awˬ hpawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ hpeh‸-aw laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:3 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Moˉseˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe piˇ taˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
Mark10:4 Baˬ da‸ ve li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ piˇ peuˬ kʼo, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ hpeh‸-aw teh‸ Moˉseˍ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:5 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui nyi ma heh ve pa taw Moˉseˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ leh yaˇ miˇ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:7 Chi hta‸ pa taw hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh," 
Mark10:8 yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ suhˍ teˇ shaˍ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
Mark10:9 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha caˉ da‸ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ chaw yaˇ maˇ gʼa yuˬ hpaˆ da‸ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:10 Yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ lawn oˇ ve yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:11 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, A shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve pa taw, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:12 Yaˇ miˇ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ baˬ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hawˉ hkʼaˆ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve kʼo, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:13 Oˇ htaˇ yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ piˇ tuˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh shiˍ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shiˍ laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:14 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ nyi ma zuhˆ leh, Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh laˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, chaw oˇ hkʼe ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:15 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e taˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:16 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ taˆ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh bon na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:17 Yawˇ ya‸ kʼaw kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh gʼuiˇ laˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh, Da‸ ve Saˍ la‸-oˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:18 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le. Gʼuiˬsha maˇ heˆ kʼo, da‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Mark10:19 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw hta‸ taˇ tiˇ pehˍ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ taˇ te, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ taˇ hkʼawˇ, shu hta‸ maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ taˇ hkanˍ, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ taˇ heˍ yuˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:20 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ na yuˬ leh te peuˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:21 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ nyi leh yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ leh, Nawˬ teˇ ceuˬ loˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ kʼo‸-e leh hkʼa cawˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ leh haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve mawˇ nawˬ cawˬ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, nawˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:22 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, mehˆ hpfuhˇ nawˍ lehˍ te leh, dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ mawˇ jeˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:23 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ caw nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Paw sha ve chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ hkʼaˬ ma haˍ jaˇ ve le." 
Mark10:24 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ pawˆ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ hkʼaˬ ma haˍ jaˇ ve le." 
Mark10:25 Kaˍ laˍ oˆ teˇ hkeh gʼo‸ naˍ hkʼawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e tuˬ ve lehˬ, paw sha ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ ve a‸ kehˉ sha ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:26 Yawˇ hui leuˉ leh anˇ jaˇ leh, Hkʼe te kʼo, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ a shu gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:27 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi leh, Chaw yaˇ lehˬ chi hta‸ te maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha te maˇ gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:28 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh nawˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:29 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ awˬ pon leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ pon, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh a shu yawˇ ve ti mi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Mark10:30 chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yehˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi, awˬ e, awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh ti mi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teˇ ha pun gʼa ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ htawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:31 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ, shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Shu awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ, shu awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa kʼaw‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:32 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ hui awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ kawˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve," 
Mark10:33 Ngaˬ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ gʼa suh tuˬ ve yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark10:34 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh, ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ leh, yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:35 Oˇ htaˇ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lawˬ ve hkʼe nawˬ te laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:36 Yawˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:37 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Nawˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa htaˇ, nawˬ la‸ sha paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ mui tcuh laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:38 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ lawˬ ve, nawˬ huiˉ maˬ maˇ shiˍ. Ngaˬ dawˬ ve kawˆ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ dawˬ hpeh‸-aw laˇ. Ngaˬ hkanˍ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hkanˍ hpeh‸-aw laˇ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:39 Hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ dawˬ ve kawˆ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkanˍ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark10:40 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ mehˍ paˉ gʼa mui tuˬ, ngaˬ pe‸ laˇ maˇ hpeh‸. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon gu taˍ piˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ oˇ kaˬ lo gʼa mui ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:41 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi gʼaˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:42 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ te tuˬ aˉ yaˇ gʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ uˉ peunˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve chaw uiˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ nyiˉ te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:43 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw uiˍ hpeh‸ gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa te ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:44 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ te gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon yawˇ lehˬ vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:45 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, shu yawˇ awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ shu awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ laˬ leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ, yawˇ ve a sha‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:46 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ geh Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Tiˆmehˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Baˍtiˆmehˇ meh ve mehˆ cuˉ ve lawˬ leh‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo mui chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:47 Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:48 Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Ta‸ iˉ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ deˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:49 Yeˍsuˆ huˉ taˍ leh, Yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui mehˆ cuˉ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ kuˬ leh, Ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Tu loˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:50 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ kʼehˆ teh taˉ leh, pawˆ tu leh Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:51 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ mehˆ mawˬ la tuˬ nawˬ hta‸ te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark10:52 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Kʼai loˬ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ nawˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ cawˬ haˉ mehˆ mawˬ la leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:1 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo, Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hta‸ neˇ ve Behˆhpaˍgeˍ hkʼaˆ leh Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Mark11:2 Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Oˇ kaˬ lo lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ ciˇ jaw sheˍ ve piˉ laˬ ehˉ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark11:3 Hpui leh sheh veu laˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chi hkʼe te ve le teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ na nyi laˇ ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ loˍ leh yawˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ veu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:4 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼai leh, yehˬ miˉ awˬ baˬ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo piˉ laˬ ehˉ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, piˉ laˬ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ hpui ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:5 Oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw piˉ laˬ ehˉ hta‸ hpui ve le teh‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:6 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:7 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ piˉ laˬ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh sheh veu laˇ leh, piˉ laˬ ehˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hkʼawˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ taˆ ciˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:8 Chaw maˇ maˇ a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo hkʼawˇ piˇ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ heh jaˇ lo suhˆ hpa‸ chaw leh ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo hkʼawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:9 Yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Hoˍsaˍnaˍ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo laˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Mark11:10 Laˬ chehˇ ve ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Daˍviˆ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma lo htawˇ Hoˍsaˍnaˍ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:11 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ yawˇ caw nyi peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la ve pa taw tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:12 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la leh, Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˍ meu‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:13 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ htaˇ ka‸ awˬ hpa‸ cawˬ ve maˉ nawˆ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, awˬ cehˬ oˇ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ leh naˍ maˇ naw‸ leh naˍ, gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yawˇ ca nyi ve yoˬ. Awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ heˆ ve pa taw, awˬ hpa‸ hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:14 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, nawˬ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ a shu ka‸ taˇ gʼa caˇ piˇ teh‸, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:15 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo mawˇ vuiˬ mawˇ hawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ leh, hpu pa shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve hpui lawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˉ pui kʼaˍ hawˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve mui hkʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hpfuhˆ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:16 Mawˇ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ yuˬ leh bon yehˬ lonˉ oˇ ve hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai tuˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ." 
Mark11:17 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve yehˬ hta‸ chaw teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ pon bon lawˬ kuiˬ yehˬ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ, yehˬ chi hta‸ chaw hkʼawˇ chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:18 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ ca ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ anˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:19 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ hui venˇ awˬ baˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Mark11:20 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ shawˉ yawˇ hui ya‸ kʼaw oˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼai htaˇ, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ geu hkʼa gaˬ nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:21 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ dawˇ nawˇ la leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nyi sheˍ. Nawˬ hkeu piˇ taˉ ve maˉ nawˆ cehˬ lehˬ, nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai peuˬ law leˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:22 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ loˬ." 
Mark11:23 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ teh‸ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yonˍ leh, nyi ma htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ maˇ te ve kʼo, hkʼaw chi teˇ shiˍhta‸, Jiˆ tawˆ-e leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca ce lo‸-e loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark11:24 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa lawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yonˍ loˬ. Oˇ hkʼe yonˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark11:25 Nawˬ hui huˉ taˍ leh bon lawˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ oˇ ve hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa-o. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ htawˇ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Yawˇ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo toˇ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Mark11:28 Nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve le. Kanˇ paˆ chi a shu nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. 
Mark11:29 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ na nyi shaˍ. Nawˬ hui yaw hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark11:30 Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo gʼa ve laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo chaw yaˇ hui geh lo gʼa ve laˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:31 Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma lo gʼa ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve le teh‸, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark11:32 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ hui geh gʼa ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ shawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ yawˇ hui kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark11:33 Hkʼe te leh, Ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ, Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ hto laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:1 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ teˇ hpaˍ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a pehˉ meuˇ hko te leh ti taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkʼa caw zuhˇ ko taˍ leh, a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ nyiˉ kuiˬ duˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Shaw kuiˬ yehˬ mvuh ve hta‸ htawˇ te leh, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˍ piˇ taˉ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ miˬ lo yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:2 Awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, hko oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:3 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tiˍ taˍ leh dawˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ kʼawˇ lehˍ kʼo‸-e peu ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:4 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ yawˇ hui geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ dawˆ hkʼaw sheˬ leh, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:5 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼai tcuh ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ laiˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼai tcuh ve htawˇ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui dawˆleh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:6 Yawˇ ha‸ jaˇ ve yaˇ paˍ ceh tiˉ yawˇ geh cawˬ taˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui yawˆ yan tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ leh, awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ pawˆ yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, awˬ shinˉ gʼa shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Laˬ-o‸, yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ-a veuˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:8 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hko awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo chiˇ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:9 Hkʼe te leh, hko awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te piˇ tuˬ le. Yawˇ laˬ leh hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hko oˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ ngaˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark12:10 Yehˬ kawˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui baˬ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ lo kawˍ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
Mark12:11 Chi lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha te ve kanˉ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ anˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:12 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ pa haˉ chi yawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ lawn kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:13 Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ya‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ leh Heˍroˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:14 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ maˇ kawˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ nyi leh Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ a moˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ, maˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ." 
Mark12:15 Ngaˬ hui gʼa keu piˇ tuˬ laˇ, maˇ gʼa keu piˇ tuˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ shiˍ leh, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve le. Ngaˬ gʼa nyi tuˬ, hpu teˇ hteh‸ ngaˬ geh yuˬ laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:16 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, A shu ve awˬ han, a shu ve awˬ meh cawˬ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:17 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve mawˇ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:18 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Saˍduˆkehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Mark12:19 Saˍ la‸-oˬ, Moˉseˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ viˉ paˍ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ leh suh ve kʼo, awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ kʼaw‸ heuˆ leh awˬ viˉ paˍ awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ gʼa cawˬ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:20 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi suhˍ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ heuˆ leh, yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:21 Nyi gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ heuˆ leh, yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ suh ve yoˬ. Shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yoˬ." 
Mark12:22 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi suhˍ gʼaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ taˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ suh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve htawˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:23 Kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hpehˬ tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui suhˍ gʼaˇ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ heuˆ peuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:24 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hta‸ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui dawˇ ya‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Mark12:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ka piˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ te. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hkʼe hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark12:26 Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha Moˉseˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Moˉseˍ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw laˇ. Aˉ chuˇ buiˇ awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo, Ngaˬ lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha, Iˉcaˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha leh Yaˍkoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:27 Yawˇ lehˬ, suh ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui dawˇ ya‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:28 Oˇ htaˇ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh yawˇ hui tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ leh, Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ uiˍ leuˉ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:29 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Uiˍ leuˉ ve teˇ maˬ lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, na sheˍ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:30 Nawˬ ve nyi ma hkʼa peu-eˬ, nawˬ ve co ha hkʼa peu-eˬ, nawˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh nawˬ ve awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:31 Nyiˇ hkawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ chi nyiˇ hkawˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:32 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ oˇ ve kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Cawˇ ve yoˬ, Saˍ la‸-oˬ. Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ leh, yawˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Gʼuiˬsha maˇ cawˬ ve teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ hteˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:33 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nyi ma hkʼa peu-eˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ ve lehˬ, aˬ miˍ tuˉ tanˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ leh tanˇ tuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:34 Yawˇ hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nyi leh yaw hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ vuiˇ da‸ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi maˇ haˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:35 Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ teˇ pawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸ lehˬ Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma te li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve le." 
Mark12:36 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu Daˍviˆ hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ taˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ-oˆ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:37 Daˍviˆ awˬ to yawˇ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ ve yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ha lehˬ ha kʼa na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:38 Yawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ve hta‸ deh leh ca te toˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Tcuh hkʼaw lo shu yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˆ yan laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Mark12:39 bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui hkʼawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hti caˇ hti dawˬ kuiˬ lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:40 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mehˇchawˇma ve yehˬ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ leh, venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa tawˆ la tuˬ maw chaweh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh uiˍ jaˇ ve ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:41 Oˇ htaˇ, hpu tanˇ keu kuiˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ teˇ hpawˇ lo yawˇ mui chehˇ leh, chaw chi ma ve hpu tanˇ keu kuiˬ lo hpu keu ve hta‸ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ. Paw sha ve chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ hpu maˇmaˇ keu ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:42 Oˇ htaˇ haˍ gʼawˇ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, kuiˇ peh‸ shanˍ ehˉ nyiˇ maˬ keu ve yoˬ. Peh‸ shanˍ ehˉ oˇ ve nyiˇ maˬ lehˬ, teˇ peh‸ hpfuhˇ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:43 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, hpu tanˇ keu kuiˬ lo keu ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ haˍ gʼawˇ ve mehˇchawˇma chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ leuˉ leh keu maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark12:44 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ tawˆ leh keu ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ miˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve a sha‸ hu tuˬ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ leh keu ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:1 Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nyi sheˍ. Hkʼaˬ ma da‸ jaˇ ve haˉ pui teˇ hpaˍ leh, hkʼaˬ ma da‸ jaˇ ve yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve le." 
Mark13:2 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Uiˍ jaˇ ve yehˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ mawˬ laˇ. Choˬ kaˬ lo haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ shiˍ maˇ cawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ shu te luˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:3 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ teˇ hpawˇ, Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo mui chehˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ, Yaˍkoˆ, Yoˇhanˬ leh Anˍdrehˍ hui laˬ leh," 
Mark13:4 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ htaˆ hpeh‸ la tuˬ le. Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ awˬ heˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ tawˆ la tuˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ a yehˉ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:5 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Mark13:6 Chaw maˇ maˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ laˬ leh, Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:7 Ma‸ bawˆ ve leh bawˆ da‸-a teh‸ te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui kawˆ cheˇ ve nyi ma taˇ cawˬ piˇ. Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ leh meuˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ." 
Mark13:8 Chaw teˇ ceuˬ leh teˇ ceuˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ leh teˇ peˆ ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo miˬ hiˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Meu‸ ve kaˆ ve htawˇ cawˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:9 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu nawˬ hui hta‸ jaw‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ htaˬ pa taw nawˬ hui mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ leh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa huˉ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shaˉ hkiˆ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:10 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:11 Nawˬ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ laˇ tuˬ shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa yaw tuˬ ve hta‸ taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ yaw tcuh laˇ ve hkʼe ceh tiˉ yaw-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ yaw shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui maˇ heˆ, daˬ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yoˬ." 
Mark13:12 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ suh tuˬ chiˇ a‸ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ pa htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hpfuhˆ leh tiˇ pehˍ tcuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:13 Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ yeˬ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:14 Te luˬ te sheˆ puiˉ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ chehˇ cawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, (li‸ chi hta‸ gʼaw ve chaw lehˬ shiˍ-o‸,) oˇ htaˇ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpaw-e loˬ. Yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw taˇ kʼaw‸ ya‸-e." 
Mark13:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, mawˇ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ ca yuˬ tuˬ, yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ lo‸-e." 
Mark13:16 Heh hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ ca kʼaw‸ yuˬ tuˬ, taˇ kʼo‸-e." 
Mark13:17 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ hu ma leh cuˉ dawˬ ve yaˇ ehˉ cawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:18 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ kaˆ yanˇ maˇ gʼa cawˇ tuˬ bon lawˬ-o‸." 
Mark13:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha te hpanˍ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ maˇ hpeh‸ la jaw sheˍ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:20 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha maˇ ngeh piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ponˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ pa taw, awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ ngeh piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:21 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Nyi-o, Hkri‸ choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ, oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve kʼo, taˇ yonˍ." 
Mark13:22 Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve Hkri‸ leh maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpeh‸ ve kʼo leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ, anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:23 Nawˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark13:24 Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇ nyi naˆ ho‸ kʼai leh, ha pa htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ ba." 
Mark13:25 Meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ naw ma lo ce la leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo cawˬ ve kanˇ paˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:26 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo moˬ ciˇ leh ya‸ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:27 Oˇ htaˇ mvuhˇ awˇ ceˍ miˬ awˍ hpawˇ lo, miˬguiˬ awˬ leh teˇ kaˬ te leh mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ leh teˇ kaˬ hkʼa gaˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼai tcuh leh, yawˇ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:28 Maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ tehˆ maˍ ve tawˇ pa haˉ chi hta‸ henˇ yuˬ-o‸. Awˬ tuˍ tuˍ la leh awˬ caˍ caˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ cha hkui yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:29 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ lehˬ yehˬmiˉhpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸." 
Mark13:30 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chi teˇ co maˇ ponˬ kʼai sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:31 Mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬ naˆ ma mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, maˇ mehˉ kʼai taˬ." 
Mark13:32 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui ka‸, Yaˇ hpu ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:33 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ htaˆ gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, shaˍ ti‸ te leh shaw taˍ-o‸." 
Mark13:34 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve yehˬ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˉ leh, yehˬ miˉ shaw shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ htawˇ hkʼa deh‸ shaw taˍ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark13:35 Hkʼe te leh, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la tuˬ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ htaˇ leh naˍ, shehˍ kʼaw hkui htaˇ leh naˍ, gʼaˆ hpfuh bvuhˬ htaˇ leh naˍ, mvuhˇ shawˉ htaˇ leh naˍ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, shaw taˍ-o‸." 
Mark13:36 Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, nawˬ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark13:37 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼe, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, shaw taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:1 Nyiˇ nyi peuˬ kʼo, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ leh Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ, Chaw chi ma ve duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ te teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:3 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw hkiˬ tu‸ paˍ Siˉmonˍ ve aˉ hkʼaw hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lo‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve naˍ manˇ hawnˉ keu taˍ ve hpuˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui kaw teˇ maˬ yuˬ laˬ leh, kaw oˇ ve hta‸ dawˆ hkoˇ sheˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ naˍ manˇ hawnˉ oˇ ve ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:4 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nyi ma zuhˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo naˍ manˇ hawnˉ chi hta‸ yehˇ baˬ ve le." 
Mark14:5 Naˍ manˇ hawnˉ chi ve hta‸ shehˆ ha hteh‸ hpaˆ hawˇ leh, haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ pehˬ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ chi hta‸ taˇ deˇ. Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te yawˇ hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ piˇ ve le. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ te laˇ peuˬ." 
Mark14:7 Haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ te piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Mark14:8 Yaˇ miˇ chi lehˬ, te puiˉ te hpeh‸ ve hkʼe te peuˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ tuˍ tuˬ awˬ pon, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ naˍ manˇ hawnˉ pfuhˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:9 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ miˬguiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo ca maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ miˇ chi hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ te taˍ ve kanˉ chi hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:10 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:11 Yawˇ hui tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ hpu piˇ tuˬ ka ti‸ te taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, da‸ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ Yuˇda‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:12 Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi htaˇ, paˍsaˍhkaˍ yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ tiˇ tanˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon hkʼaˬ lo teˇ kaˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ca gu tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:13 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Iˉ kaˆ mu‸ hkʼu taˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark14:14 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo lo‸-e ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ. Saˍ la‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ leh ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon teh taˍ ve hkehˉ chaw bawehˇ hkʼaˬ lo le." 
Mark14:15 Oˇ htaˇ, chehˇ kuiˬ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ peuˬ ve, awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ bawehˇ uiˍ ve teˇ bawehˇ yawˇ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hui awˬ pon gu taˍ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:16 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼe gʼa mawˬ leh, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:17 Mehˆ muiˉ naˆ la htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ geh yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:18 Yawˇ hui awˍ mui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ geh teˇ geh hkaˆ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:19 Yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ leh, Ngaˬ laˇ teh‸ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:20 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ geh teˇ hkehˇ tiˉ hkaˆ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ." 
Mark14:21 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ gʼa kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ chiˇ a‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve maˇpaw la ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:22 Yawˇ hui caˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yuˬ-o‸. Chi lehˬ ngaˬ ve awˬ to yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:23 Kawˆ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ yuˬ leh, bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ oˇ ve hta‸ dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:24 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi lehˬ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ chi lehˬ, chaw maˇ maˇ ve awˬ pon ngeuˍ pfuhˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:25 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:26 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ kʼa peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui tawˆ-e leh Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:27 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma luˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˬ hawˉ paˍ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˆ pehˍ leh, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˆ da‸ leh teˇ kaˬ teˇ hkeh hpaw kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ nawˬ hui gʼuˇ suhˍ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:29 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Shu hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma luˬ htawˇ ngaˬ lehˬ nyi ma maˇ luˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:30 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ya‸ puiˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh nyiˇ pawˆ maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:31 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ gʼa suh ve htawˇ, nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ chiˇ baˬ taˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:32 Oˇ htaˇ Geˍseˍmaˍniˆ meh ve teˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui gaˬ leh, Ngaˬ bon ca lawˬ chehˇ htaˇ nawˬ hui choˬ kaˬ lo mui taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:33 Peuˬ leh, Peˍtruˆ, Yaˍkoˆ, Yoˇhanˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh shiˍ veu ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo anˇ jaˇ, sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ la leh," 
Mark14:34 yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nyi ma dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve suh la yoˬ. Choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ leh shaw taˍ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:35 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ a ciˉ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ sheˍ leh, awˬ yanˇ chi ve yawˇ hta‸ ponˬ kʼai gʼa kʼo, ponˬ kʼai laˇ tuˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:36 Aˍbaˆ A pa-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kawˆ chi ve ngaˬ hta‸ ponˬ kʼai tcuh laˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Nawˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:37 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, nawˬ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve laˇ. Teˇ naˍ riˍ ceh ka‸ nawˬ shaw taˍ maˇ hpeh‸ laˇ." 
Mark14:38 Nawˬ hui beˬ ve lawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ bon lawˬ leh shaw taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ htawˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ lehˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:39 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ lawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ bon kʼaw‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:40 Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼaw‸ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui zuh‸ muiˉ geu‸ jaˇ ve pa taw zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
Mark14:41 Shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ yawˇ kʼaw‸ la leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa leh gʼaˇ jehˇ chehˇ sheˍ laˇ. Pehˇ-o, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Mark14:42 Tu, kʼai-a veuˬ. Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:43 Yawˇ tawˇ yaw chehˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, aˉ htaw pfuhˇ leh suhˆ taˬ taˆ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ htawˇ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:44 Yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ heˆ chi hkʼe te tuˬ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve, Ngaˬ boˆ nu ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tiˍ taˍ leh hkʼa deh‸ yuˬ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:45 Yawˇ gaˬ la htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼai leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ leh yawˇ hta‸ boˆ nu ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:46 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ vawˆ leh yuˬ tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Mark14:47 Awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve aˉ htaw gʼawˬ tawˆ leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ chaw leh naˍ paw cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:48 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ hta‸ ca hpeh yuˬ ve hkʼe, aˉ htaw leh suhˆ taˬ teˇ hpaˍ yuˬ veu laˇ leh ngaˬ hta‸ ca hpeh la ve leˇ." 
Mark14:49 Teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ leh maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ hpeh yuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:50 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh hpaw-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:51 Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, pi‸ hpa teˇ hkʼoˆ ceh tiˉ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hawˆ taˍ leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Mark14:52 pi‸ hpa oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ kʼehˆ baˬ taˉ leh awˬ kʼu nyi te hpaw-e ve yoˬ. 
Mark14:53 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ geh yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ oˇ kaˬ lo hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ."
