Mark14:54 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve shaˉ nanˉ awˬ paˇ lo ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ hkʼa gaˬ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai leh, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh mui leh, aˬ miˍ lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:55 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca ve htawˇ, shaˉ hkiˆ ca maˇ mawˬ." 
Mark14:56 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw maˇ maˇ yawˇ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve maˇ hawˍ da‸." 
Mark14:57 Oˇ htaˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tu la leh, yawˇ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Mark14:58 La‸ sheh te taˍ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ chi hta‸ ngaˬ te luˬ leh, la‸ sheh maˇ te ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:59 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve htawˇ, maˇ hawˍ da‸." 
Mark14:60 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ tu leh awˬ kʼaw ji lo huˉ taˍ leh, Nawˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve laˇ. Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ awˬ lawn aˬ hto‸ ma shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:61 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ leh te‸ chiˉ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Awˬ bon uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:62 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yoˬ, ngaˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, Kanˇ paˆ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui leh, mvuhˇ naw ma ve moˬ hta‸ ciˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:63 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ lehˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ tzuh‸ suhˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma shaˉ hkiˆ kʼaw‸ loˍ sheˍ le." 
Mark14:64 Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ lehˬ suh keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:65 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ ve, yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ beh taˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ chu-eˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ dawˆ leh yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:66 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ hawˉ lo ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve awˬ ceˬ ma teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh," 
Mark14:67 Peˍtruˆ aˬ miˍ lehˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, Nawˬ htawˇ Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:68 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Peˍtruˆ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ leh, Nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ, na ka‸ na maˇ gʼa teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, ko taˍ kuiˬ yehˬ miˉ awˬ baˬ lo yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:69 Awˬ ceˬ ma oˇ ve teˇ pawˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ mawˬ htaˇ, awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸, Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:70 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw gaˬ leh awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:71 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hkeu leh, Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark14:72 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ. Gʼaˆ hpfuh nyiˇ pawˆ maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ Peˍtruˆ dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ hawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:1 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui lehˬ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ geh jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpeh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ sheh veu leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:2 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yoˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:3 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ maˇ maˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:4 Hkʼe te leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve laˇ. Yawˇ hui nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ hkʼaˬ ma taˍ ve hta‸ nyi sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve pa taw jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ anˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:6 Pawehˇ oˇ ve hta‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hui lawˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:7 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ kʼai leh chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve Baˍraˍbaˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hpfuhˆ kʼai ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh htawnˍ hkʼaw hpeh keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:8 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼai leh awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:9 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui awˬ pon Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tcuh gaˇ ve laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkawehˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ maˇ hpehˇ leh Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉteˇ hpaˍ lehˬ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ ca juˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:12 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
Mark15:13 Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:14 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le. Yawˇ haiˬ ve aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:15 Hkʼe te leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ te gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui awˬ pon Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ jaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:16 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve hawˉ yehˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai leh, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ ta‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:17 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpa nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma yawˇ hta‸ deh piˇ ve yoˬ. Aˉ chuˇ te hta‸ htawˇ yuˬ leh, shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼe te gʼa‸ leh yawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:18 Yuˇda‸ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˆ yan ve hkʼe te leh yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:19 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui lo taˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ dawˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ leh, hkui tcuhˉ teh leh yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:20 Yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼehˆ baˬ leh yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ feuˉ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:21 Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ leh Ruˇhpuˆ awˬ pa, Siˉmonˍ meh ve Kuˇreˍneˍ venˇ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, heh hkʼaw kʼai kʼaw‸ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ nyiˉ leh Yeˍsuˆ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:22 Gawˇlaˍgawˇtaˆ meh ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh oˇ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, oˉ koˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:23 Muˇraˍ hkaw‸ taˍ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ maˇ dawˬ." 
Mark15:24 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui lehˬ veu‸ kʼaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkʼoˆ hta‸ a shu gʼa cawˇ leh naˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui kuˇ da‸ leh yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ pehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:25 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ shawˉ kʼawˇ naˍ riˍ teˇ yanˇ yoˬ." 
Mark15:26 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve li‸ yawˇ hui bvuh‸ nehˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Mark15:27 Peuˬ leh yawˇ geh teˇ geh chaw hkʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ, la‸ sha paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Kʼai kʼai laˬ laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ leh, a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hiˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Eˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ te luˬ leh shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te gʼa ve chaw-oˬ," 
Mark15:30 nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ponˬ piˇ leh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Mark15:31 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui htawˇ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hui geh teˇ geh chi hka shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Shu hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ maˇ gʼa." 
Mark15:32 Ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ geh teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:33 Mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼa gaˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:34 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh te leh, Eˇliˆ, Eˇliˆ, laˍmaˍsaˍbaˆtaˍniˍ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, Ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ laˇ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:35 Awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Nyi loˬ, yawˇ Eˇliˇya‸ hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:36 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ mvuhˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, lo taˬ hta‸ choˆ leh yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Law taˍ sheˍ. Eˇliˇya‸ yawˇ hta‸ ca yuˬ ya‸ la tuˬ leh naˍ, ngaˬ hui nyi taˍ shaˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:37 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh, shaˉ cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:38 Oˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve hpaˬ kaˍlehˬ, awˬ na te leh awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa gaˬ nyiˇ hkoˇ tzuh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:39 Yawˇ chi hkʼe shaˉ cheˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ chehˇ ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve yaˇ hpu teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:40 Oˇ kaˬ a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ chehˇ leh nyi taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ, a sha‸ i ve Yaˍkoˆ teˇ gʼaˇ leh Yoˇseˍ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ leh, Saˍloˍmenˍ hui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:41 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh yawˇ hta‸ te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo yawˇ geh teˇ geh taˆ la ve yaˇ miˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ leh nyi taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:42 Shinˉ nyi maˇ gaˬ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, gu ve awˬ nyi hpeh ve pa taw," 
Mark15:43 Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Aˍriˆma‸htehˍ venˇ yaˇ Yoˇseh‸ meh ve teˇ g’aˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼai leh Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ lawˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:44 Awˬ yanˇ chi maw ceh tiˉ ka‸ suh peuˬ ve pa taw, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ anˇ leh ma‸ poˍ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, Yawˇ suh peuˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:45 Yeˍsuˆ suh peuˬ ve awˬ lawn ma‸ poˍ hto piˇ leh yawˇ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:46 Hkʼe te leh, Yoˇseh‸ hpa hpu hta‸ vuiˬ yuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ yuˬ ya‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hpa hpu yuˬ hawˆ htiˆ sheˬ leh, haˉ pui htawˆ taˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo haˉ pui hpfuhˆ tsuhˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Mark15:47 Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ leh Yoˇseˍ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ kuiˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:1 Shinˉ nyi peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ, Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ leh Saˍloˍmenˍ hui lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ ca pfuhˍ piˇ tuˬ sha hawnˉ vuiˬ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:2 Teˇ shinˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:3 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ hta‸ tsuhˇ taˍ ve haˉ pui hta‸ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon a shu hpfuhˆ baˬ laˇ tuˬ le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:4 Yawˇ hui chiˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, haˉ pui oˇ ve hpfuhˆ baˬ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Haˉ pui oˇ ve lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:5 Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, hpuˉ lehˍ ve aˇ po‸ zuhˬ ma veu‸ taˍ ve chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:6 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. La‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve Naˬzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui ca ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ. Yawˇ choˬ kaˬ maˇ chehˇ. Yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ kuiˬ lo ca nyi la-o." 
Mark16:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui kʼai leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh Peˍtruˆ hta‸ chi hkʼe hto piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui gʼuˇ suhˍ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ lo yawˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve hkʼe, oˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:8 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh, kawˆ cheˇ leh anˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui gʼuiˇ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ hto piˇ." 
Mark16:9 Teˇ shinˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ awˬ to Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ neˇ suhˍ hkeh geh taˍ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ piˇ jaw ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:10 Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ jaw ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ haˍ gʼaˇ haˍ leh hawˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˍriˆ kʼai leh yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:11 Yeˍsuˆ te‸ chehˇ leh Maˍriˆ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, maˇ yonˍ." 
Mark16:12 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ ho‸ awˬ han peun da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ to yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:13 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ leh, chehˇ taˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hto piˇ ve htawˇ yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ." 
Mark16:14 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ awˍ mui caˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ to yawˇ hui hta‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ puiˉ ve leh nyi ma ka‸ heh ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ deˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Mark16:15 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai leh chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ca maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Mark16:16 Yonˍ leh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark16:17 Yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ heˆ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Mark16:18 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, vuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ taw‸ ma hta‸ dawˬ ve ka‸, yawˇ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ hpeh‸. Chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui la‸ sheh taˍ leh chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ na-e la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:19 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chiˇ taˆ-e leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo yawˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Mark16:20 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh teˇ kaˬ le le lo bon hkawˇ ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hui geh kanˉ te leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ te tawˆ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yeˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:1 Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve Htawˇhpiˇ luˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, awˬ lawn teˇ ceuˬ peuˬ teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hteˇ lehˍ bvuh‸ taˍ peuˬ." 
Luke1:2 Hkʼa hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve eˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ gʼa mawˬ taˍ leh, bon hkawˇ gʼa maˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ peuˬ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:3 Ngaˬ htawˇ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hui bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shawˍ nyi tehˆ nyi taˍ peuˬ." 
Luke1:4 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ gʼa henˇ taˍ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ teˇ ceuˬ peuˬ teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hteˇ lehˍ nawˬ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:5 Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Aˍbiˉya‸ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Zaˍhkaˍriˆ meh ve paw hkuˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma lehˬ Aˍronˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ meh Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ yoˬ." 
Luke1:6 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ leh piˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te leh ya‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ. Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:7 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ lehˬ chaw meh ma hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ mawˇ la peuˬ." 
Luke1:8 Zaˍhkaˍriˆ ve awˬ moˍ kanˉ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ paw hkuˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te chehˇ htaˇ," 
Luke1:9 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh sha hawnˉ ve hta‸ tuˉ tanˇ tuˬ, paw hkuˇ awˬ liˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui kuˇ da‸ leh yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:10 Sha hawnˉ ve hta‸ tuˉ tanˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:11 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tawˆ la leh, sha hawnˉ ve tuˉ tanˇ kuiˬ la‸ sha paˉ lo huˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:12 Zaˍhkaˍriˆ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ leh kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Zaˍhkaˍriˆ-oˬ, taˇ kawˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ bon lawˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kaˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ miˇ ma Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon yaˇ paˍ paw la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ teh‸ nawˬ gʼa meh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:14 Nawˬ lehˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve paw la ve pa taw, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw uiˍ chaw mvuh hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ leh bvuhˆ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ a ciˉ ka‸ dawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ paw la htaˇ ka‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:16 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la tuˬ ve yawˇ te tuˬ yoˬ. 
Luke1:17 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˇ da‸ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui ve cuˇ yiˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon gu taˍ ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ gu piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ lehˬ Eˇliˇya‸ ve nyi ma leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ mvuhˇ maw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:18 Oˇ htaˇ Zaˍhkaˍriˆ lehˬ, Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ tuˬ le. Ngaˬ lehˬ mawˇ la peuˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ miˇ ma htawˇ mawˇ la peuˬ teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:19 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ taˍ ve Gaˍbeˍlaˆ yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ leh, ha lehˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi hto laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:20 Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ tawˇ yaw maˇ gʼa leh chaw kʼaˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:21 Chaw chi ma ve lehˬ, Zaˍhkaˍriˆ hta‸ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maw chaweh chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:22 Yawˇ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ yaw maˇ gʼa leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼaˍ chehˇ leh, la‸ sheh awˬ heˆ ceh tiˉ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:23 Yawˇ kanˉ te ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:24 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ yaˇ hu la leh, ha pa ngaˇ maˬ hkʼa gaˬ va‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:25 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ nyi laˇ ve awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw yaˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shu hkʼaiˉ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hta‸ yuˬ baˬ laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ awˬ pon chi hkʼe te laˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:26 Ha pa hkaw‸ maˬ gaˬ htaˇ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ Gaˍbeˍlaˆ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:27 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ Yoˇseh‸ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ heuˆ da‸ tuˬ ka ti‸ te taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ haˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, Maˍriˆ meh ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:28 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve Maˍriˆ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, Awˬ bon gʼa maˇ ve yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:29 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ leh, na‸ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ gaˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸, yawˇ dawˇ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:30 Oˇ htaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Maˍriˆ-oˬ, taˇ kawˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:31 Nawˬ yaˇ hu la leh, yaˇ paˍ paw la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ nawˬ gʼa meh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:32 Yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw uiˍ chaw mvuh hpeh‸ leh, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ awˬ pa Daˍviˆ ve kʼaw jaw piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:33 Yawˇ lehˬ, Yaˍkoˆ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ maˇ cawˬ, teh‸ Maˍriˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:34 Oˇ htaˇ Maˍriˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ cawˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ le teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:35 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ ya‸ la leh, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ nawˬ hta‸ beh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, paw la tuˬ ve yaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ leh, da‸ kehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:36 Chaw meh ma teh‸ kʼoˆ ve nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ htawˇ, yawˇ mawˇ la peuˬ ve ka‸, yaˇ paˍ hta‸ hu chehˇ ve ha pa hkaw‸ maˬ gaˬ peuˬ." 
Luke1:37 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha maˇ te puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:38 Maˍriˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ ma yoˬ. Nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:39 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Maˍriˆ tu leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve venˇ teˇ venˇ lo haˆ haˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:40 Yawˇ Zaˍhkaˍriˆ ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ hta‸ na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:41 Maˍriˆ na‸ piˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ ehˉ lehˬ, hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ te ve yoˬ. Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu biˇ la leh," 
Luke1:42 yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ lehˬ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve gʼoˇ peˬ hkʼaw ve yaˇ ehˉ htawˇ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:43 Ngaˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ ve awˬ e ngaˬ geh laˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ngaˬ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw gʼa ve le. 
Luke1:44 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ na‸ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ ve gʼoˇ peˬ hkʼaw ve yaˇ ehˉ lehˬ, ha lehˬ leh hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:45 Yonˍ ve yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:46 Oˇ htaˇ Maˍriˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve nyi ma lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:47 Ngaˬ ve co ha htawˇ, ngaˬ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:48 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ ma hta‸ yawˇ nyi laˇ peuˬ. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, chaw teˇ co peuˬ teˇ co ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yaˇ miˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:49 Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ te laˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:50 Yawˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ teˇ co peuˬ teˇ co cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Luke1:51 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh lehˬ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve hta‸ te taˍ peuˬ. A shu yawˇ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpaˆ da‸ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ." 
Luke1:52 Jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ yuˬ ce piˇ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ taˆ piˇ peuˬ." 
Luke1:53 Meu‸ ve kaˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa bvuhˆ caˍ piˇ leh, paw sha ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ to kʼawˇ lehˍ hpehˇ peu piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:54 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe. 
Luke1:55 Aˍbraˍhanˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ hta‸ ga piˇ peuˬ." 
Luke1:56 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ geh shehˆ ha pa chehˇ taˉ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:57 Eˇliˇsaˍbehˆ yaˇ paw ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la leh yaˇ paˍ paw la ve yoˬ. 
Luke1:58 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ bon yawˇ hta‸ te piˇ ve awˬ lawn, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ geh hkʼa geh ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:59 Hiˉ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ pa ve awˬ meh hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ Zaˍhkaˍriˆ meh piˇ-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke1:60 awˬ e kʼoˆ ve, Maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ gʼa meh piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:61 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:62 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe meh piˇ tcuh gaˇ leh naˍ teh‸, awˬ pa hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ heˆ te leh na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:63 Yawˇ lehˬ, bvuh‸ tuˬ ve awˬ baˉ hta‸ lawˬ leh, Yawˇ ve awˬ meh Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ teh‸, bvuh‸ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:64 Oˇ ve teˇ hkui awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh ha tehˍ htawˇ nuˇ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ tawˇ yaw leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:65 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:66 Hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw tawnˇ taˍ leh, Yaˇ ehˉ chi lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ leh naˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ yawˇ geh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:67 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ pa Zaˍhkaˍriˆ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu biˇ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke1:68 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ ca nyi la leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ peuˬ." 
Luke1:69 Yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ Daˍviˆ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ peuˬ. 
Luke1:70 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:71 Yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ nyi bawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ." 
Luke1:72 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˬ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ te piˇ leh, yawˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ awˬ pon te ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:73 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:74 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ," 
Luke1:75 ngaˬ hui ve a sha‸ leh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, kawˆ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ awˬ pon kanˉ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:76 Yaˇ ehˉ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:77 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha ha kʼaˉ puiˉ jaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa ve awˬ hkʼaw lo htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ piˇ tuˬ, nawˬ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo gʼa kʼai leh, yawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gʼa gu taˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke1:78 Mvuhˇ naw ma ve awˬ gʼeuˆ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ba la htaˇ," 
Luke1:79 naˆ ho‸ ve leh suh ve aˉ gʼuiˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ leh, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve ya‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ sheh maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. teh‸ Zaˍhkaˍriˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke1:80 Yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve uiˍ la leh, co ha hpawˇ htawˇ awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ tawˆ la ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:1 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ meh yuˬ tuˬ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ Awˇguˇtuˆ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:2 Chi teˇ pawˆ awˬ meh yuˬ ve lehˬ, Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Kuˇreˍniˆ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ te chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ meh yuˬ ve awˉ lawˉ peuˇ teˇ pawˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:3 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ meh keu tuˬ awˬ pon, teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ ve venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:4 Yoˇseh‸ htawˇ, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, yawˇ heuˆ taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ Maˍriˆ geh hkʼa geh awˬ meh ca keu tuˬ," 
Luke2:5 Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ lo tu leh, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ Behˍlehˍhehnˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Daˍviˆ ve venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Maˍriˆ yaˇ hu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:6 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ paw ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:7 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ paw la leh, pehˉ keu htiˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nuˇ lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw yawˇ hta‸ iˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkehˉ chaw yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
Luke2:8 Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, heh hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ hpeu‸ htaˇ yawˇ hui ve yawˬ moˍ hta‸ shaw chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:9 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la leh, yawˇ hui awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ ba tawˆ la leh, yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:10 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ha lehˬ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:11 Ya‸ nyi Daˍviˆ ve venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ pon Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ paw la peuˬ. 
Luke2:12 Yawˇ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Hkri‸ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ heˆ chi hkʼe cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ pehˉ keu htiˆ sheˬ leh, nuˇ lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw iˉ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:13 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ geh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke2:14 Mvuh jaˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ, yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:15 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo kʼaw‸ taˆ kʼo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Behˍlehˍhehnˍ venˇ lo ngaˬ hui kʼai leh, hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve awˬ lawn chi Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve hkʼe ca nyi-a veuˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:16 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui haˆ haˆ kʼai leh, Maˍriˆ leh Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ ka‸, nuˇ lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw iˉ taˍ ve yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ ka‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:17 Gʼa mawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve awˬ lawn mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui shu hta‸ kʼaw‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:18 Hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ paˍ hui hto piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ anˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:19 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ tawnˇ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:20 Yawˬ hawˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:21 Hiˉ nyi gaˬ leh yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh chi lehˬ, awˬ e gʼoˇ peˬ hkʼaw maˇ hu sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ meh piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:22 Moˉseˍ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui awˬ pon da‸ tuˬ kehˬ tuˬ te ve awˬ nyi biˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke2:23 Yaˇ kaoˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ hkʼa paw la ve teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon gʼa fuiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Luke2:24 aˉ pui kʼaˍ teˇ ceh, maˇ heˆ kʼo guˇ ehˉ nyiˇ hkeh hta‸ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe gʼa tanˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:25 Oˇ htaˇ, Suˉmonˍ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ law tcuhˉ taˍ leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:26 Yawˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh maˇ gʼa suh teh‸, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:27 Oˇ htaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa awˬ e lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe yaˇ paˍ ehˉ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ te piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke2:28 Suˉmonˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ taˍ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke2:29 Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ dawˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa kʼo‸-e tuˬ, chi beu‸ a hkaw-anˬ a ciˉ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ." 
Luke2:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ." 
Luke2:31 Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ gu taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Luke2:32 Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ ba piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:33 Yaˇ ehˉ awˬ lawn yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve hta‸ awˬ pa awˬ e anˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke2:34 Suˉmonˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ bon na‸ piˇ leh, awˬ e Maˍriˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ ehˉ chi hta‸ pa taw, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ paiˍ leh laiˉ gʼaˇ tu la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke2:35 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Aˉ htaw lehˬ, nawˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ juˆ pawnˍ laˇ ve hkʼe ˬ nawˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:36 Aˍsaˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ, Hpaˍnoˍeˍlaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ miˇ Aˍnaˆ meh ve tcuh kaˍ ma teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ mawˇ jaˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ hpawˇ geh suhˍ hkʼaw‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa chehˇ leh," 
Luke2:37 hiˉ chi awˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ mehˇchawˇma hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ chehˇ taˍ leh, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ caˇ tuˬ ce leh bon lawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:38 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ laˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve te ceuˬ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:39 Awˬ pa awˬ e lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:40 Yaˇ ehˉ oˇ ve uiˍ la leh, awˬ gʼaˇ awˇ shaˉ uiˍ la ve yoˬ. Cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:41 Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e lehˬ, teˇ hkʼaw‸ le le Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:42 Yawˇ a sha‸ teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:43 Pawehˇ te ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui kʼo‸-e htaˇ, yaˇ paˍ ehˉ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˉ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ pa awˬ e maˇ shiˍ." 
Luke2:44 Awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ kʼo‸-e peuˬ hehˉ teh‸ dawˇ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ nyi ya‸ kʼaw kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ leh awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ hta‸ ca nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:45 Maˇ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼai leh yawˇ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:46 Shehˆ nyi gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ ehˉ hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, saˍ la‸ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ kʼaw ji lo mui taˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na leh yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:47 Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, anˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:48 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ anˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ e yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe te laˇ ve le. Nawˬ pa ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:49 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ huiˉ maˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ca ve le. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ maˇ shiˍ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:50 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ na maˇ gʼa." 
Luke2:51 Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh Naˍzaˍ rehˆ venˇ lo kʼo‸-e leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na yuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ e lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nyi ma hkʼaw lo tawnˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke2:52 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ to maˇ kʼoˆ, uiˍ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ka‸ chaw yaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:1 Kehˉsaˍ Tiˍbeˍriˆ uˉ peunˍ ve teˇ chi ngaˇ hkʼaw‸ gaˬ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Poˍtiˆ Piˉla‸ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ te chehˇ ve, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Heˍroˆ jawˇmawˇ te chehˇ ve, Iˉtuˆrehˇ leh Taˍraˍhkawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Heˍroˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ jawˇmawˇ te chehˇ ve, Aˍbiˇleˍ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Luˇsaˍniˆ jawˇmawˇ te chehˇ ve leh," 
Luke3:2 Aˍnaˆ leh Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ paw hkuˇ lonˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve Zaˍhkaˍriˆ ve yaˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ geh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:3 Yawˇ lehˬ Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma awˬ paˇ awˬ kui teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai leh, venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa gʼa tuˬ, venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:4 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu taˍ loˬ. Yawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ te-o." 
Luke3:5 Lawˬ hkʼo‸ teˇ maˬ le le hta‸ gʼa biˇ la piˇ leh, hkʼaw uiˍ ve i ve teˇ shiˍ le le hta‸ gʼa nehˬ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Kʼaw‸ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa hteˇ la piˇ leh, mvuh mvuh nehˬ nehˬ cawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˍ lehˍ leˆ lehˍ gʼa kʼaw‸ gu piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke3:6 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:7 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ la‸ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ tuˬ laˬ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Vuiˬ haiˬ awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, gaˬ la tuˬ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ, a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve le." 
Luke3:8 Venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la-o. Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw taˇ ca dawˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ haˉ pui shiˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tawˆ la hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:9 Chi beu‸ ka‸, suhˆ cehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ lo ceˉ ceˇ teh taˍ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ ve awˬ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ le le hta‸ htu baˬ leh, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:10 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:11 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˉ po‸ nyiˇ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, aˉ po‸ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ pehˬ piˇ-oˆ. Caˇ tuˬ cawˬ ve chaw htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:12 Awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:13 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkawnˍ shaw keunˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ awˬ leuˉ taˇ ca shaw teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:14 Ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, A shu ve mawˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ ca hiˉ yuˬ. Shu hta‸ maˇ heˆ heˆ ve ca kʼoˆ leh heˍ caˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ taˇ te. Nawˬ hui gʼa ve ha pa hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi hkʼaˇ suh chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:15 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ leh naˍ, maˇ heˆ leh naˍ, yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ nyi chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke3:16 yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkuiˉ nuˆ caˆ hta‸ hpui tuˬ ve ceh ka‸ ngaˬ te maˇ keunˍ. Yawˇ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke3:17 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo caˬ hpeuˇ tuˬ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve caˬ jaw‸ kuiˬ hta‸ kehˬ lehˍ shiˆ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˬ shiˍ hta‸ caˬ ciˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaw pfuhˇ keu tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, caˬ cuˉ hta‸ lehˬ maˇ suh puiˉ ve aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˉ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:18 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu laiˉ ceuˬ kʼoˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ nyi paˍ ve awˬ miˇ ma Heˍroˍdiˆ hta‸ heuˆ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ te ve awˬ haiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ aw lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hta‸ deˇ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw," 
Luke3:20 yawˇ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw yuˬ keu ve yoˬ. Heˍroˆ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ yawˇ te ya‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ haiˬ chi teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:21 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ leh bon lawˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke3:22 mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw la leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, awˬ ho‸ awˬ han aˉ pui kʼaˍ awˬ to hkʼe yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ ya‸ la ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke3:23 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ kanˉ tanˬ te ve teˇ yanˇ, a sha‸ shehˆ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼe gaˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ pa lehˬ, Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ teh‸ chaw yaˇ hui dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇliˆ yoˬ." 
Luke3:24 Eˇliˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍsaˆ yoˬ. Maˍsaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Leˍviˆ yoˬ. Leˍviˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Meˍlaˍhkiˆ yoˬ. Meˍlaˍhkiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yaˍnaˆ yoˬ. Yaˍnaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ. 
Luke3:25 Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍtaˍhtiˆ yoˬ. Maˍtaˍhtiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍmoˆ yoˬ. Aˍmoˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Naˍhonˍ yoˬ. Naˍhonˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇsaˍliˆ yoˬ. Eˇsaˍliˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Naˍgehˇ yoˬ. 
Luke3:26 Naˍgehˇ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍaˆ yoˬ. Maˍaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍtaˍhtiˆ yoˬ. Maˍtaˍhtiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Seˍmiˆ yoˬ. Seˍmiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ. Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yuˇda‸ yoˬ. 
Luke3:27 Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇhaˍnaˆ yoˬ. Yoˇhaˍnaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Reˍsaˆ yoˬ. Reˍsaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Seˍruˇbeˍlaˆ yoˬ. Seˍruˇbeˍlaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Saˍlaˍteˍlaˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:28 Saˍlaˍteˍlaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Neˍriˆ yoˬ. Neˍriˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Meˍlaˍhkiˆ yoˬ. Meˍlaˍhkiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˇdiˆ yoˬ. Aˇdiˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Kawˇsanˍ yoˬ. Kawˇsanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇlaˍmawˇdaˆ yoˬ. Eˇlaˍmawˇdaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇraˆ yoˬ. Eˇraˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇseˍ yoˬ. 
Luke3:29 Yoˇseˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇleˍsaˍ yoˬ. Eˇleˍsaˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇrenˍ yoˬ. Yoˇrenˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍsaˆ yoˬ. Maˍsaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Leˍviˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:30 Leˍviˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Suˉmonˍ yoˬ. Suˉmonˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yuˇda‸ yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ. Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yoˇnanˍ yoˬ. Yoˇnanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇlaˍkenˍ yoˬ. 
Luke3:31 Eˇlaˍkenˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Meˍleˍ yoˬ. Meˍleˍ ve aw pa lehˬ Mehˇnaˍ yoˬ. Mehˇnaˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍtaˍhtaˆ yoˬ. Maˍtaˍhtaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Naˍtanˍ yoˬ. Naˍtanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Daˍviˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:32 Daˍviˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yeˍsehˇ yoˬ. Yeˍsehˇ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Awˇbehˆ yoˬ. Awˇbehˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Bawˇzaˆ yoˬ. Bawˇzaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Saˍlaˍmonˍ yoˬ. Saˍlaˍmonˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Naˍsonˍ yoˬ. 
Luke3:33 Naˍsonˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍmiˆnaˍdaˆ yoˬ. Aˍmiˆnaˍdaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍranˍ yoˬ. Aˍranˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ, Heˍsaˍronˍ yoˬ. Heˍsaˍronˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Hpaˍrehˆ yoˬ. Hpaˍrehˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yuˇda‸ yoˬ." 
Luke3:34 Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yaˍkoˆ yoˬ. Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Iˉcaˆ yoˬ. Iˉcaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ yoˬ. Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Teˍraˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:35 Teˍraˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Naˍhkawˍ yoˬ. Naˍhkawˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Seˍroˆ yoˬ. Seˍroˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Raˍgawˇ yoˬ. Raˍgawˇ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Hpaˍlehˆ yoˬ. Hpaˍlehˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Heˍbaˆ yoˬ. Heˍbaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Saˍlaˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:36 Saˍlaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Kaˍiˇnanˍ yoˬ. Kaˍiˇnanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍhpaˍyaˆ yoˬ. Aˍhpaˍyaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Seˍmaˆ yoˬ. Seˍmaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Noˉa‸ yoˬ. Noˉa‸ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Laˍmehˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:37 Laˍmehˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍtuˍsaˍlaˆ yoˬ. Maˍtuˍsaˍlaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇnawˆ yoˬ. Eˇnawˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Yaˍrehˆ yoˬ. Yaˍrehˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Maˍhaˍleˍlaˆ yoˬ. 
Luke3:38 Maˍhaˍleˍlaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Kaˍiˇnanˍ yoˬ. Kaˍiˇnanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Eˇnoˆ yoˬ. Eˇnoˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Sheˍtaˆ yoˬ. Sheˍtaˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Aˍdanˍ yoˬ. Aˍdanˍ ve awˬ pa lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ. 
Luke4:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma lo tu leh kʼo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo awˇ chi nyi hkʼa gaˬ shiˍ toˇ leh, neˇhaiˬ beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:2 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ caˇ leh, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˍ meu‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:3 Oˇ htaˇ neˇhaiˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve kʼo, haˉ pui shiˍ chi hta‸ hkaoˍmonˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:4 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw yaˇ lehˬ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ gʼa te‸ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:5 Teˇ pawˆ neˇhaiˬ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ taˆ-e leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ teˇ hkui tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maw piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke4:6 Kanˇ paˆ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ leh mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ piˇ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ ngaˬ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:7 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui laˇ ve kʼo, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ ve mawˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:8 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nawˬ ve jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui leh, yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ ceh tiˉ nawˬ gʼa te ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:9 Teˇ pawˆ neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo shiˍ kʼai leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve kʼo, pawˆ ce hkʼa." 
Luke4:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:11 Nawˬ ve hkui sheh haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa heuˆ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ," 
Luke4:12 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa beˬ maˇ gʼa lawˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:13 Neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le beˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ geh tawˆ kʼai leh, teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ hpaˆ da‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:14 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e leh, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ kaˬ le le yawˇ ve awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:15 Yawˇ hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˍ piˇ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:16 Yawˇ uiˍ la kuiˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, yawˇ awˬ liˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe shinˉ nyi htaˇ bon yehˬ taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hta‸ gʼaw tuˬ yawˇ tu ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:17 Oˇ htaˇ, shu yawˇ hta‸ tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ ve li‸ piˇ leh, li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ kaˬ hta‸ ca mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:18 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ naˍ manˇ shehˍ laˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve lehˬ, hpeh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, maˍ piˇ hto piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Luke4:19 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ bon te piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ teˇ hkʼaw‸ awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ hto piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:20 Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ lo‸ leh bon yehˬ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Bon yehˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi chehˇ htaˇ," 
Luke4:21 yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tanˬ maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve Li‸ hpu tawˇ hkawˇ chi lehˬ, ya‸ nyi nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ biˇ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:22 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh, yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw tawˆ la ve na sha jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ anˇ leh, Chaw chi lehˬ, Yoˇseh‸ ve yaˇ paˍ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:23 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, tawˇ pa haˉ yehˇ leh, Naˆ tsuhˇ shehˍ hpaˇ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve a naˍ hta‸ gu na-e loˬ, Ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe, Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ te-o teh‸, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:24 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ." 
Luke4:25 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Eˇliˇya‸ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ, shehˆ hkʼaw‸ leh ha pa hkaw‸ maˬ hkʼa gaˬ mvuhˇ yeˬ maˇ laˬ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ meu‸ lonˉ kaˆ lonˉ cawˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˇchawˇma cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha Eˇliˇya‸ hta‸ yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ geh ka‸ maˇ kʼai tcuh. Siˉdonˍ mvuhˇ miˬ Saˍraˍtaˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve mehˇ chawˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ geh ceh tiˉ yawˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:27 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ Eˇliˇshehˇ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ htawˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkaw lo hkiˬ tu‸ keuˆ ve chaw cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ ve maˇ cawˬ. Suˇriˆ chaw Neˍmanˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:28 Bon yehˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:29 Yawˇ hui tu la leh venˇ awˬ baˬ lo Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa‸ tawˆ leh, yawˇ hui ve venˇ te taˍ ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo ca‸ ce piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:30 Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo hpanˍ kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:31 Oˇ htaˇ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Kaˍpeˍ neˍonˍ venˇ lo yawˇ ya‸ la leh, shinˉ nyi htaˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:32 Yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Luke4:33 Bon yehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke4:34 Aˇ yoˇ, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ te luˬ laˇ tuˬ nawˬ laˬ ve laˇ. Nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬ sha ve da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:35 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ deˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ta‸ iˉ chehˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, neˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo ca‸ baˬ sheˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ te leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:36 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve tawˇ hkawˇ le. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇ cha‸ chiˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ tawˇ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:37 Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ paˇ awˬ kui teˇ kaˬ le le lo yawˇ ve awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. 
Luke4:38 Bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, Siˉmonˍ ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Siˉmonˍ awˬ miˇ ma ve awˬ e kaˆ naˬ jaˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ pon yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:39 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve awˬ paˇ lo Yeˍsuˆ huˉ taˍ leh, kaˆ naˬ ve oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ deˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, kaˆ naˬ ve oˇ ve na-e la ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve teˇ cawˬ haˉ tu la leh yawˇ hui hta‸ te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:40 Mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, a naˍ laiˉ ceuˬ naˬ chehˇ ve chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa shiˍ veu laˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, chaw naˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:41 Neˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ kuˬ leh, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ deˇ leh tawˇ maˇ yaw tcuh." 
Luke4:42 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca leh yawˇ geh gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa hpaˆ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:43 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬawˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa ca maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe te tuˬ awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke4:44 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo cawˬ ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ bon ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:1 Teˇ pawˆ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ Yeˍsuˆ geh buiˆ lo‸ la chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Geˍneˍsaˍrehˆ gʼuiˬ po paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh," 
Luke5:2 gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ nyiˇ maˬ deh taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˇ ca paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve geu‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:3 Siˉmonˍ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ maˬ hkʼaw yawˇ lo‸-e leh, iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw a ciˉ jiˆ kʼai tuˬ Siˉmonˍ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw mui taˍ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:4 Yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hpehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Siˉmonˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Iˉ kaˆ naˉ kuiˬ lo jiˆ kʼai leh, ngaˇ gʼa tuˬ nawˬ hui ve geu‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:5 Siˉmonˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui aˬ miˍ haˉ teˇ haˉ mvuhˇ hkʼa htiˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve htawˇ, teˇ hkeh ka‸ maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, geu‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hpehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:6 Yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe te ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˇ geh maˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ve geu‸ teˇ hpaˍ tzuh‸ paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:7 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ ga laˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui la‸ mehˆ muiˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˇ yuˬ keu ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ maˬ aˬ laˬ hkʼe iˉ kaˆ tuˍ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:8 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hkui paˇ lo yawˇ boˆ sheˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ geh lo tawˆ kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ venˇbaˆ uiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:9 Yawˇ hui ngaˇ gʼa maˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ geh chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:10 Siˉmonˍ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ htawˇ, anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Siˉmonˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ chaw ca shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:11 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ deh piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:12 Teˇ pawˆ htaˇ, yawˇ venˇ teˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ to teˇ to hkʼa peu-eˬ hkiˬ tu‸ keuˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ sheˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ te gaˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ nawˬ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:13 Yeˍsuˆ la‸ sheh che leh yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ te gaˇ ve yoˬ. Da‸ la kehˬ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkiˬ tu‸ a naˍ mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:14 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hto piˇ tuˬ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ kʼai leh paw hkuˇ hta‸ nawˬ awˬ to ca maw piˇ-oˆ Shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ ve awˬ pon Moˉseˍ awˬ liˇ teh taˍ ve hkʼe, tanˇ tuˬ ca tanˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn leuˉ leh teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve pa taw, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui ve naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai leh bon ca lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:17 Teˇ nyi htaˇ, yawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ teˇ hkʼaˆ le le lo chehˇ ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ leh awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˍ ve saˍ la‸ teˇ hpaˍ gaˬ la leh mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Naˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ yawˇ geh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:18 Oˇ htaˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ku-iˍ hkʼoˆ zuh‸ chehˇ ve hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ taˆ veu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ lo‸-e leh Yeˍsuˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ taˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui ca ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:19 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ chehˇ taˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ lo‸-e tuˬ yawˇ hui ya‸ kʼaw ca maˇ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hui taˆ-e leh, beh taˍ ve hta‸ hpaˆ pawnˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chaw naˬ oˇ ve leh yawˇ zuh‸ taˍ ve ku-iˍ hta‸ chaw chi ma ve awˬ kʼaw ji lo Yeˍsuˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpehˇ ya‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:20 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve venˇ baˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:21 Oˇ htaˇ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw le. Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, venˇ baˆ hta‸ a shu hpehˇ hkʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hui dawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:22 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui nyi ma hkʼaw aˬ hto‸ ma te chi hkʼe dawˇ chehˇ ve le." 
Luke5:23 Tawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ a ciˉ kʼoˆ piˇ sha le. Nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Tu leh ya‸ kʼaw toˇ kʼai loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve sha laˇ." 
Luke5:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tu kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ leh, hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, tu-o. Nawˬ ve ku-iˍ hta‸ taˆ leh nawˬ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:25 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ tu leh, yawˇ ve zuh‸ kuiˬ hta‸ taˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:26 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Ngaˬ hui maˇ dawˇ nyi jaw ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ya‸ nyi gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:27 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ tawˆ kʼai leh, Leˍviˆ meh ve awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkawnˍ shaw kuiˬ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mui chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:28 Yawˇ lehˬ, hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, tu leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:29 Oˇ htaˇ, Leˍviˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve pawehˇ lonˉ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw maˇ maˇ, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:30 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh yawˇ hui ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ ca beu ca hkʼaiˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Naw hui aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ leh venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui geh hkʼa geh hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:31 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chehˇ sha ve chaw hui naˆ tsuhˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ maˇ loˍ. Naˬ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ loˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:32 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ, a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ awˬ pon kuˬ yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:33 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ hkui teˇ hkui caˇ tuˬ ce leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Hpaˍriˍsehˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, caˇ chehˇ dawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:34 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw hui geh chehˇ htaˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ caˇ tuˬ ce piˇ lawˬ gʼa tuˬ leh laˇ." 
Luke5:35 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ hkehˉ caˇ la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh yuˬ hpaˆ piˇ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:36 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkʼoˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ peˆ tzuh‸ sheˬ leh, veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ a shu ka‸ maˇ nehˉ jaw. Oˇ hkʼe nehˉ ve kʼo, veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ tzuh‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ suhˉ ve hpa peˆ lehˬ, veu‸ kʼaˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ da‸." 
Luke5:37 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ piˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ a shu ka‸ maˇ keu jaw. Oˇ hkʼe keu ve kʼo, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ lehˬ, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui hta‸ te hkoˇ ve pa taw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ sheˆ leh, shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui htawˇ luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke5:38 A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ shaˍ guiˬ htuˉ pui awˬ suhˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa keu ve yoˬ. 
Luke5:39 A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ piˍ hta‸ dawˬ peuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˉ hta‸ maˇ dawˬ gaˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ piˍ lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:1 Shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ heh hkʼaw hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui caˬ nu hta‸ chehˆ leh, yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh ye‸ leh caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:2 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Shinˉ nyi htaˇ te maˇ keunˍ te maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw te ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:3 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Daˍviˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˍ meu‸ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke6:4 Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ heˆ kʼo teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ caˇ maˇ keunˍ caˇ maˇ cawˇ ve, tanˇ taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ caˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ caˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼaw jaw leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:5 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, shinˉ nyi ve awˬ jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:6 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi kʼaw‸ gaˬ leh, bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ lo‸-e leh maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, oˇ kaˬ lo la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:7 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ gʼa tuˬ, shinˉ nyi htaˇ chaw naˬ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ leh naˍ teh‸, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:8 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui dawˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ leh, la‸ sheh teˇ paˉ suh ve chaw hta‸, Nawˬ tu leh awˬ kʼaw ji lo ca huˉ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tu leh huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:9 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ na nyi shaˍ. Shinˉ nyi htaˇ da‸ tuˬ te cawˇ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo luˬ tuˬ te cawˇ laˇ. Shu ve a sha‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ cawˇ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo te luˬ cawˇ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:10 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼa caw zuhˇ nyi leh, chaw oˇ ve hta‸, Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh che-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, chaw oˇ ve la‸ sheh che leh na-e la ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:11 Yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:12 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ bon lawˬ tuˬ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e leh, oˇ ve teˇ haˉ mvuhˇ hkʼa htiˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:13 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tcuh yaˇ teh‸ yawˇ meh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:14 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ yawˇ meh piˇ ve Siˉmonˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ, Yaˍkoˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ leh Baˍhtawˇlaˍmehˇ," 
Luke6:15 Ma‸htehˍ leh Htoˉma‸, Aˍlaˍhpehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ leh Seˍluˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ," 
Luke6:16 Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yuˇda‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ hui yoˬ." 
Luke6:17 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh ya‸ la leh, miˬ tawˬ kuiˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ kaˬ le le, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ Tuˇruˆ leh Siˉdonˍ mvuhˇ miˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gu na-e laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ geh hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:18 Neˇ cha‸ chiˆ fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke6:19 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa htawˇ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ tawˆ la leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:20 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:21 Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui meu‸ chehˇ kaˆ chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa caˇ bvuhˆ dawˬ bvuhˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui hawˬ chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa gʼuiˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke6:22 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ pa taw shu nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ laˇ ve, shawˍ baˬ laˇ ve, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ laˇ ve leh, nawˬ hui ve awˬ meh hta‸ te luˬ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:23 Awˬ nyi oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ leh pawˆ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui ve la‸ shawnˍ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe te ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui paw sha ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
Luke6:25 Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼa caˇ bvuhˆ dawˬ bvuhˆ chehˇ ve chaw hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa meu‸ gʼa kaˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼuiˬ chehˇ ve chaw hui gʼa dawˬ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ leh gʼa hawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke6:26 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe chiˇ mvuh jaw ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:27 Nawˬ hui hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸-o‸. Nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi bawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ te piˇ-oˆ." 
Luke6:28 Nawˬ hui hta‸ hkeu laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon na‸ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon bon lawˬ-o‸. 
Luke6:29 Nawˬ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ diˬ teˇ paˉ hta‸ hta laˇ ve chaw hta‸ teˇ paˉ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ hkʼo piˇ sheˍ. Nawˬ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ yuˬ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ htawˇ yuˬ tuˬ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. 
Luke6:30 Nawˬ geh hkʼa lawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ ve mawˇ hta‸ yuˬ ve chaw geh taˇ kʼaw‸ lawˬ hkʼaw‸. 
Luke6:31 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ te laˇ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui shu hta‸ oˇ hkʼe te piˇ-oˆ." 
Luke6:32 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ ceh kʼaw‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:33 Nawˬ hui hta‸ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ te laˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ceh da‸ ve kʼaw‸ te piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:34 Nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ law taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ceh chiˇ piˇ ngaˍ piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui htawˇ, yawˇ hui chiˇ piˇ ngaˍ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ chiˇ piˇ ngaˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:35 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ leh da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ te piˇ-oˆ. Kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ chiˇ piˇ ngaˍ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ ve la‸ shawnˍ uiˍ jaˇ leh, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw leh haiˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ bon te piˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:36 Nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. 
Luke6:37 Nawˬ hui shu hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˇ taˍ. Oˇ hkʼe maˇ taˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ shu venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ. Shu hta‸ suhˉ taˇ taˆ. Oˇ hkʼe maˇ taˆ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ shu suhˉ maˇ taˆ. Shu ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ ka‸ shu hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke6:38 Shu hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ ka‸ shu kʼaw‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui pe‸ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, kawˬ tuˬ uiˍ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ kawˬ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, biˇ sheˆ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ nyiˉ keu hiˆ keu leh nawˬ hui ve taˉ poˆ hkʼaw keu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui shu hta‸ kawˬ piˇ ve hkʼe shu nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kawˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:39 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw maˍ piˇ hpeh‸-aw laˇ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬ kʼoˍ hkʼaw ce lo‸-e tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Luke6:40 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve saˍ la‸ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ, Hkʼa biˇ biˇ henˇ yuˬ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve saˍ la‸ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke6:41 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve toˉ la‸ lonˉ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ nyi leh, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ nyi chehˇ ve le." 
Luke6:42 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve toˉ la‸ lonˉ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ leh, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi-oˬ, nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ tawˆ laˇ shaˍ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ca kʼoˆ ve le. Heˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui-oˬ, nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve toˉ la‸ lonˉ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ yuˬ tawˆ sheˍ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw cawˬ taˍ ve mehˆ puˉ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yuˬ tawˆ tuˬ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ mawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke6:43 Da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, maˇ da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve teˇ cehˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Maˇ da‸ ve awˬ cehˬ lehˬ, da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve teˇ cehˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Luke6:44 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ shiˍ hta‸ nyi leh, awˬ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ le le hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Aˉ chuˇ cehˬ lo maˉ nawˆ shiˍ maˇ shaˉ jaw. Aˉ chuˇ buiˇ lo a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ maˇ shaˉ jaw." 
Luke6:45 Da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ doˆ taˍ kuiˬ lo, da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ doˆ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw yaw tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke6:46 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui maˇ te leh, aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le." 
Luke6:47 Ngaˬ geh laˬ leh ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ shaˍ." 
Luke6:48 Yehˬ kawˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, naˉ chaweh duˇ leh, haˉ pui awˬ hkʼoˆ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ teh taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ uiˍ taˆ la leh, iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ dawˇ yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ htinˍ ve htawˇ, yeˬ chaweh kawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ maˇ te." 
Luke6:49 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ maˇ kawˍ leh miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ ceh yehˬ kawˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ dawˇ yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ htinˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ paiˍ leh, yehˬ oˇ ve luˬ kʼai ve lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:2 Oˇ htaˇ ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ ha‸ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ naˬ leh suh la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:3 Ma‸ poˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ tuˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca lawˬ hkawˉ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:4 Yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe te piˇ tuˬ yawˇ keunˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ngaˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ ha‸ leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon bon yehˬ te laˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:6 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Ma‸ poˍ ve yehˬ hta‸ maˇ vuiˇ maˇ neˇ kuiˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ma‸ poˍ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ to hkeu‸ tuˬ taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve yehˬ hkʼaw nawˬ lo‸ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ." 
Luke7:7 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ geh lo laˬ maˇ keunˍ teh‸ dawˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ tawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ceh yaw ve ka‸, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ na-e la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke7:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ shu ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ leh, ngaˬ awˬ hawˉ lo ka‸ ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ paˍ hta‸ htawˇ, Chi hta‸ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:9 Tawˇ chi hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ yawˇ anˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ hpfuhˆ nyi leh, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸ chi taw taw yonˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa mawˬ jaw sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:10 Kʼai tcuh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ yehˬ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve na-e la peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:11 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw, Naˍiˉnaˆ meh ve venˇ lo yawˇ kʼai leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:12 Venˇ taˍ meu‸ hpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca tuˍ tuˬ, shu taˆ tawˆ la chehˇ ve yoˬ. Suh taˍ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ e lehˬ, mehˇ chawˇ ma hpeh‸ leh, yaˇ paˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mehˇchawˇma oˇ ve geh teˇ geh venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ te laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:13 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ jaˇ leh, Taˇ hawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:14 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ awˬ paˇ lo kʼai leh, taˆ tuˬ hta‸ htawˇ leh, chaw taˆ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ huˉ sheˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw haˉ paˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, tu-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:15 Oˇ htaˇ, suh taˍ ve chaw tu mui leh tawˇ yaw ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˬ e ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:16 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ jaˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ lonˉ ngaˬ hui geh tawˆ la peuˬ. Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ, yawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca nyi la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:17 Yeˍsuˆ te ve awˬ lawn chi Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:18 Oˇ htaˇ Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:19 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh kʼai tcuh leh, Nawˬ lehˬ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa dawˇ law tuˬ sheˍ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ ca na nyi tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:20 Chaw oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ lehˬ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa dawˇ law tuˬ sheˍ laˇ teh‸, nawˬ hta‸ na nyi tuˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ paˍ Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ nawˬ geh lo laˬ tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:21 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ lehˬ, chaw maˇ maˇ ve a naˍ leh naˬ ve gawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ leh, haiˬ ve neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ htawˇ, mehˆ mawˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:22 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hkʼa gʼa kaˇ hkʼa gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ ca hto piˇ-oˆ. Mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hui mehˆ mawˬ la ve, hkui luˬ ve chaw hui ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai ve, hkiˬ tu‸ keuˆ ve chaw hui da‸ la kehˬ la ve, naˍ paw pawˇ ve chaw hui naˍ paw kaˇ la ve, suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve leh, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui htawˇ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:23 Ngaˬ hta‸ nyi ma maˇ luˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:24 Yoˇhanˬ tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ kʼo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ lawn chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve le. Mvuhˇ haw meuˆ leh hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ te chehˇ ve lo cehˬ hta‸ laˇ." 
Luke7:25 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ kʼai ve le. Nuˇ lehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw hta‸ laˇ. Veu‸ da‸ kʼaˇ da‸ leh caˇ da‸ dawˬ da‸ ve chaw hui lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:26 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ kʼai ve le. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hta‸ laˇ. Yoˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hta‸ ca nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke7:27 Nyi loˬ. Nawˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo nawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ gu tuˬ, ngaˬ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ."
