Luke15:20 Yawˇ tu leh awˬ pa geh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ awˬ pa gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh, yawˇ geh gʼuiˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ yaˇ paˍ ve kʼawˍ peˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼuˉ taˍ leh boˆ nu ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:21 Oˇ htaˇ awˬ yaˇ paˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ pa-oˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hta‸ ka‸ te ya‸ peuˬ. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ ve yaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ." 
Luke15:22 Awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ pa kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Da‸ jaˇ ve aˉ po‸ lonˉ hta‸ haˆ haˆ yuˬ veu laˇ leh yawˇ hta‸ deh piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ ve la‸ naw hta‸ la‸ peˍ tcuhˉ piˇ-oˆ. Hkui sheh hta‸ hkuiˉ nuˆ tcuhˉ piˇ-oˆ." 
Luke15:23 Caˍ chu taˍ ve nuˇ ehˉ hta‸ sheh veu laˇ leh tiˇ pehˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ hui hti caˇ hti dawˬ leh ha lehˬ ha kʼa te-a veuˬ. 
Luke15:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ yaˇ paˍ chi lehˬ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ suh peuˬ htawˇ, chi beu‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ la peuˬ. Mehˉ kʼai peuˬ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ kʼaw‸ mawˬ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa tanˬ te kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:25 Awˬ viˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, heh hkʼaw chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, yehˬ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, nawˍ meuˆ leh kʼaˍ hkʼeˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:26 Yawˇ awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh, Aˬ hto‸ ma te chehˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:27 Awˬ ceˬ paˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ nyi paˍ kʼaw‸ kʼaw‸ la peuˬ. Yawˇ naˬ ve gawˬ ve luˬ ve sheˆ ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ leh, awˬ pa yawˇ hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve pa taw, caˍ chu taˍ ve nuˇ ehˉ hta‸ tiˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:28 Awˬ viˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, yehˬ hkʼaw maˇ lo‸-e. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ pa tawˆ la leh yawˇ hta‸ ca lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:29 Yawˇ awˬ pa hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nyi-o, ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ tiˉ te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ awˬ yanˇ chi maw maw gaˬ peuˬ. Nawˬ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ ponˬ leuˉ jaw. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh ha lehˬ ha kʼa te tuˬ, aˉ che‸ ehˉ teˇ hkeh ceh ka‸ nawˬ teˇ pawˆ htawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ pe‸ laˇ jaw." 
Luke15:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, meh maˬ lanˉ hui geh awˬ chawˇ te leh, nawˬ ve hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ yehˇ baˬ caˇ baˬ peuˬ ve, nawˬ ve yaˇ paˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, caˍ chu taˍ ve nuˇ ehˉ yawˇ awˬ pon nawˬ tiˇ peuˬ law leˇ teh‸, awˬ pa hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:31 Awˬ pa kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke15:32 Ngaˬ hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ ve deˇ deˇ yoˬ. Nawˬ nyi paˍ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ suh peuˬ htawˇ chi beu‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ la peuˬ. Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ mehˉ kʼai peuˬ htawˇ, chi beu‸ kʼaw‸ mawˬ peuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, ha lehˬ ha kʼa te piˇ cawˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬ pa yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:1 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Paw sha ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ yehˇ baˬ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ shu ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:2 Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh, Nawˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve, nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ve le. Nawˬ mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ ve caˇ lanˇ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ ve kanˉ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ te teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:3 Oˇ htaˇ, mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le. Ngaˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ tawˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ ca duˇ tuˬ ngaˬ te maˇ gʼa. Shu geh lawˬ caˇ tuˬ ka‸ ngaˬ ya‸ taw ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:4 Mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ tawˆ-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shu lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ hkʼaw ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:5 Yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ geh jeˬ cha taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ leh, awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ geh nawˬ jeˬ hkʼaˬ ma cha taˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:6 Naˍ manˇ teˇ ha punˇ cha taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve caˇ lanˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh haˆ mui taˍ leh, ngaˇ chi punˇ bvuh‸ keu-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:7 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ jeˬ hkʼaˬ ma cha taˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Caˬ shiˍ teˇ ha taˆ cha taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve caˇ lanˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh, hiˉ chi taˆ bvuh‸ keu-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:8 Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve mawˇ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ yehˇ puiˉ ve pa taw, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve teˇ co awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ gʼeuˆ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ cuˇ yiˍ yehˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:9 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve ka‸ awˬ chawˇ gʼa tuˬ oˇ ve hta‸ yehˇ-oˆ. Hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ oˇ ve peuˬ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, co co taiˍ taiˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke16:10 I ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw lehˬ, uiˍ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ka ti‸ yeˬ tuˬ yoˬ. I ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw lehˬ, uiˍ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke16:11 Hkʼe te leh, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ lehˬ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve ka‸, oˇ ve hta‸ yehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ka ti‸ maˇ yeˬ ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ ceuˬ a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ tuˬ le." 
Luke16:12 Nawˬ hui lehˬ shu ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ yehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ maˇ yeˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ tuˬ le." 
Luke16:13 Awˬ ceˬ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ jawˇmawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ te maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ canˇ kʼo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan kʼo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ ka‸, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ ve awˬ ceˬ ka‸, teˇ pawˆ tiˉ te maˇ gʼa taˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:14 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hpu hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:15 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ a shu yawˇ awˬ to hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hkʼe te htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ taˍ uiˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:16 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ co-e maˇ gaˬ sheˍ htaˇ ve awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo buiˆ da‸ leh lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:17 Miˬguiˬ mvuhˇ naw ma luˬ kʼai haˍ ve a‸ kehˉ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ maiˉ ehˉ teˇ maˬ luˬ kʼai tuˬ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:18 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu yaˇ miˇ hta‸ heuˆ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ hpawˇ baˬ taˉ peuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve chaw htawˇ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:19 Teˇ pawˆ htaˇ, paw sha paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hpa nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve leh da‸ jaˇ ve hpa hpu hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, teˇ nyi le le ha lehˬ ha kʼa hti caˇ hti dawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:20 Yawˇ ve yehˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cawˬ ve yehˬmiˉhpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo, awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ pawˆ lawˆ kʼuˉ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Laˍzaˍruˆ meh ve lawˬ leh‸ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu ca taˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:21 Yawˇ lehˬ, paw sha paˍ ve hpui lawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo caˇ sheˆ dawˇ sheˆ taˍ ve hta‸ caˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Hpuiˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh yawˇ ve pawˆ lawˆ kʼuˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaw leh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:22 Teˇ nyi htaˇ, haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ oˇ ve suh leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve nyi ma pui lo shiˍ teh taˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Paw sha paˍ htawˇ suh leh, shu yawˇ hta‸ ca taˆ tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:23 Suh mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hehnˇ jaˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ leh, yawˇ chiˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, vuiˇ kuiˬ lo Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve nyi ma pui lo Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:24 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ aˬ miˍ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve pa taw, Laˍzaˍruˆ yawˇ ve la‸ naw meuˇ iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw tuˍ leh, ngaˬ ve ha tehˍ gawˬ la piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh peu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Aˍbraˍhanˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, nawˬ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa leh, Laˍzaˍruˆ maˇ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ loˬ. Chi beu‸ lehˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo yawˇ dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ leh, nawˬ lehˬ tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:26 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ hui leh nawˬ hui awˬ kaˍ lo naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼo‸ lonˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, choˬ kaˬ te leh nawˬ hui chehˇ kuiˬ lo shu kʼai gaˇ ka‸ kʼai maˇ hpeh‸. Nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo te leh ngaˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo shu laˬ gaˇ ka‸ laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:27 Paw sha paˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ pa-oˬ, hkʼe te kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:28 Ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ ngaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ sheˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui lehˬ choˬ kaˬ tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo maˇ gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ ngaˬ pa ve yehˬ lo kʼai tcuh leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ maˍ piˇ tcuh-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:29 Aˍbraˍhanˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui geh Moˉseˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui na piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:30 Paw sha paˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ-oˬ, chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ. Suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui geh kʼai ve kʼo, yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke16:31 Aˍbraˍhanˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Moˉseˍ leh Gʼuiˬ sha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ na ve kʼo, suh kuiˬ lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve htawˇ yawˇ hui yonˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:1 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te piˇ ve chaw lehˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:2 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te ve a‸ kehˉ, yawˇ ve kʼawˍ peˍ hta‸ haˉ pui mawˍ hpeh kʼu leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ce peu ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:3 Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi nawˬ hta‸ te ya‸ laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
Luke17:4 Teˇ nyi tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ suhˍ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ te ya‸ laˇ leh, suhˍ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ geh kʼaw‸ laˬ leh, Ngaˬ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:5 Oˇ htaˇ tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ la tuˬ a ciˉ te laˇ-oˆ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:6 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼawˇ caˉ yawˇ hkʼe hui cawˬ ve kʼo, naˬ hawˉ cehˬ chi hta‸, Nawˬ ve awˬ geu ka‸ teˇ pawˆ tiˉ gʼawˬ tawˆ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca tcuhˉ naw‸ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:7 Nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ ti mi mehˇ kuiˬ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˬ hawˉ kuiˬ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Haˆ mui leh caˇ la-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ laˇ." 
Luke17:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve hta‸, Ngaˬ awˬ pon caˇ tuˬ gu loˬ. Ngaˬ caˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ haˍ pi tsuh‸ taˍ leh, ngaˬ hta‸ te caˍ te taw laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ nawˬ gʼa caˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Luke17:9 Awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe te ve pa taw, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ laˇ." 
Luke17:10 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ loˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ maˇ keunˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui gʼa te cawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ ceh ngaˬ hui te peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:11 Yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Gaˍliˍ lehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ tcuhˉ kaˍ lo hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:12 Hkʼaˆ teˇ hkʼaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, hkiˬ tu‸ paˍ teˇ chi gʼaˇ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ taˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:13 Yawˇ hui bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:14 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Kʼai leh, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui ve awˬ to ca maw piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, da‸ la kehˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:15 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ to na-e la ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ la leh, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:16 Yeˍsuˆ ve hkui paˇ lo yawˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:17 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Na-e la ve chaw lehˬ, teˇ chi gʼaˇ yoˬ maˇ heˆ leh laˇ. Kʼawˇ gʼaˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai le." 
Luke17:18 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ kʼaw‸ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ laˇ teh‸, kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Luke17:19 Tu leh kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ peuˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:20 Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ gaˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ gaˬ la ve lehˬ, mehˆ shiˍ nyi leh mawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Luke17:21 Nyi loˬ, choˬ kaˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ, oˇ kaˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:22 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ nyi hta‸ nawˬ hui mawˬ gaˇ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Luke17:23 Choˬ kaˬ nyi-o, oˇ kaˬ nyi-o teh‸ shu nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ taˇ kʼai, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ gʼa‸." 
Luke17:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma teˇ ceˍ lo ba la leh teˇ ceˍ lo ba gaˬ ve hkʼe, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ya‸ la ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, oˇ hkʼe maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸, chaw chi teˇ co chiˇ baˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:26 Noˉa‸ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ hpeh‸ la ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ co-e awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:27 Noˉa‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ hui caˇ chehˇ dawˬ chehˇ leh, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ leh ka piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ iˉ kaˆ htonˍ la leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:28 Lawˇtaˍ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ htawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui caˇ chehˇ dawˬ chehˇ ve, mawˇ vuiˬ mawˇ hawˇ chehˇ ve, mawˇ ti chehˇ leh, yehˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:29 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Lawˇtaˍ lehˬ Sawˉdonˍ venˇ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai ve teˇ nyi htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo aˬ miˍ leh ma‸ shiˉ mvuhˇ yeˬ hkʼa shuˍ ce la leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te luˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:30 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu tawˆ la ve teˇ nyi htaˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:31 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ve mawˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, mawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ca yuˬ tuˬ taˇ kʼaw‸ ya‸-e. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ heh hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw htawˇ, taˇ kʼo‸-e." 
Luke17:32 Lawˇtaˍ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ loˬ. 
Luke17:33 A shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ ponˬ tuˬ ca ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ a sha‸ shonˇ tuˬ yoˬ. A sha‸ shonˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve a sha‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:34 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, oˇ ve teˇ haˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo hawˉ hkʼaˆ nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, zuh‸ hpui teˇ maˬ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo zuh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teh taˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke17:35 Yaˇ miˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ geh haˉ pui maw geuˆ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teh taˉ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ lo hpeh‸ la tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Suh ve awˬ to cawˬ kuiˬ lo naˬ beuˬ ngaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:1 Yawˇ hui nyi ma maˇ luˬ leh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon gʼa lawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke18:2 Venˇ teˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸ maˇ kawˆ, chaw yaˇ hta ka‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:3 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˇchawˇma teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ geh teˇ hkui teˇ hkui kʼai leh, Ngaˬ ve canˇ paˍ ngaˬ hta‸ ya‸ laˇ ve hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ awˬ pon a ciˉ te laˇ-oˆ teh‸, kʼoˆ piˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:4 Teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve te‸ chiˉ maˇ te piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸ maˇ kawˆ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw hpeh‸ ve htawˇ," 
Luke18:5 mehˇchawˇma chi ngaˬ hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ laˇ ve pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ awˬ pon te piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ laˬ leh, hpeh‸ haˍ hkanˍ haˍ jaˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:6 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o." 
Luke18:7 Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui awˬ pon maˇ te piˇ tuˬ leh laˇ. Yawˇ maw chaweh law chehˇ tuˬ leh laˇ." 
Luke18:8 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ pon haˆ haˆ te piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:9 A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teh‸ shawˍ taˍ leh, shu hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ shawˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ tawˇ pa haˉ chi maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke18:10 Chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ bon lawˬ tuˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hpeh‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:11 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ gʼaˇ huˉ taˍ leh, Gʼuiˬ sha-oˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hta‸ maˇ shuˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve chaw, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve chaw, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ shuˍ ve pa taw htawˇ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:12 Teˇ shinˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyiˇ nyi ngaˬ caˇ tuˬ ce ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ gʼa ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ chi pun teˇ pun tanˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, vuiˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi maˇ hpeh‸. Dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve nyi ma pui hta‸ hta leh, Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, ngaˬ venˇbaˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve hta‸ a ciˉ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:14 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la leh, yawˇ ve yehˬ lo kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Hpaˍriˍsehˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw maˇ hpeh‸ la. Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, taˍ i ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ i ve chaw lehˬ, taˍ uiˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke18:15 Oˇ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ piˇ tuˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu yawˇ geh shiˍ laˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, shiˍ laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ deˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh laˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, chaw oˇ hkʼe ve mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:17 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e taˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:18 Jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve, Da‸ ve Saˍ la‸-oˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:19 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ da‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve le. Gʼuiˬ sha maˇ heˆ kʼo, da‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Luke18:20 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ taˇ te, chaw hta‸ taˇ tiˇ pehˍ, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ taˇ hkʼawˇ, shu hta‸ maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ taˇ hkanˍ, nawˬ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:21 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Ngaˬ yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ htaˇ ka‸ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ na yuˬ leh te peuˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:22 Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ teˇ ceuˬ loˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hkʼa cawˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ leh, haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve mawˇ nawˬ cawˬ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, nawˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:23 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ paw sha jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:24 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Paw sha ve chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ hkʼaˬ ma haˍ jaˇ ve le." 
Luke18:25 Kaˍ laˍ oˆ teˇ hkeh gʼo‸ naˍ hkʼawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e tuˬ ve lehˬ, paw sha ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ ve a‸ kehˉ sha ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:26 Gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ a shu gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:27 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ te maˇ gʼa ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha te gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:28 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh nawˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:29 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ pon, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e leh, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Luke18:30 chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:31 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke18:32 Awˬ lawn kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh, kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve leh, ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke18:33 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:34 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ faˉ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui na maˇ gʼa." 
Luke18:35 Yawˇ lehˬ Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, mehˆ cuˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo mui leh lawˬ caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:36 Mehˆ cuˉ paˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ kʼai kʼai laˬ laˬ te chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Chi aˬ hto‸ ma te ve le teh‸ yawˇ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:37 Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:38 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:39 Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Ta‸ iˉ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ deˇ piˇ ve htawˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:40 Yeˍsuˆ huˉ taˍ leh, Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh shiˍ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Mehˆ cuˉ paˍ yawˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke18:41 Nawˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ mehˆ mawˬ la tuˬ nawˬ hta‸ te tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:42 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Mehˆ mawˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke18:43 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ mehˆ mawˬ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˬ chiˇ mvuh leh Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:2 Oˇ kaˬ lo Saˍkehˇ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkawnˍ shaw paˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh paw sha jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:3 Yeˍsuˆ a shu leh naˍ teh‸ yawˇ mawˬ gaˇ leh ca nyi ve htawˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ chehˇ taˍ leh, yawˇ maˇ mvuh ve pa taw maˇ gʼa mawˬ." 
Luke19:4 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ laˬ tuˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo cawˬ ve hpaˉ leuˍ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ hta‸ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:5 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ la htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍkehˇ-oˬ, haˆ haˆ ya‸ la-o. Ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo gʼa haˉ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:6 Oˇ htaˇ, Saˍkehˇ haˆ haˆ ya‸ la leh, ha lehˬ ha kʼa yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:7 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yawˇ lehˬ venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh ca haˉ ve law teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, ca beu ca hkʼaiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:8 Saˍkehˇ huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ hkoˇ hkʼa gaˬ haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ pehˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ ngaˬ heˍ caˇ taˍ peuˬ ve kʼo, awˇ pun ngaˬ kʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:9 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yehˬ chi teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ nyi htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ htawˇ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:10 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai ve chaw hui hta‸ ca leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ yuˬ tuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ Saˍkehˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:11 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui na chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ kʼaw‸ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Luke19:12 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ ca yuˬ leh kʼaw‸ la tuˬ, vuiˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:13 Yawˇ maˇ kʼai sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ chi gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpu teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ cawehˬ piˇ leh, Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ hpu chi hta‸ yuˬ leh ca kaˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ canˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve awˬ tan te shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tcuh leh, Yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ ngaˬ hui maˇ heuˆ gaˇ teh‸ ca kʼoˆ piˇ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:15 Yawˇ lehˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ gʼa peuˬ leh kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, hpu piˇ taˉ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ ca kaˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ yawˬ hkʼaˬ ma gʼa ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, Yawˇ hui hta‸ ca kuˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:16 Awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve hpu teˇ cawehˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ca kaˬ leh, teˇ chi cawehˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:17 Awˬ jawˇmawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, nawˬ te ve lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. I ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ na yuˬ puiˉ ve pa taw, venˇ teˇ chi venˇ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:18 Nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve hpu teˇ cawehˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ca kaˬ leh, ngaˇ cawehˬ kʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:19 Awˬ jawˇmawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Venˇ ngaˇ venˇ hta‸ nawˬ uˉ peunˍ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:20 Teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, cho-e‸, nawˬ ve hpu teˇ cawehˬ hta‸ hpaˉ ce‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ htiˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:21 Nawˬ lehˬ te hehnˇ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kawˆ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ maˇ teh taˍ kuiˬ lo nawˬ gʼawˆ yuˬ leh, nawˬ maˇ sheˍ kuiˬ lo nawˬ gʼeu‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:22 Oˇ htaˇ awˬ jawˇmawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Haiˬ ve awˬ ceˬ-oˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ leh nawˬ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ te hehnˇ jaˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ maˇ teh taˍ kuiˬ lo gʼawˆ yuˬ leh, maˇ sheˍ kuiˬ lo gʼeu‸ yuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve kʼo," 
Luke19:23 ngaˬ ve hpu chi hta‸ yuˬ leh hpu chiˇ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te maˇ piˇ le. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, ngaˬ kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ ve hpu chi hta‸ ka‸ awˬ yawˬ hta‸ ka‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:24 Awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hpu oˇ ve teˇ cawehˬ hta‸ yawˇ geh yuˬ hkʼaw‸ leh, hpu teˇ chi cawehˬ cawˬ ve chaw hta‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:25 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, yawˇ hpu teˇ chi cawehˬ cawˬ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:26 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ cawˬ chaw geh, yawˇ hkʼa cawˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ tawˆ sheˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke19:27 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ maˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve ngaˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ choˬ kaˬ lo yuˬ laˬ leh, ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tiˇ pehˍ loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke19:28 Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:29 Yawˇ lehˬ Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hta‸ neˇ ve, Behˆhpaˍgeˍ hkʼaˆ leh Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke19:30 Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˬ ve hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Oˇ kaˬ lo lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ ciˇ jaw sheˍ ve piˉ laˬ ehˉ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hpui leh sheh veu laˇ-oˆ." 
Luke19:31 Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw hpui ve le teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ na nyi laˇ ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ loˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:32 Kʼai tcuh ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ kʼai leh gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼe gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:33 Piˉ laˬ ehˉ hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ ma hpui chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw piˉ laˬ ehˉ hta‸ hpui ve le teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:34 Jawˇmawˇ loˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke19:35 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ piˉ laˬ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh sheh veu laˇ leh, piˉ laˬ ehˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hkʼawˇ piˉ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ciˇ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:36 Yawˇ ciˇ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo hkʼawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:37 Venˇ awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ gaˬ la leh, Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw gaˬ ya‸ teˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ jaw peuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ pa taw, ha lehˬ ha kʼa awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh te leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:38 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo laˬ ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˇ. Mvuh jaˇ kuiˬ lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:39 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ deˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:40 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ ve kʼo, haˉ pui shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ kuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:41 Venˇ awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ gaˬ la htaˇ, venˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke19:42 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh nawˬ gawˬ lehˍ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ ya‸ nyi ka‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ gawˬ lehˍ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:43 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ ca nyi ca ha‸ shaˉ la ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ lo ta‸ duˇ taˍ leh, nawˬ hta‸ teˇ hpawˇ le le hoˆ taˍ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke19:44 Oˇ htaˇ, nawˬ leh nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo chiˇ baˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ shiˍ maˇ cawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui te luˬ taˉ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:45 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, mawˇ hawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:46 Ngaˬ ve yehˬ hta‸ bon lawˬ kuiˬ yehˬ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ yehˬ chi hta‸ chaw hkʼawˇ chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:47 Yawˇ lehˬ teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ awˬ naˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
Luke19:48 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui ca maˇ mawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na chehˇ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Luke20:1 Teˇ nyi htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke20:2 Nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve le. Kanˇ paˆ chi a shu nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve le, Ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:3 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ na nyi shaˍ. Nawˬ hui yaw hkʼaw‸ laˇsheˍ." 
Luke20:4 Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ, piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma lo gʼa ve laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo chaw yaˇ hui geh lo gʼa ve laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:5 Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma lo gʼa ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma te yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve le teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke20:6 Chaw yaˇ hui geh gʼa ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve kʼo, chaw chi ma ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ pehˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:7 Yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke20:8 Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ, Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˇ paˆ gʼa leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ hto laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:9 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ chi maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a pehˉ meuˇ hko te leh ti taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˍ piˇ taˉ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai leh oˇ kaˬ lo maw chaweh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:10 Awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, hko oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ dawˆ leh, awˬ kʼawˇ lehˍ kʼo‸-e peu ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:11 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ yawˇ hui geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui dawˆ leh hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te piˇ leh, awˬ kʼawˇ lehˍ kʼo‸-e peu ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:12 Peuˬ leh, awˬ ceˬ shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui dawˆ hkʼaw sheˬ leh gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:13 Oˇ htaˇ, a pehˉ meuˇ hko awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le. Ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼai tcuh shaˍ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan tuˬ yoˬ hehˉ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ awˬ shinˉ gʼa shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Laˬ-o‸, yawˇ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ-a veuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:15 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hko awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo chiˇ baˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, hko awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te piˇ tuˬ le." 
Luke20:16 Yawˇ laˬ leh, hko te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hko oˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ ngaˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Oˇ hkʼe maˇ hpeh‸ taˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:17 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yehˬ kawˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui baˬ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ lo kawˍ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ gaˇ ve le." 
Luke20:18 Haˉ pui oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ paiˍ ve chaw lehˬ, hteh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ pui oˇ ve ce teˍ ve kʼo, chaw oˇ ve meu-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:19 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tawˇ pa haˉ oˇ ve yawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ lawn kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve pa taw, awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ yawˇ hui kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:20 Mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve kanˇ paˆ leh uˉ peunˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui lehˬ jaˆ nyi shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Jaˆ nyi shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ yaw ya‸ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hkʼe te leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:21 Jaˆ nyi shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ piˇ maˍ piˇ leh, chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:22 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ a moˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ, maˇ keu piˇ cawˇ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui cuˇ yiˍ te leh heˍ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Luke20:24 Hpu teˇ hteh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ-oˆ. A shu ve awˬ han, a shu ve awˬ meh cawˬ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:25 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te leh, jawˇ mawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve mawˇ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ piˇ-oˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:26 Chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ kuiˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui ca maˇ mawˬ. Yawˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ leh ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Luke20:27 Kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Saˍduˆkehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke20:28 Saˍ la‸-oˬ, Moˉseˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ miˇ ma cawˬ leh, yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ suh ve kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ lehˬ, awˬ viˉ paˍ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ kʼaw‸ heuˆ leh, awˬ viˉ paˍ awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ gʼa cawˬ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:29 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi suhˍ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ heuˆ leh, yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:30 Nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸, shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ heuˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:31 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi suhˍ gʼaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ taˉ leh suh ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:32 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gaˬ leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve htawˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:33 Hkʼe te leh, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui suhˍ gʼaˇ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ heuˆ peuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ka piˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:35 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ hta‸ ka‸, suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ gʼa keunˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ka piˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ te." 
Luke20:36 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa suh. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:37 Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ teh‸, aˉ chuˇ buiˇ awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha, Iˉcaˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha leh Yaˍkoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:38 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ suh peuˬ ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬ sha hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ pa taw chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:39 Oˇ htaˇ li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:40 Yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi maˇ haˆ. 
Luke20:41 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkri‸ lehˬ Daˍviˆ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸, aˬ hto‸ ma te shu kʼoˆ ve le." 
Luke20:42 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Daˍviˆ yawˇ awˬ to kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Luke20:43 Nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ taˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ-oˆ, teh‸ Chiˇ mvuh ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:44 Hkʼe te leh, Daˍviˆ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ ve yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:45 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ na chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Luke20:46 Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ve hta‸ deh leh ca te toˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Tcuh hkʼaw lo shu yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˆ yan laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui hkʼawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hti caˇ hti dawˬ kuiˬ lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve mui kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke20:47 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mehˇchawˇma ve yehˬ hta‸ hiˇ yuˬ leh, a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa tawˆ la tuˬ maw chaweh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh uiˍ jaˇ ve ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ chiˇ nyi leh, hpu tanˇ keu kuiˬ lo paw sha paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpu keu chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:2 Haˍ gʼawˇ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ gʼaˇ peh‸ shanˍ nyiˇ peh‸ keu ve hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Luke21:3 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, haˍ gʼawˇ ve mehˇchawˇma chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh keu maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ tawˆ leh keu ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ miˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ a sha‸ hu tuˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ leh keu ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:5 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi sha jaˇ ve haˉ pui shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh, tanˇ taˍ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ ve awˬ lawn shu kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke21:6 Nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu te luˬ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ shiˍ maˇ cawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ luˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:7 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, hkʼe te kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ htaˆ hpeh‸ la tuˬ le. Hpeh‸ la paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ heˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ tawˆ la tuˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:8 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw maˇ maˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ laˬ leh, Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ kʼai." 
Luke21:9 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ma‸ bawˆ ve leh mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ kʼai ve awˬ lawn hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, kawˆ ve cheˇ ve taˇ cawˬ piˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˉ lawˉ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ la tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:10 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ ceuˬ leh teˇ ceuˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ leh teˇ peˆ ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:11 Miˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ hiˆ ve, chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo meu‸ ve kaˆ ve leh naˬ beuˬ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ leh, uiˍ jaˬ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh fawˉ mehˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo leh htawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shu nawˬ hui hta‸ yuˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:13 Chi hkʼe te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:14 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ ve, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ dawˇ nyi teh‸, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo dawˇ cheˆ taˍ-o‸." 
Luke21:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ maˇ gʼa leh tawˍ taˍ maˇ gʼa ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:16 Awˬ pa awˬ e, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ leh awˬ chawˇ awˬ paˆ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:17 Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Luke21:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui ve uˉ hkeh mvuh teˇ mvuh ka‸ maˇ gʼa luˬ." 
Luke21:19 Nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ puiˉ ve hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui ve co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:20 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ ma‸ moˍ ma‸ cuˇ hkʼa caw zuhˇ hoˆ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, venˇ oˇ ve gʼa luˬ paˇ neˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸." 
Luke21:21 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpaw-e loˬ. Venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui tawˆ kʼai-o. Venˇ awˬ baˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui venˇ hkʼaw lo taˇ lo‸-e." 
Luke21:22 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ biˇ la tuˬ, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:23 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yaˇ hu ma leh cuˉ dawˬ ve yaˇ ehˉ cawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo dawˇ haˍ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:24 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, aˉ htaw chaw pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Shu yawˇ hui hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ yanˇ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ naˆ tiˍ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:25 Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ nyi, ha pa, meu‸ keu teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ leh gʼuiˬ baˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ jaˇ ve pa taw, chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ anˇ jaˇ leh, dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:26 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, maˇ nawˇ maˇ hteh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma ve kanˇ paˆ teˇ hpaˍ hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:27 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, uiˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo moˬ hta‸ ciˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:28 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tanˬ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui oˉ kʼoˍ chiˇ leh nyi-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ neˇ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:29 Yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Maˉ nawˆ cehˬ leh suhˆ cehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nyi-o." 
Luke21:30 Awˬ caˍ caˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ cha hkui yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui mawˬ leh shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:31 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸." 
Luke21:32 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chi teˇ co maˇ ponˬ kʼai sheˍ htaˇ, awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:33 Mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬ naˆ ma mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, maˇ mehˉ kʼai taˬ." 
Luke21:34 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, caˇ leuˉ dawˬ leuˉ ve, tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve, miˬguiˬ dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma hawˇ buiˬ lehˍ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ va yaw ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ teˇ cawˬ haˉ nawˬ hui aw‸ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:35 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke21:36 Hkʼe te leh, hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ leh, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa huˉ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ leh shaw taˍ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:37 Yawˇ lehˬ, teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ leh, teˇ haˉ le le tawˆ kʼai leh Shaˍlonˍ meh ve hkʼaw lo ca haˉ-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke21:38 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ, mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ htaˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ meh ve, Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:2 paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ hta‸ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:3 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ meh ve Yuˇda‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Saˍtanˍ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:4 Yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gʼa chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:5 Yawˇ hui ha lehˬ jaˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ hpu piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:6 Yawˇ htawˇ hkanˍ yuˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, da‸ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ yawˇ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:7 Paˍsaˍhkaˍ yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve awˬ nyi, Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:8 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Ngaˬ hui Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon ca gu-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:9 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ gu tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:10 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ venˇ hkʼaw gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, iˉ kaˆ mu‸ hkʼu taˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, yawˇ lo‸-e ve yehˬ hkʼaw nawˬ huiˉ maˬ lo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ," 
Luke22:11 yehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ, Saˍ la‸ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ leh ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ, hkehˉ chaw bawehˇ hkʼaˬ lo le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi-o." 
Luke22:12 Oˇ htaˇ, gu taˍ peuˬ ve, awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ bawehˇ uiˍ ve teˇ bawehˇ yawˇ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo gu taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:13 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe gʼa mawˬ leh, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:14 Awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui leh, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh mui ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:15 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ sheˍ htaˇ, naw hui geh teˇ geh ngaˬ Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ chi hta‸ caˇ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo pawehˇ chi teˇ maˬ maˇ biˇ la sheˍ ve ceh ceh, pawehˇ chi hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:17 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ kawˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Kawˆ chi hta‸ yuˬ leh nawˬ hui pehˬ dawˬ-o‸." 
Luke22:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ ve ceh ceh, ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, ngaˬ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:19 Hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh yawˇ hkaoˍ monˇ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon tanˇ piˇ ve ngaˬ ve awˬ to yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ chi hkʼe te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:20 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ mvuhˇ haˉ awˍ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, kawˆ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Kawˆ chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngeuˍ pfuhˍ ve, ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo te taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ geh teˇ hkehˇ tiˉ hkaˆ caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:22 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ gʼa kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:23 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe te tuˬ le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼa na nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:24 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ shu a‸ kehˉ gʼa uiˍ tuˬ le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:25 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon shehˍ hpaˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, shu a‸ kehˉ i ve teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼe te-o, Awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼe te-o." 
Luke22:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve le. Hpui lawˇ lo mui caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, te caˍ te taw ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ laˇ. Hpui lawˇ lo mui caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo te caˍ te taw shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:28 Beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ geh hkʼa geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:29 Ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ mvuhˇ miˬ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:30 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve hpui lawˇ lo nawˬ hui gʼa caˇ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke22:31 Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, caˬ shiˍ caˬ hkʼa htaˬ hkeunˉ ve hkʼe, Saˍtanˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkeunˉ tuˬ yawˇ lawˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:32 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ gʼa luˬ kʼai tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ awˬ pon bon lawˬ peuˬ. Nawˬ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:33 Oˇ htaˇ Siˉmonˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, htawnˍ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, suh kuiˬ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ geh hkʼa geh kʼai tuˬ gu taˍ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Peˍtruˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ya‸ puiˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:35 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, hpu guˉ pi, miˉ chaw leh hkuiˉ nuˆ maˇ yuˬ kʼai tcuh laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui loˍ ve cuˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ cawˬ laˇ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ na nyi htaˇ, Loˍ ve cuˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:36 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi beu‸ lehˬ, hpu guˉpi cawˬ ve chaw kʼo, hpu guˉ pi yuˬ kʼai. Miˉ chaw cawˬ ve chaw kʼo, miˉ chaw pfuhˇ kʼai. Aˉ htaw maˇ cawˬ ve chaw kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hawˇ leh aˉ htaw ca vuiˬ yuˬ-o‸." 
Luke22:37 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ chaw haiˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh shu shawˍ keu tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa biˇ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ gʼa biˇ la ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:38 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nyi loˬ, choˬ kaˬ aˉ htaw nyiˇ taˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, Hkʼe kʼo, law‸ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:39 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:40 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Beˬ ve lawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:41 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui chehˇ kuiˬ te leh, haˉ pui teˇ hkʼe baˬ gaˬ law‸ hkʼe fui yawˇ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke22:42 A pa-oˬ, nawˬ nyi ma cawˇ ve kʼo, kawˆ chi hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa ponˬ kʼai tuˬ a ciˉ te laˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Nawˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:43 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la leh yawˇ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:44 Yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kuiˍ tawˆ la ve lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ diˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ ce ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:45 Yawˇ bon lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ tu leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:46 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve le. Tu-o. Beˬ ve lawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:47 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ boˆ nu tuˬ, awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ jiˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:48 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yuˇda‸-oˬ, nawˬ boˆ nu ve hta‸ te leh chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve law leˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:49 Yeˍsuˆ geh hkʼa geh chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui aˉ htaw gʼa chaw tuˬ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:50 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ chaw leh, la‸ sha paˉ ve naˍ paw cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:51 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Pehˇ-o, taˇ kʼaw‸ te loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve naˍ paw hta‸ htawˇ sheˬ leh gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:52 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ geh gaˬ la ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ hta‸ ca hpeh yuˬ ve hkʼe, aˉ htaw leh suhˆ taˬ teˇ hpaˍ yuˬ veu laˇ leh laˬ ve laˇ." 
Luke22:53 Teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ hpeh yuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ yanˇ chi ve lehˬ nawˬ hui ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ leh, naˆ ho‸ ve kanˇ paˆ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:54 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo sheh kʼai ve yoˬ. Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaˇ suh a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo gʼa‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:55 Shaˉ nanˉ awˬ paˇ ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬ kʼaw ji lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ aˬ miˍ ceh leh teˇ geh mui lehˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Peˍtruˆ htawˇ yawˇ hui geh ca mui lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:56 Yawˇ aˬ miˍ gʼeuˆ ba kuiˬ lo mui chehˇ ve hta‸ awˬ ceˬ ma teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, Chi hpaˇ htawˇ yawˇ geh chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:57 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Peˍtruˆ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ leh, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:58 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ leh, Nawˬ htawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:59 Teˇ naˍ riˍ hkʼe maw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, Chi hpaˇ ka‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yawˇ geh hkʼa geh chehˇ ve chaw yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼoˆ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:60 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ-oˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:61 Oˇ htaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ hpfuhˆ nyi ve yoˬ. Ya‸ puiˉ gʼaˆ hpfuh maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ Peˍtruˆ dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:62 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh gʼaˇ hte‸ hawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:63 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ leh dawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:64 Yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ beh taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Nawˬ hta‸ a shu dawˆ laˇ ve le. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:65 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu laiˉ ceuˬ kʼoˆ leh maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
Luke22:66 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yuˬ kʼai leh," 
Luke22:67 Nawˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hto laˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui yonˍ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Luke22:68 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ na nyi ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Luke22:69 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:70 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve leh laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yoˬ, nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke22:71 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma shaˉ hkiˆ kʼaw‸ loˍ sheˍ ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui awˬ to gʼa kaˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:1 Oˇ htaˇ, hpawnˬ da‸ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ tu la leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh sheh kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke23:2 Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ ya‸kʼaw sheh ya‸ laˇ leh, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ a moˇ maˇ gʼa keu tuˬ tawˍ taˍ laˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ to Hkri‸ kʼoˆ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:3 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ laˇ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yoˬ, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:4 Hkʼe te leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ teh‸, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui leuˉ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ te leh choˬ kaˬ hkʼa gaˬ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo maˍ piˇ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ tu la tuˬ ca juˆ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:6 Tawˇ chi hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Yawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw yoˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:7 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ uˉ peunˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ geh yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:8 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ lawn gʼa kaˇ jaw leh, yawˇ te maˍ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ law chehˇ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ ve maw jaˇ peuˬ." 
Luke23:9 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ laiˉ ceuˬ na nyi ve htawˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ." 
Luke23:10 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇ baˆ gʼaˇ hte‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:11 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ hui geh teˇ geh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh, kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, da‸ jaˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ feuˉ piˇ leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼaw‸ shiˍ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:12 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ canˇ da‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:13 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Luke23:14 Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw sheh ya‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh sheh veu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hkʼe venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ." 
Luke23:15 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ maˇ mawˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui geh kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nyi loˬ, yawˇ lehˬ suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ te." 
Luke23:16 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ sheˬ leh hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ teˇ geh kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:19 Baˍraˍbaˆ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hpfuhˆ hpeh‸ leh, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve pa taw, htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:20 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ, hta‸ pehˍ loˬ." 
Luke23:22 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le. Yawˇ haiˬ ve aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve le. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ sheˬ leh hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:23 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ, gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼoˆ tcuhˉ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ gʼaˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:24 Hkʼe te leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ suhˉ taˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:25 Mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ leh shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve pa taw, htawnˍ hkʼaw lo keu taˍ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, yawˇ hui lawˬ ve hkʼe hpehˇ piˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui te gaˇ ve hkʼe te hpeh‸ tuˬ yawˇ hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:26 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui sheh tawˆ-e ve teˇ yanˇ, heh hkʼaw kʼai kʼaw‸ la ve Kuˇreˍneˍ venˇ yaˇ Siˉmonˍ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui yuˬ tiˍ taˍ leh, la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ tcuh leh Yeˍsuˆ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:27 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw hawˬ leh paˆ hawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:28 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpfuhˆ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw taˇ hawˬ. Nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon leh nawˬ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon hawˬ-o‸." 
Luke23:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Chaw meh ma teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ maˇ hu jaw ve gʼoˇ peˬ leh yaˇ ehˉ maˇ dawˬ jaw ve cuˉ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke23:30 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, hkʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ paˆ teˍ laˇ-oˆ. Hkʼaw pui ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ, Ngaˬ hui hta‸ hoˆ tiˍ taˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke23:31 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, suhˆ awˬ tcuhˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, suhˆ awˬ vi hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe taw te tuˬ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:32 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, chaw haiˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:33 Oˉkoˆ meh ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw haiˬ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸, yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ, la‸ mehˍ paˉ teˇ gʼaˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:34 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, A pa-oˬ, yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui kuˇ da‸ leh, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:35 Chaw chi ma ve huˉ leh nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Shu hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:36 Ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ paˇ lo laˬ leh, ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Luke23:37 Nawˬ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ nawˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:38 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo htawˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ teh‸, li‸ bvuh‸ nehˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:39 Oˇ htaˇ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve chaw haiˬ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ka‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:40 Awˬ nu ve teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ suhˉ taˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ htawˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ maˇ kawˆ laˇ." 
Luke23:41 Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ chi hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ te ya‸ ve pa taw, hkanˍ keunˍ hkanˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ te ya‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ hta‸ deˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:42 Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, nawˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:43 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ya‸ nyi nawˬ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Paˍraˍdiˇsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:44 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ teˇ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼa gaˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ naˆ ho‸ hpeh‸ sheˬ leh, mvuhˇ nyi awˬ gʼeuˆ mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:45 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve hpaˬ kaˍ lonˉ lehˬ, nyiˇ hkoˇ tzuh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:46 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh, A pa-oˬ, ngaˬ ve co ha nawˬ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ shaˉ cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:47 Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:48 Oˇ ve hta‸ hpawnˬ nyi chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma pui hta‸ hta leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:49 Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa shiˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo te leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a ciˉ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:50 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Aˍriˆma‸htehˍ venˇ lo laˬ ve Yoˇseh‸ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, da‸ ve chaw leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw teˆ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:51 Yawˇ lehˬ jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui jehˬ cheˆ leh te ve hta‸ yawˇ nyi ma maˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:52 Yawˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ lawˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:53 Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ ya‸ leh, hpa hpu yuˬ htiˆ sheˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ tuˍ jaw sheˍ ve, haˉ pui htawˆ taˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:54 Awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ, pawehˇ awˬ pon gu ve awˬ nyi hpeh‸ leh, shinˉ nyi gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:55 Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo te leh Yeˍsuˆ geh hkʼa geh laˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, tuˍ hpfuh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te teh taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke23:56 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼo‸-e leh, sha hawnˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh naˍ manˇ hawnˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gu taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui gʼaˇ jehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:1 Teˇ shinˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi mvuhˇ htiˇ la htaˇ, yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui gu taˍ ve sha hawnˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ leh tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:2 Yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, tuˍ hpfuh hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:3 Yawˇ hui lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ maˇ mawˬ" 
Luke24:4 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ maˇ tawˆ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh taˍ ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la leh yawˇ hui awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:5 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ kawˆ jaˇ leh miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ suh ve chaw chehˇ kuiˬ lo ca la ve le." 
Luke24:6 Yawˇ choˬ kaˬ maˇ chehˇ. Kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ. Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. 
Luke24:7 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehˆ nyi gaˬ kʼo, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:8 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:9 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼaw‸ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ lawn oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:10 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ, Yoˇhaˍnaˆ, Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Luke24:11 Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
Luke24:12  
Luke24:13 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ suhˍ laˆ vuiˇ da‸ ve Eˇmaw‸ hkʼaˆ lo kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke24:14 hkʼa hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaoˍ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke24:15 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ chi hkʼe kʼaoˍ da‸ jehˬ da‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ to awˬ paˇ lo laˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh teˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ koˍ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:17 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ ya‸ kʼaw kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn na‸ uˉ te da‸ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ mehˆ hpfuhˇ nawˍ lehˍ te leh huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:18 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Kaˍlawˇhpaˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ leh, chi nyiˇ nyi venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw nawˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ yoˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:19 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn le teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ lawn yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ leh chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼaˇ suhˍ, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:20 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh ngaˬ hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ gʼa suh tuˬ awˬ pon suhˉ taˆ tuˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:21 Yawˇ lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui dawˇ law jaw ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, ya‸ nyi shehˆ nyi gaˬ peuˬ." 
Luke24:22 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htawˇ anˇ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ shawˉ teˇ na‸ yawˇ hui tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai leh, yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ maˇ mawˬ." 
Luke24:23 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, Yawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:24 Ngaˬ hui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai leh, yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:25 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yonˍ tuˬ, nyi ma hkʼaw maˇ dawˇ pawnˍ puiˉ leh cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui-oˬ," 
Luke24:26 Hkri‸ lehˬ chi hkʼe gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:27 Oˇ htaˇ, Moˉseˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ tanˬ leh, Li‸ hpu hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve awˬ lawn hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tcuhˉ kuiˬ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:28 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼai chehˇ ve hkʼaˆ lo gaˬ paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai-a teh‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:29 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ geh haˉ taˉ sheˍ. Mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ peuˬ. Mvuhˇ ka‸ hpeu‸ la yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh ca haˉ tuˬ yawˇ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:30 Yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼeh‸ leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:31 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ mehˆ hpaw la leh, Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ mehˉ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:32 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ leh Li‸ hpu tcuhˉ kuiˬ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo geh jaˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:33 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tu leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ leh yawˇ hui geh chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:34 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ. Siˉmonˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to maw piˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:35 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ la ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:36 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ to yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo huˉ taˍ leh, Nawˬ hui geh dawˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, chaw ha ku hta‸ mawˬ ve law teh‸ dawˇ leh, kawˆ jaˇ leh cheˇ lehˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:38 Yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ ve le. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ te chehˇ ve le." 
Luke24:39 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ngaˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh hkui sheh hta‸ nyi-o. Ngaˬ hta‸ shoˆ nyi htawˇ nyi-o. Ngaˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui mawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ shaˍ leh awˬ mu‸ ku cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw ha ku lehˬ, oˇ hkʼe cawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh," 
Luke24:40 yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hkui sheh yawˇ hui hta‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke24:41 Yawˇ hui anˇ leh ha lehˬ jaˇ ve pa taw, hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ hui geh caˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ cawˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ."
