Luke24:42 Ngaˇ piˬ taˍ ve teˇ tawn yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Luke24:43 Yawˇ yuˬ leh yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ caˇ ve yoˬ. 
Luke24:44 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chiˇ mvuh ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ awˬ lawn hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:45 Oˇ htaˇ, Li‸ hpu ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:46 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Hkri‸ lehˬ gʼa hkanˍ suh leh shehˆ nyi gaˬ kʼo gʼa kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Luke24:47 Venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ awˬ lawn, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ tanˬ leh chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:48 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:49 Ngaˬ Awˬ pa piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hui geh lo ngaˬ peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa sheˍ ve ceh ceh, venˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:50 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ awˬ paˇ lo hkʼa gaˬ shiˍ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ la‸ sheh chiˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ bon na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:51 Chi hkʼe bon na‸ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo taˆ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:52 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui taˉ leh, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Luke24:53 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:1 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ Tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve G’uiˬsha geh chehˇ leh Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, G’uiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John1:2 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John1:3 Hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ te taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ te ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. 
John1:4 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha te‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Co ha te‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve Awˬ gʼeuˆ" 
John1:5 Awˬ gʼeuˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hk’aw lo ba la leh, naˆ ho‸ ve lehˬ Awˬ g’euˆ hta‸ maˇ g’aˇ." 
John1:6 Gʼuiˬsha peu laˇ ve Yoˇhanˬ meh ve chaw teˇ g’aˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon laˬ ve yoˬ. 
John1:7 Yawˇ hta‸ pa taw chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yonˍ la tuˬ, Awˬ gʼeuˆ oˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ la ve yoˬ." 
John1:8 Yawˇ lehˬ Awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John1:9 Awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ tehˬ ma lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo laˬ leh chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John1:10 Yawˇ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ htawˇ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
John1:11 Yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ laˬ htawˇ, yawˇ ve chaw yawˇ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ." 
John1:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa ha‸ yuˬ leh yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:13 Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Chaw yaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw htawˇ maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
John1:14 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Awˬ pa lo laˬ ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John1:15 (Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve lehˬ, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John1:16 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ biˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ peuˬ teˇ ceuˬ gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John1:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, Moˉseˍ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John1:18 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw. Awˬ pa ve nyi ma pui lo chehˇ ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ lehˬ, Awˬ pa awˬ lawn hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
John1:19 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh Leˍviˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo tu leh Yoˇhanˬ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Nawˬ a shu le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ chi hkʼe shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
John1:20 Ngaˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ teh‸, hteˇ lehˍ hto piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ maˇ heˍ maˇ faˉ." 
John1:21 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Hkʼe te kʼo, nawˬ Eˇliˇya‸ leh laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Ngaˬ Eˇliˇya‸ maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ leh laˇ teh‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:22 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ a shu le. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ peu laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui kʼaw‸ hto piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John1:23 Yoˇhanˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ te-o teh‸, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kuˬ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ ngaˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:24 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui kʼai tcuh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John1:25 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ, Eˇliˇya‸ ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ heˆ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John1:26 Yoˇhanˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ shu hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John1:27 Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkuiˉ nuˆ caˆ hta‸ hpui tuˬ ve ceh ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:28 Yawˇ hui Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe na nyi kuiˬ lehˬ, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo cawˬ ve Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw, Yoˇhanˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ kaˬ yoˬ." 
John1:29 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ geh lo laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Miˬguiˬ yaˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ shehˍ hpaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ nyi-o." 
John1:30 Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve lehˬ, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John1:31 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ laˬ leh shu hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:32 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Yoˇhanˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, aˉ pui kʼaˍ hkʼe mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John1:33 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shi. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ tcuh laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Awˬ ha hpu ya‸ la leh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:34 Ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ leh, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John1:35 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ geh kʼaw‸ huˉ chehˇ htaˇ," 
John1:36 Yeˍsuˆ laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ nyi leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:37 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John1:38 Yeˍsuˆ hpfuhˆ nyi leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ aˬ hto‸ ma ca ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo chehˇ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. (Raˍbiˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, saˍ la‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John1:39 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ca nyi la-o. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼai leh, yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ awˇ naˍ riˍ hkʼe gaˬ peuˬ ve pa taw, oˇ ve teˇ nyi yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John1:40 Yoˇhanˬ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ yoˬ." 
John1:41 Yawˇ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ paˍ Siˉmonˍ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ Meˍsiˉya‸ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Meˍsiˉya‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John1:42 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ viˉ paˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ geh shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Siˉmonˍ hta‸ nyi leh, Nawˬ lehˬ Yoˇhanˬ ve yaˇ paˍ Siˉmonˍ yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ Keˍhpaˆ gʼa meh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Keˍhpaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, haˉ pui teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John1:43 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi, Yeˍsuˆ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ lo kʼai tuˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:44 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ lehˬ, Anˍdrehˍ leh Peˍtruˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ Behˇsehˇdaˆ venˇ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John1:45 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ lehˬ, Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Moˉseˍ bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn yawˇ hui bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Yoˇseh‸ ve yaˇ, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:46 Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Naˍzaˍrehˆ venˇhkʼaw lo da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ tawˆ la hpeh‸ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Ca nyi la-o teh‸, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:47 Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ yawˇ geh laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo heˍ ve a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw awˬ teh‸ awˬ na ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John1:48 Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ le teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ kuˬ sheˍ htaˇ, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ awˬ hawˉ lo nawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:49 Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ htawˇ nawˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:50 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˉ nawˆ cehˬ awˬ hawˉ lo mawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve pa taw nawˬ yonˍ ve laˇ. Chi a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ sheˍ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John1:51 Yeˍsuˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw taˍ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ taˆ taˆ ya‸ ya‸ te chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Kaˍnaˆ hkʼaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hkehˉ caˇ chehˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John2:2 Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ, hkehˉ caˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ tuˬ shu kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John2:3 A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e lehˬ, Yawˇ hui a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ maˇ cawˬ-oˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:4 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Ngaˬ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:5 Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ tcuh laˇ ve hkʼe te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John2:6 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon yehˇ tuˬ, oˇ kaˬ lo haˉ pui iˉ mvuhˇ kʼoˍ hkaw‸ shiˍ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Iˉ mvuhˇ kʼoˍ teˇ shiˍ ve hta‸, iˉ kaˆ nyiˇ taˆ shehˆ taˆ hkʼe keu daw ve yoˬ." 
John2:7 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Iˉ mvuhˇ kʼoˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ hkʼa biˇ hkʼo keu-o teh‸, awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui iˉ kaˆ hkʼa biˇ keu ve yoˬ." 
John2:8 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi beu‸ nyiˉ veu leh, hkehˉ caˇ ve awˬ hoˉ hta‸ ca yuˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui ca yuˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:9 Hkehˉ caˇ ve awˬ hoˉ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve hta‸ a ciˉ dawˬ nyi ve yoˬ. A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ chi hkʼaˬ lo gʼa ve leh naˍ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ. (Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, iˉ kaˆ hkʼo keu ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ.) Oˇ htaˇ hkehˉ caˇ ve awˬ hoˉ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
John2:10 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, da‸ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ taw piˇ leh, shu hkʼa bvuhˆ dawˬ peuˬ htaˇ heh‸, maˇ da‸ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ taw piˇ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ lehˬ, da‸ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve law teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John2:11 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve awˬ heˆ chi teˇ maˬ hta‸ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Kaˍnaˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw te maˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John2:12 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ e, yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ lo ya‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa‸ maw maw maˇ chehˇ." 
John2:13 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
John2:14 Oˇ htaˇ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkaw lo, yawˬ, nuˇ, aˉ pui kʼaˍ teˇ hpaˍ hawˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hpu pa shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo mui chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John2:15 Yawˇ lehˬ, aˉ caˆ hkeh hta‸ yuˬ leh jaw‸ tuˬ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˬ leh nuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ tawˆ ve yoˬ. Hpu pa shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve hpu hta‸ ngeuˍ baˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve hpui lawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
John2:16 Aˉ pui kʼaˍ hawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ, Mawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai-o. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve yehˬ hta‸ mawˇ hawˇ mawˇ vuiˬ kuiˬ yehˬ taˇ te teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:17 Nawˬ ve yehˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw hkʼa biˇ biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:18 Oˇ htaˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ heˆ teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ te maˍ laˇ tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:19 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Bon yehˬ lonˉ chi hta‸ te luˬ-o‸. Shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te peuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:20 Oˇ htaˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui kʼoˆ ve, Bon yehˬ lonˉ chi hta‸ awˇ chi hkaw‸ hkʼaw‸ gʼa te ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ shehˆ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ kʼaw‸ te peuˬ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John2:22 Hkʼe te leh, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh, Li‸ hpu hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John2:23 Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ te maˍ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John2:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to maˇ a‸ piˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John2:25 Chaw yaˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ ve awˬ lawn chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ loˍ." 
John3:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo jawˇmawˇ te ve, Niˆkawˇdeˍ meh ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John3:2 Yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ haˉ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve saˍ la‸ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ te maˍ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ te maˇ gʼa teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:3 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ awˬ suhˉ teˇ pawˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ paw la ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:4 Niˆkawˇdeˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Mawˇ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼaw‸ paw la hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Yawˇ ve awˬ e gʼoˇ peˬ hkʼaw yawˇ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ paw la hpeh‸ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
John3:5 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ leh Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ paw la ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e." 
John3:6 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ lo paw la ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu lo paw la ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ ha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John3:7 Nawˬ hui awˬ suhˉ teˇ pawˆ gʼa kʼaw‸ paw la ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hta‸ taˇ anˇ. 
John3:8 Mvuhˇ haw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ lo meuˆ kʼai gaˇ ve ka‸ meuˆ kʼai leh, awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ lo meuˆ laˬ leh naˍ, hkʼaˬ lo meuˆ kʼai tuˬ leh naˍ, nawˬ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:9 Niˆkawˇdeˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te hpeh‸ gʼa tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
John3:10 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo saˍ la‸ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
John3:11 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ leh, ngaˬ hui mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ." 
John3:12 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yonˍ tuˬ le." 
John3:13 Mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la ve chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo maˇ taˆ-e jaw." 
John3:14 Heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ vuiˬ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hkʼe, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu htawˇ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John3:15 Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John3:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha miˬguiˬ yaˇ hta‸ ha‸ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ piˇ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Yaˇ hpu hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ gʼa luˬ maˇ gʼa sheˆ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
John3:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw miˬguiˬ yaˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:18 Yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ. Maˇ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, chi beu‸ ka‸ suhˉ taˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ." 
John3:19 Suhˉ taˆ ve chi lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo awˬ gʼeuˆ lo‸ la htawˇ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui awˬ haiˬ hta‸ te ve pa taw, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ a‸ kehˉ yawˇ hui naˆ ho‸ ve hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
John3:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ haiˬ hta‸ te ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ nyi bawˬ leh, yawˇ te ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa tawˆ la tuˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba kuiˬ lo yawˇ maˇ laˬ." 
John3:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ te ve teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ cuˇ leh te ve teh‸ tawˆ la tuˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ geh yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John3:22 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ yawˇ hui geh oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ leh, shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:23 Saˍlenˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ neˇ Ehˉnonˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ kaˬ lo iˉ kaˆ cawˬ maˇ ve pa taw, Yoˇhanˬ htawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo kʼai leh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John3:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa geh sheˍ." 
John3:25 Oˇ htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, da‸ tuˬ kehˬ tuˬ te ve awˬ liˇ awˬ lawn Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ geh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:26 Yawˇ hui Yoˇhanˬ geh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, nawˬ Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo chehˇ htaˇ nawˬ geh chehˇ jaw leh, nawˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ chehˇ leh chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ geh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:27 Yoˇhanˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma lo yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw yaˇ lehˬ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ gʼa maˇ hpeh‸." 
John3:28 Ngaˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ peu laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ to ngaˬ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. 
John3:29 Awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ tuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ hta‸ gʼa ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ha lehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la peuˬ." 
John3:30 Yawˇ lehˬ, gʼa uiˍ kʼai mvuh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ lehˬ, gʼa i kʼai yawnˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John3:31 Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh, miˬguiˬ ve awˬ lawn ceh kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John3:32 Yawˇ gʼa mawˬ gʼa kaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ." 
John3:33 Yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John3:34 Gʼuiˬsha peu laˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yaw ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Awˬ ha hpu piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ kawˬ maˇ tehˆ nyi leh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John3:35 Awˬ pa lehˬ, Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ leh, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ." 
John3:36 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John4:1 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ shu hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la piˇ leh baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ shu hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la piˇ leh baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve a‸ kehˉ maˇ ve hta‸ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:2 (Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ to shu hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui ceh tiˉ piˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
John4:3 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ teh‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John4:4 Yawˇ lehˬ Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ gʼa hpanˍ kʼai cawˇ ve yoˬ. 
John4:5 Hkʼe te leh, Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Suˇhkaˍ meh ve venˇ teˇ venˇ lo yawˇ gaˬ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yaˍkoˆ yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ piˇ taˉ ve miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ hta‸ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:6 Oˇ kaˬ lo Yaˍkoˆ ve nanˬ bawˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ ya‸ kʼaw toˇ heuˬ ve pa taw, nanˬ bawˍ awˬ paˇ lo mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ teˇ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John4:7 Saˍmaˍriˆ yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ iˉ kaˆ ca hkʼo la ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ a ciˉ taw laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:8 Oˇ ve teˇ hkui yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇ hkʼaw lo caˇ tuˬ ca vuiˬ kʼai peuˬ." 
John4:9 Saˍmaˍriˆ yaˇ miˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ Saˍmaˍriˆ yaˇ miˇ geh iˉ kaˆ lawˬ dawˬ ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw hui awˬ chawˇ maˇ te da‸ ve pa taw chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John4:10 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha piˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Ngaˬ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ a ciˉ taw laˇ-oˆ teh‸ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, nawˬ yawˇ geh lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ htawˇ nawˬ hta‸ co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ taw laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:11 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ iˉ kaˆ nyiˉ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Nanˬbawˍ chi naˉ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo gʼa tuˬ le." 
John4:12 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Yaˍkoˆ lehˬ, nanˬ bawˍ chi ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to ka‸, yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸, yawˇ ve ceˇ caˬ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸, nanˬ bawˍ chi hta‸ dawˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ yawˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve leh laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:13 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Iˉ kaˆ chi hta‸ hkʼa dawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ kʼaw‸ shiˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John4:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ piˇ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ hkʼa dawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ iˉ kaˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ shiˉ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve iˉ kaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ awˬ pon tawˆ la chehˇ ve gʼuiˬ tuˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:15 Yaˇ miˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ iˉ kaˆ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ shiˉ tuˬ leh, choˬ kaˬ lo iˉ kaˆ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ hkʼo la tuˬ, iˉ kaˆ oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ a ciˉ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:16 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Nawˬ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ ca kuˬ leh choˬ kaˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
John4:17 Ngaˬ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ awˬ hpawˇ ngaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ jaw peuˬ leh, chi beu‸ nawˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ nawˬ ve awˬ hpawˇ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:19 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John4:20 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaw pui chi awˬ hkʼoˆ lo oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui tuˬ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:21 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yonˍ-o‸, Hkʼaw pui chi teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa hta‸ nawˬ hui oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ gʼa ca kʼaw‸ pui tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:22 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
John4:23 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ pa hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la chehˇ leh, chi beu‸ ka‸ gaˬ la peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ oˇ hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:24 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ ha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hui lehˬ, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:25 Yaˇ miˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Meˍsiˉya‸ laˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Meˍsiˉya‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John4:26 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve ngaˬ lehˬ, yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ yaˇ miˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:27 Oˇ ve teˇ hkui yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, yaˇ miˇ geh yawˇ tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui anˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma heuˆ gaˇ ve le. Aˬ hto‸ ma te yawˇ geh nawˬ tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ na nyi." 
John4:28 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve iˉ kaˆ mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ teh taˉ leh, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e leh venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
John4:29 Ngaˬ hkʼa te jaw ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca nyi la-o. Yawˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve leh naˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John4:30 Yawˇ hui venˇ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai leh Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. 
John4:31 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, caˇ tuˬ a ciˉ caˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
John4:32 Yawˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve caˇ tuˬ ngaˬ geh cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:33 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ caˇ tuˬ laˬ caˍ piˇ leh naˍ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ na da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John4:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ te leh, yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te peuˬ tuˬ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John4:35 Ha pa awˍ lehˇ gaˬ kʼo, caˬ gʼeu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, heh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chiˇ nyi-o. Chi beuˬ ka‸ caˬ gʼeu‸ tuˬ caˬ meh la leh shiˉ-ehˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
John4:36 Caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, gʼaˇ hpfuhˇ gʼa leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ awˬ pon awˬ shiˍ shaw keu ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ti shehˍ hpaˇ leh gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ geh gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John4:37 Teˇ gʼaˇ ti leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼeu‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, chi hta‸ cawˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:38 Nawˬ hui kanˉ maˇ te kuiˬ lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ caˬ ca gʼeu‸ tcuh ve yoˬ. Shu kanˉ te taˍ leh, yawˇ hui te taˍ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui lo‸-e peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:39 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Ngaˬ hkʼa te jaw ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
John4:40 Hkʼe te leh, Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo nyiˇ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:41 Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ yonˍ ve yoˬ. 
John4:42 Yawˇ hui lehˬ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw ceh ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ to yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, chaw chi lehˬ miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John4:43 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ lo nyiˇ nyi chehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John4:44 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ awˬ to shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
John4:45 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo pawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw kʼai leh, pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hkʼa te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
John4:46 Hkʼe te leh, iˉ kaˆ hta‸ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ ve teˇ kaˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Kaˍnaˆ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yaˇ paˍ naˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:47 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tu leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ suh la paˇ neˇ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
John4:48 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ yonˍ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:49 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve yaˇ maˇ suh sheˍ htaˇ a ciˉ laˬ-o‸ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:50 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ ve yaˇ pa na-e la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yonˍ leh kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John4:51 Yawˇ kʼo‸-e chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ la leh, Nawˬ ve yaˇ paˍ na-e la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:52 Hkʼe te leh, Yawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ tanˬ na-e la ve le teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Aˉ nyi mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ teˇ naˍ riˍ htaˇ, yawˇ kaˆ naˬ ve na-e la ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John4:53 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Nawˬ ve yaˇ paˍ na-e la peuˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hta‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ awˬ pa shiˍ leh, yawˇ awˬ to ka‸ yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ka‸ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
John4:54 Awˬ heˆ chi lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tu leh Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ te ve awˬ heˆ nyiˇ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John5:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la leh, Yeˍsuˆ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
John5:2 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw, yawˬ taˍ meu‸ hpe‸ awˬ paˇ lo, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ Beˍteˍsaˍdaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve gʼuiˬ po teˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬ po oˇ ve awˬ jaˇ lo aˉ po kʼo ngaˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John5:3 Aˉ po kʼo oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo naˬ ve chaw, mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw, hkui luˬ ve chaw leh hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw maˇ maˇ zuh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Shehˆ chi hiˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ naˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:6 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ naˬ maw jaˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ chehˇ sha la gaˇ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John5:7 Chaw naˬ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, iˉ kaˆ hiˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ yuˬ keu laˇ tuˬ ve chaw maˇ cawˬ. Ngaˬ ya‸-e chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo‸-e ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:8 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Tu loˬ. Nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼai-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:9 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ na-e la leh, yawˇ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John5:10 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi lehˬ, shinˉ nyi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, na-e la ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ya‸ nyi lehˬ shinˉ nyi yoˬ. Nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve lehˬ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John5:11 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼai-o teh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:12 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve chaw a shu le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John5:13 Na-e la ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ a shu leh naˍ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, oˇ kaˬ lo chaw chehˇ maˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ." 
John5:14 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Nawˬ chehˇ sha la peuˬ. Chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ taˇ kʼaw‸ te teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:15 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ kʼai leh, Ngaˬ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:16 Shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ oˇ hkʼe te ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:17 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ Awˬ pa lehˬ, chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:18 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ shinˉ nyi hta‸ te luˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˇ ve Awˬ pa teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ taˍ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ leuˉ leh ca ve yoˬ." 
John5:19 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Yaˇ hpu lehˬ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe te‸ chiˉ ka‸ te maˇ gʼa. Awˬ pa te chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve hkʼe ceh tiˉ yawˇ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa hkʼa te ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ Yaˇ hpu htawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
John5:20 Awˬ pa lehˬ, Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ leh, yawˇ awˬ to hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa anˇ jaˇ tuˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John5:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa lehˬ suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ lawˬ ve hkʼe, Yaˇ hpu htawˇ yawˇ te‸ la piˇ gaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te‸ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John5:22 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Awˬ pa hta‸ yawˆ yan ve hkʼe Yaˇ hpu hta‸ htawˇ yawˆ yan tuˬ, Awˬ pa lehˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ. Suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ." 
John5:23 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ, Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ maˇ yawˆ yan ve yoˬ." 
John5:24 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ taˍ peuˬ. Suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ. Suh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ponˬ tawˆ-e leh, te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e peuˬ." 
John5:25 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la chehˇ leh, chi beu‸ ka‸ gaˬ la peuˬ. Gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hui htawˇ co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John5:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ tuˬ Awˬ pa a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:27 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve pa taw, suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:28 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ taˇ anˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh tawˆ la tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John5:29 Da‸ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, co ha te‸ ve awˬ pon kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ. Haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John5:30 Ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe te‸ chiˉ ka‸ te maˇ gʼa. Ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ te. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
John5:31 Ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ lehˬ maˇ cawˇ." 
John5:32 Ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve lehˬ, cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:33 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ geh shu hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:34 Chaw yaˇ lo laˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John5:35 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ leh awˬ gʼeuˆ ba chehˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ ha lehˬ tuˬ nyi ma cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John5:36 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ cawˬ taˍ ve shaˉ hkiˆ lehˬ, Yoˇhanˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te tuˬ Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ te tcuh laˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ ka‸ kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:37 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa htawˇ, ngaˬ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ kaˇ jaw. Yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui maˇ mawˬ jaw." 
John5:38 Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ htawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ peu laˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ." 
John5:39 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve pa taw, Li‸ hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ ca hpeu‸ nyi gʼaw nyi ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:40 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui co ha te‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ geh laˬ tuˬ nawˬ hui nyi ma maˇ cawˬ." 
John5:41 Chaw yaˇ piˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ. 
John5:42 Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. 
John5:43 Ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John5:44 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ piˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha piˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ maˇ ca ve nawˬ hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yonˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
John5:45 Awˬ pa mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ laˇ tuˬ ve teh‸ taˇ dawˇ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui gʼaˇ va taˍ ve Moˉseˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John5:46 Moˉseˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui yonˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John5:47 Yawˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yonˍ tuˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Tiˍbeˍriˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Gaˍliˍlehˇ gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo hkanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John6:2 Naˬ ve gawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John6:3 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e leh, oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John6:4 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te tuˬ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:5 Yeˍsuˆ chiˇ nyi leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ geh laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw chi ma ve gʼa caˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼaˬ lo ca vuiˬ tuˬ le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John6:6 Yawˇ chi hkʼe na nyi ve lehˬ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve ceh yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ awˬ to shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John6:7 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi ma ve hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ hkʼeh‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ, hpu nyiˇ ha hteh‸ hpfuhˇ vuiˬ ve htawˇ maˇ law‸ taˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:8 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Anˍdrehˍ kʼoˆ ve," 
John6:9 Cho‸ te taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ leh ngaˇ ehˉ nyiˇ hkeh cawˬ ve yaˇ paˍ ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi ma ve awˬ pon chi teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le teh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:10 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mui tcuh-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo mvuh‸ de hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, oˇ kaˬ lo mui taˍ ve chaw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ ceh tiˉ ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ hkʼe cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John6:11 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ leh, bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mui chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˇ shaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui caˇ gaˇ ve hkʼe pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:12 Yawˇ hui hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Te‸ chiˉ maˇ gʼa mehˉ kʼai tuˬ, caˇ leuˉ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:13 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, cho‸ te taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ ngaˇ diˬ hta‸ caˇ leuˉ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, teˇ chi nyiˇ hkʼawˍ lawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
John6:14 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ te ve awˬ heˆ chi hta‸ chaw chi ma ve gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Chaw chi lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo laˬ tuˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:15 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ nyiˉ te tcuh-a teh‸ dawˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo kʼaw‸ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
John6:16 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼuiˬ po lo ya‸-e leh," 
John6:17 haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ lo hkanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui mehˆ muiˉ naˆ jaˇ peuˬ ve ka‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui geh maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ." 
John6:18 Mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ jaˇ leh, gʼuiˬ baˇ taˆ la ve yoˬ." 
John6:19 Yawˇ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ shehˆ laˆ awˇ laˆ hkʼe gʼawˆ kʼai peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ kʼaw juˇ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ paˇ lo laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ htaˇ kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:20 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ yoˬ, taˇ kawˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:21 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lehˬ yawˇ hui kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ kaˬ lo teˇ cawˬ haˉ gaˬ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
John6:22 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo chehˇ taˉ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, aˉ nyi htaˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ teˇ maˬ ceh tiˉ cawˬ taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ lo‸-e leh, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ kʼai ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John6:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Tiˍbeˍriˆ venˇ lo laˬ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui hkaoˍmonˇ gʼa caˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
John6:24 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ oˇ kaˬ lo maˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui ciˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John6:25 Gʼuiˬ po coˇ paˉ lo yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, nawˬ choˬ kaˬ lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ laˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John6:26 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ hta‸ ca ve maˇ heˆ. Hkaoˍ monˇ hkʼa bvuhˆ gʼa caˇ ve pa taw ceh nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ." 
John6:27 Luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon gʼaˇ hte‸ taˇ te. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o. Caˇ tuˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon yeˬ ve caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:28 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ," 
John6:29 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ peu laˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:30 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh nawˬ hta‸ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ heˆ te maˍ laˇ ve le." 
John6:31 Nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma kanˉ te maˍ laˇ ve le. Awˬ puˍ aw‸ pi teˇ hpaˍ gʼa caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, mvuhˇ naw ma ve hkaoˍmonˇ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo maˍnaˆ shi hta‸ gʼa caˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:32 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ teh‸ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, mvuhˇ naw ma ve hkaoˍmonˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ Moˉseˍ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve mvuhˇ naw ma ve hkaoˍmonˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ ngaˬ Awˬ pa yoˬ." 
John6:33 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve hkaoˍmonˇlehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve hkaoˍ monˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:34 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, hkaoˍ monˇ oˇ ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:35 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ geh laˬ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ kʼaw‸ meu‸-o. Ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ shiˉ-o." 
John6:36 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ mawˬ ve htawˇ maˇ yonˍ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ." 
John6:37 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa pe‸ laˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, ngaˬ geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ geh laˬ ve chaw hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ chiˇ baˬ." 
John6:38 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve lehˬ, ngaˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ te tuˬ ya‸ la ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John6:39 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve a loˍ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa pe‸ laˇ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa mehˉ kʼai leh, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John6:40 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ mawˬ leh yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ Awˬ pa a loˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:41 Ngaˬ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve hkaoˍ monˇ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca beu ca hkʼaiˉ ve yoˬ." 
John6:42 Chaw chi lehˬ, Yoˇseh‸ ve yaˇ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ teh‸, chi beu‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:43 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ taˇ beu taˇ hkʼaiˉ." 
John6:44 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa lehˬ, shu hta‸ ngaˬ geh lo maˇ gʼawˬ veu laˇ ve kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ geh laˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Ngaˬ geh gʼawˬ veu laˇ ve chaw hta‸ awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John6:45 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa geh hkʼa gʼa kaˇ leh hkʼa gʼa henˇ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, ngaˬ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John6:46 Chaw teˇ gʼa ka‸ Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw. Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ Awˬ pa hta‸ mawˬ jaw ve yoˬ. 
John6:47 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John6:48 Ngaˬ lehˬ, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve hkaoˍ monˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:49 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo maˍnaˆ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa caˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui suh ve yoˬ." 
John6:50 Hkaoˍmonˇ chi hta‸ gʼa caˇ ve chaw maˇ gʼa suh tuˬ, hkaoˍmonˇ chi lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John6:51 Ngaˬ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkaoˍmonˇ chi hta‸ gʼa caˇ ve chaw lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ co ha te‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ ve awˬ pon, ngaˬ piˇ tuˬ ve hkaoˍmonˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ shaˍ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:52 Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ shaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te caˍ laˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:53 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ maˇ caˇ leh yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ maˇ dawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
John6:54 Ngaˬ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ leh ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ dawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John6:55 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ shaˍ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na caˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ htawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na dawˬ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:56 Ngaˬ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ leh ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ dawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:57 Te‸ chehˇ ve Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ te‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hta‸ caˇ ve chaw htawˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw co ha te‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John6:58 Hkaoˍmonˇ chi lehˬ, awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui gʼa caˇ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa caˇ ve htawˇ suh ve yoˬ. Hkaoˍmonˇ chi lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ. Hkaoˍmonˇ chi hta‸ caˇ ve chaw lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:59 Kaˍpeˍneˍonˍ venˇ lo cawˬ ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John6:60 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui laiˉ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Tawˇ chi lehˬ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. A shu na hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:61 Awˬ lawn chi yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ca beu ca hkʼaiˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Tawˇ chi ve hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma luˬ ve leh laˇ." 
John6:62 Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ chehˇ jaw kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ taˆ kʼo‸-e chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ tuˬ ve le." 
John6:63 Co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ ha yoˬ. Awˬ shaˍ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ te maˇ gʼa. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ ha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John6:64 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ maˇ yonˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ a shu hpeh‸ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ a shu hpeh‸ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John6:65 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ Awˬ pa a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ ve kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ geh laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ taˍ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John6:66 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼo‸-e leh yawˇ geh maˇ kʼaw‸ te toˇ ve yoˬ. 
John6:67 Nawˬ hui htawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ ve laˇ teh‸, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John6:68 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui a shu geh kʼai tuˬ ve le. Nawˬ lehˬ co ti‸ ha ti‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John6:69 Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ kehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ taˍ leh shiˍ taˍ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John6:70 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, neˇhaiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John6:71 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Siˉmonˍ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ ve yaˇ Yuˇda‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca chehˇ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ kʼai." 
John7:2 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui Aˉ po kʼo pawehˇ te ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:3 Yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇ miˬ lo kʼai-o." 
John7:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ meh bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, baˬ kuiˬ lo yawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ te. Kanˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ te ve kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ nawˬ awˬ to hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
John7:6 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:7 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ maˇ hpeh‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ lehˬ haiˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
John7:8 Pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui kʼai-o. Ngaˬ ve awˬ yanˇ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve pa taw, pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ maˇ kʼai sheˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:9 Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ leh, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
John7:10 Yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ htawˇ shu hta‸ maˇ mawˬ tcuh leh ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John7:11 Pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ca leh, Yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo chehˇ le teh‸ na nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:12 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ lawn tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yawˇ chaw da‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yawˇ chaw da‸ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw chi ma ve hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw sheh ya‸ chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ lawn hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ maˇ haˆ." 
John7:14 Pawehˇ oˇ ve te leh awˬ kʼaw ji hkʼeun la ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˆ-e leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:15 Hkʼe te leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ anˇ leh, Chaw chi lehˬ li‸ maˇ henˇ jaw ve ka‸, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te chi taw taw shiˍ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:16 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:17 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ te gaˇ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve leh naˍ, maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve leh naˍ, yawˇ shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John7:18 A shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ pon awˬ me‸ awˇ hponˇ ca ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ pon awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ca ve chaw lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo heˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
John7:19 Moˉseˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ na yuˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve le teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:20 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ neˇ geh ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ a shu ca ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:21 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˇ ve, Ngaˬ kanˉ teˇ maˬ te leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:22 Moˉseˍ lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve awˬ liˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. (Awˬ tehˬ kʼoˆ kʼo, Moˉseˍ geh awˉ lawˉ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ geh awˉ lawˉ laˬ ve yoˬ.) Shinˉ nyi htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui chaw hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:23 Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa te luˬ tuˬ, shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸ chaw yaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ ve law kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve laˇ." 
John7:24 Nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ceh nyi leh suhˉ jehˬ ve taˇ te. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ suhˉ jehˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:25 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca chehˇ ve lehˬ, chaw chi hpaˇ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
John7:26 Nyi sheˍ. Yawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve ka‸, shu yawˇ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼoˆ. Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na shiˍ ve leh naˍ." 
John7:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi hpaˇ hkʼaˬ lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo tawˆ la tuˬ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ shiˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:28 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ yawˇ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ laˬ gaˇ leh laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
John7:29 Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ geh lo laˬ leh, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:30 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve pa taw, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ ca hpeh yuˬ." 
John7:31 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ te ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ yawˇ te tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:32 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn kʼoˆ da‸ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ tuˬ bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
John7:33 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ hkui teˇ yanˇ chehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ geh lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
John7:34 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca tuˬ yoˬ. Ca ve htawˇ mawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John7:35 Hkʼe te leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ve le. Hpaˆ da‸ leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui geh ca chehˇ kʼai peuˬ ve chaw hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai leh, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ ca maˍ piˇ tuˬ ve laˇ." 
John7:36 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca tuˬ yoˬ. Ca ve htawˇ mawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ gaˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:37 Pawehˇ te ve awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ nyi, awˬ nyi uiˍ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ huˉ taˍ leh kuˬ ve, Iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve chaw cawˬ kʼo, ngaˬ geh ca dawˬ la-o." 
John7:38 Ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ lawˬ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la leh yoˬ ya‸-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:39 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw hui gʼa tuˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa sheˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Awˬ ha hpu maˇ pe‸ laˇ sheˍ." 
John7:40 Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Chi teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuhˍ kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:41 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸ lehˬ Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la tuˬ laˇ." 
John7:42 Hkri‸ lehˬ Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh Daˍviˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ Behˍlehˍhehnˍ hkʼaˆ lo tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John7:43 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ pa taw chaw chi ma ve nyi ma maˇ hawˍ da‸." 
John7:44 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ ca hpeh yuˬ." 
John7:45 Oˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui geh kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yuˬ laˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ," 
John7:46 bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˍ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ maˍ piˇ jaw teh‸ kʼoˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:47 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ heˍ gʼa peuˬ laˇ." 
John7:48 Jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ laˇ." 
John7:49 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:50 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh laˬ jaw ve Niˆkawˇdeˍ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
John7:51 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kaˇ leh yawˇ te ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ ve ceh ceh, yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John7:52 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ htawˇ Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ chaˬ nyi sheˍ. Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ tawˆ la ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John7:53 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John8:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Shaˍlonˍ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
John8:2 Mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ mui taˍ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:3 Haˉ chawˇ te chehˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yuˬ veu laˇ leh awˬ kʼaw ji lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ. 
John8:4 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, yaˇ miˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ haˉ chawˇ te chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
John8:5 Chi hkʼe ve chaw hta‸ haˉ pui gʼa baˬ pehˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:6 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ lehˍ te leh, miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ve la‸ naw bvuh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ na nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hteˇ lehˍ kʼaw‸ te leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, haˉ pui yuˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ baˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:8 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ lehˍ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ te leh, miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo la‸ naw kʼaw‸ bvuh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John8:9 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, shu a‸ kehˉ mawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ chehˇ taˍ leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve htawˇ awˬ kʼaw ji lo huˉ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
John8:10 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hteˇ lehˍ kʼaw‸ te leh kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ lo kʼai peuˬ le. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ ciˍ yanˍ laˇ leh laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:11 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ ciˍ yanˍ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ ciˍ yanˍ. Kʼai loˬ. Venˇbaˆ taˇ kʼaw‸ te teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:12 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ miˬguiˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ ve chaw lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼai. Co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:13 Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ nawˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ lehˬ, maˇ cawˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:14 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve leh hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve leh hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
John8:15 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ ceh nyi leh suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ." 
John8:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa lehˬ ngaˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John8:17 Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, shaˉ hkiˆ oˇ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John8:18 Ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa htawˇ, ngaˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:19 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui kʼoˇ ve, Nawˬ Awˬ pa hkʼaˬ lo le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ shiˍ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:20 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, hpu shaw kuiˬ bawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve pa taw, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ hpeh yuˬ." 
John8:21 Teˇ pawˆ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca tuˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼai kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:22 Hkʼe te leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼai kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John8:23 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ lo laˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ na hpawˇ lo laˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
John8:24 Nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:25 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ a shu le. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ chehˇ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
John8:26 Nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ kʼoˆ leh suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, hteˇ jaˇ cawˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ geh lo ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:27 Awˬ pa awˬ lawn yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ. 
John8:28 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui chiˇ taˆ-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ a loˍ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ te. Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John8:29 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ baˬ taˉ laˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John8:30 Tawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ yaw ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
John8:31 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui chehˇ yeˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John8:32 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:33 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, shu ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa te jaw. Nawˬ hui hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, venˇbaˆ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, venˇbaˆ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John8:35 Awˬ ceˬ lehˬ, aˉ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ gʼa chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:36 Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John8:37 Nawˬ hui lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
John8:38 Ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa geh lo gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa geh lo gʼa kaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:39 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, Aˍbraˍhanˍ te ve hkʼa suhˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John8:40 Ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo gʼa kaˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ca ve yoˬ. Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ chi hkʼe maˇ te." 
John8:41 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ leh, yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:42 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo tawˆ la leh laˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ laˬ gaˇ leh laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:43 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui na maˇ gʼa ve le. Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui na yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw yoˬ. 
John8:44 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa neˇhaiˬ geh lo laˬ leh, nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe te gaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chehˇ maˇ gʼa. Yawˇ heˍ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve hkʼe yaw ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ heˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, heˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ve awˬ pa htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John8:45 Ngaˬ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw ve pa taw nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
John8:46 Ngaˬ venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ gʼa tuˬ le. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ yaw ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve le." 
John8:47 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ na teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:48 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, neˇ geh ve chaw htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, cawˇ ve yoˬ, maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:49 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ neˇ geh ve chaw maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa hta‸ yawˆ yan ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan." 
John8:50 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ca ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ca shehˍ hpaˇ leh suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John8:51 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te kʼai ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa suh teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:52 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ neˇ geh ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ peuˬ. Aˍbraˍhanˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ suh peuˬ. Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te kʼai ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa suh teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ ve law leˇ." 
John8:53 Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve leh laˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ suh peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ suh peuˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ a shu hkʼe te ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John8:54 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ te ve kʼo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ oˇ ve hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ nawˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John8:55 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ heˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John8:56 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ leh ha lehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John8:57 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ a sha‸ ngaˇ chi hkʼaw‸ ka‸ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ. Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ nawˬ mawˬ jaw leh laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:58 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Aˍbraˍhanˍ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ cawˬ taˍ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John8:59 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ baˬ tuˬ ve haˉ pui shiˍ gʼawˆ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ va‸ sheˬ leh bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John9:1 Yeˍsuˆ ya‸ kʼaw kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw la htaˇ ka‸ mehˆ cuˉ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John9:2 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ. chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ paw la htaˇ ka‸ mehˆ cuˉ taˍ ve lehˬ, a shu ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw le. Yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw laˇ. Awˬ pa awˬ e ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:3 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Awˬ pa awˬ e ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John9:4 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw htaˇ ngaˬ hui gʼa te ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kanˉ te maˇ hpeh‸ ve mvuhˇ hpeu‸ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. 
John9:5 Ngaˬ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ sheˍ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, miˬguiˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John9:6 Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ciˉ gʼuiˇ hpe‸ pfuhˍ leh je‸ nehˆ te sheˬ leh, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ shehˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:7 Siˉlonˍ gʼuiˬ po lo kʼai leh tsuhˇ baˬ-o‸ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Siˉlonˍ kʼoˆ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, Kʼai tcuh peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ.) Hkʼe te leh yawˇ kʼai leh ca tsuhˇ baˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ mehˆ mawˬ la leh kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John9:8 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve yehˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo chehˇ ve chaw hui leh yawˇ lawˬ leh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve chaw hui kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ mui taˍ leh lawˬ leh‸ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John9:9 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ ngaˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John9:10 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te mawˬ la ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:11 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍsuˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ je‸ nehˆ te leh, ngaˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ shehˍ laˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Siˉlonˍ gʼuiˬ po lo kʼai leh tsuhˇ baˬ-o‸ teh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ ca tsuhˇ hkʼa ve teˇ yanˇ mehˆ mawˬ la ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:12 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai le teh‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:13 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ jaw ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John9:14 Yeˍsuˆ je‸ nehˆ te leh yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve teˇ nyi lehˬ, shinˉ nyi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John9:15 Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te mawˬ la ve awˬ lawn Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ je‸ nehˆ shehˍ laˇ leh, ngaˬ ca tsuhˇ baˬ ve teˇ yanˇ mehˆ mawˬ la ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:16 Hkʼe te leh, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw oˇ ve hpaˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shinˉ nyi htaˇ yawˇ maˇ ce maˇ kan teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh te gʼa tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ dawˇ hkʼaˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John9:17 Mehˆ cuˉ jaw ve chaw hta‸ yawˇ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:18 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mehˆ mawˬ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ maˇ kuˬ na sheˍ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ mehˆ cuˉ leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ mehˆ mawˬ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ." 
John9:19 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ ve yaˇ paˍ yoˬ laˇ. Paw la htaˇ ka‸ mehˆ cuˉ ve teh‸ nawˬ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, chi teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ laˇ. Hkʼe te kʼo, chi beu‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ mehˆ mawˬ la ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:20 Yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, paw la htaˇ ka‸ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John9:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh yawˇ mehˆ mawˬ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ maˇ shiˍ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ a shu mawˬ la piˇ ve hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ maˇ shiˍ. Yawˇ hta‸ na nyi-o. Yawˇ uiˍ la peuˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ to awˬ lawn yawˇ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:22 Yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.
