Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ tawˆ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ jehˬ cheˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
John9:23 Chi hta‸ pa taw, awˬ pa awˬ e kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ uiˍ la peuˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ na nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:24 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ jaw ve chaw hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kuˬ veu laˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ ceh tiˉ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:25 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ venˇbaˆ yaˇ leh naˍ, maˇ heˆ leh naˍ, ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ. Teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ mehˆ cuˉ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ ngaˬ mehˆ mawˬ la peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:26 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te laˇ ve le. Nawˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:27 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ sheh htaˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ ve ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ na. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kaˇ gaˇ sheˍ le. Nawˬ hui htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la gaˇ leh laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:28 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ leh, Nawˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, Moˉseˍ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John9:29 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Moˉseˍ hta‸ tawˇ yaw piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi hpaˇ hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John9:30 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ngaˬ ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve lehˬ, anˇ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John9:31 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan leh yawˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬshaˬ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John9:32 Mvuhˇ kawˍ miˬ ya‸ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, paw la htaˇ ka‸ mehˆ cuˉ taˍ ve chaw hta‸ shu mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ kaˇ jaw." 
John9:33 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ te maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:34 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ venˇbaˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve ka‸, nawˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
John9:35 Chaw oˇ ve hta‸ shu gʼa‸ tawˆ ve awˬ lawn Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ca mawˬ htaˇ, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ nawˬ yonˍ ve laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:36 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu a shu le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:37 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John9:38 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
John9:39 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Mehˆ maˇ mawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, mehˆ mawˬ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ mawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ kʼai tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John9:40 Yawˇ awˬ paˇ lo chehˇ taˍ ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Ngaˬ hui htawˇ mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hpeh‸ ve laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John9:41 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Ngaˬ hui mehˆ mawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ cawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:1 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, yawˬ hkawˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸ la htaˇ, yehˬmiˉhpe‸ lo maˇ lo‸ la leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ hkʼaˇ lo ca taˆ lo‸ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ chaw naˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John10:2 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yehˬmiˉhpe‸ lo lo‸ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John10:3 Yehˬ miˉ shaw shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ yehˬ miˉ hpaw piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ meh hta‸ kuˬ leh, yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
John10:4 Yawˇ ve yawˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ sheh tawˆ-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo yawˇ kʼai leh, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John10:5 Yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ da‸ ve chaw hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, chaw oˇ hkʼe ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh yawˇ hui maˇ kʼai ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸ hpaw-e ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:6 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, tawˇ pa haˉ chi yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
John10:7 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ lehˬ yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ lo‸ la tuˬ ve yehˬmiˉhpe‸ yoˬ." 
John10:8 Ngaˬ maˇ laˬ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkʼa laˬ peuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ chaw naˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na." 
John10:9 Ngaˬ lehˬ, yehˬmiˉhpe‸ yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸ la ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, tawˆ tawˆ lo‸ lo‸ te leh, kʼaˆ caˇ kuiˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John10:10 Chaw hkʼawˇ lehˬ, hkʼawˇ yuˬ tuˬ, tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ leh, te luˬ tuˬ awˬ pon ceh laˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ a sha‸ gʼa te‸ tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, a sha‸ te‸ ve oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John10:11 Ngaˬ lehˬ da‸ ve yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, gʼaˇ hpfuhˇ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ heˆ leh, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ ve maˇ heˆ ve pa taw, veˬ laˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh hpaw-e ve yoˬ. Veˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ che‸ leh hpaˆ da‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John10:13 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, gʼaˇ hpfuhˇ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ceh hpeh‸ leh, yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon te‸ chiˉ maˇ dawˇ nyi ve pa taw, yawˇ hpaw-e ve yoˬ." 
John10:14 Ngaˬ lehˬ da‸ ve yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ yoˬ. Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ leh, ngaˬ htawˇ Awˬ pa hta‸ shiˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ leh, ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John10:15 Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ ve yoˬ. 
John10:16 Yawˬ hkawˆ chi hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ ngaˬ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa ca shiˍ veu laˇ leh, yawˇ hui ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˬ moˍ teˇ moˍ tiˉ cawˬ leh, yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John10:17 Ngaˬ ve a sha‸ hta‸ kʼaw‸ yuˬ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ, a sha‸ tanˇ piˇ ve pa taw Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
John10:18 Ngaˬ ve a sha‸ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ hiˉ yuˬ maˇ lu yuˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ leh, kʼaw‸ yuˬ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ ngaˬ geh cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te tuˬ, Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:19 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ dawˇ hkʼaˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John10:20 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ neˇ geh leh gʼuˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui na ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John10:21 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, neˇ geh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ. Neˇ lehˬ mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hta‸ mehˆ mawˬ la piˇ gʼa tuˬ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John10:22 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve pawehˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:23 Mvuhˇ kaˆ ve awˬ yanˇ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Sawˉla‸monˍ ve koˇ caˉ lo te toˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
John10:24 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ chehˇ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui htawˇ dawˇ nawˬ dawˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ nawˬ hkʼaˬ maw maw te laˇ tuˬ ve le. Nawˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:25 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ ve ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
John10:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ heˆ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui maˇ yonˍ." 
John10:27 Ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ leh, yawˇ hui ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John10:28 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa luˬ maˇ gʼa sheˆ. A shu ka‸ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ lu yuˬ maˇ gʼa." 
John10:29 Yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ ve yoˬ. A shu ka‸ Awˬ pa ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ lu yuˬ maˇ gʼa." 
John10:30 Awˬ pa ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:31 Oˇ htaˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ baˬ tuˬ ve haˉ pui shiˍ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ ve yoˬ." 
John10:32 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ Awˬ pa lo tawˆ la ve da‸ ve kanˉ laiˉ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ-a teh‸ te ve le teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:33 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ da‸ ve kanˉ te ve pa taw nawˬ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ-a teh‸ te ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve pa taw baˬ-a teh‸ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ chaw yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha hkʼe nawˬ te ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve, nawˬ hui lehˬ gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
John10:35 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. (Li‸ hpu tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ te luˬ maˇ hpeh‸.)" 
John10:36 Hkʼe te kʼo, Awˬ pa da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ leh, chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu laˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve pa taw, Nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui kʼoˇ ve leh laˇ." 
John10:37 Ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ taˇ yonˍ." 
John10:38 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ htawˇ, ngaˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yonˍ-o‸. Oˇ hkʼe yonˍ ve kʼo, Awˬ pa ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ lehˬ Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ka‸, nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John10:39 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ hpeh yuˬ-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John10:40 Yoˇhanˬ awˉ lawˉ peuˇ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve teˇ kaˬ, Yawˇdanˍ gʼuiˬ ma coˇ paˉ lo yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John10:41 Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh lo laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ awˬ heˆ te‸ chiˉ maˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn Yoˇhanˬ hkʼa kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, cawˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John10:42 Oˇ kaˬ lo chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ la ve yoˬ. 
John11:1 Maˍriˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ ma Maˍhtaˆ hui chehˇ ve Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ yaˇ Laˍzaˍruˆ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ naˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
John11:2 Maˍriˆ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ naˍ manˇ hawnˉ shehˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve hkui sheh hta‸ uˉ hkeh mvuh yuˬ shiˆ piˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ. Naˬ chehˇ ve Laˍzaˍruˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:3 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ viˉ ma oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ geh shu hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ naˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
John11:4 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Naˬ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, suh law‸ law‸ naˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ. Naˬ ve oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la leh, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John11:5 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Maˍhtaˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi ma hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:6 Hkʼe te leh, Laˍzaˍruˆ naˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ kaˬ lo nyiˇ nyi kʼaw‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:7 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai-a veuˬ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:8 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Raˍbiˆ-oˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ-a teh‸ te chehˇ ve ka‸, nawˬ oˇ kaˬ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai tuˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:9 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ chi nyiˇ naˍ riˍ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw htaˇ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai ve kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
John11:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ hpeu‸ htaˇ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John11:11 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ chawˇ Laˍzaˍruˆ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ ca nawˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ kʼai shaˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:12 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, yawˇ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve kʼo, na-e la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:13 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Laˍzaˍruˆ suh peuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, Laˍzaˍruˆ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:14 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Laˍzaˍruˆ suh peuˬ." 
John11:15 Nawˬ hui yonˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo maˇ chehˇ ve pa taw nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ yawˇ geh kʼai-a veuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John11:16 Hkʼe te leh, Yaˇ cehˬ kʼa teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Htoˉma‸ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yawˇ geh teˇ geh suh tuˬ ngaˬ hui htawˇ kʼai-a veuˬ teh‸, yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:17 Yeˍsuˆ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw lo tuˍ taˍ ve awˇ nyi gaˬ peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:18 Beˍtaˍniˆ venˇ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ neˇ ve yoˬ. Aˬ laˬ hkʼe nyiˇ laˆ ceh tiˉ vuiˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:19 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Maˍhtaˆ leh Maˍriˆ geh Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ maˇ laˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Laˍzaˍruˆ suh ve pa taw, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ dawˇ sha tuˬ te piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:20 Yeˍsuˆ laˬ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ Maˍhtaˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Maˍriˆ lehˬ, yehˬ hkʼaw chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:21 Oˇ htaˇ Maˍhtaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ suh tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
John11:22 Chi beu‸ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha geh nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ lawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:23 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:24 Maˍhtaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ nyi, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:25 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ leh co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, suh peuˬ ve htawˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John11:26 A sha‸ te‸ leh ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa suh. Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ nawˬ yonˍ ve laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:27 Maˍhtaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yoˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo laˬ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:28 Maˍhtaˆ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ kʼai leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi ma Maˍriˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Saˍ la‸ gaˬ la peuˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, a yehˉ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:29 Maˍriˆ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ haˆ tu leh Yeˍsuˆ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John11:30 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ hkʼaˆ hkʼaw lo maˇ lo‸-e sheˍ. Maˍhtaˆ yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ ve teˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:31 Hkʼe te leh, Maˍriˆ geh yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ dawˇ sha tuˬ te chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Maˍriˆ haˆ tu leh tawˆ kʼai ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ tuˍ hpfuh lo ca hawˬ ve hehˉ teh‸ dawˇ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John11:32 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ chehˇ taˍ kuiˬ lo gaˬ la leh yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve hkui paˇ lo boˆ sheˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ suh tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:33 Maˍriˆ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hawˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼanˇ leh dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:34 Nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ lo ca taˍ ve le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ca nyi la-o teh‸ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:35 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John11:36 Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi sheˍ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ ha‸ jaˇ law leˇ teh‸ kʼoˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:37 Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hta‸ mehˆ mawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Laˍzaˍruˆ maˇ gʼa suh tuˬ te maˇ gʼa leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:38 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ hkʼanˇ leh tuˍ hpfuh lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Tuˍ hpfuh oˇ ve lehˬ, haˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo haˉ pui shiˍ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:39 Haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ-o‸ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ viˉ ma Maˍhtaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, yawˇ suh ve chi beu‸ awˇ nyi gaˬ peuˬ ve pa taw, kuiˇ nuˬ la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:40 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ yonˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:41 Oˇ htaˇ, haˉ pui shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui hpfuhˆ baˬ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, A pa-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
John11:42 Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ na yuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John11:43 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Laˍzaˍruˆ-oˬ, tawˆ la-o teh‸, yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John11:44 Oˇ htaˇ, suh peuˬ ve chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkui sheh la‸ sheh hta‸ hpa hawˆ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ hpaˉ ce‸ hpeh tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ hpui hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:45 Hkʼe te leh, Maˍriˆ geh laˬ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ te ve kanˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
John11:46 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui geh kʼai leh, Yeˍsuˆ te ve kanˉ awˬ lawn ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:47 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬ heˆ laiˉ ceuˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:48 Ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼe leˇ teh taˍ ve kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Roˉma‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, ngaˬ hui ve da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hiˉ yuˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John11:49 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, oˇ ve teˇ hkʼaw‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ shiˍ." 
John11:50 Chaw teˇ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ gʼa luˬ tuˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ chaw teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon suh ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon leuˉ leh da‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ nyi law leˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John11:51 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ dawˇ tawˆ leh yaw ve maˇ heˆ. Oˇ ve teˇ hkʼaw‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ chaw oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼe te leh tawˇ yaw ve yoˬ." 
John11:52 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ awˬ pon Yeˍsuˆ gʼa suh tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Teˇ kaˬ le le lo hpaˆ da‸ chehˇ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui hta‸ teˇ moˍ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon htawˇ yawˇ gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ. 
John11:53 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:54 Hkʼe te leh Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ te toˇ. Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, heh puiˉ hkʼaw hta‸ neˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Eˇhpaˍrenˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh yawˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John11:55 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ a shu yawˇ awˬ to da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ tuˬ, pawehˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo tu leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John11:56 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ. Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui huˉ chehˇ htaˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ le. Yawˇ lehˬ pawehˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ laˬ hehˉ laˇ teh‸ na nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John11:57 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui lehˬ, chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve, A shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hpeh yuˬ tuˬ gʼa hto laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John12:1 Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkaw‸ nyi htaˇ ka‸, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Beˍtaˍniˆ hkʼaˆ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve Laˍzaˍruˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John12:2 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ mvuhˇ hpeu‸ awˍ teˇ poˬ te caˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Maˍhtaˆ awˍ keu caˍ piˇ shehˍ ma te leh Laˍzaˍruˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ geh mui caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:3 Oˇ htaˇ Maˍriˆ lehˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve naˍduˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve naˍ manˇ hawnˉ teˇ chi law hta‸ yuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve hkui sheh hta‸ shehˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Maˍriˆ yawˇ ve uˉ hkeh mvuh yuˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ ve hkui sheh hta‸ shiˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Naˍ manˇ hawnˉ oˇ ve awˬ shaˉ lehˬ, yehˬ teˇ yehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hawnˉ heuˍ lehˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John12:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
John12:5 Naˍ manˇ hawnˉ chi hta‸ hpu shehˆ ha hteh‸ hawˇ sheˬ leh haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te maˇ pehˬ piˇ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
John12:6 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ dawˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ lehˬ chaw hkʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Hpu miˉ chaw hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ leh, keu taˍ ve hpu hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ jaw ve yoˬ." 
John12:7 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ chi hta‸ taˇ deˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ tuˍ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ pon, naˍ manˇ hawnˉ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ peuˬ." 
John12:8 Haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:9 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, yawˇ hui oˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ kʼai ve maˇ heˆ. Suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ htawˇ mawˬ gaˇ leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John12:10 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ htawˇ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John12:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ pa taw Yuˇda‸ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai chehˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:12 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gaˬ la ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:13 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, tcuhˉ pui meuˇ awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Hoˍsaˍnaˍ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
John12:14 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, piˉ laˬ ehˉ hta‸ mawˬ leh ciˇ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe," 
John12:15 Ziˉonˍ ve yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, taˇ kawˆ. Nyi loˬ, nawˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, piˉ laˬ awˬ yehˇ hta‸ ciˇ leh laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John12:16 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ awˬ lawn oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ gʼa peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe te piˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ." 
John12:17 Yeˍsuˆ Laˍzaˍruˆ hta‸ tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo kuˬ tawˆ la leh yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ taˍ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:18 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ hta‸ ca ha‸ ve lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ heˆ oˇ ve hta‸ te ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
John12:19 Hkʼe te leh, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Nawˬ hui te‸ chiˉ te maˇ gʼa. Nyi loˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai peuˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John12:20 Pawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw oˉ kʼoˍ pui la tuˬ awˬ pon laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
John12:21 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw cawˬ ve Behˇsehˇdaˆ venˇ yaˇ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ geh kʼai leh, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, ngaˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:22 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ kʼai leh Anˍdrehˍ hta‸ hto piˇ leh, Anˍdrehˍ leh Hpiˇliˇpuˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:23 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
John12:24 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, caˬ yawˇ teˇ shiˍ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ ce leh, maˇ luˬ maˇ suh ve kʼo, awˬ yawˇ teˇ shiˍ tiˉ cawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, luˬ kʼai suh kʼai ve kʼo, awˬ shiˍ maˇ maˇ naw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John12:25 A shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a sha‸ gʼa shonˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ canˇ ve chaw lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John12:26 Ngaˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa laˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chehˇ ve teˇ kaˬ lo ngaˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw htawˇ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Awˬ pa taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John12:27 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ nyi ma dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ le. A pa-oˬ, awˬ yanˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ, awˬ lawn kʼo awˬ yanˇ chi awˬ pon ngaˬ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
John12:28 A pa-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la leh, Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ peuˬ. Ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ cawˬ piˇ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:29 Oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, Mvuhˇ tawˍ tawˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:30 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Bvuhˬ la ve awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui awˬ pon yoˬ." 
John12:31 Miˬguiˬ chi lehˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇhta‸ chi beu‸ ka‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John12:32 Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ngaˬ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ geh lo ngaˬ gʼawˬ veu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:33 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te suh tuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:34 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸ lehˬ co co taiˍ taiˍ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma te kʼoˆ ve le. Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, a shu le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:35 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh teˇ hkui ceh tiˉ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Naˆ ho‸ ve nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa hoˆ tiˍ taˍ tuˬ, nawˬ geh awˬ gʼeuˆ cawˬ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui toˇ kʼai loˬ. Naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo toˇ kʼai ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ." 
John12:36 Nawˬ hui geh awˬ gʼeuˆ cawˬ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼeuˆ ve yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ yonˍ loˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui geh lo tawˆ kʼai leh ca va‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John12:37 Yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ awˬ heˆ chi taw taw yawˇ te taˍ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ." 
John12:38 Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ a shu yonˍ ve le. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ a shu hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve le, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:39 Chi hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui yonˍ maˇ hpeh‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍyaˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve," 
John12:40 Yawˇ hui mehˆ shiˍ maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, nyi ma maˇ gʼa dawˇ pawnˍ tuˬ leh, nyi ma maˇ kʼaw‸ pa leh ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa gu na-e tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ cuˉ piˇ lawˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ heh piˇ lawˬ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:41 Iˉsaˍyaˆ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John12:42 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ htawˇ, jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yonˍ ve htawˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw, yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui maˇ kʼoˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ tawˆ laˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
John12:43 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa ve a‸ kehˉ, chaw yaˇ hui geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John12:44 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John12:45 Ngaˬ hta‸ mawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John12:46 Ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John12:47 Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John12:48 Ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ leh ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na ve chaw hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ nyi htaˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John12:49 Ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼoˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ gʼa yaw tuˬ ve, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ." 
John12:50 Yawˇ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hkʼa kʼoˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John13:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo tawˆ kʼai leh Awˬ pa geh gʼa kʼo‸-e tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ ve hta‸ Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ maˇ te sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve yawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:2 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, neˇhaiˬ lehˬ Siˉmonˍ ve yaˇ paˍ Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ tawˆ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ." 
John13:3 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ pa chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha geh kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John13:4 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ awˍ caˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ tu la leh yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ kʼehˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hpaˉ ce‸ yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve caw‸ cehˍ nyi hta‸ tsuh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:5 Oˇ htaˇ, hkehˇ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo iˉ kaˆ keu leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, yawˇ tsuh‸ taˍ ve hpaˉ ce‸ yuˬ leh shiˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:6 Yawˇ Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ tuˬ ve laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John13:7 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te chehˇ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ htawˇ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ nawˬ shiˍ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:8 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve hkui sheh hta‸ nawˬ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa tsuhˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tsuhˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:9 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve hkui sheh hta‸ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. La‸ sheh leh oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ htawˇ tsuhˇ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:10 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Iˉ kaˆ hehˉ peuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ da‸ kehˬ peuˬ ve pa taw, hkui sheh hta‸ ceh tiˉ tsuhˇ tuˬ loˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ kehˬ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ da‸ kehˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ daˬ kehˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John13:12 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ kʼaw‸ deh leh mui ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-aˬ laˇ." 
John13:13 Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ Saˍ la‸ ka‸ Jawˇmawˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve hkʼe ngaˬ lehˬ Saˍ la‸ ka‸ Jawˇmawˇ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:14 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ ka‸, Saˍ la‸ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:15 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ te laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ te tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ tuˬ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
John13:16 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ ceˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Tcuh yaˇ htawˇ, yawˇ hta‸ tcuh peu shehˍ hpaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
John13:17 Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh, shiˍ ve hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John13:18 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Ngaˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve hkui mehˍ cu ngaˬ hta‸ hteˆ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ gʼa biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:19 Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ tuˬ, maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ peuˬ." 
John13:20 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ peu kʼai ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:21 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh, Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ tehˬ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John13:22 Yawˇ a shu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ leh naˍ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:23 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ ha‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma pui paˇ lo ngeh mui chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:24 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Yawˇ a shu hta‸ kʼoˆ ve leh naˍ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ heˆ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:25 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve nyi ma pui awˬ paˇ lo jiˆ kʼai leh, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, a shu le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John13:26 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ peu-eˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh awˍ chiˇ hkʼaw tuˍ sheˬ leh piˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ peu-eˬ hta‸ awˍ chiˇ hkʼaw tuˍ sheˬ leh, Siˉmonˍ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ ve yaˇ pa Yuˇda‸ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:27 Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve teˇ peu-eˬ hta‸ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Saˍtanˍ yawˇ awˬ kʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ te tuˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ haˆ haˆ ca te-o teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:28 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ ve hta‸ hpui lawˇ paˇ lo mui chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. 
John13:29 Yuˆda‸ lehˬ, hpu miˉ chaw hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸, Pawehˇ chi awˬ pon ngaˬ hui loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca vuiˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh naˍ, maˇ heˆ kʼo, Haˍ gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ ca piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh naˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ dawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:30 Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, hkaoˍmonˇ oˇ ve teˇ peu-eˬ hta‸ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John13:31 Yawˇ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, chi beu‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la peuˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la peuˬ." 
John13:32 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo Yaˇ hpu hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John13:33 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ hkui ceh gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼai kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:34 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸," 
John13:35 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ ve kʼo, ha‸ da‸ ve oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:36 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼai kuiˬ lo chi beu‸ nawˬ laˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ heh‸, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ laˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:37 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve le. Nawˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ ve a sha‸ tanˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John13:38 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ pon nawˬ ve a sha‸ tanˇ tuˬ laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, gʼaˆ hpfuh maˇ bvuhˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ baˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:1 Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma taˇ dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ yonˍ-o‸. 
John14:2 Ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ kuiˬ cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, maˇ cawˬ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto taˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼo‸-e leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ ca gu tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:3 Ngaˬ kʼo‸-e leh nawˬ hui awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ ca gu taˉ peuˬ kʼo, ngaˬ ve chehˇ kui lo nawˬ hui htawˇ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ laˬ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:4 Ngaˬ kʼai kuiˬ ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John14:5 Htoˉma‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ tuˬ le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:6 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ ya‸ kʼaw yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸, co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ cuˇ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ Awˬ pa geh gaˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
John14:7 Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi beu‸ hta‸ tanˬ leh nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸, Htoˉma‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:8 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ Awˬ pa a ciˉ maw laˇ-oˆ. Maw laˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:9 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chi maw maw chehˇ peuˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ laˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ mawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ mawˬ peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ Awˬ pa a ciˉ maw laˇ-oˆ teh‸, nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma te kʼoˆ ve le." 
John14:10 Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ pa chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ maˇ yonˍ leh laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, yawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:11 Ngaˬ lehˬ Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yonˍ loˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ loˬ." 
John14:12 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ ngaˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te tuˬ yoˬ. Chi a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ te tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Awˬ pa geh kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:13 Awˬ pa lehˬ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ pa taw awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:14 Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui lawˬ ve hkʼe ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:15 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui na yuˬ leh te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:16 Ngaˬ lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ lawˬ leh, nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ tuˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John14:17 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Nawˬ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ yawˇ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ yaˇcuˬshi hkʼe baˬ taˉ laˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh kʼaw‸ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. 
John14:19 Teˇ hkui gaˬ kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ te‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui htawˇ gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:20 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:21 Ngaˬ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh te ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ Awˬ pa ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ chaw oˇ ve hta‸ ha‸ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ to yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maw piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:22 Yuˇda‸ Iˉsaˍkaˍriˍoˆ maˇ heˆ ve, Yuˇda‸ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ to ngaˬ hui hta‸ maw laˇ leh miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ maˇ maw piˇ ve, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John14:23 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ geh lo laˬ leh yawˇ geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:24 Ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John14:25 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John14:26 Awˬ pa lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le maˍ laˇ leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John14:27 Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ teh taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui piˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma taˇ dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ. Kawˆ ve nyi ma ka‸ taˇ cawˬ piˇ. 
John14:28 Ngaˬ kʼo‸-e leh nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, Awˬ pa geh ngaˬ kʼo‸-e ve pa taw nawˬ hui ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa lehˬ ngaˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John14:29 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ gʼuˇ suhˍ chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ." 
John14:30 Chi beu‸ hta‸ tanˬ leh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ tcuhˇ tcuhˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ yaw-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ te‸ chiˉ kanˇ paˆ maˇ cawˬ." 
John14:31 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ pa hta‸ ngaˬ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, miˬ guiˬ yaˇ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ te ve yoˬ. Tu loˬ. Kʼai-a veuˬ." 
John15:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve a pehˉ meuˇ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa lehˬ, hko ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John15:2 Awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ ve ngaˬ ve awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ tawˆ baˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, leuˉ leh awˬ shiˍ naw‸ maˇ la tuˬ, yawˇ kehˬ lehˍ gu shawˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John15:3 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, chi beu‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui kehˬ la peuˬ." 
John15:4 Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ kʼaˉ lehˬ, awˬ te hta‸ maˇ tcuhˉ naw‸ kʼo, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la maˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la maˇ hpeh‸." 
John15:5 Ngaˬ lehˬ a pehˉ meuˇ te hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ shiˍ maˇ maˇ naw‸ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui te‸ chiˉ ka‸ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
John15:6 Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chiˇ baˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe ve awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu gʼawˆ hpoˆ leh, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu leh aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
John15:7 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui lawˬ gaˇ ve hkʼe lawˬ-o‸. Nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:8 Nawˬ hui awˬ shiˍ maˇ maˇ naw‸ la ve pa taw, ngaˬ Awˬ pa awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa leh, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:9 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ-oˆ." 
John15:10 Ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ Awˬ pa piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:11 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve ha lehˬ ve cawˬ tuˬ leh, nawˬ hui ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ, tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John15:12 Ngaˬ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸." 
John15:13 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ awˬ pon a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ tanˇ piˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. 
John15:14 Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John15:15 Chi beu‸ hta‸ tanˬ leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ ceˬ teh‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceˬ lehˬ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ aˬ hto‸ ma te chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ chawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa geh ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ peuˬ." 
John15:16 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui kʼai leh awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la leh, awˬ shiˍ oˇ ve yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ pa geh nawˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:17 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe piˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸. 
John15:18 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ canˇ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hta‸ canˇ ve teh‸ shiˍ-o‸." 
John15:19 Nawˬ hui lehˬ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ chi miˬ guiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ leh, miˬguiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ tawˆ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ." 
John15:20 Awˬ ceˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui na yuˬ leh te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ htawˇ na yuˬ leh te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ te laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
John15:22 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ ca hto piˇ la ve kʼo, yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ ca kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
John15:23 Ngaˬ hta‸ canˇ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ canˇ ve yoˬ." 
John15:24 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ te jaw ve kanˉ hta‸ yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼaˇ suhˍ ngaˬ maˇ te ve kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh canˇ ve yoˬ." 
John15:25 Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Te‸ chiˉ awˬ lawn maˇ cawˬ ka‸, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John15:26 Awˬ pa geh lo tawˆ la ve Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Awˬ pa lo tawˆ la ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve Awˬ ha hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ awˬ lawn yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John15:27 Nawˬ hui htawˇ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:1 Nawˬ hui nyi ma maˇ gʼa luˬ kʼai tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:2 Shu nawˬ hui hta‸ Yuˇda‸ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ hta‸ te peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:3 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw oˇ hkʼe te tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:4 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˉ laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ, tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve pa taw, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ laˇ sheˍ." 
John16:5 Ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ geh chi beu‸ ngaˬ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai tuˬ le teh‸, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ na nyi." 
John16:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˇ laˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ haˍ tuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
John16:7 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ngaˬ kʼo‸-e ve lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ maˇ kʼo‸-e ve kʼo, Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ nawˬ hui geh maˇ laˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ kʼo‸-e ve kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:8 Yawˇ gaˬ la htaˇ, venˇbaˆ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˉ jehˬ suhˉ taˆ ve awˬ lawn htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:9 Yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, venˇbaˆ awˬ lawn hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:10 Ngaˬ lehˬ Awˬ pa geh kʼo‸-e leh, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:11 Miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ piˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw suhˉ jehˬ suhˉ taˆ ve awˬ lawn ka‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
John16:12 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui hkanˍ yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸ sheˍ." 
John16:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu gaˬ la htaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ hui kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ dawˇ tawˆ leh yaw ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:14 Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ yawˇ yuˬ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:15 Awˬ pa hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ ve htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ yawˇ yuˬ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ." 
John16:16 Teˇ hkui gaˬ kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ. Teˇ hkui kʼaw‸ gaˬ kʼo, gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:17 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Teˇ hkui gaˬ kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ. Teˇ hkui kʼaw‸ gaˬ kʼo, gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Ngaˬ Awˬ pa geh kʼo‸-e ve pa taw teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ gaˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John16:18 Peuˬ leh yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Teˇ hkui gaˬ kʼo teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ gaˇ ve le, Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
John16:19 Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ na nyi gaˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ ve pa taw yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Teˇ hkui gaˬ kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ. Teˇ hkui kʼaw‸ gaˬ kʼo, gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ na nyi da‸ chehˇ ve laˇ." 
John16:20 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ hui gʼa kuˬ hawˬ paˆ hawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui lehˬ, gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ tuˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui dawˇ haˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, ha lehˬ tuˬ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:21 Yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yaˇ paw ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ paw tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve pa taw, yawˇ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ paw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chi miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ paw la peuˬ ve pa taw yawˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ leh, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:22 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve ha lehˬ tuˬ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui geh hiˉ yuˬ maˇ gʼa." 
John16:23 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ na nyi. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Awˬ pa geh nawˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:24 Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ lawˬ jaw sheˍ. Nawˬ hui ha lehˬ tuˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ lawˬ loˬ. Lawˬ ve kʼo, gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:25 Ngaˬ tawˇ pa haˉ yehˇ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Tawˇ pa haˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ yehˇ leh, Awˬ pa awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John16:26 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ pon Awˬ pa geh ngaˬ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ kʼoˆ." 
John16:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ leh, Awˬ pa geh lo ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve pa taw, Awˬ pa yawˇ awˬ to nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
John16:28 Ngaˬ lehˬ Awˬ pa geh lo tawˆ la leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo gaˬ la peuˬ. Teˇ pawˆ miˬguiˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ tawˆ kʼai leh Awˬ pa geh kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:29 Yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chi beu‸ nawˬ tawˇ pa haˉ maˇ yehˇ leh hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:30 Nawˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shiˍ taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hta‸ na nyi laˇ tuˬ nawˬ maˇ loˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo laˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˇ ve yoˬ." 
John16:31 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ peuˬ laˇ." 
John16:32 Nawˬ hui hpaˆ da‸ leh, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼo‸-e leh ngaˬ hta‸ tiˉ baˬ taˉ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la chehˇ leh chi beu‸ ka‸ gaˬ la peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ pa ngaˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John16:33 Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ. Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nyi ma taˇ luˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John17:1 Tawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, A pa-oˬ, awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Yaˇ hpu lehˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ, nawˬ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ-oˆ." 
John17:2 Nawˬ lehˬ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ hkʼa chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ co ti‸ ha ti‸ piˇ tuˬ, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ nawˬ yawˇ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ-oˆ." 
John17:3 Co ti‸ ha ti‸ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ peu laˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui shiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John17:4 Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ te tcuh laˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ ngaˬ te peuˬ leh, chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ peuˬ." 
John17:5 A pa-oˬ, miˬguiˬ maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
John17:6 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hpeu‸ maw piˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ nawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ a‸ laˇ peuˬ. Peuˬ leh, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui na yuˬ leh te kʼai peuˬ." 
John17:7 Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ lo laˬ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. 
John17:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui na yuˬ leh, ngaˬ nawˬ geh lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na shiˍ leh, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John17:9 Yawˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John17:10 Ngaˬ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, nawˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-e htawˇ ngaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
John17:11 Chi beu‸ hta‸ tanˬ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ chehˇ. Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ geh lo kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve kehˬ ve A pa-oˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ." 
John17:12 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve pa taw, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ luˬ kʼai ve lehˬ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John17:13 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ geh lo kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve ha lehˬ tuˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ, ngaˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
John17:14 Nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˇ piˇ peuˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui htawˇ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ." 
John17:15 Chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ tuˬ ngaˬ lawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ ngaˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John17:16 Ngaˬ lehˬ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui htawˇ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸." 
John17:17 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. 
John17:18 Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John17:19 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa da‸ gʼa kehˬ la tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ ngaˬ da‸ lehˍ kehˬ lehˍ teh taˍ peuˬ." 
John17:20 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ceh tiˉ ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ la tuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon htawˇ ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. 
John17:21 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. A pa-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui yonˍ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
John17:22 Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ piˇ peuˬ." 
John17:23 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, nawˬ htawˇ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hkʼa deh‸ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ ha‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
John17:24 A pa-oˬ, miˬguiˬ chi maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh chehˇ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John17:25 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve A pa-oˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui nawˬ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John17:26 Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa cawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve awˬ meh ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, kʼaw‸ shiˍ piˇ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:1 Yeˍsuˆ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh tawˆ kʼai leh, Keˍdronˍ lawˬ kʼaˉ coˇ paˉ lo hkanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo cawˬ ve hko awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ leh yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ teˇ geh lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John18:2 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh teˇ geh oˇ kaˬ lo laiˉ pawˆ kʼai jaw ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John18:3 Hkʼe te leh Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ moˍ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh Hpiˍriˍsehˇ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, kawˆ faiˇ tuˉ aˬ miˍ tuˉ leh, la‸ caˉ ka‸ yuˬ veu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:4 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gaˬ la tuˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shiˍ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh kʼai leh, Nawˬ hui a shu hta‸ ca ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:5 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yuˇda‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui geh huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John18:6 Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ htunˍ kʼo‸-e leh miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ paiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John18:7 Nawˬ hui a shu hta‸ ca ve le teh‸ yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ na nyi htaˇ, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:8 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ hto laˇ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ca ve kʼo, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:9 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ luˬ kʼai teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:10 Oˇ htaˇ, Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ aˉ htaw pfuhˇ taˍ ve pa taw, aˉ htaw oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼawˬ tawˆ leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ chaw leh, la‸ sha paˉ ve naˍ paw cheˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Maˍlaˍhkuˆ meh ve yoˬ." 
John18:11 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve aˉ htaw hta‸ awˬ hpui awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ keu-o. Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve kawˆ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa dawˬ leh laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:12 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ moˍ leh ma‸ poˍ ka‸, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yuˬ hpeh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John18:13 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ Aˍnaˆ geh yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Aˍnaˆ lehˬ Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ ve awˬ puˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ lehˬ, oˇ ve teˇ hkʼaw‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw hkuˇ lonˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:14 Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Chaw ceuˬ awˬ pon chaw teˇ gʼaˇ suh ve kʼo, leuˉ leh da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ awˬ hkʼaˇ beˆ maˍ piˇ jaw ve teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ." 
John18:15 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hta‸ shiˍ da‸ ve pa taw, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve shaˉ nanˉ awˬ paˇ ko taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ geh lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John18:16 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hta‸ shiˍ da‸ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, yehˬ miˉ shaw shehˍ ma hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ shiˍ lo‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John18:17 Oˇ htaˇ, yehˬ miˉ shaw shehˍ ma lehˬ, Nawˬ htawˇ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Maˇ heˆ teh‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:18 Oˇ htaˇ kaˆ ve pa taw, awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shiˉ gʼeu‸ hta‸ aˬ miˍ ceh leh, huˉ lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Peˍtruˆ htawˇ yawˇ hui geh huˉ taˍ leh aˬ miˍ lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:19 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:20 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maˍ piˇ peuˬ. Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ, bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hkʼa htaˆ ka‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ shu hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ hkʼawˇ maˍ jaw." 
John18:21 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ na nyi laˇ ve le. Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe maˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na nyi-o. Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe maˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:22 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hta hpehˇ leh, Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hta‸ nawˬ chi hkʼe yaw hkʼaw‸ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:23 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ cawˇ kʼo, maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ beˆ maˍ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve cawˇ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ dawˆ laˇ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:24 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shu hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ Aˍnaˆ maˇ hpui leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ geh sheh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
John18:25 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ huˉ taˍ leh aˬ miˍ lehˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Nawˬ htawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ leh gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:26 Peˍtruˆ chaw leh naˍ paw cheˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ hko awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw oˇ ve geh teˇ geh chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ ve yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:27 Peˍtruˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui gʼaˆ hpfuh bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ. 
John18:28 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ geh lo te leh jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, maˇ gʼa cha‸ chiˆ leh, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ, jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ lo‸-e." 
John18:29 Hkʼe te leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ tawˆ la leh, Chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ nawˬ hui aˬ hto‸ ma venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ cawˬ le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:30 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, haiˬ ve hta‸ maˇ te ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:31 Hkʼe te leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh, nawˬ hui awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe suhˉ jehˬ-o‸ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:32 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te suh tuˬ ve awˬ lawn kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John18:33 Hkʼe te leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Nawˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:34 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hkʼaˇ nawˬ dawˇ tawˆ leh na nyi ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn shu nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:35 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve leh laˇ. Nawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ laˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ te ya‸ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:36 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te kuiˬ lehˬ, chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Ngaˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te kuiˬ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa gaˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ ve yaˇ gʼuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ bawˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te kuiˬ lehˬ, chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John18:37 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, nawˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ paw la leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo laˬ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John18:38 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui chehˇ taˍ kuiˬ lo yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ kuiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ca maˇ mawˬ." 
John18:39 Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ nawˬ hui heuˆ gaˇ ve laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John18:40 Yawˇ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ hta‸ maˇ heˆ. Baˍraˍbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Baˍraˍbaˆ lehˬ, chaw hpfuhˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John19:1 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh jaw‸ ve yoˬ." 
John19:2 Ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, aˉ chuˇ te hta‸ yuˬ leh shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼe te gʼa‸ sheˬ leh, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma yawˇ hta‸ deh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:3 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ geh laˬ leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ bon uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ hta hpehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:4 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ya‸ kuiˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ mawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh shiˍ tawˆ la ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:5 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ aˉ chuˇ uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ taˍ leh, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ deh taˍ leh tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Chaw chi hpaˇ hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:6 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ, hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ kuiˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ mawˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:7 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe te ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ suh keunˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ Gʼuiˬ sha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
John19:8 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, leuˉ leh kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:9 Yawˇ hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh, Nawˬ hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve chaw le teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ." 
John19:10 Hkʼe te leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ maˇ yaw laˇ leh laˇ. Nawˬ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ leh laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:11 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ naw ma lo nawˬ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ maˇ piˇ ve hkʼe kʼo, nawˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ te‸ chiˉ kanˇ paˆ maˇ cawˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, leuˉ leh venˇbaˆ uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:12 Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ ya‸ kʼaw ca ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ chaw chi hpaˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. A shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John19:13 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shiˍ tawˆ-e leh, suhˉ jehˬ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo ca mui ve yoˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ Gaˍbaˍtaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, haˉ pui hkʼawˇ taˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John19:14 Awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te tuˬ awˬ pon gu ve awˬ nyi hpeh‸ leh, awˬ yanˇ lehˬ mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ hkʼe teˇ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ nyi loˬ." 
John19:15 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ loˬ, tiˇ pehˍ loˬ. La‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ loˬ teh‸, gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ gʼa hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ ve laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Kehˉsaˍ maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:16 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ ve la‸ ka hta‸ taˆ leh, oˉ koˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ kʼo, Gawˇlaˍgawˇtaˆ meh ve yoˬ." 
John19:18 Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ geh teˇ geh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ, teˇ hpawˇ lo teˇ gʼaˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ awˬ kʼaw ji lo hta‸ keu piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:19 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, li‸ bvuh‸ leh, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo nehˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:20 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve teˇ kaˬ lehˬ, venˇ hta‸ neˇ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼaw ve yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve lehˬ, Heˍbrehˇ li‸, Roˉma‸ li‸ leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ li‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:21 Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ teh‸ taˇ bvuh‸. Ngaˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yoˬ teh‸ chi hpaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸-o‸." 
John19:22 Jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ lehˬ, Ngaˬ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ gu bvuh‸-o teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:23 Ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh awˇ pun pehˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ pun yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui yuˬ ve yoˬ. Aˉ po‸ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ hkʼawˇ ma maˇ cawˬ. Hpaw kʼawˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh hpaw mehˍ hkʼa gaˬ te chiˇ taˍ ve aˉ po‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John19:24 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Aˉ po‸ chi hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ tzuh‸ hkoˇ leh, a shu gʼa cawˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ kuˇ da‸ yuˬ-a veuˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, Ngaˬ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui pehˬ yuˬ leh, ngaˬ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui kuˇ da‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ, teh‸ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John19:25 Yeˍsuˆ ve la‸ ka paˇ lo yawˇ ve awˬ e, awˬ e ve awˬ nyi ma, Kaˍlawˉhpaˆ ve awˬ miˇ ma Maˍriˆ leh, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ hui huˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:26 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ e leh yawˇ ha‸ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ yawˇ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ e hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John19:27 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ, Nawˬ ve awˬ e hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ hta‸ tanˬ leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e hta‸ shiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:28 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ te peuˬ ve hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ shiˍ leh, Ngaˬ iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Li‸ hpu tawˇ hkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la ve yoˬ." 
John19:29 Oˇ kaˬ lo ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve mu‸ hkʼu teˇ shiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ mvuhˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, lo taˬ hta‸ choˆ leh yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ chiˇ daw‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John19:30 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, ci ve awˬ gʼuiˬ hta‸ chaw‸ dawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Kanˉ te peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, oˉ kʼoˍ kʼaw‸ lehˍ te sheˬ leh shaˉ cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
John19:31 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi lehˬ, pawehˇ awˬ pon gu ve awˬ nyi hpeh‸ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi kʼo, uiˍ jaˇ ve shinˉ nyi hpeh‸ ve pa taw, shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo suh taˍ ve awˬ to teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa teh taˉ tuˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui lehˬ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh kʼai leh, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve hkui sheh hta‸ dawˆ hteh leh, suh taˍ ve awˬ to oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John19:32 Hkʼe te leh, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu taˍ ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve hkui sheh hta‸ dawˆ hteh ve yoˬ." 
John19:33 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ suh peuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ ve hkui sheh hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ dawˆ hteh." 
John19:34 Ma‸ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ ve nyi kuˇ hpawˇ hta‸ gehˇ juˆ leh, awˬ suhˍ leh iˉ kaˆ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
John19:35 Nawˬ hui htawˇ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:36 Oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, Yawˇ ve awˬ mu‸ ku teˇ ma ka‸ maˇ gʼa dawˆ hteh teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
John19:37 Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ kaˬ kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Yawˇ hui juˆ pawnˍ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui nyi tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:38 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Aˍriˆma‸htehˍ venˇ yaˇ Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ gʼa yuˬ kʼai tuˬ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh ca lawˬ leh, jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ yawˇ hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh yawˇ laˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ.
