Yoˇseh‸ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu hta‸ maˇ shiˍ tcuh." 
John19:39 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh lo tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ laˬ ve Niˆkawˇdeˍ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, muˇraˍ leh aˬ cawˍ hkaw‸ da‸ taˍ ve, aˬ laˬ hkʼe shehˆ chi cawehˬ yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John19:40 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ yuˬ leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui chaw tuˍ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, sha hawnˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ keu leh, hpa hpu yuˬ htiˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John19:41 Yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ hta‸ pehˍ kuiˬ lo, hko teˇ hko cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hko oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ tuˍ jaw sheˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh awˬ suhˉ teˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John19:42 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve pawehˇ awˬ pon gu ve awˬ nyi hpeh‸ leh, tuˍ hpfuh oˇ ve htawˇ awˬ paˇ lo cawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo ca tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
John20:1 Suhˍ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi, mvuhˇ maˇ htiˇ sheˍ htaˇ, Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ lehˬ teˇ na‸ tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai leh, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼoˇ meuˇ lo tsuhˇ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John20:2 Hkʼe te leh Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ leh Yeˍsuˆ ha‸ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh lo yawˇ gʼuiˇ laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shu yuˬ kʼai leh, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ lo ca teh taˍ leh naˍ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:3 Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ kʼai leh tuˍ hpfuh lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
John20:4 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ teˇ geh gʼuiˇ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Peˍtruˆ a‸ kehˉ gʼuiˇ gehˬ leh, tuˍ hpfuh lo yawˇ awˉ lawˉ gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
John20:5 Tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼehˉ nyi htaˇ, hpa hpu oˇ kaˬ lo teh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ, Ya‸ hkʼaˇ tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ lo‸-e." 
John20:6 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼuiˇ laˬ chehˇ ve Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ gaˬ la leh, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, hpa hpu teh taˍ laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
John20:7 Oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ beh ve hpaˉ ce‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Hpaˉ ce‸ oˇ ve hpa hpu geh teˇ geh maˇ teh taˍ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ kaˬ lo lo‸ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John20:8 Oˇ htaˇ, tuˍ hpfuh lo awˉ lawˉ gaˬ ve, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ lo‸-e leh gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
John20:9 Yeˍsuˆ suh kuiˬ lo gʼa kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ. 
John20:10 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John20:11 Maˍriˆ lehˬ, tuˍ hpfuh awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh hawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hawˬ chehˇ htaˇ, tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ kʼehˉ nyi leh," 
John20:12 hpuˉ-ehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to teh taˍ kuiˬ oˉ kʼoˍ hpawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, hkui sheh hpawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John20:13 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te hawˬ chehˇ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve Awˬ jawˇmawˇ hta‸ shu yuˬ kʼai leh, hkʼaˬ lo ca teh taˍ leh naˍ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw hawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:14 Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ hpfuhˆ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ." 
John20:15 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te hawˬ chehˇ ve le. Nawˬ a shu hta‸ ca ve le teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Maˍriˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hko ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve hehˉ teh‸ dawˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Saˍ la‸-oˬ, nawˬ yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ lo teh taˍ ve ngaˬ hta‸ a ciˉ hto laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ ca yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:16 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Maˍriˆ-oˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Maˍriˆ hpfuhˆ nyi leh, Raˍbuˇniˆ-oˬ teh‸, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ yaw leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Raˍbuˇniˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ saˍ la‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
John20:17 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ taˇ vawˆ taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ pa geh ngaˬ maˇ gʼa taˆ-e sheˍ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui geh kʼai leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ ve Awˬ pa leh nawˬ hui ve Awˬ pa, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha leh nawˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha geh lo ngaˬ taˆ-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Maˍriˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:18 Maˍriˆ Maˍgaˍdaˍlaˆ kʼai leh, Ngaˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:19 Suhˍ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ nyi mvuhˇ hpeu‸ htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji huˉ taˍ leh, Nawˬ hui geh dawˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:20 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve la‸ sheh leh yawˇ ve nyi kuˇ hpawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:21 Yeˍsuˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui geh dawˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ peu kʼai ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:22 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ meuˆ peu leh kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸." 
John20:23 A shu teˇ gʼaˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hpehˇ hkʼa ve kʼo venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. A shu teˇ gʼaˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui maˇ hpehˇ piˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ venˇbaˆ cawˬ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:24 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui geh laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yaˇ cehˬ kʼa teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Htoˉma‸ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:25 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Htoˉma‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo sho cuˇ hta‸ keu ve awˬ haiˇ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa mawˬ leh, awˬ haiˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ ve la‸ naw maˇ gʼa htawˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, yawˇ ve nyi kuˇ hpawˇ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh maˇ gʼa juˆ keu nyi ve kʼo, ngaˬ maˇ yonˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:26 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hiˉ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ chehˇ taˍ leh, Htoˉma‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hoˆ taˍ ve htawˇ, Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji huˉ taˍ leh, Nawˬ hui geh dawˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:27 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ Htoˉma‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve la‸ naw choˬ kaˬ lo htawˇ nyi leh, ngaˬ ve la‸ taw kʼaw hta‸ nyi-o. Nawˬ ve la‸ sheh che leh, ngaˬ ve nyi kuˇ hpawˇ hta‸ juˇ keu nyi-o. Maˇ yonˍ ve taˇ cawˬ piˇ. Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:28 Htoˉma‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Jawˇ mawˇ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:29 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ mawˬ ve pa taw yonˍ ve law leˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ htawˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John20:30 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ te maˍ piˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ bvuh‸ keu taˍ ve maˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. 
John20:31 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ tuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw yawˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ chi ma bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ" 
John21:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Tiˍbeˍriˆ gʼuiˬ po awˬ paˇ lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ to maw piˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ." 
John21:2 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ, Yaˇ cehˬ kʼa teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Htoˉma‸, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ Kaˍnaˆ hkʼaˆ yaˇ Naˍtaˍneˍlaˆ, Zeˍbeˍdehˇ ve yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
John21:3 Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Ngaˬ ngaˇ ca-e shaˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui ka‸ kʼai-a teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼai leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ haˉ yawˇ hui ngaˇ ca ve, teˇ hkeh ka‸ maˇ gʼa." 
John21:4 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ shiˍ." 
John21:5 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˇ gʼa-aw laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Maˇ gʼa teh‸ yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:6 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ la‸ sha paˉ lo geu‸ hpehˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui geu‸ hpehˇ leh, ngaˇ maˇ maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, geu‸ hta‸ gʼawˬ maˇ gʼaˇ." 
John21:7 Oˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ha‸ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ veu‸ taˍ ve pa taw, aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ deh sheˬ leh, gʼuiˬ po hkʼaw lo pawˆ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
John21:8 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ hta‸ maˇ vuiˇ, ngaˇ chi loˬ hkʼe ceh tiˉ vuiˇ ve pa taw, ngaˇ hkʼa biˇ geh taˍ ve geu‸ hta‸ gʼawˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
John21:9 Yawˇ hui pehˬ shaˉ lo gaˬ htaˇ, shiˉ gʼeu‸ aˬ miˍ ceh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, ngaˇ piˬ taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkaoˍmonˇ teh taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
John21:10 Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve ngaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:11 Hkʼe te leh, Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, ngaˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve geu‸ oˇ ve hta‸ pehˬ shaˉ lo gʼawˬ veu laˇ ve yoˬ. Geu‸ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ ve ngaˇ 153 hkeh cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˇ chi taw taw gʼa maˇ ve htawˇ, geu‸ maˇ tzuh‸." 
John21:12 Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Awˍ caˇ la-o teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, Nawˬ a shu le teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi maˇ haˆ." 
John21:13 Yeˍsuˆ laˬ leh hkaoˍ monˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˇ shaˍ hta‸ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe te pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
John21:14 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ to awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ maw piˇ ve lehˬ, chi teˇ pawˆ shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
John21:15 Yawˇ hui awˍ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yoˇhanˬ ve yaˇ Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ ha‸ ve a‸ kehˉ nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Ha‸ ve yoˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve yawˬ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:16 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yoˇhanˬ ve yaˇ Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸-aw laˇ teh‸ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Ha‸ ve yoˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:17 Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yoˇhanˬ ve yaˇ Siˉmonˍ-oˬ, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸-aw laˇ teh‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve pa taw Peˍtruˆ dawˇ haˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ-oˆ." 
John21:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, nawˬ yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hkʼaˇ nawˬ haˍ pi tsuh‸ leh, nawˬ kʼai gaˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ mawˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ ve la‸ sheh nyiˇ paˉ che leh, shu nawˬ hta‸ haˍ pi tsuh‸ laˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ maˇ kʼai gaˇ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ lo shu nawˬ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:19 (Yeˍsuˆ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la tuˬ ve awˬ pon Peˍtruˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te suh tuˬ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ.) Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:20 Peˍtruˆ hpfuhˆ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ha‸ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ ve teˇ pawˆ yawˇ hui mvuhˇ hpeu‸ awˍ caˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve nyi ma pui awˬ paˇ lo ngeh mui taˍ leh, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ ve a shu le teh‸ na nyi shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ." 
John21:21 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, chi hpaˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
John21:22 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le. Nawˬ awˬ to ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
John21:23 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ gʼa suh teh‸, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ gʼa suh teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh piˇ gaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ le teh‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
John21:24 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh bvuh‸ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
John21:25 Yeˍsuˆ te ve kanˉ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hkʼa te ve awˬ lawn teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ daw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ miˬguiˬ chi ka‸ maˇ daw teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:1 Htawˇhpiˇluˆ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ tanˬ te tanˬ maˍ ve hta‸ te leh, yawˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo taˆ kʼo‸-e ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ, li‸ awˉ lawˉ teˇ kʼoˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ." 
Acts1:2 Yawˇ maˇ taˆ kʼo‸-e sheˍ htaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh, yawˇ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:3 Yawˇ hkanˍ suh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˇ chi nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to maw piˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to te‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ laiˉ ceuˬ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:4 Teˇ pawˆ yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ tawˆ kʼai sheˍ. Ngaˬ geh nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve, Awˬ pa ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ law taˍ sheˍ." 
Acts1:5 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ maˇ maw maw kʼo, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ gʼa hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:6 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, chi beu‸ nawˬ lehˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ laˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:7 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ pa yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve awˬ yanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ maˇ loˍ." 
Acts1:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la htaˇ, nawˬ hui kanˇ paˆ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ tanˬ leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ, Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh mvuhˇ leh miˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:9 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh yaˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi chehˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ-e leh, yawˇ hui mawˬ leh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, moˬ yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:10 Yeˍsuˆ taˆ-e chehˇ ve hta‸ tcuh yaˇ hui chiˇ nyi chehˇ htaˇ, hpu ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh ve chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ la leh, yawˇ hui awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:11 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ ve, Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi chehˇ ve le. Nawˬ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ taˆ-e ve Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ mvuhˇ naw ma lo taˆ kʼo‸-e ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:12 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ Shaˍlonˍ meh ve hkʼaw lo tu leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ maˇ vuiˇ da‸, shinˉ nyi teˇ nyi toˇ hpeh‸ ve ya‸ kʼaw hkʼe fui tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:13 Yawˇ hui venˇ hkʼaw kʼaw‸ gaˬ la htaˇ, yehˬ awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ jaw ve bawehˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ, Yoˇhanˬ, Yaˍkoˆ, Anˍdrehˍ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ, Htoˉma‸, Baˍhtawˇlaˍmehˇ, Ma‸htehˍ, Aˍlaˍhpehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ, Siˉmonˍ Seˍluˆ leh, Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yuˇda‸, chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Acts1:14 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ leh yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ leh Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:15 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ ha nyiˇ chi gʼa hkʼe hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo tu huˉ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts1:16 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ gʼa biˇ la tehˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw maˍ piˇ paˍ Yuˇda‸ awˬ lawn awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu Daˍviˆ ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ yoˬ." 
Acts1:17 Yuˇda‸ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:18 (Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te leh, gʼa ve awˬ hpfuhˇ miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ vuiˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˉ kʼoˍ hpawˇ ce leh, gʼoˇ peˬ hkoˇ ve pa taw, awˬ gʼuˬ tehˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:19 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh miˬ guiˬ oˇ ve teˇ peˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ Aˍkeˍdaˍmaˆ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ miˬguiˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Acts1:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Chiˇ mvuh ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve Yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ gawˬ cu gawˬ pehˆ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ taˇ chehˇ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Yawˇ ve aˉ yaˇ shu hta‸ kʼaw‸ piˇ-oˆ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:21 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui geh shaˉ hkiˆ ga hkanˍ tuˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ loˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:22 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Yoˇhanˬ geh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, ngaˬ hui geh yiˬ yiˬ laˬ laˬ te toˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo leh, ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh kʼaw‸ taˆ kʼo‸-e ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:23 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ Yuˇtuˆ meh ve, Baˍsaˍbaˆ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ Yoˇseh‸ yoˬ. Nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Maˍhtiˆ yoˬ." 
Acts1:24 Yawˇ hui bon lawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ shiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ," 
Acts1:25 Yuˇda‸ lehˬ tcuh yaˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼo‸-e peuˬ. Yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te leh tcuh yaˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ, chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ leuˆ yuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ a ciˉ beˆ maˍ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts1:26 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ meh bvuh‸ keu leh hkaˆ yuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˍhtiˆ hta‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ geh yawˇ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:1 Peˍteˍkoˆteˍ pawehˇ awˬ nyi gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ kaˬ lo tiˉ hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:2 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ ya‸ la leh, yawˇ hui mui taˍ ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:3 Aˬ miˬ ha hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ha tehˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ha tehˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ pehˬ taˍ leh teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ jehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:4 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu biˇ la leh, Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ tcuh yaw tcuh ve hkʼe, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ hkawˇ yaw ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:5 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ le le lo laˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:6 Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hpawnˬ la leh, a shu yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ shu yaw laˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ka keh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:7 Yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ leh dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve chaw chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Acts2:8 Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ paw la kuiˬ mvuhˇmiˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve, hkʼaˬ hkʼe le." 
Acts2:9 Ngaˬ hui Paˍtiˆ chaw, Meˍdiˆ chaw, Eˇlanˍ chaw, Meˍsoˇpoˇtaˍmiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw, Yuˇda‸ leh Kaˍpaˍdawˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw, Poˍtuˆ leh Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw," 
Acts2:10 Hpuˍgiˆ leh Paˍpuˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw, Eˇjiˇtu‸ leh Kuˇreˍneˍ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve Liˍbuˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw, Roˉma‸ venˇ lo laˬ ve hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ, Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Yuˇda‸ awˬ liˇ hta‸ yuˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Acts2:11 Kaˍreˍte chaw leh Aˍraˆ chaw, Gʼuiˬsha ve uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn shu yaw laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:12 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ jaˇ leh dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Aˬ hto‸ ma hpeh‸ ve leh naˍ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ na nyi da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼaiˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ suhˉ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ lehˬ tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi teˇ gʼaˇ hui geh huˉ taˍ leh, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh chaw chi ma ve hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ chaw leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na leh awˬ lawn chi hta‸ shiˍ-o‸." 
Acts2:15 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi beu‸ lehˬ mvuhˇ shawˉ kʼawˇ naˍ riˍ ceh tiˉ gaˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:16 Awˬ lawn chi ve lehˬ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Yawˇlaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:17 Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve yaˇ paˍ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ bon maˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:18 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ paˍ awˬ ceˬ ma teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ bon maˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:19 Awˬ na hpawˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo, awˬ suhˍ, aˬ miˍ leh mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ, awˬ heˆ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:20 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ nyi maˇ gaˬ sheˍ htaˇ, mvuhˇ nyi naˆ ho‸ hpeh‸ la leh, ha pa htawˇ awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:21 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ peun leh kuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Yawˇlaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:22 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui-oˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ na-o. Nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh kanˉ uiˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:23 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ taˍ leh dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve hkʼe Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chaw haiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ peuˬ." 
Acts2:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha hpui baˬ piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hpeh taˍ maˇ gʼa." 
Acts2:25 Yawˇ awˬ lawn Daˍviˆ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:26 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve nyi ma ha lehˬ leh, ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw ha lehˬ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ ve awˬ to dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve co ha hta‸ suh mvuhˇ suh miˬ lo baˬ taˉ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ve da‸ kehˬ ve Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuiˇ kʼai luˬ kʼai tuˬ nawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ piˇ." 
Acts2:28 Co ha te‸ ve ya‸ kʼaw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ nawˬ te laˇ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:29 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ Daˍviˆ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ suh leh, shu yawˇ hta‸ tuˍ piˇ peuˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ ve tuˍ hpfuh ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:30 Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui tcuh tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ ka ti‸ te leh hkanˍ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:31 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ dawˇ shiˍ dawˇ mawˬ leh, Hkri‸ hta‸ suh mvuhˇ suh miˬ lo maˇ baˬ taˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ ve awˬ to htawˇ kuiˇ ve luˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ teh‸ Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:32 Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ awˬ lawn chi hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. 
Acts2:33 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼui sha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ uiˍ yuˬ mvuh piˇ leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Awˬ pa kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe Awˬ pa geh yawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ ve hkʼe, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ yawˇ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:34 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Daˍviˆ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ awˬ to kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts2:35 Nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ taˍ htaˇ hkʼa ga, ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ-oˆ, teh‸ Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:36 Hkʼe te leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ teˇ yehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ chi hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ ka‸ Hkri‸ ka‸ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:37 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ heuˆ jaˇ leh, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸, Peˍtruˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:38 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ-o‸. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts2:39 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ka‸, nawˬ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ awˬ pon ka‸, vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ka‸, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hkʼa kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:40 Yawˇ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tawˇ maˇ maˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nyi ma kʼaw‸ ve chaw chi teˇ co awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa ponˬ tuˬ te-o teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:41 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw aˬ laˬ hkʼe shehˆ hinˉ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:42 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tcuh yaˇ hui maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve, awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve, Jawˇmawˇ ve pawehˇ hta‸ caˇ ve leh bon lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:43 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ, anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ maˇ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:44 Hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ moˍ tiˉ te leh, mawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ teˇ geh yehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:45 Yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hawˇ leh, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, loˍ ve hkʼe chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:46 Teˇ nyi le le yawˇ hui teˇ geh bon yehˬ lonˉ lo taˆ-e ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼeh‸ leh, ha lehˬ ha kʼa nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui teˇ geh caˇ tuˬ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts2:47 Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ nyi le le Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ la piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:1 Teˇ nyi htaˇ Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ bon lawˬ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, bon yehˬ lonˉ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:2 Paw la htaˇ ka‸ hkui sheh luˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh lawˬ caˇ tuˬ, teˇ nyi le le shu yawˇ hta‸ taˆ laˬ leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Nyi sha ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:3 Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh lawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts3:4 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ nyi-o teh‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:5 Yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ gʼa tuˬ teh‸ dawˇ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:6 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ geh hpu shi maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo juˇ kʼai loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:7 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh hta‸ Peˍtruˆ gʼawˬ tu piˇ leh, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ ve hkui taw peh leh hkui kʼawˍ lehˍ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:8 Yawˇ pawˆ tu leh juˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh juˇ kʼai, pawˆ kʼai leh Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:9 Yawˇ juˇ kʼai chehˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Acts3:10 yawˇ lehˬ bon yehˬ lonˉ ve Nyi sha ve yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo mui taˍ leh lawˬ caˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hui anˇ jaˇ leh dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:11 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ htaˇ, chaw chi ma ve anˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh Sawˉla‸monˍ ve koˇ caˉteh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ kaˬ lo gʼuiˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:12 Peˍtruˆ chi hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw awˬ lawn chi hta‸ naw hui anˇ ve le. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ leh a shu yawˇ ve da‸ hkuiˇ ja hkuiˇ hta‸ pa taw chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ya‸ kʼaw juˇ piˇ lawˬ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ leh, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tiˉ nyi tiˍ taˍ ve le." 
Acts3:13 Aˍbraˍhanˍ, Iˉcaˆ leh Yaˍkoˆ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ leh jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ yawˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ dawˇ cheˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:14 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui chiˇ baˬ leh, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui lawˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:15 Co ha te‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui tiˇ pehˍ ve htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:16 Nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, awˬ meh oˇ ve lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw gʼa leh, yonˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ sha la piˇ peuˬ." 
Acts3:17 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ shiˍ leh te ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ maˇ shiˍ leh chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:18 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Hkri‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ cuˇ leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ te biˇ la peuˬ." 
Acts3:19 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ shiˆ baˬ laˇ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh nyi ma kʼaw‸ pa-o. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve dawˇ sha ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la leh," 
Acts3:20 nawˬ hui awˬ pon leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Hkri‸ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Acts3:21 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ gu te htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, Yeˍsuˆ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts3:22 Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ pon tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts3:23 A shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ baˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:24 Saˍmo-eˍlaˆ hta‸ tanˬ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hkʼa tawˆ la ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:25 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬ sha piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬ sha kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts3:26 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ na‸ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ leh, nawˬ hui geh awˉ lawˉ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:1 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ shaw ve ma‸ poˍ leh Saˍduˆkehˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui geh gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:2 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh, suh ve chaw hui hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve awˬ lawn bon maˍ ve pa taw, gaˬ la ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ bawˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:3 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ la ve pa taw, shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:4 Bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve chaw hawˉ hkʼaˆ tiˉ ngaˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ hkʼe cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts4:5 Shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼe gaˬ leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:6 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ Aˍnaˆ leh, Kaˍyaˍhpaˆ, Yoˇhanˬ, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:7 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo teh taˍ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ a shu ve kanˇ paˆ, a shu ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo chi hkʼe te ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:8 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui ve jawˇ mawˇ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ," 
Acts4:9 hkui luˬ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ bon te piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gu na-e piˇ ve awˬ lawn ya‸ nyi ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ na nyi laˇ ve kʼo," 
Acts4:10 nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ leh Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ chi hta‸ shiˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ leh suh kuiˬ lo Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ na-e la leh, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:11 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui yehˬ kawˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ baˬ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ htawˇ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
Acts4:12 Yawˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ meh maˇ heˆ kʼo, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ meh maˇ cawˬ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:13 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ li‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw, te‸ chiˉ maˇ gʼa henˇ jaw ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve pa taw, anˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Yeˍsuˆ geh chehˇ jaw ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:14 Na-e la peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui te‸ chiˉ ka‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Acts4:15 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ awˬ baˬ lo tawˆ kʼai tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ jehˬ da‸ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts4:16 Chaw chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, awˬ heˆ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na te tawˆ la ve hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui te‸ chiˉ ca kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:17 ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi ma ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ lawn chi leuˉ leh maˇ gʼa bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ, awˬ meh chi hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa maˍ tuˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tawˇ hkʼa deh‸ nyiˉ piˇ shaˍ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:18 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ hto piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ te teh‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve a‸ kehˉ nawˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui dawˇ nyi-o." 
Acts4:20 Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ hto maˇ maˍ ve kʼo, chehˇ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:21 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tawˇ hkʼa deh‸ kʼaw‸ nyiˉ piˇ leh hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw chi ma ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui ca maˇ gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn chi hta‸ pa taw chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:22 Na-e la peuˬ ve, awˬ heˆ chi hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hpaˆ gaˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:23 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ peuˬ htaˇ, awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼo‸-e leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hui hkʼa kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:24 Yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh te leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma, miˬ naˆ ma, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ leh oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:25 Nawˬ lehˬ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Daˍviˆ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve le. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ca dawˇ nyi ve le." 
Acts4:26 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha leh yawˇ ve Hkri‸ hta‸ tawˍ da‸ tuˬ, chi miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ tu la leh, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ teˇ geh hpawnˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:27 Nawˬ naˍ manˇ shehˍ taˍ ve, nawˬ ve da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ ceˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ tawˍ da‸ tuˬ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ leh jawˇmawˇ Poˍtiˆ Piˉla‸, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui ka‸, venˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ tehˬ awˬ na teˇ geh hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:28 Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ ve kanˇ paˆ leh nawˬ ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:29 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, chi beu‸ yawˇ hui tawˇ nyiˉ laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ nyi leh, nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ga laˇ sheˍ." 
Acts4:30 Naˬ ve gawˬ ve hta‸ gu na-e piˇ tuˬ, nawˬ ve la‸ sheh che leh, nawˬ ve da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ ceˬ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:31 Yawˇ hui bon lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hiˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu biˇ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:32 Yonˍ ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ, dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ cawˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve teh‸ maˇ kʼoˆ leh, hkʼa cawˬ ve mawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ teˇ geh yehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:33 Tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:34 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo loˍ ve cuˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ leh yehˬ hkʼa cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, yawˇ hui ve miˬguiˬ leh yehˬ hta‸ hawˇ leh, gʼa ve hpu hta‸ yuˬ laˬ leh, tcuh yaˇ hui ve hkui paˇ lo taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:35 Yawˇ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ loˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:36 Oˇ htaˇ, Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ lo paw la ve Leˍviˆ chaw, Yoˇseh‸ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Tcuh yaˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ Baˍnaˍbaˆ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Baˍnaˍbaˆ kʼoˆ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts4:37 Yawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ hta‸ hawˇ leh, gʼa ve hpu hta‸ tcuh yaˇ hui ve hkui paˇ lo laˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:1 Aˍnaˍniˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ leh yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma Saˍhpiˉra‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ka‸ miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ hawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:2 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ nyi ma hawˍ da‸ leh, awˬ hpfuhˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pun yuˬ teh taˉ leh teˇ pun ceh tiˉ tcuh yaˇ hui ve hkui paˇ lo laˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:3 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Aˍnaˍniˆ-oˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ heˍ piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ awˬ hpfuhˇ teˇ pun yuˬ teh taˉ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ chi hkʼe te gaˇ ve nyi ma hkʼa biˇ cawˬ la tuˬ aˬ hto‸ ma te Saˍtanˍ nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ tawˆ piˇ lawˬ ve le." 
Acts5:4 Miˬguiˬ oˇ ve maˇ hawˇ sheˍ htaˇ, nawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Hawˇ leh gʼa ve awˬ hpfuhˇ htawˇ, nawˬ ve mawˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chi hkʼe te tuˬ nawˬ ve nyi ma hkʼaw ca dawˇ ve le. Nawˬ chaw yaˇ hta‸ heˍ ve maˇ heˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ heˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:5 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Aˍnaˍniˆ paiˍ leh suh-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:6 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw haˉ paˍ hui tu la leh, yawˇ hta‸ htiˆ leh ca taˆ tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:7 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ shehˆ naˍ riˍ hkʼe gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma lo‸ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ." 
Acts5:8 Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ miˬguiˬ hawˇ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ chi ma tiˉ gʼa ve yoˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yoˬ, chi ma tiˉ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:9 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve le. Nyi loˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ ca tuˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, yehˬmiˉhpe‸ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la peuˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui taˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:10 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve Peˍtruˆ ve hkui paˇ lo paiˍ leh suh-e ve yoˬ. Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lo‸ la leh, yaˇ miˇ suh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui taˆ veu leh, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ paˇ lo ca tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:11 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ leh awˬ lawn chi ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts5:12 Tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ maˇ maˇ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh Sawˉla‸monˍ ve koˇ caˉ lo hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Acts5:13 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ ca pawnˇ da‸ maˇ haˆ htawˇ, chaw chi ma ve yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˆ yan leh taˍ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:14 Yonˍ ve chaw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ yaˇ miˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pawnˇ da‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:15 Peˍtruˆ ya‸ kʼaw kʼai htaˇ, yawˇ ve aˉ gʼuiˬ ha chaw naˬ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ baˬ piˇ tuˬ, chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shu taˆ leh, ya‸ kʼaw paˇ lo zuh‸ hpui leh ku-iˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:16 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo cawˬ ve venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ hpawnˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ leh yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts5:17 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh yawˇ ve chaw Saˍduˆkehˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkawehˉ ve nyi ma hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ geh tu la leh," 
Acts5:18 tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Acts5:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, htawnˍ yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpaw sheˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ shiˍ tawˆ-e leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts5:20 Nawˬ hui kʼai loˬ. Bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw huˉ leh, co ha te‸ ve chi hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:21 Tawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ shawˉ teˇ na‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw yawˇ hui lo‸-e leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ ca shiˍ laˬ tuˬ, bon yehˬ ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui htawnˍ hkʼaw lo gaˬ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼo‸-e leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts5:23 Htawnˍ yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa deh‸ hoˆ taˍ leh, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yehˬ miˉ awˬ baˬ lo shaw chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui yehˬ miˉ hta‸ hpaw htaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ teh‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:24 Bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ poˍ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ leh naˍ, yawˇ hui dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:25 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lo‸ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Htawnˍ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui haw taˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw lo huˉ taˍ leh chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:26 Oˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ ve ma‸ poˍ leh yawˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ teˇ geh kʼai leh, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ ca shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi ma ve yawˇ hui hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ la puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui kawˆ ve pa taw, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh maˇ te." 
Acts5:27 Yawˇ hui hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ leh, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve," 
Acts5:28 Awˬ meh chi hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa maˍ maˇ gʼa hto tuˬ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh tawˇ piˇ taˍ peuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ, Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui maˍ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkʼa biˇ biˇ la piˇ peuˬ. Chaw oˇ ve hpaˇ ve awˬ suhˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la piˇ tuˬ nawˬ hui dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:29 Peˍtruˆ leh tcuh yaˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw yaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ a‸ kehˉ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:30 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui suhˆ hkuiˉ daw hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ peuˬ." 
Acts5:31 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ Uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ leh Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ leh, yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ-e peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:32 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu htawˇ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:33 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:34 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˆ yan ve Gaˍmaˍleˍlaˆ meh ve Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ tu leh, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ teˇ hkui shiˍ tawˆ-e tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:35 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui-oˬ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ ve shaˍ ti‸ hkʼa deh‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Acts5:36 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Htuˇda‸ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ tu la leh, yawˇ chaw uiˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw aˬ laˬ hkʼe awˇ ha gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hpaˆ da‸ guiˇ da‸ leh luˬ kʼai mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:37 Yawˇ luˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hui awˬ meh keu ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ meh ve Gaˍliˍlehˇ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ tawˆ la leh, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ htawˇ, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hpaˆ da‸ guiˇ da‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:38 Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ taˇ te. Yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui chehˇ piˇ. Yawˇ hui dawˇ ve leh yawˇ hui te ve chi teˇ hpaˍ, chaw yaˇ lo hpeh‸ la ve kʼo, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts5:39 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lo hpeh‸ la ve kʼo, nawˬ hui te luˬ gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ heh‸ hkehnˉ ve chaw htawˇ hpeh‸ la puiˉ-aˆ mehˍ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:40 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui na yuˬ leh, tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ jaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ maˇ gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ kʼaw‸ piˇ peuˬ leh hpehˇ peu ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:41 Tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ meh oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te laˇ ve hta‸ hkanˍ keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha shawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts5:42 Yawˇ hui teˇ nyi le le bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yehˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˍ piˇ leh bon maˍ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:1 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ la chehˇ htaˇ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ hkawˇ yaw ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Heˍbrehˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca beu ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ nyi le le caˇ tuˬ pehˬ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ gʼa ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Acts6:2 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ teh taˉ leh caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ pehˬ caˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve lehˬ maˇ cawˇ." 
Acts6:3 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh da‸ ve, Awˬ ha hpu ka‸ cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ ka‸ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve chaw suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui leuˆ yuˬ sheˍ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ kanˉ chi teˇ maˬ ngaˬ hui te tcuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts6:4 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, bon lawˬ leh bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:5 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma cawˇ leh chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve leh da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Saˍteˍhpanˍ teˇ gʼaˇ leh, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ, Pawˇhkawˍ, Niˆkaˍnawˍ, Tiˉmonˍ, Paˍmeˍnaˆ leh Yuˇda‸ awˬ liˇ yuˬ ve Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ yaˇ Niˇkawˇlaˆhui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:6 Tcuh yaˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ teh taˍ leh, tcuh yaˇ hui bon lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:7 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ bvuhˬ kʼai leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ maˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ laiˉ gʼa htawˇ na yuˬ leh yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:8 Saˍteˍhpanˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon leh kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh, chaw yaˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ uiˍ jaˇ ve anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:9 Oˇ htaˇ, ponˬ ve chaw hui teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yuˇda‸ bon yehˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hui leh, Kuˇreˍneˍ chaw, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ chaw, Kiˇliˇkiˆ chaw leh, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ chaw hui tu la leh Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ yaw ve cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ leh Awˬ ha hpu ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui tawˍ da‸ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Acts6:11 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼawˇ jehˬ leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ tcuh ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Moˉseˍ hta‸ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:12 Yawˇ hui lehˬ mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca juˆ piˇ leh, Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ ca hpeh yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:13 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, heˍ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ leh awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:14 Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ chi ve hta‸ te luˬ leh, Moˉseˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ piˇ taˉ laˇ ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts6:15 Oˇ htaˇ, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi htaˇ, yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:1 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hkʼe yoˬ laˇ teh‸, Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:2 Saˍteˍhpanˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi leh awˬ pa hui-oˬ, a ciˉ na sheˍ. Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, Haˍranˍ venˇ lo maˇ ca chehˇ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ, Meˍsoˇpoˇtaˍmiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ geh tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts7:3 Nawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh nawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:4 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Hkaˍlaˍdehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, Haˍranˍ venˇ lo ca chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ pa suh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo kʼaw‸ tawˆ la tcuh leh, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo jiˆ laˬ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:5 Mvuhˇmiˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ awˬ shinˉ hkui taw kʼaw hui ka‸ maˇ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ yaˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, mvuhˇmiˬ chi yawˇ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui hta‸ ka‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:6 Gʼuiˬsha chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui lehˬ, shu ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkehˉ chaw gʼa te leh, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo yawˇ hui awˇ ha hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ ceˬ gʼa te leh fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts7:7 Yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ ceˬ te tcuh ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ leh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui tawˆ la leh choˬ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:8 Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ htawˇ Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Iˉcaˆ paw la leh, hiˉ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Iˉcaˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ paw la leh, Yaˍkoˆ htawˇ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ paw la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:9 Awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ hkawehˉ ve pa taw, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇ miˬ lo yawˇ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ geh chehˇ leh," 
Acts7:10 yawˇ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Eˇjiˇtu‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Hpaˍrawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Yoˇseh‸ kʼai htaˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha yawˇ hta‸ awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ piˇ ve pa taw, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh yawˇ ve hawˉ yehˬ ka‸ Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:11 Oˇ htaˇ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Hkaˍnanˍ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo meu‸ ve kaˆ ve gaˬ la leh, tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nyiˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ ca maˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo caˬ shiˍ cawˬ ve teh‸ Yaˍkoˆ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, nyiˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ teˇ pawˆ yawˇ peu kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:13 Yawˇ hui nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai htaˇ, Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to shiˍ piˇ leh, Hpaˍrawˇ htawˇ Yoˇseh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:14 Oˇ htaˇ Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ, awˬ pa Yaˍkoˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ca shiˍ laˬ tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ suhˍ chi ngaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:15 Yaˍkoˆ htawˇ Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai leh, yawˇ awˬ to ka‸, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui kaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo suh peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:16 Yawˇ hui hta‸ Sheˍhkenˍ venˇ lo taˆ kʼo‸-e leh, Sheˍhkenˍ venˇ yaˇ Haˍmawˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui geh Aˍbraˍhanˍ hpu piˇ leh vuiˬ taˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh lo ca tuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:17 Gʼuiˬsha Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ yanˇ biˇ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyiˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ uiˍ la maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:18 Yoˇseh‸ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:19 Jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nyiˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ cuˇ yiˍ te leh, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa te‸ tuˬ, nyiˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ leh yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:20 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nyi sha jaˇ ve Moˉseˍ teˇ gʼa paw la ve yoˬ. Ha pa sheh lehˇ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ pa ve aˉ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ hu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:21 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hta‸ ca baˬ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Hpaˍrawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˆ yuˬ leh yawˇ ve yaˇ hkʼe shawˍ leh hu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:22 Moˉseˍ lehˬ Eˇjiˇtu‸ chaw hui ve cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa henˇ leh, tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:23 Yawˇ a sha‸ awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ hta‸ ca nyi tuˬ, yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:24 Yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shu fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve chaw hta‸ ga piˇ leh, fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve Eˇjiˇtu‸ chaw hta‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ leh tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:25 Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh, yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ shiˍ-aw hehˉ teh‸ Moˉseˍ dawˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
Acts7:26 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, Awˬ chawˇ hui-oˬ, nawˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ da‸ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ la tuˬ hka piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:27 Yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ hta‸ ya‸ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ leh suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ, a shu nawˬ hta‸ teh taˍ ve le." 
Acts7:28 Aˉ nyi htaˇ Eˇjiˇtu‸ chaw hta‸ nawˬ tiˇ pehˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hta‸ ka‸ tiˇ pehˍ gaˇ ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, Moˉseˍ hta‸ ca‸ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:29 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Moˉseˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Meˇdiˍanˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ca hpaw chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ htaˇ, yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:30 Awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Siˉnaˆ hkʼaw awˬ paˇ lo cawˬ ve heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo aˉ chuˇ buiˇ aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ leh, aˬ miˍ ha oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:31 Moˉseˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ anˇ leh, hkʼa deh‸ nyi tuˬ awˬ paˇ lo jiˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:32 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la leh, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha, Aˍbraˍhanˍ, Iˉcaˆ, Yaˍkoˆ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ Moˉseˍ kawˆ cheˆ leh nyi maˇ haˆ." 
Acts7:33 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve hkuiˉ nuˆ kʼehˆ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ huˉ taˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve miˬguiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:34 Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ shu fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼanˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ ya‸ la peuˬ. Chi beu‸ laˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai tcuh laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:35 Moˉseˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui baˬ taˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ leh suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ a shu nawˬ hta‸ teh taˍ ve le. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ jawˇmawˇ leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, aˉ chuˇ buiˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha cuˇ leh, Moˉseˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:36 Moˉseˍ lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ. Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:37 Moˉseˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ hto piˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:38 Moˉseˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Siˉnaˆ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw piˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ geh maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ geh maˇ kʼoˆ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ te‸ chehˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:39 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼo‸-e gaˇ ve nyi ma tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:40 Yawˇ hui Aˍronˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai laˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ te laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw sheh tawˆ la ve Moˉseˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh naˍ, ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:41 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui lehˬ, nuˇ ehˉ awˬ han shaˉ ho‸ teˇ maˬ te leh oˇ ve hta‸ tanˇ tuˬ tanˇ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui la‸ sheh te taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ ha lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:42 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hpfuhˆ kʼai leh, meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ yehˬ-oˬ, nawˬ hui heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ chehˇ htaˇ, to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hpaˍ tiˇ tanˇ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ tanˇ laˇ ve laˇ." 
Acts7:43 Nawˬ hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ awˬ pon te taˍ ve Mawˇloˆ shaˉ ho‸ ve hpa aˉ po kʼo leh, Reˍhpanˍ gʼuiˬsha ve meu‸ keu shiˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui taˍ uiˍ leh taˆ toˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ coˇ paˉ hkʼa gaˬ shiˍ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:44 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hpa aˉ po kʼo cawˬ ve yoˬ. Moˉseˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ gʼa te ve teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ te taˍ ve hpa aˉ po kʼo hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:45 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui lehˬ, Yawˇsuˆ geh teˇ geh mvuhˇmiˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸ la htaˇ, hpa aˉ po kʼo oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ lo‸ la ve yoˬ. Hpa aˉ po kʼo oˇ ve lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:46 Daˍviˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh Yaˍkoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ yehˬ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ lawˬ ve htawˇ," 
Acts7:47 Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon yehˬ gʼa te ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Sawˉla‸monˍ yoˬ. 
Acts7:48 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, chaw yaˇ la‸ sheh te taˍ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe," 
Acts7:49 Mvuhˇ naw ma lehˬ, ngaˬ ve kʼaw jaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hkui sheh taˍ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ pon nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve yehˬ te tuˬ ve le. Ngaˬ jehˇ tuˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ kaˬ le." 
Acts7:50 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh te taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:51 Kʼawˍ peˍ heh ve chaw, nyi ma leh naˍ paw awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ te ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:52 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ fawˉ maˇ mehˍ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ le. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn hto piˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ htawˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui chiˇ a‸ leh tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ." 
Acts7:53 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve ka‸, nawˬ hui maˇ na yuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:54 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw chi ma ve gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, ciˬ geu‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:55 Oˇ htaˇ Saˍteˍhpanˍ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chiˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo Yeˍsuˆ huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ka‸ gʼa mawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ." 
Acts7:56 Mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw taˍ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo chaw yaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:57 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ leh, a shu yawˇ ve naˍ paw tsuhˇ taˍ leh yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ geh Saˍteˍhpanˍ geh gʼuiˇ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:58 Peuˬ leh, venˇ awˬ baˬ lo yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ tawˆ-e leh, yawˇ hta‸ haˉ pui shiˍ ga hpoˆ baˬ ve yoˬ. Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ kʼehˆ leh Sawˉlu‸ meh ve chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ve hkui paˇ lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:59 Yawˇ hui Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ haˉ pui shiˍ ga baˬ chehˇ htaˇ, Saˍteˍhpanˍ bon lawˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve co ha hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts7:60 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, venˇbaˆ chi yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ taˇ taˍ teh‸, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:1 Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve lehˬ, Sawˉlu‸ htawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, fawˉ mehˍ jaˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve pa taw, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hpaˆ da‸ leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo hpaw-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:2 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ ca tuˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw gʼaˇ hte‸ paˆ hawˬ kehˇ hawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Sawˉlu‸ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ te luˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ teˇ yehˬ peuˬ teˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, hawˉ hkʼaˆ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼawˬ kʼai leh, htawnˍ hkʼaw lo ca keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:4 Hkʼe te leh hpaˆ da‸ kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:5 Hpiˇliˇpuˆ htawˇ, Saˍmaˍriˆ venˇ lo kʼai leh yawˇ hui hta‸ Hkri‸ awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:6 Yawˇ maˍ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, yawˇ te ve awˬ heˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ lehˬ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, neˇ cha‸ chiˆ geh ve chaw maˇ maˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh ve chaw leh, hkui luˬ ve chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ htawˇ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:8 Hkʼe te leh, venˇ yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ maˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:9 Siˉmonˍ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo faˍ te leh, Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw hui hta‸ maˇ maˇ anˇ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ chaw uiˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:10 Uiˍ ve i ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:11 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, maw chaweh faˍ te maˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ anˇ piˇ lawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ lawn Hpiˇliˇpuˆ maˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui yonˍ la leh, hawˉ hkʼaˆ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:13 Siˉmonˍ yawˇ awˬ to htawˇ yonˍ la leh, baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ heˆ leh uiˍ ve anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:14 Saˍmaˍriˆ chaw hui Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve awˬ lawn Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Peˍtruˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:15 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon bon lawˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ka‸, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ ya‸ la sheˍ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve ceh tiˉ sheˍ." 
Acts8:17 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ leh, yawˇ hui da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ ha hpu gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:18 Tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ shu awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ ve pa taw da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu gʼa ve hta‸ Siˉmonˍ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hpu yuˬ veu laˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts8:19 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ la‸ sheh taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu gʼa tuˬ, kanˇ paˆ chi ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:20 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ hpu piˇ leh gʼa tuˬ teh‸ nawˬ dawˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve hpu lehˬ nawˬ geh hkʼa geh luˬ kʼai piˇ-oˆ." 
Acts8:21 Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ ve nyi ma maˇ hteˇ ve pa taw, kanˉ chi hta‸ nawˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ caˉ da‸." 
Acts8:22 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve chi hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ loˬ. Hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ-oˆ." 
Acts8:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˇ ve awˬ taw‸ ma cawˬ leh, venˇbaˆ nawˬ hta‸ hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:24 Oˇ htaˇ Siˉmonˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hkʼa kʼoˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ, teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh lawˬ hkawˉ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:25 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Kʼo‸-e chehˇ htaˇ, Saˍmaˍriˆ hkʼaˆ laiˉ hkʼaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:26 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ tu leh, awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ lo kʼai-o. Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ te leh Gaˍsaˍ lo kʼai ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ kʼaw oˇ ve lehˬ, shehˇ de hkʼaw kʼai ve ya‸ kʼaw yoˬ." 
Acts8:27 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ tu leh kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Ehˇtaˍyoˇpiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve, Kanˍdaˍkeˍ meh ve nanˇ hawˉ hkanˇ ma awˬ hawˉ lo jawˇmawˇ te ve Ehˇtaˍyoˇpiˆ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo oˉ kʼoˍ ca pui kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nanˇ hawˉ hkanˇ ma ve hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:28 Yawˇ kʼo‸-e chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve iˉ mvuhˇ lawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mui leh, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ ve li‸ hta‸ gʼaw chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:29 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Iˉ mvuhˇ lawˬ oˇ ve geh teˇ geh kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:30 Hkʼe te leh, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ ve li‸ hkʼaw lo jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve gʼaw chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Nawˬ gʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ lawn chi hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ-aˬ laˇ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:31 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Shu ngaˬ hta‸ tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ leh, yawˇ geh teˇ geh taˆ mui la tuˬ yawˇ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:32 Yawˇ gʼaw chehˇ ve Li‸ hpu lehˬ chi teˇ tawn yoˬ. Tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ sheh kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˬ mvuh nuˆ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˬ ehˉ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ka‸ yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw maˇ ngaˉ leh ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:33 Nyiˉ ya‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ htaˇ, shu yawˇ hta‸ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ a shu kʼaoˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:34 A ma‸ lonˉ lehˬ Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ na nyi ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ chi teˇ gʼaˇ a shu awˬ lawn kʼoˆ ve le. Yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn kʼoˆ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn kʼoˆ ve laˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ a ciˉ na nyi gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:35 Oˇ htaˇ, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh, Li‸ hpu chi teˇ tawn hta‸ tanˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:36 Yawˇ hui ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, iˉ kaˆ cawˬ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ la leh, a ma‸ lonˉ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, choˬ kaˬ iˉ kaˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma tawˍ taˍ tuˬ cawˬ le teh‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ iˉ mvuhˇ lawˬ hta‸ jehˇ tcuh leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw lo ya‸-e leh, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ lehˬ a ma‸ lonˉ hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:39 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ yuˬ kʼai leh, a ma‸ lonˉ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ mawˬ. A ma‸ lonˉ lehˬ, ha lehˬ ha kʼa awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼaw‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts8:40 Oˇ htaˇ, Aˍcoˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Hpiˇliˇpuˆ hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai leh, Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ, venˇ hkʼaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:1 Sawˉlu‸ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ-a teh‸ tiˉ kʼoˆ leh, gʼaˇ hte‸ caˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:2 Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ chi hta‸ lo‸-e ve chaw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, yaˇ miˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa mawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpeh yuˬ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo sheh veu laˇ tuˬ, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo cawˬ ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ geh kʼai leh li‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:3 Yawˇ Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ gʼeuˆ teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ hti la ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:4 Yawˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo paiˍ leh, Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:5 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ a shu le teh‸ yawˇ na nyi htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ chehˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ." 
Acts9:6 Tu leh venˇ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ ve hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts9:7 Yawˇ geh kʼai chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htawˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ka keh leh huˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:8 Sawˉlu‸ tu la leh, mehˆ ngaˉ nyi htawˇ yawˇ mehˆ maˇ mawˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ yuˬ leh, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo yawˇ hta‸ sheh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:9 Shehˆ nyi hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ mehˆ maˇ mawˬ leh, maˇ caˇ maˇ dawˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:10 Oˇ htaˇ, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍnaˍniˆ meh ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo, Aˍnaˍniˆ-oˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:11 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Tu leh, Hteˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ caˆ lo kʼai-o. Yuˇda‸ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo Taˍsuˆ venˇ yaˇ Sawˉlu‸ hta‸ ca nyi-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:12 Yawˇ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la tuˬ, Aˍnaˍniˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lo‸ la leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ teh‸, Yeˍsuˆ Aˍnaˍniˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Aˍnaˍniˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, chaw oˇ ve lehˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo nawˬ ve da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ haiˬ ve hkʼaˬ ma te ve awˬ lawn chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ hto laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Acts9:14 Choˬ kaˬ lo htawˇ, nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ hkʼa kuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ tuˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui geh yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa peuˬ teh‸, Aˍnaˍniˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Kʼai loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw leh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hkʼaˬ ma gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ maw piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:17 Hkʼe te leh, Aˍnaˍniˆ kʼai leh yehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ Sawˉlu‸ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ nyi paˍ Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, nawˬ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la leh da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu biˇ la tuˬ, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo nawˬ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to maw laˇ ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:18 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ Sawˉlu‸ ve mehˆ shiˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ shehˆ hta‸ shuˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ ce la leh, yawˇ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tu leh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˇ tuˬ caˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:19 Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh yawˇ teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ jaw chehˇ leh," 
Acts9:20 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸, teˇ cawˬ haˉ bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ tanˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:21 Gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa kuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ te luˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Choˬ kaˬ lo htawˇ, oˇ hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui geh sheh kʼai tuˬ yawˇ gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:22 Sawˉlu‸ lehˬ, co ha hpawˇ shaˬ te shaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la leh, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ, yawˇ hui a ciˉ ka‸ dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:23 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ maw la peuˬ htaˇ, Sawˉlu‸ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ Sawˉlu‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ, venˇ yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ yawˇ hui shaw chehˇ ve pa taw," 
Acts9:25 yawˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ Sawˉlu‸ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, hkʼaˉ puˍ lu hkʼaw keu leh lanˇ venˇ awˬ baˬ lo yawˇ hta‸ hpehˇ ya‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:26 Yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ ca pawnˇ da‸ tuˬ yawˇ te ve htawˇ, yawˇ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ kawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Baˍnaˍbaˆ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, tcuh yaˇ hui geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Sawˉlu‸ yawˇ ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ bon maˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, Baˍnaˍbaˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:28 Hkʼe te leh, Sawˉlu‸ lehˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui geh chehˇ leh, tawˆ tawˆ lo‸ lo‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:29 Heˍlaˍsaˆ hkawˇ yaw ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ na‸ uˉ te da‸ leh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:30 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo shiˍ kʼai leh, Taˍsuˆ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:31 Oˇ hta‸, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇ miˬ leh Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha cawˬ leh, uiˍ la mvuh la ve yoˬ.
