Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu dawˇ sha piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui toˇ kʼai leh maˇ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:32 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai leh, Luˇdaˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hui geh gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:33 Oˇ kaˬ lo hkui sheh la‸ sheh suh leh, hiˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ zuh‸ chehˇ ve Ehˉneˍ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:34 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ehˉneˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ nawˬ hta‸ gu na-e laˇ ve yoˬ. Tu leh nawˬ ve zuh‸ hpui hta‸ gu teh-o teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:35 Luˇdaˆ venˇ leh Shaˍronˍ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ na-e la peuˬ ve chaw oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:36 Yuˇpeˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Taˍbiˉtaˆ meh ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh oˇ ve Heˍlaˍsaˆ hkawˇ kʼo, Dawˍkaˍ yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh, shu hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:37 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ naˬ leh suh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ tsuhˇ piˇ peuˬ leh, bawehˇ awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ lo yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:38 Luˇdaˆ venˇ lehˬ Yuˇpeˍ venˇ hta‸ neˇ leh, Peˍtruˆ Luˇdaˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Awˬ yanˇ maˇ jiˆ leh ngaˬ hui geh haˆ haˆ laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:39 Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ tu leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, bawehˇ awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ lo yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Mehˇchawˇma hkʼa peu-eˬ Peˍtruˆ awˬ paˇ huˉ taˍ leh hawˬ leh, Dawˍkaˍ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ htaˇ, tawˉ taˍ ve aˉ po‸ veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:40 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ tawˆ kʼai tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, awˬ suh ku hpawˇ yawˇ hpfuhˆ leh, Taˍbiˉtaˆ-oˬ, tu-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve mehˆ hpaw leh Peˍtruˆ hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ, tu mui ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:41 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ la‸ sheh che leh, yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ tu piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui leh mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, te‸ la peuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:42 Awˬ lawn chi, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ teˇ kaˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuhˬ kʼai leh, chaw maˇ maˇ Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts9:43 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Siˉmonˍ meh ve shaˍ guiˬ te paˍ geh awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:1 Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Kawˍneˍliˆ meh ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Iˉtaˍliˍ ma‸ moˍ teˇ ta‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:2 Yawˇ leh yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ puiˉ leh yawˆ yan puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ shu hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ maˇ tanˇ piˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:3 Teˇ nyi htaˇ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ aˬ laˬ hkʼe shehˆ naˍ riˍ teˇ yanˇ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ geh laˬ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Kawˍneˍliˆ-oˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:4 Kawˍneˍliˆ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh kawˆ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ bon lawˬ ve hkawˇ leh tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ gaˬ leh, yawˇ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:5 Chi beu‸ Yuˇpeˍ venˇ lo chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca kuˬ tcuh-o." 
Acts10:6 Yawˇ lehˬ shaˍ guiˬ te paˍ Siˉmonˍ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:7 Yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ leh, yawˇ geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:8 Awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:9 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ hui kʼai leh, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Peˍtruˆ lehˬ bon lawˬ tuˬ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ htaˇ yehˬ awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:10 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˍ meu‸ la leh, awˍ caˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Shu caˇ tuˬ gu chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ ve hkʼe awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:11 Aˉ boˆ lonˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ve teˇ maˬ lehˬ, awˬ ceˍ awˇ ceˍ hta‸ hpeh taˍ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpehˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:12 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkui sheh la‸ sheh awˍ lehˇ cawˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, loˇ kʼai gaˆ kʼai puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ ve ngaˆ awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:13 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve, Peˍtruˆ-oˬ, tu leh tiˇ caˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, maˇ hpeh‸ taˬ. Cha‸ chiˆ leh maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ caˇ jaw teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:15 Teˇ pawˆ awˬ hkawˇ kʼaw‸ bvuhˬ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ ve taˇ kʼoˆ teh‸, yawˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:16 Chi hkʼe shehˆ pawˆ hpeh‸ peuˬ leh, aˉ boˆ lonˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ve oˇ ve hta‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ mvuhˇ naw ma lo kʼaw‸ yuˬ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:17 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw gʼa mawˬ ve aˬ hto‸ ma tcuhˉ kuiˬ leh naˍ, yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo dawˇ maˇ tawˆ te chehˇ htaˇ, Kawˍneˍliˆ tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Siˉmonˍ ve yehˬ hta‸ ca na laˬ leh, yehˬmiˉhpe‸ lo gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Acts10:18 Yawˇ hui kuˬ leh, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ choˬ kaˬ chehˇ-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:19 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi chehˇ htaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw shehˆ gʼaˇ nawˬ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ. Tu leh ya‸ kʼai loˬ." 
Acts10:20 Nyi ma htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ taˇ te. Yawˇ hui geh kʼai loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:21 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ geh ya‸-e leh, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui ca ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn cawˬ leh laˬ ve le teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:22 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw da‸ chaw hteˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ leh, Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve Kawˍneˍliˆ meh ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo kuˬ yuˬ leh, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:23 Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ aˉ hkʼaw lo kuˬ yuˬ leh hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼe yawˇ tu leh yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Yuˇpeˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:24 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ hui Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ hkʼaw gaˬ ve yoˬ. Kawˍneˍliˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˇ awˬ nyi leh awˬ chawˇ awˬ paˆ hui hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:25 Peˍtruˆ lo‸ la htaˇ, Kawˍneˍliˆ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ leh, Peˍtruˆ ve hkui paˇ lo boˆ sheˬ leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ tu leh, Tu-o, ngaˬ htawˇ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:27 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ Kawˍneˍliˆ geh na‸ uˉ te da‸ leh lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:28 Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ geh ca guiˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, te maˇ keunˍ te maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, cha‸ chiˆ ve ka‸, maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve ka‸ maˇ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
Acts10:29 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ htaˇ, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ leh laˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ lawn cawˬ leh ngaˬ hta‸ ca kuˬ la ve le, ngaˬ na nyi gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:30 Kawˍneˍliˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ponˬ laˬ ve awˇ nyi htaˇ, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hpawˇ shehˆ naˍ riˍ chi teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ aˉ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts10:31 Kawˍneˍliˆ-oˬ, nawˬ bon lawˬ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha gʼa kaˇ leh, nawˬ ha kʼaˉ leh tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:32 Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ lo chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca kuˬ tcuh-o. Yawˇ lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo chehˇ ve shaˍ guiˬ te paˍ Siˉmonˍ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:33 Chi hta‸ pa taw, teˇ cawˬ haˉ ngaˬ nawˬ geh chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Nawˬ laˬ ve lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ hkʼa kʼoˆ tcuh laˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ na tuˬ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Kawˍneˍliˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:34 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi ve ngaˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:35 Chaw teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:36 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hpehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:37 Yoˇhanˬ maˍ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ tanˬ leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:38 Bon hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˇ paˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn leh, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ geh chehˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, da‸ ve hta‸ te leh, neˇhaiˬ fawˉ mehˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve awˬ lawn yoˬ." 
Acts10:39 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shu yawˇ hta‸ suhˆ hkuiˉ daw hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:40 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shehˆ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tuˬ la piˇ leh, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to maw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:41 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maw piˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ maw laˇ ve yoˬ. Suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh hkʼa geh caˇ ve dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:42 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ bon maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, suh peuˬ ve chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ ve awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ htawˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:43 Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:44 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ chehˇ htaˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:45 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ htawˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngeuˍ pfuhˍ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Peˍtruˆ geh laˬ ve Yuˇda‸ Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:46 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh leh Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:47 Oˇ htaˇ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu gʼa ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu gʼa ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ maˇ gʼa piˇ tuˬ, tawˍ taˍ tsuhˇ taˍ paˍ a shu cawˬ le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts10:48 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui geh a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ taˉ tuˬ, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:1 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve tcuh yaˇ hui leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts11:2 Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e htaˇ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts11:3 Nawˬ lehˬ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh yawˇ hui geh caˇ ve dawˬ ve law leˇ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ deˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:4 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ te leh awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ lawn teˇ ceuˬ peuˬ teˇ ceuˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts11:5 Ngaˬ lehˬ Yuˇpeˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ chehˇ htaˇ, aˉ boˆ lonˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ve teˇ maˬ lehˬ, awˬ ceˍ awˇ ceˍ hta‸ hpeh taˍ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo te leh ngaˬ geh hkʼa gaˬ hpehˇ ya‸ la ve hta‸, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ ve hkʼe awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:6 Oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ nyi htaˇ, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hkui sheh la‸ sheh awˍ lehˇ cawˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˬ ceuˬ, loˇ kʼai gaˆ kʼai puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh mvuhˇ hpe lo poˬ ve ngaˆ awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:7 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ-oˬ, tu leh tiˇ caˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, maˇ hpeh‸ taˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, cha‸ chiˆ leh maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ lo‸ la jaw teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:9 Mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ bvuhˬ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ ve taˇ kʼoˆ teh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:10 Chi hkʼe shehˆ pawˆ hpeh‸ peuˬ leh, oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma lo kʼaw‸ gʼawˬ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:11 Oˇ teˇ hkui awˬ hkʼaw lo, Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo ngaˬ geh tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw shehˆ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve yehˬ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:12 Nyi ma htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ maˇ te leh yawˇ hui geh kʼai loˬ teh‸, Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi hkaw‸ gʼaˇ htawˇ ngaˬ geh kʼai leh, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:13 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo tu huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇpeˍ venˇ lo chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Peˍtruˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Siˉmonˍ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca kuˬ tcuh-o." 
Acts11:14 Nawˬ leh nawˬ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve awˬ lawn htawˇ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:15 Ngaˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ tanˬ maˍ piˇ chehˇ htaˇ ka‸, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ya‸ la ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ htawˇ ya‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:16 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ. Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ gʼa hkanˍ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:17 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ la‸ shawnˍ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ piˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ le teh‸, Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:18 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ. Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui htawˇ co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:19 Oˇ htaˇ, Saˍteˍhpanˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve pa taw, hpaˆ da‸ guiˇ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hpiˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ, Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ leh Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ kʼai ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ hui bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe maˍ piˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ chaw leh Kuˇreˍneˍ mvuhˇmiˬ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:21 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ yawˇ hui geh cawˬ ve pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ yonˍ la leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:22 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ gʼa kaˇ leh, yawˇ hui Baˍnaˍbaˆ hta‸ Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:23 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui nyi ma yeˬ leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ vawˆ tcuhˉ taˍ tuˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Baˍnaˍbaˆ lehˬ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ kʼoˆ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ pawnˇ da‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:25 Baˍnaˍbaˆ lehˬ, Sawˉlu‸ hta‸ ca tuˬ, Taˍsuˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:26 Yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo shiˍ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, teˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa zuh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ geh hpawnˬ da‸ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Hkri‸ yaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve awˬ meh lehˬ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo awˉ lawˉ kʼoˆ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:27 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo tu la leh Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:28 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Aˍgaˍbuˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ tu leh, Miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo meu‸ lonˉ kaˆ lonˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh hto piˇ ve yoˬ. Meu‸ ve kaˆ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Kaˍlawˇdiˆ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:29 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts11:30 Yawˇ hui dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve hkʼe te peuˬ leh, Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Sawˉlu‸ la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ feu piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:1 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:2 Yawˇ lehˬ Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ viˉ paˍ Yaˍkoˆ hta‸ aˉ htaw chaw pehˍ ve yoˬ. 
Acts12:3 Chi ve hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ htawˇ hpeh yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:4 Peˍtruˆ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, htawnˍ hkʼaw keu leh, yawˇ hta‸ shaw tuˬ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ chi hkaw‸ gʼaˇ ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ heh‸, chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ la tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:5 Hkʼe te leh, Peˍtruˆ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha geh gʼaˇ hte‸ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:6 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, shawˉ pawˍ hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ-a teh‸ te ve teˇ haˉ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ sho caˆ nyiˇ caˆ hpeh taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ma‸ yaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ awˬ kaˍ lo zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ leh, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ htawnˍ yehˬ miˇ awˬ baˬ lo shaw chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:7 Oˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la leh, bawehˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ ve nyi kuˇ hpawˇ hta‸ hta leh, Haˆ haˆ tu loˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ nawˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ sho caˆ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve la‸ sheh lo kʼehˆ ce ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:8 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Haˍ pi tsuh‸ leh hkuiˉ nuˆ tcuhˉ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ htaˇ, yawˇ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe te ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Nawˬ ve aˉ po‸ lonˉ deh leh ngaˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:9 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ tawˆ-e leh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ te ve kanˉ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ leh, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ ve hkʼe awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo mawˬ ve teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:10 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ awˉ lawˉ teˇ moˍ leh nyiˇ moˍ teˇ moˍ hta‸ ka‸ ponˬ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve sho yehˬ miˉ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ pon yehˬ miˉ oˇ ve yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ hpaw baˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ kʼaw ceh teˇ maˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:11 Oˇ htaˇ, Peˍtruˆ nyi ma hkʼaw kʼaw‸ nawˇ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇ mawˬ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ peu laˇ leh, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hkʼa dawˇ law taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ ve awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:12 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ yawˇ gʼa shiˍ peuˬ htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ e Maˍriˆ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. (Yoˇhanˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ lehˬ Maˍkuˆ yoˬ.) Oˇ kaˬ lo chaw maˇ maˇ hpawnˬ da‸ leh bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:13 Yehˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ ve yehˬ miˉ hta‸ Peˍtruˆ htawˆ htaˇ, Roˇdeˍ meh ve awˬ ceˬ ma ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ na la ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:14 Peˍtruˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, yawˇ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve pa taw yehˬ miˉ hta‸ maˇ hpaw piˇ sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, aˉ hkʼaw gʼuiˇ lo‸-e leh, Peˍtruˆ lehˬ yehˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ ve yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:15 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Nawˬ chaw gʼuˇ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve htawˇ yawˇ lehˬ, Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yoˬ teh‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼoˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Peˍtruˆ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:16 Peˍtruˆ lehˬ, htawˆ chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui yehˬ miˉ hta‸ ca hpaw htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:17 Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ta‸ iˉ chehˇ tuˬ la‸ sheh te maˍ piˇ peuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ htawnˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yuˬ tawˆ laˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˍkoˆ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ lawn chi ve kaˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ kaˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:18 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Peˍtruˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼai ve awˬ lawn ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:19 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Peˍtruˆ hta‸ ca nyi leh maˇ mawˬ htaˇ, shaw shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tu leh Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo kʼai leh oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:20 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Tuˇruˆ venˇ yaˇ leh Siˉdonˍ venˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ te leh yawˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ zuh‸ kuiˬ bawehˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ Baˍlaˍtuˆ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui jehˬ gʼa leh, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ la tuˬ yawˇ hui lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ awˬ pon, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve mvuhˇ miˬ hta‸ gʼa cuˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:21 Jawˇmawˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, tinˍ taˍ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la htaˇ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui leh yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:22 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Awˬ hkawˇ chi ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ, gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:23 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ chiˇ uiˍ maˇ chiˇ mvuh ve pa taw, teˇ cawˬ haˉ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hawehˆ caˇ leh, yawˇ shaˉ cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, uiˍ la maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts12:25 Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Sawˉlu‸ lehˬ, shu hta‸ ga piˇ ve kanˉ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ Maˍkuˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yoˇhanˬ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo tu leh, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:1 Anˍtiˆawˍ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, bon maˍ paˍ hui leh maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Baˍnaˍbaˆ, Niˇgaˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Suˉmonˍ, Kuˇreˍneˍ mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ Luˇkiˆ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Heˍroˆ geh teˇ geh uiˍ la ve Maˍneˍ leh Sawˉlu‸ hui yoˬ." 
Acts13:2 Yawˇ hui Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh caˇ tuˬ ce chehˇ htaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ te tcuh tuˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Sawˉlu‸ te tuˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:3 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce leh bon lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo la‸ sheh taˍ leh hpehˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:4 Hkʼe te leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve hkʼe, Seˍluˍkiˆ venˇ lo ya‸-e leh, Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:5 Saˍlaˍmiˆ venˇ lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gaˬ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yoˇhanˬ htawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ga piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:6 Yawˇ hui conˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ kʼai leh, Paˍhpuˆ venˇ lo gaˬ htaˇ, Baˍyeˍsuˆ meh ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, faˍ te puiˉ ve maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:7 Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Seˍraˍgiˆ Pawˇlu‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve mvuhˇ miˬ jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ gaˇ ve pa taw, Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Sawˉlu‸ hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:8 Eˇluˇmaˆ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve maˇ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. (Eˇluˇmaˆ kʼoˆ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ, faˍ te puiˉ paˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Acts13:9 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Sawˉlu‸ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh, faˍ te puiˉ paˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts13:10 Neˇhaiˬ ve yaˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ heˍ ve leh haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ nawˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ kʼai tuˬ, nawˬ maˇ jehˇ jehˇ leh te tuˬ laˇ." 
Acts13:11 Chi beu‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la leh, nawˬ mehˆ cuˉ leh teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ jaw mvuhˇ nyi hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ cawˬ haˉ moˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ naˆ ho‸ ve yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gaˬ la leh, yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ sheh kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ shu hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:12 Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha ve maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:13 Pawˇlu‸ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Paˍhpuˆ venˇ lo tu leh, Paˍpuˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ Peˍraˍgeˍ venˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:14 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Peˍraˍgeˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ tu leh, Piˇsiˇdiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Shinˉ nyi htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ bon yehˬ taˆ-e leh mui ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:15 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ leh tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ hta‸ shu gʼaw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh chaw kʼai tcuh leh, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ tuˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:16 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ tu leh, la‸ sheh te maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, na sheˍ." 
Acts13:17 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ la‸ sheh chiˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ sheh tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:18 Heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo aˬ laˬ hkʼe awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ hui te ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:19 Hkaˍnanˍ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw suhˍ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha te luˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˇ ha ngaˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼe chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:20 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Saˍmo-eˍlaˆ ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hui piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:21 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lawˬ leh, Beˍyaˍmenˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ Kiˇshaˆ ve yaˇ Sawˉlu‸ teˇ gʼaˇ awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ te tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:22 Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ Daˍviˆ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha Daˍviˆ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw, Yeˍsehˇ ve yaˇ Daˍviˆ hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ ve a loˍ hkʼa biˇ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:23 Gʼuiˬsha ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yawˇ tawˆ la piˇ peuˬ." 
Acts13:24 Yeˍsuˆ maˇ tawˆ la sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ awˬ lawn Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:25 Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve kanˉ te peuˬ paˇ neˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ a shu hpeh‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ le. Ngaˬ lehˬ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkuiˉ nuˇ caˆ hta‸ hpui tuˬ ve ceh ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:26 Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui leh, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ lawn chi ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Acts13:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw leh yawˇ hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ shinˉ nyi le le gʼaw chehˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te biˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:28 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ mawˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jawˇmawˇ Piˉla‸ geh lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:29 Yawˇ awˬ lawn hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui te biˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hta‸ suhˆ hkuiˉ daw hkʼoˆ yuˬ ya‸-e leh, tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:31 Gaˍliˍlehˇ mvuhˇmiˬ te leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ geh kʼai jaw ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ a ciˉ maw chaweh yawˇ awˬ to maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chi beu‸ shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:32 Awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:33 Gʼuiˬsha Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ te biˇ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Chiˇ mvuh ve li‸ nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ la peuˬ, teh bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:34 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la leh, kuiˇ ve luˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ gaˬ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Daˍviˆ gʼa taˍ ve, da‸ kehˬ leh yeˬ ve awˬ bon teˇ hpaˍ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:35 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Chiˇ mvuh ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ kaˬ bvuh‸ taˍ sheˍ ve, Nawˬ ve da‸ kehˬ ve Chaw lehˬ, kuiˇ ve luˬ ve hta‸ hpuˇ tuˬ nawˬ hkanˍ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:36 Daˍviˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve teˇ co-e awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ suh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ puˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh shu yawˇ hta‸ taˍ leh, yawˇ kuiˇ kʼai luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, kuiˇ ve luˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hpuˇ." 
Acts13:38 Chi hta‸ pa taw, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi hta‸ shiˍ-o‸. Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa gʼa ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:39 Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ ponˬ piˇ maˇ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa ponˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:40 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui kʼoˆ ve, Maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw hui-oˬ, nyi leh anˇ leh luˬ kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kanˉ teˇ maˬ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn chi chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui yonˍ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:41 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ maˇ gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:42 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ bon yehˬ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ shinˉ htawˇ kʼaw‸ hto laˇ tuˬ, chaw chi ma ve yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:43 Bon yehˬ ya‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Yuˇda‸ awˬ liˇ yuˬ ve chaw maˇ maˇ Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ yeˬ tuˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:44 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ shinˉ, shinˉ nyi htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ aˬ laˬ hkʼe venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpawnˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:45 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui lehˬ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, hkawehˉ ve nyi ma hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ leh, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:46 Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa hto piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ taˉ leh co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ gʼa maˇ keunˍ teh‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui shawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui geh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts13:47 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Miˬguiˬ awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ hta‸ pa taw htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ teh taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:48 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ha lehˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon hkʼa fuiˍ taˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:49 Hkʼe te leh Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:50 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ hoˉ awˬ naˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca juˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ te leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:51 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, hkui taw kʼaw hawˉ ve je‸ meu-e hpi baˬ taˉ leh, Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts13:52 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ha lehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:1 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ lo gaˬ leh, Yuˇda‸ ve bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ geh lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui maˇ maˇ yonˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:2 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ yonˍ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ ca juˆ piˇ leh, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ canˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ la tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:3 Hkʼe te leh, oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ maw chaweh chehˇ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ awˬ lawn maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyiˇ moˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hpawˇ chehˇ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tcuh yaˇ hui hpawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:5 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ hoˉ awˬ naˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te leh haˉ pui baˬ-a teh‸ te ve hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ," 
Acts14:6 Luˇkawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ, Deˍbeˍ venˇ leh, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo hpaw-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:7 Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:8 Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkui luˬ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ mui chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ paw la htaˇ ka‸ hkui luˬ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, ya‸ kaw teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ toˇ jaw." 
Acts14:9 Yawˇ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ na chehˇ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, na-e la tuˬ yawˇ yonˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ," 
Acts14:10 awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh, Hteˇ lehˍ tu huˉ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ pawˆ tu leh, ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:11 Pawˇlu‸ chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Luˇkawˇniˆ hkawˇ yaw leh, Gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ chaw yaˇ hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hui geh ya‸ la peuˬ teh‸, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:12 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Baˍnaˍbaˆ hta‸ Cuˇsaˆ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ leuˉ leh tawˇ yaw ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ Heˍmeˍ teh‸ meh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:13 Venˇ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo Cuˇsaˆ ve bon yehˬ teˇ yehˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Bon yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve paw hkuˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nuˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh suhˉ veˆ hkʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ venˇ taˍ meu‸ hpe‸ lo yuˬ laˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ geh teˇ geh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tcuh yaˇ Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Pawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ tzuh‸ suhˍ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼuiˇ lo‸-e leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts14:15 Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chi hkʼe te ve le. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chaw yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha geh kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la tuˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma, miˬguiˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ leh oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw hkʼa cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:16 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ ve awˬ co-e teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai tuˬ hpehˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ teh taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ da‸ ve hta‸ te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma lo mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ piˇ ve, awˬ shiˍ awˬ nu naw‸ la tuˬ awˬ tcuhˉ awˬ yanˇ piˇ ve, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hkʼa bvuhˆ caˍ piˇ leh, ha lehˬ tuˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:18 Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tanˇ laˇ tuˬ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe tawˍ taˍ maˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:19 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ leh Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ beˬ gʼa peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ haˉ pui baˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ suh peuˬ teh‸ dawˇ leh, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ venˇ awˬ baˬ lo gʼawˬ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ tu leh venˇ hkʼaw kʼaw‸ lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ Baˍnaˍbaˆ geh teˇ geh Deˍbeˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:21 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ la piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ, Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ leh Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:22 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma yeˬ la leh, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve maˇ maˇ hta‸ hkanˍ ve hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw gʼa lo‸-e ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:23 Yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ ce leh bon lawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ moˍ le le awˬ pon awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui yonˍ chehˇ ve Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:24 Peuˬ leh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Piˇsiˇdiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo hpanˍ kʼai leh, Paˍpuˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:25 Peˍraˍgeˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Aˍtaˍliˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:26 Oˇ kaˬ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ laˬ htaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te tuˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo shu yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ kanˉ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ te biˇ peuˬ." 
Acts14:27 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gaˬ la htaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkʼa te ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui yonˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yehˬ miˉ hpaw piˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts14:28 Oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui geh a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts15:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ gaˬ la leh, Nawˬ hui lehˬ Moˉseˍ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve kʼo, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:2 Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ da‸ leh tawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼawˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ lawn chi hta‸ ca na nyi tuˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸, Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo chehˇ ve tcuh yaˇ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:3 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Hpiˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Saˍmaˍriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma kʼaw‸ pa ve awˬ lawn kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:4 Yawˇ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ, tcuh yaˇ hui leh, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼa te ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tu la leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ gʼa shoˍ piˇ leh, Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ gʼa piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:6 Oˇ htaˇ, tcuh yaˇ hui leh, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn chi ve hta‸ jehˬ da‸ tuˬ hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:7 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ maˇ maˇ jehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Peˍtruˆ tu la leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh gʼa yonˍ tuˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:8 Nyi ma hta‸ shiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui awˬ pon yawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:9 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui leh yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ peun da‸ piˇ lawˬ. Yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ peuˬ." 
Acts15:10 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ ngaˬ hui ka‸ taˆ maˇ gʼaˇ ve taˆ tuˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui ve la‸ kʼaˉ hkʼoˆ ca taˍ piˇ ve le." 
Acts15:11 Ngaˬ hui htawˇ yawˇ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Peˍtruˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:12 Oˇ htaˇ, hkʼa hpawnˬ la ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo anˇ tuˬ leh awˬ heˆ hkʼa te ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui na chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:13 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tawˇ yaw peuˬ htaˇ, Yaˍkoˆ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na sheˍ." 
Acts15:14 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ moˍ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ tuˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ dawˇ nyi leh ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ lawn Suˉmonˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
Acts15:15 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ. Tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve," 
Acts15:16 Chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ la leh, paiˍ peuˬ ve Daˍviˆ ve yehˬ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te tuˬ yoˬ. Luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai peuˬ ve hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gu leh, yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ cawˍ ti tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts15:17 Oˇ htaˇ, cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hkʼa pfuhˇ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ca tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts15:18 Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ awˬ lawn chi ngaˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ tcuh laˇ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Acts15:19 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha geh kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te maˇ cawˇ." 
Acts15:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼawˍ peˍ nyiˉ pehˍ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ shinˉ nyi le le bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ gʼaw maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ te leh teˇ venˇ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ Yaˍkoˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:22 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ geh Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼai tcuh tuˬ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ te ve Baˍsaˍbaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yuˇda‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:23 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ yuˬ kʼai ve li‸ lehˬ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuh yaˇ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ, Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:24 Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui maˇ kʼai tcuh ve ka‸ nawˬ hui geh kʼai leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ piˇ leh nyi ma htawˇ hpfuhˆ nawˬ hpfuhˆ kʼai tuˬ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:25 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui jehˬ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, nawˬ hui geh kʼai tuˬ chaw nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:26 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ pon a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ taˬ ve, ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve Baˍnaˍbaˆ leh Pawˇlu‸ geh yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:27 Hkʼe te leh, li‸ hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ tuˬ, Yuˇda‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:28 Jaw kʼai tuˬ loˍ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve awˬ vuiˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ taˍ tuˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ka‸ ngaˬ hui ka‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:29 Nawˬ hui jaw kʼai cawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼawˍ peˍ nyiˉ pehˍ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui jaw kʼai ve kʼo da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:30 Yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai leh Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ li‸ oˇ ve piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:31 Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼaw htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:32 Yuˇda‸ leh Siˍlaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ bon maˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, awˍ viˉ awˬ nyi hui hta‸ maˇ maˇ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ yeˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:33 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ oˇ kaˬ lo a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh peu laˇ ve chaw hui geh kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ geh teˇ geh Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ leh bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:36 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ maw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ Baˍnaˍbaˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ jaw peuˬ ve teˇ venˇ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ ca kʼaw‸ toˇ nyi-a veuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:37 Baˍnaˍbaˆ lehˬ, Maˍkuˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:38 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ kʼai cawˇ teh‸ dawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ ve teˇ pawˆ Paˍpuˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh kanˉ te kuiˬ lo yawˇ maˇ kʼai ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Acts15:39 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ huiˉ maˬ maˇ cawˇ da‸ leh hpaˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Baˍnaˍbaˆ lehˬ Maˍkuˆ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:40 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ Siˍlaˆ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts15:41 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ yeˬ la tuˬ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:1 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Deˍbeˍ venˇ leh Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Tiˆmoˉseˍ meh ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ e lehˬ, yonˍ ve Yuˇda‸ ma hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ pa lehˬ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:2 Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ leh Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh da‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:3 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh shiˍ kʼai gaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ pa Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ shiˍ ve pa taw, Pawˇlu‸ Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ yuˬ leh awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:4 Yawˇ hui venˇ teˇ hpaˍ lo hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo chehˇ ve tcuh yaˇ hui leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ jehˬ cheˆ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te kʼai tuˬ, teˇ caˉ yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:5 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la leh, teˇ nyi le le chaw maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:6 Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo bon hkawˇ maˇ gʼa maˍ tuˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui Hpuˍgiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Gaˍlaˍtiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:7 Muˇsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, Beˍtuˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve htawˇ, Yeˍsuˆ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ." 
Acts16:8 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui Muˇsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ jaˇ lo hpanˍ kʼai leh, Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:9 Tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ huˉ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇ miˬ lo laˬ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ ga laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:10 Awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chi hkʼe gʼa mawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ chaw hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬ sha ngaˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ leh, teˇ cawˬ haˉ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo gʼa kʼai tuˬ ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:11 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ te leh Saˍmoˍtaˍrehˆ conˇ lo hteˇ lehˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi Naˍpawˇliˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:12 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh Hpiˇliˇpiˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Roˉma‸ chaw hui teh taˍ ve venˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui oˇ kaˬ lo a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:13 Shinˉ nyi gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, shu bon lawˬ kuiˬ cawˬ hehˉ teh‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ leh, venˇ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui oˇ kaˬ lo mui taˍ leh, hkʼa hpawnˬ la ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Luˍdiˇ meh ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ na chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hpa nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve hta‸ hawˇ ve Saˍtiˍrehˇ venˇ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Pawˇ lu‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve nyi ma hta‸ hpaw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:15 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve leh yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve yehˬ lo ca chehˇ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, ngaˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:16 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, mawˉ te puiˉ ve awˬ ceˬ ma ehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ laˬ ha‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ kuˇ puiˉ kʼaoˍ puiˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ maˇ paw sha la ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:17 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ leh ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ leh, Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve ya‸ kʼaw maˍ laˇ ve, mvuh jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:18 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ maw chaweh yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve pa taw, Pawˇlu‸ hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ leh neˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, oˇ teˇ hkui neˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:19 Yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui paw sha la tuˬ dawˇ law kuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui hpeh yuˬ leh, shaˉ nanˉ lo chehˇ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh gʼawˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:20 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ geh sheh kʼai leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve venˇ hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ maˇ maˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:21 Ngaˬ hui Roˉma‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ ha‸ yuˬ maˇ hpeh‸, te maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:22 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ htawˇ, Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ gʼaˇ hte‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ kʼehˆ baˬ sheˬ leh, suhˆ taˬ yuˬ leh dawˆ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:23 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maˇ maˇ dawˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shaw tuˬ htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:24 Htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, shu tawˇ piˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ htawnˍ awˬ kʼaw ji ve teˇ bawehˇ lo keu leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve hkui sheh hta‸ ka‸ suhˆ htawˆ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo keu leh shawˇ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:25 Shehˍ kʼaw hkui teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ bon lawˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:26 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ miˬ hiˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, htawnˍ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ hpaw baˬ sheˬ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hpeh taˍ ve sho caˆ teˇ hpaˍ kʼehˆ tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:27 Htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ cawˬ haˉ nawˇ la leh, htawnˍ yehˬ miˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpaw baˬ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hpaw-e peuˬ hehˉ teh‸ dawˇ leh, yawˇ ve aˉ htaw gʼawˬ tawˆ leh yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ juˆ pehˍ-a teh‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:28 Pawˇlu‸ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ te‸ chiˉ taˇ te, Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:29 Oˇ htaˇ, htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ lehˬ, Aˬ miˍ tuˉ veu laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh gʼuiˇ lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kawˆ cheˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:30 Yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ shiˍ tawˆ-e peuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:31 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ loˬ. Nawˬ leh nawˬ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:32 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ leh yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:33 Oˇ ve teˇ haˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve naˬ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˬ to ka‸ yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ka‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:34 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo shiˍ kʼai leh, te caˍ te taw piˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ peuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ leh yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:35 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, paˍ leˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, Chaw oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, ca kʼoˆ piˇ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:36 Oˇ htaˇ, htawnˍ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ, jawˇmawˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ chaw hta‸ tcuh peu laˇ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ tawˆ-e leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, suhˉ maˇ jehˬ sheˍ htaˇ shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ dawˆ leh htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ laˇ. Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui laˬ leh ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ piˇ lawˬ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:38 Paˍ leˆ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ lonˉ hui hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ leh kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:39 Yawˇ hui yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh laˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ hpehˇ laˇ tuˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ peuˬ leh, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai tuˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts16:40 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai leh, Luˍdiˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:1 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui Aˍhpiˇpawˇliˆ venˇ leh Aˍpawˇ lawˇniˆ venˇ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai leh, Hteˇsaˍ lawˇniˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve bon yehˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:2 Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ te jaw ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui geh lo‸-e leh, shehˆ shinˉ hkʼa gaˬ Li‸ hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ hui geh jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:3 Hkri‸ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, suh kuiˬ lo gʼa kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:4 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yonˍ la leh, Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ pawnˇ da‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ maˇ yonˍ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ yonˍ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkawehˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, kanˉ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw haiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ leh, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Yaˍsonˍ ve yehˬ hta‸ hoˆ yuˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼawˬ tawˆ la tuˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:6 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ca maˇ mawˬ htaˇ, Yaˍsonˍ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ jawˇ mawˇ lonˉ hui geh gʼawˬ kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Miˬ guiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te piˇ lawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo htawˇ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Acts17:7 Yaˍsonˍ lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ. Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ leh, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:8 Venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh jawˇmawˇ lonˉ hui lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:9 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yaˍsonˍ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpu tanˇ keu tcuh leh hkanˍ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:10 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ Pawˇlu‸ leh Siˍlaˆ hta‸ Beˍriˆ venˇ lo tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve bon yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:11 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ chaw hui a‸ kehˉ dawˇ nyi puiˉ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ cawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, yawˇ hui teˇ nyi le le Li‸ hpu hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ gʼaw nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:12 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw maˇ maˇ yonˍ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve Heˍlaˍsaˆ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yonˍ la ve chaw hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:13 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Beˍriˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ venˇ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, oˇ kaˬ lo htawˇ yawˇ hui kʼai leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ juˆ piˇ leh duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:14 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼa gaˬ teˇ cawˬ haˉ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Siˍlaˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˉ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:15 Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ shiˍ kʼoˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Aˍhtenˍ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Siˍlaˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ yawˇ geh haˆ haˆ laˬ tuˬ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu piˇ leh yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:16 Pawˇlu‸ Aˍhtenˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ law chehˇ htaˇ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˉ ho‸ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh‸ bawˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ lehˬ bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw hui leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ nyi le le tcuh hkʼaw lo hkʼa mawˬ hkʼa hpuˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:18 Oˇ htaˇ, Eˇpiˇkuˇruˆ awˬ liˇ leh Saˍtawˉeˆ awˬ liˇ yuˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇ lu‸ geh jehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Shu hkawˇ ca gʼawˆ kʼaoˍ toˇ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn leh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve pa taw, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ miˬ ve gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ca maˍ toˇ ve chaw yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:19 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ yuˬ leh, jehˬ da‸ kuiˬ Aˍreˍ hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ lo shiˍ kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ lawn awˬ suhˉ chi ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ a ciˉ maˍ laˇ-oˆ." 
Acts17:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ maˇ kaˇ jaw ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ aˬ hto‸ ma tcuhˉ kuiˬ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:21 Aˍhtenˍ venˇ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ leh hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ lawn awˬ suhˉ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ gʼa hto tuˬ awˬ pon ceh tiˉ yawˇ hui awˬ yanˇ te peuˬ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:22 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, jehˬ da‸ kuiˬ Aˍreˍ hkʼaw awˬ kʼaw ji ve teˇ kaˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Aˍhtenˍ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ jaˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ kʼai leh nawˬ hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve tanˇ kuiˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:24 Miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬguiˬ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ chaw yaˇ la‸ sheh te taˍ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Acts17:25 Chaw yaˇ ve la‸ sheh yawˇ awˬ pon teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te tuˬ yawˇ loˍ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ a sha‸ te‸ piˇ leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:26 Yawˇ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ tuˬ, chaw teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui chehˇ tuˬ ve miˬ tcuhˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:27 Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh chaw yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ ca ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ca shoˆ nyi leh gʼa mawˬ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ chaw yaˇ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve ka‸, yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ vuiˇ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Acts17:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui te‸ chehˇ ve, hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ te chehˇ ve leh hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ kʼa shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe, Ngaˬ hui lehˬ yawˇ lo caˉ ya‸ la ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:29 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha lo caˉ ya‸ la ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw yaˇ hui dawˇ puiˉ te puiˉ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han teˇ hpaˍ, shi maˇ kʼoˆ, hpu maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ pui maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shuˍ da‸ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ dawˇ cawˇ." 
Acts17:30 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ leh te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha maˇ tawnˇ taˍ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:31 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ leuˆ yuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ, yawˇ awˬ nyi tinˍ taˍ peuˬ. Chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve teh‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, suh kuiˍ lo yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ peuˬ teh‸ Pawˇlu‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:32 Suh peuˬ ve chaw kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ leh gʼuiˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ lawn chi awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ngaˬ hui na tuˬ sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:33 Hkʼe te leh, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts17:34 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yonˍ la leh Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ pawnˇ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Daˍyawˉnaˍsiˆ meh ve Aˍreˍ hkʼaw jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, Daˍmaˍriˆ meh ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Aˍhtenˍ venˇ lo tawˆ kʼai leh Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:2 Oˇ kaˬ lo, Poˍtuˆ mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ Aˍkuˉlaˆ meh ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hpuˇ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Roˉma‸ venˇ hkʼaw lo gʼa tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ Kaˍlawˇdiˆ tawˇ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma Piˇkiˇlaˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Iˉtaˍliˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tawˆ la leh, oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ la gehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:3 Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh kʼai leh, yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh chehˇ leh kanˉ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ hpa aˉ po kʼo tawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:4 Teˇ shinˉ nyi le le bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˍ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ jehˬ piˇ cehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:5 Siˍlaˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tawˆ la leh Pawˇlu‸ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ lehˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ bon maˍ chehˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ coˇ caˇ leh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:6 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ leh maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ hpi maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui ve awˬ suhˍ nawˬ hui ve oˉ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gaˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui geh ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:7 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Tiˇtuˆ Yuˇtuˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve yehˬ lehˬ, bon yehˬ hta‸ neˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:8 Kaˍliˇpuˆ meh ve bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ leh, yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ Pawˇlu‸ maˍ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:9 Tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ taˇ kawˆ. Ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ taˇ chehˇ. Hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Acts18:10 Ngaˬ nawˬ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ naˬ tuˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, venˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve chaw maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:11 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo teˇ hkʼaw‸ leh ha pa hkaw‸ maˬ chehˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:12 Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gaˍliˍoˍ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ te chehˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ tu la leh yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw lo yuˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:13 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui htaˇ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo pui tuˬ beˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ tawˇ yaw-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ Gaˍliˍoˍ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ lawn chi lehˬ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve, maˇ heˆ kʼo haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ yeunˇ hkanˍ leh nawˬ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts18:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ meh teˇ hpaˍ leh nawˬ hui ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ lawn hpeh‸ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui te-o. Awˬ lawn chi hkʼe ve hta‸ ngaˬ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:16 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw lo gʼa‸ tawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ bon yehˬ awˬ hoˉ Suˇtenˍ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gaˍliˍoˍ lehˬ awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:18 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ oˇ kaˬ lo a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ peuˬ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh Suˇriˆ mvuhˇ miˬ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Piˇkiˇlaˆ leh Aˍkuˉlaˆ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ yawˇ geh kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ te taˍ ve hkʼe, Keˍcheˍ venˇ lo gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ chiˇ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:19 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo gaˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo teh taˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui geh jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:20 Yawˇ hui geh a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve htawˇ, yawˇ chehˇ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ kʼo, nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ hkʼaw tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:22 Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo teˆ-e leh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ca hpuˇ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:23 Oˇ kaˬ lo a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ peuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, Gaˍlaˍtiˆ mvuhˇ miˬ leh Hpuˍgiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ kʼai leh awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ ca piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:24 Oˇ htaˇ, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ venˇ yaˇ Aˍpawˇlu‸ meh ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ tawˇ yaw puiˉ ve chaw leh, Liˬ hpu shiˍ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:25 Yawˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve ya‸ kʼaw awˬ lawn gʼa henˇ leh nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ lawn hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve htawˇ, Yoˇhanˬ maˍ piˇ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:26 Yawˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh tanˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Piˇkiˇlaˆ leh Aˍkuˉlaˆ yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:27 Yawˇ lehˬ, Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hpawˇ lo hkanˍ kʼai gaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh, oˇ hpawˇ chehˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw yonˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ maˇ ga piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts18:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw yawˇ hkʼa deh‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:1 Aˍpawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ awˬ na hpawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai leh, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Acts19:2 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ gʼa peuˬ laˇ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ kaˇ jaw teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:3 Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yoˇhanˬ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:4 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve baˆtiˆsaˬ teˇ ceuˬ piˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa yonˍ tuˬ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:5 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:6 Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ htaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh leh bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:7 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hkʼe cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts19:8 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh ha pa sheh lehˇ hkʼa gaˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui geh yawˇ jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn yawˇ hui yonˍ la tuˬ yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nyi ma heh leh maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ awˬ lawn hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh tawˆ kʼai leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai leh, Tuˇraˍnuˆ ve cawnˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ nyi le le jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:10 Yawˇ nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ chi hkʼe te ve pa taw, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:11 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh uiˍ jaˇ ve anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve yoˬ. 
Acts19:12 Pawˇlu‸ yehˇ ve hpaˉ ce‸ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, tsuh‸ tuˬ ve hpa teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh shu yuˬ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui na-e la leh, haiˬ ve neˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:13 Oˇ htaˇ, neˇ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ toˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve neˇ geh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Pawˇlu‸ maˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:14 Keˍvaˆ meh ve Yuˇda‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ suhˍ gʼaˇ htawˇ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts19:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haiˬ ve neˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn htawˇ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ a shu le teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:16 Oˇ htaˇ, haiˬ ve neˇ geh ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ pawˆ kʼuˉ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hehnˇ chaweh te ve pa taw, yawˇ hui gʼa naˬ leh, yehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ kʼu nyi te hpaw tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:17 Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ lawn chi hta‸ gʼa shiˍ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ kawˆ jaˇ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:18 Yonˍ peuˬ ve chaw htawˇ maˇ maˇ laˬ leh yawˇ hui te ya‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ hto maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. 
Acts19:19 Faˍ te paˍ laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ, yawˇ hui ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ laˬ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tuˉ baˬ ve yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hpfuhˇ yawˇ hui shawˍ nyi htaˇ, ngaˇ meunˍ hteh‸ hpfuhˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:20 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ uiˍ la maˇ la leh, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:21 Chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ taˍ ve, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Roˉma‸ venˇ lo htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa gaˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:22 Yawˇ hta‸ ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Tiˆmoˉseˍ leh Eˇraˍtuˆ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo yawˇ kʼai tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˬ to Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ jaw chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:23 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ hta‸ pa taw sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ maˇ maˇ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Deˍmeˍtriˆ meh ve hpu dawˆ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hpu yuˬ leh Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma ve fuˍ yehˬ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw hpu dawˆ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ maˇ paw sha la ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:25 Yawˇ lehˬ hpu dawˆ paˍ hui hta‸ leh oˇ hkʼe ve kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, kanˉ chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui paw sha la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:26 Pawˇlu‸ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui ve la‸ sheh hkʼa te ve gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼuiˬ sha maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ yawˇ beˬ leh, nyi ma hpfuhˆ kʼai tuˬ te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:27 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ve kanˉ luˬ kʼai ve hta‸ dawˇ haˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma ve fuˍ yehˬ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ luˬ kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ htawˇ dawˇ haˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:28 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, Eˇfeˇsu‸ chaw hui ve Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:29 Hkʼe te leh, venˇ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ geh toˇ ve Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ chaw Gaˍyuˆ leh Aˍriˍtaˍhkuˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼawˬ yuˬ leh, pawehˇ te ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo teˇ geh gʼuiˇ lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:30 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e gaˇ ve htawˇ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:31 Pawˇlu‸ ve awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ ve Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇ miˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htawˇ, pawehˇ te ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ, chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:32 Hpawnˬ da‸ ve awˬ moˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ hpeh‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui maˇ-awˍ ve aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw hpawnˬ da‸ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
Acts19:33 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui lehˬ, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ chaw chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ca‸ peu leh, yawˇ tawˇ yaw tuˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ tawˇ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ gaˇ leh, yawˇ la‸ sheh awˬ heˆ te maˍ ve yoˬ."
