Acts19:34 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, Eˇfeˇsu‸ chaw hui ve Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, aˬ laˬ hkʼe nyiˇ naˍ riˍ hkʼa gaˬ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ hkawˇ tiˉ te leh kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:35 Venˇ ceˇ leˇ lonˉ lehˬ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ tcuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Eˇfeˇsu‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve Aˍteˍmiˆ gʼuiˬsha ma ve fuˍ yehˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo ce la ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ shaˉ ve venˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw a shu cawˬ le." 
Acts19:36 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ta‸ iˉ chehˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, maˇ dawˇ nyi leh te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:37 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, bon yehˬ hta‸ te luˬ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ, ngaˬ hui ve gʼuiˬsha ma hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ nawˬ hui choˬ kaˬ lo gʼawˬ veu laˇ peuˬ." 
Acts19:38 Hkʼe te leh, Deˍmeˍtriˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ hpu dawˆ paˍ hui lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ te da‸ tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, shaˉ nanˉ cawˬ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui tawˇ te da‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
Acts19:39 Chi awˬ hkʼoˆ nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve kʼo, tawˇ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ lonˉ gʼa jehˬ cheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:40 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ya‸ nyi duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve lehˬ, awˬ lawn te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, shu ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ laˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ haˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw chi hkʼe hpawnˬ da‸ le teh‸ shu na nyi laˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui te‸ chiˉ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts19:41 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hpawnˬ da‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:1 Duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve chi gawˬ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ peuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:2 Yawˇ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ maˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ mvuhˇ miˬ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:3 Pawˇlu‸ oˇ kaˬ lo ha pa sheh lehˇ chehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼo‸-e a teh‸ te htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ da‸ taˍ ve pa taw, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇ miˬ hpawˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:4 Pawˇlu‸ geh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Beˍriˆ venˇ yaˇ Puˇluˆ ve yaˇ paˍ Sawˇpaˍtaˍruˆ, Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ venˇ yaˇ Aˍriˍtaˍhkuˆ leh Seˍkuˍduˆ, Deˍbeˍ venˇ yaˇ Gaˍyuˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ chaw Tuˇhkiˆ leh Taˍroˆhpeˍ hui yoˬ." 
Acts20:5 Yawˇ hui awˉ lawˉ kʼai leh, Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:6 Hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo diˇ maˇ keu ve pawehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui Hpiˇliˇpiˆ venˇ lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ tawˆ-e leh, ngaˇ nyi gaˬ heh‸, Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ lo yawˇ hui geh gaˬ leh, oˇ kaˬ lo suhˍ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:7 Suhˍ nyi awˬ hkʼaw awˉ lawˉ teˇ haˉ htaˇ, hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, shawˉ pawˍ tawˆ kʼai tuˬ dawˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ jehˬ piˇ leh, shehˍ kʼaw hkui hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:8 Ngaˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve awˬ hta‸ teˇ htai‸ ve awˬ bawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ faiˇ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts20:9 Uˇtuˇhkuˆ meh ve chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yehˬ miˉ ehˉ awˬ hpe‸ lo mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ maw chaweh maˍ piˇ ve pa taw yawˇ zuh‸ muiˉ jo leh, zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, yehˬ shehˆ htai‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ ce leh, suh peuˬ ve hta‸ shu ca chiˇ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:10 Oˇ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ ya‸-e leh, chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ boˆ taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hta‸ kʼuˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ taˇ te. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo a sha‸ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:11 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ taˆ-e leh, hkaoˍmonˇ hkʼeh‸ leh caˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ htiˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui geh maw chaweh na‸ uˉ te da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:12 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ awˬ te‸ gʼa shiˍ kʼo‸-e leh, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:13 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ leh Aˍsoˆ venˇ lo awˉ lawˉ kʼai taˍ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, ya‸ kʼaw juˇ kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui geh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ gʼa kʼaw‸ ciˇ tuˬ yawˇ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:14 Aˍsoˆ venˇ lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw ha‸ yuˬ leh, Miˍtuˆleˍ venˇ lo ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:15 Oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai leh, shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼe ngaˬ hui Hkiˇoˆ conˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ leh, hpa‸ nyi hkʼe teˇ nyi Saˍmoˆ conˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Hpiˇ nyi hkʼe teˇ nyi oˇ kaˬ lo kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, Meˍleˍtuˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:16 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maw maw maˇ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo maˇ deh leh teˇ pawˆ tiˉ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hpeh‸ ve kʼo, Peˍteˍkoˆteˍ awˬ nyi htaˇ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ taˍ tuˬ, yawˇ haˆ haˆ kʼai gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:17 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Meˍleˍtuˆ venˇ lo chehˇ taˍ leh, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo chaw hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca kuˬ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:18 Yawˇ hui yawˇ geh gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ gaˬ la ve teˇ nyi te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:19 Ngaˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ te htaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nuˇ nehˬ nehˬ taˍ ve, mehˆ gʼuiˬ maˇ maˇ ya‸ la ve leh, Yuˆda‸ chaw hui ngaˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ da‸ ve pa taw, beˬ ve lawˇ ve laiˉ ceuˬ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:20 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ hto laˇ htaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ, teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ faˉ taˍ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ yehˬ peuˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:21 Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:22 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ leh naˍ maˇ shiˍ." 
Acts20:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu hpeh yuˬ leh fawˉ mehˍ laˇ tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ law taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ venˇ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ gʼa toˇ tuˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ toˇ peuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hta‸ kanˉ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ bon hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve a sha‸ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve teh‸ ngaˬ maˇ shawˍ." 
Acts20:25 Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ca toˇ maˍ piˇ peuˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼa gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ ngaˬ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ ve ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:26 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ponˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ maˇ jaw kʼai." 
Acts20:28 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˬ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ vuiˬ yuˬ taˍ ve awˬ moˍ hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ tuˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ." 
Acts20:29 Ngaˬ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˬ awˬ moˍ hta‸ te luˬ te sheˆ tuˬ ve haiˬ jaˇ ve veˬ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:30 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tu la leh, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ ve awˬ pon beˬ yuˬ tuˬ hteˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hpfuhˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts20:31 Chi hta‸ pa taw shaw taˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ shehˆ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ maˇ jehˇ jehˇ leh mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˍ ti‸ pe‸ laˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
Acts20:32 Ngaˬ lehˬ chi beu‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw leh, yawˇ ve awˬ bon uiˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon uiˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ uiˍ la mvuh la piˇ puiˉ leh, da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh nawˬ hui hta‸ chehˇ kuiˬ pe‸ laˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:33 Ngaˬ lehˬ, a shu teˇ gʼaˇ ve hpu, shi, veu‸ tuˬ kʼaˇ tuˬ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ sheˉ lai." 
Acts20:34 Ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh chi lehˬ, ngaˬ leh ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve chaw hui hkʼa loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ kanˉ te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:35 Nawˬ hui htawˇ chi hkʼe gʼaˇ hte‸ te leh awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ gʼa ga piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Piˇ ve lehˬ gʼa ve a‸ kehˉ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ htawˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:36 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh hkui tcuhˉ teh leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts20:37 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ hawˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ ve kʼawˍ peˍ hta‸ kʼuˉ taˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ boˆ nu ve yoˬ," 
Acts20:38 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lo hkʼa gaˬ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:1 Yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ kʼaw‸ ciˇ leh, Kawˇsaˆ conˇ lo hteˇ lehˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi Rawˇduˆ conˇ lo kʼai leh, oˇ kaˬ lo kʼaw‸ tu leh Paˍtaˍraˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:2 Oˇ kaˬ lo Hpiˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ" 
Acts21:3 Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, la‸ sha paˉ hpawˇ lo ngaˬ hui kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Suˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ciˇ kʼai leh, Tuˇruˆ venˇ lo deh ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw taˆ taˍ ve mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo yuˬ ya‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:4 Oˇ kaˬ lo awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ca mawˬ leh, suhˍ nyi hkʼa gaˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:5 Suhˍ nyi biˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, awˬ miˇ awˬ yaˇ hui ka‸ teˇ geh venˇ awˬ baˬ lo hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ kʼoˬ laˇ leh, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:6 Teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hpaˆ da‸ hkawˇ yaw da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo taˆ lo‸-e leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ a shu yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:7 Ngaˬ hui Tuˇruˆ venˇ lo tu leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw leh peuˬ htaˇ, Paˍtawˇleˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui geh ca guiˇ leh, yawˇ hui geh teˇ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:8 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi ngaˬ hui kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Suhˍ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Hpiˇliˇpuˆ meh ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui lo‸-e leh, yawˇ geh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:9 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ ma te ve yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ awˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve awˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ haˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:10 Yawˇ aˉ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Aˍgaˍbuˆ meh ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo tu leh oˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:11 Yawˇ ngaˬ hui geh lo‸ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ ve haˍ pi caˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ, yawˇ ve hkui sheh la‸ sheh hta‸ hpeh taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Haˍ pi caˆ chi ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ chi hkʼe te hpeh yuˬ leh buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Aˍgaˍbuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:12 Ngaˬ hui tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui leh oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:13 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui hawˬ leh ngaˬ ve nyi ma hkoˇ kʼai tuˬ te laˇ ve le. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hpeh laˇ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, suh ve hta‸ hkanˍ tuˬ ve ka‸ ngaˬ gu taˍ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:14 Ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ beˬ maˇ gʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇ mawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ teh‸, ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ leh ta‸ iˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:15 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hui mawˇ gu taˍ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:16 Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh kʼai leh, Maˍnaˍsonˍ meh ve Kuˇpaˍruˆ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ geh haˉ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ geh shiˍ kʼoˬ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ la‸ gʼawˇ hpeh‸ maw peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:17 Ngaˬ hui Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo gaˬ htaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:18 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh Yaˍkoˆ geh kʼai leh, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ hpawnˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:19 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ hkawˇ yaw da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha hkʼa te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn, teˇ ceuˬ peuˬ teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:20 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ viˉ paˍ-oˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo yonˍ ve chaw hkʼaˬ nyiˇ meunˍ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:21 Nawˬ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ gʼa shoˍ leh, awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe maˇ gʼa te teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ leh, Moˉseˍ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ tuˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui geh chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui laiˉ pawˆ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:22 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ le. Nawˬ gaˬ la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa kaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts21:23 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼe te-o. Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ te taˍ ve chaw awˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui geh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:24 Yawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ ca te-o. Yawˇ hui oˉ kʼoˍ chiˇ baˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬ hpfuhˇ ca keu piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ ve awˬ lawn chaw chi ma ve gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe maˇ cawˇ ve law teh‸ gʼa shiˍ leh, nawˬ awˬ to awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh hkʼa deh‸ kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts21:25 Yonˍ ve buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼawˍ peˍ nyiˉ pehˍ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai tuˬ ngaˬ hui jehˬ cheˆ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ piˇ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:26 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼe chaw oˇ ve awˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ ca te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon da‸ la kehˬ la ve awˬ liˇ te ve awˬ nyi biˇ la tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ gʼa tanˇ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:27 Suhˍ nyi oˇ ve biˇ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo laˬ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa mawˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ ca juˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts21:28 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, haˆ ga la-o. Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chehˇ kuiˬ chi hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ canˇ tuˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo shiˍ veu laˇ leh, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ chi hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Taˍroˇhpeˍ meh ve Eˇfeˇsu‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ponˬ laˬ htaˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Pawˇlu‸ geh te toˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo Pawˇlu‸ shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:30 Venˇ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te leh, chaw awˬ hpoˆ awˬ diˬ gʼuiˇ laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo gʼawˬ tawˆ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:31 Pawˇlu‸ suh tuˬ yawˇ hui te chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ teˇ venˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ hta‸ shu ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:32 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ ma‸ yaˇ leh ma‸ poˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te chehˇ kuiˬ lo gʼuiˇ ya‸-e ve yoˬ. Chaw chi ma ve lehˬ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ leh ma‸ yaˇ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:33 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ Pawˇlu‸ geh kʼai leh yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, sho caˆ nyiˇ caˆ hpeh tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve le, aˬ hto‸ ma te ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:34 Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ hpaˍ teˇ ceuˬ kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve hta‸ pa taw, awˬ lawn hkʼa deh‸ maˇ shiˍ hpeh‸ leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ ma‸ yaˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ kʼai tuˬ ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:35 Pawˇlu‸ go tcuhˉ puiˍ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hehnˇ chaweh te ve pa taw, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa chiˇ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:36 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ leh, Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ loˬ teh‸ kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:37 Ma‸ yaˇ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ yuˬ lo‸-e a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ ngaˬ tawˇ yaw hpeh‸-aw laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ Heˍlaˍsaˆ hkawˇ shiˍ-aˍ laˇ." 
Acts21:38 Nawˬ lehˬ, aˉ suhˆ htaˇ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ leh shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ shawˍ veu leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo shiˍ kʼai ve Eˇjiˇtu‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:39 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Taˍsuˆ venˇ yaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ meh maˇ uiˍ ve venˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw chi ma ve hta‸ tawˇ yaw tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ a ciˉ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts21:40 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ yawˇ hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, go awˬ hkʼoˆ huˉ taˍ leh, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ la‸ sheh awˬ heˆ te maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ yaw leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts22:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui leh awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ yaw hkʼaw‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ a ciˉ na sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:2 Yawˇ Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ yaw ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ya‸ sheh htaˇ a‸ kehˉ ka‸ ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts22:3 Ngaˬ lehˬ Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ Taˍsuˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo Gaˍmaˍleˍlaˆ ve hkui paˇ lo ngaˬ uiˍ la leh, awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ gʼa henˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ nyi nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ htawˇ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:4 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ, hawˉ hkʼaˆ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh htawnˍ hkʼaw lo keu leh, tiˇ pehˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ chi hta‸ ngaˬ fawˉ mehˍ jaw peuˬ." 
Acts22:5 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ ngaˬ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui geh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ li‸ gʼa leh, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ hpeh yuˬ veu laˇ leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:6 Ngaˬ kʼai leh Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ awˬ paˇ lo gaˬ la htaˇ, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo hehnˇ jaˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ teˇ cawˬ haˉ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ hti la ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:7 Ngaˬ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ paiˍ leh, Sawˇlu‸-oˬ, Sawˇlu‸-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve le teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:8 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ a shu le teh‸, ngaˬ na nyi htaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ chehˇ ve Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:9 Ngaˬ geh kʼai chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htawˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa kaˇ." 
Acts22:10 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ aˬ hto‸ ma gʼa te tuˬ le teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Tu leh Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo kʼai-o. Nawˬ awˬ pon hkʼa fuiˍ teh taˍ ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ oˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:11 Hehnˇ jaˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ mehˆ maˇ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ geh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ sheh veu leh, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:12 Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh da‸ leh awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ ve Aˍnaˍniˆ meh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts22:13 Yawˇ ngaˬ geh laˬ leh, Awˬ nyi paˍ Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, nawˬ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la-o teh‸ ngaˬ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ teˇ hkui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ mehˆ kʼaw‸ mawˬ la leh yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:14 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw tawˆ la ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ peuˬ." 
Acts22:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ gʼa mawˬ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ awˬ pon nawˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts22:16 Chi beu‸ nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw law chehˇ ve le. Tu la-o. Yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ peun ve awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ leh, nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ htaˬ tsuhˇ hkʼa-o teh‸ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:17 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:18 Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo haˆ haˆ tawˆ kʼai loˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ lawn nawˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:19 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw yuˬ keu leh, bon yehˬ teˇ yehˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ dawˆ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:20 Nawˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Saˍteˍhpanˍ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yuˬ sheˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh yawˇ hui te chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ shaw taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:21 Yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Tawˆ kʼai loˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui geh kʼai tcuh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:22 Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui yawˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ ta‸ iˉ na taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi hkʼe ve chaw hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yuˬ baˬ loˬ. Yawˇ te‸ chehˇ maˇ keunˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:23 Yawˇ hui kuˬ leh, a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ kʼehˆ leh baˬ taˆ ve, je‸ meu-e ka‸ mvuhˇ hpe lo hkaˆ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:24 Hkʼe te leh, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ ma‸ yaˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ kʼai tcuh leh, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw shu yawˇ awˬ lawn chi hkʼe kʼoˆ kuˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, Yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ leh na nyi-o teh‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:25 Shaˍ guiˬ caˆ yuˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ hpeh ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve ma‸ poˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ leh nawˬ hui jaw‸ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ leh laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:26 Tawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ma‸ poˍ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ geh kʼai leh, Nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ dawˇ ve le. Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve law teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:27 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ geh laˬ leh, Nawˬ Roˉma‸ chaw yoˬ laˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ teh‸ na nyi htaˇ, Yoˬ teh‸ Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:28 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ hpu maˇ maˇ gʼa piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ, paw la htaˇ ka‸ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:29 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ jaw‸ leh na nyi-a teh‸ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ teˇ cawˬ haˉ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ htawˇ, Pawˇlu‸ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ gʼa hpeh peuˬ ve pa taw kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts22:30 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui Pawˇlu‸ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ hpui hkʼa leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ kuˬ hpawnˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ shiˍ ya‸-e leh, yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hkʼa te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ." 
Acts23:2 Oˇ htaˇ paw hkuˇ lonˉ Aˍnaˍniˆ lehˬ, Yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ dawˆ hpehˇ-oˆ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:3 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Htunˉ shehˍ taˍ ve gʼo‸ pa-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ dawˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ngaˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ nawˬ choˬ kaˬ mui chehˇ ve ka‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ dawˆ tcuh ve laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:4 Awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:5 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yawˇ lehˬ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ. Nawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ lawn nawˬ haiˬ ve hkawˇ maˇ gʼa yaw teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:6 Hpawnˬ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Saˍduˆkehˇ hpeh‸ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ Pawˇlu‸ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hpeh‸ leh, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ ve awˬ yaˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hta‸ dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, bvuhˬ chaweh kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:7 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui leh Saˍduˆkehˇ hui tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ leh, hpawnˬ da‸ ve chaw hui nyiˇ moˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Saˍduˆkehˇ hui lehˬ, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ka‸ awˬ ha ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hui lehˬ, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:9 Hkʼe te leh duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ve li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tu leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ mawˬ. Awˬ ha, maˇ heˆ kʼo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw piˇ leh naˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:10 Chi hkʼe tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ jaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ gʼawˬ tzuh‸ sheˬ puiˉ-aˆ teh‸, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ dawˇ haˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ya‸-e tcuh leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo lu yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ma‸ yaˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ yuˬ kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:11 Oˇ ve teˇ haˉ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha Pawˇlu‸ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nyi ma taˇ luˬ. Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn nawˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Roˉma‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ nawˬ shaˉ hkiˆ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:12 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ ve ceh ceh, te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ caˇ maˇ dawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:13 Chi hkʼe hkanˍ taˍ ve chaw awˇ chi hpaˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Acts23:14 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ ve ceh ceh, caˇ tuˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ leh‸ nyi teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:15 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui leh jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ geh Pawˇlu‸ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ leuˉ leh hkʼa deh‸ na nyi tuˬ ve hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh yuˬ laˬ tuˬ ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ hta‸ lawˬ hkʼawˉ-oˆ. Awˬ paˇ lo yawˇ maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ ngaˬ hui gu taˍ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:16 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe naˆ taˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ Pawˇlu‸ ve awˬ nuˍ ma ve yaˇ paˍ gʼa shiˍ leh, yawˇ ma‸ yaˇ yehˬ hkʼaw lo‸-e leh Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ ca hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:17 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ leh yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw haˉ paˍ chi hta‸ ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ geh shiˍ kʼai-o. Yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ tuˬ awˬ lawn cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:18 Hkʼe te leh, ma‸ poˍ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai leh, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ geh gaˬ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw haˉ paˍ chi nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ awˬ lawn cawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ geh shiˍ veu laˇ tuˬ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Pawˇlu‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ leh lawˬ hkawˉ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:19 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ, chaw haˉ paˍ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ yuˬ leh, baˬ kuiˬ lo shiˍ kʼai leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ cawˬ le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:20 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Pawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn hkʼa deh‸ na nyi gaˇ ve hkʼe te leh, shawˉ pawˍ kʼo jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ geh shiˍ veu laˇ tuˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ tuˬ nyi ma hawˍ da‸ peuˬ." 
Acts23:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui nyi ma cawˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ ve ceh ceh, te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ caˇ maˇ dawˬ teh‸, chaw awˇ chi hpaˆ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ leh, yawˇ hta‸ naˆ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ yawˇ hui gu taˍ leh, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ law na chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:22 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ chaw haˉ paˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve awˬ lawn chi, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ hto piˇ teh‸ tawˇ piˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:23 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ, ma‸ poˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ya‸ puiˉ kʼawˇ naˍ riˍ htaˇ Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo kʼai tuˬ, la‸ caˉ pfuhˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ nyiˇ ha, iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ suhˍ chi leh, gehˇ taˆ ve ma‸ yaˇ nyiˇ ha hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ-o‸." 
Acts23:24 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Pawˇlu‸ ciˇ tuˬ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇ mawˇ lonˉ Hpeˍliˆ geh yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:25 Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ lehˬ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ feu piˇ ve," 
Acts23:26 Kaˍlawˇdiˆ Luˇsiˆ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ Hpeˍliˆ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:27 Chaw chi teˇ gʼa hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hpeh yuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ kʼai leh, yawˇ Roˉma‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve pa taw yawˇ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:28 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ hkʼaˬ hkʼe taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ve jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ geh ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:29 Suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, htawnˍ hkʼaw geh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ maˇ taˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ceh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:30 Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ shu gu taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ geh peu laˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ venˇ baˆ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ awˬ lawn kʼoˆ tuˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:31 Hkʼe teˇ leh, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Anˍtiˇpaˍriˆ venˇ hkʼa gaˬ tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:32 Shawˉ pawˍ teˇ nyi hkʼe Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ shiˍ kʼai tuˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teh taˉ leh, yawˇ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:33 Iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo gaˬ htaˇ, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ hta‸ li‸ piˇ leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ geh shiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts23:34 Mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ lehˬ, li‸ hta‸ gʼaw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ mvuhˇ miˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve le teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ htaˇ," 
Acts23:35 mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gaˬ la htaˇ, nawˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ na tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ Heˍroˆ ve hawˉ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haw taˍ tuˬ yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:1 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˇ nyi gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ Aˍnaˍniˆ geh awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ leh Teˍraˍtuˇluˆ meh ve tawˇ yaw puiˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ geh oˇ kaˬ lo laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ lawn kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:2 Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ jawˇmawˇ kuˬ teh taˍ peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Teˍraˍtuˇluˆ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui dawˇ sha gaˇ sha jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ leh, nawˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ pa taw chaw ceuˬ chi awˬ pon awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ da‸ la tuˬ nawˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:3 Chi hta‸ pa taw, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ kaˬ le le ngaˬ hui nawˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maw chaweh maˇ gʼa sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ, yeunˇ hkanˍ leh ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ tuˬ ve tawˇ teˇ nyiˇ hkawˇ hta‸ a ciˉ na laˇ sheˍ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:5 Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, haiˬ jaˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hpfuhˆ kʼai tuˬ ca juˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ kʼai ve Naˍzaˍrehˆ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:6 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ yawˇ coˇ caˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ leh yawˇ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Nawˬ awˬ to yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Teˍraˍtuˇluˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:9 Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh venˇbaˆ ga hpoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:10 Mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ tawˇ yaw tuˬ awˬ heˆ te maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ laiˉ hkʼaw‸ chaw ceuˬ chi awˬ hkʼoˆ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ te jaw ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ha kʼa yaw hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:11 Oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ ngaˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve, teˇ chi nyiˇ nyi awˬ hkʼoˆ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:12 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ leh chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te piˇ lawˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ mawˬ." 
Acts24:13 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ taˍ ve awˬ lawn, nawˬ hta‸ yuˬ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ maˇ cawˬ." 
Acts24:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe hteˇ lehˍ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ kʼai ve awˬ moˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ chi awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ngaˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ leh tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:15 Hteˇ ve chaw ka‸ maˇ hteˇ ve chaw ka‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ law ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ cuˇ leh dawˇ law ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:16 Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ ngaˬ coˇ caˇ leh te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:17 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ a ciˉ maw chaweh ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ leh tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ yuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:18 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ liˇ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te chehˇ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh," 
Acts24:19 yawˇ hui lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ taˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui laˬ leh kʼoˆ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:20 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ tu huˉ ve teˇ yanˇ, Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ pa taw ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸," 
Acts24:21 ngaˬ bvuhˬ chaweh kʼoˆ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ kuiˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ tcuh-o teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:22 Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ lehˬ, Ya‸ kʼaw awˬ liˇ awˬ lawn hta‸ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ awˬ yanˇ jiˆ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ Luˇsiˆ gaˬ la htaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ jehˬ cheˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:23 Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ shaw taˍ tuˬ, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ lehˬ ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh maˇ te leh, yawˇ loˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ taˇ tawˍ taˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:24 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw gaˬ leh, jawˇ mawˇ Hpeˍliˆ lehˬ, Duˍsiˆleˍ meh ve yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma geh teˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ ma yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ lawn kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ na ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:25 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ ve awˬ lawn leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gaˬ la tuˬ ve suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ lawn kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ kawˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi beu‸ kʼo‸-e sheˍ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:26 Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hta‸ hpu pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yawˇ dawˇ law ve pa taw, laiˉ pawˆ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kuˬ leh na‸ uˉ te da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts24:27 Nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ biˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Hpeˍliˆ jawˇ mawˇ te kuiˬ lo Pawˇkiˆ Hpeˍtuˆ jawˇmawˇ ca te la ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve pa taw, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo haw taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:1 Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ lehˬ mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gaˬ la leh, shehˆ nyi gaˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo tu leh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:2 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ hoˉ awˬ naˬ teˇ hpaˍ Pawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn maˇ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ hta‸ hto piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:3 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ bon te leh Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo a ciˉ peu laˇ-oˆ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo yawˇ hui naˆ taˍ leh Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:4 Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo haw taˍ ve yoˬ. Maˇ maw maw ngaˬ awˬ to oˇ kaˬ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts25:5 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kʼai leh, chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo ca taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:6 Yawˇ yawˇ hui geh aˬ laˬ hkʼe teˇ chi nyi chehˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼo‸-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui leh, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ ca shiˍ veu laˇ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:7 Pawˇlu‸ gaˬ la htaˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo laˬ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ huˉ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ yuˬ maˍ piˇ maˇ gʼa ve htawˇ, uiˍ jaˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:8 Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ ve awˬ lawn kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ te ya‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve pa taw, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ, nawˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai gaˇ laˇ teh‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:10 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ huˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Choˬ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ laˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ to hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ te ya‸." 
Acts25:11 Ngaˬ te ya‸ leh suh keunˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te taˍ ve kʼo, suh ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ jaw kʼai. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ hui ve la‸ shehˍ hkʼaw ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ maˇ hpeh‸. Jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ geh kʼai tuˬ ngaˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ teh kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:12 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve jehˬ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ moˍ geh jehˬ da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Nawˬ jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ geh kʼai tuˬ lawˬ ve pa taw, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ geh nawˬ gʼa kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:13 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw gaˬ leh, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ leh awˬ miˇ ma Beˍraˍniˆ lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ Kehˉsaˍriˆ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:14 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ oˇ kaˬ lo a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ hto piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍliˆ htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:15 Ngaˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui leh Yuˇda‸ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn hto laˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ tuˬ yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:16 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Venˇ baˆ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ leh, venˇbaˆ taˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ maˇ gʼa yaw hkʼaw‸ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu la‸ hkʼaw chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ Roˉma‸ chaw hui awˬ liˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui choˬ kaˬ lo hpawnˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ awˬ yanˇ maˇ jiˆ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui leh, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ tuˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:18 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui tu leh chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ yawˇ hui maˇ taˍ." 
Acts25:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn leh, Yeˍsuˆ teh‸ meh ve suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn ceh tiˉ yawˇ geh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:20 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe na nyi tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve pa taw, Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ, nawˬ oˇ kaˬ lo kʼai gaˇ laˇ teh‸, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ na nyi ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lonˉ suhˉ taˆ laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon teh taˍ laˇ sheˍ teh‸ yawˇ lawˬ hkawˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ jawˇ mawˇ Kehˉsaˍ geh kʼai tcuh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ shaw taˍ tuˬ ngaˬ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:22 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ htaˇ, Shawˉ pawˍ nawˬ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:23 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi jawˇ mawˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ leh Beˍraˍniˆ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ jiˇ leh, ma‸ teˇ hinˉ poˍ hui leh, venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ve chaw uiˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ bawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Jawˇ mawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ tawˇ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ shu shiˍ veu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:24 Oˇ htaˇ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ leh choˬ kaˬ lo hpawnˬ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui mawˬ ve chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, choˬ kaˬ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ lawn Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ geh laˬ leh, Chi hpaˇ te‸ chehˇ maˇ keunˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts25:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lonˉ geh kʼai tuˬ lawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ kʼai tcuh tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
Acts25:26 Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ ve jawˇmawˇ lonˉ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ ti teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi peuˬ kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ bvuh‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ hui chi ma ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ-oˬ, leuˉ leh nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ veu laˇ peuˬ." 
Acts25:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ peu kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ li‸ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ bvuh‸ piˇ kʼo, a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˇ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:1 Oˇ htaˇ, jawˇmawˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ lawn kʼoˆ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ ve la‸ sheh che leh yawˇ ve awˬ lawn kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve," 
Acts26:2 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ-oˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ laˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ lawn, ya‸ nyi nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, yawˇ hui tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, a ciˉ yeunˇ hkanˍ leh ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ" 
Acts26:4 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ, ngaˬ yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve teˇ yanˇ hta‸ tanˬ leh, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ te ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:5 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hui ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui ve oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Hpaˍriˍsehˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hehnˇ jaˇ ve awˬ liˇ te ve teˇ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ gaˇ ve kʼo hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:6 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law ve pa taw, chi beu‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ choˬ kaˬ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:7 Ngaˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ coˇ caˇ leh Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ka ti‸ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ hui dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, dawˇ law taˍ ve oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:8 Suh peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yonˍ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui dawˇ ve le. 
Acts26:9 Naˍzaˍrehˆ chaw Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ te cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na dawˇ nyi jaw ve yoˬ. 
Acts26:10 Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ oˇ hkʼe te jaw ve yoˬ. Paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui geh a hkaw-anˬ gʼa peuˬ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui laiˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw haw taˍ ve yoˬ. Shu yawˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ htawˇ nyi ma cawˇ leh la‸ sheh chiˇ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:11 Bon yehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ laiˉ pawˆ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve yoˬ. Nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ beu‸ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, shu mvuhˇ shu miˬ ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:12 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui ngaˬ hta‸ kanˉ chi chiˇ a‸ laˇ leh a hkaw-anˬ pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:13 Ya‸ kʼaw kʼaˉ lo mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw tcuhˆ teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo mvuhˇ nyi a‸ kehˉ hehnˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ leh ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kʼai chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ hti la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:14 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ lo paiˍ taˍ htaˇ, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ yaw leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve, Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, Sawˉlu‸-oˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve le. Nuˇ juˆ tuˬ ve aˉ taˬ hta‸ nawˬ hteˆ ve lehˬ, nawˬ gʼa naˬ ve ceh tiˉ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:15 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ a shu le teh‸ ngaˬ na nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ." 
Acts26:16 Tu leh hteˇ lehˍ huˉ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve lehˬ, chi awˬ pon yoˬ. Nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ kanˉ te leh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:17 Yuˇda‸ chaw leh buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui mehˆ gʼa mawˬ la tuˬ, yawˇ hui geh ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼai tcuh leh, yawˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts26:18 Yawˇ hui mehˆ mawˬ la ve pa taw, naˆ ho‸ ve hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ lo laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, saˍtanˍ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ leh Gʼuiˬsha geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa ve hta‸ ka‸ gʼa leh ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh ka‸ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts26:19 Hkʼe te leh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ-oˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ na yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Acts26:20 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ leh Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ bon maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh, Gʼuiˬsha geh kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la leh, venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ te tuˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:21 Chi hta‸ pa taw, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ngaˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ Gʼuiˬsha ga laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ choˬ kaˬ lo gʼa huˉ taˍ leh, uiˍ ve i ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui leh Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:23 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ awˉ lawˉ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ lawn yawˇ hto piˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:24 Pawˇlu‸ chi hkʼe yaw hkʼaw‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ kʼoˆ ve, Pawˇlu‸-oˬ, nawˬ gʼuˇ kʼai peuˬ. Nawˬ li‸ maˇ maˇ henˇ ve pa taw nawˬ gʼuˇ kʼai ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:25 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ-oˬ, ngaˬ gʼuˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw hkawˇ hkʼa deh‸ nawˇ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:26 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ baˬ kuiˬ lo hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ ve pa taw, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ maˇ shiˍ maˇ mawˬ ve te ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:27 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ yonˍ ve laˇ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:28 Jawˇmawˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Teˇ hkui tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ nawˬ te ve law leˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:29 Pawˇlu‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ yanˇ ngeh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ yanˇ maw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ awˬ to ka‸, ya‸ nyi ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ka‸, sho caˆ hpeh taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:30 Oˇ htaˇ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ tu leh, mvuhˇ miˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ka‸, Beˍraˍniˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui geh mui taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ tu ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:31 Yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, tiˇ pehˍ keunˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hpeh taˍ keunˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts26:32 Jawˇmawˇ Aˍgiˇpaˆ lehˬ jawˇmawˇ Hpeˍtuˆ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw chi lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ geh kʼai tuˬ maˇ lawˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:1 Iˉtaˍliˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ gʼa ciˇ kʼai tuˬ jawˇmawˇ dawˇ cheˆ peuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hpeh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸, Awˇguˇtuˆ ma‸ teˇ ta‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve Yuˇluˆ meh ve ma‸ poˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:2 Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo cawˬ ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ lo kʼai tuˬ ve, Aˍdaˍmuˇtiˆ venˇ yaˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ciˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ve Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ venˇ yaˇ Aˍriˍtaˍhkuˆ htawˇ, ngaˬ hui geh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:3 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi ngaˬ hui Siˉdonˍ venˇ lo deh ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh kʼai tuˬ leh awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ, Yuˇluˆ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ leh a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:4 Ngaˬ hui oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ haw hpawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve pa taw, mvuhˇ haw maˇ htinˍ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo Kuˇpaˍruˆ conˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui peun leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:5 Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Paˍpuˇliˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ paˇ lo cawˬ ve laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ teˇ tawn hta‸ ngaˬ hui hpanˍ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Luˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Muˍraˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:6 Ma‸ poˍ lehˬ oˇ kaˬ Iˉtaˍliˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ mawˬ leh, ngaˬ hui hta‸ lo‸-e tcuh ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ venˇ yaˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:7 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ maw chaweh ngaˬ hui a yehˉ yehˉ kʼai leh, haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Kaˍniˆ venˇ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ hui lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ haw hpawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼaw‸ kʼai maˇ hpeh‸ leh, mvuhˇ haw maˇ htinˍ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo Kaˍreˍteˍ conˇ hta‸ peun leh Saˍmoˍneˍ venˇ hpawˇ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:8 Haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo conˇ oˇ ve awˬ paˇ lo ngaˬ hui kʼai leh, Laˍsehˇ venˇ hta‸ neˇ ve Nyi sha ve deh kuiˬ meh ve teˇ kaˬ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:9 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ maˇ maˇ peuˬ kʼai leh, caˇ tuˬ ce ve awˬ nyi ponˬ kʼai peuˬ ve pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ ve kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts27:10 Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ kʼai ve kʼo, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ leh mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa luˬ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui ve a sha‸ htawˇ gʼa shonˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ shiˍ dawˇ mawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ma‸ poˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ a‸ kehˉ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hoˉ leh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:12 Deh kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ kaˆ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ da‸ ve pa taw, oˇ kaˬ tawˆ kʼai leh, hpeh‸ ve kʼo Hpiˇniˆ venˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ deh kuiˬ lo gaˬ leh, mvuhˇ kaˆ ve awˬ yanˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ tuˬ chaw maˇ-awˍ ve nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Hpiˇniˆ venˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ deh kuiˬ gʼuiˬ kʼaweh‸ lehˬ, Kaˍreˍteˍ conˇ lo cawˬ leh, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ awˬ na teˇ ceˍ leh, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ awˬ hawˉ teˇ ceˍ lo mawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:13 Awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ ve mvuhˇ haw a yehˉ yehˉ meuˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ law taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la peuˬ teh‸ dawˇ leh, sho kʼuˉ kʼaweh‸ gʼawˬ tawˆ peuˬ hkaw‸ nawˉ, Kaˍreˍteˍ conˇ awˬ paˇ lo hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ maw maw gaˬ leh mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ awˬ na teˇ ceˍ lo laˬ ve mvuhˇ haw lonˉ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hpawˇ lo te leh gʼaˇ hte‸ meuˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:15 Mvuhˇ haw oˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ htinˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkanˍ maˇ gʼaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼe leˇ hpehˇ peu leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw meuˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:16 Kaˍlawˉdeˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve conˇ ehˉ, mvuhˇ haw maˇ hehnˇ jaˇ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo ngaˬ hui kʼai chehˇ htaˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ maˇ gʼa luˬ kʼai tuˬ, gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ hta‸ gʼawˬ yuˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lonˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gʼawˬ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:17 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lonˉ maˇ gʼa paˆ-e tuˬ, yawˇ hui aˉ caˆ hkeh yuˬ leh hkʼa deh‸ hpeh tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, shehˇ shiˍ hpoˆ lonˉ cawˬ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui ca hkanˉ taˍ puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ dawˇ haˍ ve pa taw, hpa peˆ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ ya‸-e leh, hkʼe leˇ mvuhˇ haw meuˆ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:18 Mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ hehnˇ jaˇ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ taˆ taˆ ya‸ ya‸ te ve pa taw, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi yawˇ hui taˆ taˍ ve mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:19 Shehˆ nyi gaˬ la htaˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:20 Awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ maw chaweh awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ nyi ka‸ meu‸ keu teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ maˇ tawˆ la ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ tcuhˉ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui gʼa pon tuˬ ve teh‸ dawˇ law kuiˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Acts27:21 Yawˇ hui caˇ tuˬ maˇ caˇ ve maw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui awˬ kʼaw ji lo tu huˉ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ ve hkʼawˇ hta‸ na leh keˍreˍteˍ conˇ lo maˇ tawˆ la sheˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, luˬ ve sheˆ ve chi hta‸ maˇ gʼa hpuˇ." 
Acts27:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼa ka‸ maˇ gʼa suh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ceh tiˉ luˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Acts27:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ leh ngaˬ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ya‸ puiˉ haˉ ngaˬ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Acts27:24 Pawˇlu‸-oˬ, taˇ kawˆ, Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lonˉ Kehˉsaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ gʼa tu huˉ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ geh teˇ geh haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ciˇ taˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha nawˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:25 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hui lehˬ, conˇ teˇ maˬ maˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gʼa hkanˉ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:27 Teˇ chi awˇ nyi teˇ haˉ gaˬ leh, ngaˬ hui Aˍdiˆ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, shehˍ kʼaw hkui htaˇ hkʼe gaˬ leh, ngaˬ hui miˬguiˬ teˇ peˆ peˆ hta‸ neˇ la peuˬ hehˉ teh‸, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw kanˉ te paˍ teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:28 Yawˇ hui iˉ kaˆ hta‸ tehˆ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, nyiˇ chi loˬ naˉ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ maw maw yawˇ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ tehˆ nyi htaˇ, teˇ chi ngaˇ loˬ naˉ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:29 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, haˉ pui hta‸ htinˍ heuˆ la puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ dawˇ haˍ ve pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ mehˍ hpawˇ lo sho kʼuˉ kʼaweh‸ awˍ lehˇ hpehˇ ya‸-e peuˬ leh, mvuhˇ haˆ haˆ htiˇ la tuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:30 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh hpaw-e tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˉ kʼoˍ hpawˇ lo sho kʼuˉ kʼaweh‸ hpehˇ ya‸-e ve hkʼe te leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ ya‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Acts27:31 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ ma‸ poˍ leh ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ponˬ maˇ hpeh‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:32 Oˇ htaˇ, ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ehˉ ve aˉ caˆ hkeh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˆ cheˆ leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼaw shi peu ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:33 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la paˇ neˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˍ caˇ tuˬ Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ hui dawˇ haˍ dawˇ hkiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo law chehˇ leh, caˇ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ caˇ ve, ya‸ nyi teˇ chi awˇ nyi gaˬ peuˬ." 
Acts27:34 Chi hta‸ pa taw, caˇ tuˬ caˇ-oˆ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkʼawˉ ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ uˉ hkeh mvuh teˇ mvuh ka‸ maˇ gʼa luˬ maˇ gʼa sheˆ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:35 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ peuˬ htaˇ, hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hkaoˍ monˇ hkʼeh‸ leh caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:36 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ ha lehˬ la leh caˇ tuˬ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:37 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ ciˇ taˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, 276 gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:38 Yawˇ hui hkʼa bvuhˆ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, caˬ shiˍ caˬ hkʼa hta‸ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ lawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:39 Mvuhˇ htiˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, miˬguiˬ oˇ ve teˇ peˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shehˇ shiˍ cawˬ ve gʼuiˬ kʼaweh‸ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, hpeh‸ ve kʼo haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo gʼa‸ kʼai tuˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:40 Hkʼe te leh, sho kʼuˉ kʼaweh‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼaw lo hpui baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ gʼa‸ tuˬ ve caˉ behˆ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh taˍ ve aˉ caˆ hkeh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ hpui sheˬ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˉ kʼoˍ hpawˇ ve hpa peˆ lonˉ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw meuˆ tuˬ chiˇ taˆ-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehˇ shiˍ cawˬ ve gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo gʼa‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:41 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, iˉ kaˆ maˇ naˉ kuiˬ lo miˬ pui diˬ hta‸ htinˍ heuˆ leh, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkanˉ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˉ kʼoˍ hpawˇ hkanˉ yeˬ jaˇ leh, a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ jiˆ. Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ mehˍ hpawˇ teˇ tawn hta‸ gʼuiˬ baˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ dawˆ leh paˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:42 Hpeh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ iˉ kaˆ lawehˇ leh hpaw tawˆ-e puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ haˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ jehˬ daˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:43 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ma‸ poˍ lonˉ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui jehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, iˉ kaˆ lawehˇ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw pawˆ lo‸-e leh, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo lawehˇ tawˆ-e tuˬ, ma‸ poˍ lonˉ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts27:44 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ suhˆ baˉ hta‸ ciˇ tuˬ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ciˇ tuˬ, yawˇ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa ponˬ leh, gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:1 Ngaˬ hui luˬ ve sheˆ ve hta‸ ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, conˇ oˇ ve Meˍleˍteˍ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:2 Conˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ jaˇ leh hkʼa deh‸ ga laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ yeˬ laˬ leh kaˆ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui aˬ miˍ ceh leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:3 Oˇ htaˇ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, suhˆ kʼaˉ ku-iˍ teˇ kʼa‸ gʼawˆ veu laˇ leh, aˬ miˍ hkʼaw keu ve teˇ yanˇ, aˬ miˍ chiˆ ve pa taw vuiˬ haiˬ teˇ hkeh tawˆ la leh, Pawˇlu‸ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ hawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:4 Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Pawˇlu‸ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ vuiˬ haiˬ hawˆ leh yu taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼa ponˬ htawˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ te‸ chehˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ teh‸ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:5 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, vuiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpi keu leh, yawˇ awˬ to te‸ chiˉ maˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:6 Yawˇ lehˬ awˬ to hpo‸ la tuˬ, maˇ heˆ kʼo, teˇ cawˬ haˉ paˍ suh-e tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ leh law nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maw chaweh law nyi chehˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ te‸ chiˉ maˇ hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ hkʼaˇ kʼaw‸ pa leh, Chaw chi hpaˇ lehˬ, gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:7 Chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve awˬ paˇ lo, conˇ awˬ hoˉ Puˍbaˍliˆ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ miˬguiˬ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ leh, shehˆ nyi hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ caˍ laˇ taw laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:8 Oˇ htaˇ Puˍbaˍliˆ ve awˬ pa lehˬ, kaˆ naˬ leh gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ nyi te ve pa taw zuh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ geh kʼai leh, bon lawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ leh, yawˇ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:9 Oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve pa taw, conˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw naˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ laˬ leh, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ gu na-e piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:10 Yawˇ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ maˇ yawˆ yan leh, ngaˬ hui haw lo‸ kʼoˍ kʼaw‸ ciˇ tawˆ-e ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo keu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:11 Shehˆ ha pa gaˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ venˇ yaˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui kʼaw‸ ciˇ tawˆ-e ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ kaˆ yanˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ conˇ oˇ ve teˇ maˬ lo deh taˍ ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ oˇ ve awˬ han lehˬ, yaˇ cehˬ kʼa gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ han hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:12 Suˇraˍkuˆ venˇ lo gaˬ leh, oˇ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hui shehˆ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:13 Ngaˬ hui oˇ kaˬ lo kʼaw‸ tawˆ kʼai leh, htawˇ kʼaw‸ nawˬ kʼaw‸ te kʼai leh, Reˍgiˍonˍ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ nyi, awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ ve mvuhˇ haw meuˆ la leh, nyiˇ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui Pawˇtaˍyawˇliˆ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:14 Oˇ kaˬ lo ngaˬ hui awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mawˬ da‸ leh, yawˇ hui geh suhˍ nyi chehˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe te kʼai leh, Roˉma‸ venˇ lo gaˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:15 Oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui laˬ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, Aˍpiˆ tcuh teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ kaˬ leh, Saˉ laˆ shehˆ yehˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ kaˬ lo hkʼa gaˬ laˬ leh, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ca ha‸ yuˬ la ve yoˬ. Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:16 Ngaˬ hui Roˉma‸ venˇ lo gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ shaw ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh hkʼa geh yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ chehˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:17 Shehˆ nyi gaˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ oˇ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hpawnˬ la htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ puˬ awˬ pi hui ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ te ya‸ htawˇ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ngaˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, Roˉma‸ chaw hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:18 Roˉma‸ chaw hui ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na nyi peuˬ htaˇ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ maˇ mawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ tawˍ taˍ ve pa taw, Kehˉsaˍ suhˉ taˆ laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ gʼa lawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe gʼa te lawˬ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ ngaˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Acts28:20 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ mawˬ leh tawˇ gʼa yaw da‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw sho caˆ chi hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:21 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ lawn Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ lo laˬ ve li‸ hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ gʼa jaw. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ awˬ lawn maˇ da‸ ve ca kʼoˆ ca kʼaoˍ la ve ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Acts28:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, shu hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ kʼai ve chaw awˬ moˍ chi hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ dawˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui kaˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:23 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui awˬ nyi tinˍ da‸ ve yoˬ. Tinˍ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la htaˇ, Pawˇlu‸ chehˇ taˍ kuiˬ lo chaw maˇ maˇ hpawnˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ shawˉ te leh mvuhˇ hpeu‸ hkʼa gaˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, yawˇ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ la tuˬ Moˉseˍ ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ leh tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:24 Yawˇ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ yonˍ la ve, ya‸ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ maˇ yonˍ." 
Acts28:25 Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ leh, tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ tawˆ kʼai sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ Pawˇlu‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Iˉsaˍyaˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, cawˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ," 
Acts28:26 Chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ geh kʼai leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa kaˇ ve htawˇ, na maˇ gʼa taˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa mawˬ ve htawˇ, maˇ shiˍ taˬ." 
Acts28:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui mehˆ shiˍ maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, naˍ paw maˇ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ, nyi ma hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, nyi ma maˇ kʼaw‸ pa leh ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa gu na-e tuˬ, chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ ve nyi ma heh leh, yawˇ hui ve naˍ paw maˇ na gaˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ me‸ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:28 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve chi, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ piˇ kʼai leh, yawˇ hui na tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ-o‸ teh‸, Pawˇlu‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, yawˇ ngaˍ taˍ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyiˇ hkʼaw‸ chehˇ leh, yawˇ geh hkʼa laˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Acts28:31 Yawˇ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ lawn bon maˍ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, a shu ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ tawˍ taˍ." 
Romans1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ Pawˇlu‸ yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ te tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ laˇ peuˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ peuˬ. 
Romans1:2 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh Li‸ hpu hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ tcuh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:3 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi lehˬ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ kʼo, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:4 Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸, kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ." 
Romans1:5 Yawˇ hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ ka‸, yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ te tuˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ peuˬ. Kanˉ chi ve lehˬ, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yonˍ leh na yuˬ tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:6 Nawˬ hui htawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve pa taw, chaw ceuˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui lo‸-e taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:7 Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve Roˉma‸ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans1:8 Awˉ lawˉ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ lawn bvuhˬ kʼai ve hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:9 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ pon ngaˬ ve nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ kanˉ te leh, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:10 Ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw ya‸ kʼaw teˇ caˆ caˆ tawˆ la leh nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:11 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼa mawˬ da‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ la tuˬ, Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ pehˬ laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:12 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ yonˍ ve leh nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ da‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui geh ngaˬ awˬ shiˍ gʼa taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui geh htawˇ ngaˬ awˬ shiˍ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ve, nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ ngaˬ laiˉ pawˆ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:14 Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hteunˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw ceuˬ chi ma ve hta‸ ngaˬ shaiˍ piˇ tuˬ jeˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:15 Hkʼe te leh, puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui Roˉma‸ venˇ yaˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ gu taˍ peuˬ." 
Romans1:16 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ tuˬ ngaˬ maˇ ya‸ taw. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui, hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:17 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ kʼaw‸ yonˍ maˇ la tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:18 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yonˍ leh maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ tawˍ taˍ tsuhˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans1:20 Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hpanˍ taˍ te taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ lawn mehˆ mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ te taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, co co taiˍ taiˍ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ ka‸, yawˇ co co taiˍ taiˍ Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ka‸, yawˇ hui dawˇ shiˍ dawˇ mawˬ la ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, maˇ shiˍ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Romans1:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh keunˍ ve hkʼe maˇ chiˇ uiˍ maˇ chiˇ mvuh. Yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ htawˇ maˇ shiˍ maˇ nawˇ. Yawˇ hui ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ leh naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:22 A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸, Ngaˬ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui chaw kʼaˍ chaw buiˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:23 Maˇ luˬ maˇ suh puiˉ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, luˬ puiˉ suh puiˉ ve chaw, ngaˆ, hkui sheh la‸ sheh awˍ lehˇ cawˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ, vuiˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ yawˇ hui ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:24 Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw cha‸ cha‸ chiˆ chiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te gaˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui te gʼaˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ haiˬ te da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ lawn hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui baˬ taˍ leh, te hpanˍ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon kanˉ te ve yoˬ. Te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ mvuh cawˇ ve yoˬ. A menˬ." 
Romans1:26 Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hui haiˬ ve hta‸ te gaˇ jaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hkʼe te tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, yawˇ hui ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, te keunˍ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, te maˇ keunˍ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:27 Hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh yawˇ hui maˇ kʼaw‸ zuh‸. Hawˉ hkʼaˆ chawˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te da‸ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ taw tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te da‸ leh, venˇ baˆ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:28 Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ gaˇ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ. Hkʼe te leh, maˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ la leh, maˇ keunˍ maˇ cawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:29 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve, haiˬ ve, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, shu hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te gaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ hkawehˉ puiˉ ve, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve, shu hta‸ ya‸ gaˇ puiˉ ve, shu hta‸ heˍ puiˉ ve, shu hta‸ nyi bawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:30 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, shu hta‸ hkʼawˇ deˇ ve chaw, shu hta‸ hkʼaiˉ ve chaw, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ canˇ ve chaw, caˆ muiˬ puiˉ ve chaw, nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve chaw, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh ve chaw, sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te puiˉ ve chaw leh, awˬ pa awˬ e hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:31 Yawˇ hui lehˬ maˇ dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ, ka ti‸ maˇ yeˬ puiˉ, shu hta‸ ha‸ cawˇ ve hkʼe maˇ ha‸ puiˉ leh, shu hta‸ maˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans1:32 Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa te ve chaw hui lehˬ, suh keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe shiˍ taˍ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ to te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, oˇ hkʼe te ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui nyi ma cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:1 Hkʼe te leh, shu hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ awˬ to ka‸ ca kʼoˆ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu hta‸ nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ awˬ to ka‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh shu hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸ venˇbaˆ kʼaw‸ taˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:2 Oˇ hkʼe te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ciˍ yanˍ ve lehˬ, hteˇ jaˇ cawˇ jaˇ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:3 Shu awˬ hkʼoˆ nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ awˬ to ka‸ te chehˇ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve laˇ." 
Romans2:4 Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve paw sha jaˇ ve awˬ bon te laˇ ve, yeunˇ hkanˍ ve leh, nyi ma dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve laˇ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon lehˬ, nawˬ venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ sheh kʼai laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
Romans2:5 Nawˬ nyi ma heh leh venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ pon, yawˇ nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ shaw hpoˆ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ tawˇ jehˬ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:6 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ te ve kanˉ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:7 Yeunˇ hkanˍ leh da‸ ve kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ, da‸ ve awˬ meh leh, maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ co ti‸ ha ti‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ leh, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ, hehnˇ jaˇ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:9 Haiˬ ve hta‸ hkʼa te ve chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh dawˇ tui‸ gaˇ tui‸ ve gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui, hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa te ve chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui, hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi."
