Romans2:12 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ leh venˇbaˆ hkʼa te ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ cawˬ taˍ leh venˇbaˆ hkʼa te ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo tawˇ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw hui ceh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:14 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve ka‸ yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui dawˇ shiˍ leh awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe te ve kʼo, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
Romans2:15 Yawˇ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, maˇ heˆ kʼo venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:16 Ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh, chaw yaˇ hui nyi ma hkʼaw faˉ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans2:17 Nawˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ nyi ma uiˍ chaweh te ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:18 Nawˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ gʼa henˇ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ shiˍ ve chaw leh, da‸ jaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ fuiˍ puiˉ pehˬ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:19 Nawˬ lehˬ mehˆ cuˉ ve chaw hui hta‸ sheh kʼai shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:20 Nawˬ lehˬ, maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sheh kʼai shehˍ hpaˇ te leh, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ te ve teh‸ nawˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ cawˬ ve teh‸ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:21 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve ka‸, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ maˍ leh laˇ. Shu ve mawˇ hta‸ taˇ hkʼawˇ teh‸ nawˬ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve ka‸, nawˬ awˬ to shu ve mawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˇ ve laˇ." 
Romans2:22 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ taˇ te teh‸ nawˬ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve ka‸, nawˬ awˬ to haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve laˇ. Shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ nawˬ cha‸ naˬ chehˇ ve ka‸, shaˉ ho‸ yehˬ hkʼaw cawˬ ve mawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼawˇ yuˬ ve laˇ." 
Romans2:23 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ gʼaˇ va leh nyi ma uiˍ ve ka‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ kʼaw‸ te ya‸ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ te luˬ ve laˇ." 
Romans2:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:25 Nawˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ ya‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve hkʼe kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans2:26 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve ka‸, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans2:27 Bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ leh awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve awˬ liˇ nawˬ cawˬ ve ka‸, nawˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve ka‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ venˇ baˆ taˍ laˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans2:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ ceh Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ ceh awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Romans2:29 Awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ ve li‸ mehˆ biˇ la tuˬ ceh shoˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Co ha leh nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe ve chaw hta‸ chaw yaˇ maˇ chiˇ mvuh htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:1 Hkʼe te leh Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, shu a‸ kehˉ awˬ bon hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ leuˉ ve le. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le." 
Romans3:2 Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:3 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ka ti‸ maˇ yeˬ htawˇ, aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Yawˇ hui ka ti‸ maˇ yeˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve ka ti‸ hta‸ te luˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ te luˬ taˬ." 
Romans3:4 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ hteˇ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nawˬ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ htaˇ, nawˬ gʼaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui ve maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te tawˆ la piˇ ve kʼo, kʼoˆ kuiˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ le. Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ leh ciˍ yanˍ laˇ ve lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te laˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. (Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ kʼoˆ jaw ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Romans3:6 Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ. Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ cawˇ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ miˬguiˬ yaˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te suhˉ jehˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Romans3:7 Ngaˬ heˍ ve hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ leuˉ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ la piˇ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ suhˉ taˆ chehˇ sheˍ le." 
Romans3:8 Da‸ ve tawˆ la tuˬ maˇ da‸ ve hta‸ te shaˍ teh‸, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve teh‸ yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼaiˉ chehˇ ve law. Oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve chaw hui ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:9 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ shu a‸ kehˉ da‸ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ venˇbaˆ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼoˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
Romans3:10 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw maˇ cawˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:11 Shiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ca ve chaw htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ 
Romans3:12 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ kʼai peuˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw maˇ cawˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:13 Yawˇ hui ve hkʼaw‸ hkʼaw lehˬ, hpaw taˍ ve tuˍ hpfuh hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve ha tehˍ lehˬ, heˍ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve meuˇ guiˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo vuiˬ haiˬ awˬ taw‸ ma cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:14 Yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo hkeu ve hkawˇ leh, nyi ma naˬ ve hkawˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:15 Shu ve awˬ suhˍ yuˬ sheˆ tuˬ yawˇ hui ve hkui sheh gehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Romans3:16 Yawˇ hui hkʼa kʼai kuiˬ lo, shu awˬ pon luˬ tuˬ sheˆ tuˬ leh dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ tuˬ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:17 Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ. 
Romans3:18 Yawˇ hui hkʼa nyi ve teˇ hpaˍ aw hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:19 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˇ teˇ hkʼawˇ ka‸ kʼaw‸ yaw tuˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:20 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬ sha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:21 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn chi ve hta‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ teˇ hpaˍ leh tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ." 
Romans3:22 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yonˍ ve pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, peun da‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
Romans3:23 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ venˇbaˆ te leh Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ maˇ mi taˬ. 
Romans3:24 Awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans3:25 Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ tanˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ leh, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ chaw yaˇ te ya‸ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ ciˍ yanˍ sheˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:26 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, chi beu‸ awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:27 Hkʼe te leh, nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ hkʼaˬ lo cawˬ le. Nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ le. Kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw laˇ. Maˇ heˆ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans3:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:29 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Yoˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui ve Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬ sha yawˇ hui hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui htawˇ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans3:31 Hkʼe te leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te luˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ te luˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ leuˉ leh yeˬ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:1 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ lawn hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ le." 
Romans4:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Romans4:3 Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve le. Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:4 Kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼaˇ hpfuhˇ gʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, shu yawˇ hta‸ awˬ bon te piˇ ve teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ. Yawˇ gʼa keunˍ ve pa taw gʼa ve teh‸ shawˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:5 Yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teh‸ shawˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Haiˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ yonˍ ve pa taw yoˬ. 
Romans4:6 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ kanˉ hta‸ maˇ nyi leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Daˍviˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:7 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ peuˬ leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ beh taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:8 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:9 Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ awˬ bon chi hta‸ gʼa ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui htawˇ gʼa ve laˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Aˍbraˍhanˍ yonˍ ve pa taw Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:10 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ teˇ yanˇ chi hkʼe shawˍ taˍ piˇ ve le. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ peuˬ htaˇ laˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo, maˇ shoˍ sheˍ htaˇ laˇ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ maˇ heˆ. Maˇ shoˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:11 Yawˇ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸, yawˇ yonˍ ve htaˬ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve hta‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ tuˬ, yawˇ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve awˬ heˆ hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve ka‸, yonˍ ve hta pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:12 Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ pa htawˇ yawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ sheˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸, yawˇ yonˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui htawˇ yonˍ leh yawˇ ve hkui ha awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:13 Aˍbraˍhanˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ shinˉ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yoˬ teh‸ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ ve chaw hui awˬ shinˉ hta‸ gʼa ve kʼo, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ leh, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve ka‸ luˬ kʼai peuˬ." 
Romans4:15 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Romans4:16 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ awˬ shinˉ hta‸ gʼa hpeh‸ leh, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha cuˇ leh awˬ shinˉ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ yonˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hui htawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans4:17 Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve awˬ lawn Li‸ hpu hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Chaw ceuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ ve awˬ pa ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ leh, maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeh‸ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˇ yonˍ leh, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:18 Chaw ceuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, dawˇ law kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ htawˇ, yawˇ yonˍ leh dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ lehˬ, oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans4:19 A sha‸ aˬ laˬ hkʼe teˇ ha hkʼaw‸ gaˬ leh, yawˇ awˬ to suh taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, Saˍraˇ htawˇ yaˇ hu yaˇ leh ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ nuˇ kʼai." 
Romans4:20 Gʼuiˬsha ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nyi htaˇ, yawˇ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ htawˇ dawˇ nawˬ dawˇ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ yonˍ ve awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:21 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe Gʼuiˬsha te hpeh‸ ve hta‸ Aˍbraˍhanˍ yonˍ yeˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Romans4:22 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans4:23 Yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe shawˍ taˍ ve teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ pon ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ." 
Romans4:24 Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon htawˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shawˍ taˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans4:25 Ngaˬ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hkanˍ suh leh, ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:1 Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:2 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw awˬ bon chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa lo‸ la leh gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law leh, ha lehˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:3 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ha lehˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:4 Yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve hta‸ pa taw da‸ ve hta‸ te puiˉ la ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve hta‸ te puiˉ ve pa taw ngaˬ hui dawˇ law puiˉ la ve hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. 
Romans5:5 Dawˇ law puiˉ ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngeuˍ keu laˇ peuˬ." 
Romans5:6 Ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ nuˇ jaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw haiˬ hui awˬ pon Hkri‸ hkanˍ suh ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:7 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw awˬ pon hkanˍ suh tuˬ ve chaw ca haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ pawˆ pawˆ chaw da‸ awˬ pon hkanˍ suh haˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ hehˉ. 
Romans5:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, Hkri‸ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon hkanˍ suh leh, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ha‸ ve hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maw laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:9 Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans5:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hkanˍ suh ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ la ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ la peuˬ ve kʼo, Yaˇ hpu te‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans5:11 Chi ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ sheˍ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha lehˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ la peuˬ. 
Romans5:12 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo venˇbaˆ lo‸ la leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw suh ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ venˇbaˆ te peuˬ ve pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:13 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ taˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo venˇbaˆ cawˬ taˍ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ sheˍ." 
Romans5:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Aˍdanˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh Moˉseˍ ve awˬ co-e hkʼa gaˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ te ya‸ ve lehˬ, Aˍdanˍ te ya‸ ve hta‸ maˇ shuˍ da‸ htawˇ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Aˍdanˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, te ya‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ shuˍ da‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ te ya‸ ve pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ gʼa suh ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon ka‸, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve awˬ bon ka‸, chaw maˇ ve awˬ pon leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:16 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ ya‸ ve hta‸ pa taw hpeh‸ la ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ shuˍ da‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ te ya‸ ve ka‸, suhˉ jehˬ leh ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, te ya‸ maˇ ve ka‸, hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:17 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ te ya‸ leh, te ya‸ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw suh ve teˇ ceuˬ uˉ peunˍ ve kʼo, maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ka‸, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ ka‸ gʼa ve chaw hui lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw te‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˉ leh gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans5:18 Hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ te ya‸ ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la leh, co ha gʼa te‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ na yuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ venˇbaˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ na yuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans5:20 Ya‸ ve jiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ la tuˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ lo‸ la ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ venˇbaˆ maˇ la ve teˇ kaˬ lo awˬ bon leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans5:21 Chi hta‸ pa taw, venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, suh ve hta‸ cuˇ leh uˉ peunˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ cuˇ leh uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:1 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Awˬ bon maˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼaw‸ kʼai tuˬ sheˍ laˇ. Maˇ kʼai taˬ." 
Romans6:2 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ hpawˇ suh peuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼaw‸ te‸ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Romans6:3 Ngaˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ suh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
Romans6:4 Hkʼe te leh, baˆtiˆsaˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkanˍ htaˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh suh leh tuˍ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ lehˬ, Awˬ pa ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ pa taw suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui htawˇ te‸ la leh chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh teˇ geh suh ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans6:6 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ ve awˬ ceˬ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ te leh, venˇbaˆ ve awˬ to luˬ kʼai tuˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ piˍ lehˬ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh peuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:7 Suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ tawˆ la peuˬ." 
Romans6:8 Ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh suh ve kʼo, yawˇ geh teˇ geh te‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:9 Hkri‸ lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve pa taw, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ yawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ suh leh, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ uˉ peunˍ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:10 Yawˇ hkanˍ suh ve lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpawˇ teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ hkanˍ suh leh, yawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hpawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:11 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ venˇbaˆ hpawˇ suh peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha hpawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ shawˍ taˍ-o‸." 
Romans6:12 Venˇbaˆ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ, nawˬ hui suh puiˉ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇ baˆ hta‸ taˇ uˉ peunˍ tcuh." 
Romans6:13 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ pon la‸ caˉ hkʼe yehˇ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ taˇ a‸ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ awˬ to Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ a‸ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ pon la‸ caˉ hkʼe yehˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ a‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans6:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ bon awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve pa taw, venˇbaˆ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Romans6:15 Hkʼe te leh hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ chehˇ leh awˬ bon awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ kʼaw‸ te tuˬ laˇ. Maˇ heˆ taˬ." 
Romans6:16 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ te tuˬ nawˬ hui ve awˬ to yawˇ hta‸ a‸ piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ nawˬ hui na yuˬ chehˇ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ te ve kʼo, gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, na yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ te ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans6:17 Nawˬ hui lehˬ venˇbaˆ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ jaw htawˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ na yuˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans6:18 Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ tawˆ la peuˬ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
Romans6:19 Nawˬ hui awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ceh dawˇ pawnˍ puiˉ ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te tuˬ leh, haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ haiˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ a‸ piˇ jaw ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ te tuˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans6:20 Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Romans6:21 Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te ve pa taw, awˬ bon hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa le. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui awˬ pon ya‸ taw tuˬ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ leh meuˇ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans6:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi beu‸ nawˬ hui lehˬ, venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ tawˆ la peuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve pa taw, naw hui da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon oˇ ve awˬ leh meuˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans6:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, venˇbaˆ te leh gʼa ve awˬ hpfuhˇ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼe leˇ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ bon lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans7:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ yawˇ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ shiˍ paˍ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Romans7:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ geh hpeh ka taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ awˬ hpawˇ suh peuˬ ve kʼo, awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ awˬ miˇ ma gʼa ponˬ peuˬ." 
Romans7:3 Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ maˇ suh sheˍ htaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve kʼo, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te shehˍ ma teh‸ shu yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ suh peuˬ ve kʼo, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ponˬ peuˬ ve pa taw, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ca heuˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te shehˍ ma maˇ heˆ." 
Romans7:4 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui Hkri‸ ve awˬ to geh teˇ geh suh peuˬ ve pa taw, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la hpeh‸ tuˬ, suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui heuˆ da‸ peuˬ." 
Romans7:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la tuˬ, venˇ baˆ te gaˇ ve nyi ma teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ te gaˇ ve nyi ma oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw nawˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ ponˬ peuˬ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui suh taˉ peuˬ ve pa taw, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui kanˉ te ve lehˬ, bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ piˍ awˬ hawˉ lo te ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve nyi ma awˬ suhˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:7 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ le. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ taˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ taˇ sheˉ lai teh‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, sheˉ lai ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ." 
Romans7:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ venˇbaˆ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa leh, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˉ lai ve laiˉ ceuˬ te tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ lehˬ suh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:9 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ gaˬ la htaˇ, venˇbaˆ te‸ la leh ngaˬ suh ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:10 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ ve teh‸ dawˇ ve ka‸, ngaˬ awˬ pon suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo venˇbaˆ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa leh, ngaˬ hta‸ heˍ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, oˇ ve hta‸ yehˇ leh ngaˬ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:12 Hkʼe te leh, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ htawˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve leh, da‸ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans7:13 Hkʼe te leh da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ suh tuˬ te laˇ ve laˇ. Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ taˬ. Venˇbaˆ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ, venˇbaˆ lehˬ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yehˇ leh ngaˬ hta‸ suh tuˬ te laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, piˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, venˇbaˆ hkʼaˬ ma haiˬ jaˇ ve hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:14 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, co ha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh, venˇbaˆ vuiˬ yuˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:15 Ngaˬ te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ca dawˇ maˇ tawˆ. Ngaˬ te gaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ te leh, ngaˬ canˇ jaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ te gaˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ te ve kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:17 Hkʼe te leh maˇ da‸ ve oˇ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ ngaˬ awˬ to te ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve venˇbaˆ te ve yoˬ. 
Romans7:18 Ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ to chi awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve hta‸ te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ htawˇ, da‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ te maˇ puiˉ." 
Romans7:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ te gaˇ ve ka‸ maˇ te. Maˇ te gaˇ ve awˬ haiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:20 Ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ te ve kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ to oˇ ve hta‸ te ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve venˇbaˆ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:21 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ da‸ ve hta‸ te gaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ haiˬ teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:22 Ngaˬ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo tiˉ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ liˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ liˇ chi teˇ maˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ chehˇ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hpeh kʼai tuˬ ka‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans7:24 Ngaˬ lehˬ hpeh‸ bawˬ jaˇ, dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ suh piˇ lawˬ puiˉ ve awˬ to chi awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu ponˬ laˇ tuˬ le." 
Romans7:25 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ponˬ laˇ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ cawˇ ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ cawˇ ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:1 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chi beu‸ ciˍ yanˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Romans8:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo leh, suh ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ hpehˇ laˇ peuˬ." 
Romans8:3 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ pa taw, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh te maˇ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha te taˍ peuˬ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, venˇbaˆ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui awˬ to cawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ to cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:4 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ kʼai leh, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:6 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyi ma lehˬ, suh ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ dawˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyi ma lehˬ, co ha te‸ ve leh dawˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyi ma lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ canˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, chehˇ maˇ hpeh‸ taˬ." 
Romans8:8 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Romans8:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ tehˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ Hkri‸ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸." 
Romans8:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve kʼo, awˬ to lehˬ venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw suh peuˬ ve htawˇ, co ha lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:11 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui suh puiˉ ve awˬ to hta‸ htawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans8:12 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ geh jeˬ pfuhˇ taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Romans8:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh a sha‸ te‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh awˬ to te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suh piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans8:14 Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu shiˍ kʼai sheh kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kawˆ tuˬ, awˬ ceˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui awˬ yaˇ ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Aˍbaˆ a pa-oˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:16 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma geh teˇ geh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. 
Romans8:17 Awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh awˬ shinˉ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa caˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans8:18 Chi beu‸ teˇ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ tehˆ nyi maˇ keunˍ ve teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:19 Hpanˍ taˍ te taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ, dawˇ law jaˇ leh law chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hpanˍ taˍ te taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ te maˇ gʼa ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ chehˇ gaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh shehˍ hpaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:21 Hpanˍ taˍ te taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, luˬ ve sheˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ te ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ponˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ hui dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:22 Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ hpanˍ taˍ teˍtaˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, teˇ geh hkʼanˇ chehˇ leh, teˇ geh tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:23 Hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ha hpu ve awˬ bon hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa peuˬ ve ngaˬ hui htawˇ, awˬ yaˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ la leh, awˬ to chi htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui law chehˇ htaˇ, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼanˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Dawˇ law taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve kʼo, kʼaw‸ dawˇ law tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ a shu teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ law tuˬ sheˍ le." 
Romans8:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui maˇ mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve kʼo, oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ leh law chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:26 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu ga laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui bon hkʼaˬ hkʼe te lawˬ cawˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ shiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ hkʼanˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui awˬ pon lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hkʼanˇ ve lehˬ, tawˇ yaw maˇ tawˆ leh hkʼanˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:27 Nyi ma hta‸ ca nyi shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui awˬ pon Awˬ ha hpu lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:28 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼa ha‸ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ yawˇ te tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬ sha yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:29 Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi maˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yaˇ uiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha te ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:30 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ fuiˍ teh taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ, yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ, yawˇ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:31 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hpawˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, a shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˍ da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
Romans8:32 Yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ponˬ piˇ leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu geh teˇ geh hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans8:33 Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ a shu venˇbaˆ taˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ. 
Romans8:34 Venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve teh‸ a shu suhˉ taˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Hkanˍ suh shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ. Yawˇ hkanˍ suh ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo chehˇ taˍ leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon lawˬ hkawˉ chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans8:35 Hkri‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, a shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ yuˬ hpaˆ laˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve, dawˇ tui‸ gaˇ tui‸ ve, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve, meu‸ ve kaˆ ve, veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve, kawˆ tuˬ ve, aˉ hte‸ aˉ htaw, chi teˇ hpaˍ laˇ." 
Romans8:36 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nawˬ awˬ pon teˇ nyi tanˇ vanˇ ngaˬ hui tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ awˬ pon teh taˍ ve yawˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ shu shawˍ taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans8:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui leuˉ leh gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
Romans8:38 Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ cawˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Romans8:39 kanˇ paˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, naˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ yuˬ hpaˆ laˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ ngaˬ yonˍ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:1 Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ heˍ ve maˇ heˆ. 
Romans9:2 Ngaˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ leh, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ nyi ma haw haw chiˆ chiˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma htawˇ, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh awˬ lawn chi hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui awˬ pon, ngaˬ awˬ to Hkri‸ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh hkeu ve hta‸ hkanˍ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:4 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ gʼa ve maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ka ti‸ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui ve hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:5 Awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ shawˍ kʼo, Hkri‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui ve chaw ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ chehˇ leh, co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ bon uiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. A menˬ." 
Romans9:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ luˬ kʼai ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw awˬ tehˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Romans9:7 Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Iˉcaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ shawˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Romans9:8 Kʼoˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui ceh tiˉ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Nehˉ hkʼaw‸ chi teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ htaˇ, Saˍraˇ lehˬ yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:10 Oˇ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Reˍbehˆka‸ htawˇ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Iˉcaˆ hta‸ heuˆ leh yaˇ hu chehˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ maˇ paw la sheˍ." 
Romans9:11 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ da‸ ve kanˉ ka‸ maˇ da‸ ve kanˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa te sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha chaw yaˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve lehˬ, kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ gʼa luˬ tuˬ, kuˬ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ chaw hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, awˬ e hta‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Romans9:12 Awˬ viˉ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:13 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yaˍkoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ ha‸ leh Iˉsawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ canˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:14 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ taˬ." 
Romans9:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ Moˉseˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Ngaˬ awˬ bon te piˇ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ awˬ bon te piˇ leh, ngaˬ ha kʼaˉ piˇ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha kʼaˉ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:16 Heuˆ gaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha awˬ bon te piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ gʼa ve yoˬ. 
Romans9:17 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw jawˇmawˇ Hpaˍrawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve kanˇ paˆ hpeu‸ tawˆ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve awˬ meh bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:18 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ bon te piˇ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ yawˇ te piˇ leh, nyi ma heh piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ yawˇ heh piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:19 Hkʼe te leh, aˬ hto‸ ma te Gʼuiˬsha venˇbaˆ kʼaw‸ taˍ laˇ sheˍ le. Yawˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ a shu tawˍ taˍ gʼa tuˬ le teh‸ nawˬ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans9:20 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tawˇ kʼaw‸ shaˬ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw le. Te taˍ ve mawˇ lehˬ, te shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸, Aˬ hto‸ ma te ngaˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe te laˇ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ laˇ." 
Romans9:21 Mu‸ hkʼu te shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, mu‸ hkʼu te tuˬ ve je‸ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Je‸ teˇ diˬ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve awˬ pon yehˇ tuˬ ve mu‸ hkʼu teˇ shiˍ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ pon yehˇ tuˬ ve mu‸ hkʼu teˇ shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ te hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans9:22 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ maw piˇ tuˬ leh, yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve mu‸ hkʼu teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ leh yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le." 
Romans9:23 Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ tuˬ ve awˬ pon awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ gu taˍ ve, yawˇ ha kʼaˉ ve mu‸ hkʼu teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ hkʼaˬ ma maˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le." 
Romans9:24 Yawˇ hkʼa kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve muˬ hkʼu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ kuˬ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:25 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Hawˇseˍ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ maˇ heˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, maˇ ha‸ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ ha‸ ve yaˇ miˇ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans9:26 Yawˇ hui hta‸, Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans9:27 Iˉsaˍyaˆ htawˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ awˬ lawn bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ ve shehˇ shiˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ ve htawˇ, chaw a ciˉ ceh tiˉ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans9:28 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ haˆ haˆ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:29 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ maˇ teh taˉ laˇ ve kʼo, Sawˉdonˍ venˇ hkʼe ngaˬ hui hpeh‸ leh, Gawˇmawˇra‸ venˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:30 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ ca ve htawˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa peuˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yonˍ leh gʼa ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans9:31 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ca ve htawˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te biˇ maˇ gʼa." 
Romans9:32 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, yonˍ ve hta‸ maˇ cuˇ leh kanˉ hta‸ ceh tiˉ cuˇ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans9:33 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nyi loˬ. Chaw yaˇ hkui htiˇ poˬ tuˬ ve haˉ pui leh, paiˍ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ Ziˉonˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kawˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu hkui htiˇ poˬ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui htawˇ hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ. Iˉsaˍ reˍlaˆ chaw hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ nyi ma cawˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui shiˍ leh te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Romans10:3 Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ leh, a shu yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ yeˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ te ve pa taw, yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Hkri‸ lehˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ te leh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:5 Moˉseˍ bvuh‸ taˍ ve lehˬ, Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo a shu taˆ-e tuˬ le. Naˉ jaˇ kuiˬ lo a shu ya‸-e tuˬ le teh‸ nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ dawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:7 (Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ hta‸ ca shiˍ ya‸ la tuˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo a shu taˆ-e tuˬ le. Hkri‸ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ, naˉ jaˇ kuiˬ lo a shu ya‸-e tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Romans10:8 Hkʼe te leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve le. Tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ neˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, nawˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. (Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Romans10:9 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw hkanˍ yuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo yonˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans10:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ lehˬ nyi ma hkʼaw yonˍ ve pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la leh, maw‸ kʼaw hkanˍ yuˬ ve pa taw htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:11 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw peun da‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa kuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ bon hkʼa biˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ hkʼa kuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans10:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kuˬ tuˬ le. Yawˇ awˬ lawn maˇ gʼa kaˇ jaw ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te yonˍ tuˬ le. Maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te gʼa kaˇ tuˬ le." 
Romans10:15 Chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼai tcuh ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve hkui sheh lehˬ, hkʼaˬ ma nyi sha jaˇ ve le teh‸ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍyaˆ kʼoˆ ve, Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ a shu yonˍ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:17 Hkʼe te leh yonˍ ve lehˬ, gʼa kaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ. Gʼa kaˇ ve htawˇ, Hkri‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ shu hto laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans10:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa kaˇ leh laˇ. Gʼa kaˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve awˬ hkawˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai leh, yawˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ, gaˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:19 Teˇ pawˆ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ na nyi ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui maˇ shiˍ leh laˇ. Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇmiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkawehˉ tuˬ ngaˬ te leh, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:20 Iˉsaˍyaˆ htawˇ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ ca ve chaw hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn maˇ na nyi ve chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn shiˍ piˇ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans10:21 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ lawn yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Maˇ na yuˬ leh tawˇ kʼaw‸ shaˬ puiˉ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ, teˇ nyi tanˇ vanˇ ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh che law taˍ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:1 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ na nyi ve, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ peuˬ laˇ. Maˇ baˬ taˉ taˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hpeh‸ leh, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Beˍyaˍmenˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:2 Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ taˍ ve, yawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ baˬ taˉ ve maˇ heˆ. Eˇliˇya‸ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Romans11:3 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ yawˇ hui tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ tanˇ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ hui duˇ baˬ peuˬ. Ngaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ taˉ leh, ngaˬ hta‸ ka‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui ca chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
Romans11:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve le. Baˍlaˆ shaˉ ho‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ maˇ teh ve chaw suhˍ hinˉ gʼaˇ ngaˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ teh taˍ sheˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:5 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chi beu‸ awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw a ciˉ cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:6 Awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw leuˆ yuˬ ve kʼo, kanˉ te ve hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸. Kanˉ te ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼo, awˬ bon oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ bon maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:7 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui ca ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa. Leuˆ yuˬ ve chaw hui ceh tiˉ gʼa leh, maˇ leuˆ yuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, nyi ma heh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:8 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ ve hkʼe, Ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ zuh‸ muiˉ jo ve nyi ma maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ mawˬ puiˉ ve mehˆ shiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ kaˇ puiˉ ve naˍ paw maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:9 Daˍviˆ htawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui ve hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon pehˍ htaw taˍ ve, va htaw taˍ ve, ce lo‸-e tuˬ paˆ te taˍ ve leh, yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ cawˇ ve ciˍ yanˍ tuˬ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans11:10 Yawˇ hui mehˆ maˇ mawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Yawˇ hui ve caw‸ htawˇ hkʼaˬ htaˇ ka‸ kʼaw‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:11 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ na nyi ve, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, paiˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ hkui htiˇ poˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ taˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui ya‸ ve jiˆ ve hta‸ pa taw buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hkawehˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:12 Yawˇ hui ya‸ ve jiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ paw sha la piˇ lawˬ leh, yawˇ hui shonˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ paw sha la piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hkʼa biˇ lo‸ la htaˇ, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh hkʼaˬ ma kʼaw‸ paw sha la piˇ lawˬ tuˬ ve le." 
Romans11:13 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, kanˉ chi ve hta‸ ngaˬ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:14 Ngaˬ kanˉ chi ve hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh ve lehˬ, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hkawehˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ la leh, yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ baˬ taˍ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ la ve kʼo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans11:16 Awˉ lawˉ tanˇ piˇ ve hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ tcuhˇ teˇ diˬ ehˉ da‸ kehˬ ve kʼo, hkaoˍ monˇ teˇ diˬ lonˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ ka‸ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ geu teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:17 Awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˆ baˬ leh, nawˬ hui shaˍlonˍ awˬ hteunˍ ve awˬ kʼaˉ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, shaˍlonˍ meuˇ cehˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui caˉ da‸ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ geh awˬ tcuhˇ hta‸ gʼa caˇ ve kʼo, tawˆ baˬ taˍ ve awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ nyi ma taˇ uiˍ." 
Romans11:18 Nawˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ ve kʼo, chi hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Nawˬ awˬ geu hta‸ kanˬ chiˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ, awˬ geu nawˬ hta‸ kanˬ chiˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:19 Ngaˬ awˬ cehˬ hta‸ gʼa caˉ da‸ tuˬ, awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˆ baˬ peuˬ teh‸, nawˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:20 Yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw tawˆ baˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nyi ma taˇ uiˍ. Kawˆ ve nyi ma cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans11:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ shaˍlonˍ meuˇ awˬ kʼaˉ hta‸ maˇ teh taˍ piˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ htawˇ teh taˍ laˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Romans11:22 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh yawˇ hehnˇ chaweh te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Paiˍ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hehnˇ chaweh te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ yawˇ ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ maˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ htawˇ tawˆ baˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans11:23 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, maˇ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ chehˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve kʼo, awˬ cehˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha te puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ liˇ maˇ heˆ htawˇ, shaˍlonˍ cehˬ awˬ hteunˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ tawˆ yuˬ leh, shaˍlonˍ meuˇ cehˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ ve kʼo, shaˍlonˍ meuˇ awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve shaˍlonˍ meuˇ cehˬ hta‸ leuˉ leh kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Romans11:25 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa cuˇ tuˬ, faˉ taˍ ve awˬ lawn chi nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lo‸ la maˇ biˇ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nyi ma heh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:26 Hkʼe te leh, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui hkʼa peu-eˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Ponˬ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Ziˉonˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, Yaˍkoˆ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans11:27 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, chi ve lehˬ yawˇ hui geh ngaˬ te tuˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:28 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬ sha ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve lehˬ, awˬ puˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ yawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ yuˬ hkʼaw‸. Yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hta‸ yawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ." 
Romans11:30 Nawˬ hui awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui maˇ na yuˬ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
Romans11:31 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui ha kʼaˉ ve hta‸ gʼa ve pa taw, yawˇ hui htawˇ ha kʼaˉ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, chi beu‸ yawˇ hui maˇ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:32 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haw tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans11:33 Gʼuiˬsha ve uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ leh shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, hkʼaˬ ma naˉ jaˇ ve le. Gʼuiˬsha suhˉ taˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu ka‸ ca dawˇ maˇ gaˬ. Yawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu ka‸ ca maˇ mawˬ." 
Romans11:34 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve nyi ma hta‸ a shu shiˍ ve le. Yawˇ hta‸ a shu maˍ piˇ jehˬ piˇ jaw ve le. 
Romans11:35 Gʼuiˬsha awˬ bon kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ, a shu yawˇ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ awˬ bon te piˇ jaw ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le lehˬ," 
Romans11:36 yawˇ lo laˬ ve, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw cawˬ la ve leh, yawˇ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Co co taiˍ taiˍ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Romans12:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ bon teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ naw hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve, da‸ kehˬ ve leh, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve tanˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ-oˆ. Chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui te keunˍ ve oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans12:2 Chi miˬguiˬ yaˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ kʼai. Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ jaˇ ve, nyi ma cawˇ jaˇ ve leh biˇ jaˇ ve a loˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh fuiˍ da‸ gʼa tuˬ, nyi ma awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ pa leh, chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans12:3 Ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn dawˇ keunˍ dawˇ cawˇ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh taˇ dawˇ. Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ pehˬ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, dawˇ keunˍ dawˇ cawˇ ve hkʼe ceh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn dawˇ nyi-o." 
Romans12:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ hkʼeun maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼeun oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, kanˉ te ve maˇ shuˍ da‸." 
Romans12:5 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui chaw maˇ ve htawˇ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ caˉ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans12:6 Ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ peun da‸ ve yoˬ. Bon maˍ paˍ te tuˬ ve awˬ bon gʼa ve kʼo, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve hkʼe bon maˍ paˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ te-o." 
Romans12:7 Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ ve awˬ bon gʼa ve kʼo, ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te-o. Maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ te ve chaw lehˬ, maˍ piˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te-o." 
Romans12:8 Shu hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te-o. Shu hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve chaw lehˬ, ha lehˬ ha kʼa maˇ chaweh pehˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hoˉ te ve chaw lehˬ, gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ leh te-o. Ha kʼaˉ piˇ ve chaw lehˬ, ha lehˬ ha kʼa te leh ha kʼaˉ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans12:9 Nawˬ hui ha‸ ve lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cha‸ loˬ. Da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸." 
Romans12:10 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ha‸ da‸ ve hkʼe teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˇ taˍ uiˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ shu hta‸ taˍ uiˍ piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans12:11 Coˇ caˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ taˇ nuˇ piˇ. Nyi ma pfuhˇ leh Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon kanˉ gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o. 
Romans12:12 Dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ tcuhˉ taˍ-o‸." 
Romans12:13 Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ loˍ ve hkʼe pehˬ piˇ ga piˇ-oˆ. Hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ. 
Romans12:14 Nawˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ na‸ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ taˇ hkeu piˇ. Na‸ piˇ ve ceh tiˉ te-o. 
Romans12:15 Ha lehˬ ve chaw hui geh teˇ geh ha lehˬ-o‸. Hawˬ ve chaw hui geh teˇ geh hawˬ-o‸. 
Romans12:16 Teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ nyi ma htaˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Uiˍ gaˇ mvuh gaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ dawˇ. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh awˬ chawˇ te-o. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve teh‸ taˇ dawˇ. 
Romans12:17 Shu haiˬ ve te laˇ htawˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ awˬ haiˬ taˇ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ da‸ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ tiˉ te tuˬ dawˇ nyi taˍ-o‸." 
Romans12:18 Te hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ te chehˇ-oˆ." 
Romans12:19 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ te ya‸ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui taˇ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ. Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ leh te hkʼaw‸ tuˬ awˬ pon teh taˍ piˇ-oˆ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve kanˉ yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans12:20 Hkʼe te leh nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ awˍ meu‸ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ caˍ piˇ-oˆ. Iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve kʼo, taw piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, yawˇ ya‸ taw jaˇ leh mehˆ hpfuhˇ haw tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans12:21 Haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ taˇ gʼaˇ piˇ lawˬ. Da‸ ve hta‸ cuˇ leh haiˬ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. 
Romans13:1 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha geh gʼa ve maˇ heˆ kʼo, uˉ peunˍ tuˬ kanˇ paˆ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui cawˬ taˍ ve kanˇ paˆ teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans13:2 Hkʼe te leh, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha teh taˍ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Tawˍ taˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans13:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ gaˇ laˇ. Da‸ ve hta‸ te-o. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans13:4 Nawˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve kʼo, kawˆ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ aˉ htaw hkʼe leˇ pfuhˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ haiˬ hkʼa te ve chaw hui hta‸ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans13:5 Hkʼe te leh, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma htawˇ, dawˇ sha hpeh‸ tuˬ hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Romans13:6 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui a moˇ ka‸ keu piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh kanˉ chi ve hta‸ yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans13:7 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ piˇ keunˍ piˇ cawˇ ve hkʼe piˇ-oˆ. A moˇ shaw ve chaw hui hta‸ a moˇ keu piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hkawnˍ shaw ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ hkawnˍ keu piˇ-oˆ. Kawˆ keunˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ kawˆ-oˆ. Yawˆ yan keunˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˆ yan-o. 
Romans13:8 Jeˬ a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ pfuhˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ ve jeˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pfuhˇ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te biˇ peuˬ." 
Romans13:9 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ maˇ gʼa te, chaw hta‸ maˇ gʼa tiˇ pehˍ, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkʼawˇ, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa sheˉ lai teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu cawˬ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve teˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Romans13:10 Ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ awˬ haiˬ maˇ te. Hkʼe te leh, ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te biˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans13:11 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chi beu‸ awˬ yanˇ lehˬ nawˬ hui zuh‸ nawˇ la tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui awˉ lawˉ yonˍ gehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ a‸ kehˉ, chi beu‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ leuˉ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ neˇ la peuˬ." 
Romans13:12 Mvuhˇ hpeu‸ awˬ yanˇ peuˬ la paˇ neˇ leh, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, naˆ ho‸ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼehˆ baˬ taˉ leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve la‸ caˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ veu‸ deh-a veuˬ." 
Romans13:13 Ha lehˬ tuˬ te ponˬ te leuˉ leh tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te leh te ponˬ te leuˉ ve, shu hta‸ ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ leh hkawehˉ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ te. Mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw htaˇ te keunˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te-a veuˬ." 
Romans13:14 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ veu‸ deh-o. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai tuˬ te‸ chiˉ taˇ gu taˍ." 
Romans14:1 Yonˍ ve nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, dawˇ hkʼaˇ maˇ hawˍ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn yawˇ geh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ tuˬ awˬ pon ha‸ yuˬ ve taˇ te." 
Romans14:2 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ caˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yonˍ ve nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼawˇ hpa‸ mvuhˬ naweh hta‸ ceh tiˉ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:3 Teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ caˇ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ caˇ ve chaw hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa te. Maˇ caˇ ve chaw htawˇ, caˇ ve chaw hta‸ venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa taˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ." 
Romans14:4 Shu ve awˬ ceˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve nawˬ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw le. Yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa‸ kʼoˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve awˬ jawˇmawˇ hta‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, jawˇmawˇ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, jawˇmawˇ yawˇ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh tuˬ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:5 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ nyi nyi hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ taˍ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yoˬ teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ cheˆ loˬ." 
Romans14:6 Awˬ nyi hta‸ taˍ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh taˍ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh caˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh caˇ ve yoˬ. Maˇ caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo caˇ tuˬ ce leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon te‸ chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. A shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon suh ve maˇ heˆ." 
Romans14:8 Ngaˬ hui te‸ ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon te‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui suh ve htawˇ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon suh ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh te‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, suh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve mawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh peuˬ ve chaw hta‸ ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hta‸ ka‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ, Hkri‸ hkanˍ suh leh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:10 Nawˬ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve le. Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa gaˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans14:11 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ te‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hkui tcuhˉ teh leh, maw‸ kʼaw teˇ maˬ le le Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:12 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ gʼa kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans14:13 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ taˇ kʼaw‸ taˍ da‸. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ leh te ya‸ tuˬ ngaˬ maˇ te-o teh‸, nawˬ hui dawˇ cheˆ taˍ loˬ." 
Romans14:14 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ shiˍ leh yonˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ ve teh‸ yawˇ shawˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:15 Caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi gʼa dawˇ haˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ taˇ te luˬ piˇ. Yawˇ awˬ pon htawˇ Hkriˬ hkanˍ suh taˍ peuˬ." 
Romans14:16 Nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ taˇ cawˬ piˇ. 
Romans14:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve leh, ha lehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:18 Hkri‸ awˬ pon chi hkʼe kanˉ te ve chaw hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh leh, chaw yaˇ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:19 Hkʼe te leh cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ tuˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ uiˍ la mvuh la tuˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Romans14:20 Caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ hta‸ taˇ te luˬ piˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, caˇ ve hta‸ pa taw shu hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ ve kʼo, caˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ te ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:21 Shaˍ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ te ve htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, maˇ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:22 Nawˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ to leh Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ceh tiˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A shu yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ ve pa taw, ha lehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans14:23 Yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma htawˇ dawˇ nawˬ dawˇ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ caˇ ve kʼo, yonˍ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ leh caˇ ve pa taw, nyi ma hkʼaw suhˉ taˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ. Yonˍ ve hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:1 Ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ te leh, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hui gʼaˇ nuˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:2 Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ da‸ la uiˍ la tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ hui nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ te piˇ-a veuˬ." 
Romans15:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ htawˇ yawˇ awˬ to nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ te. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, yawˇ hui hkʼaiˉ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ hkʼa bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ leh Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ sha ve hta‸ gʼa ve pa taw, dawˇ law tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:5 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ htaˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ leh dawˇ sha piˇ puiˉ ve Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
Romans15:6 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ te leh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh hkawˇ teˇ hkawˇ tiˉ chiˇ mvuh hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans15:7 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, Hkri‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸." 
Romans15:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ pon Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh, awˬ puˍ lonˉ hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ teˇ hpaˍ yeˬ la tuˬ leh," 
Romans15:9 yawˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve hta‸ pa taw buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ, Hkri‸ lehˬ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Chi hta‸ pa taw, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh, nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:10 Teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yawˇ ve chaw hui geh teˇ geh ha lehˬ-o‸, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:11 Teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ sheˍ ve, Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh piˇ lawˬ-o‸, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:12 Iˉsaˍyaˆ htawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼoˆ ve, Yeˍsehˇ ve awˬ geu lo awˬ caˍ caˍ la tuˬ yoˬ. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yawˇ tawˆ la leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ law kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:13 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw, dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui biˇ la tuˬ, dawˇ law tuˬ cawˬ la piˇ ve Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ le le biˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans15:14 Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve chaw, shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ biˇ ve chaw leh, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ maˍ da‸ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:15 Ngaˬ lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve paw hkuˇ te tuˬ Gʼuiˬ sha ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh, li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:16 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ tanˇ tuˬ hkʼe Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:17 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui na yuˬ tuˬ, tawˇ yaw leh kanˉ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh te ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ lawn te‸ chiˉ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ ca kʼoˆ." 
Romans15:19 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ te leh Iˇluˇriˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa gaˬ, hkʼa caw zuhˇ Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ peuˬ." 
Romans15:20 Yehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hta‸ shu te taˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˉ te tuˬ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ gʼa kaˇ jaw sheˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:21 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ shu maˇ hto piˇ jaw htawˇ, yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ gʼa kaˇ jaw htawˇ, yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:22 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ maˇ gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ laiˉ pawˆ ngaˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:23 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te kuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ leh, laiˉ hkʼaw‸ nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ laˬ gaˇ jaˇ ve pa taw," 
Romans15:24 Saˍpenˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui geh ca guiˇ taˉ tuˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui geh teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ jaw awˬ chawˇ te da‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve lo nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ peu kʼai laˇ tuˬ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ, chi beu‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo ngaˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ mawˇ jeˬ pehˬ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa ga piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:27 Yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa ga piˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ bon kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, co ha hpawˇ Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve awˬ bon teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui htawˇ gʼa ve kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ga piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:28 Hkʼe te leh, kanˉ chi hta‸ ngaˬ te peuˬ leh, la‸ shawnˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nawˬ hui geh te leh Saˍpenˍ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Romans15:29 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la htaˇ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:30 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ ha hpu ve ha‸ da‸ pehnˇ da‸ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:31 Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw hui la‸ hkʼaw ngaˬ gʼa ponˬ leh, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ chaw hui awˬ pon ngaˬ gʼa te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Hkri‸ yaˇ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon bon ga lawˬ laˆ mehˍ." 
Romans15:32 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw ha lehˬ ha kʼa nawˬ hui geh gʼa gaˬ la tuˬ leh, nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ bon gʼaˇ hte‸ ga lawˬ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans15:33 Dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh chehˇ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Romans16:1 Keˍcheˍ venˇ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ga piˇ shehˍ ma hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ hui ve awˬ nyi ma Hpiˉbeˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh lo ngaˬ kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. 
Romans16:2 Hkri‸ yaˇ hui te keunˍ ve hkʼe, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi leh yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸. Yawˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ loˍ ve htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ga piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ ga piˇ peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ka‸ ga laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:3 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve kanˉ ga te ve Piˇkiˇlaˆ leh Aˍkuˉlaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans16:4 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ a sha‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon hkanˍ suh taˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ceh tiˉ chiˇ mvuh ve maˇ heˆ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:5 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ yaˇ awˉ lawˉ hpeh‸ la ve ngaˬ ha‸ ve Eˇpehˇnehˆ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans16:6 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon kanˉ gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve Maˍriˆ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans16:7 Ngaˬ geh htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ jaw ve, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ Aˍdawˇniˆ leh Yuˇniˆ hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, tcuh yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh bvuhˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
Romans16:8 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha‸ ve Aˍpaˍliˆ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans16:9 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Hkri‸ ve kanˉ te ve Uˇraˍbaˍ leh ngaˬ ha‸ ve Saˍtaˍhkuˆ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. 
Romans16:10 Hkʼa deh‸ lawˇ nyi peuˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ Aˍpeˍleˍ hta‸ ka‸, Aˍriˇtawˇbuˆ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:11 Ngaˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve Heˍroˍdiˍoˍ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Naˍkiˍsuˆ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ."
