Romans16:12 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon kanˉ te chehˇ ve Taˍruˇhpehˇnaˆ leh Taˍruˇ hpawˇsaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve ngaˬ ha‸ ve Peˍraˍsiˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:13 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve Ruˇhpuˆ leh ngaˬ ve awˬ e hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ ve, yawˇ ve awˬ e yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:14 Aˍsoˍkaˍreˆ, Hpaˍleˍgoˍ, Heˍraˍmeˍ, Paˇrawˇbaˆ, Heˍraˍmaˆ leh, yawˇ hui geh chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:15 Hpiˇlawˇluˆ, Yuˇliˆ, Neˍruˆ leh Neˍruˆ ve awˬ nyi ma Awˇloˍpaˆ leh, yawˇ hui geh chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:16 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo boˆ nu da‸ leh la‸ sheh caˉ da‸-o‸. Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:17 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ peuˬ ve maˍ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ hawˍ ve, hpaˆ da‸ tuˬ te puiˉ ve, shu ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh jaw kʼai-o teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Hkri‸ awˬ pon kanˉ te ve maˇ heˆ. A shu yawˇ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ pon ceh kanˉ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, na sha ve tawˇ leh chiˇ mvuh ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yehˇ leh, da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:19 Nawˬ hui na yuˬ puiˉ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ puiˉ leh, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:20 Maˇ maw maw kʼo, dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve hkui taw kʼaw awˬ hawˉ lo Saˍtanˍ hta‸ naˆ nehˆ sheˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Romans16:21 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ Tiˆmoˉseˍ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ Luˇkiˆ, Yaˍsonˍ leh Sawˇsiˇpaˍtaˆ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:22 Ngaˬ lehˬ, li‸ chi bvuh‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Teˍraˍtiˆ yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:23 Ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ yuˬ leh caˍ laˇ taw laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gaˍyuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Venˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw hpu ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ Eˇraˍtuˆ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Kawˍtuˆ htawˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ lawn ngaˬ bon maˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui hta‸ yeˬ la piˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve bon hkawˇ chi lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ chi lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ faˉ taˍ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la peuˬ." 
Romans16:26 Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yonˍ leh na yuˬ tuˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ Gʼuiˬsha tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, faˉ taˍ ve oˇ ve chi beu‸ tawˆ la peuˬ leh, tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve li‸ hta‸ pa taw faˉ taˍ ve oˇ ve hta‸ chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Romans16:27 Yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo co co taiˍ taiˍ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ. 
1Corinthians1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ Pawˇlu‸ yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, tcuh yaˇ te tuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:2 Nawˬ hui Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Suˇtenˍ, li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ. Teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve chaw hui, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ hkʼa kuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:3 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
1Corinthians1:4 Nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa peuˬ." 
1Corinthians1:5 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw, tawˇ yaw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shiˍ puiˉ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui biˇ la peuˬ." 
1Corinthians1:6 Hkri‸ awˬ lawn ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hkʼe cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ peuˬ. 
1Corinthians1:7 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve hta‸ law chehˇ htaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ yawnˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:8 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ yeˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:9 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ka ti‸ yeˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh nawˬ hui awˬ chawˇ gʼa te da‸ tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:10 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui tawˇ yaw da‸ ve hawˍ da‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ moˍ shawˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ ve taˇ cawˬ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ te leh, dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians1:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ Hkaˍlawˇiˆ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:12 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ Pawˇlu‸ ve chaw yoˬ, Ngaˬ lehˬ Aˍpawˇlu‸ ve chaw yoˬ, Ngaˬ lehˬ Keˍhpaˆ ve chaw yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ ve chaw yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:13 Hkri‸ lehˬ hpaˆ da‸ pehˬ da‸ taˍ ve leh laˇ. Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh ve leh laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Pawˇlu‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve leh laˇ." 
1Corinthians1:14 Kaˍliˇpuˆ leh Gaˍyuˆ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ maˇ piˇ ve pa taw ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:15 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians1:16 (Saˍteˍhpanˍ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi awˬ hkʼoˆ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hta‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ dawˇ nawˇ.) 
1Corinthians1:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, baˆtiˆsaˬ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ tcuh peu laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ tcuh peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ htaˇ, Hkri‸ ve la‸ ka kanˇ paˆ maˇ gʼa yawnˇ kʼai tuˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ uiˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw leh maˍ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians1:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, la‸ ka awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, la‸ ka lehˬ ngaˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:19 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hui ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te luˬ leh, shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve hta‸ ngaˬ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:20 Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hkʼaˬ lo le. Li‸ bvuh‸ paˍ hkʼaˬ lo le. Chi beu‸ awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ lawn laiˉ ceuˬ shiˍ leh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ paˍ hkʼaˬ lo le. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians1:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Chi lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve cuˇ yiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ shu shawˍ ve ngaˬ hui maˍ piˇ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:22 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ lawˬ leh, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hui lehˬ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh ve Hkri‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ lawn bon maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ pon hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ hpeh‸ leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon, Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve cuˇ yiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:25 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve gʼaˇ uiˍ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:26 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Miˬguiˬ hpawˇ hta‸ shawˍ kʼo, kuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hui maˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve chaw hui ka‸ maˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Jawˇmawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hui htawˇ maˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ ya‸ taw piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ya‸ taw piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:28 Cawˬ taˍ hpeh‸ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te mehˉ tuˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ, shu shawˍ baˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh, te‸ chiˉ maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:29 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians1:30 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve, da‸ ve kehˬ ve leh, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpeh‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians1:31 Hkʼe te leh, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Nyi ma uiˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ nyi ma uiˍ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ ca maˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ, na sha jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw leh cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh ngaˬ ca maˍ la ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians2:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ chehˇ htaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ leh, yawˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:3 Nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ chehˇ htaˇ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh kawˆ jaˇ cheˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:4 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa yeˬ tuˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ tuˬ," 
1Corinthians2:5 ngaˬ tawˇ yaw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, bon maˍ laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yehˇ leh beˬ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ ha hpu chehˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ leh, yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:6 Biˇ la peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Luˬ kʼai mehˉ kʼai tuˬ ve miˬguiˬ jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ ka‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. 
1Corinthians2:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ faˉ taˍ ve leh naˉ jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˍ ve yoˬ. Cuˇ yiˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, miˬguiˬ maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve cuˇ yiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:8 Cuˇ yiˍ chi hta‸ chi miˬguiˬ jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ. Yawˇ hui shiˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ve Awˬ jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians2:9 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hui awˬ pon yawˇ gu taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mehˆ shiˍ maˇ mawˬ jaw, naˍ paw maˇ kaˇ jaw leh, chaw yaˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo maˇ dawˇ shiˍ jaw ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ca nyi leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ ca nyi ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:11 Chaw yaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve nyi ma maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw yaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu maˇ heˆ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ a shu ka‸ shiˍ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians2:12 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ gʼa taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha ngaˬ hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ bon teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:13 Awˬ bon oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ chaw yaˇ maˍ laˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ha hpu maˍ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hui kʼaw‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Co ha hpawˇ awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ htaˇ, co ha hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians2:14 Co ha hpawˇ maˇ dawˇ pawnˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ pon cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Co ha hpawˇ ceh tiˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gʼa ve pa taw, yawˇ lehˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ puiˉ." 
1Corinthians2:15 Co ha hpawˇ dawˇ pawnˍ ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw oˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ maˇ gʼa." 
1Corinthians2:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ve nyi ma hta‸ a shu shiˍ ve le. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Hkri‸ ve nyi ma cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, co ha hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ maˇ hpeh‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ hpawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ caˉ da‸ ve chaw leh, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ ve chaw hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, heh ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ caˍ laˇ. Cuˉ gʼuiˬ ceh tiˉ nawˬ hui hta‸ taw laˇ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ ka‸, nawˬ hui heh ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ maˇ gʼa sheˍ." 
1Corinthians3:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ miˬguiˬ hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkawehˉ da‸ leh, ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ chehˇ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui te chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians3:4 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ ve chaw yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Ngaˬ Aˍpawˇlu‸ ve chaw yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve ceh ceh, nawˬ hui miˬguiˬ yaˇ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians3:5 Aˍpawˇlu‸ lehˬ a shu le. Pawˇlu‸ htawˇ a shu le. Nawˬ hui gʼa yonˍ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kanˉ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ htawˇ a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
1Corinthians3:6 Ngaˬ ti taˍ leh Aˍpawˇlu‸ iˉ kaˆ pfuhˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yeˬ la uiˍ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:7 Hkʼe te leh, ti shehˍ hpaˇ leh iˉ kaˆ pfuhˍ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ uiˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Yeˬ la uiˍ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ceh tiˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:8 Ti shehˍ hpaˇ leh iˉ kaˆ pfuhˍ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ te taˍ ve hkʼe, teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:9 Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve ti mi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:10 Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve yehˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼe yehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ te taˍ peuˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ caˉ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼaw‸ caˉ te ve hta‸ te shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ le le shaˍ ti‸ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, teh taˍ peuˬ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ teh taˍ maˇ gʼa." 
1Corinthians3:12 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ shi, hpu, haˉ pui shehnˉ, suhˆ, zuhˇ, chi gʼawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ caˉ te ve kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ kanˉ te taˍ ve hkʼe tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ, aˬ miˍ lehˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le ve kanˉ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le ve kanˉ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve kanˉ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ aˬ miˍ oˇ ve lawˇ nyi tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:14 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ caˉ te ve kanˉ yeˬ chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:15 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ bon lehˬ shonˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ awˬ to htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw gʼa ponˬ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:16 Nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
1Corinthians3:17 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ hta‸ te luˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ bon yehˬ oˇ ve hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:18 Chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˇ heˍ. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ chi miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ la tuˬ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians3:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, yawˇ hui cuˇ yiˍ te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:20 Teˇ kaˬ kʼaw‸ bvuh‸ taˍ sheˍ ve, Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hui ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:21 Hkʼe te leh, chaw yaˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma taˇ uiˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui ve hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:22 Pawˇlu‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Aˍpawˇlu‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Keˍhpaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ ve leh suh ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve leh awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui ve hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians3:23 Nawˬ hui Hkri‸ ve hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:1 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ shawˍ taˍ laˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:2 Ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ laˇ ve lehˬ, i jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸ suhˉ maˇ jehˬ." 
1Corinthians4:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ to ya‸ kuiˬ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ dawˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:5 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˉ taˇ taˆ sheˍ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ gaˬ la htaˇ naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ yawˇ te leh, chaw yaˇ ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, a shu yawˇ keunˍ ve hkʼe chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:6 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ leh Aˍpawˇlu‸ hta‸ nawˬ hui henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ tawˇ pa haˉ te maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ceh tiˉ nawˬ hui te tuˬ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe te maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu hta‸ peun da‸ tuˬ a shu nawˬ hta‸ te laˇ ve le. Gʼuiˬsha geh gʼa taˍ ve maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ aˬ hto‸ ma cawˬ le. Gʼuiˬsha geh gʼa taˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha geh maˇ gʼa ve hkʼe te leh aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve le." 
1Corinthians4:8 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh peuˬ leˇ. Chi beu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui paw sha la peuˬ leˇ. Ngaˬ hui maˇ heˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui uˉ peunˍ gʼa ve law leˇ. Nawˬ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na uˉ peunˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui htawˇ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ suhˉ taˆ peuˬ ve chaw hui hkʼe, Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ ngaˬ hui tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ leh meuˇ htaˇ maw piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon teh taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui leh chaw yaˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nyi guiˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ceh hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ awˬ pon cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, nawˬ hui lehˬ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, ngaˬ hui lehˬ shu shawˍ baˬ taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:11 Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˍ meu‸ ve, iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve, maˇ gʼa veu‸ maˇ gʼa deh ve, dawˆ ve tiˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ ti maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:12 Ngaˬ hui ve la‸ sheh kanˉ gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼa te caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ laˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui bon kʼaw‸ na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:13 Shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ laˇ htaˇ, kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ tuˬ ngaˬ hui lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ miˬguiˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼe ngaˬ hui hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ shu shiˆ baˬ taˍ ve awˬ puiˍ taˆ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:14 Nawˬ hui ya‸ taw tuˬ ngaˬ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ leh, shaˍ ti‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui saˍ la‸ awˬ meunˍ gʼaˇ hkʼe cawˬ htawˇ, awˬ pa laiˉ gʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ. Ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la piˇ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians4:16 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui te tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:17 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve, ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te ve awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:18 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh maˇ laˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ dawˇ leh nyi ma uiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
1Corinthians4:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ a loˍ cawˇ ve kʼo, maˇ maw maw ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ gaˬ la htaˇ, ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ ve lehˬ, nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ heˆ, yawˇ hui kanˇ paˆ cawˬ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, tawˇ yaw ve hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˇ paˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians4:21 Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe heuˆ gaˇ ve le. Ngaˬ lehˬ, suhˆ taˬ yuˬ leh gʼa laˬ tuˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve leh nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa laˬ tuˬ ve laˇ." 
1Corinthians5:1 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ hui geh ka‸ maˇ cawˬ jaw ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ awˬ pa ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ heuˆ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians5:2 Chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve ka‸ nawˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui dawˇ haˍ cawˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Chi hkʼe te ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. 
1Corinthians5:3 Ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ htawˇ, ngaˬ ve nyi ma nawˬ hui geh cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve hkʼe, chi hkʼe te ve chaw hta‸ chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ suhˉ taˆ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians5:4 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui leh ngaˬ ve nyi ma teˇ geh hpawnˬ da‸ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh chi hkʼe te loˬ." 
1Corinthians5:5 Te ya‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ te luˬ piˇ tuˬ, Saˍtanˍ la‸ hkʼaw lo chiˇ a‸ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve co ha lehˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians5:6 Nawˬ hui chi hkʼe nyi ma uiˍ ve lehˬ maˇ da‸. Diˇ a ciˉ ceh tiˉ hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ tcuhˇ teˇ diˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ciˇ la piˇ puiˉ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. 
1Corinthians5:7 Nawˬ hui diˇ maˇ cawˬ ve hkaoˍmonˇ awˬ suhˉ teˇ diˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ, diˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon tanˇ peuˬ ve Paˍsaˍhkaˍ yawˬ ehˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians5:8 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui pawehˇ caˇ htaˇ, diˇ awˬ piˍ hta‸ taˇ yehˇ. Haiˬ ve leh cha‸ chiˆ ve diˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ yehˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, diˇ maˇ cawˬ ve hkaoˍmonˇ, da‸ kehˬ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ-a veuˬ." 
1Corinthians5:9 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw hui geh awˬ chawˇ maˇ gʼa te teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ. 
1Corinthians5:10 Ngaˬ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai leh hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve chaw hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ chawˇ maˇ gʼa te teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Oˇ hkʼe yoˬ kʼo, nawˬ hui miˬguiˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa tawˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians5:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve, tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve leh, shu mawˇ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve chaw hui geh awˬ chawˇ maˇ gʼa te ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, chi hkʼe ve chaw geh awˍ ka‸ taˇ caˇ teh‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians5:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe caˉ da‸ ve le. Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ nawˬ hui suhˉ gʼa jehˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians5:13 Awˬ baˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ loˬ. 
1Corinthians6:1 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ tawˇ te da‸ tuˬ cawˬ htaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui geh maˇ kʼai leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ laˇ tuˬ lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ hui geh kʼai ve laˇ." 
1Corinthians6:2 Hkri‸ yaˇ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ kʼo, i jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui suhˉ jehˬ maˇ keunˍ leh laˇ." 
1Corinthians6:3 Nyiˬ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Hkʼe te leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˉ leh suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians6:4 Chi hkʼe ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ shawˍ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ te tcuh tuˬ, nawˬ hui teh taˍ ve laˇ." 
1Corinthians6:5 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui ya‸ taw tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ cawˇ da‸ ve awˬ kaˍ lo jehˬ cheˆ tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ leh laˇ." 
1Corinthians6:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ te da‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ka‸ tawˇ te da‸ ve law leˇ." 
1Corinthians6:7 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ te da‸ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui awˬ pon co ha hpawˇ shonˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shu te ya‸ laˇ ve hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui maˇ hkanˍ le. Shu nawˬ hui ve mawˇ heˍ caˇ laˇ ve hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui maˇ hkanˍ le." 
1Corinthians6:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui shu hta‸ te ya‸ leh heˍ caˇ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:9 Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e ve nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Nawˬ hui taˇ dawˇ ya‸. Guiˇ ya‸ ve chaw, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ puiˬ ve chaw, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chawˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai ve chaw," 
1Corinthians6:10 shu mawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˇ ve chaw, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw, tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve chaw, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve chaw leh, shu mawˇ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e." 
1Corinthians6:11 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ chi hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ jaw ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui tsuhˇ hkʼa peuˬ leh da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh leh ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ngaˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ bon cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ ceˬ te tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians6:13 Caˇ tuˬ lehˬ, gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ pon yoˬ. Gʼoˇ peˬ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, chi nyiˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te luˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ to lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:14 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yehˇ leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:15 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ leh meh maˬ lanˉ ve awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ taˬ." 
1Corinthians6:16 Meh maˬ lanˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ geh awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ geh co ha teˇ maˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:18 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve hta‸ jaw kʼai loˬ. Chaw yaˇ te ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu venˇbaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ te ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians6:19 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ve bon yehˬ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ leh nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ to lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve mawˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians6:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hpfuhˇ piˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ taˍ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians7:1 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ bvuh‸ laˇ shaˍ. Hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma maˇ heuˆ kʼo da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:2 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ cawˬ maˇ ve pa taw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ cawˇ leh, yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ le le htawˇ awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:3 Awˬ hpawˇ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ caˉ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ miˇ ma htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ caˉ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:4 Awˬ miˇ ma lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ maˇ uˉ peunˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hpawˇ uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ hpawˇ htawˇ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ maˇ uˉ peunˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ miˇ ma uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:5 Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ teˇ geh zuh‸ tuˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Bon hkʼa deh‸ lawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nyiˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nyi ma cawˇ leh teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ teˇ geh maˇ zuh‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ taˇ tawˍ taˍ. Awˬ to hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve pa taw, Saˍtanˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa beˬ tuˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ geh kʼaw‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ, a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve teˇceuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:7 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha geh a shu yawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:8 Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ maˇ heuˆ sheˍ ve chaw leh mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ngaˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te chehˇ ve kʼo da‸ ve yoˬ. 
1Corinthians7:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ ve kʼo, heuˆ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ gaˇ leh nyi ma haw haw chiˆ chiˆ hpeh‸ ve a‸ kehˉ heuˆ da‸ ve lehˬ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:10 Awˬ miˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hpaˆ da‸ teh‸, heuˆ da‸ peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ heˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hpaˆ da‸ peuˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ ca leh, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ chehˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ tuˬ te cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hpawˇ htawˇ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ maˇ gʼa baˬ." 
1Corinthians7:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ geh chehˇ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ baˬ cawˇ ve teh‸, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ chi ve hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ, ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:13 Awˬ miˇ ma htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma geh chehˇ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ baˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hpawˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ pa taw da‸ la kehˬ la ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ miˇ ma htawˇ, awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ pa taw da‸ la kehˬ la ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ lehˬ, maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ yawˇ hui da‸ kehˬ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ hpaˆ da‸ gaˇ ve kʼo, hpaˆ da‸ piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe te hpaˆ da‸ gaˇ ve kʼo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ, hawˉ hkʼaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, yaˇ miˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpeh ka taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ taˍ ve lehˬ, cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ tuˬ awˬ pon kuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:16 Awˬ miˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ gʼa tuˬ leh naˍ, maˇ gʼa tuˬ leh naˍ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ hpeh‸ le. Awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ gʼa tuˬ leh naˍ, maˇ gʼa tuˬ leh naˍ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ hpeh‸ le." 
1Corinthians7:17 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpeh‸ tcuh ve hkʼe leh, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ taˍ ve hkʼe ceh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le te kʼai sheˍ. Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ moˍ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ chi hkʼe te teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:18 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kuˬ yuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve hkʼe taˇ kʼaw‸ te. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ htaˇ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve taˇ te." 
1Corinthians7:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve teˇ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:20 Teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ kuˬ yuˬ htaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe ceh, hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ sheˍ." 
1Corinthians7:21 Nawˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ htaˇ, nawˬ awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve laˇ. Chi ve hta‸ nawˬ taˇ dawˇ haˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ ceˬ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ ponˬ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, nawˬ tawˆ kʼai cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:22 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve ponˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ponˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ chehˇ htaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:23 Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hpfuhˇ piˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ taˍ ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ taˇ hpeh‸ la piˇ." 
1Corinthians7:24 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ htaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha geh teˇ geh oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1Corinthians7:25 Yaˇ miˇ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh ngaˬ gʼa taˍ ve tawˇ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:26 Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ tu‸ hkanˍ jaˇ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la ve pa taw, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:27 Nawˬ awˬ miˇ ma cawˬ laˇ. Cawˬ kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ taˇ baˬ. Nawˬ awˬ miˇ ma maˇ cawˬ laˇ. Maˇ cawˬ kʼo awˬ miˇ ma taˇ heuˆ." 
1Corinthians7:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ awˬ miˇ ma heuˆ ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ te ve maˇ heˆ. Yaˇ miˇ haˉ htawˇ, awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ te ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi hkʼe te ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chi ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:29 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ yanˇ ngeh jaˇ peuˬ. Chi beu‸ hta‸ tanˬ leh, awˬ miˇ ma cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians7:30 Paˆ hawˬ kehˇ hawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ hawˬ ve chaw hkʼe chehˇ-oˆ. Ha lehˬ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ ha lehˬ ve chaw hkʼe chehˇ-oˆ. Mawˇ vuiˬ ve chaw lehˬ, mawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians7:31 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ ca ve chaw hkʼe chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ lehˬ, pa kʼai mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:32 Nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa dawˇ haˍ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ miˇ ma maˇ cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nyi leh shaˍ ti‸ taˍ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ miˇ ma cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh awˬ miˇ ma nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ, miˬguiˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nyi leh dawˇ hkiˉ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nyi ma nyiˇ hkʼaˇ dawˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:34 Awˬ hpawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ leh yaˇ miˇ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh awˬ to hpawˇ leh co ha hpawˇ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ nyi leh shaˍ ti‸ taˍ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hpawˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh awˬ hpawˇ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ miˬguiˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nyi leh dawˇ hkiˉ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ va htaw ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ, keunˍ ve cawˇ ve hkʼe te leh, nyi ma htawˇ hpfuhˆ nawˬ hpfuhˆ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon kanˉ hkʼa deh‸ te tuˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:36 Awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ miˇ, yaˇ miˇ haˉ te ve awˬ yanˇ ponˬ leh, awˬ hpawˇ maˇ heuˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ da‸ teh‸ dawˇ ve kʼo, awˬ yaˇ miˇ awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve hkʼe heuˆ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Awˬ pa lehˬ, venˇbaˆ te ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ heuˆ da‸ tcuh-o." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, a shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma yeˬ leh yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ heuˆ tcuh ka‸ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, yawˇ te gaˇ ve hkʼe te hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hta‸ awˬ hpawˇ maˇ heuˆ tcuh tuˬ nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ da‸ ve hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:38 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ tcuh ve chaw lehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ te ve yoˬ. Maˇ heuˆ tcuh ve chaw htawˇ, leuˉ leh da‸ ve hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:39 Awˬ miˇ ma lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ maˇ suh ve ceh ceh, yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ geh hpeh ka taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ suh peuˬ kʼo, yawˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve chaw hta‸ kʼaw‸ heuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ heuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ngaˬ dawˇ ve lehˬ, maˇ kʼaw‸ heuˆ leh chehˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, leuˉ leh yawˇ pon ha lehˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬ sha ve Awˬ ha hpu cawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve teh‸ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:1 Shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve caˇ tuˬ awˬ lawn lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ lehˬ, nyi ma uiˍ tuˬ te puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:2 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ ve teh‸ dawˇ ve kʼo, shiˍ keunˍ shiˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ." 
1Corinthians8:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:4 Hkʼe te leh, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ ve awˬ lawn lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Shaˉ ho‸ lehˬ, chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ leh, Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Gʼuiˬsha maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ leh jawˇ mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼuiˬsha teh‸ shu meh piˇ taˍ ve gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ htawˇ," 
1Corinthians8:6 ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la leh, ngaˬ hui htawˇ yawˇ awˬ pon hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Jawˇ mawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui htawˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ chi teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ cawˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ taˍ uiˍ chehˇ sheˍ ve pa taw, caˇ tuˬ oˇ ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve teh‸ shawˍ leh caˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve pa taw, cha‸ chiˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:8 Caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui maˇ caˇ ve kʼo, awˬ bon yawnˇ kʼai tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui caˇ ve kʼo, awˬ bon leuˉ leh gʼa tuˬ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui te hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ te-o." 
1Corinthians8:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, shaˉ ho‸ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo mui caˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ mawˬ leh, yawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve kʼo, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ yawˇ caˇ tuˬ, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ la tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians8:11 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ pa taw awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ luˬ kʼai peuˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon htawˇ, Hkri‸ hkanˍ suh peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:12 Chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui hta‸ te ya‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te piˇ ve pa taw, Hkri‸ hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui te ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians8:13 Hkʼe te leh, caˇ tuˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ngaˬ te ya‸ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi maˇ gʼa te ya‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ shaˍ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ ponˬ peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Tcuh yaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te taˍ ve kanˉ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians9:2 Shu awˬ pon ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ htawˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:3 Ngaˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
1Corinthians9:4 Ngaˬ hui gʼa caˇ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ laˇ. 
1Corinthians9:5 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ teˇ hpaˍ leh, Keˍhpaˆ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ shiˍ toˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ laˇ." 
1Corinthians9:6 Ngaˬ leh Baˍnaˍbaˆ ceh tiˉ la‸ sheh kanˉ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ laˇ. 
1Corinthians9:7 A shu yawˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ leh ma‸ yaˇ te ve chaw, a shu teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ le. Hko te leh iˉ shiˍ maˇ shaˉ caˇ ve, a shu teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ le. Ceˇ caˬ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hawˉ leh cuˉ gʼuiˬ maˇ dawˬ ve, a shu teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ le." 
1Corinthians9:8 Chaw yaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve laˇ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ htawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. 
1Corinthians9:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Caˬ naˆ chehˇ ve nuˇ hta‸ maw‸ kʼaw maˇ gʼa hoˆ taˍ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nuˇ awˬ pon dawˇ nyi ve laˇ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ dawˇ nyi leh kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians9:10 Yoˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ti mi mehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Caˬ jaw‸ ve chaw htawˇ, caˬ shiˍ gʼa tuˬ dawˇ law leh jaw‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha hpawˇ ve awˬ yawˇ sheˍ peuˬ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ve awˬ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa gʼeu‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui te ya‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ ve laˇ." 
1Corinthians9:12 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw nawˬ hui geh awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ gʼeu‸ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui leuˉ leh a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ htawˇ maˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa tawˍ taˍ tuˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:13 Bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve chaw hui lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ gʼa caˇ leh, tanˇ kuiˬ lo kanˉ te ve chaw hui lehˬ, tanˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa pehˬ caˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ." 
1Corinthians9:14 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa caˇ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ lehˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ te. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ chi hta‸ te luˬ te mehˉ laˇ ve a‸ kehˉ, ngaˬ suh kʼo da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:16 Ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˇ maˍ kʼo, chehˇ maˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ awˬ pon dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:17 Hpu maˇ caˇ leh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ te gaˇ leh te ve kʼo, awˬ bon gʼa ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ ve ka‸ ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ taˍ laˇ ve kanˉ cawˬ leh gʼa te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:18 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ awˬ bon gʼa ve lehˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve le. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, hpu caˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ caˇ leh, na shehˍ hpaˇ hui te‸ chiˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ awˬ bon gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngaˬ lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ceˬ ka‸ maˇ hpeh‸ htawˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ maˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ ceˬ ngaˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Corinthians9:20 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ pon Yuˇda‸ chaw hkʼe ngaˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ chehˇ htawˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼe ngaˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Corinthians9:21 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe ngaˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ awˬ pon awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Hkri‸ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:22 Awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ngaˬ htawˇ shu geh teˇ geh gʼa tuˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ pon chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:24 Gʼuiˇ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, gʼuiˇ da‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼuiˇ ve htawˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ la‸ shawnˍ gʼa ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ gʼuiˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians9:25 Gʼuiˇ da‸ ve pawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼuiˇ da‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ o‸ yuˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ puiˉ ve uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians9:26 Hkʼe te leh, htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ te leh ngaˬ gʼuiˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Chu-eˬ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, hkʼe leˇ mvuhˇ haw hta‸ ceh ngaˬ chu-eˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ shu hta‸ bon maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ awˬ to shawˍ baˬ taˍ ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ chu-eˬ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe shiˍ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, moˬ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ hpanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:2 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, moˬ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ geh baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians10:3 Yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ co ha ve caˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ caˇ leh," 
1Corinthians10:4 yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ co ha ve dawˬ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ dawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, co ha ve haˉ hpawˇ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, haˉ hpawˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:5 Haˉ hpawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ-awˍ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬ sha nyi hkʼaˇ maˇ suh. Yawˇ hui heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:6 Yawˇ hui haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui maˇ gʼa sheˉ lai tuˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon shaˍ ti‸ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:7 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, caˇ ve dawˬ ve awˬ pon mui leh, leˍ guiˇ tuˬ awˬ pon tu la ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:8 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui oˇ hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe te ve pa taw, teˇ nyi tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw nyiˇ meunˍ shehˆ hinˉ gʼaˇ paˍ suh-e ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:9 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui oˇ hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe te ve pa taw, vuiˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ te luˬ te sheˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:10 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼanˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo beu ve deˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui oˇ hkʼe maˇ gʼa te. Yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe te ve pa taw, te luˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:11 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shu shaˍ ti‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw hpeh‸ la leh, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon Li‸ hpu hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:12 Hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, Ngaˬ yeˬ lehˍ huˉ chehˇ ve teh‸ dawˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ maˇ gʼa paiˍ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:13 Chaw yaˇ hui gʼa hpuˇ jaw ve beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ ceh tiˉ nawˬ hui gʼa hpuˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ, ka ti‸ yeˬ leh, nawˬ hui hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ tuˬ, yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ hpuˇ htaˇ, nawˬ hui hkanˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ponˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ yawˇ gu taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:14 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ jaw kʼai loˬ." 
1Corinthians10:15 Dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve cawˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ nyi-o. 
1Corinthians10:16 Ngaˬ hui chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ bon uiˍ ve kawˆ lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui teˇ geh caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼeh‸ ve hkaoˍmonˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui teˇ geh caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians10:17 Hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ diˬ tiˉ cawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui maˇ ve htawˇ, teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ diˬ hta‸ tiˉ hpawnˬ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:18 Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui te ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Tanˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ caˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, tanˇ kuiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians10:19 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ gaˇ ve le. Shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le. Shaˉ ho‸ ka‸, aˬ hto‸ ma kʼoˆ tuˬ cawˬ le." 
1Corinthians10:20 Kʼoˆ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ. Lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve tanˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tanˇ ve maˇ heˆ, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ tuˬ ngaˬ maˇ heuˆ gaˇ." 
1Corinthians10:21 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kawˆ leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve kawˆ, teˇ maˬ hta‸ dawˬ ve kʼo, teˇ maˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve hpui lawˇ leh neˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve hpui lawˇ, teˇ maˬ lo mui caˇ ve kʼo teˇ maˬ lo nawˬ hui mui caˇ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians10:22 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ ngaˬ hui te tuˬ laˇ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ a‸ kehˉ awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve laˇ. 
1Corinthians10:23 Ngaˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ bon cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ puiˉ ve maˇ heˆ," 
1Corinthians10:24 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ taˇ ca. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu awˬ pon awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ ca-o." 
1Corinthians10:25 Tcuh hkʼaw hkʼa hawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˇ-oˆ. Shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ pa taw, te‸ chiˉ taˇ na nyi." 
1Corinthians10:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:27 Maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ leh nawˬ hui kʼai gaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkʼa teh laˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ-oˆ. Shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ pa taw, te‸ chiˉ taˇ na nyi." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, Chi lehˬ shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ peuˬ ve caˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ hto laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ caˇ loˬ." 
1Corinthians10:29 Shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ nawˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Shu ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ te hpeh‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw shu ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma tawˍ taˍ laˇ ve le." 
1Corinthians10:30 Awˬ bon hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh ngaˬ caˇ ve kʼo, bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh caˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw shu ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ laˇ ve le." 
1Corinthians10:31 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la tuˬ te-o." 
1Corinthians10:32 Chaw maˇ maˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ pon awˬ bon hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ ca leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians10:33 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ taˇ te." 
1Corinthians11:1 Hkri‸ te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ te ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te-o." 
1Corinthians11:2 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui na yuˬ leh te kʼai ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe shiˍ tcuh gaˇ ve yoˬ. Hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ le le ve oˉ kʼoˍ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ lehˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ yoˬ. Hkri‸ ve oˉ kʼoˍ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:4 Hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, bon lawˬ htaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon maˍ htaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ beh ve kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ te luˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ bon lawˬ htaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, bon maˍ htaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ maˇ beh ve kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ te luˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ maˇ beh ve kʼo, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ chiˇ baˬ taˍ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ miˇ lehˬ oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ maˇ beh ve kʼo, uˉ hkeh mvuh nuˆ baˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, uˉ hkeh mvuh nuˆ baˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ chiˇ baˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yaˇ miˇ awˬ pon ya‸ taw tuˬ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ beh taˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Corinthians11:7 Hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ beh maˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, hawˉ hkʼaˆ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hawˉ hkʼaˆ hta‸ yaˇ miˇ lo yuˬ te taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Yaˇ miˇ hta‸ hawˉ hkʼaˆ lo yuˬ te taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:9 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ yaˇ miˇ awˬ pon hpanˍ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Yaˇ miˇ lehˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ awˬ pon hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:10 Hkʼe te leh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ pa taw, yaˇ miˇ lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ beh taˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ miˇ lehˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ hta‸ loˍ leh, hawˉ hkʼaˆ htawˇ yaˇ miˇ hta‸ loˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ miˇ lehˬ hawˉ hkʼaˆ lo hpeh‸ la ve hkʼe, hawˉ hkʼaˆ htawˇ yaˇ miˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:13 Yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ maˇ beh leh Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ bon lawˬ keunˍ maˇ keunˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui dawˇ nyi-o." 
1Corinthians11:14 Hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, uˉ hkeh mvuh hu ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ pon ya‸ taw tuˬ hpeh‸ ve teh‸, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ve awˬ liˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians11:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ miˇ lehˬ uˉ hkeh mvuh hu ve kʼo, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve uˉ hkeh mvuh lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ beh tuˬ awˬ pon piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ gaˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ liˇ maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians11:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, leuˉ leh da‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon hpawnˬ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Leuˉ leh luˬ kʼai tuˬ awˬ pon hpawnˬ da‸ ve pa taw, tawˇ piˇ laˇ tuˬ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians11:18 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hpawnˬ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui awˬ moˍ shawˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kaˇ ve hkʼe cawˇ ve yoˬ hehˉ teh‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ, awˬ moˍ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼa cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nawˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve pawehˇ hta‸ caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon hpawnˬ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians11:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ a shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ awˉ lawˉ caˇ sheˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, teˇ gʼaˇ kʼo awˍ meu‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ kʼo a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:22 Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Nawˬ hui caˇ kuiˬ dawˬ kuiˬ awˬ pon a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ maˇ cawˬ leh laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬ sha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ya‸ taw piˇ lawˬ ve laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve le. Chi hkʼe te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ ve laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh laˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians11:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ maˍ laˇ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, shu yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve teˇ haˉ htaˇ, hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ yuˬ leh," 
1Corinthians11:24 awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ hkʼeh‸ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ ve awˬ to hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ chi hta‸ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:25 Yawˇ hui mvuhˇ haˉ awˍ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ kawˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Kawˆ chi lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui dawˬ ve teˇ pawˆ le le ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hkaoˍmonˇ chi hta‸ caˇ leh, kawˆ chi hta‸ dawˬ ve teˇ pawˆ le le, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:27 Hkʼe te leh, chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ keunˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ leh Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kawˆ hta‸ dawˬ ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to leh awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yawˇ te ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:28 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ lawˇ nyi peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hkaoˍmonˇ hta‸ caˇ leh kawˆ hta‸ dawˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ maˇ pehˬ maˇ fuiˍ gʼa leh caˇ ve dawˬ ve kʼo, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼoˆ ciˍ yanˍ ve gaˬ la tuˬ yawˇ caˇ ve dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:30 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw maˇ maˇ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh naˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ suh peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:31 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ lawˇ nyi ve kʼo, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ." 
1Corinthians11:32 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui geh teˇ geh ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ jaw‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians11:33 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, caˇ ve dawˬ ve awˬ pon nawˬ hui teˇ geh hpawnˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa deh‸ law da‸-o‸." 
1Corinthians11:34 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˍ meu‸ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve aˉ hkʼaw lo caˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ ve lehˬ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ htaˇ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ laˇ gu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, co ha hpawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:2 Nawˬ hui lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ kʼai ve hkʼe nawˬ hui kʼai leh, tawˇ yaw maˇ puiˉ ve shaˉ ho‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ ca pui ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:3 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe shiˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ hkeu taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬ sha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ maˇ cuˇ ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians12:4 La‸ shawnˍ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve htawˇ, Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:5 Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon te tuˬ ve kanˉ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:6 Te tawˆ la ve kanˉ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve htawˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa peu-eˬ te tawˆ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:7 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ shiˍ puiˉ ve tawˇ hkawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:9 Awˬ ha hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yonˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ lehˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ chaw naˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ puiˉ ve la‸ shawnˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:10 Teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ anˇ tuˬ te hpeh‸ tuˬ piˇ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ bon maˍ puiˉ tuˬ piˇ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ puiˉ tuˬ piˇ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh puiˉ tuˬ piˇ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve hta‸ tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ puiˉ tuˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:11 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ te tawˆ la leh, yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:12 Awˬ to lehˬ, teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ leh awˬ hkʼeun maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ to ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ maˇ ve htawˇ, awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ htawˇ oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceˬ leh ponˬ peuˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ geh Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hta‸ gʼa dawˬ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians12:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ to lehˬ awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ tiˉ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:15 Hkui sheh lehˬ, Ngaˬ la‸ sheh maˇ heˆ ve pa taw awˬ to hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve pa taw awˬ to hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians12:16 Naˍ paw lehˬ, ngaˬ mehˆ shiˍ maˇ heˆ ve pa taw awˬ to hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve pa taw awˬ to hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians12:17 Awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le. Awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ naˍ paw hpeh‸ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te nuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le." 
1Corinthians12:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo keu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:19 Awˬ hkʼeun hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, awˬ to hkʼaˬ hkʼe te cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1Corinthians12:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼeun cawˬ maˇ ve htawˇ, awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:21 Mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ loˍ teh‸, la‸ sheh hta‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸. Oˉ kʼoˍ htawˇ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ loˍ teh‸, hkui sheh hta‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians12:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ gʼa cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:23 Awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˉ leh ngaˬ hui awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve nyi maˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ, leuˉ leh nyi sha tuˬ ngaˬ hui te piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:24 Nyi sha chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe te tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hpaˆ da‸ guiˇ da‸ ve maˇ gʼa cawˬ leh, awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ teˇ maˬ leh teˇ maˬ dawˇ nyi da‸ puiˉ tuˬ," 
1Corinthians12:25 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ to hta‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˉ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:26 Awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ tu‸ hkanˍ ve kʼo, awˬ hkʼeun hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ yawˇ geh tu‸ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa ve kʼo, awˬ hkʼeun hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ yawˇ geh gʼa ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nawˬ hui lehˬ Hkri‸ ve awˬ to hpeh‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ to oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:28 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ moˍ tcuh yaˇ hui, nyiˇ moˍ teˇ moˍ bon maˍ paˍ hui, shehˆ moˍ teˇ moˍ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui, oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ anˇ tuˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ hui, oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chaw naˬ hui hta‸ gu na-e piˇ puiˉ ve chaw hui, ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui, awˬ hoˉ te ve chaw hui leh, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh puiˉ ve chaw hui hta‸ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha teh taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians12:29 Hkʼa peu-eˬ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ bon maˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ anˇ tuˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. 
1Corinthians12:30 Hkʼa peu-eˬ chaw naˬ hta‸ gu na-e piˇ puiˉ ve la‸ shawnˍ cawˬ ve laˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh puiˉ ve laˇ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ puiˉ ve laˇ. 
1Corinthians12:31 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ da‸ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sheˉ lai jaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ da‸ jaˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ caˆ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw puiˉ ve htawˇ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve maˇ cawˬ kʼo, bo lo kʼoˍ dawˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ leh shehnˍ hehˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼe ceh ngaˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ngaˬ bon maˍ puiˉ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, faˉ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ leh cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jiˆ kʼai gʼa tuˬ yonˍ ve nyi ma hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve maˇ cawˬ kʼo, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ngaˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ shu hta‸ pehˬ piˇ tanˇ piˇ leh, ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸ aˬ miˍ tuˉ tanˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve maˇ cawˬ kʼo, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ gʼa." 
1Corinthians13:4 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ, dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ leh ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ maˇ hkawehˉ puiˉ, maˇ caˆ muiˬ puiˉ, nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians13:5 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ te puiˉ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon maˇ ca puiˉ, nyi ma maˇ zuhˆ puiˉ, shu awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ puiˉ." 
1Corinthians13:6 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ ha lehˬ puiˉ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:7 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkanˍ puiˉ ve, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yonˍ puiˉ ve, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ dawˇ law puiˉ ve leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ maˇ luˬ puiˉ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, bon maˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:9 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve lehˬ, maˇ biˇ sheˍ. Ngaˬ hui bon maˍ ve ka‸ maˇ biˇ sheˍ." 
1Corinthians13:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, biˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ gaˬ la htaˇ, maˇ biˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:11 Ngaˬ yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe ngaˬ tawˇ yaw ve, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe ngaˬ nyi ma cawˬ ve leh, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe ngaˬ dawˇ nyi ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ la htaˇ, yaˇ ehˉ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:12 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, maˇ kehˬ da‸ ve mehˆ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi chehˇ ve hkʼe yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ oˇ htaˇ gaˬ kʼo, mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ leh gʼa mawˬ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi beu‸ ngaˬ hkʼa biˇ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, oˇ htaˇ gaˬ kʼo ngaˬ hkʼa biˇ shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians13:13 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, yonˍ ve, dawˇ law ve leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve, chi shehˆ ceuˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi shehˆ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ jaˇ ve lehˬ ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:1 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼai leh, co ha hpawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ sheˉ lai-o. Bon maˍ puiˉ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ leuˉ leh sheˉ lai-o." 
1Corinthians14:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ na maˇ gʼa. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw, tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ yaw ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ bon maˍ ve chaw lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ tuˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ tuˬ leh, dawˇ sha la piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:4 Tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ tiˉ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ bon maˍ ve chaw lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:5 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh nawˬ hui bon maˍ puiˉ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ tuˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ yuˬ tawˆ maˍ piˇ ve kʼo, bon maˍ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ yawˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:6 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve htawˇ, hpeu‸ maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ, shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ, bon maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ, maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hkawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le." 
1Corinthians14:7 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, a sha‸ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, lehˉ lu maˇ kʼoˆ, tinˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ cehnˍ kʼo, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ meuˆ gaˇ ve leh naˍ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ hteˆ gaˇ ve leh naˍ, shu hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1Corinthians14:8 Behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve hkawˇ htawˇ maˇ cehnˍ kʼo, ma‸ bawˆ tuˬ awˬ pon a shu gu taˍ tuˬ le." 
1Corinthians14:9 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui maw‸ kʼaw yehˇ leh tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, shu na gʼa ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˇ yaw ve kʼo, nawˬ yaw ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ shu hkʼaˬ hkʼe te shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ haw hta‸ tawˇ yaw piˇ ve hkʼe ceh hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:10 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo tawˇ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians14:11 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ kʼo, tawˇ yaw shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ lehˬ shu mvuhˇmiˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, tawˇ yaw shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ, ngaˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shu mvuhˇmiˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:12 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ sheˉ lai jaˇ ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ puiˉ tuˬ leuˉ leh ca-o." 
1Corinthians14:13 Hkʼe te leh, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ gʼa tuˬ bon lawˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw leh bon lawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve nyi ma hkʼaw bon lawˬ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ." 
1Corinthians14:15 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ le. Ngaˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ bon lawˬ leh, ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ngaˬ bon lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh leh, ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ngaˬ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:16 Hkʼe maˇ heˆ leh, nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ bon hta‸ nawˬ chiˇ mvuh ve kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ chiˇ mvuh ve hkawˇ hta‸ na maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te, A menˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1Corinthians14:17 Nawˬ lehˬ bon hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ chiˇ mvuh ve htawˇ, shu hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ maˇ gʼa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh puiˉ ve pa taw, ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hpawnˬ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh leh tawˇ teˇ meunˍ hkawˇ yaw ve a‸ kehˉ, ngaˬ shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ ngaˇ hkawˇ ceh yaw gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:20 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui dawˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yaˇ ehˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, dawˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw mawˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians14:21 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw ceuˬ ve ha tehˍ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw ceuˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ ngaˬ cuˇ leh, chaw chi teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ tawˇ yaw piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi hkʼe te yaw piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:22 Hkʼe te leh, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve lehˬ, yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Bon maˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:23 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpawnˬ da‸ leh, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh chehˇ htaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui, maˇ heˆ kʼo maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui lo‸ la kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ chaw gʼuˇ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Corinthians14:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ bon maˍ chehˇ ve kʼo, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw, maˇ heˆ kʼo Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lo‸ la htaˇ, bon maˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ awˬ to venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ jawˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:25 Yawˇ nyi ma hkʼaw faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui geh awˬ tehˬ awˬ na chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:26 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Nawˬ hui hpawnˬ da‸ htaˇ, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ kʼa ve, maˍ piˇ ve, hpeu‸ maˍ ve, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve, tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ ve, teˇ gʼaˇ le le teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ te ve yoˬ. Shu uiˍ la yeˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te-o." 
1Corinthians14:27 Tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw cawˬ kʼo, nyiˇ gʼaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ taˇ yaw tcuh. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ chiˇ mvuh peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Corinthians14:28 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hpawnˬ da‸ htaˇ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ yuˬ tawˆ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve chaw hui hta‸ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸ na‸ uˉ te da‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Corinthians14:29 Bon maˍ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo shehˆ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˍ tcuh leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shawˍ nyi dawˇ nyi piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Corinthians14:30 Oˇ kaˬ lo mui taˍ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa ve kʼo, awˉ lawˉ maˍ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ta‸ iˉ chehˇ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Corinthians14:31 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ leh awˬ gʼaˇ gʼa tuˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ bon maˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:32 Bon maˍ paˍ hui ve nyi ma lehˬ, bon maˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:33 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ lehˬ gawˬ lehˍ ve hta‸ te piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:34 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ te chehˇ ve hkʼe, yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ta‸ iˉ chehˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui tawˇ yaw tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui lehˬ shu awˬ hawˉ lo gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:35 Yawˇ hui teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ shiˍ gaˇ ve kʼo, aˉ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ na nyi cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ miˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ yaw ve kʼo, ya‸ taw tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:36 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ tawˆ la ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui geh ceh tiˉ gaˬ la ve laˇ." 
1Corinthians14:37 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ bon maˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve, maˇ heˆ kʼo Awˬ ha hpu la‸ shawnˍ cawˬ ve teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ shiˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ maˇ shiˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
1Corinthians14:39 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, bon maˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai jaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Tawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw chiˇ mvuh ve hta‸ htawˇ taˇ tawˍ taˍ." 
1Corinthians14:40 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ cawˇ da‸ ve hkʼe, nyi sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te-o."
