1Corinthians15:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ leh, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:2 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼe leˇ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ leh hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ yeˬ taˍ ve kʼo, oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ lawn uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn oˇ ve lehˬ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ pon hkanˍ suh peuˬ." 
1Corinthians15:4 Tuˍ hpfuh hkʼaw tuˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, shehˍ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ htaˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:5 Yawˇ lehˬ, Keˍhpaˆ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to maw piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:6 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, teˇ pawˆ tiˉ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ngaˇ ha gʼaˇ hpaˆ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ to kʼaw‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ-awˍ ve te‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ suh peuˬ." 
1Corinthians15:7 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Yaˍkoˆ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ maw piˇ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ tcuh yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ to kʼaw‸ maw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ka‸ paw la ve yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, awˬ leh teˇ pawˆ yawˇ awˬ to ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ maw laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ tcuh yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬ sha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ fawˉ mehˍ jaw ve pa taw, shu ngaˬ hta‸ tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ tuˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ keunˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw yoˬ. Ngaˬ gʼa ve awˬ bon htawˇ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ hui a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ kanˉ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ te ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon ngaˬ geh cawˬ leh, awˬ bon oˇ ve kanˉ te ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:11 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ awˬ to maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi hkʼe bon maˍ leh, nawˬ hui htawˇ chi hkʼe yonˍ taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:12 Hkri‸ lehˬ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui bon maˍ ve kʼo, suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve le." 
1Corinthians15:13 Suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve maˇ cawˬ kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians15:14 Hkri‸ lehˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui bon maˍ ve chi, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve htawˇ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Hkri‸ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ peuˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suh ve chaw hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians15:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ hta‸ htawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ peuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians15:17 Hkri‸ lehˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve kʼo, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:18 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh peuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ luˬ kʼai peuˬ." 
1Corinthians15:19 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ceh tiˉ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ law tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Hkri‸ lehˬ suh kuiˬ lo awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ leh, suh peuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ naw‸ la ve awˬ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw suh ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ la ve hkʼe, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:22 Aˍdanˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ suh ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve hkʼe kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ. Hkri‸ lehˬ awˉ lawˉ naw‸ ve awˬ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:24 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ lehˬ uˉ peunˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ, aˉ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, kanˇ paˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te luˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ mvuhˇmiˬ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:25 Hkri‸ lehˬ canˇ paˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve hkui taw kʼaw awˬ hawˉ lo taˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ. 
1Corinthians15:26 Awˬ leh meuˇ te luˬ piˇ tuˬ ve canˇ paˍ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Yaˇ hpu ve hkui taw kʼaw awˬ hawˉ lo Gʼuiˬsha teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ Yaˇ hpu awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo teh taˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:28 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ Yaˇ hpu awˬ hawˉ lo teh taˍ peuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ teh taˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hawˉ lo Yaˇ hpu htawˇ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:29 Suh peuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ pon baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw ca hkanˍ ve le. Suh ve chaw hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw yawˇ hui ve awˬ tan shu baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ ve le." 
1Corinthians15:30 Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw teˇ naˍ riˍ le le kawˆ tuˬ dawˇ haˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve le." 
1Corinthians15:31 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ leh, teˇ nyi le le suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:32 Shu te jaw ve hkʼe, ngaˬ lehˬ Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa loˍ yuˬ da‸ jaw ve htawˇ, ngaˬ awˬ pon aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Suh ve chaw hui maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la kʼo, shu kʼoˆ ve hkʼe, Shawˉ pawˍ ngaˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ ve pa taw, caˇ bvuhˆ dawˬ bvuhˆ te chehˇ-a veuˬ." 
1Corinthians15:33 Nawˬ hui taˇ dawˇ ya‸. Haiˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, da‸ ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:34 Nawˇ la leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai-o. Venˇbaˆ hta‸ taˇ kʼaw‸ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Nawˬ hui ya‸ taw tuˬ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:35 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe na nyi laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Suh ve chaw hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ le. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve awˬ to cawˬ leh kʼaw‸ tawˆ la tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:36 Maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ sheˍ ve awˬ yawˇ lehˬ, maˇ luˬ maˇ suh ve kʼo, te‸ la tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians15:37 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ sheˍ ve lehˬ, hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ cehˬ hta‸ nawˬ sheˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Caˬ yawˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ yawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh nawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:38 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, awˬ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ cehˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ cehˬ hpeh‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:39 Shaˍ hkʼa cawˬ ve lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw yaˇ ve awˬ shaˍ teˇ ceuˬ, to nuˇ to shaˆ ve awˬ shaˍ teˇ ceuˬ, ngaˆ awˬ shaˍ teˇ ceuˬ leh, ngaˇ awˬ shaˍ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:40 Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ to teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ leh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ to teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ to teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ leh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ to teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ htawˇ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:41 Mvuhˇ nyi ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ, ha pa ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ leh, meu‸ keu teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Meu‸ keu teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, teˇ shiˍ leh teˇ shiˍ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ peun da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:42 Suh peuˬ ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la tuˬ ve lehˬ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ to lehˬ, luˬ puiˉ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ leh, maˇ luˬ maˇ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:43 Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ leh, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:44 Sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ to hpeh‸ leh, kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, co ha ve awˬ to hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ ve awˬ to cawˬ ve kʼo, co ha ve awˬ to htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:45 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve Aˍdanˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ te‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ ve Aˍdanˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ te‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:46 Co ha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˉ lawˉ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˉ lawˉ laˬ leh, oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ co ha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:47 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve chaw lehˬ, je‸ hpeh‸ leh, miˬguiˬ lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:48 Je‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, je‸ lo tawˆ la ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, je‸ lo tawˆ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ pfuhˇ ve hkʼe, mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ hui pfuhˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:50 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ to lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e maˇ hpeh‸. Luˬ puiˉ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ luˬ maˇ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Corinthians15:51 Nyi loˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto maˍ laˇ shaˍ. Nyiˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa suh tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Corinthians15:52 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ hkui tiˉ, mehˆ teˇ me‸ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nyiˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa pa tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, behˬ heh ma awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, suh peuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, maˇ luˬ maˇ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la leh, nyiˬ hui htawˇ gʼa pa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:53 Awˬ lawn kʼo, luˬ puiˉ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ chi lehˬ, maˇ luˬ maˇ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa veu‸ deh tuˬ yoˬ. Suh puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ chi htawˇ, maˇ suh puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa veu‸ deh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:54 Luˬ puiˉ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ luˬ maˇ kuiˇ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, suh puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ suh puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ veu‸ deh ve teˇ yanˇ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ. Gʼaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hehˆ dawˬ peuˬ." 
1Corinthians15:55 Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ-oˬ, nawˬ gʼaˇ tuˬ hkʼaˬ lo cawˬ le. Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ-oˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ viˇ hkʼaˬ lo cawˬ le." 
1Corinthians15:56 Suh ve awˬ viˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ ve kanˇ paˆ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. 
1Corinthians15:58 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nyi ma yeˬ ve chaw, te kuiˬ dawˇ kuiˬ yeˬ ve chaw leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon nawˬ hui te ve kanˉ lehˬ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ shiˍ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians16:1 Hkri‸ yaˇ hui awˬ pon hpu tanˇ shaw ve awˬ lawn lehˬ, Gaˍlaˍtiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hto piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ oˇ hkʼe te-o." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ngaˬ gaˬ la htaˇ hpu tanˇ maˇ gʼa shaw tuˬ, teˇ shinˉ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi htaˇ, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ awˬ bon gʼa taˍ ve hkʼe, hpu tanˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yuˬ tawˆ leh ha‸ shaˉ taˍ-o‸." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ngaˬ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ve hpu tanˇ hta‸ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo yuˬ kʼoˬ piˇ tuˬ, nawˬ hui nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve li‸ bvuh‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ peu kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ngaˬ htawˇ kʼai cawˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ hui ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kʼai hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:5 Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hpanˍ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇ miˬ hta‸ gʼa hpanˍ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:6 Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo kʼaw‸ kʼai tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ peu kʼai laˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ tuˬ teh‸ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇkaˆ yanˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ hehˉ." 
1Corinthians16:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi beu‸ hpanˍ kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ da‸ tuˬ ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma cawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh a ciˉ maw chaweh chehˇ tuˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:8 Peˍteˍkoˆteˍ pawehˇ awˬ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˉ hkʼa deh‸ te hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon kʼehˬ jaˇ ve yehˬ miˉ teˇ maˬ hpaw taˍ ve yoˬ. Tawˍ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:10 Tiˆmoˉseˍ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la kʼo, nawˬ hui geh chehˇ htaˇ yawˇ maˇ gʼa kawˆ tuˬ nawˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:11 Hkʼe te leh, a shu ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ taˇ te. Yawˇ ngaˬ geh kʼaw‸ la hpeh‸ tuˬ, dawˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ peu laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh yawˇ kʼaw‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Aˍpawˇlu‸ awˬ lawn lehˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ tuˬ yawˇ nyi ma a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:13 Nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ shaw taˍ-o‸. Yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ lehˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ gʼaˇ yuˬ tawˆ leh, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Corinthians16:14 Nawˬ hui hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te-o." 
1Corinthians16:15 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Saˍteˍhpanˍ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui lehˬ, Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ yaˇ awˉ lawˉ hpeh‸ la leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ, yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:16 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve chaw hui awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ga piˇ leh kanˉ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:17 Saˍteˍhpanˍ, Hpawˍtuˇnaˆ leh Aˍhkaˍyaˍkuˆ hui gaˬ la ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ nyi ma sha la ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:18 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ ve nyi ma leh nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ yawˆ yan-o." 
1Corinthians16:19 Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Aˍkuˉlaˆ leh Piˇkiˇlaˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui ve yehˬ hkʼaw hpawnˬ da‸ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ka‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ geh tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:20 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo boˆ nu da‸ leh la‸ sheh caˉ da‸-o‸. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:22 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve kʼo, hkeu ve hta‸ hkanˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ laˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Corinthians16:23 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ngaˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Corinthians1:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ leh, Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tiˆmoˉseˍ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ teˇ geh li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:2 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
2Corinthians1:3 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. Yawˇ lehˬ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ leh, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ngaˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ hui htawˇ dawˇ sha la piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ la ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ la ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:6 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui htawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ ve kʼo, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve chi hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:7 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:8 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui a sha‸ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ dawˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ hui hkanˍ maˇ gʼaˇ ve tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ nyiˉ tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ngaˬ hui gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, suhˉ taˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ maˇ va leh, suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼaˇ va tuˬ, chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:10 Yawˇ lehˬ, chi taw taw uiˍ jaˇ ve suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ peuˬ leh kʼaw‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ sheˍ ve hta‸ htawˇ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:11 Nawˬ hui htawˇ, bon ga lawˬ laˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ bon lawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui gʼa ve awˬ bon teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon, chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ngaˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, leuˉ leh nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ va ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼaˇ va ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:13 Nawˬ hui gʼaw gʼa leh shiˍ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians1:14 Nawˬ hui hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ shiˍ taˍ peuˬ ve hkʼe, hkʼa biˇ shiˍ la tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui oˇ hkʼe shiˍ la ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pa taw nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ngaˬ chi hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ gʼa kʼaw‸ ha lehˬ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh awˉ lawˉ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:16 Ngaˬ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hui geh ca guiˇ la taˉ leh, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼaw‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hui geh ca kʼaw‸ guiˇ la leh, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ hpawˇ lo shiˍ kʼoˬ laˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe dawˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ te ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ te ve hkʼe, yoˬ ka‸ maˇ heˆ ka‸ teˇ pawˆ tiˉ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve laˇ." 
2Corinthians1:18 Gʼuiˬsha ka ti‸ yeˬ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yoˬ ka‸ maˇ heˆ ka‸ teˇ pawˆ tiˉ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians1:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Siˍlaˍnuˆ, Tiˆmoˉseˍ, ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, yoˬ ka‸ maˇ heˆ ka‸ teˇ pawˆ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yoˬ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:20 Gʼuiˬsha ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yoˬ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui A menˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:21 Nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui hta‸ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ yeˬ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ leh leuˆ yuˬ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:22 Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maiˉ taˍ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ shinˉ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ lo maˇ laˬ ve teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ ngaˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui uˉ peunˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve lehˬ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:1 Dawˇ haˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh maˇ kʼaw‸ laˬ teh‸, ngaˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians2:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, a shu ngaˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ le. Ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve chaw ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ piˇ lawˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:3 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ha lehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ piˇ lawˬ cawˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve, nyi ma dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve leh, mehˆ gʼuiˬ maˇ maˇ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ha‸ jaˇ ve nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:5 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ shu hta‸ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ kʼoˆ ponˬ kʼoˆ leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ.)" 
2Corinthians2:6 Oˇ hkʼe ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ-awˍ ve chi hkʼe ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve lehˬ law‸ peuˬ. 
2Corinthians2:7 Dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ gʼa gaˬ tuˬ, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ cawˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:8 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:9 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui na yuˬ chehˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸ ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:10 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui hpehˇ piˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hpehˇ hkʼa ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon Hkri‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hpehˇ hkʼa ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:11 Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, Saˍtanˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:12 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ lo ngaˬ gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ awˬ pon yehˬ miˉ hpaw laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Tiˇtuˆ hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nyi ma maˇ sha ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ Taˍroˇaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ sheh kʼai laˇ leh, shu yawˇ hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ ve awˬ shaˉ hawnˉve teˇ ceuˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo zuhˇ kʼai piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ cuˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Hkri‸ ve awˬ shaˉ hawnˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians2:16 Luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai chehˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ suh ve awˬ shaˉ hpeh‸ leh, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve chaw hui awˬ pon co ha te‸ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te‸ ve awˬ shaˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu teˇ gʼaˇ te hpeh‸ ve le." 
2Corinthians2:17 Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ yawˬ gʼa tuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ hkaw‸ da‸ leh maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, oˇ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha maˍ tcuh laˇ ve hkʼe ceh, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi ma pfuhˇ leh hteˇ lehˍ maˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:1 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ to awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ kʼaw‸ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui geh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve li‸ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui loˍ ve laˇ." 
2Corinthians3:2 Nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Li‸ chi lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo bvuh‸ taˍ leh, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ shiˍ leh gʼaw gʼa ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:3 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ cuˇ leh bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ ve yoˬ. Naˬ meu‸ gʼuiˬ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Haˉ pui baˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ bvuh‸ taˍ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:4 Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe yonˍ tehˬ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians3:5 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te hpeh‸ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ gʼaˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hui cuˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ awˬ pon kanˉ te puiˉ te gʼa tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ leh cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ chi ve lehˬ, li‸ mehˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, li‸ mehˆ lehˬ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ co ha te‸ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:7 Haˉ pui baˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ htawˆ bvuh‸ taˍ ve, suh piˇ lawˬ puiˉ ve awˬ liˇ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Moˉseˍ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lo ba tawˆ la chehˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ lehˬ, shaˬ te shaˬ mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve htawˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi maˇ hpeh‸ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ba tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:8 Hkʼe te kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ lehˬ, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ tuˬ ve le." 
2Corinthians3:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ciˍ yanˍ tuˬ suhˉ taˆ ve awˬ liˇ gaˬ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ liˇ gaˬ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, leuˉ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:10 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ tawˆ la ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve pa taw, awˉ lawˉ cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gaˬ la ve kʼo, yeˬ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leuˉ leh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:12 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui dawˇ law kuiˬ chi hkʼe cawˬ ve pa taw, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:13 Mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa nyi tuˬ, Moˉseˍ lehˬ yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ hpa beh taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ oˇ hkʼe maˇ te." 
2Corinthians3:14 Yawˇ hui nyi ma heh leh maˇ dawˇ pawnˍ puiˉ ve pa taw, ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ piˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼaw ve teˇ yanˇ, beh taˍ ve hpa maˇ yehˬ baˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ hpa oˇ ve hta‸ yehˬ baˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Moˉseˍ ve li‸ hta‸ gʼaw ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ hpa beh taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve kʼo, beh taˍ ve hpa oˇ ve hta‸ yehˬ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:17 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Awˬ ha hpu hpeh‸ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve Awˬ ha hpu chehˇ ve teˇ kaˬ lo ponˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians3:18 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, mehˆ hpfuhˇ maˇ beh leh, mehˆ gʼeuˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui kʼaw‸ ba piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu hpeh‸ ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui lehˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ shaˬ te shaˬ maˇ la leh yawˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:1 Gʼuiˬsha ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve pa taw, kanˉ chi ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui nyi ma maˇ luˬ," 
2Corinthians4:2 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh ya‸ taw tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ. Heˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yuˬ hpfuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui maˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ cawˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:3 Ngaˬ hui maˍ chehˇ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ lehˬ beh taˍ ve kʼo, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve chaw hui awˬ pon ceh tiˉ beh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:4 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hpeh‸ ve Hkri‸ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa ba tuˬ, chi miˬguiˬ ve gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ naˆ ho‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ to awˬ lawn bon maˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ lawn leh, ngaˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:6 Naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ ba tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ ba laˇ peuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ shu gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ chi lehˬ, ngaˬ hui lo tawˆ la ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬ sha geh lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ teh‸, hpeu‸ maw piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve mawˇ chi lehˬ, je‸ mu‸ hkʼu awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, teˇ hpawˇ le le lo nyiˉ tiˍ taˍ laˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve htawˇ, hoˆ tiˍ taˍ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve htawˇ, dawˇ tui‸ gaˇ tui‸ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians4:9 Fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve htawˇ, ga laˇ paˍ maˇ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Shu dawˆ baˬ laˇ ve htawˇ, luˬ kʼai htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians4:10 Yeˍsuˆ ve te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la hpeh‸ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ pfuhˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ ve te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve suh puiˉ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon suh tuˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:12 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo suh ve teˇ ceuˬ kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo lehˬ, te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui htawˇ yonˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve pa taw, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:14 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ lawˬ leh, nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ chehˇ tcuh laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:15 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon shaˬ te shaˬ maˇ la ve hkʼe, shu yawˇ hta‸ shaˬ te shaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:16 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui nyi ma maˇ luˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ luˬ kʼai chehˇ ve htawˇ, co ha hpawˇ lehˬ teˇ nyi peuˬ teˇ nyi awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:17 Chi beu‸ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve i jaˇ lawˬ jaˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ca tehˆ nyi maˇ gʼa ve uiˍ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon te laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians4:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mawˬ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui nyi ve maˇ heˆ. Maˇ mawˬ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui nyi ve yoˬ. Mawˬ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ hkui tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ mawˬ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ cawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ" 
2Corinthians5:1 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve aˉ po kʼo chi luˬ kʼai ve kʼo, la‸ sheh maˇ te ve, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo co co taiˍ taiˍ cawˬ ve, Gʼuiˬsha te taˍ ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˉ po kʼo chi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hkʼanˇ chehˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve ngaˬ hui ve yehˬ hta‸ veu‸ deh gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:3 Oˇ hkʼe gʼa veu‸ deh ve kʼo, awˬ kʼu nyi gʼa chehˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians5:4 Aˉ po kʼo chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, hawˇ ve mawˇ pfuhˇ leh hkʼanˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ veu‸ deh gaˇ leh hkʼanˇ chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Suh puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ te‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ gʼa hehˆ dawˬ tuˬ, veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui veu‸ deh gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:5 Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon, ngaˬ hui hta‸ gu laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ hui awˬ bon chi hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ chi beu‸ ka‸ Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians5:6 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ nyi ma yeˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui te kʼai chehˇ ve lehˬ mehˆ shiˍ mawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ngaˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ to chi hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh leuˉ leh chehˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:9 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ to hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ hui coˇ caˇ leh te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ htaˇ te ve hkʼe, da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Hkri‸ ve suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ kʼaw jaw gʼuˇ suhˍ lo gʼa gaˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:11 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ shiˍ leh, nawˬ hui htawˇ nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ to hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ nyi ma hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ dawˇ nyi leh awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ ceh tiˉ nyi ma uiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui gʼuˇ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon gʼuˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui nyi ma biˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon biˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:14 Hkri‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ vawˆ taˍ leh shiˍ kʼai sheh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon hkanˍ suh ve pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ suh peuˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ cheˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians5:15 Yawˇ lehˬ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon maˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ pon hkanˍ suh leh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon te‸ chehˇ tuˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon hkanˍ suh ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:16 Hkʼe te leh, ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, chaw yaˇ hui shu hta‸ shawˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui lehˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ taˍ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ hta‸ chaw yaˇ hui shawˍ taˍ ve hkʼe ceh shawˍ taˍ chehˇ ve htawˇ, ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe maˇ kʼaw‸ shawˍ taˍ." 
2Corinthians5:17 Hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la peuˬ, Awˬ piˍ teˇ hpaˍ mehˉ kʼai peuˬ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
2Corinthians5:18 Awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ te laˇ peuˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸ shu yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ la tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ te tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:19 Yawˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ la tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ taˍ. Shu yawˇ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ te tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:20 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ ve awˬ tan te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ loˬ teh‸, Hkri‸ ve awˬ tan te leh ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians5:21 Hkri‸ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ jaw htawˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hpeh‸ la tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼe leˇ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Cawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ga laˇ ve yoˬ. teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ lehˬ cawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ nyi lehˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:3 Ngaˬ hui kanˉ te ve hta‸ shu venˇbaˆ taˍ maˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ hkui htiˇ poˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ te." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˉ te paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ shu shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ. Gʼaˇ hte‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve, dawˇ tui‸ gaˇ tui‸ ve, haˍ jaˇ ve," 
2Corinthians6:5 dawˆ laˇ jaw‸ laˇ ve, htawnˍ hkʼaw keu laˇ ve, shu duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve, kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve, maˇ gʼa zuh‸ ve leh, meu‸ ve kaˆ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:6 Da‸ kehˬ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve, shiˍ puiˉ ve, dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve, shu awˬ pon da‸ ve hta‸ te ve, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ ve, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ ve, hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ maˍ piˇ ve," 
2Corinthians6:7 Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ cuˇ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve la‸ caˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ la‸ sha paˉ la‸ mehˍ paˉ vawˆ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo," 
2Corinthians6:8 awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shu chiˇ mvuh laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shu hkʼaiˉ laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼe, shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ shawˍ laˇ ve htawˇ, hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:9 Ngaˬ hui hta‸ shu maˇ shiˍ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, shu hkʼa peu-eˬ shiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Suh paˇ neˇ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, tiˇ pehˍ laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ." 
2Corinthians6:10 Dawˇ haˍ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ha lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Haˍ gʼawˇ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ paw sha la piˇ ve yoˬ. Te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, teˇ ceuˬ le le cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:11 Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ faˉ taˍ leh, hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ i ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ i jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:13 Nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ha‸ laˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:14 Maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ caˉ da‸, taˇ pawnˇ da‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te caˉ da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te awˬ chawˇ te da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
2Corinthians6:15 Hkri‸ lehˬ Beˍleˍlaˆ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw geh hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
2Corinthians6:16 Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ shaˉ nanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te cawˇ da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Ngaˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ hui geh ngaˬ te toˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh yawˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ chehˇ taˍ-o‸ teh‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ taˇ htawˇ, Maˇ htawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ngaˬ lehˬ nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve yaˇ paˍ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:1 Hkʼe te leh, ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to leh nyi ma hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ leh yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ ve kehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ biˇ la piˇ-a veuˬ." 
2Corinthians7:2 Nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ te ya‸, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ maˇ te leh, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ heˍ caˇ ve maˇ te." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh kʼo teˇ geh suh tuˬ, te‸ kʼo teˇ geh te‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:4 Nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ ceuˬ htawˇ ngaˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ca kʼoˆ maˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ hui gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo bawˆ da‸ tuˬ cawˬ leh, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma luˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Tiˇtuˆ gaˬ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:7 Tiˇtuˆ gaˬ la ve pa taw ceh tiˉ dawˇ sha la ve maˇ heˆ. Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh gʼa veu laˇ ve dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui dawˇ sha la ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, ngaˬ awˬ pon nyi ma pfuhˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ leuˉ leh ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:8 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve li‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve pa taw, oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ hpeh‸ bawˬ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ bawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, li‸ oˇ ve lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ hkui ceh tiˉ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:9 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ haˍ piˇ lawˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve pa taw ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ gʼa shonˇ kʼai tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ve dawˇ haˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ haˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, hpeh‸ bawˬ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ haˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:11 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ haˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve teˇ hpaˍ te tawˆla piˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Nawˬ hui coˇ caˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hteˇ ve awˬ lawn kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, kawˆ ve nyi ma cawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ law tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma pfuhˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ ma te tawˆ la ve le. Kanˉ chi hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peu." 
2Corinthians7:12 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, te ya‸ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Te ya‸ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw awˬ pon ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkʼaˬ ma coˇ caˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:13 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui dawˇ sha la peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui dawˇ sha gaˇ sha peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, Tiˇtuˆ ha lehˬ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui leuˉ leh ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ nyi ma sha la piˇ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ngaˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn chiˇ mvuh ve hkawˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Tiˇtuˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ lawn chiˇ mvuh ve hkawˇ yaw taˍ ve lehˬ hteˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:15 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ na yuˬ leh, kawˆ ve cheˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˉ leh ha‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians7:16 Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians8:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ bon hkʼaˬ hkʼe na‸ piˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:2 Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve maˇ maˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui ha lehˬ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, biˇ sheˆ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui mawˇ jeˬ maˇ maˇ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe tanˇ piˇ peuˬ. Puiˉ ve hpeh‸ ve hkʼe tanˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa kʼaw‸ tanˇ piˇ sheˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:4 Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ ve awˬ bon chi teˇ ceuˬ gʼa te tuˬ, a hkaw-anˬ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:5 Ngaˬ hui dawˇ law ve a‸ kehˉ ka‸ yawˇ hui te ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui lehˬ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ka‸ a shu yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:6 Hkʼe te leh, Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ tanˬ te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve kanˉ chi hta‸ te peuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:7 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo, yonˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ yaw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ te taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ bon uiˍ ve kanˉ chi teˇ maˬ hta‸ htawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o." 
2Corinthians8:8 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Shu coˇ caˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ htaˇ, nawˬ hui ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na cawˬ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ paw sha chehˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve hta‸ hkanˍ leh, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui paw sha la ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:10 Chi awˬ lawn ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ ve nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ shaˍ. Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ hui te gaˇ leh te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, aˉ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˬ hui tanˬ te laˬ ve hkʼe chi beu‸ te peuˬ piˇ-oˆ. Chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon da‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:11 Hkʼe te leh, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui te puiˉ te hpeh‸ ve hkʼe te peuˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Corinthians8:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ve maˇ heˆ. Te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:13 Kanˉ chi hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon sha leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon haˍ jaˇ tuˬ ngaˬ te gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians8:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ te gaˇ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui awˬ leuˉ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui loˍ ve cuˆ ve hta‸ ga piˇ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ nawˬ hui loˍ ve cuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ leuˉ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ ga laˇ leh, hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:15 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Maˇ chaweh gʼawˆ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ awˬ leuˉ maˇ cawˬ leh, a ciˉ ceh tiˉ gʼawˆ yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ loˍ ve cuˆ ve maˇ cawˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:16 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ nyi ma pfuhˇ ve hkʼe, Tiˇtuˆ htawˇ nyi ma pfuhˇ la tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha te piˇ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:17 Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ nawˬ hui geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:19 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve kanˉ chi hta‸ ga te tuˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Kanˉ chi hta‸ te ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la leh, shu hta‸ ga piˇ gaˇ ve nyi ma hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:20 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, maˇ jaˇ ve tanˇ tuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaw leh pehˬ piˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, shu venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa taˍ laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ htawˇ keunˍ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te tuˬ ngaˬ hui dawˇ taˍ leh te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:22 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ geh teˇ geh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ hui kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo laiˉ pawˆ lawˇ nyi peuˬ leh, yawˇ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ yonˍ jaˇ ve pa taw, chi beu‸ leuˉ leh nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tiˇtuˆ awˬ lawn lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ ve awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ peu laˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians8:24 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui ha‸ pehnˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui chiˇ mvuh ve hkawˇ yaw ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ te-o." 
2Corinthians9:1 Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ ve kanˉ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ. 
2Corinthians9:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ shu hta‸ ga piˇ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui shu hta‸ ga piˇ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ chaw hui hta‸ hto piˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Aˍhkaˍyaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, aˉ nyi hkʼaw‸ htaˇ ka‸ gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ-awˍ ve hta‸ nawˍ piˇ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve lehˬ, kanˉ chi awˬ hkʼaw hkʼe leˇ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ tuˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:4 Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh laˬ leh, nawˬ hui maˇ gu maˇ hehnˇ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa ya‸ taw ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:5 Chi hta‸ pa taw, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬ bon uiˍ ve kanˉ chi teˇ maˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ te peuˬ taˍ laˇ tuˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui geh peu kʼai cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Tanˇ tuˬ chi piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ nyiˉ te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ leh, ha lehˬ ha kʼa tanˇ piˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:6 Awˬ lawn chi ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. A ciˉ ceh tiˉ sheˍ ve chaw lehˬ, a ciˉ ceh tiˉ gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Maˇ chaweh sheˍ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ chaweh gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:7 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe tanˇ piˇ-oˆ. Dawˇ haˍ leh te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa te ve hta‸ pa taw te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ha lehˬ ha kʼa tanˇ piˇ ve chaw hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:8 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le cawˬ law‸ leh, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ le le maˇ chaweh piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:9 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yawˇ maˇ chaweh sheˍ peuˬ. Haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ piˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:10 Awˬ yawˇ sheˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ awˬ yawˇ ka‸ caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ ka‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ yawˇ piˇ leh maˇ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ maˇ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:11 Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui maˇ chaweh piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui paw sha la tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pa taw shu Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ awˬ pon te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu hta‸ ga piˇ ve kanˉ chi lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ loˍ ve hkʼe hkʼa biˇ ga piˇ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, shu Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ maˇ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ htawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:13 Shu hta‸ ga piˇ ve kanˉ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ leh awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai ve pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ ka‸, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui maˇ chaweh tanˇ piˇ ve pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:14 Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ bon na‸ laˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ jaˇ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon bon lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians9:15 Ca kʼoˆ maˇ peuˬ ve la‸ shawnˍ Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o." 
2Corinthians10:1 Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ awˬ to lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, yawˇ ve nyi ma da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ lehˍ taˍ leh, ngaˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ ngaˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:2 Ngaˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ te ve hkʼe te ve chaw hpeh‸ ve teh‸ shawˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ te maˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, chi taw taw nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa te maˍ laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve htawˇ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ma‸ bawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians10:4 Ngaˬ hui ma‸ bawˆ ve la‸ caˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve la‸ caˉ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ta‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ awˬ pon, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve la‸ caˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ tawˍ taˍ tsuhˇ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui yuˬ baˬ hpaˆ baˬ ve yoˬ. Dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ maˬ le le hta‸ ngaˬ hui hpeh yuˬ leh, Hkri‸ hta‸ na yuˬ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:6 Nawˬ hui na yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ biˇ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˬ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi sheˍ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to Hkri‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ shawˍ taˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ Hkri‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:8 Nawˬ hui hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hui hta‸ aˉ yaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ awˬ pon pe‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Hkʼe te leh, aˉ yaˇ chi awˬ lawn ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa cawˇ cawˇ kʼoˆ maˇ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians10:9 Ngaˬ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ ngaˬ te gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians10:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˇ ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ leh hehnˇ jaˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ awˬ to chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh, yawˇ kʼoˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:11 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ htawˇ chi hkʼe te ve yoˬ teh‸, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Corinthians10:12 A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui awˬ to yawˇ hui hta‸ tehˆ da‸ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui te maˇ haˆ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ tehˆ da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ shuˍ da‸ ve hta‸ nyi ve pa taw, yawˇ hui cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:13 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ ponˬ kʼoˆ leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ kanˉ te kuiˬ pehˬ laˇ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ hui te tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pehˬ laˇ ve kanˉ te kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:14 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ pehˬ laˇ ve kanˉ te kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e taˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve kanˉ te kuiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te ponˬ te leuˉ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ nawˬ hui geh hkʼa gaˬ awˉ lawˉ ca maˍ la ve lehˬ ngaˬ hui yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:15 Shu te taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te ve hkʼe te leh, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼaˇ hte‸ ca kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ la maˇ la ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ pehˬ laˇ taˍ ve kanˉ te kuiˬ htawˇ leuˉ leh uiˍ la kʼehˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians10:16 Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ coˇ paˉ lo hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu kanˉ te kuiˬ lo shu te taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui ca kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ nyi ma uiˍ leh kʼoˆ loˬ." 
2Corinthians10:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve chaw hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ awˬ pon Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve chaw hta‸ ceh tiˉ Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:1 Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ a ciˉ bvuh‸ laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ law ve yoˬ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na nawˬ hui a ciˉ yeunˇ hkanˍ laˇ sheˍ. 
2Corinthians11:2 Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ sheˉ lai ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ sheˉ lai ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ hpawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, vuiˬ lehˬ heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Eˇva‸ hta‸ beˬ yuˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ luˬ kʼai leh, Hkri‸ hta‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ mehˉ kʼai puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh, ngaˬ maˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn hta‸ maˇ maˍ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn maˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui gʼa peuˬ ve awˬ ha maˇ heˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ha hta‸ gʼa ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˇ heˆ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve law." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ngaˬ lehˬ, uiˍ ve mvuh ve tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ chehˇ ve teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:6 Tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ maˇ puiˉ ve htawˇ, cuˇ yiˍ hpawˇ ngaˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe puiˉ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:7 Nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ nehˬ piˇ lawˬ leh, awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ yuˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ venˇbaˆ te ve leh laˇ." 
2Corinthians11:8 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon kanˉ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ geh hpu hta‸ ngaˬ ha‸ yuˬ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve mawˇ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:9 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ leh teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ loˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ maˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo laˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hkʼa loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ ngaˬ te taˍ leh, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ htawˇ ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:10 Hkri‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ chi hkʼe nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸, Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ tawˍ taˍ maˇ gʼa." 
2Corinthians11:11 Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw le. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve pa taw laˇ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ponˬ la htaˇ ngaˬ te chehˇ ve hkʼe, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ htawˇ kʼaw‸ te kʼai tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe te leh, heˍ puiˉ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:14 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, anˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Saˍtanˍ ka‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:15 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe te ve kʼo, anˇ tuˬ uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, Yawˇ hui kanˉ te ve hkʼe, awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ kʼo gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ shaˍ. Ngaˬ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ taˇ dawˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui chi hkʼe dawˇ ve ka‸, ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ a ciˉ yaw hpeh‸ tuˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼe ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ sheˍ." 
2Corinthians11:17 (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ tcuh laˇ leh kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ chaweh te leh kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:18 Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ awˬ lawn nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ.)" 
2Corinthians11:19 Nawˬ hui cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ nawˬ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa yeunˇ hkanˍ ve law." 
2Corinthians11:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ ceˬ te tcuh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ hiˉ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ heˍ caˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ hta ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:21 Nawˬ hui hta‸ oˇ hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, ya‸ taw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ haˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ htawˇ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ haˆ ve yoˬ. (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼe ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
2Corinthians11:22 Yawˇ hui Heˍbrehˇ chaw hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Ngaˬ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Ngaˬ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Ngaˬ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians11:23 Yawˇ hui Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve laˇ. Yawˇ hui a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, chaw gʼuˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ.) Shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ kanˉ te ve yoˬ. Shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ jaw ve yoˬ. Gʼaw maˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ dawˆ laˇ jaw‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ jaw ve yoˬ. Suh paˇ neˇ ve ka‸ laiˉ pawˆ ngaˬ cawˬ jaw ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:24 Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ngaˬ hta‸ shehˆ chi kʼawˇ hkʼe jaw‸ laˇ ve, ngaˇ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ jaw peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:25 Shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ gawˇ taˬ jaw‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ leh, haˉ pui baˬ laˇ ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ gʼa hkanˍ jaw peuˬ. Shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ luˬ kʼai ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ jaw peuˬ. Teˇ nyi teˇ haˉ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa chehˇ jaw peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:26 Laiˉ pawˆ ngaˬ ca te toˇ jaw peuˬ. Iˉ kaˆ lawˬ hta‸ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, Chaw hkʼawˇ hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, venˇ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ tuˬ cawˬ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa hpuˇ jaw peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:27 Kanˉ te hkeu‸ leh heuˬ jaˇ ve, laiˉ pawˆ maˇ gʼa zuh‸ ve, awˍ meu‸ ve leh iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve, laiˉ pawˆ caˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve, kaˆ ve leh veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ jaw peuˬ." 
2Corinthians11:28 Awˬ ceuˬ chi ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon dawˇ haˍ dawˇ hkiˉ ve teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, teˇ nyi le le ngaˬ hta‸ nyiˉ tiˍ taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:29 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ htawˇ awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ nuˇ leh laˇ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ kʼai ve kʼo, ngaˬ maˇ hpeh‸ bawˬ leh laˇ." 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ gʼa yaw ve kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ceh, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ yaw tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:31 Ngaˬ heˍ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ bon uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:32 Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ tuˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ Aˍreˍtaˆ awˬ hawˉ ve mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ lehˬ, Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ hta‸ shaw tcuh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians11:33 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˉ puˍ lu awˬ hkʼaw keu leh, lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ ehˉ awˬ hpe‸ lo ngaˬ hta‸ hpehˇ ya‸-e laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, mvuhˇmiˬ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa ponˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ leh awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo maw laˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ngaˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ shaˍ." 
2Corinthians12:2 Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ ve teˇ chi awˇ hkʼaw‸ htaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma shehˆ htai‸ teˇ htai‸ hkʼa gaˬ chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. (Awˬ to taˆ-e ve leh naˍ, awˬ ha ceh tiˉ taˆ-e ve leh naˍ, ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ. Gʼuiˬsha ceh tiˉ shiˍ ve yoˬ.)" 
2Corinthians12:3 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Paˍraˍdiˇsuˆ lo chiˇ taˆ-e ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. (Awˬ to taˆ-e ve leh naˍ, awˬ ha ceh tiˉ taˆ-e ve leh naˍ, ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ. Gʼuiˬsha ceh tiˉ shiˍ ve yoˬ.)" 
2Corinthians12:4 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸ kʼoˆ maˇ keunˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. 
2Corinthians12:5 Chaw oˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ shaˍ. Ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ to awˬ lawn nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ gaˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chi nyiˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ awˬ lawn maˇ gʼa dawˇ nyi tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ lawn nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼoˆ." 
2Corinthians12:7 Uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ leuˉ leh maˇ gʼa taˍ uiˍ tuˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ aˉ chuˇ teˇ maˬ tcuhˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Aˉ chuˇ chi lehˬ, Saˍtanˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ awˬ to hta‸ leuˉ leh maˇ gʼa taˍ uiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:8 Aˉ chuˇ chi hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ shehˆ pawˆ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ ve awˬ bon lehˬ, nawˬ awˬ pon law‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ kaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve kanˇ paˆ biˇ la ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ ve kanˇ paˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gʼa cawˬ taˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn hta‸ leuˉ leh nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha lehˬ ha kʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ awˬ pon gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ laˇ ve, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve, tu‸ jaˇ hkanˍ jaˇ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ha lehˬ ha kʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ngaˬ lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh laˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ maˇ hpeh‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ chehˇ." 
2Corinthians12:12 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ te maˍ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hu ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ taˍ uiˍ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ taˍ uiˍ ve, aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ le. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hu ve, ngaˬ ve ya‸ kuiˬ chi hta‸ a ciˉ hpehˇ laˇ-oˆ." 
2Corinthians12:14 Shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ chi beu‸ ngaˬ gu taˍ leh, chi teˇ pawˆ ka‸ nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa hu tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ve mawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ ca ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ ca ve yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ pa awˬ e awˬ pon mawˇ jeˬ gʼa shaw hpoˆ taˍ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ pa awˬ e teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon mawˇ jeˬ gʼa shaw hpoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:15 Nawˬ hui ve co ha awˬ pon ngaˬ ve mawˇ jeˬ gʼa peuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve awˬ to gʼa luˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ha lehˬ ha kʼa te tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ la ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼa i kʼai tuˬ ve leh laˇ." 
2Corinthians12:16 Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hu ve htawˇ, ngaˬ cuˇ yiˍ te leh heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:17 Nawˬ hui chehˇ kuiˬ lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼai tcuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ ngaˬ heˍ yuˬ ve leh laˇ." 
2Corinthians12:18 Tiˇtuˆ nawˬ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai tuˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ leh, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ geh kʼai tcuh ve yoˬ. Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ ve leh laˇ. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh kanˉ te ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ ya‸ kʼaw teˇ caˆ tiˉ toˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
2Corinthians12:19 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ to awˬ pon kʼaw‸ yaw hkʼaw‸ chehˇ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui chi maw maw dawˇ chehˇ ve leh laˇ. Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui uiˍ la yeˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui maˇ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui dawˇ law taˍ ve hkʼe ngaˬ htawˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve, hkawehˉ da‸ ve, nyi ma zuhˆ ve, pehˬ da‸ hpaˆ da‸ ve, hkʼaiˉ da‸ ve, hkʼawˇ deˇ ve, nyi ma uiˍ ve leh, duiˆ-ehˍ shaˇ-ehˍ te ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ hehˉ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians12:21 Nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hta‸ nyiˉ ya‸ laˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te ve, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve leh, te ponˬ te leuˉ ve hta‸ te ve chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ hehˉ teh‸ dawˇ hkiˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:1 Chi teˇ pawˆ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ ve lehˬ, shehˆ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ ti cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo shehˆ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:2 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ ca guiˇ la htaˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ laˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ venˇbaˆ te ve chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, te ya‸ chehˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la ve kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Corinthians13:3 Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh tawˇ yaw chehˇ ve leh naˍ teh‸, nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ gaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ ponˬ piˇ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ te tuˬ, Hkri‸ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo gʼa hkanˍ suh ve htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh te‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:5 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ-aw laˇ, maˇ yeˬ chehˇ laˇ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ tehˆ nyi lawˇ nyi sheˍ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, lawˇ nyi ve hta‸ hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve chaw hpeh‸ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ." 
2Corinthians13:6 Lawˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui lehˬ hkanˍ gʼa ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:7 Haiˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Lawˇ nyi ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkanˍ gʼa peuˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ hui tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. ngaˬ hui hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve chaw hta‸ shuˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ ngaˬ hui te‸ chiˉ te maˇ hpeh‸. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hui te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve pa taw ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui da‸ la biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hehnˇ chaweh maˇ gʼa yehˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve aˉ yaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:11 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ leh ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Da‸ la biˇ la piˇ-oˆ. Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ-o‸. Cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Corinthians13:12 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo boˆ nu da‸ leh la‸ sheh caˉ da‸-o‸. 
2Corinthians13:13 Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ ve pehnˇ ve leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians1:1 Ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve Pawˇlu‸ leh ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gaˍlaˍtiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:2 Ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ geh lo gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw yaˇ hta‸ pa taw hpeh‸ la ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ leh yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pa taw hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:3 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Galatians1:4 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, haiˬ ve chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ awˬ to chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:5 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ. 
Galatians1:6 Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ haˆ haˆ baˬ taˉ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:7 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ cawˬ tehˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te laˇ leh, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ yuˬ hpfuhˆ gaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ."
