Galatians1:8 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve bon hkawˇ ngaˬ hui maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve kʼo, hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians1:9 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ shaˍ. Nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve bon hkawˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve kʼo, hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians1:10 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ ngaˬ te ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ ngaˬ te ve laˇ. Chaw yaˇ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ ca ve laˇ. Chaw yaˇ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ ca chehˇ sheˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians1:11 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ geh lo tawˆ la ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ tcuh laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ geh lo ngaˬ gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Shu ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve pa taw gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:13 Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui kaˇ jaw ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ fawˉ mehˍ leh, luˬ kʼai tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:14 Ngaˬ ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui teh taˉ laˇ ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tuˬ ngaˬ nyi ma pfuhˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ve chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo a sha‸ ngaˬ hkʼe ceh ve chaw maˇ-awˍ ve a‸ kehˉ Yuˇda‸ awˬ liˇ hta‸ ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ maˇ paw la sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ laˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ," 
Galatians1:16 yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ngaˬ hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, chaw yaˇ geh ngaˬ ca jehˬ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians1:17 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ tcuh yaˇ maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ htaˇ tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ taˍ ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh ngaˬ maˇ kʼai. Aˍraˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Daˍmaˍsehˆ venˇ lo kʼaw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:18 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, shehˆ hkʼaw‸ gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Keˍhpaˆ geh ngaˬ ca guiˇ-e tuˬ Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo kʼai leh, yawˇ geh teˇ chi ngaˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:19 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yaˍko hta‸ maˇ heˆ kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ." 
Galatians1:20 (Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ heˍ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
Galatians1:21 Oˇ ve hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Suˇriˆ leh Kiˇliˇkiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo ngaˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:22 Oˇ htaˇ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw sheˍ." 
Galatians1:23 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ laˇ jaw ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, oˇ htaˇ yawˇ te luˬ chehˇ ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ chi beu‸ bon maˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, kʼoˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians1:24 Ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. 
Galatians2:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, teˇ chi awˇ hkʼaw‸ gaˬ htaˇ, ngaˬ Tiˇtuˆ hta‸ shiˍ veu leh, Baˍnaˍbaˆ geh Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lo teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:2 Gʼuiˬsha hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ te peuˬ ve kanˉ leh chi beu‸ te chehˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼe leˇ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ yawˇ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. (Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Galatians2:3 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kʼai ve Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, shu yawˇ hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ tcuh." 
Galatians2:4 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve ponˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ jaˆ nyi leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˬ ceˬ te tcuh laˇ tuˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teh‸ kʼoˆ ve ka‸, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi maˇ heˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh lo hkʼawˇ lo‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ na." 
Galatians2:6 Awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ htehˍ laˇ. (Yawˇ hui awˬ hoˉ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ dawˇ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi.)" 
Galatians2:7 Yawˇ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ htehˍ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha Peˍtruˆ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:8 (Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ Peˍtruˆ hta‸ aˉ yaˇ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ aˉ yaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Galatians2:9 Ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, nyi ma yeˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ, Yaˍkoˆ, Keˍhpaˆ leh Yoˇhanˬ hui lehˬ, Baˍnaˍbaˆ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh caˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve lehˬ, awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui geh kʼai leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw hui geh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ da‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:10 Haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ, chi teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ hui lawˬ hkawˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te tuˬ ngaˬ htawˇ te gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:11 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Keˍhpaˆ lehˬ, Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ te maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve pa taw, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ taˍ leh deˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yaˍkoˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ htaˇ, Keˍhpaˆ lehˬ, buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh awˍ caˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ moˍ hta‸ yawˇ kawˆ ve pa taw, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh, awˬ chawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:13 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Yuˇda‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh maˇ heˆ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ te ve pa taw, Baˍnaˍbaˆ ka‸ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:14 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh hteˇ lehˍ maˇ kʼai ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ Keˍhpaˆ hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ te leh buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ te ve kʼo, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ te tuˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ nyiˉ te ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:15 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, paw la htaˇ ka‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians2:16 Ngaˬ hui Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve ka‸, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve pa taw maˇ heˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ taˍ peuˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians2:17 Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui ca chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˆ la ve kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ venˇbaˆ awˬ pon kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve leh laˇ. Chi hkʼe maˇ heˆ taˬ." 
Galatians2:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hpaˆ baˬ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ gu te ve kʼo, ngaˬ te ya‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo gʼa te‸ tuˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpawˇ lo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ suh ve yoˬ." 
Galatians2:20 Ngaˬ Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ te‸ chehˇ ve lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ to maˇ heˆ, Hkri‸ ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ngaˬ a sha‸ te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ leh ngaˬ awˬ pon yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ peuˬ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ngaˬ yonˍ ve pa taw te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians2:21 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ ngaˬ baˬ taˉ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la gʼa ve hkʼe kʼo, Hkri‸ suh ve lehˬ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:1 Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve Gaˍlaˍtiˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh ve hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve htawˇ, a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ heˍ gʼa ve le." 
Galatians3:2 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe ceh tiˉ na nyi gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa ve lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw laˇ." 
Galatians3:3 Nawˬ hui chi taw taw cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ leh laˇ. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui tanˬ te taˍ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ cuˇ leh te peuˬ piˇ tuˬ ve laˇ." 
Galatians3:4 Chi taw taw tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼe leˇ hkanˍ peuˬ ve leh laˇ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ maˇ dawˇ. 
Galatians3:5 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ leh nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo anˇ tuˬ te tawˆ la shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve laˇ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui kaˇ leh yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te ve laˇ." 
Galatians3:6 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:7 Hkʼe te leh, yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ-o‸." 
Galatians3:8 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ Li‸ hpu shiˍ taˍ mawˬ taˍ leh, Nawˬ hta‸ pa taw chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Liˬ hpu lehˬ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:9 Hkʼe te leh, yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yonˍ puiˉ ve Aˍbraˍhanˍ geh teˇ geh awˬ bon gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:10 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, hkeu ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ te tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:11 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians3:12 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te ve chaw lehˬ, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ gʼa te kʼai tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:13 Suhˆ cehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ gʼa hkanˍ suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lo laˬ ve hkeu ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:14 Hkʼe te leh, Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ bon Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la leh, yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Galatians3:15 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chaw yaˇ hui gʼa hpuˇ gʼa mawˬ jaw ve tawˇ pa haˉ ngaˬ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ shaˍ. Chaw yaˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ te leh li‸ hkʼa deh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ peuˬ ve kʼo, chaw yaˇ hui te ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ baˬ taˉ maˇ hpeh‸. Kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
Galatians3:16 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ leh yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, laiˉ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ yoˬ." 
Galatians3:17 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˇ ha shehˆ chi hkʼaw‸ gaˬ htaˇ, yawˇ piˇ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ leh te luˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians3:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ shinˉ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼo, ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ caˉ da‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ awˬ shinˉ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:19 Hkʼe te leh, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Ka ti‸ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ ve ceh ceh, te ya‸ te jiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ htehˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ cuˇ leh, awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:20 Awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ cawˬ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha lehˬ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:21 Hkʼe te leh, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ cawˇ da‸ leh tawˍ taˍ ve laˇ. Oˇ hkʼe maˇ heˆ taˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, piˇ taˍ ve awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw awˬ tehˬ awˬ na cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians3:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe gʼa tuˬ, Li‸ hpu lehˬ awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ awˬ hawˉ lo teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:23 Yonˍ ve oˇ ve maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ htaˇ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hpeh taˍ leh shaw taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ leh, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:24 Hkʼe te leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ Hkri‸ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:25 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la peuˬ ve pa taw, nyi ha‸ shaˉ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui maˇ kʼaw‸ chehˇ." 
Galatians3:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians3:27 Nawˬ hui Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ yuˬ peuˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ hta‸ veu‸ deh taˍ peuˬ." 
Galatians3:28 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Yuˇda‸ chaw leh Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ ceˬ leh ponˬ ve chaw maˇ cawˬ. Hawˉ hkʼaˆ leh yaˇ miˇ maˇ cawˬ." 
Galatians3:29 Nawˬ hui lehˬ Hkri‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:1 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ shinˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, awˬ ceˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ peun da‸." 
Galatians4:2 Awˬ pa tinˍ taˍ ve awˬ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, yaˇ ehˉ lehˬ shaw shehˍ hpaˇ leh ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:3 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ gʼa te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:4 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hpeh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ piˇ leh, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, awˬ yanˇ biˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:5 Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ geh paw la leh, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo paw la ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:6 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo peu laˇ leh, Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, Aˍbaˆ A pa-oˬ teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:7 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ lehˬ awˬ ceˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸. Nawˬ lehˬ awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pa taw awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:8 Nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve gʼuiˬsha teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo nawˬ hui awˬ ceˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ tehˬ kʼoˆ kʼo Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe ka‸, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼo‸-e ve le. Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ hui awˬ ceˬ kʼaw‸ te gaˇ ve le." 
Galatians4:10 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ awˬ nyi, ha pa, awˬ tcuhˉ awˬ yanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ ce kan chehˇve law leˇ." 
Galatians4:11 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼaˇ na te ve lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ hehˉ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ te ya‸ laˇ jaw." 
Galatians4:13 Ngaˬ awˬ to naˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ teˇ pawˆ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ gʼa maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:14 Ngaˬ awˬ to naˬ ve chi lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon hkanˍ haˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ te, ngaˬ hta‸ maˇ baˬ taˉ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:15 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui ha lehˬ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ chi beu‸ hkʼaˬ lo mehˉ kʼai ve le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ hta‸ kʼehˉ tawˆ leh ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe kʼo, pe‸ laˇ peuˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:16 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ kʼoˆ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ la ve laˇ." 
Galatians4:17 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon gʼaˇ hte‸ awˬ bon te laˇ ve htawˇ, da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ dawˇ law leh te ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon nawˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ awˬ bon te piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui dawˇ law ve pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo chehˇ tcuh gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:18 Da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon shu nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ awˬ bon te laˇ ve lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ da‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ceh tiˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians4:19 Ngaˬ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Hkri‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ chehˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yaˇ paw tuˬ naˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ gʼa kʼaw‸ hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:20 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ lawn dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve pa taw, chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ gaˇ leh, ngaˬ kʼoˆ hehnˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ pa gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:21 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ gaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ kaˇ laˇ. Ngaˬ hta‸ hto laˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians4:22 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ ma ve yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ awˬ ceˬ ma maˇ heˆ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:23 Awˬ ceˬ ma ve yaˇ paˍ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ pa taw paw la ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceˬ ma maˇ heˆ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yaˇ paˍ lehˬ, ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:24 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ tehˆ nyi leh henˇ yuˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Siˉnaˆ hkʼaw hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve Haˍgaˍraˆ yoˬ. Yawˇ yaˇ paw la piˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon paw la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:25 Haˍgaˍraˆ lehˬ, Aˍraˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Siˉnaˆ hkʼaw hpeh‸ leh, chi beu‸ cawˬ taˍ ve Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:26 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo cawˬ ve Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ ma maˇ heˆ ve yaˇ miˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:27 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Yaˇ maˇ paw jaw ve chaw meh ma-oˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Yaˇ paw tuˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ha lehˬ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ hpawˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, awˬ hpawˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ a‸ kehˉ awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:28 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Iˉcaˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:29 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ pa taw paw la ve yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chi beu‸ ka‸ oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:30 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Li‸ hpu hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve le. Awˬ ceˬ ma leh yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceˬ ma ve yaˇ paˍ lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ ma maˇ heˆ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yaˇ paˍ geh teˇ geh awˬ shinˉ hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians4:31 Hkʼe te leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ awˬ ceˬ ma ve yaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ ceˬ ma maˇ heˆ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ve yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:1 Ngaˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ awˬ pon Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, hkʼa deh‸ yeˬ chehˇ leh, awˬ ceˬ pfuhˇ ve ehˉ kʼaweh‸ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ taˇ kʼaw‸ pfuhˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians5:2 Na sheˍ. Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ." 
Galatians5:3 Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ shaˍ. Oˇ hkʼe ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼa na yuˬ leh gʼa te ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:4 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui hkʼa dawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ kʼai peuˬ. Awˬ bon hta‸ nawˬ hui shonˇ kʼai peuˬ." 
Galatians5:5 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ. Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians5:7 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ gʼuiˇ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa na yuˬ tuˬ, a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ laˇ ve le." 
Galatians5:8 Nawˬ hui nyi ma chi hkʼe hpfuhˆ kʼai tuˬ beˬ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Galatians5:9 Diˇ a ciˉ ceh tiˉ ka‸ hkaoˍmonˇ teˇ diˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ciˇ la piˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ. 
Galatians5:10 Ngaˬ dawˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui ka‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ dawˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te laˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians5:11 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ chehˇ sheˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ sheˍ le. Oˇ hkʼe maˍ piˇ ve kʼo, la‸ ka hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ peuˬ." 
Galatians5:12 Nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ shawˆ baˬ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ponˬ ve chi, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai tuˬ awˬ pon taˇ yehˇ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ ceˬ te da‸-o‸." 
Galatians5:14 Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ biˇ la peuˬ." 
Galatians5:15 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ che‸ caˇ da‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ gʼa te luˬ da‸ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o." 
Galatians5:16 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ hui maˇ kʼai taˬ." 
Galatians5:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ heh‸ hkehnˉ leh, Awˬ ha hpu htawˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ heh‸ hkehnˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, oˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ tanˬ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼaw‸ chehˇ." 
Galatians5:19 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la peuˬ. Kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te ve, peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve hta‸ te ve," 
Galatians5:20 shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve, neˇ te ve, canˇ da‸ ve, ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, nyi ma zuhˆ ve, tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve, hpaˆ da‸ guiˇ da‸ ve, awˬ moˍ pehˬ da‸ ve," 
Galatians5:21 hkawehˉ ve, tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve, ha lehˬ tuˬ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve, chi hkʼe ve teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e teh‸, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians5:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve, ha lehˬ ve, dawˇ sha ve, dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve, ha kʼaˉ ve, shu awˬ pon da‸ ve hta‸ te ve, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve," 
Galatians5:23 nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa te teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ maˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Galatians5:24 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ hkʼa caˉ da‸ ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve a loˍ leh sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ geh la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ pehˍ peuˬ." 
Galatians5:25 Ngaˬ hui Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo te‸ chehˇ ve kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Galatians5:26 Ngaˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ da‸ tuˬ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hkawehˉ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui baˬ taˉ-a veuˬ." 
Galatians6:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ kʼaw‸ da‸ la tuˬ, nawˬ hui co ha hpawˇ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gu piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ htawˇ, beˬ ve lawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ gʼa kʼai tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ to shaˍ ti‸ te-o." 
Galatians6:2 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ vuiˬ hta‸ ga pfuhˇ da‸-o‸. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Hkri‸ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui te biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:3 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ te‸ chiˉ te maˇ puiˉ ve ka‸, ngaˬ lehˬ, cheuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ heˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians6:4 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, a shu yawˇ te taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tehˆ nyi-o. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, shu te taˍ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ awˬ to te taˍ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ yawˇ gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ vuiˬ hta‸ gʼa pfuhˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:6 Bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa henˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ maˍ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ pehˬ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians6:7 Taˇ dawˇ ya‸. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te maˇ hpeh‸. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ yawˇ sheˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:8 A shu yawˇ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ sheˍ ve kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo luˬ ve sheˆ ve hta‸ gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ sheˍ ve kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:9 Da‸ ve hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ nuˇ leh te-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui nyi ma maˇ luˬ ve kʼo, awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ hui gʼa gʼeu‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:10 Te hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon da‸ ve hta‸ te-a veuˬ. Yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon leuˉ leh da‸ ve hta‸ te-a veuˬ." 
Galatians6:11 Ngaˬ awˬ to ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve li‸ mehˆ chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ ve hta‸ nyi-o. 
Galatians6:12 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ nyi sha tuˬ te gaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ guiˬ meuˇ gʼa shoˍ tuˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ nyiˉ leh te tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve la‸ ka hta‸ pa taw fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ te ve ceh tiˉ yoˬ." 
Galatians6:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ to ka‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa biˇ na yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ tcuh gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians6:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ ngaˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve la‸ ka awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. La‸ ka oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw miˬguiˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ awˬ pon suh peuˬ leh, ngaˬ htawˇ miˬguiˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suh baˬ taˉ peuˬ." 
Galatians6:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ shoˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ. Chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la ve teˇ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians6:16 Chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la ve awˬ liˇ chi awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ leh ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Galatians6:17 Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hta‸ taˇ kʼaw‸ sho‸ sha‸ laˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ maiˉ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Galatians6:18 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ" 
Ephesians1:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ yeˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:2 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Ephesians1:3 Ngaˬ hui Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. Yawˇ lehˬ, co ha hpawˇ awˬ pon mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ le le, Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ na‸ laˇ peuˬ." 
Ephesians1:4 Miˬguiˬ maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ da‸ kehˬ ve chaw leh, ya‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:5 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ peuˬ. Chi hkʼe te tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:6 Yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ jaˇ ve yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve yawˇ ve awˬ bon ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:7 Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa peuˬ. Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ ve awˬ bon uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:8 Cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ leh shiˍ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon ngaˬ hui hta‸ shaˬ te shaˬ maˇ la tuˬ yawˇ te laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ lehˬ faˉ taˍ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ. Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh chi hkʼe te tuˬ yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:10 Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, awˬ yanˇ biˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha tcuhˉ da‸ caˉ da‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tcuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:11 Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui htawˇ awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ peuˬ." 
Ephesians1:12 Hkri‸ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ dawˇ law taˍ ve ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ ve awˬ pon, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ peuˬ." 
Ephesians1:13 Nawˬ hui htawˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ ve awˬ lawn ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ maiˉ taˍ peuˬ." 
Ephesians1:14 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa biˇ gʼa caˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ taˍ peuˬ. Chi lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui chiˇ mvuh tuˬ ve awˬ pon yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:15 Nawˬ hui Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ." 
Ephesians1:16 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:17 Ngaˬ bon lawˬ htaˇ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ, dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma leh hpeu‸ maˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:18 Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, dawˇ law tuˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ shinˉ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve leh hkʼaˬ ma awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ dawˇ mawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:19 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ hui hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon, kʼoˆ maˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ ve ka‸, ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha te htaˇ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ hehnˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:20 Kanˇ paˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo yawˇ hta‸ mui tcuh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:21 Yawˇ lehˬ, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ, jawˇmawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, awˬ meh hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ, chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yawˇ uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:22 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo Gʼuiˬsha teh taˍ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hkʼa caˉ da‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians1:23 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to yoˬ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ biˇ ve hkʼe, hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼaw‸ biˇ la tuˬ yawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:1 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, te ya‸ kuiˬ leh venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:2 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui miˬguiˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ hpe lo ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ka‸ nawˬ hui kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve awˬ ha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:3 Oˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh chehˇ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ te ve pa taw, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ te gaˇ ve hkʼe te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui te ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha kʼaˉ puiˉ jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve pa taw," 
Ephesians2:5 venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui suh taˍ ve htawˇ, Hkri‸ geh hkʼa geh yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ la piˇ peuˬ. (Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa peuˬ.)" 
Ephesians2:6 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh hkʼa geh ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇ naw ma ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ geh mui tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:7 Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon te ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui te ve pa taw gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:9 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nyi ma maˇ gʼa uiˍ tuˬ, kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa ve maˇ heˆ." 
Ephesians2:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ te taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te kʼai tuˬ awˬ pon awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha gu taˍ peuˬ." 
Ephesians2:11 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hpeh‸ ve nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Hkri‸ hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ la‸ sheh te ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:12 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ awˬ moˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa pawnˇ da‸. Awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ huiˬ maˇ caˉ da‸. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo dawˇ law kuiˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians2:13 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw awˬ paˇ neˇ lo gaˬ la peuˬ." 
Ephesians2:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui chaw nyiˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ la piˇ leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ kaˍ lo ko taˍ ve gʼo‸ pa hta‸ yawˇ hpaˆ baˬ peuˬ." 
Ephesians2:15 Yawˇ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ leh tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, chaw nyiˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw awˬ suhˉ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ la leh, cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:16 La‸ ka hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui chaw nyiˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ awˬ pon htawˇ yawˇ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve pa taw, canˇ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:17 Hkri‸ laˬ leh, nawˬ hui vuiˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, neˇ kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui chaw nyiˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ pa geh kʼai tuˬ, ya‸ kʼaw cawˬ taˍ peuˬ." 
Ephesians2:19 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui lehˬ shu mvuhˇmiˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸. Hkehˉ chaw ka‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸. Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui geh teˇ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ chehˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:20 Yehˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuh yaˇ hui leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hpeh‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ to lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:21 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ yehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ caˉ da‸ taˍ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ kehˬ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ uiˍ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians2:22 Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yawˇ lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ yuˬ leh yehˬ oˇ ve hta‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:1 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ pon htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:2 Nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui awˬ pon ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:3 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ a ciˉ bvuh‸ laˇ peuˬ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:4 Li‸ chi hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaw chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Hkri‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:5 Faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve awˬ lawn, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ piˇ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ kehˬ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:6 Faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Yuˇda‸ chaw hui geh teˇ geh awˬ shinˉ gʼa caˇ ve, yawˇ hui geh awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ hpeh‸ la leh, piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:7 Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve awˬ bon ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼe leˇ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ te tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ chi hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:8 Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve biˇ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ leh awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon maˍ piˇ tuˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ shu a‸ kehˉ i ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, awˬ bon chi yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:9 Peuˬ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la biˇ la chehˇ ve awˬ lawn chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ka‸, awˬ bon chi hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:10 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw faˉ taˍ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇ hpe lo chehˇ ve uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ chi beu‸ shiˍ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, oˇ htaˇ yawˇ faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:11 Chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, miˬguiˬ maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ dawˇ law taˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:12 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, maˇ kawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:13 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma maˇ gʼa luˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:14 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ pa taw, Awˬ pa mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:15 Yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:16 Ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yawˇ yehˇ leh, awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ lawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Ephesians3:17 nawˬ hui yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw Hkri‸ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ yeˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:18 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ geu tcuhˆ naˉ leh awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ yeˬ ve pa taw, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh Hkri‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkʼaˬ ma kʼehˬ ve, hkʼaˬ ma zuhˬ ve, hkʼaˬ ma mvuh ve leh hkʼaˬ ma naˉ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui htawˇ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon ka‸ ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:19 Chaw yaˇ shiˍ maˇ gaˬ ve Hkri‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ awˬ pon ka‸ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe shiˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve biˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:20 Gʼuiˬsha ve kanˇ paˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui lawˬ ve leh dawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh yawˇ maˇ chaweh te laˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians3:21 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, co co taiˍ taiˍ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Ephesians4:1 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon htawnˍ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve ngaˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ceh tiˉ te kʼai-o." 
Ephesians4:2 Hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ nehˬ ve, nyi ma nuˇ nuˇ nehˬ nehˬ ve, nyi ma dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve leh, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ da‸ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai-o." 
Ephesians4:3 Aˉ caˆ hkeh hpeh tsuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hpeh tsuh‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o." 
Ephesians4:4 Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui dawˇ law kuiˬ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ cawˬ tuˬ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ cawˬ leh, Awˬ ha hpu teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:5 Jawˇmawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ, baˆtiˆsaˬ teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:6 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ chehˇ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:7 Hkri‸ lehˬ yawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ hkʼaˬ ma pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ bon chi ma gʼa peuˬ." 
Ephesians4:8 Hkʼe te leh, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Yawˇ lehˬ mvuh kuiˬ lo taˆ-e ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ yawˇ hpeh veu leh, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:9 Yawˇ taˆ-e ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ miˬguiˬ awˬ hawˉ teˇ htai‸ lo yawˇ ya‸-e taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Ephesians4:10 Ya‸-e ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ biˇ la piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, mvuhˇ nawˬ ma hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ taˆ-e ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:11 Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, shu awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ to uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:12 La‸ shawnˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ tcuh yaˇ te tuˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ bon maˍ paˍ te tuˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ paˍ te tuˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ paˍ te tuˬ, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:13 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ shiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, uiˍ la peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ biˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hui htawˇ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ te laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:14 Chi hkʼe uiˍ la ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui yaˇ ehˉ maˇ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ leh, la‸ lehnˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ cuˇ yiˍ te leh heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ maˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ haw meuˆ chiˇ veu ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ choˬ hpawˇ oˇ hpawˇ meuˆ chiˇ veu gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Ephesians4:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yaw leh, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hkʼa biˇ biˇ uiˍ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:16 Oˉ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve pa taw, awˬ to teˇ to hkʼa peu-eˬ uiˍ la chehˇ leh, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ la chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ to oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ tcuhˉ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ pa taw, teˇ tawn leh teˇ tawn caˉ da‸ taˍ leh, awˬ hkʼeun teˇ maˬ peuˬ teˇ maˬ a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ cawˬ ve hkʼe te ve pa taw, awˬ to oˇ ve uiˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:17 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ leh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ te ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui taˇ kʼaw‸ te. Yawˇ hui dawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:18 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nyi ma heh leh te‸ chiˉ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ kʼai leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ caˉ da‸." 
Ephesians4:19 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ya‸ taw puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ te gaˇ jaˇ leh, peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve hta‸ te tuˬ yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:20 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Hkri‸ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe gʼa henˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Ephesians4:21 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh gʼa henˇ taˍ ve kʼo, haiˬ ve oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Ephesians4:22 Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ piˍ hta‸ kʼehˆ baˬ taˉ-oˆ. Nyi ma awˬ piˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui te chehˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh, ya‸ kʼai tuˬ te puiˉ ve sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:23 Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ hkʼaˇ awˬ suhˉ cawˬ la piˇ-oˆ. 
Ephesians4:24 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hteˇ ve cawˇ ve leh da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hpanˍ taˍ ve nyi ma awˬ suhˉ hta‸ veu‸ deh-o." 
Ephesians4:25 Hkʼe te leh, heˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ le le a shu yawˇ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ceh tiˉ yaw da‸-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ caˉ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians4:26 Nawˬ hui nyi ma zuhˆ ve htawˇ, venˇbaˆ taˇ te. Mvuhˇ nyi maˇ kʼehˬ sheˍ htaˇ, nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ mehˉ kʼai piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
Ephesians4:27 Neˇhaiˬ kanˉ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ taˇ piˇ." 
Ephesians4:28 Shu ve mawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˇ jaw ve chaw taˇ kʼaw‸ hkʼawˇ loˬ. Loˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ ga piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ sheh yehˇ leh da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te-o." 
Ephesians4:29 Nawˬ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo cha‸ chiˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ peu-eˬ ka‸ taˇ tawˆ la piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ, shu loˍ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ ve tawˇ ceh tiˉ yaw leh, shu hta‸ uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ puiˉ ve da‸ ve tawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ yaw-o." 
Ephesians4:30 Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ taˇ dawˇ haˍ piˇ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ laˇ peuˬ 
Ephesians4:31 Shu hta‸ nyi ma naˬ ve, shu hta‸ beu‸ ve, shu hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve, shu hta‸ deˇ da‸ ya‸ da‸ ve leh, shu hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ-oˆ. Shu hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te gaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ htawˇ baˬ taˉ-oˆ." 
Ephesians4:32 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ da‸ ve hta‸ te da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha kʼaˉ da‸-o‸. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ peuˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ hpehˇ da‸-o‸." 
Ephesians5:1 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, yawˇ te ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te-o." 
Ephesians5:2 Hkri‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve pa taw, awˬ shaˉ hawnˉ ve tanˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ ve awˬ to Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ veyoˬ." 
Ephesians5:3 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve, cha‸ chiˆ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ve leh, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ yaw da‸ ve ceh ka‸ taˇ te. Hkri‸ yaˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ maˇ keunˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:4 Cha‸ chiˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh baˇ da‸ gʼuiˬ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ maˇ keunˍ. Chiˇ mvuh ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ yaw-o." 
Ephesians5:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw, maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve chaw leh, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ shinˉ maˇ gʼa ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. (Shu ve mawˇ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ.)" 
Ephesians5:6 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yaw leh nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:7 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ chawˇ taˇ te da‸." 
Ephesians5:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˉ lawˉ htaˇ naˆ ho‸ lehˍ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:9 Awˬ gʼeuˆ yaˇ hkʼe te kʼai-o. (Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ gʼeuˆ ve awˬ shiˍ lehˬ, da‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ.)" 
Ephesians5:10 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ la tuˬ te-o. 
Ephesians5:11 Awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ ve, naˆ hoˆ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ te. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve ya‸ kuiˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ tawˆ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, baˬ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui tawˇ yaw ve ceh ka‸ ya‸ taw tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:13 Ya‸ kuiˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ tawˆ la piˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ pa taw hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ, awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:14 Hkʼe te leh, chi hkʼe kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˇ la-o. Suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tuˬ la-o. Hkri‸ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba laˇ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:15 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe dawˇ ve te ve hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ hkʼa deh‸ taˍ-o‸. Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hui hkʼe taˇ te. Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hui hkʼe te chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:16 Chi beu‸ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ haiˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, awˬ yanˇ hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ leh hkʼa deh‸ yehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:17 Chi hta‸ pa taw, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve a loˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:18 A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve taˇ te. Oˇ hkʼe te ve lehˬ, te ponˬ te leuˉ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ ha hpu hkʼa biˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:19 Chiˇ mvuh ve tawˇ hkawˇ, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ leh co ha hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ da‸-o‸. Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh-o." 
Ephesians5:20 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ pon Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:21 Hkri‸ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hawˉ lo teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:22 Awˬ miˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hawˉ lo nawˬ hui chehˇ ve hkʼe, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:23 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ moˍ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, awˬ hpawˇ htawˇ awˬ miˇ ma ve oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ to hpeh‸ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:24 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve hkʼe, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians5:25 Awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Hkri‸ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ moˍ hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ha‸-o‸." 
Ephesians5:26 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ, iˉ kaˆ tsuhˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Hkri‸ lehˬ bon hkawˇ hta‸ yehˇ leh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ kehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ ve awˬ to chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:27 Yawˇ aˬ hto‸ ma te Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ kehˬ piˇ le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, da‸ kehˬ ve, ya‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve, awˬ kuiˉ awˬ haiˇ hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ moˍ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ moˍ oˇ ve yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ a‸ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon tsuhˇ kehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:28 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ha‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ to hta‸ canˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ caˍ piˇ taw piˇ leh, hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ moˍ hta‸ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ yawˇ awˬ to ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:31 Chi hta‸ pa taw hawˉ hkʼaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˉ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, teˇ suhˍ teˇ shaˍ tiˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:32 Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ, naˉ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ leh yawˇ ve awˬ moˍ awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians5:33 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le htawˇ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, a shu yawˇ awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ha‸-o‸. Awˬ miˇ ma htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan-o." 
Ephesians6:1 Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui ve awˬ pa awˬ e ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians6:2 Teˇ ceuˬ le le nawˬ awˬ pon da‸ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo co zuhˬ ha zuhˬ cawˬ tuˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o." 
Ephesians6:3 (Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ.)" 
Ephesians6:4 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ taˇ te. Nawˬ hui yaˇ hu duˬ hu ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ leh sheh kʼai-o." 
Ephesians6:5 Vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Hkri‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve hkʼe, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kawˆ cheˇ leh nyi ma teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo na yuˬ-o‸." 
Ephesians6:6 Shu mehˆ mawˬ kuiˬ ceh te ve leh, chaw yaˇ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ceh te ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, nyi ma pfuhˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha ve a loˍ hta‸ te-o." 
Ephesians6:7 Chaw yaˇ awˬ pon ceh te ve maˇ heˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon te ve hkʼe, ha lehˬ, ha kʼa te-o." 
Ephesians6:8 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, da‸ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, shu vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ponˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼaw‸ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians6:9 Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui htawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ te piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui kawˆ tuˬ taˇ te. Yawˇ hui ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ leh nawˬ hui ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, shu ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi ve teh‸ shiˍ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians6:10 Awˬ leh meuˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yeˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians6:11 Neˇhaiˬ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve la‸ caˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui veu‸ deh leh pfuhˇ taˍ-o‸," 
Ephesians6:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ chaw yaˇ hta‸ gʼa tawˍ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˇ paˆ cawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ naˆ ho‸ ve hta‸ uˉ peunˍ chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ hpe lo chehˇ ve haiˬ ve awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa tawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians6:13 Hkʼe te leh, haiˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yeˬ chehˇ hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ huˉ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve la‸ caˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸." 
Ephesians6:14 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui ve caw‸ cehˍ nyi hta‸ tsuh‸ taˍ leh, nyi ma hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ nyi ma pui hta‸ htanˬ tuˬ veu‸ deh leh," 
Ephesians6:15 cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ tuˬ te hpeh‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw gu taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkuiˉ nuˆ tcuhˉ ve hkʼe tcuhˉ leh huˉ taˍ-o‸. 
Ephesians6:16 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ bawˆ laˇ ve aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve hkaˆ ce teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ gʼa tuˬ, htanˬ tuˬ hta‸ pfuhˇ ve hkʼe, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pfuhˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Ephesians6:17 Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve sho uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ taˍ leh, Awˬ ha hpu ve aˉ htaw hta‸ pfuhˇ taˍ-o‸. Aˉ htaw oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians6:18 Hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ ve leh lawˬ hkawˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ te leh, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe bon lawˬ tuˬ awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ nuˇ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon bon lawˬ leh shaw chehˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians6:19 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve faˉ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon htawˇ bon lawˬ-o‸." 
Ephesians6:20 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve awˬ pon ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ tan te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, sho caˆ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˍ piˇ keunˍ ve hkʼe, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon bon lawˬ-o‸." 
Ephesians6:21 Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ leh hkʼaˬ hkʼe te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui htawˇ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tuˇhkiˆ lehˬ awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians6:22 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ leh, yawˇ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Ephesians6:23 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ pe‸ laˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Ephesians6:24 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ geh awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Philippians1:1 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Hpiˇliˇpiˆ venˇ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:2 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Philippians1:3 Teˇ pawˆ le le ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:4 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ htaˇ, teˇ pawˆ le le ha lehˬ ha kʼa bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:5 Awˉ lawˉ teˇ nyi te leh chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ nawˬ hui ngaˬ geh teˇ geh awˬ chawˇ te ve pa taw, ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:6 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ tanˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ kanˉ oˇ ve hta‸ te peuˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ yonˍ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:7 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ lawn ngaˬ chi hkʼe dawˇ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma dawˇ nawˇ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:9 Ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ puiˉ tuˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ teˇ ceuˬ leh pehˬ puiˉ fuiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ shaˬ te shaˬ uiˍ la maˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:10 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ leh yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw gʼa ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shiˍ nawˬ hui hkʼa biˇ cawˬ leh," 
Philippians1:11 Hkri‸ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ pon da‸ ve kehˬ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon ka‸ ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ gʼa hpuˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ bvuhˬ kʼai piˇ lawˬ ve law teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:13 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ awˬ pon ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ jawˇmawˇ lonˉ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ ta‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:14 Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve pa taw, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi maˇ-awˍ ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma yeˬ leh, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui maˇ kawˆ." 
Philippians1:15 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkawehˉ ve leh ya‸ da‸ gaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ awˬ lawn bon maˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, da‸ ve hta‸ tawˆ la tuˬ dawˇ law leh bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:16 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ lehˬ, cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ gʼa yaw hkʼaw‸ tuˬ ve awˬ pon ngaˬ choˬ kaˬ lo gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, da‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ law leh maˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ shiˍ leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:17 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkawehˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ awˬ lawn bon maˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hteˇ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ. Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve hta‸ leuˉ leh tu‸ hkanˍ jaˇ la tuˬ yawˇ hui dawˇ taˍ leh, tanˬ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon maˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:18 Hkʼe te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe le. Heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ awˬ lawn shu bon maˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ awˬ lawn shu bon maˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ha lehˬ leh, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ htawˇ kʼaw‸ ha lehˬ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ ha hpu ga laˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:20 Ngaˬ dawˇ law leh heuˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ ngaˬ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw leh, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chi beu‸ htawˇ ngaˬ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve hkʼa deh‸ cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ te‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, suh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ Hkri‸ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ suh ve kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ pon awˬ yawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:22 Ngaˬ awˬ to te‸ chehˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, suh ve leh te‸ ve, hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa leuˆ yuˬ tuˬ leh naˍ maˇ shiˍ." 
Philippians1:23 Oˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ awˬ kaˍ lo ngaˬ chehˇ leh dawˇ maˇ tawˆ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ kʼo‸-e leh Hkri‸ geh chehˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Chi lehˬ leuˉ leh da‸ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ gʼa chehˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon leuˉ leh awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:25 Ngaˬ chi hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui uiˍ la leh ha lehˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:26 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui leuˉ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:27 Hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼa te hkʼa dawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, ngaˬ gaˬ la leh nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon nawˬ hui teˇ geh gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:28 Nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ kawˆ. Maˇ kawˆ ve kʼo, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬ heˆ chi ve nyiˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians1:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui gʼa ve awˬ bon lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, yawˇ awˬ pon gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Philippians1:30 Ngaˬ gʼa bawˆ da‸ ve leh nawˬ hui gʼa bawˆ da‸ ve, teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, Bawˆ da‸ ve chi, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ te chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, chi beu‸ htawˇ ngaˬ te chehˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:1 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ gʼa ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ chawˇ te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu hta‸ dawˇ nyi leh ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve kʼo," 
Philippians2:2 ngaˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ chi hkʼe te-o. Nawˬ hui nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ, ha‸ da‸ pehnˇ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ leh, nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ taˍ hkʼaˇ teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Philippians2:3 Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ leh nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ a shu yawˇ awˬ to a‸ kehˉ shu hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ-oˆ." 
Philippians2:4 A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ taˇ dawˇ nyi. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, shu hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ dawˇ nyi-o." 
Philippians2:5 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ nyi ma taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Philippians2:6 Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ vawˆ taˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ maˇ dawˇ." 
Philippians2:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ kʼehˆ teh taˉ leh, awˬ ceˬ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ deh leh, chaw yaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:8 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ chaw yaˇ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ taˍ nehˬ leh, suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Suh ve oˇ ve lehˬ, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians2:9 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yuˬ uiˍ yuˬ mvuh piˇ leh, awˬ meh hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ meh yawˇ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa chehˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo hkui tcuhˉ gʼa teh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians2:11 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, maw‸ kʼaw teˇ maˬ le le shaˉ hkiˆ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians2:12 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, leuˉ leh chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, kawˆ ve cheˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o." 
Philippians2:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui te gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ tuˬ leh te gʼa tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:14 Nawˬ hui hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼanˇ ve leh tawˇ kʼaw‸ shaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ te." 
Philippians2:15 Oˇ hkʼe maˇ te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, shu hta‸ maˇ ya‸ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Nyi ma kʼaw‸ ve leh nyi ma hpfuhˆ puiˉ ve chaw chi teˇ co awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui lehˬ ya‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve, Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui vawˆ taˍ leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve hkʼe miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw chi teˇ co hta‸ nawˬ hui ba piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:16 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi gaˬ kʼo, ngaˬ nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ chi hkʼe cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ gʼuiˇ ve lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve htawˇ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Philippians2:17 Nawˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, tanˇ tuˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Tanˇ tuˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ hta‸ ngeuˍ baˬ ve htawˇ ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:18 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui htawˇ ha lehˬ leh, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Philippians2:19 Nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ, maˇ maw maw Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nyi ma taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ geh maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:21 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ pon da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ ca leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ca ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Tiˆmoˉseˍ lehˬ awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼaˬ ma da‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ pa geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve hkʼe, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:23 Hkʼe te leh, shu ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ cawˬ haˉ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:24 Maˇ maw maw ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui geh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:25 Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Eˇpaˍhpawˍdiˆ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh kʼaw‸ la tcuh cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te leh ngaˬ geh teˇ geh bon hpawˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve tcuh yaˇ ka‸ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ loˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:26 Yawˇ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nyi ma haˍ jaˇ leh, yawˇ naˬ ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ maˇ maˇ dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh kʼaw‸ la tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:27 Suh paˇ neˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ naˬ jaˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ha kʼaˉ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ leuˉ leh maˇ gʼa dawˇ haˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:28 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hui gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve a ciˉ hkehnˇ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh haˆ haˆ kʼaw‸ la tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Philippians2:29 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw, ha lehˬ ve hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸. Chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te-o." 
Philippians2:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ ga laˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo loˍ ve cuˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te biˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ ve a sha‸ tanˇ leh, Hkri‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve pa taw, yawˇ aˬ laˬ hkʼe suh ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ leh ve teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ teˇ pawˆ peuˬ teˇ pawˆ ngaˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ awˬ pon hkeu‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui yeˬ la tuˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:2 Hpuiˇ hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, haiˬ ve kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ baˬ shawˆ baˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ te-o." 
Philippians3:3 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma uiˍ kuiˬ cawˬ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ va ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:4 Awˬ tehˬ kʼoˆ kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va gaˇ kʼo, hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ va tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:5 Ngaˬ paw la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hiˉ nyi gaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Beˍyaˍmenˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, Heˍbrehˇ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo paw la ve Heˍbrehˇ chaw hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ Hpaˍriˍsehˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:6 Ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te jaw ve awˬ lawn hta‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ fawˉ mehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ lehˬ venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ yawˬ teˇ hpaˍ, Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ ha‸ ve pa taw, shonˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:8 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shonˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ ve pa taw, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shonˇ baˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:9 Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ peuˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:10 Ngaˬ htawˇ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ dawˇ law ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ka‸, yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ ka‸ shiˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Philippians3:11 yawˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh hkanˍ leh, yawˇ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ shuˍ da‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shonˇ baˬ leh, chiˇ baˬ peuˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:12 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ gʼa peuˬ, maˇ heˆ kʼo chi beu‸ ka‸ ngaˬ biˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ vawˆ yuˬ peuˬ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa vawˆ yuˬ tuˬ, awˬ hkʼaˇ suh ngaˬ gʼa‸ yuˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ vawˆ yuˬ peuˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:14 Ponˬ laˬ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ leunˇ baˬ taˉ leh, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cawˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ la‸ sheh che yuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ mvuhˇ naw ma lo taˆ-e tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ gʼa htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ gʼa‸ yuˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:15 Yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la peuˬ ve ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma oˇ hkʼe taˍ-a veuˬ. Nawˬ hui nyi ma oˇ hkʼe maˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ lawn oˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians3:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa gʼa‸ mi taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ leh hteˇ lehˍ kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Philippians3:17 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ te ve hkʼe nawˬ hui htawˇ te-o. Ngaˬ hta‸ henˇ yuˬ leh te kʼai chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chiˇ nyi-o."
