Philippians3:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ laiˉ pawˆ hto laˇ peuˬ leh, chi beu‸ ka‸ mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaw‸ hto laˇ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ ve la‸ ka hta‸ canˇ paˍ te chehˇ ve chaw maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:19 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ kʼo, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve gʼoˇ peˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ya‸ taw cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma uiˍ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hpawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ hui dawˇ nyi ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:20 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ oˇ kaˬ lo tawˆ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians3:21 Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ tcuh tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yehˇ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve yawˇ ve awˬ to hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ pa laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians4:1 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ ha‸ leh ngaˬ nyi ma haˍ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍoˬ, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ ve ha lehˬ tuˬ hpeh‸ leh ngaˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Philippians4:2 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma hawˍ da‸ la tuˬ, Eˇvawˇdiˆ leh Suˇtuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:3 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ hkʼa deh‸ te jaw ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ-oˬ, nawˬ htawˇ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ka‸, Kaˍleˍmeˍ teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸, co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh bvuh‸ taˍ ve, ngaˬ geh kanˉ te ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ ka‸, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ bvuhˬ kʼai tuˬ te jaw ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:4 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Philippians4:5 Nawˬ hui nyi ma da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:6 Aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ. Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve, lawˬ hkawˉ ve leh chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ gaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Philippians4:7 Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lo laˬ ve, chaw yaˇ hui ca dawˇ maˇ gaˬ ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma leh nawˬ hui ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ shaˉ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians4:8 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Hteˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, yawˆ yan keunˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, nyi sha ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, shu ve awˬ lawn da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ, chiˇ mvuh keunˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ lawn oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o." 
Philippians4:9 Ngaˬ geh nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ gʼa ha‸ yuˬ leh, gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te-o. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians4:10 Chi beu‸ htawˇ, nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve pa taw, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ ga laˇ tuˬ ya‸ kʼaw maˇ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:11 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ loˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ cawˬ leh kʼoˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa hpuˇ da‸ ve htawˇ, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ shiˍ la peuˬ." 
Philippians4:12 Haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, paw sha jaˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hkanˍ puiˉ la peuˬ. Caˇ bvuhˆ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, meu‸ ve kaˆ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, paw sha ve maˇ kʼoˆ, haˍ gʼawˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te hkanˍ tuˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ shiˍ la peuˬ." 
Philippians4:13 Ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ te puiˉ te hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ chawˇ te laˇ ve lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:15 Hpiˇliˇpiˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ tanˬ maˍ gehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai htaˇ, piˇ ve leh ha‸ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ moˍ ka‸ chi hkʼe maˇ te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ loˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ nyiˇ pawˆ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:17 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ ngaˬ ca ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui awˬ shiˍ naw‸ maˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui awˬ bon gʼa maˇ tuˬ ve hta‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ ca ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:18 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, ngaˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le hkʼa law‸ cawˬ leh, awˬ leuˉ ka‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Eˇpaˍhpawˍdiˆ geh nawˬ hui feu laˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. La‸ shawnˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ shaˉ hawnˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh leh ha‸ yuˬ ve tanˇ tuˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:19 Ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui hkʼa loˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa biˇ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Philippians4:20 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ. 
Philippians4:21 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:22 Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Leuˉ leh jawˇmawˇ Kehˉsaˍ ve hawˉ yehˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philippians4:23 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Colossians1:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tiˆmoˉseˍ ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Kawˇlawˇsehˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hui leh, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:2 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Colossians1:3 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:5 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, mvuhˇ naw ma lo nawˬ hui awˬ pon ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw htawˇ, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Dawˇ law ve chi awˬ lawn awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:6 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la uiˍ la chehˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la leh uiˍ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:7 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve, ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve Eˇpaˍhpaˍraˆ geh nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ taˍ peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Hkri‸ ve ka ti‸ yeˬ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh," 
Colossians1:8 Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. 
Colossians1:9 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui yonˍ leh ha‸ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Co ha hpawˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ leh dawˇ pawnˍ dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼa biˇ biˇ shiˍ tuˬ ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:10 Nawˬ hui oˇ hkʼe shiˍ ve kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui te kʼai leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la tuˬ leh, leuˉ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ maˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians1:11 Yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma yeˬ leh yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ tuˬ, nawˬ hui kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ tuˬ awˬ pon htawˇ ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:12 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui awˬ shinˉ caˇ keunˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ te laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ pa hta‸ nawˬ hui chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians1:13 Awˬ pa lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ ha‸ ve Yaˇ hpu ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tcuh laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:14 Yaˇ hpu oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpehˇ laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians1:15 Yawˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hpeh‸ leh, hpanˍ taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˇ kaoˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:16 Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, mawˬ hpeh‸ ve leh mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼaw jaw teˇ hpaˍ, jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ pa taw leh yawˇ awˬ pon te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:17 Teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, yawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:18 Yawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ to hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hpeh‸ leh hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, suh kuiˬ lo awˉ lawˉ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ cawˬ tuˬ Awˬ pa nyi hkʼaˇ suh leh," 
Colossians1:20 la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo sheˆ ve yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:21 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ leh haiˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma hpawˇ yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi beu‸ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ to hkanˍ suh ve pa taw, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ cawˇ da‸ hawˍ da‸ piˇ lawˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui da‸ kehˬ ve chaw, venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw leh, shu kʼoˆ kuiˬ yaw kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:23 Nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ jiˆ leh, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ taˍ leh yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ chi hkʼe chiˇ a‸ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ hawˉ lo cawˬ taˍ ve, hkʼa hpanˍ taˍ ve te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve shu maˍ piˇ taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ htawˇ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:24 Chi beu‸ ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha lehˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hkʼa cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to awˬ pon ngaˬ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ to teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:25 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa biˇ shiˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ laˇ ve hkʼe, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kanˉ chi Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon yoˬ." 
Colossians1:26 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ teˇ co peuˬ teˇ co faˉ taˍ leh tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ yawˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
Colossians1:27 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui awˬ pon tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ ve tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians1:28 Yawˇ awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui bon maˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw chiˇ a‸ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ leh, cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yehˇ leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians1:29 Oˇ ve awˬ pon ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ pe‸ laˇ leh ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ coˇ caˇ leh te ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:1 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, Lawˍdiˍkiˆ venˇ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ ma coˇ caˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:2 Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Hkri‸ hta‸ caˇ da‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ yawˇ hui hkʼa deh‸ na gʼa leh shiˍ puiˉ ve cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve cawˬ leh teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa deh‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:3 Awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ leh shiˍ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Colossians2:4 A shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, na sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yehˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui geh maˇ chehˇ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ ve nyi ma nawˬ hui geh cawˬ leh, awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ te chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yonˍ yeˬ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw ha lehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:6 Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ ve hkʼe, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼai chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians2:7 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ geu gʼa tcuhˉ naw‸ taˍ leh gʼa uiˍ la yeˬ la chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yeˬ chaweh chehˇ taˍ leh, oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians2:8 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ tawˇ hkawˇ leh tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve heˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yehˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa hpeh yuˬ veu tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ Hkri‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw yaˇ teˇ caˉ peuˬ teˇ caˉ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ ceh hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve biˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ Hkri‸ ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:10 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui biˇ la peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:11 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, la‸ sheh te ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Hkri‸ ve awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:12 Nawˬ hui baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh tuˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha te taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve pa taw, baˆtiˆsaˬ hkanˍ ve oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ geh teˇ geh nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:13 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, te ya‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ leh, ngaˬ hui te ya‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ peuˬ." 
Colossians2:14 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve la‸ ma‸ oˇ ve teˇ maˬ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hta‸ keu ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ. 
Colossians2:15 Uˉ peunˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ caˉ hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ baˬ sheˬ leh, oˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ hta‸ shu gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. La‸ ka hta‸ pa taw awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:16 Hkʼe te leh, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, pawehˇ te ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, ha pa cheˆ ve awˬ nyi awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, shinˉ nyi awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ taˇ na." 
Colossians2:17 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gaˬ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve aˉ gʼuiˬ ha ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:18 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ nehˬ lehˍ gʼa taˍ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ gʼa pui ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ceh tiˉ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui te ve teˇ hpaˍ te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve ka‸ nyi ma uiˍ chaweh te ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼaˇ va ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa lu yuˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Colossians2:19 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Oˉ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw awˬ to teˇ to hkʼa peu-eˬ uiˍ la chehˇ leh, uiˍ la ve oˇ ve lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo laˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ to lehˬ, awˬ tcuhˉ awˬ caˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw caˉ da‸ taˍ leh, awˬ gʼaˇ biˇ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:20 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh suh taˍ peuˬ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hkʼe nawˬ hui te chehˇ sheˍ ve le." 
Colossians2:21 Taˇ ca vawˆ, taˇ ca leh‸, taˇ ca htawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw nawˬ hui te chehˇ sheˍ ve le." 
Colossians2:22 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve awˬ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui teh taˍ leh maˍ piˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians2:23 A shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ dawˇ tawˆ leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma taˍ nehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ to hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ tuˬ te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:1 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca-o. Hkri‸ lehˬ, oˇ kaˬ lo Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha pa mui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:2 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve taˇ te. Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ tcuhˉ taˍ-o‸. 
Colossians3:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui suh peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ hui ve co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Hkri‸ geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:4 Ngaˬ hui ve co ha te‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians3:5 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ-o‸. Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te ve, peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve hta‸ te ve, haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve leh, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:6 Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
Colossians3:7 Nawˬ hui htawˇ ponˬ laˬ htaˇ awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te jaw ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ nyi ma zuhˆ ve, beu‸ jaˇ ve, shu hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te gaˇ ve, shu hta‸ hkʼaiˉ ve leh, cha‸ chiˆ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw ve, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ-oˆ." 
Colossians3:9 Teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ taˇ heˍ da‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ chaw awˬ piˍ hta‸ ka‸, chaw awˬ piˍ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ kʼehˆ baˬ peuˬ leh, chaw awˬ suhˉ hta‸ veu‸ deh taˍ peuˬ." 
Colossians3:10 Chaw awˬ suhˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shiˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:11 Chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Heˍlaˍsaˆ chaw leh Yuˇda‸ chaw maˇ cawˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw leh awˬ guiˬ meuˇ maˇ shoˍ ve chaw maˇ cawˬ. Chaw hteunˍ leh Saˍkuˍsiˆ chaw maˇ cawˬ. Vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ leh ponˬ ve chaw maˇ cawˬ. Hkri‸ lehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:12 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ leh, nawˬ hui da‸ kehˬ ve leh yawˇ ha‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ veu‸ deh-o. Ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve, shu awˬ pon da‸ ve hta‸ te ve, nyi ma taˍ nehˬ ve, nyi ma nuˇ nuˇ nehˬ nehˬ ve leh, nyi ma dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ veu‸ deh-o." 
Colossians3:13 Teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ da‸-o‸. Teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ taˍ da‸ kuiˬ cawˬ kʼo, venˇbaˆ hpehˇ da‸-o‸. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ venˇbaˆ hpehˇ da‸-o‸." 
Colossians3:14 Oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ veu‸ deh taˍ-o‸. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ biˇ la tuˬ hpeh tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:15 Hkri‸ ve dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo uˉ peunˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ pon, awˬ to teˇ to tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ ve bon hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians3:16 Cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Hkri‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Chiˇ mvuh ve tawˇ hkawˇ, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ leh co ha hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˍ da‸ leh shaˍ ti‸ piˇ da‸-o‸. Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians3:17 Nawˬ hui hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, tawˇ yaw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˉ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te-o. Yawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians3:18 Awˬ miˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians3:19 Awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ ha‸ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh taˇ te." 
Colossians3:20 Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ pa awˬ e ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:21 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma maˇ gʼa luˬ tuˬ, yawˇ hui nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ taˇ te." 
Colossians3:22 Vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ-o‸. Shu gʼa mawˬ kuiˬ ceh te ve leh chaw yaˇ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ceh te ve taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Nyi ma taˍ hkʼaˇ teˇ hkʼaˇ tiˉ te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo na yuˬ-o‸." 
Colossians3:23 Nawˬ hui kanˉ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve teˇ ceuˬ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ awˬ pon te ve maˇ heˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon te ve hkʼe nyi ma pfuhˇ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o." 
Colossians3:24 Nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ shinˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui Jawˇmawˇ Hkri‸ awˬ pon kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians3:25 Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ te ve maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi." 
Colossians4:1 Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui htawˇ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ shiˍ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve leh keunˍ da‸ cawˇ da‸ ve hkʼe ceh te piˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:2 Hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Bon lawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shaw chehˇ leh, chiˇ mvuh chehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:3 Hkri‸ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui gʼa kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui pon yehˬ miˉ hpaw laˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon htawˇ bon lawˬ laˇ-oˆ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ ve tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve awˬ pon ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:4 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ keunˍ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve awˬ pon ka‸ bon lawˬ laˇ-oˆ. 
Colossians4:5 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nyi leh te-o. Awˬ yanˇ hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ leh hkʼa deh‸ yehˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:6 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa yaw hkʼaw‸ cawˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ, nawˬ hui tawˇ yaw ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ shu awˬ pon cawˇ da‸ leh na sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yaw leh, aˉ leh‸ hkaw‸ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:7 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tuˇhkiˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:8 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh, yawˇ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:9 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui chehˇ kuiˬ lo laˬ ve, ka ti‸ yeˬ leh ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Awˍneˍsiˍmuˆ hta‸ htawˇ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, choˬ kaˬ lo hkʼa hpeh‸ la ve awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Colossians4:10 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve Aˍriˍtaˍhkuˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Baˍnaˍbaˆ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Maˍku htawˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. (Maˍkuˆ awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸.)" 
Colossians4:11 Yuˇtuˆ meh ve Yeˍsuˆ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yuˇda‸ chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ pon kanˉ te chehˇ ve lehˬ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ maˇ maˇ dawˇ sha la ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:12 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve Eˇpaˍhpaˍraˆ htawˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la leh hkʼa deh‸ yeˬ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ pon hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, Lawˍdiˍkiˆ venˇ leh Heˍraˍpawˇliˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaˬ ma coˇ caˇ leh te ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ yawˇ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Colossians4:14 Ngaˬ hui ha‸ jaˇ ve saˍ la‸ gʼonˍ Luˉka‸ leh Deˍmaˆ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. 
Colossians4:15 Lawˍdiˍkiˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Noˍhpaˆ leh yawˇ ve yehˬ hkʼaw lo hpawnˬ da‸ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:16 Li‸ chi hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaw peuˬ kʼo, Lawˍdiˍkiˆ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ gʼaw tcuh-o. Lawˍdiˍkiˆ chaw hui gʼa ve li‸ hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui gʼaw-o." 
Colossians4:17 Aˍhkiˇpuˆ hta‸ htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh nawˬ gʼa taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ." 
Colossians4:18 Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui geh awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Pawˇlu‸, Siˍlaˍnuˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ hui lehˬ, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh leh, ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw kanˉ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve hta‸ pa taw kanˉ hkeu‸ ve hta‸ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ dawˇ law ve pa taw nyi ma yeˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui maˍ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ ceh hpeh‸ leh nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yonˍ yeˬ jaˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ tuˬ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ka‸ Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ka‸ henˇ yuˬ leh te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, bon hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve htawˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ ve ha lehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo bon hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Chi hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui lehˬ, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ leh Aˍhkaˍyaˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ lawn teˇ kaˬ le le lo bvuhˬ kʼai ve pa taw, oˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui te‸ chiˉ kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ loˍ." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ laˇ ve awˬ lawn shu kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve leh awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon kanˉ hta‸ nawˬ hui te hpeh‸ tuˬ, shaˉ ho‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui baˬ taˉ leh Gʼuiˬsha geh kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ kʼaw‸ la ve awˬ lawn hta‸ htawˇ, shu kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Suh kuiˬ lo Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui law chehˇ ve awˬ lawn htawˇ, shu kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, gaˬ la tuˬ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh laˬ ve lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, Hpiˇliˇpiˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ca maˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ, gʼa tawˍ da‸ tuˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ dawˇ ya‸ te ya‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, heˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ nyi hkʼaˇ suh leh chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve hkʼe ceh ngaˬ hui maˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ hui maˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ lawˇ nyi laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ngaˬ hui maˍ ve yoˬ. 
1Thessalonians2:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, shu nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hui shu hta‸ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui sheˉ lai leh maˍ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yehˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw geh maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ hui geh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ hui maˇ ca." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Awˬ e teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ jaˇ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ceh tiˉ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ, ngaˬ hui ve a sha‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui ha‸ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui kanˉ te ve hkʼaˬ ma hkeu‸ jaˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬ sha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hkeu‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ kanˉ te ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nawˬ hui Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui te laˇ ve lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve leh venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha ka‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ pa teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te piˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ te laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ keunˍ ve hkʼe ceh te tuˬ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ laˇ peuˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui maˍ laˇ ve Gʼuiˬ sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw yaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼe nawˬ hui shawˍ taˍ leh ha‸ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬ sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shawˍ taˍ leh ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yuˇda‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬ sha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hui ve la‸ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ nawˬ hui ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Yuˇda‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ tiˇ pehˍ leh, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ maˇ te ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ngaˬ hui maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ Yuˇda‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tawˍ taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ biˇ la tuˬ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬ sha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa biˇ gaˬ la peuˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, teˇ hkui teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa hpaˆ da‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ mawˬ gaˇ jaˇ leh gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ to nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa hpaˆ da‸ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ hpaˆ da‸." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui geh laiˉ pawˆ laˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Saˍtanˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui ve dawˇ law kuiˬ, ha lehˬ kuiˬ leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ aˬ hto‸ ma le. Nawˬ hui yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh ngaˬ hui ve ha lehˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui maˇ gʼa shiˍ maˇ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ Aˍhtenˍ ven awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˉ tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ yeˬ leh awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe yonˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ ngaˬ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Beˬ shehˍ hpaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ beˬ yuˬ leh, ngaˬ hui kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ la puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ Tiˆmoˉseˍ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la leh, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn, ha lehˬ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ leh, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn ka‸, yawˇ hto laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve leh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yeˬ chehˇ ve kʼo, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬ sha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ha lehˬ tuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ maˇ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ mawˬ da‸ leh, nawˬ hui yonˍ maˇ biˇ sheˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ biˇ la tuˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ venˇ ngaˬ hui bon gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Nawˬ hui geh ngaˬ hui laˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hui pon ya‸ kʼaw gu taˍ laˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ da‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la maˇ la tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ te laˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ yeˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ leh awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te keunˍ ve leh, Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa te cawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh gʼa henˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui te chehˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ hte‸ te kʼai sheˍ." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui gʼa da‸ gʼa kehˬ tuˬ, chi lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le da‸ ve kehˬ ve leh yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ heuˆ chehˇ-oˆ. 
1Thessalonians4:5 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui oˇ hkʼe taˇ te." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Kanˉ chi teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ gʼa te ponˬ te leuˉ leh maˇ gʼa te ya‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ hkʼa deh‸ pe‸ laˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, chi hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cha‸ chiˆ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Hkʼe te leh, chi hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve chaw lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Awˬ tehˬ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ maˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, awˬ baˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ tuˬ leh nawˬ hui chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa ca cuˇ tuˬ," 
1Thessalonians4:12 ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ peuˬ ve hkʼe, ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ leh a shu yawˇ te kuiˬ hta‸ te leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to la‸ sheh kanˉ te tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, dawˇ law kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ dawˇ haˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa dawˇ haˍ tuˬ, suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ piˇ lawˬ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ suh leh kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh kʼaw‸ shiˍ veu laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe hto laˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ gʼa gaˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ htawˇ bvuhˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˉ lawˉ te‸ tu la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve ngaˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ hpe lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ geh hkʼa geh moˬ cawˬ kuiˬ lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ taˆ-e laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui dawˇ sha la tuˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ da‸-o‸." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ leh awˬ tcuhˉ awˬ yanˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ chaw hkʼawˇ laˬ ve hkʼe Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Mvuhˇmiˬ gawˬ la peuˬ leh ngaˬ hui te‸ chiˉ dawˇ haˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ teh‸, shu kʼoˆ da‸ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ paw tuˬ naˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ naˬ jaˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe, luˬ ve sheˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ cawˬ haˉ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ponˬ kuiˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui naˆ ho‸ ve hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ ve pa taw, awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ hpeu‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, naˆ ho‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ caˉ da‸." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui zuh‸ muiˉ taˇ kʼa chehˇ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ shaw chehˇ leh shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-a veuˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ zuh‸ muiˉ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Tzuhˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve chaw hui htawˇ, tanˇ hkuinˇ htaˇ dawˬ bvuhˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ chehˇ-a veuˬ. Yonˍ ve leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ nyi ma pui hta‸ htanˬ tuˬ hkʼe veu‸ deh leh, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve dawˇ law ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve sho uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ taˍ-a veuˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ fuiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Ngaˬ hui te‸ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, suh ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ geh teˇ geh gʼa te‸ chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon hkanˍ suh peuˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui te chehˇ ve hkʼe, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ uiˍ la yeˬ la tuˬ te da‸-o‸." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te leh, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ leh shaˍ ti‸ pe‸ laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˆ yan-o." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui htawˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Kanˉ maˇ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ-oˆ. Nyi ma i puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ-oˆ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˬ chaweh taˍ-o‸." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Shu haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ te laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te tcuhˉ taˍ-o‸." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ bon lawˬ tcuhˉ taˍ-o‸. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe te tuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ pon Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬ sha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Awˬ ha hpu ve aˬ miˍ hta‸ taˇ tiˇ pehˍ. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Shu Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ taˇ te. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi-o. Da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ jaw kʼai-o. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma, co ha leh awˬ to biˇ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe te laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon bon lawˬ-o‸." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo boˆ nu da‸ leh la‸ sheh caˉ da‸-o‸. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ li‸ chi gʼaw maˍ piˇ tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Pawˇlu‸, Siˍlaˍnuˆ leh Tiˆmoˉseˍ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh cawˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ la maˇ la chehˇ leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ la chehˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe chiˇ mvuh keunˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Hkʼe te leh, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve leh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ leh yonˍ chehˇ taˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha hteˇ lehˍ suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ heˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ pon nawˬ hui hkanˍ chehˇ leh, mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ tuˬ yawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui geh teˇ geh aˬ miˍ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ," 
2Thessalonians1:7 chi beu‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ fawˉ mehˍ piˇ tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh gʼaˇ jehˇ piˇ tuˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hehnˇ chaweh kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ nyi htaˇ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ka‸, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ ka‸ gʼa hpaˆ da‸ leh, co co taiˍ taiˍ luˬ ve sheˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ leh, yonˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ anˇ leh chiˇ mvuh tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui htawˇ oˇ ve teˇ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chi hkʼe bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve awˬ bon hta‸ nawˬ hui keunˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa dawˇ law ve hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa te ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui te peuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Nawˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon uiˍ jaˇ maˇ jaˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui htawˇ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la leh, yawˇ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ ngaˬ hui gʼa hpawnˬ da‸ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui taˇ dawˇ hkiˉ." 
2Thessalonians2:2 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸, awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo shu gʼa mawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shu kʼoˆ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ ve taˇ cawˬ piˇ." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ nyi oˇ ve maˇ gaˬ sheˍ gʼuˇ suhˍ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hpfuhˆ kʼai ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ la tuˬ leh, venˇbaˆ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve, luˬ ve sheˆ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼuiˬsha teh‸ shu hkʼa kʼoˆ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ tawˍ taˍ leh, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ taˍ uiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo mui taˍ leh, yawˇ awˬ to Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh chehˇ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ hto laˇ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ dawˇ nawˇ leh laˇ." 
2Thessalonians2:6 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ, chi beu‸ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe tawˍ taˍ chehˇ ve awˬ lawn nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, chi beu‸ ka‸ baˬ kuiˬ lo kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ tawˆ kʼai ve ceh ceh, oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Tawˍ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, venˇbaˆ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ chaw oˇ ve hta‸ meuˆ pehˍ leh, yawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ ve lehˬ, Saˍtanˍ te taˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ cuˇ leh laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, shu hta‸ heˍ yuˬ tuˬ awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ," 
2Thessalonians2:10 luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ gʼa tuˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ yehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Hkʼe te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ leh, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ piˇ tuˬ," 
2Thessalonians2:12 maˇ heˆ heˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui yonˍ tuˬ awˬ pon dawˇ ya‸ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ gaˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ gʼa chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve pa taw, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Oˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ, ngaˬ hui maˍ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon te ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Hkʼe te leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yeˬ chaweh chehˇ taˍ-o‸. Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa maˍ laˇ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍo‸." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ to leh ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ dawˇ sha la piˇ leh, da‸ ve kanˉ leh da‸ ve tawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hta‸ yeˬ la piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
2Thessalonians2:17 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw co co taiˍ taiˍ dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo haˆ haˆ bvuhˬ kʼai leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa ve hkʼe, teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon bon lawˬ-o‸." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Te ponˬ te leuˉ ve chaw leh haiˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ htawˇ bon lawˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yonˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ yeˬ la piˇ lawˬ leh, haiˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ, yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ htawˇ nawˬ hui te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh Hkri‸ ve nyi ma yeˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nawˬ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai piˇ-oˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui geh nawˬ hui gʼa henˇ taˍ peuˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ kʼai leh te‸ chiˉ kanˉ maˇ te ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ taˇ te." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui te ve hta‸ nawˬ hui henˇ yuˬ leh te cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui kanˉ maˇ te leh hkʼe leˇ chehˇ taˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:8 A shu teˇ gʼaˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ piˇ leh ngaˬ hui caˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa hkeu‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ kanˉ gʼaˇ hte‸ te ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Shu caˍ laˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa caˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ henˇ yuˬ tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ chi hkʼe te teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ taˍ peuˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kanˉ maˇ te gaˇ ve kʼo, awˍ taˇ caˍ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, bawˬ jaˇ leh, shu ve kanˉ hta‸ ca sho‸ sha‸ piˇ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to kanˉ te‸ chiˉ maˇ te ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe tawˇ piˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te leh, a shu yawˇ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ-oˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, da‸ ve hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ taˇ nuˇ piˇ." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ maˇ na yuˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ tawnˇ taˍ-o‸. Yawˇ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ taˇ te." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, canˇ paˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hta‸ taˇ shawˍ taˍ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ leh, yawˇ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Dawˇ sha piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh chehˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ awˬ to nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ bvuh‸ ve li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, chi hkʼe cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ bvuh‸ ve la‸ meuˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ-o‸." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
1Timothy1:1 Ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Gʼuiˬsha leh, ngaˬ hui ve dawˇ law kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve yaˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:2 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ, ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy1:3 Ngaˬ Maˍkeˍdawˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ chehˇ taˉ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Peun da‸ ve yonˍ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa maˍ piˇ tuˬ, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:4 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, kaˇ puiˇ kaˇ lao teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ caˉ peuˬ teˇ caˉ kʼoˆ leh peuˬ kuiˬ leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ gʼa taˍ uiˍ tuˬ nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon htawˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chehˇ tcuh taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ tuˬ ceh tiˉ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:5 Nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui ha‸ pehnˇ ve cawˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve chi lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve nyi ma, venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve nyi ma leh, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yonˍ ve nyi ma, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:6 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn hta‸ ceh tiˉ tawˇ yaw da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:7 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ maˍ paˍ te gaˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui kʼoˆ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
1Timothy1:8 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh hteˇ lehˍ te kʼai htaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:9 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ teh taˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw, maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan te ve chaw, venˇbaˆ te ve chaw, maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve chaw, bon liˇ hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw, awˬ pa awˬ e hta‸ dawˆ ve chaw, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw," 
1Timothy1:10 haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chawˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve hta‸ te ve chaw, chaw hta‸ hkʼawˇ yuˬ ve chaw, heˍ ve chaw, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo heˍ ve chaw leh, cawˇ ve maˍ hkʼaˇ hta‸ heh‸ hkehnˉ ve chaw, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ teh taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:11 Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ taˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:12 Ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ ngaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˉ chi hta‸ te tuˬ ngaˬ ka ti‸ yeˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ dawˇ taˍ leh ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:13 Ngaˬ lehˬ ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve, yawˇ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ ve leh, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ maˇ shiˍ leh maˇ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te ve pa taw, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:14 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yonˍ ve leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ geh teˇ geh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ htawˇ, ca kʼoˆ maˇ peuˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:15 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ awˬ pon miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, cawˇ jaˇ leh, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ yuˬ cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ lehˬ shu a‸ kehˉ venˇbaˆ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ ma yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ jaˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, ngaˬ shu a‸ kehˉ venˇbaˆ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa tuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ lehˬ, henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy1:17 Co co taiˍ taiˍ uˉ peunˍ ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ, maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ puiˉ leh, chaw yaˇ mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
1Timothy1:18 Ngaˬ yaˇ Tiˆmoˉseˍ-oˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ shu Gʼuiˬsha awˬ tan te leh, nawˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve hta‸ vawˆ taˍ leh, venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh, da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon ma‸ bawˆ loˬ." 
1Timothy1:19 Venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ baˬ taˉ ve pa taw, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ luˬ kʼai ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma htawˇ luˬ kʼai peuˬ." 
1Timothy1:20 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, Huˍmeˍnehˇ leh Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn henˇ yuˬ tuˬ, Saˍtanˍ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ." 
1Timothy2:1 Hkʼe te leh, awˉ lawˉ teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ chi hkʼe awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha geh lawˬ hkawˉ ve, bon lawˬ ve, shu awˬ pon bon lawˬ ve leh chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ hpaˍ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon te-o." 
1Timothy2:2 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, dawˇ sha leh nyi ma gawˬ lehˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ yawˆ yan leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, a sha‸ te‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon htawˇ oˇ hkʼe te-o." 
1Timothy2:3 Oˇ hkʼe te ve lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Gʼuiˬ sha nyi ma cawˇ ve kanˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:4 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ la tuˬ yawˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha leh chaw yaˇ awˬ kaˍ lo awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hpeh‸ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:6 Yawˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:7 Awˬ lawn oˇ ve hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon, ngaˬ lehˬ bon maˍ paˍ leh tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yonˍ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ teh taˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. (Ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, heˍ ve maˇ heˆ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ.)" 
1Timothy2:8 Hkʼe te leh, teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma zuhˆ ve leh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ kehˬ ve la‸ sheh chiˇ leh bon lawˬ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:9 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve leh nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, keunˍ da‸ cawˇ da‸ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ veu‸ deh ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Uˉ hkeh mvuh hpeˇ ve, shi hkʼeun tcuhˉ ve, piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ tcuhˉ ve leh, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ veu‸ deh ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ heuˆ gaˇ." 
1Timothy2:10 Ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui te keunˍ ve hkʼe, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tcuhˉ taˍ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:11 Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ taˍ leh, ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo henˇ yuˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
1Timothy2:12 Yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hawˉ hkʼaˆ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ piˇ. Yawˇ ta‸ iˉ gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Aˍdanˍ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ te hpanˍ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Eˇva‸ hta‸ te hpanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:14 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Aˍdanˍ hta‸ heˍ gʼa ve maˇ heˆ. Yaˇ miˇ hta‸ heˍ gʼa leh, yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve te ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy2:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yonˍ ve, ha‸ pehnˇ ve, da‸ kehˬ ve leh nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ ve kʼo, yaˇ paw ve pa taw yawˇ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:1 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ te ve kanˉ hta‸ ca ve chaw lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ ca ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ cawˇ tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:2 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, venˇ baˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve chaw, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ puiˉ ve chaw, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve chaw, te keunˍ te cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw, hkehˉ chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw leh, maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:3 Yawˇ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ponˬ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw leh, shu hta‸ ya‸ da‸ dawˆ da‸ ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve chaw, shu hta‸ tawˇ maˇ gʼawˬ da‸ puiˉ ve chaw, hpu hta‸ maˇ sheˉ lai puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:4 Yawˇ ve yehˬ kʼa hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ uˉ peunˍ leh, yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa deh‸ te tuˬ maˍ gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ kʼa hta‸ uˉ peunˍ maˇ gʼaˇ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te nyi ha‸ shaˉ gʼa tuˬ le." 
1Timothy3:6 Yawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ suhˉ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ nyi ma uiˍ la mvuh la leh neˇhaiˬ ve ciˍ yanˍ kuiˬ lo ce lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:7 Awˬ baˬ hpawˇ chehˇ ve chaw mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ da‸ ve awˬ meh cawˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, shu hkʼaiˉ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, neˇhaiˬ va htaw taˍ ve hta‸ yaw tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:8 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, dawˇ yeˬ gaˇ yeˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ha tehˬ nyiˇ maˬ cawˬ ve chaw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ponˬ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸." 
1Timothy3:9 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo, hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ peuˬ ve yonˍ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ yonˍ yeˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:10 Yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ awˉ lawˉ lawˇ nyi sheˍ. Lawˇ nyi peuˬ leh, venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ kʼo, ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ te tcuh cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:11 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ga piˇ shehˍ ma teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, dawˇ yeˬ gaˇ yeˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ca hkʼaiˉ ca kʼoˆ puiˉ ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸, shaˍ ti‸ cawˬ ve chaw leh teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:12 Ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ gʼa cawˬ ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ kʼa hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ uˉ peunˍ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ga piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ te ve chaw hui lehˬ, da‸ ve awˬ meh gʼa ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ha‸ hanˉ ve nyi ma ka‸ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:14 Maˇ maw maw nawˬ geh laˬ tuˬ ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ haˆ haˆ maˇ gaˬ la kʼo," 
1Timothy3:15 Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ kʼa awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te keunˍ te cawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ kʼa oˇ ve lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ moˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ moˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ pon, awˬ hkuiˉ daw leh awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy3:16 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ tehˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ. Yawˇ awˬ lawn awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon maˍ piˇ peuˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ peuˬ. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ taˆ kʼo‸-e peuˬ." 
1Timothy4:1 Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, chi hkʼe hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, heˍ puiˉ ve awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ leh, neˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:2 Heˍ puiˉ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ neˇhaiˬ cuˇ leh oˇ hkʼe maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ sho chiˆ ngawˉ piˇ leh hkeu‸ kʼai peuˬ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. 
1Timothy4:3 Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ maˇ gʼa heuˆ da‸ leh, caˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa caˇ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Caˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, yonˍ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa caˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha te hpanˍ taˍ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:4 Gʼuiˬsha te hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ yuˬ ve kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ gʼa baˬ." 
1Timothy4:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, bon lawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ da‸ peuˬ kehˬ peuˬ." 
1Timothy4:6 Nawˬ lehˬ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve da‸ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ nawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, yonˍ hkʼaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, nawˬ te kʼai chehˇ ve da‸ ve maˍ hkʼaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ caˇ chehˇ dawˬ chehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:7 A pi kʼu teˇ hpaˍ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve kaˇ lao teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ na. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ la tuˬ, nawˬ awˬ to hkʼa deh‸ te jawˬ-o‸." 
1Timothy4:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la tuˬ te jawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ bon a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:9 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi lehˬ, cawˇ jaˇ leh awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ yuˬ cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:10 Te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law tcuhˉ taˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ leh kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon leuˉ leh Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy4:11 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ shu hta‸ tawˇ piˇ leh maˍ piˇ-oˆ. 
1Timothy4:12 Nawˬ yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa kʼoˆ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve, yonˍ ve leh da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ lehˬ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy4:13 Ngaˬ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, shu hta‸ Li‸ hpu gʼaw maˍ piˇ ve, awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve leh maˍ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ coˇ caˇ leh te chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1Timothy4:14 Awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ la‸ sheh taˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ tan te leh yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ yehˇ leh te-o mehˍ." 
1Timothy4:15 Nawˬ kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la mvuh la chehˇ ve hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma pfuhˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o." 
1Timothy4:16 Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, shaˍ ti‸ te leh, chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yeˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:1 Chaw mawˇ hta‸ deˇ maˍ piˇ ve taˇ te. Awˬ pa hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-oˆ. Yaˇ nehˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼe shawˍ taˍ-o‸." 
1Timothy5:2 Chaw mawˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ e hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ leh, yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸, da‸ kehˬ ve nyi ma hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼe shawnˍ taˍ-o‸." 
1Timothy5:3 Ga piˇ paˍ maˇ cawˬ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ. 
1Timothy5:4 Mehˇchawˇma lehˬ, awˬ yaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo awˬ hawehˍ cawˬ ve kʼo, yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ a shu yawˇ yehˬ hkʼaw ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ leh, awˬ pa awˬ e awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ bon kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe ha‸ shaˉ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:5 Ga piˇ paˍ maˇ cawˬ leh, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ chehˇ taˍ ve mehˇchawˇma lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ leh, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ htaˇ lawˬ hkawˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha lehˬ tuˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ ca ve mehˇchawˇma lehˬ, yawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve htawˇ, suh taˍ peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:7 Shu venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, mehˇchawˇma hui ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˇ hkʼe tawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy5:8 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, leuˉ leh a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ hkʼaw ve chaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ ha‸ shaˉ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw a‸ kehˉ haiˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:9 A sha‸ hkaw‸ chi hkʼaw‸ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ meh hta‸ mehˇchawˇma ve caˇ lanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ bvuh‸ keu. 
1Timothy5:10 Awˬ hpawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ heuˆ jaw ve, da‸ ve kanˉ te ve yoˬ teh‸ shu shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve, awˬ yaˇ awˇ duˬ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ ve, hkehˉ chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui ve hkui sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ piˇ ve, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ ve leh, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ te ve mehˇchawˇma hpeh‸ ve kʼo, caˇ lanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh bvuh‸ keu-o." 
1Timothy5:11 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˇ lanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh taˇ bvuh‸ keu. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui Hkri‸ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ hpawˇ kʼaw‸ heuˆ gaˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:12 Hkʼe te leh, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ve ka ti‸ hta‸ yawˇ hui te luˬ ve pa taw, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:13 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui teˇ yehˬ peuˬ teˇ yehˬ lo kʼai leh, bawˬ la puiˉ ve yoˬ. Bawˬ ve ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui tawˇ maˇ leh, kʼoˆ maˇ keunˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve shu te kuiˬ hta‸ ca sho‸ sha‸ piˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:14 Hkʼe te leh, yaˇ nehˬ hpeh‸ ve mehˇ chawˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ hpawˇ kʼaw‸ heuˆ tuˬ, yaˇ paw la piˇ tuˬ leh, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ kʼa hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, canˇ paˍ lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Timothy5:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi beu‸ ka‸ mehˇ chawˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ya‸ kʼai leh, Saˍtanˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai peuˬ." 
1Timothy5:16 Yonˍ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to yawˇ hui hta‸ ga piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ lehˬ, ga piˇ paˍ maˇ cawˬ ve mehˇchawˇma hpeh‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, awˬ vuiˬ chi Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ taˇ gaˬ piˇ." 
1Timothy5:17 A shu yawˇ ve kanˉ hkʼa deh‸ te ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyiˇ pun yawˆ yan cawˇ ve yoˬ. Bon maˍ ve leh shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˉ leh yawˆ yan cawˇ ve yoˬ. 
1Timothy5:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Caˬ shiˍ naˆ chehˇ ve nuˇ maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ nawˬ maˇ gʼa hoˆ taˍ. Peuˬ leh, Kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, gʼaˇ hpfuhˇ gʼa cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:19 Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ, maˇ heˆ kʼo shehˆ gʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ taˇ na." 
1Timothy5:20 Venˇbaˆ te tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ deˇ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ kawˆ ve nyi ma cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:21 Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ fuiˍ maˇ pehˬ leh, shu ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te-o teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy5:22 A shu hta‸ ka‸ aˉ yaˇ haˆ haˆ taˇ piˇ. Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ caˉ da‸. Nawˬ awˬ to da‸ lehˍ kehˬ lehˍ chehˇ taˍ-o‸. 
1Timothy5:23 Chi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ iˉ kaˆ ceh tiˉ taˇ dawˬ. Nawˬ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ pon leh, nawˬ teˇ hkui teˇ hkui naˬ chehˇ ve awˬ pon, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ ka‸ a ciˉ dawˬ-o‸." 
1Timothy5:24 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ve venˇbaˆ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la leh, suhˉ jehˬ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ."
