1Timothy5:25 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ maˇ tawˆ la sheˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ faˉ taˍ gʼa tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Timothy6:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui maˍ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa kʼoˆ tuˬ, shu vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ gʼa hpeh‸ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˆ yan keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:2 Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ hawˉ lo gʼa chehˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ la peuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te maˇ cawˇ. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon leuˉ leh kanˉ hkʼa deh‸ te cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui oˇ hkʼe te ve teˇ yanˇ, ha‸ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:3 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˍ piˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-oˆ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, peun da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve kʼo," 
1Timothy6:4 yawˇ lehˬ nyi ma uiˍ leh, te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ na da‸ leh, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn tawˇ gʼawˬda‸ ve hta‸ ceh tiˉ yawˇ te gaˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, hkawehˉ da‸ ve, deˇ da‸ ya‸ da‸ ve, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve, shu awˬ lawn haiˬ ve hta‸ ca dawˇ ve leh," 
1Timothy6:5 da‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tawˆ la puiˉ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve pa taw awˬ yawˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:6 Awˬ tehˬ kʼoˆ kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve kʼo, awˬ yawˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ hui lo‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, te‸ chiˉ maˇ yuˬ laˬ leh, ngaˬ hui tawˆ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ htawˇ, te‸ chiˉ yuˬ kʼai maˇ hpeh‸." 
1Timothy6:8 Hkʼe te leh, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ leh veu‸ tuˬ kʼaˇ tuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:9 Paw sha la gaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ beˬ ve, va htaw taˍ ve leh, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸ te luˬ puiˉ ve sheˉ lai ve laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ce lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Sheˉ lai ve oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hta‸ luˬ kuiˬ sheˆ kuiˬ lo kʼa piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hpu hta‸ sheˉ lai ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, haiˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, hpu hta‸ sheˉ lai ve hta‸ pa taw, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ leh, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ juˆ pawnˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:11 Gʼuiˬsha ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, nyi ma yeˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh hkʼa deh‸ kʼai-o." 
1Timothy6:12 Yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve, da‸ ve bawˆ da‸ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸. Oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leh, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ da‸ ve shaˉ hkiˆ nawˬ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ." 
1Timothy6:13 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ a sha‸ te‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, jawˇmawˇ Poˍtiˆ Piˉla‸ gʼuˇ suhˍ da‸ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:14 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, nawˬ ya‸ kuiˬ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na yuˬ leh te kʼai-o." 
1Timothy6:15 Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ leh, jawˇ mawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Timothy6:16 Yawˇ ceh tiˉ co co taiˍ taiˍ a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ leh, a shu teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ awˬ paˇ lo kʼai maˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw leh, mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ yawˇ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
1Timothy6:17 Chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw sha ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma maˇ gʼa uiˍ tuˬ leh, luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve mawˇ jeˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼa dawˇ law tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hui gʼa ha lehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa dawˇ law tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy6:18 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, shu hta‸ awˬ bon te piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kanˉ maˇ chaweh te tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, shu hta‸ pehˬ piˇ tanˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chaweh piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy6:19 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yeˬ ve a sha‸ te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui da‸ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ cawˬ tuˬ ve awˬ pon, da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaw hpoˆ taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Timothy6:20 Tiˆmoˉseˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ-o‸. Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve cuˇ yiˍ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼe leˇ kʼoˆ guiˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ leh tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o." 
1Timothy6:21 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve cuˇ yiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkanˍ yuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, yonˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ kʼai peuˬ. Nawˬ hui geh awˬ bon cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy1:1 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw co ha gʼa te‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ lawn kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh ya hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:2 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
2Timothy1:3 Bon lawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ pon kanˉ te ve hkʼe ngaˬ htawˇ kanˉ te ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:4 Nawˬ ve mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ nyi teˇ haˉ le le ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:5 Nawˬ nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve chi lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ ve awˬ pi Lawˇiˆ leh nawˬ ve awˬ e Uˇniˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ leh, chi beu‸ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:6 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ la‸ sheh taˍ ve pa taw nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ aˬ miˍ gu ceh ve hkʼe hkʼa deh‸ gu ceh tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ kawˆ puiˉ ve nyi ma pe‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve nyi ma, ha‸ pehnˇ ve nyi ma leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve nyi ma yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:8 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ taˇ ya‸ taw. Yawˇ awˬ pon htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve ngaˬ hta‸ pa taw htawˇ taˇ ya‸ taw. Gʼuiˬsha geh kanˇ paˆ gʼa taˍ ve hkʼe, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ pon gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh hkanˍ-o‸." 
2Timothy1:9 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ dawˇ law taˍ ve hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ leh, da‸ kehˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ chi hkʼe te laˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Timothy1:10 Yawˇ ve awˬ bon oˇ ve lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ leh, ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ tawˆ la ve hta‸ pa taw, chi beu‸ awˬ bon oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te luˬ leh, co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸, ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la piˇ lawˬ peuˬ." 
2Timothy1:11 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi awˬ pon bon maˍ paˍ, tcuh yaˇ leh, saˍ la‸ te tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:12 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ chi hkʼe gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ maˇ ya‸ taw. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ yonˍ chehˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:13 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yonˍ ve leh ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ geh gʼa kaˇ taˍ ve, da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na yuˬ leh te kʼai-o." 
2Timothy1:14 Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ nawˬ cuˇ leh, nawˬ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ laˇ peuˬ ve, da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ-o‸." 
2Timothy1:15 Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ peuˬ ve teh‸ nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, Hpuˍgeˍluˆ leh Heˍraˆmoˇgenˍ ka‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:16 Awˇneˍsiˉhpawˍ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ laiˉ pawˆ dawˇ sha la piˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ sho caˆ hpeh taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ya‸ taw." 
2Timothy1:17 Yawˇ Roˉma‸ venˇ lo gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hta‸ mawˬ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ ca ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy1:18 Yawˇ lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh lo ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ga laˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:1 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ yaˇ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy2:2 Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ ngaˬ geh gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy2:3 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve da‸ ve ma‸ yaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ ngaˬ geh teˇ geh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ-o‸." 
2Timothy2:4 Ma‸ yaˇ te chehˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve ma‸ poˍ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ te gaˇ ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼaˉ tiˍ hawˆ tiˍ taˍ tuˬ yawˇ maˇ te." 
2Timothy2:5 Gʼuiˇ da‸ ve pawehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe maˇ gʼuiˇ ve kʼo, shu yawˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ yoˬ teh‸ maˇ shawˍ piˇ." 
2Timothy2:6 Kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve muiˬ caˇ paˍ lehˬ, awˬ shiˍ hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa caˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:7 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ puiˉ tuˬ cuˇ yiˍ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:8 Ngaˬ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hkʼe, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve, suh kuiˍ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la peuˬ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy2:9 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw haiˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hta‸ shu hpeh taˍ laˇ leh, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ shu hpeh taˍ maˇ gʼa." 
2Timothy2:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve oˇ ve geh teˇ geh co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ ka‸ yawˇ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:11 Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh teˇ geh suh ve kʼo, yawˇ geh teˇ geh gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:12 Ngaˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ geh teˇ geh gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ baˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:13 Ngaˬ hui ka ti‸ maˇ ye‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ lehˬ ka ti‸ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ baˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
2Timothy2:14 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ-oˆ. Tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn tawˇ maˇ gʼa gʼawˬ da‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, kaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui hta‸ te luˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:15 Nawˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ awˬ to yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ leh te-o. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ ya‸ taw tuˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:16 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼe leˇ kʼoˆ guiˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve nyi ma shaˬ te shaˬ maˇ la leh," 
2Timothy2:17 yawˇ hui maˍ piˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, kuiˇ ve behˬ ve hkʼaw kuiˬ uiˍ la kʼehˬ la ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Huˍmeˍnehˇ leh Hpiˇlehˆ ka‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:18 Suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, hpeh‸ la peuˬ teh‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ kʼoˆ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ya‸ kʼai peuˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ve yonˍ ve nyi ma hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hpfuhˆ baˬ piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve yeˬ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yeˬ chehˇ leh, yinˉ chi hkʼe tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ pfuhˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ baˬ taˉ-oˆ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:20 Uiˍ ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpu hkʼeun shi hkʼeun ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Suhˆ leh je‸ te taˍ ve awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼeun teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve awˬ pon yehˇ leh, teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ pon yehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:21 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo yuˬ baˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yehˇ hpeh‸ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ leh, da‸ ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ ve, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:22 Yaˇ nehˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ sheˉ lai puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ jaw kʼai-o. Da‸ kehˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ kuˬ ve chaw hui geh teˇ geh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ, yonˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh, cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o." 
2Timothy2:23 Cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ leh, te‸ chiˉ tcuhˉ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ jehˬ da‸ ve hta‸ ka‸ jaw kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe jehˬ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ te tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:24 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ ceˬ lehˬ, deˇ da‸ ya‸ da‸ ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸. Yawˇ lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ te ve chaw, maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve chaw leh, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy2:25 Yawˇ hta‸ tawˍ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ puiˉ ve chaw htawˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha te piˇ tuˬ leh naˍ, maˇ shiˍ." 
2Timothy2:26 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, neˇhaiˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hui hta‸ neˇhaiˬ hpeh yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve va awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:1 Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ taˍ-o‸. 
2Timothy3:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw, hpu hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw, caˆ muiˬ puiˉ ve chaw, nyi ma uiˍ ve chaw, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw, awˬ pa awˬ e hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw, shu ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw, maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve chaw," 
2Timothy3:3 shu hta‸ maˇ ha‸ puiˉ ve chaw, shu ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ hpehˇ piˇ puiˉ ve chaw, shu hta‸ hkʼaiˉ puiˉ ve chaw, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve chaw, haiˬ jaˇ ve chaw leh, da‸ ve hta‸ canˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:4 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, shu hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ puiˉ ve chaw, shu shaˍ ti‸ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw, nyi ma uiˍ jaˇ ve chaw leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ ha‸ leh miˬguiˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:5 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ve htawˇ, oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yawˇ hui chiˇ baˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o." 
2Timothy3:6 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, shu ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇ baˆ maˇ maˇ pfuhˇ taˍ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ sheˉ lai ve laiˉ ceuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:7 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ shu maˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na chehˇ ve ka‸, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ la puiˉ." 
2Timothy3:8 Yaˍneˍ leh Yaˍbeˍ hui Moˉseˍ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve hkʼe, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ luˬ kʼai peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
2Timothy3:9 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve hkʼe, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn htawˇ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:10 Ngaˬ maˍ piˇ ve, ngaˬ te ve, ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve, ngaˬ yonˍ ve, ngaˬ dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve, ngaˬ ha‸ pehnˇ ve leh ngaˬ nyi ma yeˬ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ taˍ peuˬ." 
2Timothy3:11 Anˍtiˆawˍ venˇ, Iˇkawˇniˆ venˇ leh Luˇtaˍraˆ venˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve leh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ ve hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ taˍ peuˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:12 Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan gaˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:13 Haiˍ ve chaw leh heˍ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shaˬ te shaˬ haiˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui shu hta‸ heˍ leh, shu htawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ heˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:14 Nawˬ lehˬ, nawˬ gʼa henˇ leh hkʼa deh‸ gʼa yonˍ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ a shu geh gʼa henˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ htaˇ ka‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Li‸ hpu hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ cuˇ yiˍ pe‸ laˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:16 Li‸ hpu hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy3:17 Gʼuiˬsha ve chaw lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te leh biˇ ve chaw leh, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ pon gu taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ, Li‸ hpu lehˬ maˍ piˇ ve, venˇbaˆ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve, kʼaw‸ da‸ la piˇ ve leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te tuˬ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon Li‸ hpu lehˬ awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:1 Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui leh suh peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la tuˬ ve leh yawˇ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ cuˇ leh nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ chi hkʼe pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:2 Bon hkawˇ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ cawˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o. Deˇ maˍ piˇ leh shaˍ ti‸ piˇ-oˆ. Dawˇ zuhˬ gaˇ zuhˬ ve leh maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy4:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn ka‸ kaˇ gaˇ puiˉ leh, a shu yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve hkʼe maˍ laˇ ve saˍ la‸ maˇ chaweh hta‸ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:4 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ gʼa na tuˬ yawˇ hui hpfuhˆ kʼai leh, kaˇ puiˇ kaˇ lao hkawˇ hta‸ na leh awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:5 Nawˬ lehˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ ve kanˉ hta‸ te chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ te chehˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te-o." 
2Timothy4:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi beu‸ ka‸ tanˇ tuˬ hkʼe tanˇ piˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa hkanˍ leh, ngaˬ gʼa kʼo‸-e ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:7 Da‸ jaˇ ve bawˆ da‸ tuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ bawˆ da‸ peuˬ. Gʼuiˇ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ gʼuiˇ peuˬ. Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍ peuˬ. 
2Timothy4:8 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ ngaˬ awˬ pon ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ nyi oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, shi uˉ tcuhˍ oˇ ve ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la tuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:9 Nawˬ ngaˬ geh haˆ haˆ laˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ coˇ caˇ-oˆ. 
2Timothy4:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Deˍmaˆ lehˬ chi miˬguiˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, Hteˇsaˍlawˇniˆ venˇ lo kʼai peuˬ. Kaˍreˍkeˍ lehˬ, Gaˍlaˍtiˆ mvuhˇ miˬ lo kʼai leh, Tiˇtuˆ lehˬ Daˍlaˍmaˍtiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai peuˬ." 
2Timothy4:11 Luˉka‸ teˇ gʼa ceh tiˉ ngaˬ geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˍkuˆ hta‸ ka‸ shiˍ veu laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ga laˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:12 Tuˇhkiˆ hta‸ Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ lo ngaˬ kʼai tcuh peuˬ. 
2Timothy4:13 Nawˬ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Taˍroˇaˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo Kaˍpuˆ geh ngaˬ teh taˉ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, leuˉ leh shaˍ guiˬ kʼuˉ hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yuˬ veu laˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy4:14 Ca liˉ paˍ Aˍleˍsaˍduˆ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ haˍ tuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ te laˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:15 Nawˬ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ maˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:16 Ngaˬ awˬ to awˬ pon ngaˬ awˉ lawˉ teˇ pawˆ gʼa yaw hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hpawˇ lo maˇ chehˇ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˇ taˍ piˇ lawˬ." 
2Timothy4:17 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ bon hkawˇ hkʼa biˇ maˍ piˇ leh, buiˇshaˆaˉnaˆ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa kaˇ tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ geh chehˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, laˇ caˬ shiˉ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:18 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, haiˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇ miˬ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A men." 
2Timothy4:19 Piˇkiˇlaˆ leh Aˍkuˉlaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˇneˍsiˉhpawˍ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
2Timothy4:20 Eˇraˍtuˆ lehˬ, Kawˇrenˍhtuˆ venˇ lo chehˇ taˉ ve yoˬ. Taˍroˆhpeˍ teˇ gʼaˇ naˬ leh, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ Meˍleˍtuˆ venˇ hkʼaw lo teh taˉ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:21 Mvuhˇ kaˆ yanˇ maˇ gaˬ sheˍ htaˇ nawˬ haˆ haˆ gaˬ la tuˬ coˇ caˇ-oˆ. Uˇbuˇluˆ, Puˇdeˍ, Liˇnuˆ, Kaˍlawˉduˆ leh awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Timothy4:22 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ ka‸ nawˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus1:1 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve yaˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve Tiˇtuˆ hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:2 Ngaˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ uiˍ la maˇ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ la tuˬ awˬ pon tcuh yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:3 Yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, maˇ heˍ puiˉ ve Gʼuiˬsha aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te ve yoˬ. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ leh chiˇ a‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:4 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Titus1:5 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, loˍ sheˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ gu kʼaw‸ te leh, teˇ venˇ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˆ teh taˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ Keˍreˍteˍ conˇ lo chehˇ tcuh taˉ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:6 Awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw leh, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ gʼa hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui awˬ lawn shu kʼoˆ kuiˬ yaw kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, awˬ liˇ da‸ leh, shu ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw, venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te ve chaw, nyi ma ngeh ve chaw, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ponˬ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw, shu hta‸ ya‸ da‸ dawˆ da‸ ve chaw leh, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸." 
Titus1:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkehˉ chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw, da‸ ve hta‸ nyi ma cawˇ ve chaw, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve chaw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw, da‸ ve kehˬ ve chaw leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:9 Da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ hpeh‸ leh, gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, maˍ piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ yeˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu hkawˇ maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼe leˇ ca kʼoˆ puiˉ ve chaw leh, heˍ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ guiˬ meuˇ shoˍ ve chaw teˇ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe ve chaw leuˉ leh cawˬ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:11 Yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ gʼa hoˆ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, maˍ piˇ maˇ keunˍ ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh, yehˬ kʼa teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:12 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Keˍreˍteˍ chaw hui lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ heˍ ve chaw, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve chaw leh, caˇ ponˬ caˇ leuˉ ve chaw bawˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:13 Shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve tawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Yuˇda‸ ve kaˇ puiˇ kaˇ lao teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve chaw hui tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ gʼa na yuˬ leh, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la tuˬ," 
Titus1:14 yawˇ hui hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh maˍ piˇ-oˆ. 
Titus1:15 Nyi ma hkʼaw da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ cha‸ chiˆ ve chaw leh maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, da‸ kehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ leh yawˇ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, cha‸ chiˆ ve yoˬ." 
Titus1:16 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui te ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve hkʼe te ve yoˬ. Shu yawˇ hui hta‸ cha‸ naˬ ve chaw, maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw leh, da‸ ve kanˉ te tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ hui hta‸ a ciˉ ka‸ yehˇ maˇ hpeh‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:1 Nawˬ lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve yonˍ hkʼaˇ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus2:2 Chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shaˍ ti‸ cawˬ ve chaw, dawˇ yeˬ gaˇ yeˬ ve chaw, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve chaw, yonˍ ve, ha‸ pehnˇ ve leh nyi ma yeˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:3 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chaw mawˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, te ve dawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo keunˍ ve hkʼe te ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ hkʼaiˉ puiˉ ve chaw leh, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ponˬ dawˬ leuˉ ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸. Da‸ ve hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve chaw gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:4 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, a sha‸ i ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ leh awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ puiˉ tuˬ, yawˇ hui maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:5 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve chaw, da‸ kehˬ ve chaw, a shu yawˇ ve yehˬ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ puiˉ ve chaw, nyi ma da‸ ve chaw leh, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ la tuˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hui maˍ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Titus2:6 A sha‸ i ve hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ nyi ma taˍ puiˉ tuˬ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ hkʼa deh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus2:7 Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ awˬ to hkʼa deh‸ te maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ lehˍ te leh, dawˇ yeˬ gaˇ yeˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus2:8 Shu venˇbaˆ taˍ kuiˬ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, da‸ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ te‸ chiˉ hkʼaiˉ maˇ hpeh‸ leh, gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ yoˬ." 
Titus2:9 Shu vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:10 Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve mawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ gʼa te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ gʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ pa Gʼuiˬsha ve maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ hui te hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Titus2:11 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ awˬ pon tawˆ la peuˬ." 
Titus2:12 Awˬ bon oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ baˬ taˉ tuˬ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ ca‸ na‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui lehˬ, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te puiˉ ve leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ tuˬ ka‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus2:13 Ngaˬ hui ve uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la tuˬ ve awˬ bon uiˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Titus2:14 Yawˇ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon da‸ ve kehˬ ve chaw teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve awˬ to tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te gaˇ jaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Titus2:15 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh deˇ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan maˇ gʼa te tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ te-o." 
Titus3:1 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, jawˇmawˇ leh uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ leh yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus3:2 A shu hta‸ ka‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ gʼa kʼoˆ. Tawˇ maˇ gʼa gʼawˬ da‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ taˍ leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˆ yawˆ yan yan te tuˬ ka‸, yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ-oˆ." 
Titus3:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui htawˇ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw, maˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve chaw, ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ ve chaw, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ sheˉ lai leh ha lehˬ tuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai ve chaw, shu hta‸ hkawehˉ leh naˬ tuˬ te ve chaw, shu ngaˬ hui hta‸ canˇ leh, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ canˇ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, yawˇ chaw yaˇ hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:5 Ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve kanˉ te ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha kʼaˉ ve hta‸ pa taw htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ suhˉ teˇ pawˆ paw la ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tsuhˇ hkʼa laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ gu te laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:6 Ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yawˇ cuˇ leh, oˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ hkʼa biˇ ngeuˍ pfuhˍ laˇ veyoˬ." 
Titus3:7 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ hta‸ dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui yawˇ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:8 Tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ nawˬ yonˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw hui lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa te tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ hpeh‸ leh, chaw yaˇ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ maˇ cawˬ ve jehˬ da‸ cehˇ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ caˉ peuˬ teˇ caˉ shawˍ nyi ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ lawn tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, jaw kʼai-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ leh, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:10 Awˬ moˍ pehˬ da‸ hpaˆ da‸ tuˬ te ve chaw hta‸ teˇ pawˆ nyiˇ pawˆ hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ taˇ kʼaw‸ te. 
Titus3:11 Chi hkʼe ve chaw lehˬ, nyi ma a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ hteˇ leh, venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ shiˍ-o‸. Yawˇ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ suhˉ taˆ peuˬ." 
Titus3:12 Ngaˬ lehˬ, Aˍteˍmaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Tuˇhkiˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ geh peu laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Niˇkawˇpaˍliˆ venˇ lo ngaˬ hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ tuˬ coˇ caˇ leh laˬ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ kaˆ ve awˬ yanˇ htaˇ venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Titus3:13 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ shiˍ pa Seˍnaˆ leh Aˍpawˇlu‸ hta‸ haˆ haˆ peu laˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa loˍ tuˬ hkʼa deh‸ ga piˇ-oˆ. 
Titus3:14 Ngaˬ hui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ te kʼai hpeh‸ tuˬ maˍ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, loˍ jaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ga piˇ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Titus3:15 Ngaˬ geh chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
Philemon1:1 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ pon htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tiˆmoˉseˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te ve ha‸ ve Hpiˇleˍmonˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Philemon1:2 awˬ nyi ma Aˍpiˆ leh ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ geh teˇ geh bon hpawˇ ma‸ yaˇ te ve Aˍhkiˇpuˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpawnˬ da‸ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:3 Ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Philemon1:4 Nawˬ lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw," 
Philemon1:5 nawˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ngaˬ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:6 Ngaˬ bon lawˬ ve lehˬ, shu geh teˇ geh nawˬ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui cawˬ taˍ ve da‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ shiˍ maˇ la tuˬ awˬ pon ngaˬ lawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:7 Awˬ nyi paˍ-oˬ, nawˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ dawˇ sha jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ pa taw Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve nyi ma awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:8 Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ te keunˍ te cawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon nawˬ hta‸ tawˇ piˇ tuˬ, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ha‸ hanˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ oˇ hkʼe maˇ te." 
Philemon1:9 Chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ leh, chi beu‸ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ pon htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:10 Ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, co ha hpawˇ ngaˬ paw la piˇ taˍ ve, ngaˬ ve yaˇ Awˍneˍsiˍmuˆ awˬ pon ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:11 (Yawˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ awˬ pon awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ bon cawˬ tehˬ ve yoˬ.)" 
Philemon1:12 Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ geh kʼaw‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ chi hkʼe peuˬ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ ve nyi ma shiˍ hta‸ nawˬ geh peu laˇ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
Philemon1:13 Ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ htawnˍ hkʼaw gʼa chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ nawˬ ve awˬ tan te leh ngaˬ awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ geh chehˇ tcuh gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ awˬ bon te laˇ ve lehˬ, gʼa te ve pa taw te ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ leh, te gaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te ve teˇ ceuˬ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ geh a hkaw-anˬ maˇ gʼa ve ceh ceh, ngaˬ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ te gaˇ." 
Philemon1:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ nawˬ geh hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chehˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ gʼa hpaˆ da‸ ve yoˬ hehˉ." 
Philemon1:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi teˇ pawˆ nawˬ geh kʼaw‸ chehˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ ceˬ hkʼe maˇ heˆ. Ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hkʼe chehˇ piˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ htawˇ chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:17 Ngaˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na nawˬ ve awˬ chawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ shawˍ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸." 
Philemon1:18 Yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ te ya‸ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, jeˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ cawˬ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ ve jeˬ hkʼe shawˍ taˍ-o‸." 
Philemon1:19 Ngaˬ Pawˇlu‸ lehˬ, jeˬ oˇ ve hta‸ shaiˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ awˬ to bvuh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ awˬ to nawˬ ve co ha ngaˬ hta‸ shaiˍ laˇ cawˇ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼoˆ." 
Philemon1:20 Awˬ nyi paˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ geh awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ gʼa gaˇ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Philemon1:21 Nawˬ ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ yonˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve a‸ kehˉ ka‸ nawˬ te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:22 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ a ciˉ gu taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ pawˆ gʼa kʼaw‸ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:23 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ geh teˇ geh htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ taˍ ve Eˇpaˍhpaˍraˆ lehˬ, nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:24 Ngaˬ geh teˇ geh kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ Maˍkuˆ, Aˍriˍtaˍhkuˆ, Deˍmaˆ leh Luˉka‸ hui htawˇ, nawˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Philemon1:25 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Hebrews1:1 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh, awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo laiˉ pawˆ tawˇ yaw piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:2 Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ kʼaw‸ yaw laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ shinˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, Yaˇ hpu oˇ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh, sha hpa‸ laˬ hpa‸ htaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:3 Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ba tawˆ la leh, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh, hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ leh ga piˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ tsuhˇ baˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuh kuiˬ lo chehˇ ve kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo yawˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:4 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui da‸ ve awˬ meh cawˬ ve a‸ kehˉ yawˇ gʼa taˍ ve awˬ meh lehˬ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ lehˬ yawˇ hui a‸ kehˉ uiˍ leuˉ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:5 Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ la peuˬ, teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ jaw le. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ pa hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ngaˬ ve yaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ jaw le." 
Hebrews1:6 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yaˇ uiˍ hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ peu laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui loˬ, teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:7 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tcuh leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ aˬ miˍ ha hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ tcuh ve yoˬ, teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yaˇ hpu ve awˬ lawn chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, nawˬ ve kʼaw jaw co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ nawˬ uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:9 Nawˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ ha‸ leh, aˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw nawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pfuhˍ piˇ ve a‸ kehˉ, lehˬ ve naˍ manˇ nawˬ hta‸ yawˇ pfuhˍ laˇ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:10 Peuˬ leh, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ nawˬ miˬguiˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ taˍ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ htawˇ nawˬ ve la‸ sheh te hpanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:11 Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ luˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ lehˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ veu‸ kʼaˇ hkʼe piˍ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:12 Aˉ po‸ lonˉ hta‸ lo‸ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ lo‸ leh kʼaw‸ pa piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, nawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ htawˇ maˇ peuˬ maˇ leh, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews1:13 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, Nawˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ taˍ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ-oˆ, teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ jaw le." 
Hebrews1:14 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ pon kanˉ te tuˬ, tcuh taˍ ve awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Hebrews2:1 Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa jiˆ tawˆ-e tuˬ, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ leuˉ leh hkʼa deh‸ na yuˬ-o‸." 
Hebrews2:2 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ tcuh ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ cawˇ ve pa taw, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te ya‸ leh maˇ na yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe yawˇ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:3 Hkʼe te leh, uiˍ jaˇ ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve chi hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ponˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ lawn chi awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼoˆ taˍ leh, gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, Awˬ lawn chi awˬ tehˬ awˬ na cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:4 Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ, awˬ heˆ leh anˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ pehˬ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ chehˇ ve, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ cawˬ la tuˬ ve miˬ guiˬ chi hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui awˬ hawˉ lo yawˇ teh taˍ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews2:6 Li‸ hpu teˇ kaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ chaw yaˇ hta‸ dawˇ nyi tuˬ, chaw yaˇ lehˬ aˬ hto‸ ma hpeh‸ ve le. Nawˬ chaw yaˇ ve yaˇ hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ, chaw yaˇ ve yaˇ lehˬ aˬ hto‸ ma hpeh‸ ve le." 
Hebrews2:7 Nawˬ yawˇ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo a ciˉ ceh tiˉ nehˬ piˇ leh, da‸ ve awˬ meh leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ, shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼe nawˬ yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ piˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
Hebrews2:8 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ ve hkui taw kʼaw awˬ hawˉ lo nawˬ teh taˍ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ teh taˍ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ teh taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ teh taˍ ve hta‸ chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ gʼa mawˬ sheˍ." 
Hebrews2:9 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo a ciˉ ceh tiˉ nehˬ piˇ leh, suh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve pa taw, da‸ ve awˬ meh leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ, shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˆ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon suh ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ maˇ maˇ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ kuiˬ lo shiˍ kʼai ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ leh sheh kʼai piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ yawˇ te piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hta‸ pa taw awˬ ceuˬ chi hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ leh, yawˇ da‸ piˇ kehˍ piˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yawˇ maˇ ya‸ taw." 
Hebrews2:12 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ ve awˬ meh ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ awˬ kʼaw ji lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:13 Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼaˇ va tuˬ yoˬ. Peuˬ leh teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ leh Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:14 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ htawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, yawˇ suh ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve neˇhaiˬ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Hebrews2:15 suh ve hta‸ kawˆ ve pa taw, te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ co-e awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ ceˬ gʼa te chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ laˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na kʼoˆ kʼo, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ ga piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:17 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ha kʼaˉ puiˉ jaˇ leh ka ti‸ yeˬ ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ leh, chaw yaˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ gʼa hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews2:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ jaw peuˬ ve pa taw, beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ ga piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:1 Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo kuˬ yuˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ngaˬ hui geh hkʼa geh gʼa ve, da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui yonˍ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuh yaˇ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:2 Moˉseˍ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ leh na yuˬ puiˉ ve hkʼe, Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ leuˆ teh taˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ka ti‸ yeˬ leh na yuˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:3 Yehˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yehˬ a‸ kehˉ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ Moˉseˍ a‸ kehˉ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yehˬ teˇ yehˬ le le lehˬ, te shehˍ hpaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ te shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:5 Moˉseˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hkʼa kʼoˆ maˍ tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ awˬ pon, Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw, awˬ ceˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ka ti‸ yeˬ leh na yuˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Hkri‸ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ yaˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ka ti‸ yeˬ leh na yuˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˇ law ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ leh nyi ma uiˍ tuˬ cawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼa gaˬ yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui lehˬ yehˬ oˇ ve teˇ yehˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:7 Hkʼe te leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, Ya‸ nyi yawˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve kʼo," 
Hebrews3:8 heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi leh nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ te laˇ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma taˇ heh piˇ." 
Hebrews3:9 Oˇ kaˬ lo nawˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ngaˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi canˇ nyi leh, awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yo." 
Hebrews3:10 Hkʼe te leh, chaw oˇ ve teˇ co hta‸ ngaˬ nyi ma zuhˆ leh kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ ya‸ kʼai chehˇ leh, ngaˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:11 Hkʼe te leh, Yawˇ hui lehˬ ngaˬ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e teh‸, nyi ma zuhˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hkanˍ taˍ peuˬ, teh‸ da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:12 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve leh maˇ yonˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ te-o. Chi hkʼe ve nyi ma lehˬ, nawˬ hui leh te‸ chehˇ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ piˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:13 Venˇbaˆ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nyi ma maˇ gʼa heh kʼai tuˬ, ya‸ nyi teh‸ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ nyi le le nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ da‸-o‸." 
Hebrews3:14 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ ve hkʼe, awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼa gaˬ nyi ma hkʼa deh‸ yeˬ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui Hkri‸ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews3:15 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, Ya‸ nyi yawˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve kʼo, nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ te laˇ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma taˇ heh piˇ." 
Hebrews3:16 Gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve htawˇ nyi ma zuhˆ tuˬ te ve chaw hui lehˬ, a shu le. Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo Moˉseˍ sheh tawˆ la ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Hebrews3:17 Awˇ chi hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ a shu hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve le. Venˇbaˆ te leh, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo paˍ suh-e ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Hebrews3:18 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e teh‸, a shu hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ ve le. Maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Hebrews3:19 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ hui maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw maˇ gʼa lo‸-e ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:1 Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ cawˬ sheˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ maˇ gʼa lo‸-e puiˉ-aˆ teh‸ nyiˬ hui teˇ geh dawˇ hkiˉ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui htawˇ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui gʼa kaˇ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ." 
Hebrews4:3 Ngaˬ hui yonˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e teh‸ nyi ma zuhˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hkanˍ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te peuˬ leh, suhˍ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼaˇ jehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, suhˍ nyi teˇ nyi awˬ lawn Li‸ hpu teˇ kaˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:5 Li‸ hpu teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo, Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e, teh‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:6 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve chaw hui maˇ na yuˬ ve pa taw yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa lo‸-e ve htawˇ, gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ cawˬ ve pa taw," 
Hebrews4:7 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ nyi teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ tinˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yanˇ maw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Daˍviˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh ya‸ sheh bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Ya‸ nyi yawˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui nyi ma taˇ heh, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ tinˍ taˍ ve awˬ nyi oˇ ve lehˬ ya‸ nyi yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˇsuˆ lehˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e piˇ lawˬ peuˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ nyi hta‸ Gʼuiˬ sha kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews4:9 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon gʼaˇ jehˇ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ kanˉ te peuˬ leh gʼaˇ jehˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ve gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te peuˬ leh gʼaˇ gʼa jehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:11 Hkʼe te leh, gʼaˇ jehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ, ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ te-a veuˬ. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, shu maˇ na yuˬ leh paiˍ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ paiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ viˇ nyiˇ hpawˇ cawˬ ve aˉ htaw hkʼa peu-eˬ a‸ kehˉ tcuhˆ leh, nyi ma leh co ha hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ mu‸ ku awˬ tcuhˉ leh awˬ caw paw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, juˆ pawnˍ leh pehˬ da‸ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ leh heuˆ gaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ, fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:13 Hkʼa hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ faˉ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ kʼu nyi hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ mawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:14 Ngaˬ hui uiˍ jaˇ ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui yonˍ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ-a veuˬ, Paw hkuˇ lonˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ hkʼa gaˬ lo‸-e peuˬ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews4:15 Ngaˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ beˬ ve lawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ jaw ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ venˇbaˆ maˇ te." 
Hebrews4:16 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸, loˍ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ga laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ ka‸ gʼa tuˬ, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon uiˍ ve kʼaw jaw awˬ paˇ lo ngaˬ hui jiˆ kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Hebrews5:1 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ te tuˬ, chaw yaˇ hui awˬ tan leuˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, venˇ baˆ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon la‸ shawnˍ leh tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:2 Yawˇ hui awˬ to htawˇ gʼaˇ nuˇ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, maˇ shiˍ ve chaw leh ya‸ kʼai ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:3 Yawˇ hui gʼaˇ nuˇ puiˉ ve pa taw, chaw yaˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ pon gʼa tanˇ piˇ ve hkʼe, a shu yawˇ ve venˇ baˆ awˬ pon htawˇ yawˇ hui gʼa tanˇ piˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:4 Peuˬ leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ a shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ aˉ yaˇ chi hta‸ yuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Aˍronˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kuˬ yuˬ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui hta‸ htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha gʼa kuˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:5 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Hkri‸ lehˬ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ taˍ uiˍ leh paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ ca te yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ lehˬ ngaˬ ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ nyi ngaˬ nawˬ ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ la peuˬ, teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ aˉ yaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:6 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu teˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve, Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ veawˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ lehˬ co co taiˍ taiˍ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:7 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ puiˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ leh mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ leh lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ, na yuˬ puiˉ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:8 Yawˇ lehˬ, Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve htawˇ tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ na yuˬ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ shiˍ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:9 Yawˇ biˇ la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa na yuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ pon yawˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:10 Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ paw hkuˇ lonˉ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:11 Awˬ lawn chi ngaˬ kʼoˆ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui haˆ haˆ na maˇ gʼa puiˉ ve pa taw, tcuhˉ kuiˬ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ tuˬ haˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:12 Awˬ yanˇ chi maw maw gaˬ peuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi ve kʼo, nawˬ hui lehˬ shu hta‸ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ cawˇ ve htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ lawn lonˉ ma teˇ hpaˍ, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ loˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Heh ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui caˇ maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, cuˉ gʼuiˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˬ cawˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews5:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, cuˉ gʼuiˬ hta‸ dawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yaˇ ehˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ puiˉ." 
Hebrews5:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, heh ve caˇ tuˬ lehˬ, chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ mawˬ ve kaˇ ve jawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ puiˉ la tuˬ laiˉ pawˆ te jawˬ ve pa taw, da‸ ve leh maˇ da‸ ve hta‸ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:1 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ ve awˬ lawn awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ teh taˉ leh, uiˍ la biˇ la tuˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai-a veuˬ. Suh taˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Hebrews6:2 baˆtiˆsaˬ awˬ lawn maˍ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, la‸ sheh taˍ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, suh ve chaw hui kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼo, co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ pon suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ ceh tiˉ taˇ kʼaw‸ kawˍ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Hebrews6:3 Gʼuiˬsha a hkaw-anˬ pe‸ laˇ ve kʼo, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui teh taˉ leh awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve, mvuhˇ naw ma ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ gʼa leh‸ nyi peuˬ ve leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ gʼa peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ," 
Hebrews6:5 Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ tuˬ ve teˇ co ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼa leh‸ nyi peuˬ ve htawˇ," 
Hebrews6:6 yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ luˬ kʼaw‸ kuiˇ kʼai ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˇ tuˬ te maˇ hpeh‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo kʼaw‸ hta‸ pehˍ leh, yawˇ hta‸ shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ya‸ taw tuˬ te piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:7 Miˬguiˬ lehˬ, laiˉ pawˆ laˬ ve mvuhˇ yeˬ gʼuiˬ hta‸ gʼa chaw‸ leh, muiˬ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon awˬ bon cawˬ ve gʼawˇ hpa‸ mvuhˬ naweh leh awˬ shiˍ awˬ nu hta‸ cawˬ la piˇ lawˬ ve kʼo, miˬguiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha na‸ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ oˇ ve aˉ chuˇ leh mvuh‸ teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ yeˬ la ve kʼo, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, baˬ taˍ leh hkeu ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ kʼo, aˬ miˬ tuˉ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:9 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui te taˍ ve kanˉ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hta‸ ga piˇ taˍ peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, chi beu‸ ka‸ nawˬ hui chi hkʼe te chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve chi Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon nawˬ hui hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ leunˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews6:11 Dawˇ law taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ biˇ la tuˬ ve awˬ pon, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼa gaˬ chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ gʼaˇ hte‸ te tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:12 Hkʼe te leh, a yehˉ yehˉ taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yonˍ ve leh yeunˇ hkanˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, nawˬ hui htawˇ te-o." 
Hebrews6:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ ka ti‸ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:14 Yawˇ hkanˍ taˍ ve lehˬ, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na bon na‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na maˇ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ leh hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:15 Hkʼe te leh, Aˍbraˍhanˍ yeunˇ hkanˍ leh law taˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:16 Chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh hkanˍ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te peuˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:17 Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ, yawˇ dawˇ cheˆ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ pa puiˉ ve awˬ lawn, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ gʼa taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ leuˉ leh hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ gaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ to hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ te ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:18 Ka ti‸ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ, chi nyiˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui ponˬ kuiˬ lo hpaw lo‸ la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˬ taˍ ve dawˇ law taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Maˇ pa puiˉ ve chi nyiˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ heˍ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Hebrews6:19 Dawˇ law ve chi lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ pon yeˬ leh maˇ jiˆ kʼai puiˉ ve sho kʼuˉ kʼaweh‸ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, hpaˬ kaˍ nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews6:20 Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ paw hkuˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ la leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo‸-e taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:1 Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Saˍlehnˍ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ leh, mvuh jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Aˍbraˍhanˍ bawˆ pehˍ taˉ leh kʼaw‸ la chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍ dehˆ yawˇ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ leh bon na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:2 Aˍbraˍhanˍ htawˇ, yawˇ hkʼa gʼa taˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ chi pun teˇ pun yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve awˬ meh chi lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Saˍlehnˍ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Tcuhˉ kuiˬ kʼo, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:3 Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ pa awˬ e maˇ cawˬ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve a sha‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ leh meuˇ maˇ cawˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yawˇ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:4 Yawˇ hkʼaˬ ma uiˍ jaˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ. Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, bawˆ da‸ kuiˬ lo gʼa veu laˇ ve mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hta‸ teˇ chi pun teˇ pun piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:5 Leˍviˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw hkuˇ te tuˬ aˉ yaˇ gʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ chi pun teˇ pun shaw yuˬ tuˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui geh gʼa shaw yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ maˇ heˆ htawˇ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ geh yawˇ teˇ chi pun teˇ pun gʼa leh, ka ti‸ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ bon na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:7 Uiˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, i ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ bon na‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn chi ve hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
Hebrews7:8 Suh puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chi beu‸ teˇ yanˇ teˇ chi pun teˇ pun hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Te‸ chehˇ ve teh‸ yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, oˇ ve teˇ yanˇ teˇ chi pun teˇ pun hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:9 Shu geh teˇ chi pun teˇ pun ha‸ yuˬ ve Leˍviˆ teˇ gʼa htawˇ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ chi pun teˇ pun piˇ taˍ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ lehˬ Aˍbraˍhanˍ hta‸ hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, Leˍviˆ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ puˍ lonˉ Aˍbraˍhanˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:11 Leˍviˆ chaw hui paw hkuˇ te ve teˇ yanˇ, Iˉsaˍraˍlaˆ chaw hui lehˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Leˍviˆ chaw hui paw hkuˇ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw yaˇ hui biˇ la gʼa ve hkʼe kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu paw hkuˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la tuˬ loˍ sheˍ ve le. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, paw hkuˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Aˍronˍ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ heˆ. Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, paw hkuˇ te ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ pa ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ htawˇ gʼa pa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:13 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ Li‸ hpu hkʼaw kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ tanˇ kuiˬ lo kanˉ maˇ te jaw." 
Hebrews7:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ oˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ paw hkuˇ gʼa te tuˬ ve awˬ lawn Moˉseˍ te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼoˆ taˍ." 
Hebrews7:15 Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu paw hkuˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tawˆ la peuˬ ve pa taw, paw hkuˇ awˬ ceuˬ kʼaw‸ pa peuˬ ve hta‸ leuˉ leh hkʼa deh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:16 Yawˇ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ, awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ yawˇ paw hkuˇ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˇ ve pa taw hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ luˬ maˇ suh puiˉ ve a sha‸ te‸ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ lawn chi hkʼe shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ Maˍlaˍhkiˆsaˍdehˆ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, co co taiˍ taiˍ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:18 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ leh te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve pa taw, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha teh taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:19 (Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ biˇ la piˇ maˇ gʼa.) Hkʼe te leh, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ da‸ leuˉ ve dawˇ law tuˬ cawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼaw‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Dawˇ law tuˬ chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo jiˆ kʼai hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:20 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkanˍ taˍ ve maˇ cawˬ ka‸, paw hkuˇ te tuˬ aˉ yaˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:21 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ aˉ yaˇ gʼa ve lehˬ, hkanˍ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ leh gʼa ve yoˬ. Hkanˍ taˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hkanˍ taˍ leh, yawˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ lehˬ co co taiˍ taiˍ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ leh hkanˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:22 Chi hta‸ pa taw, da‸ leuˉ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ chi hta‸ yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:23 Oˇ htaˇ, paw hkuˇ maˇ maˇ gʼa cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ kanˉ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
Hebrews7:24 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ ve pa taw, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yawˇ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:25 Chi hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh Gʼuiˬsha geh jiˆ laˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui awˬ pon lawˬ hkawˉ tuˬ, yawˇ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:26 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ hta‸ loˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve, ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve, cha‸ chiˆ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve, venˇ baˆ yaˇ hui hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ taˍ ve leh, mvuhˇ naw ma mvuh ve a‸ kehˉ Gʼuiˬ sha yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ taˆ piˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews7:27 Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu paw hkuˇ lonˉ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ awˬ pon, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve venˇ baˆ awˬ pon, teˇ nyi le le tanˇ tuˬ gʼa tanˇ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ kʼaw‸ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ." 
Hebrews7:28 Chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ puiˉ ve htawˇ, paw hkuˇ lonˉ te tuˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ aˉ yaˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ laˬ ve hkanˍ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ biˇ jaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ aˉ yaˇ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:1 Ngaˬ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve awˬ lawn uiˍ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chehˇ ve Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kʼaw jaw la‸ sha paˇ lo mui taˍ leh," 
Hebrews8:2 awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo, kanˉ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ te ve maˇ heˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha te taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, la‸ shawnˍ leh tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ hui hta‸ leuˆ teh taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, paw hkuˇ lonˉ chi teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, tanˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ yawˇ gʼa cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:4 Yawˇ lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hkʼe kʼo, yawˇ paw hkuˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te leh, la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:5 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ bon yehˬ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han leh aˉ gʼuiˬ ha ceh hpeh‸ ve bon yehˬ teˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Moˉseˍ lehˬ aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ hta‸ te-a teh‸ te ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe maˍ piˇ ve, Hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hta‸ maw laˇ peuˬ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ te tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:6 Chi beu‸ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, da‸ leuˉ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ pon awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe, yawˇ gʼa taˍ ve kanˉ htawˇ da‸ leuˉ ve yoˬ. Aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ oˇ ve da‸ leuˉ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, da‸ leuˉ ve ka ti‸ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ teh taˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ teˇ maˬ biˇ ve hkʼe kʼo, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ." 
Hebrews8:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ teˇ yehˬ leh Yuˇda‸ teˇ yehˬ hta‸ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ ngaˬ teh taˍ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:9 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ la‸ sheh gʼawˬ leh Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo sheh tawˆ la ve teˇ nyi htaˇ, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ te piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hkʼe maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh yawˇ hui maˇ kʼaw‸ te. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ teh taˉ ve yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:10 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ teˇ yehˬ hta‸ ngaˬ te piˇ tuˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo keu piˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ bvuh‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hui htawˇ ngaˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:11 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ-o‸ teh‸, mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ chawˇ chawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ maˍ piˇ da‸ tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ te leh uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:12 Ngaˬ yawˇ hui ve ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ, teh‸ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews8:13 Ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˉ lawˉ piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ hta‸ awˬ piˍ hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Maw jaˇ leh piˍ kʼai peuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:1 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve da‸ kehˬ ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ hta‸ te taˍ leh, awˉ lawˉ teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ faiˇ taˍ kuiˬ, hpui lawˇ leh, tanˇ taˍ ve hkaoˍmonˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve teˇ tawn hta‸ da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:3 Hpaˬ kaˍ nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ lo, da‸ kehˬ jaˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ teˇ tawn cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:4 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo shi oˍ taˍ ve sha tuˉ tanˇ kuiˬ leh, shi hkʼa caw zuhˇ oˍ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ ta kʼoˍ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ta kʼoˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, maˍnaˆ shiˍ keu taˍ ve shi mu‸ hkʼu, awˬ tuˍ tuˍ ve Aˍronˍ ve juˇ fuiˍ leh, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ liˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve haˉ pui baˉ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:5 Ta kʼoˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve hkeˍruˆbenˍ nyiˇ maˬ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hoˆ hta‸ beh taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ chi beu‸ kʼoˆ maˇ tanˇ sheˍ." 
Hebrews9:6 Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chi hkʼe te peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te tuˬ, aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ lo‸-e chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyiˇ tawn teˇ tawn awˬ hkʼaw lo paw hkuˇ lonˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ lo‸-e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, tanˇ piˇ tuˬ awˬ suhˍ yuˬ leh, teˇ hkʼaw‸ teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ gʼa lo‸-e ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:8 Aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ tawn cawˬ chehˇ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e tuˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw maˇ pawnˍ sheˍ teh‸, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:9 Awˬ lawn chi lehˬ, chi teˇ co-e awˬ pon tawˇ pa haˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo la‸ shawnˍ leh tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ piˇ chehˇ ve htawˇ, la‸ shawnˍ leh tanˇ tuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ pui la ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Hebrews9:10 Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, caˇ tuˬ dawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, tsuhˇ baˬ ve laiˉ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ to hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ leh kʼaw‸ gu hteˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hkʼa gaˬ ceh tiˉ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:11 Pawˇ hkuˇ lonˉ te leh da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ te laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon Hkri‸ gaˬ la htaˇ, leuˉ leh uiˍ jaˇ biˇ jaˇ ve aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hpanˍ kʼai leh, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, la‸ sheh te taˍ ve maˇ heˆ, miˬguiˬ chi hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews9:12 Da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ lo‸-e ve teˇ yanˇ, aˉ che‸ leh nuˇ ehˉ awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yuˬ lo‸-e ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yuˬ lo‸-e ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui co co taiˍ taiˍ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ te ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, aˉ che‸ leh nuˇ paˍ ve awˬ suhˍ ka‸, nuˇ ma haˉ hta‸ tuˉ tanˇ ve hkʼaw‸ laˉ ka‸, awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpawˇ maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ hpeh‸ pfuhˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ tuˬ te gʼa ve kʼo," 
Hebrews9:14 Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo suh taˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ piˇ leh, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon kanˉ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh hkʼaˬ ma te gʼa tuˬ le. Yawˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ cuˇ leh, awˬ kuiˉ awˬ haiˇ a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ ve awˬ to Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:15 Chi hta‸ pa taw, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ hawˉ lo te ya‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, Yeˍsuˆ hkanˍ suh peuˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve co co taiˍ taiˍ ve awˬ shinˉ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ awˬ pon awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:16 Awˬ shinˉ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon li‸ bvuh‸ teh taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve kʼo, awˬ shinˉ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na suh peuˬ ve hta‸ awˉ lawˉ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ shinˉ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon li‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ suh peuˬ htaˇ heh‸ awˬ shinˉ pehˬ piˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ te‸ chehˇ ve ceh ceh, bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe awˬ shinˉ pehˬ piˇ maˇ hpeh‸ sheˍ." 
Hebrews9:18 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ teˇ maˬ ka‸, awˬ suhˍ maˇ yehˇ leh tanˬ te laˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews9:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ le le Moˉseˍ chaw chi ma ve hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, nuˇ ehˉ awˬ suhˍ leh aˉ che‸ awˬ suhˍ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ hkaw‸ da‸ leh, nyiˉ-ehˍ ve yawˬ mvuh leh huˇsoˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve mvuh‸ teˇ tsuh‸ hta‸ yehˇ leh, li‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hpeh‸ pfuhˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:20 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ suhˍ chi lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:21 Aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ leh oˇ kaˬ lo yehˇ ve awˬ hkʼeun hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ htawˇ, oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ awˬ suhˍ yuˬ leh hpeh‸ pfuhˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:22 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, aˬ laˬ hkʼe awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ awˬ suhˍ yuˬ leh tsuhˇ baˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ sheˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ kʼo, venˇbaˆ hpehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
Hebrews9:23 Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ tuˬ, chi hkʼe ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ tuˬ, leuˉ leh da‸ ve tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa yehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ chaw yaˇ la‸ sheh te taˍ ve da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e ve maˇ heˆ. Oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve chehˇ kuiˬ teˇ maˬ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han ceh hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ chehˇ taˍ tuˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ lo‸-e taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:25 Paw hkuˇ lonˉ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ maˇ heˆ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ hkʼaw‸ le le lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ lehˬ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ awˬ to laiˉ pawˆ gʼa tanˇ piˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews9:26 Oˇ hkʼe gʼa tanˇ piˇ ve kʼo, miˬguiˬ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh, yawˇ laiˉ pawˆ gʼa hkanˍ suh tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:27 Chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ, teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ suh leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews9:28 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Hkri‸ lehˬ, chaw maˇ maˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hkanˍ pfuhˇ tuˬ, teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ yawˇ awˬ to tanˇ piˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la htaˇ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ya‸ la leh, yawˇ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:1 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ lehˬ, gaˬ la tuˬ ve da‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve aˉ gʼuiˬ ha ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, teˇ hkʼaw‸ peuˬ teˇ hkʼaw‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ tanˇ tuˬ hta‸ ceh tiˉ tanˇ piˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ paˇ lo jiˆ kʼai ve chaw hui hta‸ biˇ la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Hebrews10:2 Yawˇ hui biˇ la ve hkʼe kʼo, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hui tanˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ tanˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Oˉ kʼoˍ pui la ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ pawˆ da‸ peuˬ kehˬ peuˬ ve hkʼe kʼo, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve teh‸, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hkʼaw maˇ kʼaw‸ dawˇ." 
Hebrews10:3 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, tanˇ tuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, teˇ hkʼaw‸ peuˬ teˇ hkʼaw‸ venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nuˇ paˍ awˬ suhˍ leh aˉ che‸ awˬ suhˍ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ maˇ hpeh‸ taˬ." 
Hebrews10:5 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ tanˇ tuˬ leh la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ heuˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ ngaˬ awˬ pon awˬ to gu taˍ peuˬ." 
Hebrews10:6 Aˬ miˍ tuˉ tanˇ ve tanˇ tuˬ leh, venˇbaˆ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ha lehˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews10:7 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, lo‸ taˍ ve li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ awˬ lawn bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ te tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ."
