Hebrews10:8 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Tanˇ tuˬ leh la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ tuˉ tanˇ ve tanˇ tuˬ leh venˇbaˆ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ maˇ heuˆ gaˇ leh maˇ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. (Tanˇ tuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
Hebrews10:9 Nyi loˬ, nawˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ te tuˬ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ve teˇ maˬ hta‸ yeˬ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ maˬ hta‸ yawˇ baˬ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:10 Oˇ hkʼe te tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ tanˇ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ." 
Hebrews10:11 Paw hkuˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, teˇ nyi le le tanˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ maˇ gʼa ve tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:12 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa tuˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ teˇ maˬ tiˉ ve hta‸ tanˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo mui taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:13 Yawˇ oˇ kaˬ lo mui taˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve hkui taw kʼaw hawˉ lo, Gʼuiˬsha taˍ piˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ law chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, tanˇ tuˬ teˇ maˬ tiˉ ve hta‸ tanˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ co co taiˍ taiˍ biˇ la piˇ peuˬ." 
Hebrews10:15 Da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu htawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo yawˇ kʼoˆ ve," 
Hebrews10:16 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ te tuˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo keu piˇ leh, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma dawˇ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ bvuh‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:17 Peuˬ leh, Yawˇ hui ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ leh haiˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:18 Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, venˇbaˆ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ loˍ." 
Hebrews10:19 Hkʼe te leh, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ te leh lo‸-e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:20 Ngaˬ hui lo‸-e ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon hpaˬ kaˍ hta‸ yehˬ baˬ taˍ leh, co ha te‸ ve ya‸ kʼaw awˬ suhˉ teˇ caˆ yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon te pawnˍ taˍ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui cuˇ leh lo‸-e ve yoˬ. Hpaˬ kaˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ to hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:21 Gʼuiˬsha ve yehˬ teˇ yehˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uiˍ jaˇ ve paw hkuˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hui cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Hebrews10:22 Hkʼe te leh, shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ mehˉ kʼai htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ pfuhˍ laˇ leh da‸ kehˬ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ yehˇ leh ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ laˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui hkʼa biˇ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ geh jiˆ lo‸-e veuˬ." 
Hebrews10:23 Ngaˬ hui hkanˍ yuˬ taˍ ve dawˇ law ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hiˆ hiˆ naˇ naˇ maˇ te leh, yeˬ chaweh vawˆ taˍ-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ka ti‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:24 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ pehnˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, da‸ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te tuˬ, shu hta‸ dawˇ nyi leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ-a veuˬ." 
Hebrews10:25 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ teˇ geh hpawnˬ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ peuˬ. Nawˬ hui oˇ hkʼe taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ nyi oˇ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, leuˉ leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ da‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Hebrews10:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ leh ha‸ yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh venˇbaˆ kʼaw‸ te ve kʼo, venˇbaˆ awˬ pon tanˇ tuˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Hebrews10:27 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, law taˍ tuˬ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:28 Moˉseˍ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo shehˆ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, shu yawˇ hta‸ maˇ ha kʼaˉ leh tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:29 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ naˆ tiˍ taˍ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ da‸ kehˬ piˇ lawˬ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ ve teh‸ shawˍ leh, awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh hkʼaˬ ma hehnˇ jaˇ ve ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ keunˍ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ ve le." 
Hebrews10:30 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve kanˉ yoˬ. Ngaˬ kʼaw‸ shaiˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi hkʼe kʼoˆ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:31 Te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ce lo‸-e tuˬ ve lehˬ, kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:32 Ponˬ laˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ haˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Oˇ htaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yeunˇ hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ gʼa bawˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:33 Shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, oˇ hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh nawˬ hui nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:34 Awˬ lawn kʼo, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, shu nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ hiˉ yuˬ lu yuˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh da‸ jaˇ ve, maˇ mehˉ puiˉ maˇ luˬ puiˉ ve mawˇ jeˬ nawˬ hui cawˬ taˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:35 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ taˇ baˬ taˉ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw la‸ shawnˍ uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:36 Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te leh, yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ nawˬ hui loˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:37 Awˬ lawn kʼo, laˬ tuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ maˇ law chehˇ leh maˇ maw maw gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:38 Ngaˬ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ jiˆ kʼo‸-e ve kʼo, ngaˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ maˇ heˆ, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews10:39 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui lehˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ jiˆ kʼo‸-e leh luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui ve co ha htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:1 Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui dawˇ law taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na gʼa tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui maˇ mawˬ sheˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na cawˬ taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ deh‸ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:2 Aˍ sho-eˬ htaˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ yonˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:3 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw sha hpa‸ laˬ hpa‸ htaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, maˇ mawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:4 Aˍbeˍlaˆ lehˬ, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Kaˍiˉnaˆ ve tanˇ tuˬ a‸ kehˉ da‸ ve tanˇ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ yuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Aˍbeˍlaˆ suh peuˬ htawˇ, yonˍ ve oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ tawˇ yaw chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:5 Eˇnawˆ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma lo yuˬ taˆ-e ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ yuˬ taˆ-e ve pa taw, shu yawˇ hta‸ ca maˇ mawˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ maˇ yuˬ taˆ-e sheˍ htaˇ, Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve yoˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬ sha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:6 Chaw yaˇ lehˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ te maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha geh jiˆ kʼai ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha cawˬ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ ca ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ bon piˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa yonˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:7 Noˉa‸ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, maˇ hpeh‸ la sheˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hto piˇ maˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo na yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ gʼa ponˬ tuˬ, yawˇ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ te ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ taˆ leh, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:8 Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ awˬ shinˉ gʼa tuˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lo kʼai tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, hkʼaˬ lo gʼa kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ htawˇ na yuˬ leh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:9 Yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ gʼa tuˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, shu mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼaw ca chehˇ ve chaw hkʼe yawˇ hkehˉ chaw te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ geh teˇ geh mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa tuˬ ve Iˉcaˆ leh Yaˍkoˆ hui geh aˉ po kʼo teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha kawˍ taˍ te taˍ ve, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ yeˬ jaˇ ve venˇ hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:11 Saˍraˇ htawˇ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yaˇ hu ve awˬ yanˇ leh peuˬ ve htawˇ, yawˇ yaˇ hu gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ka ti‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:12 Hkʼe te leh, mawˇ jaˇ leh suh paˇ neˇ ve hawˉ hkʼaˆ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo cawˬ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ jaˇ leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ lo cawˬ ve shehˇ shiˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ gʼaw maˇ gʼa htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:13 Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo suh ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa sheˍ htawˇ, awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ vuiˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ leh ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ htaˇ, shu mvuhˇ shu miˬ lo hkehˉ chaw hkʼe hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:14 Oˇ hkʼe kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui gʼa tuˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ ca chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ hui hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:15 Yawˇ hui tawˆ la ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ hui kʼo‸-e tuˬ awˬ yanˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui dawˇ law taˍ ve mvuhˇmiˬ lehˬ, oˇ ve a‸ kehˉ da‸ ve mvuhˇ naw ma mvuhˇmiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, shu kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ya‸ taw. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui chehˇ tuˬ awˬ pon venˇ hta‸ yawˇ gu taˍ peuˬ." 
Hebrews11:17 Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ Iˉcaˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:18 Iˉcaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ cawˬ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ka ti‸ gʼa taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ ve hta‸ tanˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ chaw yaˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ puiˉ ve hta‸ yawˇ yonˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ pa haˉ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, suh kuiˬ lo yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ hta‸ yawˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:20 Iˉcaˆ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Yaˍkoˆ leh Iˉsawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ bon na‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:21 Yaˍkoˆ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, suh la paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yoˇseh‸ ve yaˇ paˍ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ bon na‸ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve juˇ fuiˍ awˬ meuˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:22 Yoˇseh‸ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ ve a sha‸ leh la paˇ neˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ gʼa tawˆ kʼai tuˬ ve awˬ lawn hto piˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ mu‸ ku hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te tuˬ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ tawˇ piˇ taˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:23 Moˉseˍ ve awˬ pa awˬ e lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Moˉseˍ paw la peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ha pa sheh lehˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hta‸ faˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve lehˬ awˬ hkiˇ awˬ nganˇ da‸ jaˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼa mawˬ leh, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ maˇ kawˆ." 
Hebrews11:24 Moˉseˍ lehˬ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ uiˍ la ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, Hpaˍrawˇ yaˇ miˇ ve awˬ yaˇ paˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ hkanˍ gaˇ." 
Hebrews11:25 Teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw ha lehˬ chehˇ ve a‸ kehˉ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ geh hkʼa geh gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ leuˉ leh heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. 
Hebrews11:26 Hkri‸ awˬ pon gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve da‸ jaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve teh‸, yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ gʼa tuˬ ve la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:27 Yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ kawˆ leh, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, mawˬ maˇ hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ mawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe te leh, yawˇ nyi ma yeˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:28 Yaˇ uiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa htawˇ tuˬ, Moˉseˍ yawˇ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Paˍsaˍhkaˍ pawehˇ te leh awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ pfuhˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:29 Yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ goˇ lehˍ ve miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ juˇ kʼai ve hkʼe, Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ nyi hta‸ hkanˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Eˇjiˇtu‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hkanˍ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, kʼa suh peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:30 Yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw hui Yeˍriˆhkoˇ venˇ hta‸ suhˍ nyi caw peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, lanˇ venˇ paˆ ce ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:31 Meh maˬ lanˉ Raˍhaˆ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh maˇ gʼa luˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, jaˆ nyi shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ha lehˬ ha kʼa ha‸ yuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:32 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ aˬ hto‸ ma gʼa kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ sheˍ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Giˉdonˍ, Baˍrehˆ, Saˍsonˍ, Yeˍhpaˍtaˆ, Daˍviˆ, Saˍmo-eˍlaˆ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn ca kʼaoˍ maˇ peuˬ taˬ." 
Hebrews11:33 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve, hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ uˉ peunˍ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa taˍ ve, laˇ caˬ shiˉ ve maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve," 
Hebrews11:34 hehnˇ jaˇ ve aˬ miˍ hta‸ shiˉ pehˍ gʼaˇ ve, aˉ htaw la‸ hkʼaw gʼa ponˬ ve, awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve hta‸ gʼa ve, ma‸ bawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ la leh, shu mvuhˇ miˬ ve ma‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:35 Yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo a shu yawˇ ve chaw kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, hehnˇ jaˇ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, leuˉ leh da‸ ve kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, shu ponˬ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ hkanˍ yuˬ." 
Hebrews11:36 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te leh dawˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, sho caˆ hpeh leh htawnˍ hkʼaw keu taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:37 Shu haˉ pui baˬ ve, liˉ leu gʼeu‸ cheˆ ve leh, aˉ htaw chaw pehˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Haˍ gʼawˇ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, fawˉ ve mehˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˬ guiˬ kʼuˉ aˉ che‸ guiˬ kʼuˉ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, teˇ kaˬ peuˬ teˇ kaˬ lo yawˇ hui gʼa hpaw toˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews11:38 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw leh hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lawˬ hkʼoˆ lo, miˬ kʼoˍ haˉ kʼoˍ hkʼaw lo ca chehˇ toˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui da‸ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ chi yawˇ hui hta‸ maˇ keunˍ." 
Hebrews11:39 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve htawˇ, ka ti‸ piˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ gʼa sheˍ." 
Hebrews11:40 Aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ pa taw le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh maˇ heˆ kʼo, yawˇ hui biˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa sheˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon da‸ leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gu taˍ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:1 Hkʼe te leh, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ chi taw taw maˇ leh, moˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ hui hta‸ caw zuhˇ chehˇ taˍ ve pa taw, tawˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ sheˬ leh, hawˆ taˍ ve venˇ baˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼehˆ baˬ taˉ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ pon gu taˍ laˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ nyi ma yeˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼuiˇ kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Hebrews12:2 Gʼuiˇ kʼai chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ nyi taˍ-o‸. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ tanˬ te leh biˇ la piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ teh taˍ ve ha lehˬ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, ya‸ taw ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ leh, la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh peuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ chi beu‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve kʼaw jaw la‸ sha paˉ lo mui chehˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
Hebrews12:3 Nawˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ gʼa nuˇ leh, nyi ma maˇ gʼa luˬ tuˬ, venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo chi taw taw hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na te leh tawˍ taˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o." 
Hebrews12:4 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hta‸ gʼa tawˍ da‸ bawˆ da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui ve awˬ suhˍ sheˆ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ jaw sheˍ." 
Hebrews12:5 Yaˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ pa maˍ piˇ ve hkʼe, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ maˍ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui leunˇ peuˬ laˇ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ yaˇ paˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ hkʼe leˇ taˇ dawˇ. Yawˇ nawˬ hta‸ deˇ maˍ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, nyi ma taˇ luˬ." 
Hebrews12:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ha‸ ve chaw hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve yaˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ jaw‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:7 Yawˇ maˍ laˇ ve hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ-o‸. Yaˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ pa te piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ te laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ pa maˇ maˍ piˇ ve yaˇ paˍ a shu teˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ le." 
Hebrews12:8 Yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ maˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui yaˇ awˬ tehˬ ma hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:9 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ hui yawˆ yan ve yoˬ. Chi a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh, co ha hpawˇ ve Awˬ pa awˬ hawˉ lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ leh co ha gʼa te‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
Hebrews12:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui hta‸ teˇ tcuhˉ teˇ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ da‸ ve kehˬ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon da‸ ve hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ leh maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:11 Maˍ laˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, ha lehˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve maˇ heˆ, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve awˬ shiˍ naw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:12 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui ve la‸ sheh deu lehˍ te chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chiˇ leh, awˬ gʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ ve hkui tcuhˉ kʼu teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Hebrews12:13 Hkui sheh luˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ tcuhˉ maˇ gʼa jiˆ kʼai leh na-e la tuˬ, nawˬ hui ve hkui sheh awˬ pon ya‸ kʼaw hteˇ lehˍ gu taˍ-o‸." 
Hebrews12:14 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, da‸ la kehˬ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o. Da‸ ve kehˬ ve maˇ cawˬ ve chaw a shu teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ." 
Hebrews12:15 Nawˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ hkʼa deh‸ taˍ-o‸. Maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ gʼa puiˉ-aˆ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ laˇ tuˬ, hkʼaˇ ve awˬ geu tawˆ la leh, chaw maˇ maˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ htawˇ te laˇ puiˉ-aˆ." 
Hebrews12:16 Awˍ teˇ poˬ ceh tiˉ gʼa caˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yaˇ uiˍ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ hawˇ baˬ ve Iˉsawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ hkʼa deh‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Hebrews12:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ Iˉsawˇ lehˬ na‸ piˇ ve awˬ bon hta‸ kʼaw‸ heuˆ gaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, baˬ taˉ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Mehˆ gʼuiˬ ya‸ la ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ ca ve htawˇ, kʼaw‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ awˬ yanˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Hebrews12:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, la‸ sheh htawˇ gʼa ve, aˬ miˍ to‸ ve, naˆ tawˉ naˆ ho‸ ve leh, mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ la ve hkʼaw teˇ shiˍ lo nawˬ hui laˬ ve maˇ heˆ." 
Hebrews12:19 Hkʼaw oˇ ve teˇ shiˍ lo behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ leh tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ yaw laˇ tuˬ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, To nuˇ to shaˆ ka‸ hkʼaw oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa daw‸ ve kʼo, haˉ pui baˬ pehˍ-o‸ teh‸, tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui hkanˍ maˇ gʼa." 
Hebrews12:21 Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve pa taw, Ngaˬ kawˆ cheˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, Moˉseˍ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:22 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui laˬ ve lehˬ, Ziˉonˍ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo laˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaw oˇ ve lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve venˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ ve Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ, ca gʼaw maˇ peuˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ," 
Hebrews12:23 mvuhˇ naw ma ve caˇ lanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh bvuh‸ taˍ ve yaˇ uiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo, biˇ la peuˬ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui ve co ha teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ kuiˬ lo," 
Hebrews12:24 ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ awˬ suhˉ awˬ pon awˬ kaˍ te shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ geh lo leh, Aˍbeˍlaˆ ve awˬ suhˍ tawˇ yaw ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh da‸ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw ve, pfuhˍ taˍ ve awˬ suhˍ geh lo nawˬ hui laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:25 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, tawˇ yaw laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na ve chaw maˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo shaˍ ti‸ piˇ sheh hpaˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ na ve pa taw maˇ gʼa ponˬ ve kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve shaˍ ti‸ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui maˇ na ve kʼo, leuˉ leh ponˬ maˇ hpeh‸." 
Hebrews12:26 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ miˬguiˬ hta‸ hiˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ ka ti‸ cawˬ taˍ ve lehˬ, Miˬguiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ hiˆ piˇ tuˬ sheˍ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ htawˇ hiˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:27 Teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ hiˆ piˇ tuˬ sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve lehˬ, hiˆ piˇ maˇ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ yeˬ chehˇ tuˬ, hiˆ piˇ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Hiˆ piˇ gʼa ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, te hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews12:28 Hkʼe te leh, hiˆ piˇ maˇ gʼa ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-a veuˬ. Yawˆ yan puiˉ kawˆ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui-a veuˬ." 
Hebrews12:29 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, to‸ baˬ chehˇ ve aˬ miˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:1 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi ha‸ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
Hebrews13:2 Hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ taˇ leunˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hkehˉ chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ jaw ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:3 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve chaw hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ shawˍ taˍ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui htawˇ awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ taˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
Hebrews13:4 Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ heuˆ da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hpawˇ awˬ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ kʼai. Awˬ lawn kʼo, guiˇ ya‸ ve chaw leh haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:5 Hpu hta‸ sheˉ lai ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo taˇ cawˬ piˇ. Nawˬ hui hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi hkʼaˇ suh chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ hpaˆ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ baˬ teh‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:6 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ ga laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ kawˆ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Chaw yaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ aˬ hto‸ ma te laˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ le, teh‸ nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:7 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpa hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ nyi leh, yawˇ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ henˇ yuˬ leh te-o." 
Hebrews13:8 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, aˉ nyi, ya‸ nyi leh co co taiˍ taiˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:9 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ shu laiˉ ceuˬ ca maˍ la ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ hui taˇ kʼai. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ pa taw nyi ma yeˬ ve kʼo, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Caˇ tuˬ ce kan ve hta‸ pa taw nyi ma yeˬ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Caˇ tuˬ ce kan ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ yehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon maˇ gʼa." 
Hebrews13:10 Ngaˬ hui tanˇ kuiˬ teˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tanˇ kuiˬ chi teˇ maˬ lo gʼa caˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
Hebrews13:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, paw hkuˇ lonˉ lehˬ venˇ baˆ hpehˇ tuˬ ve tanˇ tuˬ awˬ pon to nuˇ to shaˆ ve awˬ suh hta‸ yuˬ leh, da‸ kehˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ to oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ baˬ lo aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:12 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ Yeˍsuˆ htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw chaw yaˇ hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ tuˬ, lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ awˬ baˬ lo yawˇ hkanˍ suh ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:13 Hkʼe te leh ngaˬ hui htawˇ, shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve hta‸ yawˇ hkanˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ hui hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, deh kuiˬ awˬ baˬ lo yawˇ geh tawˆ kʼai-a veuˬ." 
Hebrews13:14 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yeˬ ve venˇ maˇ cawˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ cawˬ la tuˬ ve venˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law leh ca chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:15 Hkʼe te leh, Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ chiˇ mvuh ve tanˇ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ tanˇ piˇ-a veuˬ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:16 Da‸ ve hta‸ te ve teˇ ceuˬ leh shu hta‸ mawˇ jeˬ pehˬ piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ taˇ leunˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi hkʼe ve tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:17 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ hoˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ awˬ lawn Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ gʼa kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve co ha hta‸ yawˇ hui hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe nyi ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ leh ha lehˬ ha kʼa te hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon te‸ chiˉ maˇ cawˬ." 
Hebrews13:18 Ngaˬ awˬ pon bon lawˬ laˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, ya‸ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ ngaˬ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ da‸ ve hta‸ tiˉ te gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:19 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh haˆ haˆ gʼa kʼaw‸ la hpeh‸ tuˬ ve, bon lawˬ laˇ tuˬ leuˉ leh ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:20 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Co co taiˍ taiˍ ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ te tuˬ yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ sheˆ leh, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:21 Dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ te shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui te gʼa tuˬ, da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la tuˬ ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nyi ma cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Hebrews13:22 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ngeh ve li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ leh na yuˬ tuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:23 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Tiˆmoˉseˍ hta‸ shu hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ ve teh‸ shiˍ-o‸. Yawˇ haˆ haˆ gaˬ la ve kʼo, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh laˬ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ gʼa mawˬ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Hebrews13:24 Nawˬ hui ve awˬ hoˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ leh Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ hto piˇ-oˆ. Choˬ kaˬ lo chehˇ taˍ ve Iˉtaˍliˍ chaw teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. 
Hebrews13:25 Nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ geh awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ. 
James1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha leh Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ Yaˍkoˆ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hpaˆ da‸ kʼai peuˬ ve chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo dawˇ sha ha lehˬ tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
James1:2 Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, beˬ ve lawˇ ve laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
James1:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma lehˬ, lawˇ nyi ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ, nawˬ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
James1:4 Nawˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ yawnˇ kʼai leh, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te-o." 
James1:5 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ cuˇ yiˍ maˇ biˇ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha geh lawˬ-o‸. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, maˇ deˇ leh chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ chaweh hkʼe leˇ piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, cuˇ yiˍ lawˬ ve chaw hta‸ ka‸ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
James1:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo lawˬ-o‸. Nyi ma htawˇdawˇnawˬdawˇ taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nyi ma htawˇ dawˇ nawˬ dawˇ te ve chaw lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw meuˆ leh gʼuiˬ baˇ taˆ taˆ ya‸ ya‸ te ve hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James1:7 Oˇ hkʼe ve chaw lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh yawˇ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ gʼa tuˬ ve teh‸ taˇ dawˇ." 
James1:8 Yawˇ lehˬ, nyi ma nyiˇ shiˍ cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ maˇ yeˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James1:9 Shu awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ ha lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
James1:10 Paw sha ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ maˇ cawˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ htawˇ ha lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, paw sha ve chaw lehˬ, mvuh‸ veˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
James1:11 Mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ la leh, haw jaˇ chiˆ jaˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuh‸ lehˬ nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai ve yoˬ. Awˬ veˆ ka‸ piˬ kʼai ce kʼai leh, nyi sha ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸ mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, paw sha ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ te chehˇ ve kanˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo luˬ kʼai mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
James1:12 Beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ da‸ htaˇ, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, lawˇ nyi ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkanˍ gʼaˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Shi uˉ tcuhˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James1:13 Venˇbaˆ beˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hta‸ beˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ taˇ kʼoˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ beˬ maˇ hpeh‸. Haiˬ ve te tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ maˇ beˬ." 
James1:14 Hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ sheˉ lai puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, venˇ baˆ te tuˬ yawˇ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
James1:15 Oˇ htaˇ, sheˉ lai puiˉ ve nyi ma lehˬ, yaˇ hu ve hkʼe yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hu la leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ paw la piˇ ve yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ htawˇ, uiˍ la biˇ la ve teˇ yanˇ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ paw la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
James1:16 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, taˇ dawˇ ya‸." 
James1:17 Da‸ ve awˬ bon hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, biˇ ve la‸ shawnˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chehˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ ve Awˬ pa geh ya‸ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ maˇ pa puiˉ. Yawˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo aˉ gʼuiˬ ha ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
James1:18 Hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ naw‸ la ve iˉ shiˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ, yawˇ a loˍ cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ paw la piˇ ve yoˬ." 
James1:19 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ lawn chi hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Shu tawˇ yaw ve hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na sheˍ. Tawˇ haˆ haˆ taˇ yaw. Nyi ma haˆ haˆ taˇ zuhˆ." 
James1:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ tawˆ la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
James1:21 Chi hta‸ pa taw, cha‸ chiˆ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, haiˬ ve hta‸ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui ve co ha hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ puiˉ ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw ti taˍ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ yuˬ-o‸," 
James1:22 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Kaˇ ve chaw ceh tiˉ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Kaˇ ve chaw ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James1:23 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh maˇ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi ve chaw hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
James1:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nyi peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai leh, yawˇ awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hkʼaˬ hkʼe cawˬ ve hta‸ teˇ cawˬ haˉ leunˇ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
James1:25 Chaw hta‸ ponˬ piˇ ve, biˇ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nyi tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, kaˇ leh leunˇ kʼai ve chaw maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw hpeh‸ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkʼa te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
James1:26 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ hta‸ yawˇ hkʼa deh‸ te ve teh‸ dawˇ htawˇ, yawˇ ve ha tehˍ hta‸ maˇ gʼaˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ heˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve lehˬ hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James1:27 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cha‸ chiˆ ve maˇ cawˬ leh da‸ kehˬ ve oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve awˬ liˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yaˇcuˬshi leh mehˇchawˇma teˇ hpaˍ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ miˬguiˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa ngawˉ tuˬ gʼa faˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James2:1 Ngaˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw yaˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ taˇ nyi." 
James2:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, shi la‸ peˍ tcuhˉ leh da‸ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ leh, maˇ da‸ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ hui nyiˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui ve hpawnˬ da‸ kuiˬ lo lo‸ la htaˇ," 
James2:3 da‸ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ veu‸ deh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui nyi leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Da‸ ve mui kuiˬ chi hta‸ mui-o. Peuˬ leh haˍ yaˇ gʼawˇ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Oˇ kaˬ lo huˉ taˍ-o‸, maˇ heˆ kʼo, Ngaˬ ve hkui paˇ lo mui taˍ-o‸ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve kʼo," 
James2:4 nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ pehˬ da‸ fuiˍ da‸ leh, haiˬ ve dawˇ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo shu hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James2:5 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, hkʼa deh‸ na sheˍ. Yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo paw sha la tuˬ, haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui lehˬ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James2:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ te ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ leh suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ shaˉ nanˉ lo gʼawˬ kʼai ve chaw hui lehˬ, paw sha ve chaw hui maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James2:7 Nawˬ hui gʼa taˍ ve da‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, paw sha ve chaw hui maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James2:8 Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ ha‸ ve hkʼe, nawˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ ha‸-o‸ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ chi hta‸ nawˬ hui te biˇ ve kʼo, da‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui te peuˬ." 
James2:9 Shu mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui nyi chehˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ te chehˇ leh, nawˬ hui te ponˬ te leuˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve." 
James2:10 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkʼaˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ liˇ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ceh te ya‸ ve ka‸, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ya‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James2:11 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ taˇ te teh‸ kʼoˆ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Shu hta‸ taˇ tiˇ pehˍ ka‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ maˇ te htawˇ shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve kʼo, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James2:12 Ponˬ piˇ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh, nawˬ hui hta‸ suhˉ gʼa jehˬ tuˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui tawˇ yaw ve maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˉ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa deh‸ te-o." 
James2:13 Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu hta‸ maˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ htaˇ, Suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ ha kʼaˉ piˇ. Ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ veyoˬ." 
James2:14 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, Ngaˬ lehˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ htawˇ, kanˉ maˇ te ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le. Yonˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ hpeh‸-aw laˇ." 
James2:15 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ veu‸ kʼaˇ maˇ cawˬ leh, teˇ nyi pon teˇ nyi caˇ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo," 
James2:16 nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Dawˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kʼo‸-e loˬ. Nawˬ awˬ to hta‸ lehˬ la piˆ, bvuhˆ la piˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ to pon loˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ piˇ ve kʼo, aˬ hto‸ ma awˬ bon cawˬ le." 
James2:17 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, kanˉ maˇ te ve kʼo, yonˍ ve oˇ ve suh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James2:18 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ lehˬ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ kanˉ te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Kanˉ maˇ te leh, nawˬ yonˍ ve maˍ laˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, kanˉ te ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ yonˍ ve nawˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
James2:19 Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ yonˍ ve leˇ. Nawˬ yonˍ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Neˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yonˍ leh kawˆ cheˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. 
James2:20 Maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw-oˬ, yonˍ leh kanˉ maˇ te ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ gaˇ laˇ." 
James2:21 Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ pa Aˍbraˍhanˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve yaˇ paˍ Iˉcaˆ hta‸ tanˇ kuiˬ hkʼoˆ tanˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, kanˉ te ve pa taw yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James2:22 Yawˇ te ve kanˉ geh hkʼa geh yonˍ ve ka‸ cawˬ leh, kanˉ hta‸ pa taw yawˇ yonˍ ve biˇ la ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
James2:23 Aˍbraˍhanˍ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve Li‸ hpu tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ biˇ la ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ chawˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
James2:24 Hkʼe te leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yonˍ ve hta‸ pa taw ceh tiˉ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ. Kanˉ ka‸ te ve hta‸ pa taw hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
James2:25 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Raˍhaˆ meh ve meh maˬ lanˉ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, tcuh peu ve chaw hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ leh, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ya‸ kʼaw teˇ caˆ hta‸ kʼo‸-e tcuh ve pa taw, kanˉ te leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ la ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James2:26 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo co ha maˇ cawˬ kʼo suh ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ kanˉ maˇ te ve kʼo, suh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James3:1 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui laiˉ gʼaˇ maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ taˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˍ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shu a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
James3:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ laiˉ ceuˬ te ya‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ, yawˇ tawˇ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ yaw ya‸ jaw kʼo, yawˇ biˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, awˬ to teˇ to hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James3:3 Iˉ mvuhˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ tuˬ yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo sho caˆ keu ve kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼawˬ caw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James3:4 Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi sheˍ. Uiˍ jaˇ ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ kʼai ve htawˇ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ gʼa‸ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, i jaˇ ve caˉ behˆ ehˉ hta‸ yehˇ leh, yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lonˉ hta‸ suhˉ caw piˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
James3:5 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ha tehˍ lehˬ, awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo i jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼeun hpeh‸ ve htawˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˇ uiˍ tawˇ mvuh yaw puiˉ ve yoˬ. I jaˇ ve aˬ miˍ lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve heh puiˉ hkʼaw hta‸ to‸ baˬ gʼa ve hta‸ nyi sheˍ." 
James3:6 Ha tehˍ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo, ha tehˍ lehˬ venˇbaˆ ve mvuhˇmiˬ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ maˇ maˇ hpehˇ tawˆ la piˇ leh, shaˬ te shaˬ maˇ la tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Moˬ naˆ ho‸ lehˬ, ha tehˍ hta‸ aˬ miˍ tuˉ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
James3:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, to nuˇ to shaˆ, ngaˆ, loˇ kʼai gaˆ kʼai puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ, iˉ kaˆ hkʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ chaw yaˇ meuˇ la tuˬ te gʼa leh, te meuˇ taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
James3:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw yaˇ lehˬ, ha tehˍ hta‸ meuˇ la tuˬ te maˇ gʼa. Ha tehˍ lehˬ, ta‸ iˉ maˇ chehˇ puiˉ ve haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Suh piˇ puiˉ ve awˬ taw‸ ma htawˇ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
James3:9 Ngaˬ hui ha tehˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh ngaˬ hui ve Awˬ pa hpeh‸ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ te hpanˍ taˍ ve chaw yaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ha tehˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh kʼaw‸ hkeu piˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
James3:10 Maw‸ kʼaw teˇ maˬ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo, chiˇ mvuh ve hkawˇ ka‸, hkeu ve hkawˇ ka‸ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi hkʼe te maˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
James3:11 Gʼuiˬ tuˇ teˇ maˬ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo mehˬ ve iˉ kaˆ leh hkʼaˇ ve iˉ kaˆ teˇ geh tawˆ la tuˬ laˇ. 
James3:12 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ shaˍlonˍ shiˍ naw‸ hpeh‸-aw laˇ. A pehˉ meuˇ te hta‸ maˉ nawˆ shiˍ naw‸ hpeh‸-aw laˇ. Oˇ hkʼe naw‸ maˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hkʼaˇ ve gʼuiˬ tuˇ lehˬ, mehˬ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ maˇ hpeh‸." 
James3:13 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ leh shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw a shu le. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ cawˬ ve hkʼe, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te leh, yawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
James3:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui hkawehˉ puiˉ jaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ moˍ shawˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gaˇ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve taˇ te." 
James3:15 Chi hkʼe ve cuˇ yiˍ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la ve cuˇ yiˍ maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ ve cuˇ yiˍ leh, neˇhaiˬ ve cuˇ yiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James3:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hkawehˉ puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ leh, nyi ma uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ moˍ shawˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve kʼo, sho‸ sha‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh haiˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
James3:17 Mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la ve cuˇ yiˍ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ da‸ ve kehˬ ve, hkʼaw‸ nawˉ cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve, na yuˬ puiˉ ve leh, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸, da‸ ve awˬ shiˍ ka‸, hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Htawˇ hpfuhˆ nawˬ hpfuhˆ te ve nyi ma leh, heˍ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
James3:18 Cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ tuˬ te ve chaw hui lehˬ, dawˇ sha ve awˬ hkʼaw lo sheˍ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
James4:1 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo canˇ da‸ ve leh ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve teˇ hpaˍ aˬ hto‸ ma pa taw tawˆ la ve le. Nawˬ hui awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ te gaˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo bawˆ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw tawˆ la ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
James4:2 Nawˬ hui heuˆ gaˇ jaˇ ve hkʼe maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai ve hkʼe maˇ gʼa ve pa taw, shu hta‸ ya‸ da‸ jiˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui maˇ lawˬ ve pa taw nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa." 
James4:3 Nawˬ hui lawˬ htawˇ maˇ gʼa. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ ceh te gaˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui lawˬ ya‸ ve yoˬ." 
James4:4 Haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te shehˍ ma hta‸ shuˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, miˬguiˬ awˬ liˇ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ laˇ. Miˬguiˬ awˬ liˇ hta‸ awˬ chawˇ te gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha ve canˇ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James4:5 Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ keu laˇ ve co ha hta‸ yawˇ sheˉ lai jaˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve tawˇ chi lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve teh‸ dawˇ ve laˇ." 
James4:6 Yawˇ lehˬ awˬ bon leuˉ leh piˇ ve yoˬ. Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve mvuh ve chaw hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ leh, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ awˬ bon piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James4:7 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha uˉ peunˍ ve awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Neˇhaiˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui lo yawˇ hpaw tawˆ-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
James4:8 Gʼuiˬsha geh jiˆ laˬ-o‸. Hkʼe te kʼo, yawˇ nawˬ hui geh jiˆ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Venˇbaˆ yaˇ hui-oˬ, nawˬ hui ve la‸ sheh hta‸ tsuhˇ hpu tsuhˇ kehˬ-o‸. Nyi ma nyiˇ hkʼaˇ dawˇ ve chaw hui-oˬ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ da‸ la kehˬ la piˇ-oˆ." 
James4:9 Nyi ma hkʼaw tu‸ hkanˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ haˍ leh hkʼanˇ chehˇ-oˆ. Paˆ hawˬ kehˇ hawˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui gʼuiˬ yawˬ ve lehˬ, nyi ma hkʼaw dawˇ haˍ leh hkʼanˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ hpeh‸ la piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui ve ha lehˬ tuˬ lehˬ, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ pa piˇ-oˆ." 
James4:10 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nyi ma nehˬ lehˍ taˍ-o‸. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ chiˇ taˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. 
James4:11 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ taˇ hkʼaiˉ da‸. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ hkʼaiˉ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ taˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ lehˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼaiˉ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ ve kʼo, nawˬ lehˬ awˬ liˇ tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ shehˍ hpaˇ maˇ heˆ. Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ venˇbaˆ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James4:12 Awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ teh taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ leh suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ponˬ piˇ tuˬ ka‸, te luˬ tuˬ ka‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ awˬ paˇ awˬ kui chehˇ ve chaw awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇ baˆ taˍ ve chaw-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe ve chaw le." 
James4:13 Nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ kʼoˆ ve, Ya‸ nyi shawˉ pawˍ ngaˬ hui venˇ teˇ venˇ venˇ lo teˇ hkʼaw‸ ca chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo tanˇ kaˬ te leh, awˬ yawˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve chaw hui-oˬ, hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ nyi sheˍ." 
James4:14 Shawˉ pawˍ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ. Nawˬ ve a sha‸ aˬ hto‸ ma hta‸ shuˍ da‸ le. Teˇ hkui tiˉ gʼa mawˬ taˉ leh, mehˉ kʼai ve iˉ kaˆ shaˉ hta‸ shuˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
James4:15 Nawˬ hui kʼoˆ cawˇ ve lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬ sha nyi ma cawˇ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui a sha‸ te‸ leh, chi hkʼe oˇ hkʼe te tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
James4:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ nawˬ hui nyi ma uiˍ leh caˆ muiˬ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Nyi ma uiˍ ve chi hkʼe ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ haiˬ ve yoˬ." 
James4:17 Hkʼe te leh, da‸ ve hta‸ te tuˬ shiˍ taˍ htawˇ maˇ te ve chaw lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ pon venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
James5:1 Chaw paw chaw sha teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ na sheˍ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ lo gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ hawˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
James5:2 Nawˬ hui ve mawˇ jeˬ lehˬ kuiˇ kʼai peuˬ. Nawˬ hui ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ pfuhˇ shehˍ ma caˇ peuˬ. 
James5:3 Nawˬ hui ve hpu shi htawˇ yawˇ caˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ caˇ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ te ve hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, aˬ miˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon, nawˬ hui mawˇ jeˬ shaw hpoˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
James5:4 Na sheˍ. Nawˬ hui ve ti mi hkʼaw caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ leh awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ piˇ ve pa taw, awˬ hpfuhˇ oˇ ve kuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Caˬ gʼeu‸ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve kuˬ hkawˇ htawˇ, hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve naˍ paw awˬ hkʼaw lo geh peuˬ." 
James5:5 Nawˬ hui miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo paw sha jaˇ leh nyi hkʼaˇ suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ te taˍ peuˬ. Tiˇ pehˍ ve awˬ nyi awˬ pon nawˬ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma hta‸ hu leh gu taˍ peuˬ." 
James5:6 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hta‸ nawˬ hui suhˉ taˆ leh tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ. Yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ tawˍ taˍ. 
James5:7 Chi hta‸ pa taw, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Muiˬ caˇ paˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa tuˬ yawˇ law taˍ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ yeˬ awˉ lawˉ laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ leh, awˬ leh laˬ ve teˇ yanˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ leh law taˍ ve yoˬ." 
James5:8 Nawˬ hui htawˇ, yeunˇ hkanˍ leh law taˍ-o‸. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
James5:9 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ teˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ taˇ taˍ da‸. Nyi-o, Suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yehˬ miˉ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
James5:10 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ peun leh maˍ laˇ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ-o‸." 
James5:11 Yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve chaw hui lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇbaˆ yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ dawˇ taˍ ve hkʼe te piˇ leh, yawˇ hkʼaˬ ma ha‸ leh ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa mawˬ peuˬ." 
James5:12 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a ciˉ ka‸ taˇ hkanˍ. Tawˇ chi lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve teˇ hkawˇ yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh taˇ hkanˍ. Nawˬ hui suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, nawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yoˬ ve kʼo yoˬ, maˇ heˆ ve kʼo maˇ heˆ teh‸ ceh tiˉ kʼoˆ loˬ." 
James5:13 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ tu‸ chehˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve laˇ. Yawˇ hta‸ bon lawˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ ha lehˬ chehˇ ve laˇ. Yawˇ hta‸ kʼa muiˬ chiˇ mvuh piˇ lawˬ-o‸. 
James5:14 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ naˬ chehˇ gawˬ chehˇ ve laˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ cuˇ leh, chaw naˬ oˇ ve hta‸ naˍ manˇ shehˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ awˬ pon bon lawˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
James5:15 Yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, chaw naˬ hta‸ na-e la piˇ leh, Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yawˇ hta‸ tu la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
James5:16 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui na-e la tuˬ, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ kʼaoˍ maˍ da‸ leh, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon bon lawˬ-o‸. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw bon lawˬ ve lehˬ, kanˇ paˆ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
James5:17 Eˇliˇya‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ chaw yaˇ hpeh‸ ve htawˇ, mvuhˇ yeˬ maˇ laˬ tuˬ yawˇ bon gʼaˇ hte‸ lawˬ htaˇ, shehˆ hkʼaw‸ leh ha pa hkaw‸ maˬ hkʼa gaˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo mvuhˇ yeˬ maˇ laˬ." 
James5:18 Teˇ pawˆ yawˇ bon kʼaw‸ lawˬ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lehˬ mvuhˇ yeˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ piˇ leh, miˬguiˬ htawˇ awˬ shiˍ kʼaw‸ naw‸ la ve yoˬ." 
James5:19 Ngaˬ awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ ya‸ kʼai leh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ shiˍ hkʼaw‸ veu laˇ ve kʼo," 
James5:20 venˇbaˆ yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ shiˍ hkʼaw‸ veu laˇ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, suh kuiˬ lo co ha teˇ maˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ leh, venˇ baˆ maˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ beh taˍ peuˬ teh‸, yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ Peˍtruˆ yoˬ. Hpaˆ da‸ leh, Poˍtuˆ, Gaˍlaˍtiˆ, Kaˍpaˍdawˇkiˆ, Aˍsiˆ leh Beˍtuˇniˆ mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ca chehˇ kʼai peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:2 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ pfuhˍ piˇ tuˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ leh, Awˬ ha hpu nawˬ hui hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ peuˬ. Awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter1:3 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o. Yawˇ ha kʼaˉ puiˉ jaˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ hui chaw awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ la leh, te‸ chehˇ ve dawˇ law kuiˬ cawˬ la ve yoˬ. Dawˇ law kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve hta‸ pa taw cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:4 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ shinˉ caˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Maˇ luˬ puiˉ, maˇ cha‸ chiˆ puiˉ, maˇ pehˆ puiˉ ve awˬ shinˉ oˇ ve hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo nawˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ ha‸ shaˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:5 Awˬ leh meuˇ teˇ nyi htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:6 Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ teˇ hkui teˇ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh lawˇ nyi ve laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hpuˇ da‸ ve htawˇ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter1:7 Aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shi hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve hkʼe, tu‸ hkanˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ nawˬ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma lehˬ, luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve shi a‸ kehˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui yonˍ yeˬ ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, chiˇ mvuh ve, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh, taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter1:8 Yawˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ mawˬ jaw htawˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ htawˇ, nawˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ yonˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ jaˇ leh, ca kʼoˆ maˇ peuˬ ve ha lehˬ tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:9 Nawˬ hui yonˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve co ha htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:10 Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve chi hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hkʼa deh‸ na nyi leh ca nyi peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ bon pe‸ laˇ tuˬ ve awˬ lawn, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ yawˇ hui bon maˍ peuˬ." 
1Peter1:11 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Hkri‸ ve Awˬ ha hpu kanˉ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ tuˬ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ te tuˬ leh naˍ, yawˇ hui ca nyi peuˬ ve yoˬ. Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Hkri‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:12 Tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ te ve kanˉ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon maˇ heˆ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon yoˬ teh‸, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Chi beu‸ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ chi shu nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma lo peu laˇ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui ka‸ mawˬ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:13 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui nyi ma gu taˍ leh shaˍ ti‸ taˍ chehˇ-oˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ tuˬ ve awˬ bon hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ dawˇ law taˍ-o‸." 
1Peter1:14 Aˉ suhˆ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ sheˍ htaˇ, a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ taˇ kʼaw‸ te. Na yuˬ puiˉ ve yaˇ ehˉ hkʼe te-o." 
1Peter1:15 Nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ da‸ kehˬ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui hkʼa te ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo da‸ kehˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter1:16 Ngaˬ da‸ kehˬ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui htawˇ da‸ kehˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:17 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ hui bon lawˬ htaˇ, A pa-oˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ chaw mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ maˇ nyi leh, teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ te ve kanˉ hta‸ nyi leh suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkehˉ chaw te chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te-o." 
1Peter1:18 Awˬ puˍ awˬ pi teˇ hpaˍ geh gʼa ve awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ponˬ tuˬ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve hpu shi hta‸ yehˇ leh htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Peter1:19 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ laˇ ve nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ kuiˉ awˬ haiˇ maˇ cawˬ leh awˬ meˇ maˇ cawˬ ve yawˬ ehˉ awˬ suhˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:20 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ te hpanˍ sheˍ htaˇ ka‸, chi hkʼe gʼa te hkanˍ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:21 Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yonˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ suh kuiˬ lo kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la piˇ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ leh dawˇ law ve awˬ ceuˬ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:22 Nawˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ na yuˬ ve pa taw, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hui hta‸ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ha‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma da‸ la kehˬ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui nyi ma awˬ tawˬ hkʼa gaˬ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-o‸." 
1Peter1:23 Nawˬ hui awˬ suhˉ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ paw la peuˬ. Paw la ve chi lehˬ, luˬ puiˉ sheˆ puiˉ ve awˬ yawˇ hta‸ pa taw maˇ heˆ. Maˇ luˬ maˇ sheˆ puiˉ ve awˬ yawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve te‸ chehˇ yeˬ chehˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw paw la ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:24 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ mvuh‸ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hui ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ htawˇ mvuh‸ veˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Mvuh‸ lehˬ nawˍ kʼai goˇ kʼai leh, awˬ veˆ htawˇ piˬ kʼai ce kʼai ve yoˬ." 
1Peter1:25 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:1 Hkʼe te leh, shu hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te ve, shu hta‸ heˍ ve, maˇ heˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ ka‸ yoˬ ve hkʼe te ve, hkawehˉ ve leh hkʼaiˉ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ-oˆ." 
1Peter2:2 Paw la gehˇ sheˍ ve yaˇ ehˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, co ha hpawˇ da‸ jaˇ ve cuˉ gʼuiˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai-o. Co ha hpawˇ ve cuˉ gʼuiˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˬ ve pa taw, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui uiˍ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve ha kʼaˉ puiˉ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa leh‸ nyi peuˬ." 
1Peter2:4 Jawˇmawˇ oˇ ve geh laˬ-o‸. Yawˇ lehˬ te‸ chehˇ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ leh, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:5 Nawˬ hui htawˇ te‸ chehˇ ve haˉ pui shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ yuˬ leh co ha hpawˇ ve yehˬ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ-oˆ. Co ha hpawˇ ve tanˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tanˇ tuˬ, nawˬ hui da‸ kehˬ ve paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Nawˬ hui Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh tanˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tanˇ tuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ha‸ yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:6 Li‸ hpu awˬ hkʼaw chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Nyi-o, ngaˬ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ Ziˉonˍ awˬ hkʼaw awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ lo ngaˬ kawˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Haˉ pui shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw lehˬ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw, teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:7 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hui hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, yawˇ da‸ jaˇ leh awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, Li‸ hpu hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, Yehˬ kawˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hui baˬ taˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ awˬ ceˍ kʼaweh‸ ve haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ hpeh‸ la peuˬ." 
1Peter2:8 Chaw yaˇ hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ leh, nyi ma luˬ tuˬ ve haˉ pui shiˍ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hkui htiˇ poˬ paiˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ taˍ peuˬ." 
1Peter2:9 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha leuˆ yuˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve paw hkuˇka‸ nawˬ hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui da‸ kehˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ awˬ tehˬ awˬ na hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸ la tuˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ tawˆ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, yawˇ ve da‸ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn shu hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter2:10 Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ, nawˬ hui lehˬ awˬ meh maˇ cawˬ ve chaw ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi beu‸ lehˬ, nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve chaw ceuˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ hui lehˬ, ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ bon hta‸ maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ chi beu‸ ha kʼaˉ ve awˬ bon hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa peuˬ." 
1Peter2:11 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, shu mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, co ha hta‸ bawˆ da‸ chehˇ ve, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:12 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ hui da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ te-o. Yawˇ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaiˉ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui ve da‸ ve kanˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la htaˇ, yawˇ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:13 Jawˇmawˇ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw, chaw yaˇ hui leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ uˉ peunˍ ve awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter2:14 A shu yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve jawˇmawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo htawˇ hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Chaw haiˬ hta‸ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ leh, chaw da‸ hta‸ chiˇ mvuh piˇ tuˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:15 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui da‸ ve hteˇ ve hta‸ te tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve pa taw, maˇ shiˍ puiˉ maˇ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, te‸ chiˉ ca kʼoˆ maˇ hpeh‸ leh, ta‸ iˉ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:16 Nawˬ hui ponˬ peuˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui ponˬ ve lehˬ, haiˬ ve hta‸ te tuˬ awˬ pon maˇ heˆ. Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ ceˬ te tuˬ awˬ pon hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:17 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˆ yan-o. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ha‸-o‸. Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ kawˆ-oˆ. Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan-o. 
1Peter2:18 Awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kawˆ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Nyi ma da‸ leh nuˇ nehˬ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Haiˬ ve jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo htawˇ hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter2:19 Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ leh, shu fawˉ mehˍ laˇ ve teˇ yanˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ sheˍ. Nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:20 Nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ cawˬ ve pa taw shu dawˆ laˇ tiˇ laˇ ve hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ htaˇ, aˬ hto‸ ma chiˇ mvuh tuˬ cawˬ le. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve hta‸ te ve pa taw, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ yeunˇ hkanˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi hkʼaˇ suh tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter2:21 Oˇ hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ. Hkri‸ htawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ pon gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, nawˬ hui yawˇ ve hkui ha awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ kʼai tuˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ pon henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ yawˇ te taˉ peuˬ." 
1Peter2:22 Yawˇ lehˬ venˇbaˆ maˇ te jaw. Yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw lo heˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ka‸ maˇ tawˆ la jaw. 
1Peter2:23 Shu yawˇ hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ htaˇ, yawˇ shu hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na maˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ. Yawˇ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, shu hta‸ yawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸. Hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ Suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter2:24 Suhˆ hkuiˉ daw hkʼoˆ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ suh htaˇ, yawˇ awˬ to awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ yawˇ pfuhˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ suh baˬ taˉ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa te‸ chehˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hkanˍ suh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve naˬ kuiˬ hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui na-e la peuˬ." 
1Peter2:25 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ leh mehˉ kʼai ve yawˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chi beu‸ lehˬ nawˬ hui ve co ha hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ shehˍ hpaˇ Yawˬ hawˉ paˍ geh nawˬ hui kʼaw‸ la peuˬ." 
1Peter3:1 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ miˇ ma teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui ve awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve htawˇ, nawˬ hui yawˆ yan puiˉ ve leh da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼa teˇ hpaˍ te ve hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ," 
1Peter3:2 nawˬ hui te‸ chiˉ maˇ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ ve ka‸, nawˬ hui ve da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter3:3 Nawˬ hui awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve lehˬ, uˉ hkeh mvuh hpeˇ ve, shi hkʼeun tcuhˉ ve, veu‸ jiˇ kʼaˇ jiˇ ve, awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve ceh taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ." 
1Peter3:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve lehˬ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve leh gawˬ lehˍ chehˇ puiˉ ve, awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ ve chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ luˬ puiˉ leh, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:5 Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ awˬ hkiˇ chi hkʼe te shawˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ hpawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo hkʼa deh‸ chehˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:6 Tawˇ pa haˉ te kʼo, Saˍraˇ lehˬ, Aˍbraˍhanˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ na yu‸ leh, yawˇ hta‸ jawˇ mawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui da‸ ve hta‸ te leh, hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ htawˇ kawˆ puiˉ ve nyi ma maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui Saˍraˇ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:7 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ hpawˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ miˇ ma geh chehˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ awˬ pon dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve nyi ma cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui a‸ kehˉ awˬ gʼaˇ nuˇ ve htawˇ, co ha te‸ ve awˬ bon hta‸ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh awˬ shinˉ gʼa caˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˆ yan-o. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui bon lawˬ ve hta‸ tawˍ taˍ tuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1Peter3:8 Awˬ leh meuˇ ve tawˇ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha kʼaˉ da‸ leh ha‸ da‸-o‸. Nyi ma nuˇ lehˍ te leh, shu awˬ hawˉ lo nyi ma nehˬ lehˍ taˍ-o‸." 
1Peter3:9 Shu awˬ haiˬ te laˇ ve htawˇ, awˬ haiˬ taˇ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸. Shu hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ laˇ ve htawˇ, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na taˇ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ hkʼaw‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ na‸ piˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui awˬ bon gʼa tuˬ, chi ve awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ." 
1Peter3:10 A sha‸ te‸ gaˇ leh, ha lehˬ dawˇ sha ve awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mawˬ gaˇ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve ha tehˍ haiˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ taˇ yaw. A shu yawˇ ve meuˇ guiˬ heˍ ve hkawˇ hta‸ ka‸ taˇ kʼoˆ." 
1Peter3:11 Haiˬ ve hta‸ jaw kʼai leh, da‸ ve hta‸ te-o. Cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ca leh, oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼa‸ kʼai-o." 
1Peter3:12 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ nyi chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve naˍ paw htawˇ, yawˇ hui ve bon lawˬ hkawˇ hta‸ na chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, awˬ haiˬ hkʼa te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ ve canˇ paˍ yoˬ teh‸ shawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:13 Nawˬ hui da‸ ve hta‸ gʼaˇ hte‸ te chehˇ ve kʼo, a shu nawˬ hui hta‸ ca ya‸ la tuˬ le." 
1Peter3:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ puiˉ ve law kʼo, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ho laˇ ve hta‸ taˇ kawˆ, sho‸ sha‸ ve nyi ma ka‸ taˇ cawˬ piˇ." 
1Peter3:15 Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo Hkri‸ hta‸ Jawˇmawˇ yoˬ teh‸ shawˍ taˍ leh yawˆ yan-o. Nawˬ hui dawˇ law taˍ ve awˬ lawn, hkʼa na nyi laˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe yaw hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ, hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ-o‸. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ leh yawˆ yan ve awˬ hkʼaw lo te-o." 
1Peter3:16 Nawˬ hui shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma hta‸ kehˬ lehˍ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui te ve da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼaiˉ leh venˇbaˆ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter3:17 Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve kʼo, da‸ ve hta‸ te leh tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ, haiˬ ve hta‸ te leh gʼa hkanˍ ve a‸ kehˉ leuˉ leh da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ pa taw teˇ pawˆ gʼa suh ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬ sha geh ngaˬ hui hta‸ shiˍ kʼo‸-e gʼa tuˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve chaw hui awˬ pon hkanˍ suh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to suh ve htawˇ, Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw kʼaw‸ te‸ la ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:19 Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw yawˇ kʼai leh, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ ve awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bon ca maˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:20 Awˬ ha oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Noˉa‸ ve awˬ co-e htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve pa taw, htawnˍ hkʼaw chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Noˉa‸ haw lo‸ kʼoˍ lonˉ hta‸ te chehˇ htaˇ, chaw yaˇ Gʼuiˬsha hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ tuˬ Gʼuiˬsha yeunˇ hkanˍ leh law taˍ htawˇ, yawˇ hui maˇ na yuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chaw hiˉ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa ponˬ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:21 Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, chi beu‸ baˆtiˆsaˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ ponˬ laˇ ve yoˬ. Baˆtiˆsaˬ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, awˬ to hta‸ ngawˉ taˍ ve awˬ meˇ tsuhˇ baˬ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ shiˍ puiˉ ve nyi ma da‸ la kehˬ la ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter3:22 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma lo taˆ kʼo‸-e leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve la‸ sha paˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh, kanˇ paˆ cawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:1 Hkʼe te leh, Hkri‸ yawˇ ve awˬ to gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ htaˇ, yawˇ nyi ma taˍ ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui htawˇ nyi ma taˍ leh, gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ-o‸. A shu yawˇ ve awˬ to gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw lehˬ, venˇbaˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ peuˬ." 
1Peter4:2 Oˇ hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ to te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ kʼaw‸ te. Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:3 Buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw teˇ hpaˍ te ve hkʼe, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ nawˬ hui htawˇ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ nawˬ hui htawˇ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ te ve, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve, ha lehˬ tuˬ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve, caˇ leuˉ dawˬ leuˉ ve leh, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ pui cawˇ ve ka‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui taˇ kʼaw‸ te loˬ." 
1Peter4:4 Chi beu‸ nawˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui geh te ponˬ te leuˉ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa‸ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui anˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ lawn gʼa kʼaoˍ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Suhˉ jehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, te‸ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ leh suh peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ, yawˇ gu taˍ hehnˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
1Peter4:6 Chi hta‸ pa taw, suh peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ awˬ to cawˬ ve chaw hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha te‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ co ha hpawˇ yawˇ hui te‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ yawˇ ca maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:7 Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve lehˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, bon hkʼa deh‸ lawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, nyi ma taˍ puiˉ leh, shaˍ ti‸ taˍ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter4:8 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ, gʼaˇ hte‸ ha‸ da‸-o‸. Tawˇ chi lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve tawˇ teˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, maˇ jaˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ beh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:9 Hkehˉ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ yuˬ-o‸. Hpeh‸ bawˬ ve nyi ma taˇ cawˬ piˇ. 
1Peter4:10 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ bon gʼa taˍ ve hkʼe, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon yehˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ hui chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon laiˉ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ leh yehˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:11 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ tawˇ yaw ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha yaw tcuh ve hkʼe ceh yaw-o. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ shu hta‸ ga piˇ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha pe‸ laˇ ve awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ hta‸ cuˇ leh ga piˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ pa taw teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo, shu Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh tuˬ yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ co co taiˍ taiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. A menˬ." 
1Peter4:12 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ aˬ miˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ lawˇ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, taˇ anˇ. Chi lehˬ anˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1Peter4:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, nawˬ hui gʼa ha lehˬ jaˇ tuˬ ve awˬ pon, yawˇ tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ nawˬ hui ka‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve pa taw ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter4:14 Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw, shu nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ laˇ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬ sha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter4:15 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve, shu mawˇ hkʼawˇ ve, awˬ haiˬ te ve, shu hta‸ sho‸ sha‸ tuˬ te ve, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ." 
1Peter4:16 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ Hkri‸ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve pa taw gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve kʼo, taˇ ya‸ taw. Awˬ meh chi hta‸ pa taw gʼa hkanˍ ve teˇ yanˇ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh-o." 
1Peter4:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha suhˉ tanˬ jehˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Yawˇ ve yehˬ yaˇ kʼa yaˇ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ suhˉ jehˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ pon, awˬ leh meuˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve le." 
1Peter4:18 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw lehˬ, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ haˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve venˇbaˆ yaˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ponˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve le." 
1Peter4:19 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve pa taw gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ ka‸ da‸ ve hta‸ te cawˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve co ha a‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter5:1 Nawˬ hui awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ lawˬ hkawˉ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hkʼe awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ awˬ to gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˆ la tuˬ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter5:2 Nawˬ hui geh cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve yawˬ awˬ moˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ shaˉ-oˆ. Shu hkawˇ leuˉ maˇ gʼa leh te ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Ha lehˬ ha kʼa te-o. Hpu gʼa gaˇ leh te ve ka‸ taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Nyi ma pfuhˇ leh te-o. 
1Peter5:3 Nawˬ ve yawˬ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ jawˇ mawˇ hkʼe taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˬ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ hpeh‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter5:4 Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, Yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ awˬ hoˉ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ nawˍ kʼai puiˉ ve, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter5:5 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yaˇ nehˬ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ-oˆ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ ceˬ hkʼe nyi ma nehˬ lehˍ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nyi ma uiˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nyi ma nuˇ nehˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ bon piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter5:6 Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo nyi ma nehˬ lehˍ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ yanˇ cawˇ ve teˇ yanˇ htaˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1Peter5:7 Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui awˬ pon dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui ve dawˇ haˍ dawˇ hkiˉ tuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ-oˆ." 
1Peter5:8 Shaˍ ti‸ te leh hkʼa deh‸ shaw taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui ve canˇ paˍ neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, kuˬ chehˇ ve laˇ caˬ shiˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, shu hta‸ che‸ caˇ tuˬ ca caw nyi toˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter5:9 Yonˍ yeˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo neˇhaiˬ hta‸ tawˍ taˍ-o‸. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve nawˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter5:10 Nawˬ hui teˇ hkui teˇ yanˇ gʼa tu‸ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ bon hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ biˇ la piˇ, yeˬ la piˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ cawˬ la piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Co co taiˍ taiˍ yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ Hkri‸ hta‸ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter5:11 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ. 
1Peter5:12 Ka ti‸ yeˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ shawˍ taˍ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Siˍlaˍnuˆ hta‸ ngaˬ cuˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ ngeh ve li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ pe‸ laˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ve awˬ bon awˬ lawn hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ, li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon chi awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hui yeˬ chaweh chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1Peter5:13 Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw chehˇ ve, nawˬ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve awˬ moˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve yaˇ Maˍkuˆ ka‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1Peter5:14 Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo boˆ nu da‸ leh la‸ sheh caˉ da‸-o‸. Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve nawˬ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. 
2Peter1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ leh tcuh yaˇ Siˉmonˍ Peˍtruˆ yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve yonˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui yonˍ ve nyi ma cawˬ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yawˇ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
2Peter1:2 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ ka‸ shiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ maˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
2Peter1:3 Ngaˬ hui co ha te‸ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan hpeh‸ tuˬ, hkʼa loˍ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ. Yawˇ chi hkʼe te ve lehˬ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve pa taw yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh biˇ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui hta‸ yawˇ kuˬ yuˬ peuˬ." 
2Peter1:4 Yawˇ ve awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ jaˇ leh uiˍ jaˇ ve ka ti‸ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ peuˬ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo luˬ ve sheˆ ve cawˬ la ve yoˬ. Ka ti‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ pa taw, luˬ ve sheˆ ve chi hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa ponˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma taˍ ve hkʼe nawˬ hui htawˇ taˍ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter1:5 Chi hta‸ pa taw, gʼaˇ hte‸ coˇ caˇ leh, nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ, da‸ ve awˬ liˇ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Peter1:6 Da‸ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ, cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Cuˇ yiˍ cawˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gʼaˇ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Peter1:7 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan puiˉ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ha‸ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ, ha‸ da‸ pehnˇ da‸ ve cawˬ piˇ-oˆ." 
2Peter1:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ leh maˇ la ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇ mawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ shiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui awˬ bon cawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, awˬ shiˍ maˇ maˇ naw‸ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter1:9 Chi teˇ hpaˍ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, mehˆ cuˉ paˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, mehˆ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ceh tiˉ mawˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ awˬ piˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Yeˍsuˆ tsuhˇ hpu tsuhˇ kehˬ piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ leunˇ kʼai peuˬ." 
2Peter1:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ kuˬ yuˬ leuˆ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ yeˬ la tuˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te-o. Chi hkʼe te ve kʼo, nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ paiˍ." 
2Peter1:11 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ leh Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ ve mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼe awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ gu taˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter1:12 Hkʼe te leh, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ yeˬ ve htawˇ, chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ tuˬ, ngaˬ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:13 Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa leunˇ kʼai tuˬ, ngaˬ awˬ to te‸ chehˇ ve ceh ceh, nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ dawˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:14 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ngaˬ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, maˇ maw maw ngaˬ ve awˬ to chi hta‸ gʼa baˬ taˉ tuˬ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:15 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ tawˆ kʼai peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ htawˇ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ dawˇ nawˇ tuˬ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ te tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter1:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ lawn leh yawˇ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ htaˇ, cuˇ yiˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh ca dawˇ kʼoˆ ve kaˇ puiˇ kaˇ lao hkawˇ ceh hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui mehˆ shiˍ gʼa mawˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:17 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ taˍ uiˍ taˍ mvuh leh awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ piˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw chi lehˬ, ngaˬ ha‸ jaˇ ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ nyi hkʼaˇ suh ve yoˬ teh‸, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:18 Da‸ kehˬ ve hkʼaw oˇ ve teˇ shiˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ yawˇ geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma lo tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:19 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui leuˉ leh yonˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ htiˇ la leh tawˆ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ gʼeuˆ ba chehˇ ve kawˆ faiˇ hta‸ cuˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na yuˬ leh cuˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter1:20 Li‸ hpu hkʼaw cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ hkawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ tcuhˉ kuiˬ hta‸ dawˇ tawˆ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ awˉ lawˉ shiˍ-o‸."
