2Peter1:21 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw yaw ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu yawˇ hui hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ leh, yawˇ hui teˇ caˉ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ kʼaw‸ yaw ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:1 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la jaw ve hkʼe, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ maˇ heˆ heˆ ve saˍ la‸ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, shu hta‸ te luˬ te hpaˆ puiˉ ve yonˍ hkʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ca hkʼawˇ keu la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ vuiˬ yuˬ peuˬ ve Awˬ Jawˇmawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ taˉ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to haˆ haˆ luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ, yawˇ hui te chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:2 Chaw laiˉ gʼaˇ yawˇ hui ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ shu maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter2:3 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ sheˉ lai jaˇ ve pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ heˍ leh, yawˇ hui awˬ pon awˬ bon tawˆ la tuˬ ceh nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ chawˇ hkʼe te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ taˆ cheˆ taˍ ve lehˬ, hkʼe leˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve maˇ heˆ. Yawˇ hui awˬ tehˬ awˬ na luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter2:4 Venˇbaˆ te ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha maˇ ponˬ piˇ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ moˬ naˆ ho‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu leh, suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi hkʼa gaˬ naˆ ho‸ jaˇ kuiˬ lo yawˇ hui hta‸ haw taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:5 Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ve miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui hta‸ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha maˇ ponˬ piˇ. Yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ pui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha iˉ kaˆ htonˍ pehˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ bon maˍ ve Noˉa‸ leh yawˇ geh chaw suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ Gʼuiˬsha ponˬ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:6 Sawˉdonˍ venˇ leh Gawˇmawˇra‸ venˇ hta‸ htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hkʼaw‸ laˉ hpeh‸ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ oˇ hkʼe te ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ pui ve chaw hui awˬ pon henˇ kuiˬ jawˬ kuiˬ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Lawˇtaˍ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ ponˬ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw haiˬ teˇ hpaˍ cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ te ve pa taw, Lawˇtaˍ lehˬ dawˇ haˍ gaˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:8 (Awˬ lawn kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui geh chehˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ hui ve haiˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ gʼa kaˇ ve pa taw, teˇ nyi le le yawˇ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo tu‸ hkanˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ.)" 
2Peter2:9 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, beˬ ve lawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hpuˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ponˬ piˇ tuˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tcuhˉ taˍ tuˬ htawˇ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:10 Cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ sheˉ lai ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai leh jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hawˉ maˇ chehˇ gaˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ leuˉ leh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ leh a shu yawˇ ve a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh tiˉ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ uiˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ yawˇ hui maˇ kawˆ puiˉ." 
2Peter2:11 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hui a‸ kehˉ awˬ gʼaˇ leh kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve htawˇ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ maˇ te, venˇbaˆ ka‸ maˇ taˍ." 
2Peter2:12 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hpeh yuˬ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ awˬ pon paw la ve, maˇ dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hkʼe ceh tiˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼaˇ yawˇ hui haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai leh," 
2Peter2:13 maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw htaˇ ka‸ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ha lehˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui geh yawˇ hui pawehˇ te leh ha lehˬ tuˬ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ to hta‸ cawˬ taˍ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ kuiˉ awˬ haiˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
2Peter2:14 Yawˇ hui ve mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ceh tiˉ nyi gaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ bvuhˆ puiˉ. Nyi ma maˇ yeˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ yawˇ hui beˬ yuˬ puiˉ leh, shu mawˇ shu jeˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui sheˉ lai puiˉ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hkeu taˍ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:15 Hteˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ yawˇ hui baˬ taˉ leh ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ kʼai peuˬ. Bawˉsawˍ ve yaˇ Baˍlanˍ ve ya‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaˇ suh yawˇ hui gʼa‸ kʼai peuˬ. 
2Peter2:16 Baˍlanˍ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve kanˉ awˬ hpfuhˇ hta‸ sheˉ lai leh, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ pa taw deˇ maˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, tawˇ maˇ yaw puiˉ ve piˉ laˬ teˇ hkeh lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ tawˇ yaw leh, tcuh kaˍ paˍ Baˍlanˍ gʼuˇ ve hta‸ tawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:17 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ fiˍ kʼai peuˬ ve gʼuiˬ tuˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, mvuhˇ haw meuˆ chiˇ veu ve moˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ pon naˆ ho‸ jaˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ gu taˍ peuˬ." 
2Peter2:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ bon maˇ cawˬ ve tawˇ uiˍ tawˇ mvuh teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui yaw ve yoˬ. Ya‸ kʼaw ya‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ tawˆ la gehˇ sheˍ ve chaw hui hta‸, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ te ponˬ te leuˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ hui yehˇ leh kʼaw‸ beˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:19 Nawˬ hui shu awˬ ceˬ maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ te teh‸ yawˇ hui shu hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ to lehˬ luˬ ve sheˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw yaˇ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw yaˇ lehˬ oˇ ve awˬ hawˉ lo awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:20 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ leh Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hta‸ yawˇ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa ponˬ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe gʼa ponˬ ve htawˇ, cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ lo‸-e leh hkanˉ taˍ ve pa taw, cha‸ chiˆ ve oˇ ve yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ ve kʼo, awˬ leh meuˇ hpeh‸ la ve lehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ hpeh‸ ve a‸ kehˉ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter2:21 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw hta‸ shiˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hui hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve da‸ ve kehˬ ve awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ taˉ ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw oˇ ve hta‸ shiˍ ve a‸ kehˉ maˇ shiˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ pon leuˉ leh da‸ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter2:22 Hpuiˇ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ hpe‸ baˬ taˍ ve hta‸ kʼaw‸ gʼawˆ leh‸ leh, va‸ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ yawˇ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ tsuhˇ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ meh‸ gʼuˬ kʼaw‸ hehˉ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve chaw mawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ cawˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:1 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve li‸ chi lehˬ, nyiˇ kʼoˆ teˇ kʼoˆ yoˬ. Li‸ chi ve nyiˇ kʼoˆ kʼoˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ dawˇ nyi puiˉ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:2 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve da‸ kehˬ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui kʼoˆ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve tcuh yaˇ hui hta‸ cuˇ leh piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:3 Awˉ lawˉ shiˍ cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai leh, kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:4 Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ kʼaw‸ ya‸ la tuˬ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve ka ti‸ tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe kʼai le. Awˬ puˍ awˬ pi hui ka‸ suh peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ tanˬ leh ya‸ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, hkʼa peu-eˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:5 Aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇ naw ma cawˬ la ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ dawˇ nawˇ gaˇ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo miˬguiˬ tawˆ la leh, iˉ kaˆ hta‸ pa taw miˬguiˬ hpeh‸ la ve hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:6 Oˇ htaˇ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ iˉ kaˆ htonˍ piˇ leh, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ te luˬ te sheˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:7 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, chi beuˬ cawˬ taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬguiˬ hta‸ aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ tuˬ ve awˬ pon leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ leh te luˬ ve teˇ nyi hkʼa gaˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma leh miˬguiˬ hta‸ yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:8 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ teˇ nyi hta‸ teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼe shawˍ leh, teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ hta‸ teˇ nyi hkʼe shawˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui taˇ leunˇ." 
2Peter3:9 Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ka ti‸ te taˍ ve hkʼe biˇ la tuˬ yawˇ naiˇ jaˇ law teh‸ chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ dawˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ka ti‸ biˇ la tuˬ yawˇ naiˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ venˇ baˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa luˬ kʼai tuˬ yawˇ heuˆ gaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:10 Chaw hkʼawˇ chaw naˆ laˬ ve hkʼe, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇ naw ma lehˬ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh te leh mehˉ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve aˬ miˍ chiˆ jaˇ leh kuiˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa te taˍ ve kanˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:11 Chi hkʼa peu-eˬ kuiˬ kʼai tuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve awˬ liˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ tiˉ te leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw hpeh‸ keunˍ hpeh‸ cawˇ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
2Peter3:12 Nawˬ hui lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ nyi hta‸ law taˍ leh dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ nyi oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ leh, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve aˬ miˍ chiˆ jaˇ leh kuiˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:13 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ ka ti‸ cawˬ taˍ ve hkʼe, mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ suhˉ leh miˬguiˬ awˬ suhˉ cawˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ceh tiˉ cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:14 Hkʼe te leh ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ law chehˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ cha‸ chiˆ ve leh awˬ kuiˉ awˬ haiˇ maˇ gʼa cawˬ tuˬ leh, dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve nyi ma gʼa cawˬ tuˬ, coˇ caˇ leh te-o." 
2Peter3:15 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ gʼa tuˬ ve awˬ pon yeunˇ hkanˍ chehˇ ve teh‸ dawˇ-oˆ. Ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Pawˇlu‸ htawˇ, yawˇ cuˇ yiˍ gʼa ve hkʼe, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
2Peter3:16 Yawˇ ve li‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo shiˍ haˍ jaˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Maˇ shiˍ puiˉ leh nyi ma maˇ yeˬ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu Li‸ hpu tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yuˬ hpfuhˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ pa taw, gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:17 Hkʼe te leh ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ lawn chi ve hta‸ awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ peuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw, haiˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ yawˇ hui te ya‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa sheh kʼai tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Nawˬ hui shaˍ ti‸ maˇ taˍ kʼo, nawˬ hui nyi ma yeˬ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ luˬ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ." 
2Peter3:18 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ leh Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ bon awˬ hkʼaw lo leh yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, nawˬ hui uiˍ la piˇ-oˆ. Chi beu‸ ka‸ te leh co co taiˍ taiˍ yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
1John1:1 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ taˍ ve, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ leh, mehˆ shiˍ htawˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, gʼa htawˇ gʼa yuˬ nyi jaw peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:1 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ taˍ ve, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ lawn ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ leh, mehˆ shiˍ htawˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa deh‸ nyi leh, gʼa htawˇ gʼa yuˬ nyi jaw peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:2 Co ha te‸ ve oˇ ve hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, oˇ ve awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Awˬ pa geh cawˬ ve co ti‸ ha ti‸ teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ leh, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:2 Co ha te‸ ve oˇ ve hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, oˇ ve awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Awˬ pa geh cawˬ ve co ti‸ ha ti‸ teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ leh, ngaˬ hui nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:3 Nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui geh awˬ chawˇ gʼa te da‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve lehˬ, Awˬ pa leh yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:3 Nawˬ hui htawˇ ngaˬ hui geh awˬ chawˇ gʼa te da‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve lehˬ, Awˬ pa leh yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh awˬ chawˇ te da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:4 Ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:4 Ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ, awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ feu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:5 Yawˇ geh ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo naˆ ho‸ ve a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John1:5 Yawˇ geh ngaˬ hui gʼa kaˇ leh nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ ve yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ awˬ gʼeuˆ hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo naˆ ho‸ ve a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John1:6 Ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh awˬ chawˇ te da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui heˍ chehˇ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ te." 
1John1:6 Ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh awˬ chawˇ te da‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui heˍ chehˇ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ te." 
1John1:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ chawˇ te da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:7 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ chawˇ te da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ suhˍ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ laˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:8 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ heˍ leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John1:8 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ heˍ leh, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John1:9 Ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ leh maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ka ti‸ yeˬ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:9 Ngaˬ hui a shu yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ maˍ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve venˇ baˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ leh maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ laˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ka ti‸ yeˬ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:10 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ te jaw teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ hui heˍ paˍ meh piˇ leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John1:10 Ngaˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ te jaw teh‸ kʼoˆ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ngaˬ hui heˍ paˍ meh piˇ leh, yawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:1 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ga laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Awˬ pa geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ." 
1John2:1 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ gʼa te tuˬ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ venˇbaˆ te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ga laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ Awˬ pa geh chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ yoˬ." 
1John2:2 Ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ lehˬ tanˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:2 Ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon, yawˇ lehˬ tanˇ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:3 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa deh‸ deh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:3 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa deh‸ deh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:4 Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ na yuˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chaw heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:4 Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ na yuˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chaw heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ tehˬ awˬ na biˇ la peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:5 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ tehˬ awˬ na biˇ la peuˬ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:6 Ngaˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ te ve hkʼe yawˇ htawˇ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:6 Ngaˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw lehˬ, Yeˍsuˆ te ve hkʼe yawˇ htawˇ te cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:7 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ leh, nawˬ hui geh cawˬ taˍ ve tawˇ awˬ piˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ awˬ piˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ jaw peuˬ ve tawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:7 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ piˇ leh, nawˬ hui geh cawˬ taˍ ve tawˇ awˬ piˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ awˬ piˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ jaw peuˬ ve tawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ htawˇ, tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, naˆ ho‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ mehˉ kʼai chehˇ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ chi beu‸ ka‸ ba tawˆ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ htawˇ, tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, naˆ ho‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ mehˉ kʼai chehˇ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ lehˬ chi beu‸ ka‸ ba tawˆ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:9 Awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:9 Awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ chehˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ chi beu‸ hkʼa gaˬ naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:10 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkui htiˇ poˬ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:10 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh, awˬ gʼeuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkui htiˇ poˬ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:11 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo toˇ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Naˆ ho‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ mehˆ cuˉ piˇ lawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ." 
1John2:11 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ leh, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo toˇ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Naˆ ho‸ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ mehˆ cuˉ piˇ lawˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ hkʼaˬ lo kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ shiˍ." 
1John2:12 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:12 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw nawˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hpehˇ hkʼa peuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:13 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:13 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ peuˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:14 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ leh, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ peuˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:14 Awˬ pa teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ cawˬ chehˇ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ taˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw haˉ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ leh, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼaˇ peuˬ ve pa taw ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:15 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ ha‸ loˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:15 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ ha‸ loˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve kʼo, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ." 
1John2:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ te gaˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ shiˍ mawˬ leh heuˆ gaˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ pa taw nyi ma uiˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha lo tawˆ la ve maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1John2:16 Awˬ lawn kʼo, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ te gaˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ shiˍ mawˬ leh heuˆ gaˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ hta‸ pa taw nyi ma uiˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha lo tawˆ la ve maˇ heˆ. Miˬguiˬ lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1John2:17 Miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John2:17 Miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve sheˉ lai ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve a loˍ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John2:18 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ lehˬ awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ ka‸ Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ laiˉ gʼaˇ tawˆ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ lehˬ awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:18 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ lehˬ awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ ka‸ Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ laiˉ gʼaˇ tawˆ la peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, chi beu‸ lehˬ awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:19 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ, yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai peuˬ." 
1John2:19 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui ngaˬ hui hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui geh teˇ geh chehˇ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui hkʼa peu-eˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ teh‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la tuˬ, yawˇ hui tawˆ kʼai peuˬ." 
1John2:20 Da‸ kehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ ve pa taw, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:20 Da‸ kehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ peuˬ ve pa taw, teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:21 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh, heˍ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:21 Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ leh, heˍ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:22 Heˍ shehˍ hpaˇ a shu le. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Awˬ pa leh Yaˇ hpu hta‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:22 Heˍ shehˍ hpaˇ a shu le. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ maˇ heˆ laˇ. Awˬ pa leh Yaˇ hpu hta‸ gʼawˬ hkʼaˆ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:23 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ hkʼa chiˇ baˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ leh hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:23 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ hkʼa chiˇ baˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ leh hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ htawˇ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:24 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui htawˇ Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John2:24 Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ, nawˬ hui ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve kʼo, nawˬ hui htawˇ Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John2:25 Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
1John2:25 Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ pe‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
1John2:26 Nawˬ hui hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. 
1John2:26 Nawˬ hui hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. 
1John2:27 Yeˍsuˆ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve pa taw, a shu ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve lehˬ, awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, heˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve oˇ ve nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1John2:27 Yeˍsuˆ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve pa taw, a shu ka‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve lehˬ, awˬ lawn hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, heˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ heˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve oˇ ve nawˬ hui hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1John2:28 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve cawˬ tuˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ, chi beu‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1John2:28 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve cawˬ tuˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ, chi beu‸ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
1John2:29 Yawˇ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yawˇ lo paw la peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John2:29 Yawˇ lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve kʼo, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yawˇ lo paw la peuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:1 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ha‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teh‸ meh laˇ leh, ngaˬ hui lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
1John3:1 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hui hta‸ hkʼaˬ ma ha‸ ve hta‸ dawˇ nyi-o. Ngaˬ hui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teh‸ meh laˇ leh, ngaˬ hui lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ tehˬ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ." 
1John3:2 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:2 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ maˇ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ sheˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ kʼaw‸ tawˆ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:3 Yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yawˇ da‸ kehˬ ve hkʼe, chaw oˇ ve htawˇ a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:3 Yawˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe dawˇ law chehˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, yawˇ da‸ kehˬ ve hkʼe, chaw oˇ ve htawˇ a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ da‸ piˇ kehˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:4 Venˇbaˆ hkʼa te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇ baˆ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:4 Venˇbaˆ hkʼa te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇ baˆ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, awˬliˇtawˇhkawˇ hta‸ te ya‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:5 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ awˬ pon tawˆ la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John3:5 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ tuˬ awˬ pon tawˆ la ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇbaˆ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John3:6 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te. Venˇbaˆ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ." 
1John3:6 Yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te. Venˇbaˆ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hta‸ maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ sheˍ." 
1John3:7 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:7 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, a shu htawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:8 Venˇbaˆ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, neˇhaiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, neˇhaiˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1John3:8 Venˇbaˆ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, neˇhaiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, neˇhaiˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
1John3:9 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve te‸ ve awˬ yawˇ teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ leh, yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la peuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ venˇbaˆ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
1John3:9 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve te‸ ve awˬ yawˇ teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ leh, yawˇ Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la peuˬ ve pa taw, yawˇ venˇbaˆ te maˇ hpeh‸." 
1John3:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh neˇhaiˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve chaw htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ leh neˇhaiˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ fuiˍ da‸ pehˬ da‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ maˇ te ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve chaw htawˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:11 Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa ha‸ da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ. 
1John3:11 Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa ha‸ da‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ. 
1John3:12 Haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Kaˍiˉnaˆ hkʼe taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ nyi paˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, yawˇ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ haiˬ leh, awˬ nyi paˍ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:12 Haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ leh yawˇ ve awˬ nyi paˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Kaˍiˉnaˆ hkʼe taˇ hpeh‸ piˇ. Yawˇ lehˬ, aˬ hto‸ ma te awˬ nyi paˍ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, yawˇ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ haiˬ leh, awˬ nyi paˍ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw yawˇ hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ ve kʼo, taˇ anˇ." 
1John3:13 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ canˇ ve kʼo, taˇ anˇ." 
1John3:14 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e peuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa shiˍ le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve pa taw gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:14 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ kʼai leh co ha te‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e peuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa shiˍ le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve pa taw gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:15 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:15 A shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ canˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo co ti‸ ha ti‸ maˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:16 Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ ve a sha‸ tanˇ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:16 Hkri‸ lehˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ pon yawˇ ve a sha‸ tanˇ piˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui htawˇ, awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ngaˬ hui ve a sha‸ hta‸ tanˇ piˇ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:17 Chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi miˬguiˬ ve hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi haˍ gʼawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htawˇ, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1John3:17 Chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi miˬguiˬ ve hpu shi mawˇ jeˬ cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi haˍ gʼawˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ htawˇ, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ cawˬ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˬ hkʼe te cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1John3:18 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, maw‸ kʼaw ceh ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kanˉ te ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸-o‸." 
1John3:18 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, maw‸ kʼaw ceh ha‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ taˇ te. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kanˉ te ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸-o‸." 
1John3:19 Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe ha‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ taˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma dawˇ sha la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:19 Ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe ha‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ taˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma dawˇ sha la tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma a‸ kehˉ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:20 Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma a‸ kehˉ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ leh, hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:21 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:21 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve nyi ma ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ venˇbaˆ maˇ taˍ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John3:22 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui na yuˬ leh yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve pa taw, yawˇ geh ngaˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1John3:22 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui na yuˬ leh yawˇ nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ te ve pa taw, yawˇ geh ngaˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
1John3:23 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa yonˍ leh, Yaˇ hpu tawˇ piˇ laˇ ve hkʼe, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa ha‸ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:23 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ meh hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa yonˍ leh, Yaˇ hpu tawˇ piˇ laˇ ve hkʼe, teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ gʼa ha‸ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:24 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John3:24 Yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ chaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:1 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ ha teˇ maˬ le le hta‸ taˇ yonˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve leh naˍ, hkʼa deh‸ lawˇ nyi sheˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ laiˉ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai peuˬ." 
1John4:1 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, awˬ ha teˇ maˬ le le hta‸ taˇ yonˍ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve leh naˍ, hkʼa deh‸ lawˇ nyi sheˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ laiˉ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai peuˬ." 
1John4:2 Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui chi hkʼe shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ ha teˇ maˬ le le Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:2 Gʼuiˬsha ve Awˬ ha hpu hta‸ nawˬ hui chi hkʼe shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve awˬ ha teˇ maˬ le le Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:3 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ shaˉ hkiˆ maˇ hkanˍ ve awˬ ha hkʼaˬ ve teˇ maˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Chi hkʼe ve awˬ ha lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve awˬ ha laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ ka‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
1John4:3 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ shaˉ hkiˆ maˇ hkanˍ ve awˬ ha hkʼaˬ ve teˇ maˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Chi hkʼe ve awˬ ha lehˬ, Hkri‸ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ve awˬ ha laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ ve hkʼe, chi beu‸ ka‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
1John4:4 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:4 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, nawˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:5 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui yaw leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:5 Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui yaw leh, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:6 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ha hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ha hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:6 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸ ve chaw lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ. Chi hta‸ pa taw, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ha hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve awˬ ha hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:7 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Ha‸ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:7 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha geh tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Ha‸ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:8 Maˇ ha‸ puiˉ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:8 Maˇ ha‸ puiˉ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:9 Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:9 Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ hui co ha gʼa te‸ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu tiˍ hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo peu laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:10 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu peu laˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:10 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ gaˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu peu laˇ ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:11 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ chi taw taw ha‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:11 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ ngaˬ hui hta‸ chi taw taw ha‸ ve kʼo, ngaˬ hui htawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:12 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw. Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la peuˬ." 
1John4:12 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ mawˬ jaw. Ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo biˇ la peuˬ." 
1John4:13 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬ sha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:13 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve Awˬ ha hpu ngaˬ hui hta‸ pe‸ laˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬ sha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:14 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ, Awˬ pa lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu peu laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:14 Miˬguiˬ yaˇ ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ shehˍ hpaˇ te tuˬ, Awˬ pa lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu peu laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa mawˬ leh, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:15 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:15 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu yoˬ teh‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, yawˇ htawˇ Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:16 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ leh yonˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:16 Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ leh yonˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha htawˇ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:17 Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ biˇ la peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:17 Suhˉ jehˬ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ ve cawˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ biˇ la peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui htawˇ chi miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo hpeh‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:18 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve biˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, kawˆ ve hta‸ mehˉ kʼai piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve pa taw, kawˆ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ biˇ sheˍ." 
1John4:18 Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo kawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ cawˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve biˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, kawˆ ve hta‸ mehˉ kʼai piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kawˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve pa taw, kawˆ puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ biˇ sheˍ." 
1John4:19 Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ ha‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui htawˇ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:19 Gʼuiˬsha ngaˬ hui hta‸ awˉ lawˉ ha‸ ve pa taw, ngaˬ hui htawˇ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:20 Ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ yawˇ canˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ mawˬ chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, maˇ mawˬ jaw ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ha‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1John4:20 Ngaˬ Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ yawˇ canˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, a shu yawˇ mawˬ chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ maˇ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, maˇ mawˬ jaw ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˇ hkʼaˬ hkʼe te ha‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le." 
1John4:21 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ htawˇ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John4:21 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve chaw lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hta‸ htawˇ gʼa ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ hui yawˇ geh gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa hta‸ hkʼa ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, awˬ yaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:1 Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ hkʼa yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa hta‸ hkʼa ha‸ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le lehˬ, awˬ yaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:2 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ leh yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:2 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ leh yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ na yuˬ htaˇ, yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui na yuˬ leh te ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1John5:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ ha‸ ve teh‸ kʼoˆ ve lehˬ, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui na yuˬ leh te ve hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1John5:4 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hkʼa hpeh‸ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
1John5:4 Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ yaˇ hkʼa hpeh‸ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ yoˬ." 
1John5:5 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve chaw lehˬ a shu le. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1John5:5 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ ve chaw lehˬ a shu le. Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ laˇ." 
1John5:6 Chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:6 Chi teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo laˬ ve Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ceh tiˉ maˇ heˆ, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:7 Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:7 Awˬ ha hpu lehˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ pa taw, yawˇ htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ chi shehˆ ceuˬ cawˬ leh, chi shehˆ ceuˬ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:8 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Awˬ ha hpu, iˉ kaˆ leh awˬ suhˍ, shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ chi shehˆ ceuˬ cawˬ leh, chi shehˆ ceuˬ hawˍ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:9 Chaw yaˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui na ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ leuˉ leh uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:9 Chaw yaˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui na ve kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ leuˉ leh uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:10 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˉ hkiˆ oˇ ve cawˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ heˍ paˍ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
1John5:10 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu hta‸ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo shaˉ hkiˆ oˇ ve cawˬ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ heˍ paˍ meh piˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ maˇ yonˍ ve pa taw yoˬ." 
1John5:11 Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ pe‸ laˇ leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ chi yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:11 Gʼuiˬsha shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ pe‸ laˇ leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ chi yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:12 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John5:12 Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
1John5:13 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ meh hta‸ yonˍ ve nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:13 Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu awˬ meh hta‸ yonˍ ve nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, co ti‸ ha ti‸ cawˬ ve hta‸ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:14 Yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John5:14 Yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ ngaˬ hui chi hkʼe nyi ma ha‸ hanˉ tuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve a loˍ cawˇ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ lawˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ na yuˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
1John5:15 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ na yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ geh hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa peuˬ teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:15 Ngaˬ hui hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ na yuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve kʼo, yawˇ geh hkʼa lawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa peuˬ teh‸ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:16 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon yawˇ lawˬ leh, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve co ha te‸ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha geh yawˇ lawˬ ve hkʼe gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve awˬ pon gʼa lawˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1John5:16 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ gʼaˇ, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve kʼo, chaw oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ pon yawˇ lawˬ leh, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ te chehˇ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi oˇ ve co ha te‸ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha geh yawˇ lawˬ ve hkʼe gʼa tuˬ yoˬ. Suh keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ ve awˬ pon gʼa lawˬ ve teh‸ ngaˬ kʼoˆ ve maˇ heˆ." 
1John5:17 Te ya‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:17 Te ya‸ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, venˇbaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suh maˇ keunˍ ve venˇbaˆ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:18 Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la peuˬ ve yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ leh, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ htawˇ." 
1John5:18 Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ maˇ te ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha geh paw la peuˬ ve yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ leh, haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ yawˇ hta‸ maˇ htawˇ." 
1John5:19 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hta‸ ka‸, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:19 Ngaˬ hui Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve hta‸ ka‸, miˬguiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ haiˬ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ka‸, ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:20 Peuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu gaˬ la leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ puiˉ tuˬ yawˇ cuˇ yiˍ pe‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ leh yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha chi lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:20 Peuˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu gaˬ la leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ puiˉ tuˬ yawˇ cuˇ yiˍ pe‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ leh yawˇ ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ hui chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha chi lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ leh, co ti‸ ha ti‸ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
1John5:21 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, shaˉ ho‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o." 
1John5:21 Ha‸ ve yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, shaˉ ho‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ jaw kʼai-o." 
2John1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh yawˇ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ceh tiˉ ha‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa shiˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ leh yawˇ ve yaˇ ehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ceh tiˉ ha‸ ve maˇ heˆ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ hkʼa shiˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ htawˇ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:2 Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2John1:2 Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chi teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2John1:3 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh, Awˬ pa ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh lo, awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2John1:3 Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha leh, Awˬ pa ve Yaˇ hpu Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh lo, awˬ bon teˇ ceuˬ, ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh cawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
2John1:4 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:4 Awˬ pa ngaˬ hui hta‸ tawˇ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe, nawˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve pa taw, ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:5 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ peuˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ tuˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:5 Chi beu‸ lehˬ, tawˇ piˇ ve awˬ suhˉ teˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve maˇ heˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa taˍ peuˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ ha‸ da‸ tuˬ nawˬ hta‸ lawˬ hkawˉ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:6 Yawˇ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui te ve lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o teh‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
2John1:6 Yawˇ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe ngaˬ hui te ve lehˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o teh‸ tawˇ piˇ taˍ ve chi teˇ hkawˇ hta‸ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸ nawˬ hui gʼa kaˇ taˍ peuˬ." 
2John1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw heˍ paˍ laiˉ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai peuˬ. Chi hkʼe ve chaw lehˬ, chaw heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ chaw yaˇ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ pfuhˇ leh laˬ ve maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw heˍ paˍ laiˉ gʼaˇ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai peuˬ. Chi hkʼe ve chaw lehˬ, chaw heˍ paˍ hpeh‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ ve canˇ paˍ lonˉ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:8 Nawˬ hui te peuˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa mehˉ kʼai leh, nawˬ hui awˬ bon hkʼa biˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸." 
2John1:8 Nawˬ hui te peuˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼa mehˉ kʼai leh, nawˬ hui awˬ bon hkʼa biˇ gʼa hpeh‸ tuˬ, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ shaˍ ti‸ taˍ-o‸." 
2John1:9 Hkri‸ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ leh, dawˇ ponˬ dawˇ leuˉ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Hkri‸ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ ka‸ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ka‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:9 Hkri‸ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ chehˇ leh, dawˇ ponˬ dawˇ leuˉ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ caˉ da‸. Hkri‸ maˍ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Awˬ pa hta‸ ka‸ Yaˇ hpu hta‸ ka‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:10 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi maˇ pfuhˇ laˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ yehˬ hkʼaw taˇ ha‸ yuˬ, hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ tawˇ ka‸ taˇ yaw." 
2John1:10 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh maˍ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi maˇ pfuhˇ laˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ yehˬ hkʼaw taˇ ha‸ yuˬ, hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ tawˇ ka‸ taˇ yaw." 
2John1:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ te ve haiˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh te ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
2John1:11 Awˬ lawn kʼo, hpuˇ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ yaw ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ te ve haiˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh te ve hkʼe yoˬ." 
2John1:12 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, htawˇ gʼeuˆ leh naˬ meu‸ gʼuiˬ maˇ bvuh‸ gaˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh, mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ gʼa yaw da‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:12 Ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, htawˇ gʼeuˆ leh naˬ meu‸ gʼuiˬ maˇ bvuh‸ gaˇ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ hui ha lehˬ ve biˇ la tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh laˬ leh, mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ gʼa yaw da‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
2John1:13 Leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve nawˬ awˬ viˉ ma ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. 
2John1:13 Leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve nawˬ awˬ viˉ ma ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ hui nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. 
3John1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ leh, ha‸ ve Gaˍyuˆ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hoˉ chaw mawˇ hpeh‸ leh, ha‸ ve Gaˍyuˆ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:2 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, co ha hpawˇ loˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ la tuˬ leh chehˇ sha cawˬ sha tuˬ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:2 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, co ha hpawˇ loˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ nawˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve hkʼe, teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ la tuˬ leh chehˇ sha cawˬ sha tuˬ ngaˬ bon lawˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:3 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:3 Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ laˬ leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh nawˬ kʼai chehˇ ve awˬ lawn yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ha lehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai tehˬ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:4 Ngaˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ chi a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
3John1:4 Ngaˬ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ htaˇ, ngaˬ ha lehˬ tuˬ chi a‸ kehˉ uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ." 
3John1:5 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ da‸ jaw htawˇ, hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ ve lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:5 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, hkehˉ chaw hpeh‸ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ mawˬ maˇ shiˍ da‸ jaw htawˇ, hkʼa deh‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ ve lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:6 Nawˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ lawn Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ ve kʼo, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:6 Nawˬ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ lawn Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ shiˍ kʼoˬ piˇ ve kʼo, da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon yawˇ hui bon ca maˍ kʼai leh, lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ga piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ." 
3John1:7 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon yawˇ hui bon ca maˍ kʼai leh, lawˇ kiˍ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ga piˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ ha‸ yuˬ." 
3John1:8 Hkʼe te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui kanˉ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ yuˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:8 Hkʼe te leh, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chi hkʼe ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ geh teˇ geh ngaˬ hui kanˉ te hpeh‸ tuˬ, ngaˬ hui yawˇ hui hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ ha‸ yuˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:9 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ li‸ a ciˉ bvuh‸ feu piˇ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ gaˇ ve Daˍyawˇtaˍraˆ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na." 
3John1:9 Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hta‸ ngaˬ li‸ a ciˉ bvuh‸ feu piˇ peuˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo shu a‸ kehˉ uiˍ gaˇ ve Daˍyawˇtaˍraˆ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve hkawˇ hta‸ maˇ na." 
3John1:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ laˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ te chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ haiˬ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw leh, ngaˬ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ceh tiˉ te ve hta‸ yawˇ nyi hkʼaˇ maˇ suh sheˍ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, ha‸ yuˬ gaˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ leh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:10 Chi hta‸ pa taw ngaˬ laˬ ve kʼo, yawˇ te chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ haiˬ ve tawˇ hta‸ yaw leh, ngaˬ awˬ lawn maˇ heˆ heˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼe ceh tiˉ te ve hta‸ yawˇ nyi hkʼaˇ maˇ suh sheˍ. Awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ ha‸ yuˬ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ ka‸, ha‸ yuˬ gaˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ tawˍ taˍ leh Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa‸ kʼoˬ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:11 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ kʼai. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o. Da‸ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ maˇ mawˬ jaw." 
3John1:11 Ha‸ ve awˬ chawˇ-oˬ, haiˬ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh taˇ kʼai. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai-o. Da‸ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shiˍ maˇ mawˬ jaw." 
3John1:12 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Deˍmeˍtriˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, shaˉ hkiˆ chi ve lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:12 Chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ Deˍmeˍtriˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ yawˇ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ leh, shaˉ hkiˆ chi ve lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:13 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, naˬ meu‸ taˬ leh naˬ meu‸ gʼuiˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ." 
3John1:13 Ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ tuˬ maˇ maˇ cawˬ ve htawˇ, naˬ meu‸ taˬ leh naˬ meu‸ gʼuiˬ bvuh‸ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ te gaˇ." 
3John1:14 Maˇ maw maw kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ na‸ uˉ gʼa te da‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:14 Maˇ maw maw kʼo, nawˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, mehˆ hpfuhˇ tawˍ da‸ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ huiˉ maˬ na‸ uˉ gʼa te da‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ dawˇ law chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
3John1:15 Nawˬ geh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ htawˇ, nawˬ geh chehˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ shanˍ feu laˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ kʼaw‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
3John1:15 Nawˬ geh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha ve cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ chawˇ teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ shanˍ feu laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ htawˇ, nawˬ geh chehˇ ve awˬ chawˇ teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ shanˍ feu laˇ ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve hkawˇ kʼaw‸ hto piˇ-oˆ." 
Jude1:1 Ngaˬ lehˬ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve awˬ ceˬ, Yaˍkoˆ ve awˬ nyi paˍ Yuˇda‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ li‸ chi bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ nawˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:2 Ha kʼaˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ, dawˇ sha ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ la piˇ-oˆ." 
Jude1:3 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui teˇ geh hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ gʼa taˍ ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ lawn, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ bvuh‸ laˇ gaˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hta‸ teˇ pawˆ ceh tiˉ chiˇ a‸ piˇ taˍ ve yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ pon nawˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ te tuˬ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ leh li‸ chi teˇ kʼoˆ gʼa bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:4 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ ngaˬ hui geh hkʼawˇ lo‸ la peuˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve leh cha‸ chiˆ ve laiˉ ceuˬ te tuˬ awˬ pon, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ bon hta‸ yuˬ hpfuhˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ceh tiˉ ngaˬ hui ve Uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ leh Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ ve ka‸, yawˇ hui yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ baˬ ve yoˬ. Ciˍ yanˍ ve chi hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ka‸ kʼoˆ cheˆ taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:5 Nawˬ hui teˇ pawˆ hkʼa deh‸ shiˍ peuˬ ve htawˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼaw‸ dawˇ nawˇ laˇ gaˇ ve yoˬ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, Eˇjiˇtu‸ mvuhˇ miˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ piˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te luˬ te sheˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:6 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, a shu yawˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ baˬ taˉ leh, a shu yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ baˬ taˉ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ ve sho caˆ hpeh taˍ leh, naˆ ho‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo haw taˍ ve yoˬ. Suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon, uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ chi hkʼe haw taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:7 Oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Sawˉdonˍ venˇ, Gawˇmawˇra‸ venˇ leh, awˬ paˇ awˬ kui lo cawˬ ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, ngaˬ hui awˬ pon henˇ yuˬ jawˬ yuˬ tuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇ yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ponˬ te leuˉ leh, hawˉ hkʼaˆ chawˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ ka‸ peh‸ ve tzuhˆ ve hta‸ te ve pa taw, co co taiˍ taiˍ aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve ciˍ yanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, zuh‸ maˆ mawˬ ve hta‸ cuˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ a shu yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ te ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, uˉ peunˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpfuhˆ baˬ leh, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:9 Uiˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ Miˆhkeˍlaˆ lehˬ, Moˉseˍ suh taˍ ve awˬ to awˬ lawn neˇhaiˬ hta‸ tawˇ gʼawˬ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ maˇ haˆ. Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ deˇ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, yawˇ yawˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:10 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ shiˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ lawn maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Maˇ dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui lehˬ a shu yawˇ hkʼaˇ yawˇ shiˍ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai ve pa taw, luˬ kʼai sheˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:11 Yawˇ hui gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Kaˍiˉnaˆ ve ya‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaˇ suh yawˇ hui kʼai ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, yawˇ hui awˬ hpfuhˇ gʼa tuˬ awˬ pon, Baˍlanˍ te ya‸ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ suh gʼuiˇ kʼai leh, Kawˇraˆ hpfuhˆ kʼai ve hkʼe, yawˇ hui htawˇ hpfuhˆ kʼai ve pa taw gʼa luˬ gʼa sheˆ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:12 Nawˬ hui ha‸ pehnˇ ve pawehˇ hta‸ caˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ iˉ kaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve, kawˆ tuˬ uiˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ geh hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, maˇ kawˆ puiˉ leh, a shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ pon ceh tiˉ dawˇ nyi puiˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, mvuhˇ haw meuˆ chiˇ veu ve, iˉ kaˆ maˇ cawˬ ve moˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ goˇ htaˇ, awˬ shiˍ maˇ naw‸ leh, gʼawˬ baˬ peuˬ leh nyiˇ pawˆ suh peuˬ ve iˉ shiˍ cehˬ hkʼe htawˇ yawˇ hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:13 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, htawˇhpfuhˆnawˬhpfuhˆ te ve laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ gʼuiˬ baˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ fuˇ tawˆ la piˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, a shu yawˇ ve ya‸ taw tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ tawˆ la piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, htawˇ kʼaw‸ nawˬ kʼaw‸ kʼai ve meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Naˆ ho‸ jaˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ yawˇ hui awˬ pon co co taiˍ taiˍ teh taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:14 Aˍdanˍ hta‸ tanˬ leh suhˍ co-e teˇ co-e awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve Eˇnawˆ teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ lawn bon maˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve chaw awˬ meunˍ awˬ shehnˉ geh teˇ geh laˬ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:15 Yawˇ laˬ ve lehˬ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, yawˇ hui maˇ yawˆ maˇ yan te leh haiˬ ve kanˉ hkʼa te ve hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan ve venˇbaˆ yaˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ tzuhˇ tawˇ shaˆ hkʼa yaw ve tawˇ hkawˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ pon maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ taˆ leh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon htawˇ yawˇ laˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:16 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, beu puiˉ hkʼaiˉ puiˉ ve chaw, kʼoˆ puiˉ shanˬ puiˉ ve chaw, a shu yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw, caˆ muiˬ leh tawˇ uiˍ tawˇ mvuh yaw ve chaw leh, shu geh teˇ ceuˬ ceuˬ gʼa tuˬ shu hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ puiˉ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Shaˍ ti‸ piˇ leh awˬ gʼaˇ piˇ ve" 
Jude1:17 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ kʼoˆ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ." 
Jude1:18 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ yawˆ yan leh a shu yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh te kʼai leh, hkʼa mvuhˇ hkʼa na kʼoˆ guiˇ gʼuiˬ guiˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, nawˬ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ taˍ laˇ peuˬ." 
Jude1:19 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ moˍ hta‸ hpaˆ da‸ tuˬ te ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo Awˬ ha hpu maˇ chehˇ leh, awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ hpawˇ hta‸ ceh tiˉ caˉ da‸ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:20 Ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, da‸ kehˬ jaˇ ve nawˬ hui yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ la yeˬ la piˇ leh, da‸ ve kehˬ ve Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo bon lawˬ chehˇ-oˆ." 
Jude1:21 Nawˬ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve ha‸ pehnˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ awˬ to yeˬ chaweh chehˇ taˍ-o‸. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ gʼa htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ ve ha kʼaˉ puiˉ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ law chehˇ taˍ-o‸." 
Jude1:22 Hkʼa deh‸ maˇ yonˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ yonˍ la tuˬ ga piˇ-oˆ. 
Jude1:23 Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ ponˬ piˇ tuˬ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼawˬ tawˆ-oˆ. Peuˬ leh, kawˆ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ ha kʼaˉ-oˆ. Awˬ suhˍ awˬ shaˍ a loˍ hta‸ pa taw cha‸ chiˆ kʼai ve veu‸ kʼaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ canˇ-oˆ." 
Jude1:24 Nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa paiˍ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ nawˬ hui hta‸ nyi ha‸ shaˉ puiˉ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ hui ya‸ kuiˬ jiˆ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ kuiˬ lo nawˬ hui ha lehˬ ha kʼa gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yawˇ te puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Jude1:25 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo, ngaˬ hui ve Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ paˍ Gʼuiˬsha teˇ gʼaˇ tiˉ ve hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ, uiˍ ve mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ, kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ leh, uˉ peunˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ htaˇ ka‸, chi beu‸ ka‸, co co taiˍ taiˍ ka‸ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Revelation1:1 Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Maˇ maw maw hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maw piˇ tuˬ, hpeu‸ maˍ laˇ ve awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ peu laˇ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ Yoˇhanˬ hta‸ awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ shiˍ piˇ mawˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:2 Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ taˍ ve awˬ lawn hta‸ Yoˇhanˬ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ ve hkʼe shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve yoˬ. 
Revelation1:3 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ chi hta‸ gʼaw maˍ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, bvuh‸ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ leh te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la paˇ neˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:4 Ngaˬ Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, Aˍsiˆ mvuhˇmiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ suhˍ moˍ hta‸ li‸ bvuh‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸, chi beu‸ ka‸, laˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ geh lo maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve kʼaw jaw mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo chehˇ taˍ ve awˬ ha suhˍ maˬ geh lo maˇ kʼoˆ," 
Revelation1:5 ka ti‸ yeˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ geh lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ bon awˬ shinˉ leh dawˇ sha gaˇ sha tuˬ nawˬ hui geh cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. Yeˍsuˆ Hkri‸ lehˬ, suh peuˬ ve chaw hui awˬ hkʼaw lo awˉ lawˉ kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ leh, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ ha‸ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh ngaˬ hui ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ hpehˇ hkʼa laˇ peuˬ." 
Revelation1:6 Ngaˬ hui lehˬ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve Awˬ pa Gʼuiˬsha ve paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ te ve yoˬ. Co co taiˍ taiˍ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh kanˇ paˆ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ." 
Revelation1:7 Nyi loˬ, yawˇ lehˬ moˬ geh teˇ geh ya‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. Mehˆ shiˍ teˇ shiˍ le le leh yawˇ hta‸ juˆ pawnˍ ve chaw hui yawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hta‸ pa taw gʼa paˆ hawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe hpeh‸ la tuˬ yoˬ. A menˬ." 
Revelation1:8 Ngaˬ lehˬ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ leh awˬ leh meuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸, chi beu‸ ka‸, laˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:9 Ngaˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi Yoˇhanˬ yoˬ. Tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha uˉ peunˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yeunˇ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hui geh teˇ geh hkanˍ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ leh, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve pa taw, Paˍmoˆ conˇ lo ngaˬ gʼa chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:10 Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ ve awˬ nyi teˇ nyi htaˇ Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chehˇ leh, behˬ heh ma awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, ngaˬ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ lo bvuhˬ jaˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:11 Tawˇ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ li‸ hkʼaw bvuh‸ taˍ leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ chi suhˍ moˍ hta‸ feu piˇ-oˆ. Eˇfeˇsu‸, Saˍmuˇraˍnaˆ, Peˍraˍgaˍ, Saˍtiˍrehˇ, Saˍdiˆ, Hpiˇlaˍdeˍhpiˆ leh Lawˍdiˍkiˆ, awˬ moˍ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ feu piˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ."
