Revelation1:12 Ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ ngaˬ hpfuhˆ nyi htaˇ, shi kawˆ faiˇ suhˍ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:13 Kawˆ faiˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ kʼaw ji lo chaw yaˇ ve. Yaˇ hpu hta‸ shuˍ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, hkui sheh hkʼa gaˬ zuhˬ ve aˉ po‸ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, yawˇ ve nyi ma pui lo shi haˍ pi caˆ tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:14 Yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ leh yawˇ ve uˉ hkeh mvuh lehˬ, hpu ve yawˬ mvuh hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, vaˇ meu-e hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hpu ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ ha hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:15 Yawˇ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lawˍ taˍ ve kuiˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ tawˇ yaw ve awˬ hkawˇ lehˬ, iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ baˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:16 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh la‸ sha paˉ lo meu‸ keu shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ viˇ nyiˇ hpawˇ cawˬ ve tcuhˆ jaˇ ve aˉ htaw teˇ maˬ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ nyi gʼeuˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ba da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:17 Yawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ lehˬ suh ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ ve hkui paˇ lo paiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh ngaˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ taˍ leh kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Taˇ kawˆ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ leh awˬ leh meuˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation1:18 Te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ ngaˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ suh peuˬ ve htawˇ chi beu‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ ngaˬ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ ve shawˇ leh suh mvuhˇmiˬ ve shawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. 
Revelation1:19 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chi beu‸ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, bvuh‸ taˍ-o‸." 
Revelation1:20 Ngaˬ ve la‸ sheh la‸ sha paˉ lo nawˬ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ leh, shi kawˆ faiˇ suhˍ maˬ ve faˉ taˍ ve tcuhˉ kuiˬ lehˬ chi hkʼe yoˬ. Meu‸ keu shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ suhˍ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ leh, kawˆ faiˇ suhˍ maˬ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ suhˍ moˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:1 Eˇfeˇsu‸ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. La‸ sha paˉ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo meu‸ keu shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ vawˆ taˍ leh, shi kawˆ faiˇ suhˍ maˬ awˬ kʼaw ji lo yiˬ yiˬ laˬ laˬ te chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:2 Nawˬ te chehˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hkanˍ maˇ gʼa ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Tcuh yaˇ maˇ heˆ ve ka‸, a shu yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ tcuh yaˇ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ lawˇ nyi leh, yawˇ hui heˍ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ nawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:3 Nawˬ yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ pa taw tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ htawˇ, nawˬ nyi ma maˇ luˬ ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ ha‸ puiˉ ve htawˇ, chi beu‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ ha‸." 
Revelation2:5 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ mvuh kuiˬ lo ce kʼai peuˬ ve hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te-o. Nawˬ ve venˇbaˆ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ geh laˬ leh nawˬ ve kawˆ faiˇ hta‸ taˍ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yuˬ tawˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:6 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, da‸ ve chi teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ te chehˇ sheˍ. Niˇkawˇlaˆ chaw hui te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ canˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ htawˇ kanˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ canˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:7 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o. Gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve suhˆ cehˬ teˇ cehˬ ve awˬ shiˍ hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Suhˆ cehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve Paˍraˍdiˇsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:8 Saˍmuˇraˍnaˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ leh awˬ leh meuˇ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve leh, suh peuˬ ve htawˇ kʼaw‸ te‸ la peuˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:9 Nawˬ gʼa hkanˍ chehˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve leh haˍ ve gʼawˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. (Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ paw sha chehˇ ve yoˬ.) Chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ nawˬ hta‸ hkʼaiˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ka‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, Saˍtanˍ ve awˬ moˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:10 Maˇ maw maw nawˬ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ taˇ kawˆ. Nawˬ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ neˇhaiˬ lehˬ, nawˬ hui teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ htawnˍ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu leh, teˇ chi nyi hkʼa gaˬ fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ nawˬ hui gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ nyi ma yeˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Oˇ hkʼe te ve kʼo, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hkʼawˆ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:11 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o. Nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te maˇ gʼa." 
Revelation2:12 Peˍraˍgaˍ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ viˇ nyiˇ hpawˇ cawˬ ve tcuhˆ jaˇ ve aˉ htaw hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. 
Revelation2:13 Nawˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ lehˬ, Saˍtanˍ ve kʼaw jaw hpeh‸ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ nawˬ vawˆ yeˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve ka ti‸ yeˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ Anˍtiˇpaˆ ve awˬ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, ngaˬ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ nawˬ maˇ baˬ taˉ. Yawˇ lehˬ, Saˍtanˍ chehˇ taˍ ve nawˬ ve chehˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:14 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Baˍlanˍ meh ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˍ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ chaw yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui htiˇ poˬ kuiˬ teh taˍ tuˬ, yawˇ lehˬ Baˍlehˆ hta‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkui htiˇ poˬ kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ taˍ ve caˇ tuˬ hta‸ caˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:15 Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ lehˬ, Niˇkawˇlaˆ chaw hui maˍ ve awˬ hkʼaˇ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:16 Hkʼe te leh, venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ-oˆ. Hkʼe maˇ heˆ kʼo, ngaˬ nawˬ geh haˆ haˆ laˬ leh, ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve aˉ htaw hta‸ yehˇ leh, yawˇ hui hta‸ ngaˬ ma‸ bawˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:17 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o. Gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ faˉ taˍ ve maˍ naˆ shiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui teˇ shiˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Haˉ pui shiˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ bvuh‸ taˍ leh, haˉ pui shiˍ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ awˬ meh oˇ ve hta‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
Revelation2:18 Saˍtiˍrehˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve Yaˇ hpu ve mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ ha hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, lawˍ taˍ ve kuiˇ hkʼe hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:19 Yawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ kanˉ te chehˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, ha‸ pehnˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ, yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ, shu hta‸ ga piˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, yeunˇ hkanˍ puiˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Chi hkʼoˆ ka‸, chi beu‸ nawˬ te chehˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ nawˬ te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ a‸ kehˉ maˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:20 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ ma teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yeˍsaˍbeˍlaˆ meh ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ nawˬ chehˇ tcuh taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te tuˬ leh, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ tanˇ taˍ ve caˇ tuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ caˇ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ maˍ piˇ leh sheh ya‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation2:21 Venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ awˬ yanˇ piˇ ve htawˇ, yawˇ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te chehˇ ve hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ tuˬ nyi ma maˇ cawˬ." 
Revelation2:22 Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ naˬ kuiˬ gawˬ kuiˬ lo baˬ keu tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ geh haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw hui hta‸ htawˇ, yawˇ te ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ ve kʼo, uiˍ jaˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ baˬ keu tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:23 Yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, nyi ma leh dawˇ hkʼaˇ hta‸ ca nyi shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ hui teˇ gʼaˇ peuˬ teˇ gʼaˇ, a shu yawˇ te ve kanˉ hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe ngaˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:24 Saˍtanˍ ve naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ shiˍ leh, maˍ piˇ ve oˇ ve hta‸ maˇ na yuˬ ve, Saˍtiˍrehˇ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ taˍ ve nawˬ hui awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ nawˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ vuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ taˍ." 
Revelation2:25 Nawˬ hui geh hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gaˬ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸. 
Revelation2:26 Gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, awˬ leh hkʼa gaˬ ngaˬ ve kanˉ hta‸ te ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ, Awˬ pa ngaˬ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ pe‸ laˇ ve hkʼe, ngaˬ htawˇ yawˇ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:27 Je‸ mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ dawˆ hkoˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ lehˬ sho juˇ fuiˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:28 Ngaˬ lehˬ, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ peuˬ tawˆ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation2:29 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o." 
Revelation3:1 Saˍdiˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ha suhˍ maˬ cawˬ leh meu‸ keu shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ cawˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ te chehˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ shu kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, nawˬ suh taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation3:2 Shaw chehˇ-oˆ. Cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve, suh paˇ neˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ gʼaˇ hkʼa deh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ nawˬ ve kanˉ biˇ la peuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ." 
Revelation3:3 Hkʼe te leh, nawˬ hkʼaˬ hkʼe gʼa ha‸ yuˬ taˍ leh gʼa kaˇ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ dawˇ nawˇ-oˆ. Oˇ ve hta‸ na yuˬ leh venˇbaˆ dawˇ hpfuhˆ-oˆ. Nawˬ maˇ shaw chehˇ taˍ ve kʼo, chaw hkʼawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ ve teˇ yanˇ ngaˬ nawˬ geh gaˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ." 
Revelation3:4 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Saˍdiˆ venˇ awˬ hkaw lo a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ maˇ te ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ cawˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui keunˍ ve pa taw, hpu ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa veu‸ deh leh, ngaˬ geh gʼa te toˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:5 Gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, chi hkʼe ve hpu ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ gʼa veu‸ deh tuˬ yoˬ. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve awˬ meh hta‸ ngaˬ shiˆ baˬ tuˬ maˇ heˆ. Ngaˬ Awˬ pa mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Awˬ pa ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yawˇ lehˬ ngaˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:6 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o." 
Revelation3:7 Hpiˇlaˍdeˍhpiˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Daˍviˆ ve shawˇ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve, da‸ ve kehˬ ve, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hpaw taˍ kʼo, shu hoˆ maˇ gʼa, yawˇ hoˆ taˍ kʼo, shu hpaw maˇ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Revelation3:8 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nawˬ te chehˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nyi loˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ hoˆ maˇ gʼa ve yehˬ miˉ teˇ maˬ hta‸ nawˬ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo ngaˬ hpaw taˍ peuˬ. Nawˬ awˬ gʼaˇ a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve ka‸, ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ na yuˬ peuˬ leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ nawˬ maˇ baˬ taˉ." 
Revelation3:9 Saˍtanˍ ve awˬ moˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ ve la‸ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ chiˇ a‸ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, Yuˇda‸ chaw hpeh‸ ve maˇ heˆ, yawˇ hui heˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ nawˬ ve hkui sheh awˬ paˇ lo oˉ kʼoˍ pui tcuh leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ha‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui gʼa shiˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:10 Yeunˇ hkanˍ-o‸ teh‸, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ na yuˬ leh te ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ lawˇ nyi tuˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo lawˇ nyi ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la htaˇ, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ ponˬ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:11 Ngaˬ haˆ haˆ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Nawˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ gʼa lu yuˬ tuˬ, nawˬ geh hkʼa cawˬ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ vawˆ taˍ-o‸." 
Revelation3:12 Gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkuiˉ daw hpeh‸ la tuˬ ngaˬ te tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ oˇ kaˬ lo maˇ tawˆ kʼai. Yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve venˇ awˬ meh leh, ngaˬ ve awˬ meh awˬ suhˉ ngaˬ bvuh‸ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, ngaˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha geh mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la ve, Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ suhˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation3:13 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o." 
Revelation3:14 Lawˍdiˍkiˆ venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ ve tcuh yaˇ hta‸ li‸ chi hkʼe bvuh‸ piˇ-oˆ. Ka ti‸ yeˬ leh hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ hpeh‸ ve, A menˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve teˇ gʼaˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation3:15 Nawˬ te chehˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ lehˬ, gawˬ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ, chiˆ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ. Nawˬ lehˬ, gawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ, maˇ heˆ kʼo chiˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ tuˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ heuˆ gaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation3:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ lehˬ chiˆ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ, gawˬ ve ka‸ maˇ heˆ, lehˬ ve tiˉ hpeh‸ chehˇ ve pa taw, ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ hpe‸ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ paw sha ve yoˬ. Mawˇ jeˬ maˇ maˇ shaw hpoˆ taˍ peuˬ. Ngaˬ te‸ chiˉ ka‸ maˇ loˍ teh‸ nawˬ kʼoˆ ve htawˇ, nawˬ lehˬ hkʼaˬ ma hpeh‸ bawˬ tuˬ cawˬ ve, hkʼaˬ ma ha kʼaˉ tuˬ cawˬ ve leh, hkʼaˬ ma haˍ gʼawˇ chehˇ ve hta‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ, Nawˬ mehˆ cuˉ leh awˬ kʼu nyi hpeh‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ ka‸ nawˬ maˇ shiˍ law leˇ." 
Revelation3:18 Hkʼe te leh, ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ awˬ hkʼaˇ chi hkʼe maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ paw sha la tuˬ, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo lawˍ taˍ ve shi hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ awˬ kʼu nyi hpeh‸ ve hta‸ shu maˇ gʼa mawˬ leh nawˬ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ, hpu ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ mehˆ mawˬ la tuˬ, mehˆ shiˍ hkʼaw keu tuˬ ve naˆ tsuhˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ geh laˬ vuiˬ la-o." 
Revelation3:19 Ngaˬ ha‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ deˇ maˍ piˇ leh, hkʼa deh‸ maˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, hkʼa deh‸ kʼaw‸ nawˇ la leh venˇbaˆ hta‸ dawˇ hpfuhˆ-oˆ." 
Revelation3:20 Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ yehˬ miˉ paˇ lo huˉ leh htawˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ kaˇ leh yehˬ miˉ hpaw laˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ yawˇ geh lo lo‸-e leh, yawˇ geh caˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ htawˇ ngaˬ geh caˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:21 Ngaˬ lehˬ, gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, ngaˬ Awˬ pa ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ Awˬ pa geh mui taˍ ve hkʼe, gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ geh mui tuˬ ngaˬ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation3:22 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw lehˬ, Awˬ ha hpu Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ hkʼa deh‸ na-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo yehˬ miˉ hpaw taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Behˬ heh ma hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ bvuhˬ ve, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ yaw laˇ leh ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ hkawˇ lehˬ, ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Choˬ kaˬ lo taˆ la-o. Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ gʼa hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ lawn teˇ hpaˍ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:2 Teˇ cawˬ haˉ ngaˬ Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo kʼaw jaw teˇ maˬ cawˬ taˍ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ lo teˇ gʼaˇ mui chehˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:3 Oˇ kaˬ lo mui taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ leh, nyiˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Naw naˆ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve aˉ laˇ miˬ shiˉ jaw lehˬ, kʼaw jaw oˇ ve hta‸ hkʼa caw zuhˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:4 Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve teˇ maˬ hkʼa caw zuhˇ lo kʼaw jaw nyiˇ chi awˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ nyiˇ chi awˇ gʼaˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ hpuˉ-ehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:5 Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ ba tawˆ la ve, awˬ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ bvuhˬ la ve leh, mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ kawˆ faiˇ suhˍ maˬ to‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Kawˆ faiˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ha suhˍ maˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:6 Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ, haˉ pui keh-oˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve mehˆ gʼeuˆ hta‸ shuˍ ve gʼuiˬ po teˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw awˬ kʼaw ji lo maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa caw zuhˇ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh cawˬ ve yoˬ Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ hpawˇ ka‸ awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ hpawˇ ka‸ mehˆ shiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:7 Awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkeh lehˬ, laˇ caˬ shiˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Nyiˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, nuˇ paˍ ehˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Shehˆ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, poˬ chehˇ ve aˉ ceˬ lonˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:8 A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve awˇ hkeh lehˬ, teˇ hkeh le le toˍ la‸ kʼuˉ hkaw‸ maˬ cawˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve awˬ to hkʼa peu-eˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, toˍ la‸ kʼuˉ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, mehˆ shiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ maˇ jehˇ jehˇ leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve, Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ jaˇ, da‸ kehˬ jaˇ, da‸ kehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸, chi beu‸ ka‸, laˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo ka‸, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation4:9 A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ oˇ ve awˇ hkeh lehˬ, kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui taˍ ve, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ piˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ yanˇ," 
Revelation4:10 chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ oˇ ve nyiˇ chi awˇ gʼaˇ htawˇ, kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ hkui tcuhˉ teh leh, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo yawˇ hui ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ kʼehˆ teh taˍ leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Revelation4:11 Ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ, yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ leh kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa keunˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ nawˬ hpanˍ taˍ ceˍ taˍ leh, nawˬ ve a loˍ hta‸ pa taw awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hpeh‸ la leh nawˬ te hpanˍ taˍ ve deˇ deˇ yoˬ." 
Revelation5:1 Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸ taˍ ve li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve teˇ kʼoˆ hta‸ awˬ hkʼaw hpawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hta‸ hpawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ li‸ bvuh‸ taˍ leh yinˉ suhˍ maˬ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:2 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ leh yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpaˆ baˬ tuˬ, a shu te keunˍ ve le teh‸, awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:3 Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ leh awˬ hkʼaw lo nyi tuˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ te maˇ gʼa." 
Revelation5:4 Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ hpeu‸ keunˍ nyi keunˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ka‸ ca maˇ mawˬ ve pa taw, ngaˬ gʼaˇ hte‸ hawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:5 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Taˇ hawˬ. Yuˇda‸ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve, laˇ caˬ shiˉ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Daˍviˆ ve awˬ geu hpeh‸ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, gʼaˇ peuˬ. Hkʼe te leh, li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ ka‸, yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve suhˍ maˬ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ hpeu‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:6 Oˇ htaˇ, kʼaw jaw leh a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh awˬ kʼaw ji lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ kʼaw ji lo maˇ kʼoˆ, huˉ chehˇ ve Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ ehˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ jaw peuˬ ve hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkaw suhˍ maˬ cawˬ leh, mehˆ shiˍ suhˍ shiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mehˆ shiˍ oˇ ve suhˍ shiˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo kʼai tcuh taˍ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ha suhˍ maˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:7 Oˇ htaˇ, Yawˬ ehˉ laˬ leh kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo vawˆ taˍ ve li‸ hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:8 Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ yuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh leh, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ nyiˇ chi awˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, Yawˬ ehˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le tinˍ cawˬ leh, sha hawnˉ ve hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve shi mu‸ hkʼu vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Sha hawnˉ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui bon lawˬ ve hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:9 Yawˇ hui kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ kʼa leh kʼoˆ ve, Li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ tuˬ, nawˬ te keunˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ suh ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ leh, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ nawˬ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ peuˬ." 
Revelation5:10 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha awˬ pon mvuhˇmiˬ yaˇ leh paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ nawˬ te piˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ kʼa muiˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:11 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, kʼaw jaw hkʼa caw zuhˇ lo a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ leh maˇ jaˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ meunˍ awˬ meunˍ pawˆ, awˬ hinˉ awˬ hinˉ pawˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:12 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve Yawˬ ehˉ lehˬ, kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ, mawˇ jeˬ teˇ ceuˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ gʼaˇ awˬ shaˉ teˇ ceuˬ, yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ leh chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ gʼa keunˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:13 Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ awˬ hawˉ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, teˇ kaˬ le le lo cawˬ ve te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ leh Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ, yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ leh uˉ peunˍ ve kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ teh‸ yawˇ hui kʼoˆ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation5:14 A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh lehˬ, A menˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, boˆ taˍ leh oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:1 Yawˬ ehˉ lehˬ, yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve suhˍ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ maˬ hpaw ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ hkeh lehˬ, mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:2 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hkeh hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, hkaˆ teˇ maˬ shi taˍ leh, yawˇ shi uˉ tcuhˍ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ gʼaˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh, gʼaˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:3 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ nyiˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:4 Oˇ htaˇ nyiˉ-ehˍ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hkeh tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw yaˇ hui cawˇ da‸ hui da‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yuˬ tawˆ leh yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ tiˇ pehˍ da‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ aˉ htaw lonˉ teˇ maˬ piˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:5 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve sheh lehˇ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ shehˆ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, naˆ tawˉ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hkeh hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo yaˍ cuˍ teˇ maˬ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:6 A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh awˬ kʼaw ji lo tawˇ yaw ve hta‸ shuˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Caˬ shiˍ teˇ panˇ ve teˇ hteh‸ leh, cho‸ shiˍ shehˆ panˇ ve teˇ hteh‸ yoˬ. Naˍ manˇ leh a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ taˇ te luˬ piˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:7 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve awˍ lehˇ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:8 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, hpuiˇ tuˇ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hkeh hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve awˬ meh lehˬ, Suh jawˇmawˇ meh ve yoˬ. Suh mvuhˇmiˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ awˇ pun teˇ pun hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ. Aˉ htaw, meu‸ ve kaˆ ve, naˬ beuˬ naˬ ve leh, miˬguiˬ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hpaˍ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:9 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve ngaˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, co ha teˇ hpaˍ tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ hawˉ lo chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Co ha oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw leh yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui ve co ha teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:10 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇ mawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ hui awˬ suhˍ gʼa sheˆ ve awˬ pon, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw hui hta‸ nawˬ suhˉ taˆ leh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ, hkʼaˬ maw maw cawˬ tuˬ sheˍ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:11 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ hpuˉ-ehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma teˇ gʼaˇ teˇ hkʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ ve, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh awˬ ceˬ te leh yawˇ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ moˍ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ teˇ hkui jehˇ taˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:12 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve hkaw‸ maˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ nyi leh, miˬ hiˆ jaˇ ve hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ nyi lehˬ, meh htuˉ pui hpa naˆ tawˉ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ leh, ha pa tawˬ ve lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ hkʼe hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:13 Maˉ nawˆ cehˬ hta‸ mvuhˇ haw lonˉ meuˆ leh maˇ meh sheˍ ve iˉ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ ce ve hkʼe, mvuhˇ naw ma ve meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ce la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:14 Li‸ hta‸ lo‸ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, mvuhˇ naw ma mehˉ kʼai ve yoˬ. Hkʼaw pui hkʼa peu-eˬ leh conˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ jiˆ tawˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:15 Oˇ htaˇ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ, jawˇmawˇ teˇ hpaˍ, ma‸ poˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, chaw paw chaw sha teˇ hpaˍ, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve chaw leh ponˬ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, haˉ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo leh, hkʼaw pui hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve haˉ pui teˇ hpaˍ awˬ kaˍ lo ca va‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation6:16 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hkʼaw pui teˇ hpaˍ leh haˉ pui teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ ce teˍ laˇ-oˆ. Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ ngaˬ hui hta‸ maˇ gʼa mawˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yawˬ ehˉ ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ hui gʼa ponˬ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, ngaˬ hui hta‸ faˉ taˍ laˇ-oˆ." 
Revelation6:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve awˬ nyi uiˍ ve teˇ nyi gaˬ la peuˬ. A shu teˇ gʼaˇ hkanˍ hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, miˬguiˬ awˇ ceˍ lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼoˆ lo maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˆ cehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ haw maˇ gʼa meuˆ tuˬ miˬguiˬ awˇ ceˍ awˍ hpawˇ lo ve mvuhˇ haw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ vawˆ tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:2 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ kuiˬ lo taˆ la leh, te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve yinˉ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ kanˇ paˆ gʼa taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve," 
Revelation7:3 Ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ naˍ kʼaˍ pui hkʼoˆ lo yinˉ maˇ tcuhˉ piˇ sheˍ ve ceh ceh, miˬguiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˆ cehˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, taˇ fawˉ mehˍ sheˍ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:4 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw hkʼaˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve awˬ lawn ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw teˇ shehnˉ awˇ meunˍ awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. 
Revelation7:5 Yuˇda‸ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Ruˇbenˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Gaˆ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ," 
Revelation7:6 Aˍshaˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Naˍtaˍliˆ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Maˍnaˍseˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ," 
Revelation7:7 Suˉmonˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Leˍviˆ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Iˉsaˍhkaˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ," 
Revelation7:8 Zaˍbuˆlonˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Yoˇseh‸ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, Beˍyaˍmenˍ awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ, chaw chi ma ve hta‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:9 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ nyi leh, mvuhˇ miˬ teˇ peˆ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ gʼaw maˇ gʼa ve chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw lo tcuhˉ pui meuˇ awˬ kʼaˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ leh, kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ leh Yawˬ ehˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:10 Yawˇ hui awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui chehˇ ve ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha leh Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ pa taw, htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:11 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, kʼaw jaw hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, hkʼa caw zuhˇ huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ hui boˆ taˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:12 Yawˇ hui kʼoˆ ve, A menˬ. Chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ, cuˇ yiˍ maˍ yiˍ teˇ ceuˬ, yawˇ ve bon hta‸ chiˇ mvuh ve teˇ ceuˬ, yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ, kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ leh awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ co co taiˍ taiˍ cawˬ piˇ-oˆ. A menˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:13 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Hpuˉ-ehˍ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ veu‸ deh ve chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ a shu le. Yawˇ hui hkʼaˬ lo laˬ ve le teh‸ na nyi laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:14 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ shiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, a shu yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ ve awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tsuhˇ hpu taˍ peuˬ ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation7:15 Hkʼe te leh yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ chehˇ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ yawˇ ve kanˉ hta‸ te chehˇ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui geh chehˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation7:16 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ awˍ maˇ kʼaw‸ meu‸ leh, iˉ kaˆ maˇ kʼaw‸ shiˉ-o. Mvuhˇ cha chiˆ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu haw ve chiˆ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa hkanˍ-o." 
Revelation7:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, kʼaw jaw awˬ kʼaw ji lo chehˇ taˍ ve Yawˬ ehˉ lehˬ, yawˬ hawˉ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ hui hta‸ yawˬ hawˉ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve gʼuiˬ tuˇ teˇ hpaˍ lo yawˇ hui hta‸ sheh kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve mehˆ gʼuiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha shiˆ baˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ, teh‸ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:1 Yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve suhˍ maˬ teˇ maˬ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ hpaw ve teˇ yanˇ, naˍ riˍ teˇ hkawehˇ hkʼe mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ta‸ iˉ gawˬ lehˍ hpeh‸ sheˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:2 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ huˉ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ behˬ heh ma suhˍ maˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:3 Shi mu‸ hkʼu shi taˍ ve, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh, tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ paˇ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ cawˬ taˍ ve shi te taˍ ve tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo, Hkri‸ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve bon lawˬ hkawˇ geh teˇ geh tanˇ piˇ tuˬ, sha hawnˉ ve maˇ maˇ yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:4 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve sha hawnˉ ve mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui ve bon lawˬ hkawˇ geh teˇ geh Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:5 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, mu‸ hkʼu oˇ ve hta‸ yuˬ leh, tanˇ kuiˬ lo cawˬ ve aˬ miˍ hkʼa biˇ keu peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ tawˍ tawˍ ve, awˬ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ bvuhˬ ve, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ ba ve leh, miˬ hiˆ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:6 Behˬ heh ma suhˍ maˬ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ lehˬ, behˬ heh ma meuˆ tuˬ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:7 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, awˬ suhˍ hkaw‸ da‸ taˍ ve vaˇ shiˍ leh aˬ miˍ, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ce la ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ shehˆ pun teˇ pun hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˆ cehˬ shehˆ pun teˇ pun hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˉ-ehˍ ve mvuh‸ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:8 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve hkʼaw pui lonˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ hta‸ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ shehˆ pun teˇ pun lehˬ, awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:9 Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ shehˆ pun teˇ pun suh ve yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, shehˆ pun teˇ pun luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:10 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, aˬ miˍ tuˉ taˍ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ to‸ chehˇ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ lonˉ teˇ shiˍ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ce la leh, iˉ kaˆ lawˬ shehˆ pun teˇ pun awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼuiˬ tuˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, ce la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:11 Meu‸ keu shiˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkʼaˇ ve suhˆ meh ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ shehˆ pun teˇ pun lehˬ, hkʼaˇ ve suhˆ awˬ gʼuiˬ hpeh‸ la leh, iˉ kaˆ hkʼaˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, chaw maˇ maˇ suh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:12 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ nyi shehˆ pun teˇ pun, ha pa shehˆ pun teˇ pun leh, meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ shehˆ pun teˇ pun luˬ kʼai ve pa taw, yawˇ hui ve awˬ gʼeuˆ shehˆ pun teˇ pun naˆ ho‸ kʼai ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw shehˆ pun teˇ pun awˬ gʼeuˆ maˇ ba leh, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ shehˆ pun teˇ pun htawˇ oˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ gʼeuˆ maˇ ba ve yoˬ." 
Revelation8:13 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ kʼaw ji lo aˉ ceˬ lonˉ teˇ hkeh poˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ tuˬ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:1 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ngaˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo te leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa gaˬ ce kʼai peuˬ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ shiˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ ve shawˇ yawˇ hta‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:2 Oˇ htaˇ, leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hpaw ve yoˬ. Aˬ miˍ buiˬ hpfuh lonˉ ve mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, miˬ kʼoˍ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ tawˆ la leh, miˬ kʼoˍ ve mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ hta‸ pa taw mvuhˇ nyi naˆ ho‸ hpeh‸ la leh, mvuhˇ haw awˬ hkʼaw lo htawˇ naˆ ho‸ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:3 Mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo paˉ ce‸ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve aˉ ci ku taw‸ ma ve kanˇ paˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ hui hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:4 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo cawˬ ve mvuh‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hpa‸ nawˉ lehˍ cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, suhˆ cehˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ gʼa te luˬ teh‸ yawˇ hui hta‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Naˍ kʼaˍ pui hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha ve yinˉ maˇ tcuhˉ taˍ ve chaw hui hta‸ ceh tiˉ gʼa te luˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ tawˇ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:5 Chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yawˇ hui a hkaw-anˬ maˇ gʼa. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, ha pa ngaˇ maˬ hkʼa gaˬ fawˉ mehˍ piˇ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ, aˉ ci ku taw‸ ma chaw hta‸ che‸ leh naˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, fawˉ mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:6 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo, chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ca ve ka‸, ca maˇ mawˬ. Yawˇ hui suh gaˇ jaˇ ve htawˇ, suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui lo hpaw tawˆ-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation9:7 Paˉ ce‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han lehˬ, ma‸ bawˆ tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ yawˇ hui ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lehˬ, chaw yaˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:8 Yawˇ hui ve uˉ hkeh mvuh lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ ve uˉ hkeh mvuh hta‸ shuˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve ciˬ lehˬ, laˇ caˬ shiˉ ve ciˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:9 Yawˇ hui ve nyi ma pui htanˬ tuˬ ve lehˬ, sho te taˍ ve nyi ma pui htanˬ tuˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve toˍ la‸ kʼuˉ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ ve lehˬ, ma‸ bawˆ kuiˬ lo gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼai chehˇ ve iˉ mvuhˇ lawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:10 Yawˇ hui ve awˬ mehˍ tu lehˬ, aˉ ci ku taw‸ ma ve awˬ mehˍ tu hta‸ shuˍ leh, awˬ viˇ htawˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ ha pa ngaˇ maˬ hkʼa gaˬ fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve awˬ mehˍ tu awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:11 Yawˇ hui ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ lehˬ, leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ ve tcuh yaˇ yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ meh lehˬ, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ kʼo Aˍbaˍdonˍ, Heˍlaˍsaˆ hkawˇ kʼo Aˍpawˇliˍonˍteh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:12 Dawˇ haˍ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Nyi loˬ, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ kʼaw‸ laˬ tuˬ sheˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:13 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkaw‸ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, Gʼuiˬ sha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cawˬ ve shi te taˍ ve tanˇ kuiˬ ve awˬ hkaw awˍ lehˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:14 Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Uˇhpaˍraˆ gʼuiˬ ma lonˉ awˬ paˇ lo hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpui hpehˇ-oˆ teh‸, behˬ heh ma cawˬ taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkaw‸ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:15 Hkʼe te leh, chaw yaˇ shehˆ pun teˇ pun hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ awˬ pon gu taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ hpui hpehˇ piˇ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve awˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, naˍ riˍ, awˬ nyi, ha pa, awˬ hkʼaw‸, awˬ yanˇ chi awˬ pon Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hui hta‸ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:16 Iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ ve ma‸ yaˇ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ gʼaˇ cawˬ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, nyiˇ ha lanˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:17 Ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ chehˇ ve awˬ ha awˬ hkʼaw lo, iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ veu‸ deh ve nyi ma pui htanˬ tuˬ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ hkʼe nyiˉ-ehˍ ve, naw hpui ve leh, ma‸ shiˉ hkʼe shiˉ-ehˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve oˉ kʼoˍ lehˬ, laˇ caˬ shiˉ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ shuˍ leh, yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo aˬ miˍ ha, aˬ miˍ mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ leh ma‸ shiˉ tawˆ la chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:18 Yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve aˬ miˍ ha, aˬ miˍ mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ leh ma‸ shiˉ, fawˉ mehˍ ve chi shehˆ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw, chaw yaˇ shehˆ pun teˇ pun gʼa suh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:19 Awˬ lawn kʼo, iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve kanˇ paˆ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw leh awˬ mehˍ tu awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui ve awˬ mehˍ tu lehˬ, vuiˬ hta‸ shuˍ leh oˉ kʼoˍ ka‸ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Shu hta‸ te naˬ piˇ tuˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui yehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:20 Fawˉ mehˍ ve oˇ ve shehˆ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw maˇ gʼa suh leh cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ la‸ sheh te taˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ. Neˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, shi, hpu, kuiˇ, haˉ pui leh suhˆ te taˍ ve shaˉ ho‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui maˇ baˬ taˉ. Shaˉ ho‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, maˇ mawˬ puiˉ, maˇ kaˇ puiˉ, ya‸ kʼaw maˇ toˇ puiˉ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation9:21 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, neˇ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve maˇ kʼoˆ, shu ve mawˇ hta‸ hkʼawˇ ve maˇ kʼoˆ, chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ." 
Revelation10:1 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ moˬ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hkʼoˆ lo aˉlaˇmiˬshiˉjaw cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ nyi hta‸ shuˍ leh, yawˇ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, aˬ miˍ hkuiˉ daw hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:2 Yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo hpaw taˍ ve li‸ ehˉ teˇ kʼoˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼoˆ lo naˆ taˍ leh, la‸ mehˍ paˉ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo naˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:3 Laˇ caˬ shiˉ kuˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kuˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ suhˍ maˬ bvuhˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:4 Mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ suhˍ maˬ bvuhˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, ngaˬ li‸ bvuh‸-a teh‸ te ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ suhˍ maˬ bvuhˬ la ve hta‸ yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ-o‸. Oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ taˇ bvuh‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:5 Oˇ htaˇ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼoˆ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh mvuhˇ hpe lo chiˇ taˆ-e leh," 
Revelation10:6 mvuhˇ naw ma leh mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ, miˬguiˬ leh miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼa cawˬ ve hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ hpanˍ taˍ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ cuˇ leh chi hkʼe hkanˍ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ yanˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ jiˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:7 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, Gʼuiˬsha ve naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ponˬ laˬ htaˇ yawˇ ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ hto piˇ taˍ ve hkʼe, biˇ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation10:8 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ peuˬ ve awˬ hkawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼoˆ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo huˉ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo hpaw taˍ ve li‸ hta‸ ca yuˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:9 Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve geh ngaˬ kʼai leh, Li‸ ehˉ oˇ ve ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ-oˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Yuˬ leh caˇ-oˆ. Nawˬ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˇ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, nawˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo pehˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ mehˬ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:10 Oˇ htaˇ, li‸ ehˉ oˇ ve hta‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo ngaˬ yuˬ leh caˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo pehˇ gʼuiˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ mehˬ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, li‸ oˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ caˇ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ ve gʼoˇ peˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo hkʼaˇ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation10:11 Oˇ htaˇ yawˇ hui ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Chaw ceuˬ laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇmiˬ laiˉ peˆ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ laiˉ gʼaˇ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, Gʼuiˬsha nawˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ tcuh ve hkʼe nawˬ gʼa kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, juˇ fuiˍ taˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve lo taˬ teˇ taˬ ngaˬ hta‸ pe‸ laˇ leh kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Tu loˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, tanˇ kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˇ kaˬ lo oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw hui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, tehˆ nyi-o." 
Revelation11:2 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo cawˬ ve vanˇ hta‸ teh taˉ sheˍ. Oˇ ve hta‸ taˇ tehˆ nyi. Awˬ lawn kʼo, vanˇ oˇ ve buiˇ shaˆ aˉ naˆ chaw hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve venˇ hta‸ awˇ chi nyiˇ ha pa hkʼa gaˬ naˆ tiˍ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation11:3 Ngaˬ ve shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ kanˇ paˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ meh htuˉ pui hpa hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, teˇ hinˉ nyiˇ ha hkaw‸ chi nyi hkʼa gaˬ Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:4 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo cawˬ taˍ ve shaˍlonˍ cehˬ nyiˇ cehˬ hpeh‸ leh, kawˆ faiˇ nyiˇ maˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:5 Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te gaˇ ve kʼo, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo aˬ miˍ tawˆ la leh, canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ to‸ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ naˬ tuˬ te gaˇ ve kʼo, oˇ hkʼe gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation11:6 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ maˍ chehˇ ve awˬ yanˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo, mvuhˇ yeˬ maˇ laˬ tuˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ hoˆ taˍ tuˬ ve kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ la piˇ lawˬ tuˬ ka‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hkʼaˬ nyiˇ pawˆ te gaˇ ve ka‸, fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ le le miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la piˇ tuˬ ve htawˇ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:7 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Bawˆ da‸ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ gʼaˇ leh tiˇ pehˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation11:8 Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ venˇ lonˉ ve ya‸ kʼaw hpuiˇ lo teh taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve Awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ la‸ ka hkʼoˆ lo hkanˍ suh kuiˬ venˇ hpeh‸ leh, tawˇ veˆ yehˇ kʼo, Sawˉdonˍ leh Eˇjiˇtu‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:9 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, shehˆ nyi teˇ sha gʼuˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve awˬ to hta‸ hpoˆ nyi tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ shu ca tuˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ hui tawˍ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation11:10 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ suh ve pa taw ha lehˬ jaˇ leh, ha lehˬ ha kʼa te tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui teˇ gʼaˇ leh teˇ gʼaˇ la‸ shawnˍ piˇ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve nyiˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nyi ma sho‸ sha‸ jaˇ tuˬ te piˇ peuˬ." 
Revelation11:11 Shehˆ nyi teˇ sha gʼuˇ ponˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve a sha‸ te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve awˬ shaˉ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e leh, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ tu huˉ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve chaw hui lehˬ, kawˆ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:12 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Choˬ kaˬ lo taˆ la-o teh‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ yawˇ huiˉ maˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ huiˉ maˬ ve canˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ moˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:13 Awˬ yanˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo miˬ hiˆ jaˇ leh, venˇ oˇ ve teˇ chi pun teˇ pun paˆ ce ve yoˬ. Miˬ hiˆ ve oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chaw suhˍ hinˉ gʼaˇ suh ve yoˬ. Cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ kawˆ jaˇ leh mvuhˇ naw ma ve Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:14 Dawˇ haˍ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve nyiˇ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ peuˬ ve yoˬ. Nyi loˬ, dawˇ haˍ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve shehˆ ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ haˆ haˆ gaˬ la tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation11:15 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve teˇ yanˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo bvuhˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Miˬguiˬ ve mvuhˇ miˬ lehˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha ve mvuhˇmiˬ leh yawˇ ve Hkri‸ ve mvuhˇ miˬ hpeh‸ la peuˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ co co taiˍ taiˍ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:16 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ a shu yawˇ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ mui chehˇ ve chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ nyiˇ chi awˇ gʼaˇ mehˆ hpfuhˇ miˬ chaˇ hkʼoˆ boˆ taˍ leh Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh kʼoˆ ve," 
Revelation11:17 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸, chi beu‸ ka‸ te‸ chehˇ taˍ ve, kanˇ paˆ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, nawˬ lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yuˬ leh chi beu‸ uˉ peunˍ ve pa taw, nawˬ ve bon hta‸ ngaˬ hui chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:18 Mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, nawˬ htawˇ nyi ma zuhˆ la peuˬ. Suh taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ yawˆ yan ve, uiˍ ve i ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ bon piˇ tuˬ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Miˬguiˬ hta‸ te luˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te luˬ piˇ tuˬ ka‸ awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation11:19 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo Gʼuiˬsha ve bon yehˬ lonˉ hpaw sheˬ leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ ve ka ti‸ shaˉ caˆ ta kʼoˍ htaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ ba ve, awˬ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ bvuhˬ ve, mvuhˇ tawˍ ve, miˬ hiˆ ve leh vaˇ shiˍ gʼaˇ hte‸ kʼa ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ heˆ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ nyi hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, ha pa hta‸ naˆ taˍ leh, meu‸ keu shiˍ teˇ chi nyiˇ shiˍ cawˬ ve shi uˉ tcuhˍ hta‸ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:2 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve yaˇ hu leh, yaˇ paw tuˬ naˬ jaˇ leh gʼa hkanˍ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:3 Mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu awˬ heˆ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Nyiˉ-ehˍ ve cawˇ shehˍ ma lonˉ teˇ hkeh tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ oˉ kʼoˍ suhˍ shiˍ cawˬ leh, awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shi uˉ tcuhˍ suhˍ shiˍ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:4 Yawˇ ve awˬ mehˍ tu lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo cawˬ ve meu‸ keu shiˍ shehˆ pun teˇ pun hta‸ shaw yuˬ leh, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. Yaˇ paw la paˇ neˇ ve yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ yaˇ paw la ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ, cawˇ shehˍ ma lehˬ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:5 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, yaˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ paˍ paw la ve yoˬ. Yaˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, sho juˇ fuiˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh mvuhˇmiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yaˇ miˇ ve yaˇ paˍ oˇ ve hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo leh Gʼuiˬsha ve kʼaw jaw lo chiˇ taˆ-e ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:6 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo hpaw-e ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo teˇ hinˉ nyiˇ ha hkaw‸ chi nyi hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ yawˇ awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:7 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ma‸ lonˉ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Miˆhkeˍlaˆ leh yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, cawˇ shehˍ ma oˇ ve hta‸ bawˆ da‸ ve yoˬ. Cawˇ shehˍ ma leh yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ yawˇ hui hta‸ kʼaw‸ bawˆ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, cawˇ shehˍ ma leh yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ gʼaˇ leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo yawˇ hui awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Revelation12:9 Oˇ htaˇ, Neˇhaiˬ leh Saˍtanˍ teh‸ meh ve cawˇ shehˍ ma lonˉ oˇ ve teˇ hkeh hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ heˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ leh aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ve vuiˬ haiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yuˬ baˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, yawˇ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ka‸ yawˇ geh teˇ geh yuˬ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:10 Mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ jaˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve, Chi beu‸ ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha ve htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ, kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ, uˉ peunˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh, yawˇ ve Hkri‸ ve aˉ yaˇ teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ngaˬ hui ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ venˇbaˆ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ yuˬ baˬ peuˬ." 
Revelation12:11 Yawˬ ehˉ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ pa taw maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇbaˆ taˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, suh htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hui a shu yawˇ ve a sha‸ hta‸ maˇ sheˉ lai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:12 Hkʼe te leh, mvuhˇ naw ma leh mvuhˇ naw ma yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Miˬguiˬ leh laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, neˇhaiˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve awˬ yanˇ a ciˉ ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ shiˍ ve pa taw, nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ nawˬ hui geh gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:13 Cawˇ shehˍ ma oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo yuˬ baˬ peuˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa mawˬ gʼa shiˍ ve teˇ yanˇ, yaˇ hawˉ hkʼaˆ paˍ paw la piˇ ve yaˇ miˇ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ tuˬ yawˇ gʼa‸ yuˬ chehˇ ve yoˬ" 
Revelation12:14 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, vuiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ gʼa ponˬ leh heh puiˉ hkʼaw lo poˬ kʼai hpeh‸ tuˬ, aˉ ceˬ lonˉ ve toˍ la‸ kʼuˉ nyiˇ maˬ hta‸ gʼa ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ yanˇ teˇ yanˇ, awˬ yanˇ nyiˇ yanˇ leh awˬ yanˇ teˇ hkoˇ yanˇ hkʼa gaˬ yawˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation12:15 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ iˉ kaˆ shi veu tuˬ, vuiˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo iˉ kaˆ lawˬ lonˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yaˇ miˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh iˉ kaˆ hpe‸ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:16 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, miˬguiˬ lehˬ yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve hta‸ ga piˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh, cawˇ shehˍ ma ve maw‸ kʼaw hkʼaw lo hpe‸ baˬ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ hehˆ dawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:17 Cawˇ shehˍ ma lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ hta‸ nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ leh, cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve yawˇ ve awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ma‸ ca bawˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ yaˇ awˬ duˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation12:18 Cawˇ shehˍ ma oˇ ve lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ pfuhˍ paˇ shehˇ shiˍ hkʼoˆ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:1 Oˇ htaˇ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hkeh tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ cawˬ leh oˉ kʼoˍ suhˍ shiˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shi uˉ tcuhˍ teˇ chi shiˍ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve awˬ meh teˇ hpaˍ, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:2 Ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, laˇ ku-i hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve hkui sheh lehˬ, yehˬ miˉ tawˍ hkui sheh hta‸ shuˍ leh, yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw lehˬ, laˇ caˬ shiˉ maw‸ kʼaw hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ. Cawˇ shehˍ ma lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ leh, yawˇ ve kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui tcuh leh uˉ peunˍ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:3 Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve oˉ kʼoˍ teˇ shiˍ lehˬ, suh law‸ law‸ dawˆ hkʼaw taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, naˬ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw oˇ ve kʼaw‸ na-e la leh, miˬ guiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve hta‸ anˇ jaˇ leh awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:4 Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ piˇ shehˍ hpaˇ cawˇ shehˍ ma hta‸ yawˇ hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh kʼoˆ ve, Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ chi hta‸ a shu shuˍ da‸ ve le. A shu yawˇ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ hpeh‸ tuˬ le teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:5 Yawˇ hta‸ tawˇ uiˍ tawˇ mvuh yaw tcuh leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tcuh ve yoˬ. Awˇ chi nyiˇ ha pa hkʼa gaˬ kanˉ te tuˬ, yawˇ hta‸ a hkaw-anˬ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:6 Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ tuˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw ngaˉ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve chehˇ kuiˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ naw ma yaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:7 Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hta‸ ma‸ bawˆ leh gʼaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ, yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le, chaw ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le leh mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ le le awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ htawˇ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:8 Miˬguiˬ hta‸ te hpanˍ htaˇ ka‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh maˇ bvuh‸ keu taˍ ve miˬguiˬ yaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ yoˬ. Li‸ oˇ ve lehˬ, tiˇ pehˍ peuˬ ve Yawˬ ehˉ ve li‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:9 Naˍ paw cawˬ ve chaw hkʼa deh‸ na-o. 
Revelation13:10 Shu hta‸ hpeh yuˬ ve chaw lehˬ, hpeh yuˬ ve hta‸ gʼa kʼaw‸ hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Aˉ htaw yuˬ leh shu hta‸ chaw pehˍ ve chaw lehˬ, aˉ htaw hta‸ pa taw gʼa suh tuˬ yoˬ. Chi hkʼe te ve hta‸ pa taw, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui hkʼaˬ ma nyi ma yeˬ puiˉ leh hkʼaˬ ma yonˍ puiˉ ve tawˆ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:11 Miˬguiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hkeh tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ yawˬ ehˉ ve awˬ hkaw hta‸ shuˍ ve awˬ hkaw nyiˇ maˬ cawˬ leh, cawˇ shehˍ ma tawˇ yaw ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ yawˇ tawˇ yaw ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:12 Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ chi teˇ hkeh lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ tawˆ la ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ teˇ hkeh ve kanˇ paˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yuˬ leh yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yehˇ ve yoˬ. Suh law‸ law‸ dawˆ hkʼaw taˍ ve naˬ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw na-e la peuˬ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkeh hta‸ miˬguiˬ leh miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw hui oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ nyiˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh te ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:13 Uiˍ ve awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ te maˍ ve yoˬ. Hkʼaˬ hkʼe le teh‸ kʼoˆ kʼo, mvuhˇ naw ma lo te leh miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa gaˬ, chaw yaˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ yawˇ aˬ miˍ hta‸ ce la tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:14 Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkeh mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ te maˍ tuˬ yawˇ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa taˍ ve hkʼe yawˇ te ve hta‸ pa taw, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ nyiˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼa chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˉ lawˉ teˇ hkeh lehˬ, aˉ htaw chaw ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ peuˬ htawˇ te‸ chehˇ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ te tuˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ nyiˇ hkeh teˇ hkeh kʼoˆ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:15 Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve shaˉ ho‸ tawˇ yaw puiˉ tuˬ, shaˉ ho‸ oˇ ve hta‸ te‸ la piˇ hpeh‸ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa ve yoˬ. Shaˉ ho‸ oˇ ve hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ pui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ tiˇ pehˍ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:16 Chaw uiˍ chaw i maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw paw chaw sha maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw haˍ chaw gʼawˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, ponˬ ve chaw maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve la‸ sha paˉ la‸ sheh hta‸ maˇ heˆ kʼo naˍ kʼaˍ pui hta‸ maiˉ taˍ tuˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve teˇ hkeh hkanˍ yuˬ tcuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:17 Awˬ maiˉ maˇ cawˬ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸, mawˇ maˇ gʼa vuiˬ maˇ gʼa hawˇ tuˬ yawˇ te ve yoˬ. Awˬ maiˉ oˇ ve lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve awˬ meh, maˇ heˆ kʼo yawˇ awˬ meh ve nanˍ ba‸ hta‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation13:18 Chi awˬ hkʼaw lo cuˇ yiˍ gʼa hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Dawˇ shiˍ puiˉ ve chaw lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve nanˍ ba‸ hta‸ gʼaw nyi shawˍ nyi tcuh-o. Yawˇ ve nanˍ ba‸ lehˬ, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ve nanˍ ba‸ hpeh‸ leh, nanˍ ba‸ oˇ ve hkaw‸ ha hkaw‸ chi hkaw‸ yoˬ." 
Revelation14:1 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, Ziˉonˍ hkʼaw hkʼoˆ lo Yawˬ ehˉ huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˬ ehˉ ve awˬ meh leh yawˇ Awˬ pa ve awˬ meh a shu yawˇ ve naˍ kʼaˍ pui hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve chaw teˇ shehnˉ awˇ meunˍ awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:2 Iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ baˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ leh, hehnˇ jaˇ ve mvuhˇ tawˍ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ lehˬ, tinˍ hteˆ shehˍ hpaˇ teˇ hpaˍ a shu yawˇ ve tinˍ hteˆ chehˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:3 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, kʼaw jaw awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh leh chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ kʼa chehˇ ve yoˬ. Miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ taˍ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ shehnˉ awˇ meunˍ awˇ hinˉ gʼaˇ maˇ heˆ kʼo, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ awˬ suhˉ oˇ ve hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ kʼa maˇ gʼa taˬ." 
Revelation14:4 Chaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ teˇ hpaˍ geh cha‸ chiˆ tuˬ maˇ te ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hui lehˬ da‸ kehˬ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, Yawˬ ehˉ hkʼa kʼai kuiˬ teˇ kaˬ le le lo awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve chaw hui hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha leh Yawˬ ehˉ awˬ pon awˉ lawˉ naw‸ ve iˉ shiˍ hpeh‸ la tuˬ, chaw yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui hta‸ vuiˬ hkʼaw‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:5 Yawˇ hui ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo heˍ ve a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui hta‸ venˇbaˆ taˍ tuˬ ka‸ maˇ cawˬ. 
Revelation14:6 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ kʼaw ji lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ poˬ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ peˆ le le hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, chaw ceuˬ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, co co taiˍ taiˍ yeˬ ve ha lehˬ ve bon hkawˇ maˍ piˇ tuˬ yawˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:7 Yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ kawˆ leh yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ suhˉ jehˬ tuˬ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma miˬ naˆ ma hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ leh iˉ kaˆ tawˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, te hpanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:8 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ teˇ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ meh uiˍ ve Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ lehˬ paiˍ peuˬ, paiˍ peuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ taw piˇ ve hkʼe, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve awˬ taw‸ ma yuˬ leh mvuhˇ miˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ taw piˇ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:9 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ huiˉ maˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh laˬ leh awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, a shu yawˇ ve naˍ kʼaˍ pui hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maiˉ taˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve kʼo," 
Revelation14:10 a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ve hkʼe, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ yawˇ gʼa dawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ te‸ chiˉ maˇ hkaw‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve kawˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngeuˍ keu taˍ ve yoˬ. Da‸ kehˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yawˬ ehˉ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ leh ma‸ shiˉ hta‸ yehˇ leh, chaw oˇ ve hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh ciˍ yanˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation14:11 Yawˇ hui hta‸ ciˍ yanˍ piˇ ve teˇ yanˇ, tawˆ la chehˇ ve aˬ miˍ mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ taˆ-e chehˇ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, yawˇ ve awˬ meh maiˉ taˍ ve hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ gʼaˇ gʼa jehˇ kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:12 Gʼuiˬsha piˇ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ leh Yeˍsuˆ hta‸ yonˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve Hkri‸ yaˇ hui lehˬ, nyi ma yeˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ tuˬ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:13 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve, Chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ-o‸. Ya‸ nyi hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo suh ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha hpu htawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Cawˇ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui te taˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ kanˉ te hkeu‸ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ponˬ peuˬ leh, yawˇ hui gʼaˇ gʼa jehˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:14 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ nyi leh hpuˉ-ehˍ ve moˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Moˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ chaw yaˇ ve yaˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ mui taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, shi uˉ tcuhˍ hkʼawˆ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuhˆ jaˇ ve law‸ kʼawˉ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:15 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, moˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo mui taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo caˬ meh jaˇ peuˬ. Caˬ gʼeu‸ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ peuˬ ve pa taw, law‸ kʼawˉ hta‸ yuˬ leh caˬ gʼeu‸-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:16 Oˇ htaˇ, moˬ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ mui taˍ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve law‸ kʼawˉ yuˬ leh, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ ve caˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼuˉ yuˬ leh gʼeu‸ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:17 Awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ ve bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ htawˇ, tcuhˆ jaˇ ve law‸ kʼawˉ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:18 Peuˬ leh, aˬ miˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, tcuhˆ ve law‸ kʼawˉ cawˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ ve tcuhˆ ve law‸ kʼawˉ hta‸ yuˬ leh, miˬguiˬ ve a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ awˬ kʼoˍ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼeu‸-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ meh la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:19 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve law‸ kʼawˉ yuˬ leh miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ ve a pehˉ meuˇ shiˍ awˬ kʼoˍ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ kʼuˉ yuˬ leh shaw yuˬ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ nyiˉ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ nyiˉ kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation14:20 A pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ nyiˉ kuiˬ oˇ ve hta‸ venˇ awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo naˆ leh, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ nyiˉ kuiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ suhˍ tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Awˬ suhˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, teˇ hinˉ hkaw‸ ha hpaˍlonˍ kʼa gaˬ iˉ mvuhˇ maw‸ kʼaw caˆ hkʼe mvuh naˉ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo anˇ tuˬ uiˍ jaˇ ve awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve awˬ heˆ teˇ maˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ heˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, fawˉ mehˍ ve suhˍ ceuˬ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Fawˉ mehˍ ve oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ peu-eˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:2 Peuˬ leh, aˬ miˍ leh mehˆ gʼeuˆ hkaw‸ da‸ taˍ ve gʼuiˬ po hta‸ shuˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ leh yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ awˬ meh ve nanˍ ba‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, gʼaˇ peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve la‸ sheh hkʼaw Gʼuiˬsha ve tinˍ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ leh, mehˆ gʼeuˆ gʼuiˬ po awˬ paˇ lo huˉ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:3 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ Moˉseˍ ve kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ leh Yawˬ ehˉ ve kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ hta‸ kʼa muiˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, nawˬ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ uiˍ jaˇ da‸ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ve Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ-oˬ, nawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hteˇ jaˇ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:4 Jawˇmawˇ-oˬ, nawˬ hta‸ maˇ kawˆ leh nawˬ ve awˬ meh hta‸ maˇ chiˇ uiˍ maˇ chiˇ mvuh ve, a shu cawˬ le. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ teˇ gʼaˇ ceh tiˉ da‸ kehˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ nawˬ geh laˬ leh nawˬ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hteˇ lehˍ cawˇ lehˍ te ve teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa tawˍ lehˆ tawˆ la peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:5 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ ngaˬ nyi leh, shaˉ hkiˆ hpeh‸ ve aˉ po kʼo bon yehˬ lonˉ mvuhˇ naw ma lo hpaw taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:6 Fawˉ mehˍ ve suhˍ ceuˬ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ lehˬ, bon yehˬ lonˉ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve kehˬ da‸ jaˇ ve hpa hpu hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, a shu yawˇ ve nyi ma pui hta‸ shi haˍ pi caˆ tsuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:7 A sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ hkeh lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ shi mu‸ hkʼu suhˍ shiˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Shi mu‸ hkʼu oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo, co co taiˍ taiˍ te‸ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬ sha ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation15:8 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ leh yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ hta‸ pa taw, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve suhˍ ceuˬ maˇ peuˬ ve ceh ceh, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo lo‸-e maˇ hpeh‸." 
Revelation16:1 Peuˬ leh, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuhˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Nawˬ hui kʼai leh, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma zuhˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ cawˬ ve mu‸ hkʼu suhˍ shiˍ hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngeuˍ baˬ-o‸ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:2 Oˇ htaˇ, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ kʼai leh, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngeuˍ baˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve awˬ maiˉ hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ taˍ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ho‸ awˬ han hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo cha‸ chiˆ leh naˬ jaˇ ve pawˆ lawˆ kʼuˉ teˇ hpaˍ cawˬ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:3 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ nyiˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngeuˍ baˬ ve yoˬ. Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ lehˬ, chaw suh ve awˬ suhˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ la leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ suh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:4 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ shehˆ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ iˉ kaˆ lawˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh iˉ kaˆ tawˆ kuiˬ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo ngeuˍ baˬ leh, iˉ kaˆ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ suhˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:5 Oˇ htaˇ, iˉ kaˆ hpawˇ hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ ka‸ chi beu‸ ka‸ te‸ chehˇ taˍ ve Da‸ kehˬ shehˍ hpaˇ-oˬ, nawˬ chi hkʼe suhˉ jehˬ ve lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:6 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui ve awˬ suhˍ leh nawˬ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui yuˬ sheˆ ve pa taw, nawˬ yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ suhˍ kʼaw‸ dawˬ tcuh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui chi hkʼe gʼa hkanˍ ve lehˬ cawˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:7 Tanˇ kuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha-oˬ, cawˇ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hteˇ jaˇ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:8 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ awˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ mvuhˇ nyi awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngeuˍ baˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ mvuhˇ nyi lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ aˬ miˍ chiˆ piˇ tuˬ kanˇ paˆ gʼa ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:9 Haw jaˇ chiˆ jaˇ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, chaw yaˇ hui hta‸ hkeu‸ kʼai piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Fawˉ mehˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ cawˬ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ meh hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui venˇbaˆ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ leh, Gʼuiˬ sha hta‸ maˇ chiˇ uiˍ maˇ chiˇ mvuh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:10 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ngaˇ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve kʼaw jaw awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngeuˍ baˬ leh, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve mvuhˇmiˬ naˆ ho‸ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇmiˬ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, naˬ jaˇ ve pa taw, a shu yawˇ ve ha tehˍ hta‸ geu‸ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:11 Naˬ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, pawˆ lawˆ kʼuˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui gʼa hkanˍ ve pa taw mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ yawˇ hui maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui te ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ maˇ dawˇ hpfuhˆ." 
Revelation16:12 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hkaw‸ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ Uˇhpaˍraˆ gʼuiˬ ma lonˉ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo ngeuˍ baˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo chehˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon ya‸ kʼaw gu taˍ tuˬ, iˉ kaˆ lawˬ oˇ ve fiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:13 Oˇ htaˇ, cawˇ shehˍ ma ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼoˆ, cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ha sheh lehˇ tawˆ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ha oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, paˍ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:14 Yawˇ hui teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te maˍ chehˇ ve neˇhaiˬ ve awˬ ha teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ nyi uiˍ ve teˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo ma‸ bawˆ tuˬ awˬ pon, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ teˇ kaˬ le le lo chehˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ lawˬ tuˬ, awˬ ha oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:15 (Nyi loˬ, chaw hkʼawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ laˬ ve yoˬ. A shu yawˇ awˬ to awˬ kʼu nyi maˇ gʼa kʼai leh shu mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ maˇ gʼa ya‸ taw tuˬ, nawˇ chehˇ taˍ leh a shu yawˇ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ ha‸ shaˉ chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ.)" 
Revelation16:16 Awˬ ha oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Aˍmaˍgeˍdonˍ meh ve chehˇ kuiˬ lo hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ lawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh oˇ ve lehˬ, Heˍbrehˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:17 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, yawˇ ve mu‸ hkʼu hta‸ mvuhˇ haw awˬ hkʼaw lo ngeuˍ baˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, bon yehˬ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw, kʼaw jaw lo bvuhˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la leh, Peuˬ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:18 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ tiˉ po-e‸ ba ve, awˬ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ bvuhˬ ve, mvuhˇ tawˍ ve leh miˬ hiˆ jaˇ ve, chi teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo chaw yaˇ tanˬ cawˬ la ve teˇ nyi hta‸ tanˬ leh, chi taw taw miˬ hiˆ jaˇ ve teˇ pawˆ ka‸ maˇ hpeh‸ la jaw." 
Revelation16:19 Venˇ lonˉ lehˬ, hkoˇ kʼai leh, shehˆ hkoˇ hpeh‸ la ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve venˇ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ paˆ-e ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, hehnˇ ja ve nyi ma zuhˆ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ keu taˍ ve kawˆ Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ hta‸ taw piˇ tuˬ, venˇ oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:20 Conˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ mehˉ kʼai leh, hkʼaw pui teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation16:21 Shehˆ chi cawehˬ cawˬ ve vaˇ shiˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ mvuhˇ naw ma lo te leh chaw yaˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ ce la ve yoˬ. Vaˇ shiˍ fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ pa taw chaw yaˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, fawˉ mehˍ ve oˇ ve lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ hehnˇ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:1 Oˇ htaˇ, mu‸ hkʼu suhˍ shiˍ cawˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Laˬ-o‸. Iˉ kaˆ maˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ mui chehˇ ve meh maˬ lanˉ lonˉ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:2 Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ geh haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te peuˬ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ bvuhˆ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ve haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ dawˬ bvuhˆ peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:3 Oˇ htaˇ, Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve ngaˬ hta‸ heh puiˉ hkʼaw shiˍ kʼai ve yoˬ. Nyiˉ-ehˍ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˬ hkʼoˆ lo yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mui chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, oˉ kʼoˍ suhˍ shiˍ leh awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ cawˬ leh, Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ maˇ shawˍ maˇ caˆ kʼoˆ ve awˬ meh teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:4 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve leh nyiˉ-ehˍ ve veu‸ kʼaˇ hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, shi, haˉ pui shehnˉ leh piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ teˇ hpaˍ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve hta‸ caˉ da‸ ve maˇ da‸ maˇ kehˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh, cha‸ naˬ tuˬ te ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ taˍ ve shi kawˆ hta‸ yawˇ vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:5 Yawˇ ve naˍ kʼaˍ pui hta‸ tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ jaˇ ve awˬ meh chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Uiˍ ve Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ lehˬ, meh maˬ lanˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ e leh miˬguiˬ ve cha‸ chiˆ ve teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ e hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:6 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ hui ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ paˍ hui ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, dawˬ bvuhˆ gʼuˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ yawˇ hta‸ mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, maˇ maˇ anˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:7 Oˇ htaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Aˬ hto‸ ma te nawˬ anˇ ve le. Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ suhˍ shiˍ leh awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ cawˬ ve yawˇ hta‸ pfuhˇ kʼai ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ awˬ lawn maˇ kʼoˆ, tcuhˉ kuiˬ naˉ ve teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ kʼaoˍ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:8 Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ lehˬ, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ cawˬ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ maˇ maw maw kʼo, leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la leh, luˬ kuiˬ sheˆ kuiˬ lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ. Mvuhˇ kawˍ miˬ ya‸ htaˇ ka‸ co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh maˇ bvuh‸ keu taˍ ve miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, anˇ jaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, ponˬ laˬ htaˇ yawˇ cawˬ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ maˇ cawˬ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼaw‸ cawˬ la tuˬ ve hta‸ pa taw yoˬ." 
Revelation17:9 Awˬ lawn chi hta‸ shiˍ tuˬ cuˇ yiˍ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve nyi ma hta‸ loˍ ve yoˬ. Oˉ kʼoˍ oˇ ve suhˍ shiˍ lehˬ, yaˇ miˇ mui taˍ ve hkʼaw suhˍ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:10 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ htawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ngaˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, ce kʼai peuˬ. Chi beu‸ teˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ sheˍ ve yoˬ. Teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, maˇ gaˬ la sheˍ. Yawˇ gaˬ la ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ hkui ceh tiˉ gʼa chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:11 Ponˬ laˬ htaˇ cawˬ ve ka‸, chi beu‸ maˇ cawˬ ve haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ lehˬ, hiˉ gʼaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, suhˍ gʼaˇ hta‸ yawˇ caˉ da‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, luˬ kuiˬ sheˆ kuiˬ lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:12 Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ lehˬ, mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ maˇ gʼa uˉ peunˍ sheˍ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ chi gʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ hui lehˬ haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ geh teˇ geh hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ ve aˉ yaˇ hta‸ teˇ naˍ riˍ hkʼa gaˬ gʼa tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:13 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ leh, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve kanˇ paˆ leh a shu yawˇ ve aˉ yaˇ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:14 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Yawˬ ehˉ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ tuˬ yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, Yawˬ ehˉ yawˇ hui hta‸ gʼaˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ lehˬ jawˇ mawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Jawˇmawˇ hpeh‸ leh, hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ geh teˇ geh chehˇ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, kuˬ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw, leuˆ yuˬ taˍ ve chaw leh, ka ti‸ yeˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:15 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ oˇ ve ngaˬ hta‸ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve meh maˬ lanˉ mui chehˇ ve iˉ kaˆ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ, mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ leh, tawˇ hkawˇ laiˉ ceuˬ yaw ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:16 Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve awˬ hkaw teˇ chi maˬ leh haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ lehˬ, meh maˬ lanˉ hta‸ canˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ hta‸ gawˬ cu gawˬ pehˆ hpeh‸ piˇ lawˬ leh, awˬ kʼu nyi te piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ yawˇ hui caˇ leh, yawˇ hta‸ aˬ miˍ tuˉ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation17:17 Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha nyi ma cawˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui te tuˬ, yawˇ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬ sha ve tawˇ hkawˇ biˇ la htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ, yawˇ hui lehˬ nyi ma teˇ shiˍ tiˉ taˍ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve aˉ yaˇ chiˇ a‸ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬ sha chi hkʼe dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation17:18 Nawˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yaˇ miˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, miˬ guiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve venˇ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, uiˍ ve kanˇ paˆ cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ pa taw, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba chehˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:2 Yawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh gʼaˇ hte‸ kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ meh uiˍ ve Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ lehˬ paiˍ peuˬ, paiˍ peuˬ. Chehˇ kuiˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, neˇhaiˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve chehˇ kuiˬ leh cha‸ chiˆ ve awˬ ha teˇ ceuˬ le le ve va‸ taˍ kuiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Cha‸ chiˆ leh shu cha‸ naˬ ve ngaˆ teˇ ceuˬ le le ve va‸ taˍ kuiˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:3 Awˬ lawn kʼo, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ dawˬ ve hkʼe, yawˇ ve haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ dawˬ leh paiˍ peuˬ. Miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ geh haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te peuˬ leh, miˬguiˬ ve tanˇ kaˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, yawˇ paw sha jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo, yawˇ hui htawˇ paw sha la peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:4 Mvuhˇ naw ma lo awˬ kaˍ awˬ nu ve awˬ hkawˇ chi hkʼe kʼoˆ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve, Ngaˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ nawˬ hui maˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la-o." 
Revelation18:5 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve venˇbaˆ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ mvuhˇ naw ma hta‸ daw‸ htaˇ hkʼa gaˬ maˇ jaˇ leh, yawˇ ve maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha dawˇ nawˇ chehˇ ve yoˬ."
