Revelation18:6 Yawˇ shu hta‸ te piˇ ve hkʼe yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ-oˆ. Yawˇ kanˉ te taˍ ve hkʼe, yawˇ hta‸ nyiˇ pun kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ-oˆ. Kawˆ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hkaw‸ da‸ taˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ nyiˇ pun hkaw‸ da‸ leh yawˇ hta‸ taw piˇ-oˆ." 
Revelation18:7 Yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ yawˇ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh leh, paw sha jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ha kʼa te peuˬ ve hkʼe taw, yawˇ hta‸ fawˉ mehˍ leh dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ gaˬ la piˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ ve nyi ma awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Ngaˬ lehˬ nanˇ hawˉ hkanˇ ma te leh mui chehˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ mehˇchawˇma maˇ heˆ. Dawˇ haˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ hta‸ ngaˬ a ciˉ ka‸ gʼa hpuˇ tuˬ maˇ heˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:8 Hkʼe te leh, teˇ nyi tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ, paˆ hawˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ leh meu‸ ve kaˆ ve teˇ ceuˬ, fawˉ mehˍ ve chi teˇ hpaˍ gaˬ la leh, aˬ miˍ to‸ baˬ ve hta‸ yawˇ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:9 Venˇ oˇ ve geh haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te leh, paw sha jaˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo ha lehˬ ha kʼa te peuˬ ve miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve to‸ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ pon yawˇ hui kuˬ hawˬ paˆ hawˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation18:10 Venˇ oˇ ve gʼa hkanˍ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ yawˇ hui kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui vuiˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ meh uiˍ leh kanˇ paˆ uiˍ ve Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ-oˬ, nawˬ gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Teˇ naˍ riˍ tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo nawˬ hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ gaˬ la peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation18:11 Miˬguiˬ ve tanˇ kaˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ pon kuˬ hawˬ paˆ hawˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, shu yawˇ hui ve mawˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ vuiˬ." 
Revelation18:12 Mawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hpu, shi, haˉ pui shehnˉ, piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ, da‸ jaˇ ve hpa hpu, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve hpa, pfuhˇ hpa, nyiˉ-ehˍ ve hpa, hawnˉ ve suhˆ teˇ ceuˬ le le, haw ciˬ te taˍ ve mawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve suhˆ te taˍ ve mawˇ teˇ ceuˬ le le, kuiˇ te taˍ ve mawˇ, sho te taˍ ve mawˇ, haˉ pui hpu te taˍ ve mawˇ," 
Revelation18:13 kʼaw hpeh, hkʼeu hawnˉ, awˬ shaˉ hawnˉ ve awˬ meu-e, naˍ manˇ hawnˉ, lawˇbanˍ, a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ, naˍ manˇ, meu da‸ ve hkaoˍmonˇ meu-e, caˬ shiˍ, nuˇ, yawˬ, iˉ mvuhˇ, iˉ mvuhˇ lawˬ, awˬ ceˬ leh, chaw yaˇ ve co ha, chi teˇ hpaˍ yoˬ." 
Revelation18:14 Nawˬ ve nyi ma sheˉ lai jaˇ ve iˉ shiˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai peuˬ. Mehˬ jaˇ ve caˇ tuˬ leh da‸ jaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ luˬ kʼai peuˬ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ teˇ pawˆ ka‸ nawˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa mawˬ." 
Revelation18:15 Mawˇ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hawˇ ve vuiˬ ve leh venˇ oˇ ve hta‸ pa taw paw sha la ve tanˇ kaˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve gʼa hkanˍ ve tu‸ ve hkanˍ ve hta‸ kawˆ jaˇ ve pa taw, yawˇ hui vuiˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kuˬ hawˬ paˆ hawˬ leh chi hkʼe kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation18:16 Da‸ jaˇ ve hpa hpu, nyi naˆ meuˉ lehˍ ve hpa leh nyiˉ-ehˍ ve hpa hta‸ veu‸ deh leh, shi, haˉ pui shehnˉ leh piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve awˬ meh uiˍ ve venˇ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:17 Chi taw taw maˇ jaˇ ve mawˇ jeˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ teˇ naˍ riˍ ceh tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo luˬ kʼai peuˬ law leˇ, teh‸ kʼoˆ tuˬ yoˬ. Haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hoˉ hkʼa peu-eˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ hta‸ ciˇ leh kʼai kʼai laˬ laˬ te ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ, haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo kanˉ te ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ hpawˇ tanˇ kaˬ te ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, vuiˇ kuiˬ lo huˉ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:18 Venˇ oˇ ve to‸ chehˇ ve mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ hta‸ yawˇ hui gʼa mawˬ ve teˇ yanˇ, Awˬ meh uiˍ ve venˇ chi teˇ venˇ hta‸ shuˍ ve, hkʼaˬ ve teˇ venˇ cawˬ le teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:19 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, a shu yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ je‸ meu-e hkaˆ pfuhˍ leh kuˬ hawˬ paˆ hawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kuˬ leh kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ meh uiˍ ve venˇ lehˬ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ, gʼa dawˇ haˍ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mawˇ jeˬ cawˬ maˇ jaˇ ve pa taw, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw ve haw lo‸ kʼoˍ awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hkʼa peu-eˬ paw sha la ve yoˬ. Teˇ naˍ riˍ ceh tiˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo venˇ oˇ ve luˬ kʼai peuˬ law leˇ." 
Revelation18:20 Mvuhˇ naw ma leh da‸ kehˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ, tcuh yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ-oˬ, venˇ oˇ ve luˬ kʼai peuˬ ve pa taw ha lehˬ chehˇ-oˆ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ hui awˬ pon kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ tuˬ, Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ venˇ oˇ ve hta‸ suhˉ taˆ peuˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation18:21 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, haˉ pui mawˍ lonˉ hta‸ shuˍ ve haˉ pui shiˍ hta‸ chiˇ leh, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu leh kʼoˆ ve, Chi hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ meh uiˍ ve Baˍbuˍlonˍ venˇ hta‸ hehnˇ chaweh chiˇ baˬ leh, awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ venˇ oˇ ve hta‸ maˇ kʼaw‸ mawˬ." 
Revelation18:22 Tinˍ hteˆ ve chaw, kʼa muiˬ hkawˇ kʼa ve chaw, lehˉ lu meuˆ ve chaw leh behˬ heh ma meuˆ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ te ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa kaˇ. La‸ meuˇ te puiˉ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Haˉ pui mawˍ geuˆ ve awˬ hkawˇ htawˇ, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa kaˇ." 
Revelation18:23 Kawˆ faiˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ htawˇ nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa ba. La‸ kʼawˍ toˆ ve chaw haˉ yaˇ miˇ haˉ ve awˬ hkawˇ htawˇ, nawˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo maˇ kʼaw‸ gʼa kaˇ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, nawˬ ve tanˇ kaˬ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ ve chaw uiˍ chaw mvuh teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ neˇ te ve hta‸ pa taw, chaw ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ ya‸ kʼai peuˬ." 
Revelation18:24 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve awˬ suhˍ, da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hui ve awˬ suhˍ leh, miˬ guiˬ hkʼoˆ lo tiˇ pehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ, teh‸ mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:1 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ ve awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ jaˇ ve hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ la ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Haˍleˍluˇyaˬ. Htaiˍ hkʼaw‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ, awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ leh, kanˇ paˆ teˇ ceuˬ ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha geh ceh tiˉ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:2 Awˬ lawn kʼo, yawˇ suhˉ jehˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hteˇ jaˇ cawˇ jaˇ ve yoˬ. Meh maˬ lanˉ lonˉ haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve pa taw, miˬguiˬ yaˇ hui luˬ kʼai ve yoˬ. Hkʼe te leh, Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ suhˉ taˆ leh, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ suhˍ hta‸ yuˬ sheˆ ve awˬ pon yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ te hkʼaw‸ piˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:3 Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Haˍleˍluˇyaˬ, venˇ oˇ ve aˬ miˍ mvuhˇ hkʼawˇ lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ taˆ-e chehˇ ve yoˬ, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:4 Oˇ htaˇ, chaw mawˇ chaw kehˉ nyiˇ chi awˇ gʼaˇ leh a sha‸ te‸ chehˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ awˇ hkeh lehˬ, boˆ sheˬ leh, kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui chehˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui leh, A menˬ, haˍleˍluˇyaˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:5 Kʼaw jaw lo awˬ hkawˇ tawˆ la leh kʼoˆ ve, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve, yawˇ hta‸ yawˆ yan ve chaw uiˍ chaw i hkʼa peu-eˬ-oˬ, ngaˬ hui ve Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ chiˇ mvuh-o, teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:6 Peuˬ leh, chaw awˬ moˍ lonˉ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ, iˉ kaˆ gʼuiˬ baˇ maˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ leh, mvuhˇ tawˍ hehnˇ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Haˍleˍluˇyaˬ. Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve ngaˬ hui ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:7 Ngaˬ hui gʼaˇ hte‸ ha lehˬ ha kʼa te-a veuˬ. Ngaˬ hui yawˇ hta‸ chiˇ uiˍ chiˇ mvuh piˇ-a veuˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yawˬ ehˉ la‸ kʼawˍ toˆ ve awˬ yanˇ gaˬ la peuˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ heuˆ tuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ to hta‸ gu taˍ peuˬ." 
Revelation19:8 Yaˇ miˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve kehˬ da‸ jaˇ ve hpa hpu hta‸ veu‸ deh tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa ve yoˬ. Hpa hpu oˇ ve lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ te taˍ ve hteˇ ve cawˇ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ, teh‸ awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve kuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:9 Peuˬ leh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Chi hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ-o‸. Yawˬ ehˉ ve hkehˉ caˇ kuiˬ lo kʼai tuˬ kuˬ taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Peuˬ leh, Tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ tehˬ awˬ na Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:10 Oˇ htaˇ, yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ, yawˇ ve hkui sheh awˬ paˇ lo ngaˬ boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Chi hkʼe taˇ te. Nawˬ leh Yeˍsuˆ awˬ pon shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi teˇ hpaˍ geh ngaˬ awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui-o. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Yeˍsuˆ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve teˇ ceuˬ lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui hta‸ dawˇ pawnˍ piˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:11 Oˇ htaˇ ngaˬ nyi leh, mvuhˇ naw ma hpaw taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Hpuˉ-ehˍ ve iˉ mvuhˇ teˇ hkeh cawˬ leh, ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, Ka ti‸ yeˬ leh Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ shehˍ hpaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ suhˉ jehˬ leh ma‸ bawˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:12 Yawˇ ve mehˆ shiˍ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ ha hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ve oˉ kʼoˍ hta‸ shi uˉ tcuhˍ maˇ maˇ hkʼawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hta‸ awˬ meh teˇ maˬ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˬ meh oˇ ve hta‸ yawˇ awˬ to maˇ heˆ kʼo, chaw teˇ gʼaˇ ka‸ maˇ shiˍ." 
Revelation19:13 Awˬ suhˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo tuˍ taˍ peuˬ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ yawˇ veu‸ deh ve yoˬ. Yawˇ ve awˬ meh lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:14 Mvuhˇ naw ma ve ma‸ moˍ ma‸ cuˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve iˉ mvuhˇ hta‸ ciˇ leh yawˇ awˬ hkʼaˇ suh kʼai ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve leh da‸ kehˬ ve hpa hpu hta‸ veu‸ deh ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:15 Mvuhˇmiˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw tuˬ, yawˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tcuhˆ ve aˉ htaw tawˆ la ve yoˬ. Yawˇ lehˬ, sho juˇ fuiˍ hta‸ yehˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve nyi ma zuhˆ jaˇ ve a pehˉ meuˇ gʼuiˬ nyiˉ kuiˬ hta‸ yawˇ naˆ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation19:16 Yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma leh yawˇ ve pfuhˬ teh hta‸ awˬ meh chi hkʼe bvuh‸ taˍ ve, Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ leh, jawˇmawˇ awˬ hkʼoˆ Jawˇmawˇ teh‸ bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:17 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ nyi awˬ hkʼaw lo huˉ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ kʼaw ji lo poˬ chehˇ ve ngaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ yawˇ awˬ hkawˇ bvuhˬ chaweh kuˬ leh kʼoˆ piˇ ve, Laˬ-o‸, Gʼuiˬsha ve hti caˇ hti dawˬ ve pawehˇ lonˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpawnˬ la-o." 
Revelation19:18 Hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ shaˍ, ma‸ poˍ lonˉ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ shaˍ, awˬ gʼaˇ uiˍ ve chaw hui ve awˬ shaˍ, iˉ mvuhˇ leh ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ hui ve awˬ shaˍ, vuiˬ taˍ ve awˬ ceˬ hui ve awˬ shaˍ, ponˬ ve chaw hui ve awˬ shaˍ, uiˍ ve i ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ caˇ la-o teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:19 Oˇ htaˇ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ maˇ kʼoˆ, miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ leh yawˇ hui ve ma‸ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ maˇ kʼoˆ, iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ ve teˇ gʼaˇ leh yawˇ ve ma‸ moˍ hta‸ bawˆ da‸ tuˬ, yawˇ hui hpawnˬ da‸ chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:20 Oˇ htaˇ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ hpeh yuˬ leh, maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hta‸ htawˇ yawˇ geh teˇ geh hpeh yuˬ ve yoˬ. Maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ oˇ ve lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ ve yinˉ hta‸ hkanˍ yuˬ leh yawˇ ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ awˬ heˆ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ te maˍ piˇ paˍ teˇ gʼaˇ yoˬ. Aˬ miˍ to‸ chehˇ ve ma‸ shiˉ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ huiˉ maˬ hta‸ awˬ te‸ te‸ baˬ keu ve yoˬ." 
Revelation19:21 Iˉ mvuhˇ ciˇ shehˍ hpaˇ ve maw‸ kʼaw awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve aˉ htaw lehˬ, cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw pehˍ ve yoˬ. Ngaˆ hkʼa peu-eˬ yawˇ hui ve awˬ shaˍ hta‸ hkʼa bvuhˆ caˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:1 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ mvuhˇ naw ma lo ya‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ ve shawˇ leh sho caˆ lonˉ hta‸ yawˇ ve la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼaw lo vawˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:2 Neˇhaiˬ leh Saˍtanˍ hpeh‸ ve cawˇ shehˍ ma hta‸ yawˇ hpeh yuˬ leh, teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ hpeh tiˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Cawˇ shehˍ ma oˇ ve lehˬ, aˬ sho-eˬ htaˇ ve vuiˬ haiˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:3 Teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ maˇ peuˬ ve ceh ceh, chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ yawˇ maˇ gʼa heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ tuˬ, leh kuiˬ maˇ cawˬ ve miˬ kʼoˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hta‸ baˬ keu sheˬ leh, hoˆ taˍ leh yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve yoˬ. Teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, yawˇ hta‸ teˇ hkui ceh gʼa hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation20:4 Oˇ htaˇ, kʼaw jaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Kʼaw jaw oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ mui chehˇ ve chaw hui lehˬ, suhˉ jehˬ suhˉ taˆ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa taˍ ve yoˬ. Yeˍsuˆ leh Gʼuiˬsha ve tawˇ hkawˇ awˬ lawn shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ ve hta‸ pa taw, oˉ kʼoˍ tawˆ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve chaw hui ve co ha teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ htawˇ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ ve shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, oˉ kʼoˍ maˇ pui leh, yawˇ ve yinˉ tcuhˉ taˍ ve hta‸ a shu yawˇ ve naˍ kʼaˍ pui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, la‸ sheh awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, maˇ hkanˍ yuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui kʼaw‸ te‸ la leh, Hkri‸ geh teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa ga uˉ peunˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:5 Cawˬ taˍ sheˍ ve suh taˍ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ maˇ peuˬ ve ceh ceh maˇ gʼa kʼaw‸ te‸ la. Chi lehˬ, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:6 Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve kʼaw‸ te‸ tu la ve teˇ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa chehˇ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ leh da‸ kehˬ ve chaw hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ kanˇ paˆ maˇ cawˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha leh Hkri‸ ve paw hkuˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpeh‸ leh, Hkri‸ geh teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ hkʼa gaˬ uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation20:7 Teˇ hinˉ hkʼaw‸ peuˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, Saˍtanˍ hta‸ htawnˍ awˬ hkʼaw lo hpehˇ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation20:8 Miˬguiˬ awˇ ceˍ awˍ hpawˇ lo chehˇ ve chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ leh ma‸ bawˆ tuˬ awˬ pon hpawnˬ da‸ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ tawˆ kʼai ve yoˬ. Chaw ceuˬ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, Gawˇgaˆ leh Maˍgawˇgaˆ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ shehˇ shiˍ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ maˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:9 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, miˬguiˬ hkʼoˆ hkʼaˬ hpawˇ chi hpawˇ taˆ-e leh, Hkri‸ yaˇ teˇ hpaˍ ve deh kuiˬleh ha‸ ve venˇ hta‸ hoˆ taˍ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma lo aˬ miˍ ce la leh yawˇ hui hta‸ to‸ baˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:10 Yawˇ hui hta‸ heˍ yuˬ beˬ yuˬ ve neˇhaiˬ hta‸ htawˇ, aˬ miˍ leh ma‸ shiˉ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. Oˇ kaˬ lo haiˬ ve to nuˇ to shaˆ leh maˇ heˆ heˆ ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ tanˇ hkuinˇ tanˇ vanˇ fawˉ ve mehˍ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation20:11 Oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve kʼaw jaw lonˉ hta‸ leh kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ leh mvuhˇ naw ma lehˬ, yawˇ mehˆ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo hpaw-e leh, miˬguiˬ leh mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ pon chehˇ kuiˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Revelation20:12 Suh taˍ ve chaw uiˍ chaw i hkʼa peu-eˬ kʼaw jaw oˇ ve awˬ gʼuˇ suhˍ lo huˉ chehˇ taˍ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, li‸ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ hpeu‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ teˇ kʼoˆ hta‸ htawˇ hpeu‸ taˍ ve yoˬ. Suh peuˬ ve chaw hui te taˍ ve kanˉ teˇ hpaˍ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve hkʼe, li‸ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ cuˇ leh yawˇ hui hta‸ suhˉ jehˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:13 Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ lehˬ, yawˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve suh peuˬ ve chaw teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ leh Suh mvuhˇmiˬ htawˇ, yawˇ hui awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve suh peuˬ ve chaw hui hta‸ chiˇ a‸ piˇ ve yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ te taˍ ve hkʼe suhˉ jehˬ ve hta‸ gʼa hkanˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:14 Oˇ htaˇ, Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ leh Suh mvuhˇmiˬ hta‸ aˬ miˍ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ. Aˬ miˍ gʼuiˬ po oˇ ve lehˬ, nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation20:15 Co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸ awˬ hkʼaw lo awˬ meh maˇ cawˬ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, aˬ miˍ gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo baˬ keu ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:1 Oˇ htaˇ, mvuhˇ naw ma awˬ suhˉ leh miˬ guiˬ awˬ suhˉ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˉ lawˉ ve mvuhˇ naw ma leh awˉ lawˉ ve miˬguiˬ lehˬ, mehˉ kʼai peuˬ. Laˇ tsuhˇ gʼuiˬ htawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ." 
Revelation21:2 Oˇ htaˇ, da‸ kehˬ ve venˇ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ awˬ suh lehˬ, mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ Gʼuiˬsha geh lo tawˆ la leh ya‸ la chehˇ ve hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ tuˬ awˬ pon awˬ hkiˇ shawˍ taˍ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hkʼa deh‸ gu taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:3 Kʼaw jaw lo bvuhˬ jaˇ ve awˬ hkawˇ hta‸ ngaˬ gʼa kaˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkawˇ oˇ ve chi hkʼe kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve chehˇ kuiˬ chaw yaˇ hui geh cawˬ leh, yawˇ yawˇ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve chaw hpeh‸ leh, Gʼuiˬsha awˬ to yawˇ hui geh chehˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation21:4 Yawˇ lehˬ, yawˇ hui ve mehˆ gʼuiˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ shiˆ baˬ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Suh ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Dawˇ haˍ ve, paˆ hawˬ ve, naˬ ve, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ htawˇ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, awˉ lawˉ htaˇ cawˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ mehˉ kʼai peuˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:5 Kʼaw jaw hkʼoˆ lo mui shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Nyi loˬ, awˬ ceuˬ hkʼa peu-eˬ hta‸ ngaˬ awˬ suhˉ kʼaw‸ te ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. Yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hta‸ bvuh‸ taˍ-o‸. Awˬ lawn kʼo, tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:6 Peuˬ leh, yawˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Peuˬ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ leh awˬ leh meuˇ hpeh‸ leh, awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve chaw hta‸ awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ yuˬ leh gʼuiˬ tuˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˆ la ve co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ ngaˬ taw piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation21:7 Gʼaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ lehˬ, awˬ shinˉ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa caˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ yawˇ ve Gʼuiˬsha hpeh‸ leh, yawˇ ngaˬ ve yaˇ hpeh‸ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation21:8 Ya‸ hkʼaˇ, kawˆ puiˉ ve chaw, maˇ yonˍ ve chaw, cha‸ chiˆ ve chaw, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw, neˇ te ve chaw, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw leh heˍ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ lehˬ, aˬ miˍ leh ma‸ shiˉ to‸ chehˇ ve gʼuiˬ po awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa hkanˍ tuˬ yoˬ. Oˇ ve lehˬ, nyiˇ pawˆ teˇ pawˆ suh ve teˇ ceuˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:9 Oˇ htaˇ, awˬ leh meuˇ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve suhˍ ceuˬ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve mu‸ hkʼu suhˍ shiˍ hta‸ vawˆ taˍ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ suhˍ gʼaˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo teˇ gʼaˇ laˬ leh ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw leh kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Laˬ-o‸, Yawˬ ehˉ ve awˬ miˇ ma hpeh‸ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ ngaˬ nawˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:10 Yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ Awˬ ha hpu awˬ hkʼaw lo uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve hkʼaw pui lo shiˍ kʼai laˇ ve yoˬ. Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha geh lo tawˆ la leh mvuhˇ naw ma hkʼoˆ lo ya‸ la chehˇ ve da‸ kehˬ ve Yeˍruˆsaˍlehnˍ venˇ ngaˬ hta‸ yawˇ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:11 Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hkʼa biˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ gʼeuˆ ba ve lehˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hkʼe hpeh‸ leh, haˉ pui keh-oˬ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ awˬ gʼeuˆ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hta‸ ka‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:12 Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, uiˍ jaˇ mvuh jaˇ ve lanˇ venˇ cawˬ leh, lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ teˇ chi nyiˇ maˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ oˇ ve teˇ chi nyiˇ maˬ lo mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ Iˉsaˍreˍlaˆ ve yaˇ paˍ teˇ hpaˍ ve chaw teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ ve awˬ meh bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:13 Mvuhˇ nyi tawˆ hpawˇ lo yehˬ miˉ sheh lehˇ, awˬ na hpawˇ lo yehˬ miˉ sheh lehˇ, awˬ hawˉ hpawˇ lo yehˬ miˉ sheh lehˇ leh, mvuhˇ nyi kʼehˬ hpawˇ lo yehˬ miˉ sheh lehˇ cawˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:14 Lanˇ venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ kawˍ taˍ ve haˉ pui teˇ chi nyiˇ shiˍ cawˬ leh, oˇ ve teˇ hpaˍ awˬ hkʼoˆ hta‸ Yawˬ ehˉ ve tcuh yaˇ teˇ chi nyiˇ gʼaˇ ve awˬ meh bvuh‸ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:15 Ngaˬ hta‸ tawˇ yaw laˇ shehˍ hpaˇ lehˬ, venˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, lanˇ venˇ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, tehˆ nyi tuˬ, shi lo taˬ cawˬ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:16 Venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˇ ceˍ cawˬ leh, zuhˬ hpawˇ kʼehˬ hpawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Chaw oˇ ve lehˬ, yawˇ ve lo taˬ hta‸ yehˇ leh, venˇ hta‸ tehˆ nyi ve teˇ yanˇ, teˇ meunˍ nyiˇ hinˉ hpaˍlonˍ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Zuhˬ hpawˇ kʼehˬ hpawˇ, mvuh hpawˇ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:17 Peuˬ leh lanˇ venˇ hta‸ yawˇ tehˆ nyi leh, chaw yaˇ ve la‸ jaˆ hta‸ shawˍ kʼo, teˇ ha awˇ chi awˇ jaˆ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Chaw yaˇ ve la‸ jaˆ leh mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ ve la‸ jaˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:18 Lanˇ venˇ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ kawˍ taˍ ve yoˬ. Venˇ lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve shi hpeh‸ leh, mehˆ gʼeuˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ kehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:19 Lanˇ venˇ awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ teˇ hpaˍ nyi sha tuˬ, awˬ hpfuhˇ hkʼaˆ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ teˇ ceuˬ le le hta‸ yuˬ leh te taˍ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ laiˉ ceuˬ cawˬ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, naw hpui ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Sheh lehˇ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, hpuˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˍ lehˇ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, naw naˆ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:20 Ngaˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, ga‸-ehˍ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hkaw‸ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, nyiˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Suhˍ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, shi nyi ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Hiˉ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, naw shi ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Kʼawˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, shiˉ-ehˍ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Teˇ chi maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, shi naw ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Teˇ chi teˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, nyi hpui ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Teˇ chi nyiˇ maˬ teˇ maˬ lehˬ, nyi naˆ ve haˉ pui shehnˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:21 Lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ teˇ chi nyiˇ maˬ lehˬ, piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ teˇ chi nyiˇ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Yehˬ miˉ teˇ maˬ le le lehˬ, piˉ ko-eˍ shehnˉ teˇ shiˍ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo cawˬ ve ya‸ kʼaw lonˉ lehˬ, da‸ jaˇ ve shi hpeh‸ leh, mehˆ gʼeuˆ hkʼa shuˍ shuˍ kehˬ da‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:22 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon yehˬ lonˉ hta‸ ngaˬ maˇ mawˬ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, kanˇ paˆ uiˍ jaˇ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha leh Yawˬ ehˉ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo bon yehˬ lonˉ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:23 Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo mvuhˇ nyi leh ha pa awˬ gʼeuˆ ba tuˬ maˇ loˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Gʼuiˬsha ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ leh, Yawˬ ehˉ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ pon kawˆ faiˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation21:24 Chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, awˬ gʼeuˆ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo toˇ kʼai tuˬ yoˬ. Miˬguiˬ ve hkunˉ hawˉ hkanˇ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a shu yawˇ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ hta‸ yuˬ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation21:25 Venˇ oˇ ve yehˬ miˉ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ mvuhˇ law‸ kʼaw htaˇ hkʼaˬ htaˆ ka‸ maˇ hoˆ. Oˇ kaˬ lo mvuhˇ hpeu‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ htawˇ maˇ cawˬ. 
Revelation21:26 Chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve awˬ me‸ awˬ hponˇ teˇ ceuˬ leh yawˆ yan ve teˇ ceuˬ venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ hui yuˬ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. 
Revelation21:27 Cha‸ chiˆ ve hkʼaˬ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼoˆ, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te ve chaw leh, heˍ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo a ciˉ ka‸ maˇ gʼa lo‸-e. Yawˬ ehˉ ve co ti‸ ha ti‸ li‸" 
Revelation22:1 Oˇ htaˇ, Gʼuiˬsha leh Yawˬ ehˉ ve kʼaw jaw lo tawˆ la leh venˇ oˇ ve ya‸ kʼaw lonˉ awˬ kʼaw ji lo yoˬ ya‸ kʼai chehˇ ve, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ lawˬ yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve yoˬ. Iˉ kaˆ oˇ ve lehˬ, kehˬ da‸ jaˇ ve haˉ pui keh-oˬ hta‸ shuˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:2 Iˉ kaˆ lawˬ oˇ ve nyiˇ hpawˇ hpawˇ lo co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ shiˍ cehˬ cawˬ ve yoˬ. Iˉ shiˍ cehˬ oˇ ve lehˬ, awˬ shiˍ teˇ chi nyiˇ ceuˬ naw‸ leh, ha pa teˇ maˬ le le awˬ shiˍ naw‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hpa‸ teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, chaw ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ ve naˬ ve gawˬ ve hta‸ na-e la piˇ tuˬ awˬ pon yoˬ." 
Revelation22:3 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, teˇ ceuˬ ka‸ hkeu ve hta‸ maˇ gʼa hkanˍ. Venˇ oˇ ve awˬ hkʼaw lo Gʼuiˬsha leh Yawˬ ehˉ ve kʼaw jaw cawˬ leh, yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:4 Yawˇ hui lehˬ, yawˇ ve mehˆ hpfuhˇ hta‸ gʼa mawˬ leh, yawˇ hui ve naˍ kʼaˍ pui lo yawˇ ve awˬ meh cawˬ taˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:5 Awˬ hkʼaw‸ nawˉ kʼo, mvuhˇ hpeu‸ ve teˇ ceuˬ maˇ kʼaw‸ cawˬ. Kawˆ faiˇ awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, mvuhˇ nyi awˬ gʼeuˆ hta‸ maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui maˇ loˍ. Awˬ lawn kʼo, Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ, yawˇ hui hta‸ awˬ gʼeuˆ ba piˇ tuˬ yoˬ. Yawˇ hui lehˬ, co co taiˍ taiˍ gʼa uˉ peunˍ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:6 Mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ pawˆ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ ve, Tawˇ hkawˇ chi teˇ hpaˍ lehˬ, ka ti‸ yeˬ leh hteˇ ve cawˇ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui ve nyi ma hta‸ uˉ peunˍ ve Jawˇmawˇ Gʼuiˬsha lehˬ maˇ maw maw hpeh‸ la tuˬ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ yawˇ ve awˬ ceˬ teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ maˍ piˇ tuˬ, yawˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ peu laˇ peuˬ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:7 Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ haˆ haˆ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:8 Ngaˬ awˬ to Yoˇhanˬ lehˬ, awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ ve yoˬ. Chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ gʼa mawˬ peuˬ hkaw‸ nawˉ, ngaˬ hta‸ maˍ laˇ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ teˇ gʼaˇ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui tuˬ, yawˇ ve hkui paˇ lo ngaˬ boˆ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:9 Yawˇ kʼoˆ ve, Chi hkʼe taˇ te. Ngaˬ htawˇ nawˬ geh teˇ geh awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Nawˬ ve awˬ viˉ awˬ nyi hpeh‸ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ na yuˬ leh te ve chaw hui geh maˇ kʼoˆ, yawˇ hui geh teˇ geh htawˇ ngaˬ awˬ ceˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Gʼuiˬsha hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui-o teh‸, ngaˬ hta‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:10 Peuˬ leh yawˇ ngaˬ hta‸ kʼaw‸ kʼoˆ laˇ ve, Li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ yinˉ taˇ tcuhˉ." 
Revelation22:11 Maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve chaw lehˬ, maˇ hteˇ maˇ cawˇ ve hta‸ te piˇ sheˍ. Cha‸ chiˆ ve chaw lehˬ, cha‸ chiˆ ve hta‸ te piˇ sheˍ. Hteˇ ve cawˇ ve chaw lehˬ, hteˇ ve cawˇ ve hta‸ te piˇ sheˍ. Da‸ kehˬ ve chaw lehˬ, da‸ kehˬ ve hta‸ te piˇ sheˍ." 
Revelation22:12 Nyi loˬ, ngaˬ haˆ haˆ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ. Chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le, a shu yawˇ te taˍ ve hta‸ keunˍ da‸ ve hkʼe piˇ tuˬ, la‸ shawnˍ hta‸ ngaˬ yuˬ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:13 Ngaˬ lehˬ Aˍlaˍhpaˆ leh Awˇmeˍgaˆ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ hkuiˉ puiˍ leh awˬ leh meuˇ htawˇ ngaˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˉ lawˉ peuˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸, awˬ leh meuˇ ve awˬ ceuˬ ka‸ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:14 Co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ shiˍ cehˬ lo laˬ tuˬ a hkaw-anˬ gʼa tuˬ leh, lanˇ venˇ yehˬ miˉ awˬ hkʼaw lo gʼa lo‸-e tuˬ awˬ pon, a shu yawˇ ve aˉ po‸ zuhˬ ma hta‸ tsuhˇ baˬ ve chaw lehˬ, awˬ bon uiˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:15 Awˬ baˬ hpawˇ lo lehˬ, hpuiˇ hkʼe ve chaw, neˇ te ve chaw, haˉ chawˇ haˉ paˆ te ve chaw, shu hta‸ tiˇ pehˍ ve chaw, shaˉ ho‸ hta‸ oˉ kʼoˍ pui ve chaw leh, heˍ ve hta‸ tiˉ te gaˇ leh heˍ chehˇ ve chaw hkʼa peu-eˬ chehˇ taˍ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:16 Ngaˬ Yeˍsuˆ lehˬ, Hkri‸ yaˇ awˬ moˍ teˇ hpaˍ awˬ pon awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ nawˬ hui hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ tuˬ, ngaˬ ve mvuhˇ naw ma tcuh yaˇ hta‸ peu laˇ ve yoˬ. Ngaˬ lehˬ, Daˍviˆ ve awˬ geu leh awˬ ceuˬ awˬ hkʼaˇ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ. Awˬ gʼeuˆ ba hehnˇ jaˇ ve peuˬ tawˆ htawˇ ngaˬ hpeh‸ ve yoˬ." 
Revelation22:17 Awˬ ha hpu leh awˬ hpawˇ heuˆ tuˬ ve yaˇ miˇ haˉ kʼoˆ ve, Laˬ-o‸. Gʼa kaˇ ve chaw htawˇ, Laˬ-o‸ teh‸ shu hta‸ kʼoˆ piˇ-oˆ. Iˉ kaˆ shiˉ ve chaw laˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸. Dawˬ gaˇ ve chaw hkʼaˬ ve teˇ gʼaˇ maˇ kʼoˆ, awˬ hpfuhˇ maˇ piˇ leh co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ kaˆ hta‸ dawˬ piˇ lawˬ-o‸." 
Revelation22:18 Li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ hta‸ gʼa kaˇ ve chaw teˇ gʼaˇ le le hta‸ ngaˬ chi hkʼe shaˍ ti‸ pe‸ laˇ ve yoˬ. Awˬ ceuˬ chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ htehˍ piˇ ve kʼo, li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve fawˉ mehˍ ve teˇ hpaˍ Gʼuiˬsha yawˇ hta‸ kʼaw‸ htehˍ piˇ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:19 Gʼuiˬsha ve tcuh kaˍ paˍ ve tawˇ hkawˇ bvuh‸ taˍ ve li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo tawˇ hkawˇ teˇ hpaˍ hpaˍ hta‸ chaw teˇ gʼaˇ gʼaˇ yuˬ baˬ ve kʼo, li‸ chi awˬ hkʼaw lo bvuh‸ taˍ ve awˬ ceuˬ teˇ hpaˍ, co ha te‸ piˇ lawˬ ve iˉ shiˍ cehˬ leh da‸ kehˬ ve venˇ awˬ hkʼaw lo yawˇ gʼa tuˬ ve teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ Gʼuiˬsha yuˬ baˬ tuˬ yoˬ." 
Revelation22:20 Awˬ lawn chi teˇ hpaˍ hta‸ shaˉ hkiˆ hkanˍ shehˍ hpaˇ kʼoˆ ve, Awˬ tehˬ awˬ na ngaˬ haˆ haˆ laˬ tuˬ yoˬ teh‸ kʼoˆ ve yoˬ. A menˬ, Jawˇmawˇ Yeˍsuˆ-oˬ, laˬ-o‸."
